pati kṛtyeṣu syāt viśeṣa abhiyoginī na praśaṃsām sapatnīṣu niṃdām ca api tathā ātmani asūyām bhartuḥ īrṣyām vā praṇayam vā api darśayet yat asyāḥ yuṣmataḥ yāyāt bhāryā śabda abhidheya tām na ca nirbhūṣaṇā tiṣṭhet na ca api uddhata bhūṣaṇā na anyadā gaṃdha mālya ādi grāhyam pati upacārataḥ tad nyūnam sarvaśas grāhyam vallabhāyāḥ viśeṣataḥ bhūṣaṇam gandha mālyam tu tāvatkālam alakṣitam sambādhānām pradeśānām nityam sveda ādi mārjanam danta nāsā ādi paṅkānām vigandhasya ca śodhanam na anena vā tayoḥ yatnam vidadhyāt aṅga mārjane sarvāsām ca sapatnīnām sarvatra anugatā bhavet vaitasīm vṛttim āsthāya vallabhāyāḥ viśeṣataḥ kośa vastra anna tāmbūla gandha apāna auṣadha ādikam abhyaṅga udvartanam snānam bhojanam maṇḍanāni ca kuryāt bhartuḥ apatyānām dhātrī karmāṇi sādaram svena api amīṣām vittena vidadhyāt maṇḍana ādikam ubhaya yogaḥ tu vā mā vā karma jaḥ pṛthak eva saḥ sat vṛtte tu adhikām khyātim kurvīta kriyayā punar na kā api durbhagā nāma subhagā nāma jātitaḥ bhartṛ citta aparijñānāt ananuṣṭhānataḥ api vā prānukūlyāt manaḥ vṛttaiḥ paraḥ api priya tām vrajet prātikūlyāt nija upya āśu priyaḥ pradveṣa tām iyāt priyam samācaret nityam tad citā anuvidhāyinī yām anyām kāmayet tāsām tam tayā saṃprayojayet kupitām ca priyām kāñcid yatnāt asmai prasādayet tad pāda paricaryāyām gotra saṃvāhane tathā pīḍane śirasaḥ ca eva param kauśalam abhyaset pīḍanam mṛdu madhyam ca gātra avasthā viśeṣataḥ bāhu ūru kaṭi pṛṣṭheṣu skaṃdhe śirasi pādayoḥ nirmāṃseṣu pradeśeṣu nābhimūleṣu marmasu hṛd gaṇḍaka kapola ādau icchanti mṛdu mardanam viruddham sarva gātreṣu loma vastu viśeṣataḥ sa uddharṣam sneha akteṣu ca sparśāt romāñca jananam sa nakha churitam śanais pulaka ullekhana upetam śiraḥ kaṃḍūḥ ca pārśvayoḥ teṣu teṣu ca gātreṣu tat prayojyam tathā tathā nidrā gamāya tad kāle rāga saṃdhukṣaṇāya ca tiṣṭhataḥ ca upaviṣṭasya jāgrataḥ svapataḥ api vā saṃvāhanam praśaṃsaṃti yat atyartham sukha āvaham naiṣpandyam pulaka udbhedaḥ gātrāṇām akṣi mīlanam tad pradeśa arpaṇam kiñcid bodhet vikṛti darśanam ūrū mūla ādideśe ca tad pāṇi pratipīḍanam evam eva yathā uddiṣṭam strī vṛttam yā anutiṣṭhati iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi strī dharma varṇanam nāma paṃcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti uktvā bhagavān brahmā strī lakṣaṇam aśeṣatas sat vṛttam ca tathā strīṇām jagāma sa nija ālayam ṛṣayaḥ ca tathā jagmuḥ svāni dhiṣṇyāni aśeṣatas strī lakṣaṇam tathā vṛttam śrutvā kṛtsnam mahīpate ittham lakṣaṇa sampannām bhāryām prāpya mahīpate pañcayajña vidhānam tu paktim kuryāt sadā gṛhī kaṇḍanī peṣaṇī cullī udakumbhīḥ pramārjanī āsām krameṇa sarvāsām viśuddhi artham manīṣibhiḥ pañca uddiṣṭāḥ mahā yajñāḥ pratyaham gṛhamedhinām adhyāpanam brahmayajñaḥ pitṛ yajñaḥ ca tarpaṇam pañca etāni yaḥ mahāyajñān na hāpayati śaktitas devatā atithi bhṛtyānām pitṛrṇām ātmanaḥ ca yaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca yasya na asti gṛhe tu agniḥ sa mṛtaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ na sa pūjayitum śaktaḥ deva ādīn brāhmaṇa uttamaḥ prītāḥ syuḥ śāntaye tasya param kautūhalam mama sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi rāja indra śrūyatām paramam vacaḥ anagnayaḥ tu ye viprāḥ teṣām śreyaḥ abhidhīyate vrata upavāsa niyamaiḥ nānā dānaiḥ tathā nṛpa deva ādayaḥ bhavanti eva prītāḥ teṣām na saṃśayaḥ prītāḥ deva ādayaḥ teṣām bhavanti kuru nandana śatānīkaḥ uvāca bhagavan tvam tithīn brūhi tithīnām ca vidhim hi me prāśanam gṛhya dharmān ca upavāsa vidhīn api saṃsārāt ca api vipra indra śreyase jagataḥ tathā śṛṇu kaurava karmāṇi tithi guhya āśritāni tu śrutāni ghnanti pāpāni upoṣita phalāni ca pratipadi kṣīraprāśanam dvitīyāyām lavaṇa varjanam tṛtīyāyām tila annam prāśnīyāt caturthyām kṣīra aśanaḥ ca pañcamyām phala aśanaḥ sadā ṣaṣṭhyām śāka aśanaḥ saptamyām bilva āhāraḥ uṣṭamyām tu piṣṭa aśanaḥ navamyām anagni pāka āhāraḥ daśamyām ekādaśyām ghṛta āhāraḥ dvādaśyām pāyasa āhāraḥ trayodaśyām go mūtra āhāraḥ caturdaśyām yava anna āhāraḥ kuśa udaka prāśanaḥ paurṇamāsyām haviṣya āhāraḥ amāvāsyāyām sa uśvamedha rājasūyānām śataguṇam avāpnoti tathā aṣṭa māsa pāraṇe rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām sahasraguṇa phalam avāpnoti yaḥ evam niyamān rājan āśvayuja navamyām māgha māsasya saptamyām vaiśākha tṛtīyāyām kārtika paurṇamāsyām tithi vratāni gṛdṛṇāti brahmacārī gṛhasthaḥ vanasthaḥ nārī naraḥ vā śūdraḥ prayata mānasaḥ dīrgha āyuṣyam savituḥ sālokyam vrajati yaiḥ ca api purā rājan anena vidhinā etāsu tithiṣu anya janmāntare upavāsa vidhiḥ kṛtaḥ dānāni dattāni vividha prakārāṇi brāhmaṇānām tapasvi janeṣu vā tri rātra upavāsinām tīrtha yātrā tapaḥ guru mātā pitṛ śuśrūśā niratānām teṣām svarga ādi bhoga vāsanāt iha āgatānām phala niṣpatti cihnāni manuṣya loke pratyakṣatas eva dṛśyante hasti aśva yāna yugya dhana ratna kanaka hiraṇya kaṭaka keyūra graiveyaka kaṭisūtra karṇa alaṅkāra mukuṭa vara vastra vara nārī vara vilepana surūpa guṇa dīrgha āyuṣaḥ vigata adhi vyādhayaḥ dāna upavāsa ratānām phalāni etāni nṛtya gīta vāditra maṅgala pāṭhaka śabdaiḥ iha adya api puṇya kṛtaḥ bodhyamānāḥ dṛśyante iti tathā kṛta upavāsāḥ api hi dṛśyante tathā a datta dānāḥ a kṛta puṇyāḥ ca pratyakṣataḥ eva dṛśyante tat yathā kāṇa kuṣṭhi badhira jaḍa mūka vyaṅgāḥ roga dāridrya upasarga vyādhi hata āyuṣaḥ ca dṛśyaṃte adya api mānavāḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca rahasyam yat tithīnām tu devānām ca viceṣṭitam yāni iṣṭāni ca devānām bhojyāni niyamāḥ tathā devatānām rahasyāni vratāni niyamāḥ tathā tān śṛṇuṣva mahā bāho gadataḥ mama nārada sṛṣṭim pūrvam vadiṣyāmi saṃkṣepeṇa tithim prati jagadbrahmā samāgatya asṛjat ātmānam ātmanā saṃbhūta ātmā eva ātmā asau aṇḍa madhyāt viniḥsṛtaḥ ātmanā eva ātmanaḥ hi aṇḍam sṛṣṭvā sa vibhuḥ āditas brahmā nārāyaṇa ākhyaḥ asau sṛṣṭim kartum samudyataḥ tābhyām sa uṇḍa kapālābhyām divam bhūmim ca nirmame diśaḥ ca eva upadiśaḥ ca eva deva ādīn dānavān tathā tithim pūrvām imām rājan cakāra atha vibhuḥ svayam tithīnām pravarā yasmāt brahmaṇā samudāhṛtā asmāt padāt tu tithayaḥ yasmāt tu anyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ kārttikyām māgha saptamyām vaiśākhasya yuga ādiṣu yadā tu pratipadyām vai gṛhṇīyāt niyamam nṛpa caturdaśyām kṛta āhāraḥ saṃkalpam parikalpayet amāvāsyām na bhuñjīta tri kālam snānam ācaret pavitraḥ hi japet nityam gāyatrīm śirasā saha śaktyā kṣīram pradadyāt tu brahmā me prīyatām prabhuḥ tatas bhuñjīta go kṣīram anena vidhinā nṛpa eṣaḥ eva vidhiḥ dṛṣṭaḥ sarvāsu tithiṣu nṛpa vimukta pāpaḥ śuddha ātmā divya dehasya dehinaḥ brahmā dadāti saṃtuṣṭaḥ vimānam ati tejasam veda vedāṃga vidyaḥ ca dīrgha āyuḥ ca eva su prabhaḥ viśvāmitraḥ tu rāja indra brāhmaṇa tva jigīṣayā tapaḥ cacāra vipulam santāpāya divaukasām tatas tu niyamāt teṣām tithīnām pravarā tithiḥ upoṣitāḥ bahuvidhāḥ jñātvā brahma priyām tithim tithīnām pravarā hi eṣā tithīnām uttamā tithiḥ kṣatriyaḥ vaiśya śūdrau vā brāhmaṇa tvam avāpnuyuḥ evam tithiḥ iyam rājan kāma dā kañjaja priyā haihayaiḥ tālajaṅghaiḥ ca turuṣkaiḥ yavanaiḥ śakaiḥ upoṣitāḥ iha atrā eva brāhmaṇa tvam abhīpsubhiḥ iti eṣā paramā puṇyā śivā pāpa harā tathā paṭhita upāsitā rājan śraddhayā ca śrutā tathā māhātmyam ca api yaḥ pī asyāḥ śṛṇuyāt mānavaḥ nṛpa ṛddhim vṛddhim tathā kīrtim śivam divam vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pratipad kalpa varṇanam nāma ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ pratipad kalpa viṣaye brahmaṇaḥ pūjā śatānīkaḥ uvāca śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ rājan kathayāmi eṣa śānti dam pūrvam ekārṇave ghore naṣṭe sthāvara jaṅgame sasarja lokān devān ca bhūtāni vividhāni ca kāyena manasā vācā jaṅgama sthāvarāṇi ca pitā yaḥ sarva devānām bhūtānām ca pitāmahaḥ tasmāt eṣa sadā pūjyaḥ yatas lokaguruḥ paraḥ sṛjati eṣa jagat kṛtsnam pāti saṃharate tathā śatānīkaḥ uvāca sumantuḥ uvāca śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ rājan kathayāmi eṣa śāṃti dam pūrvam ekārṇave ghore naṣṭe sthāvara jaṃgame svayaṃbhūḥ abhavat devaḥ surajyeṣṭhaḥ caturmukhaḥ sasarja lokān devān ca bhūtāni vividhāni ca kāyena manasā vācā jaṃgama sthāvarāṇi ca pitā yaḥ sarva devānām bhūtānām ca pitāmahaḥ tasmāt eṣa sadā pūjyaḥ yatas loka guruḥ paraḥ sṛjati eṣa jagat kṛtsnam pāti saṃharate tathā mukhebhyaḥ caturaḥ vedāḥ vedāṃgāni ca kṛtsnaśas deva apsarasa gaṃdharvāḥ sa yakṣa uraga rākṣasāḥ pūjayaṃti sadā vīra viriṃcim sura nāyakam sa nāka rājya mokṣeṣu kṣipram bhavati bhājanam tasmāt saumya manāḥ bhūtvā yāvajjīvam pratijñayā manuṣya carmaṇā naddhaḥ sa vedhāḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ iti vijñāya yatnena pūjanī yaḥ sadā vidhiḥ yaḥ brahmāṇam dveṣṭi mohāt sarva deva namaskṛtam naraḥ naraka gāmī syāt tasya saṃbhāṣaṇāt api brahmaṇā ūrcām pratiṣṭhāpya sarva yatnaiḥ vidhānataḥ yat puṇyam phalam āpnoti tat ekāgra manāḥ śṛṇu tad phalam koṭi guṇitam labhet vedhaḥ pratiṣṭhayā kañjajam sthāpayet yaḥ tu kṛtvā śālām manoramām puṇyam koṭi koṭi guṇam labhet mātṛ jān pitṛ jān ca eva yām ca eva udvahate striyam atha vā rājyam ākāṃkṣet jāyate saṃbhava aṃtare trisaṃdhyam yaḥ japet brahma kṛtvā aṣṭadala paṃkajam paurṇamāsyām pratipadi tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu pāpa hā sarva martyānām darśanāt sparśanāt api uddhṛtya divi saṃsthāpya kulānām ekaviṃśatim puṇya kṣayāt kṣitim prāpya bhavet kṣitipatiḥ mahān veda vedāṃga tattva jñaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ ca api jāyate mṛd dāru eṣṭaka śailaiḥ vā yaḥ kuryāt brahmaṇaḥ gṛham mṛd mayāt koṭi guṇitam phalam dāru iṣṭakā maye iṣṭakā dviguṇa puṇyam kṛte śaila maye gṛhe krīḍamānaḥ upi yaḥ kuryāt śālām vai brahmaṇaḥ nṛpa puṣpa mālā parikṣiptam kiṃkiṇī jāla bhūṣitam dolā vikṣepa saṃpannam ghaṃṭā cāmara bhūṣitam muktā dāma vitānena śobhitam sūrya su prabham apsaraḥ gaṇa saṃkīrṇam sarva kāma sukha pradam tatra uṣitvā mahā bhogī krīḍamānaḥ sadā suraiḥ paśyan pariharan jantūn mṛdu pūrvam mahīpate śanais saṃmārjanam kurvan cāndrāyaṇa phalam vrajet paśyan pariharan jatūn cāṃdrāyaṇa phalam labhet nairaṃtaryeṇa yaḥ kuryāt pakṣam saṃmārjana arcanam yuga koṭi śatam sāgram brahma loke mahīyate tasya aṃte sa catur vedaḥ surūpaḥ priya darśanaḥ āḍhyaḥ sarva guṇa upetaḥ rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ kapaṭena api yaḥ kuryāt brahmaśālām su mānada tāvat dhamaṃti saṃsāre duḥkha śoka bhaya plutāḥ na bhavanti suraśreṣṭhe yāvat raktāḥ mahīpate khaṇḍa sphuṭita saṃskāram śālāyām yaḥ karoti vai na asti brahma samam jñānam na asti vedhaḥ samam tapaḥ parva kāleṣu puṇye paurṇamāsyām viśeṣataḥ śaṃkha bherī ādi nirghoṣaiḥ mahā bhigeṃya saṃyutaiḥ kuryāt nīrājanam deve surajyeṣṭhe caturmukhe yāvat parvāṇi vidhinā kuryāt nīrājanam nṛpa snāna kāle trisaṃdhyam tu yaḥ kuryāt nṛtya vādanam gītam vā mukhavādyam vā tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu snāpayet maṃtra pūtena brāhmam snānam hi tat smṛtam snānam śataguṇam jñeyam itareṣām narādhipa deva agni kāryam uddiśya kapilām āharet sadā brahma kṣatra viśaḥ ca eva na śūdraḥ tu kadācana sura jyeṣṭha ghṛta abhyaṃgāt dahet sarvam na saṃśayaḥ ghṛta snānam pratipadi sakṛt kṛtvā tu kāṃja jam kula ekaviṃśam uttārya viṣṇu loke mahī yate ayutam yaḥ gavām dadyāt bhaktyā vai vedapārage vastra hema ādi yuktānām kṣīra snānena yat phalam snāpya dadhnā sakṛt vīra kañja jam viṣṇum āpnuyāt sa sarvakālam tṛpta ātmā loka vaśya tvam ā pnuyāt pāṭalā utpala padmāni karavīrāṇi sarvadā snāna kāle prayojyāni sthirāṇi surabhīṇi ca eṣām ekatamam snānam bhaktyā kṛtvā tu vedhasi gāyatrī śata japtena vimalena aṃbhasā vibhum vibhum śīta aṃbunā snāpya dhāroṣṇa payasā tatas tatas paścāt ghṛta snānam kṛtvā pāpaiḥ vimucyate etat snāna trayam kṛtvā pūjayitvā tu bhaktitaḥ mṛd kuṃbhaiḥ tāmra jaiḥ kuṃbhaiḥ snānam śataguṇam bhavet raupye lakṣa uttaram proktam haimaiḥ koṭi guṇam bhavet brahmaṇaḥ darśanam puṇyam darśanāt sparśanam param sparśanāt arcanam śreṣṭham ghṛta snātam atas param vācikam mānasam pāpam ghṛta snānena dehinām kṣiṇute padmajaḥ yasmāt tasmāt snānam samācaret śuci vastra dharaḥ snātaḥ kṛta nyāsaḥ ca bhārata akṣaram vihitam ca anyat patra bhāge prakīrtitam kṛṣṇotkaṭam tu madhyam syāt pīta raktam tathā param prabhā kuṇḍalakaiḥ bāhyaiḥ veṣṭayet cakranāyakam mūrdhnaḥ pāda talam yāvat praṇavam vinyaset budhaḥ nāda rūpam nyaset tāvat yāvat śabdasya śūnyatā tatkāram vinyaset mūrdhni sakāram mukha maṇḍale vikāram kaṇṭha deśe tu tukāram sarva saṃdhiṣu vakāram hṛdi madhye tu rekāram pārśvayoḥ dvayoḥ ṇakāram dakṣiṇe kukṣau yakāram vāma saṃjñake bhakāram kaṭi nābhi stham r gokāram jānu parvasu dekāram jaṃghayoḥ nyasya vakāram pāda padmayoḥ syakāram aṃguṣṭhayoḥ nyasya dhīkāram ca urasi nyaset makāram jānu deśe tu hikāram guhyam āśritam dhikāram hṛdaye nyasya yokāram ca oṣṭhayoḥ nyaset nakāram nāsikā agre tu prakāram netram āśritam cokāram tu bhuvoḥ madhye dakāram prāṇam āśritam yākāram vinyaset mūrdhni takāram keśam āśritam nyāsam kṛtvā ātmanaḥ dehe deve kuryāt tathā nṛpa sarva upacāra saṃpannam kṛtvā samyak nirīkṣayet āsane pṛthivī jñeyā sarva sattva dharā matā hrasva uṃkāre matā sā tu dīrgha uṃkāre tu devarāj plutaḥ tu vyāpayet bhāvam mokṣa dam ca amṛta ātmakam yatna sthaḥ na nivarteta yogī prāṇa parāyaṇaḥ āvāhanam tatas kuryāt akṣareṇa pareṇa tu āvāhya tejaḥ rūpam tu nyaset mantra varān tatas sraṣṭāram sarva jagatām viṣṇu rudra vidhāna gam saṃbhāvya gandha puṣpa ādi saṃbhārān kramāt sarvān prakalpayet puṣpam dhūpam tathā dīpam naivedyam su manoharam khaṃḍa laḍḍuka śrīveṣṭaka āsāra aśoka vartikāḥ phalāni ca eva pakvāni lagna khaṇḍa guḍāni ca anyān ca vividhān dadyāt pūpāni vividhāni ca evamādīni sarvāṇi dāpayet a śaktitas prāṇāyāma trayam kṛtvā deha saṃśodhanāya vai āvāhayet tatas nantam dhārayantam vacaḥ sadā ṛgvedam tu yajurvedam sāmavedam ca pūjayet jñāna vairāgyam aiśvaryam dharmam saṃpūjayet budhaḥ īśāna ādi kramāt rājan vidiśāsu samaṃtataḥ śikṣā kalpaḥ vyākaraṇam niruktam chandaḥ eva ca jyotiṣam ca mahā bāho upavedāḥ ca kṛtsnaśas itihāsa purāṇāni yathāyogyam yathākramam śikṣā kalpaḥ vyākaraṇam devasya puratas sadā kalpa ādayaḥ tatas ca anye diśāsu vidiśāsu ca mahāvyāhṛtayaḥ sarvāḥ praṇavena samanvitāḥ śaktayaḥ brahmaṇaḥ tu etāḥ loka rūpāḥ vyavasthitāḥ pūjanīyāḥ prayatnena maṃtra rūpāḥ sthitāḥ svayam araka antara saṃsthān ca ṣaṭ samudrān samarcayet nakṣatrāṇi grahāḥ ca eva rāśayaḥ ca viśeṣataḥ pūjyāḥ sarve yathānyāyam surā agreṣu vyavasthitāḥ nāgāḥ ca garuḍaḥ ca eva pūjanīyaḥ tathā agratas devatāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ca eva sahitāḥ kulaparvatāḥ tad tejaḥ nilayāḥ sarve pūjanīyāḥ prayatnataḥ ācamya vidhivat pūrvam maṃtra pūtena vāriṇā hṛdaya ādīn nyaset aṃgān hṛdaya ādiṣu kṛtsnaśas maheṃdra ādi diśaḥ ca etāḥ pūjayet vidhivat nṛpa hṛdayam puratas pūjyam śiraḥ devasya pṛṣṭhatas pūrvam saṃpūjayet devam mūlamaṃtreṇa kṛtsnaśas aṃkuśam nara śārdūla hi āhvāne kaṃjam ādiśet upoṣya paṃcadaśyām tu sa yāti paramam padam ruvāca āpaḥ hiṣṭhā iti maṃtraḥ ayam hṛdayam parikīrtitam ṛtam satyam śikhā proktā udutyam netram ādiśet varmaṇā te chādayāmi kavacam samudāhṛtam gāyatrī mūla taṃtraḥ tu sādhakaḥ sarva karmaṇām gāyatryā pūjayet devam oṃkāreṇa abhimaṃtritam praṇavena aparān sarvān ṛgveda ādīn prapūjayet āhvāne pūjane vīra visarge brahmaṇaḥ tathā gāyatrī paramaḥ maṃtraḥ vedamātā vibhāvinī iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pratipad kalpe brahmaṇoḥ arcanavidhivarṇanam nāma saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ paurṇamāsī upavāsam tu kṛtvā bhaktyā narādhipa ṛgbhiḥ viśeṣataḥ devī viriñceḥ vāstu devatāḥ kārttike māsi devasya ratha yātrā prakīrtitā yām kṛtvā mānavaḥ bhaktyā yāti brahma salokatām kārtike māsi rāja indra paurṇamāsyām caturmukham mārgeṇa carmaṇā sārdham sāvitryā ca parantapa bhrāmayet nagaram sarvam nānā vādyaiḥ samanvitam sthāpayet bhrāmayitvā tu sa lokam nagaram nṛpa brāhmaṇam bhojayitya agre śāṃḍileyam prapūjya ca ratha agre śāṃḍilīputram pūjayitvā vidhānataḥ bāhmaṇān vācayitvā ca kṛtvā puṇya aha maṃgalam nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakaiḥ brahmaghoṣaiḥ ca puṣkalaiḥ kṛtvā prajāgaram hi evam prabhāte brāhmaṇam nṛpa bhojayitvā yathāśaktyā bhakṣya bhojyaiḥ anekaśas pūjayitvā janam vīra vajreṇa vidhivat nṛpa bījena ca mahā bāho payasā pāyasena ca brāhmaṇān vācayitvā ca chāṃdena vidhinā nṛpa kṛtvā puṇyāha śabdam ca ratham ca bhrāmayet pure bahvṛca ātharvaṇa uccāraiḥ chandoga adhvaryubhiḥ tathā pradakṣiṇam puram sarvam mārgeṇa su samena tu na voḍhavyaḥ rathaḥ vīra śūdreṇa śubham icchatā na āruheta ratham prājñaḥ muktvā ekam bhojakam nṛpa brahmaṇaḥ dakṣiṇe pārśve sāvitrīm sthāpayet nṛpa bhojakaḥ vāma pārśve tu puratas kañjajam nyaset evam tūrya ninādaiḥ tu śaṃkha śabdaiḥ ca puṣkalaiḥ bhrāmayitvā ratham rājan puram sarvam pradakṣiṇam sva sthāne sthāpayet bhūyas kṛtvā nīrājanam budhaḥ yaḥ evam kurute yātrām bhaktyā paśyati kārtike māsi amāvāsyām yaḥ tu dīpa pradīpanam śālāyām brahmaṇaḥ kuryāt sa gacchet brahmaṇaḥ padam pratipadi brāhmaṇān ca api guḍa miśraiḥ pradīpakaiḥ tasyām pratipadāyām tu sa gacchet brahmaṇaḥ padam mahā puṇyā tithiḥ iyam bali rājya pravartinī brahmaṇaḥ su priyā nityam bāleyā parikīrtitā brāhmaṇān pūjayitvā asyām ātmānam ca viśeṣataḥ sa yāti paramam sthānam viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ caitre māsi mahā bāho puṇyā pratipadā parā tasyām yaḥ śvapacam spṛṣṭvā snānam kuryāt narottama divyam nīrājanam tat hi sarva roga vināśanam go mahiṣī ādi yat kiṃcid tat sarvam bhūṣayet nṛpa brāhmaṇānām tathā bhojyam kuryāt kuru kula udvaha snānam dānam śataguṇam kārttike yā tithiḥ nṛpa bali rājya āpti sukha dā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pratipatkalpasamāptivarṇanam nāma aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śaryāti ākhyāne puṣpa dvitīyā varṇanam dvitīyāyām tu rāja indra aśvinau soma pītinau śatānīkaḥ uvāca cyavanena hi devānām paśyatām tat vadasva me tatra śaryātiḥ āyātaḥ snātum antar puraiḥ saha tatra mūḍham janapadam apaśyat pathi ceṣṭanam viṣ mūtra utsarga saṃruddham jyotiḥ ākṣipta niṣkriyam uvāca durmanāḥ rājā amātyān svān purogamān na ca uvāca yadā kaścid tasya rājñaḥ tu pṛcchataḥ tadā sutā sukanyā asya provāca pitaram vacaḥ mayā dṛṣṭam tu yat tāta sakhibhiḥ saha kautukam tat te vacmi nibodha tvam śṛṇu tāta mahā adbhutam śiñjita ārāva bahulāḥ kāñcī nūpura mekhalāḥ gāyantyaḥ vilapantyaḥ ca kīḍantyaḥ ca atra kānane kokila dhvanim aśrauṣam vyakta avyakta akṣaram kṛśam tatra gatvā adbhutam tāta paśyāmaḥ kila pāvakau dīpau iva acala śikhau bhūyas kanyā uvāca ha yatra āste bhārgavaḥ kaṣṭam valmīka antargataḥ muniḥ sa tam provāca nṛpatim mayā jñātam narādhipa su kanyām me prayacchasva niveśa arthī hi aham nṛpa sukanyā api patim labdhvā su prītā ārādhayat tadā rājya śriyam parityajya valkala ajina dhāriṇī tapaḥ udyotita sarva aṅgīm rūpa udārya guṇa anvitām snātām sva bhāryām cyavanaḥ uvāca madhura akṣaram ehi ehi bhadre bhadram te śayanīyam samāśraya evam uktā tu sā kanyā prāñjaliḥ patim abravīt na arhasi adya su kalyāṇa saṅgamam sthaṇḍile asame pitṛ gehe yathā atiṣṭham śayanīye su saṃskṛte bahu gairika varṇa ādyaiḥ śveta pīta aruṇa ākule vastra alaṅkāra gandha āḍhyam paśyeyam yena sādaram sukanyāyāḥ vacaḥ śrutvā cyavanaḥ prāha durmanāḥ sa kadham bhūṣayāmi adya surūpaḥ ca katham vada provāca sā patim bhūyas prahasantī kṛtāñjaliḥ cyavanaḥ prāha bhāryām tām na kariṣye tapaḥ vyayam evam uktvā tapaḥ ca ugram tatāpa su ciram tadā atha tatra āgatau vīrau aśvinau kāla paryayāt dṛṣṭavantau sukanyām tau dīptyā vai devatām iva upagamya ūcatuḥ tām tau kā tvam sundari rūpiṇī kimartham iha ekā tvam tiṣṭhase kaḥ tava āśrayaḥ sā tau uvāca tanvaṅgī śaryāti duhitā hi aham ūcatuḥ ca aśvinau devau āvām viddhi nṛpa ātmaje kim kariṣyasi tena tvam jīrṇena ca kṛśena ca bhartāram anurakta aṅgī yathā svāhā vibhāvasoḥ aśvinau ūcatuḥ āyātu ca viśatu adya cyavanaḥ vaiṣṇavī jalam tatas nau madhya gam hi ekam vṛṇīṣva anyam yam icchati tau abrūtām sukanyām tu gatvā pṛccha svakam patim tam ca pṛṣṭvā punar ca atra āgaccha nau sannidhau punar āvām atra eva tiṣṭhāvaḥ yāvat āgamanam tava sā gatvā prāha bhartāram aśvinau eva sūcatuḥ rūpavantam ca bhartāram kariṣyāvaḥ yam icchasi evam astu iti tām prāha bhāryām cyavanaḥ tvaran sā tam gṛhya jagāma āśu yatra tau bhiṣajau ubhau kurutam hi aśvinau kṣipram sukanyā ca īpsitam vṛṇot tau tam saṅgṛhya gaṅgāyām praviṣṭau muninā saha muhūrtāt tu samuttiṣṭhan rūpataḥ ca śriyā vṛtāḥ udakāt utthitāḥ tasmāt sarve te sama rūpakāḥ sukanyā tu tatas dṛṣṭvā bharttāram deva rūpiṇam harṣeṇa mahatā āviṣṭā na ca tam veda bhārata sama kāyāḥ sama vayaḥ sama rūpāḥ sama śriyaḥ vastra alaṅkāra sadṛśān dṛṣṭvā cintām gatā ciram bhavadbhiḥ ātma saṃdṛśam katham tyaktvā vṛṇe param tayā sa bahu mānam tau prāñjalyā prārthitau tadā sukanyā nipuṇam tau tu su nirīkṣya ca vihvalā ayam ca sarajāḥ mlānaḥ bhūmim āśritya tiṣṭhati nimeṣam ca eva tasya evam jñātvā vai cyavanaḥ vṛtaḥ cyavane vṛte sukanyayā puṣpa vṛṣṭiḥ papāta ha bhāryā dattā kṛtam rūpam devānām api durlabham upakāram variṣṭham yaḥ na karoti upakāriṇaḥ tasmāt aham variṣṭham vai kariṣye aham amānuṣam upakāram bhavadbhyām tu prītaḥ kuryām su niścitam ājagāma āśramam puṇyam saha bhāryaḥ mudā anvitaḥ atha śuśrāva śaryātiḥ cyavanam deva rūpiṇam jagāma ca mahā tejāḥ draṣṭum muni varam vaśī tam dṛṣṭvā praṇipatya ādau pratipūjya yathārhataḥ sukanyām tu tatas dṛṣṭvā praṇipatya abhinandya ca sā tasyāḥ sasvaje premṇā ānanda aśru pariplutā saṃsthāpya tām mudā yuktaḥ nṛpatiḥ saha bhāryayā bhūyas abravīt su saṃtuṣṭam cyavanaḥ tam narādhipam saṃbhāram kuru yajña artham yājayiṣye narādhipa jagāma sva puram hṛṣṭaḥ yajña artham yatnam ācarat sa preṣyān preṣayan kṣipram yajña arthe dravyam āharat maṃtri purohita ācāryān ānayāmāsa sa tvaram samānīteṣu sarveṣu teṣu dravyeṣu bhārata ājagāma viśuddha ātmā cyavanaḥ saha bhāryayā sampūjitaḥ ca śuśrāva mahāntam tyāgam aujasam āhūtāḥ svāgatāḥ sarve bhāga artham tridiva ālayāḥ yajña bhāge pravṛtte tu śāstra uktena vidhānataḥ āhvāne kriyamāṇe tu aśvibhyām tu tadā nṛpa devānām bhiṣajau etau na bhāga arhau na daivatau mama upakāriṇau etau dadmi bhāgam na saṃśayaḥ tatas hi uvāca sa krodhaḥ sa śakraḥ cyavanam ruṣā sa stambhayitvā tu indram tu bhāgam dattvā aśvinā urvaśī samāpayāmāsa tadā yajña karma yathārthavat kañjajaḥ atha ājagāma āśu āha ca cyavanam tadā uttaṃbhyatām ayam lekhaḥ bhāgaḥ ca astu aśvinoḥ iha jānāmi śaktim tapasaḥ cyavana iha tava uttamām khyāpana artham hi tapasaḥ tava etat kṛtam mayā yaḥ tu imām tapasaḥ khyātim tvadīyām vai paṭhiṣyati śṛṇuyāt vā api śuddha ātmā tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu yauvana yuktaḥ sa krīḍāḥ tiṣṭhati iti na saṃśayaḥ evam uktvā jagāma āśu devaḥ sva bhavanam vaśī cyavanaḥ api sa bhāryaḥ vai śaya ārtiḥ ca āśramam gataḥ athā apaśyat vimāna ābham bhavanam deva nirmitam śayyā āsana varaiḥ juṣṭam sarva kāma samṛddhimat udyāna vāpibhiḥ juṣṭam devendreṇa samāhṛtam subhūṣaṇāni divyāni ratnavanti mahānti ca ca vastrāṇi divya prāvaraṇāni ca mudam paramikām lebhe śakram ca praśaśaṃsa ha evam iṣṭā tithiḥ iyam dvitīyā aśvinoḥ nṛpa deva tvam yajña bhāgam ca samprāptau iha bhārata upoṣyāḥ vidhinā yena tam śṛṇuṣva narādhipa rūpam surūpam yaḥ vāñchet dvitīyāyām narādhipa kārtike śukla pakṣasya dvitīyāyām narādhipa puṣpa āhāraḥ varṣam ekam bhavet sa niyata ātmavān kāla prāptāni yāni syuḥ haviṣyam kusumāni tu bhuñjīyāt tāni dattvā tu brāhmaṇebhyaḥ narādhipa sauvarṇa raupya puṣpāṇi atha vā jala jāni ca iha ca āgatya kalpa ante jātaḥ vipraḥ puraskṛtaḥ veda vedāṃga viduṣaḥ sapta janma antarāṇi asau jātaḥ jātaḥ bhavet vidvān brāhmaṇaḥ asau kṛte yuge dātā yajñapatiḥ vāgmī ādhi vyādhi vivarjitaḥ iti eṣā kathitā tubhyam dvitīyā puṣpa saṃjñitā phala saṃjñā tathā anyā syāt sute vai muñjakeśini suṣṭhu puṇyā pāpa harā viṣṭaraśravasaḥ priyā a śūnya śayanā loke prakhyātā kuru nandana tām upoṣya naraḥ rājan śraddhā bhakti puraskṛtaḥ ṛddhim vṛddhim śriyam vā atha bhāryayā saha modate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi dvitīyā kalpe śaryātyākhyāne puṣpadvitīyāvarṇanam nāma ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāmnyāḥ dvitīya atitheḥ mahattvam śatānīkaḥ uvāca brūhi me dvija śārdūla dvitīyām phala saṃjñitām patnyā naraḥ muni śreṣṭha bhāryā ca patinā saha tām aham śrotum icchāmi vidhavā strī na jāyate tat me brūhi dvijaśreṣṭha śreyaḥ artham nara yoṣitām a śūnyaśayanām nāma dvitīyām śṛṇu bhārata śete jagatpatiḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śriyā sārdham yadā nṛpa a śūnya śayanā nāma tadā grāhyā hi sā tithiḥ kṛṣṇa pakṣe dvitīyāyām śrāvaṇe māsi bhārata śrīvatsa dhāriṇam devam bhaktyā abhyarcya śriyā saha śrīvatsa dhārin śrīkānta śrīvatsa śrīpate avyaya gārhasthyam mā praṇāśam me yātu dharma artha kāma dam gāvaḥ ca mā praṇaśyantu mā praṇaśyantu me janāḥ jāmayaḥ mā praṇaśyantu mattaḥ dāmpatya bhedataḥ lakṣmyāḥ na śūnyam vara da yathā te śayanam sadā śayyā mama api a śūnyā astu tathā tu madhusūdana evam pramādya pūjām ca kṛtvā lakṣmyāḥ tathā hareḥ phalāni dadyāt chāyāyām abhīṣṭāni jagatpatim naktam praṇamya āyatane haviḥ bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ brāhmaṇāya dvitīye ahni śaktyā dadyāt ca dakṣiṇām śatānīkaḥ uvāca kāni tāni abhīṣṭāni keśavasya phalāni tu kim ca dānam dvitīye ahni dātavyam brāhmaṇasya tu madhurāṇi su tīvrāṇi na ca api kaṭukāni tu dātavyāni nṛpa śreṣṭha sva śaktyā śayane nṛpa yoṣit ca kuru śārdūla bhartuḥ vallabha tām iyāt tasmāt kaṭuka tīvrāṇi strī liṅgāni vivarjayet kharjūra mātuliṅgāni śvetena śirasā saha deyāni kuru śārdūla sva śaktyā muñja keśine vāsaḥ dānam tathā dhānya phala dāna samanvitam gāṅgeyasya viśeṣeṇa dhānya dānam pracakṣate evam karoti yaḥ samyak naraḥ māsa catuṣṭayam a śūnya śayanaḥ ca asau dharma kāma artha sādhanaḥ bhavati avyāhata aiśvaryaḥ puruṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ nārī ca rājan dharma jñā vratam etat yathāvidhi kharjūra mātuliṅgāni bṛhatphala śirāṃsi ca dattvā dvijebhyaḥ rāja indra madhurāṇi parāṇi ca tasmāt sva śaktyā yat tena deyāni madhurāṇi ca iti eṣā kathitā kṛṣṇa dvitīyā tithiḥ uttamā yām upoṣya naraḥ rājan ṛddhim vṛddhim tathā vrajet śatānīkaḥ uvāca aśvibhyām dvija śārdūla katham asyām janārdanaḥ sampūjyaḥ phala saṃjñāyām kathitaḥ padmayā saha a śūnya śayanā dattā viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ aśvibhyām kuru śārdūla prītaye muñjakeśinaḥ tau eva kuru śārdūla pūjyete atra mahīpate nāsatyau bhagavān viṣṇuḥ dattaḥ ca śrīḥ vibhāvyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi dvitīyā kalpa samāptau viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ tṛtīya atithi vrata māhātmyam pativratā pati prāṇā pati śuśrūṣaṇe ratā evaṃvidhā api yā proktā śuciḥ saṃśobhanā satī sa upavāsā tṛtīyām tu lavaṇam parivarjayet sā gṛhṇāti ca vai bhaktyā vratam āmaraṇāntikam gaurī dadāti santuṣṭā rūpam saubhāgyam eva ca lāvaṇyam lalitam hṛdyam ślāghyam puṃsām manoramam puṃsaḥ manoramā nārī bharttā nāryāḥ manoramaḥ idam vratam prati vibho dharmarājasya śṛṇvataḥ mayā vratam idam sṛṣṭam saubhāgya karaṇam nṛṇām yā ca kanyā na bhartāram vindate śobhanā satī sā tu idam vratam uddiśya bhavet akṣāra bhojanā gaurīm saṃsthāpya sauvarṇīm gandha alaṅkāra bhūṣitām vastra alaṅkāra saṃvītām puṣpa maṇḍala maṇḍitām lavaṇam guḍam ghṛtam tailam devyai śaktyā nivedayet kaṭukhaṇḍam jīrakam ca patraśākam ca bhārata guḍa ghṛṣṭān tathā apūpān khaḍaveṣṭān tathā nṛpa śuklapakṣe sadā deyā yathā śaktyā hiraṇmayī dhana hīne tu bhaktyā ca madhu vṛkṣa mayī nṛpa arcyā nityam saṃnidhānāt tatra gaurī na saṃśayaḥ a kṣāra lavaṇam rātrau bhuṃkte ca eva suvāgyatā gaurī sannihitā nityam bhūmau prastara śāyinī tat śṛṇuṣva mahā bāho kathyamānam mahā phalam su ciram saha vai bhartrā krīḍayitvā iha eva sā heli lokam candra lokam lokam citraśikhaṇḍinaḥ vidhavā tu yadā rājan devyāḥ vrata parāyaṇā bharttāram niyatā nityam sadā arcana parāyaṇā iha ca utsṛjya deham svam dṛṣṭvā hari pure priyam varṣa koṭim daśaguṇām ramitvā sā iha āgatā indrāṇyā api vratam idam putra arthinyāḥ narādhipa arundhatyā tathā cīrṇam vasiṣṭham prati kāmataḥ dṛśyate divi ca adya api vaśiṣṭhasya samīpatas rohiṇyāḥ lavaṇa tyāgāt sa pannī gaṇa mardanam iti eṣā tithiḥ iti eva tṛtīyā loka pūjitā sadā viśeṣataḥ puṇyā vaiśākhe māsi yā bhavet puṇyāḥ bhādrapade māsi māghe pi evam na saṃśayaḥ māghe bhādrapade ca api strīṇām dhanyā pracakṣate sādhāraṇī tu vaiśākhe sarva lokasya bhārata māgha māse tṛtīyāyām guḍasya lavaṇasya ca dānam śreyaskaram rājan strīṇām ca puruṣasya ca guḍena tuṣyate dattaḥ lavaṇena tu viśva bhūḥ guḍa pūpāḥ tu dātavyāḥ māsi bhādrapade tathā tṛtīyāyām tu māghasya vāmadevasya prītaye vāri dānam praśastam syāt modakānām ca bhārata vaiśākhe māsi rāja indra tṛtīyā candanasya ca vāriṇā tuṣyate vedhāḥ modakaiḥ bhīmaḥ eva hi dānāt tu candanasya iha kañja jaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ yātu eṣā kuru śārdūla vaiśākhe māsi vai tithiḥ tṛtīyā sā akṣayā loke gīrvāṇaiḥ abhinanditā āgatā iyam mahā bāho bhūri candram vasuvratā kaladhautam tathā annam ca ghṛtam ca api viśeṣataḥ yat yat dattam tu akṣayam syāt tena iyam akṣayā smṛtā yat kiñcid dīyate dānam su alpam vā yadi vā bahu tat sarvam akṣayam syāt vai tena iyam akṣayā smṛtā yaḥ asyām dadāti karakan vāri bīja samanvitān sa yāti puruṣaḥ vīra lokam vai hema mālinaḥ iti eṣā kathitā vīra tṛtīyā tithiḥ uttamā yām upoṣya naraḥ rājan ṛddhim vṛddhim śriyam bhajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām brāhme parvaṇi tṛtīyākalpavidhi varṇanam nāma ekaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ caturthyām tu sadā rājan nirāhāra vrata anvitaḥ yāti bhāgya nivāsam hi krīḍate vibhavaiḥ saha iha ca āgatya puṇya ante divyaḥ divya vapuḥ yaśāḥ matimān dhṛtimān vāgmī bhāgyavān kāma kāra vā a asādhyāni api sādhya iha kṣaṇāt eva mahānti api rājā bhavati dīrgha āyuḥ sapta janmāni asau nṛpa etat dadāti santuṣṭaḥ vighna hantā vināyakaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca kaumāre lakṣaṇe puṃsām strīṇām ca sukṛte kṛte vighnam cakāra vighneśaḥ gāṅgeyasya vināyakaḥ tam tu vighnam viditvā asau kārttikeyaḥ ruṣā anvitaḥ utkṛṣya dantam tasya āsyāt hantum tam ca samudyataḥ nivārya apṛcchat deveśaḥ roṣaḥ kāryaḥ kutas tvayā tam ca ācakhyau sa pitre vai kṛtam pūruṣa lakṣaṇam tatra vighna kṛte mahyam yoṣitā na ca lakṣaṇam mama kim lakṣaṇam putra paśyase tvam vadasva me avicāreṇa saṃsthāpyam kapālī tena ca ucyate sa tat lakṣaṇam ādāya samudre prākṣipat ruṣā aham jyāyān aham jyāyān vivādaḥ abhūt tayoḥ dvayoḥ evam bruvati brahmaṇaḥ pañcamam śiraḥ mukta aṭṭahāsam provāca tvām aham veditā bhava kṛtte hayaśire tasmin sthānāt tasmāt tu brahmaṇaḥ roṣāt viniḥsṛtaḥ tu anyaḥ puruṣaḥ śveta kuṇḍalī kavacī sa śiraskaḥ ca sa śaraḥ sa śarāsanaḥ anirdeśya vapuḥ sragvī kim karomi sa ca abravīt athā uvāca ruṣā brahmā hanyatām sa su durmatiḥ rudraḥ api viṣṇu tejobhiḥ praviṣṭaḥ sa tu adhiṣṭhitaḥ haraḥ nārāyaṇam devam vaikuṇṭham aparājitam haram dṛṣṭvā atha samprāptam kāryam ca asya vicintya ca uvāca śūlinam devaḥ bhindhi śūlena me bhujam sa bibheda mahā tejāḥ bhujam śūlena tam haraḥ śūlabhedāt asṛk ca ūrdhvam jagāma āvṛtya rodasī vinivṛtya tatas paścāt kapāle nipapāta ha tadā tu vyasṛjat toyam sa kṛtvā vāruṇīm tanum āmukta kavacam raktam rakta kuṇḍalinam naram athā uvāca bhavam devam kim karomi iti mānada asau api sasarja atha śveta kuṇḍalinam naram yathā rājan balīyāṃsau kuja ketū yuga atyaye na ca adṛśyata vijayaḥ ekasya api tadā tayoḥ atha antarikṣe tau dṛṣṭvā vāc uvāca aśarīriṇī bhū loka bhāvam nirdhūya bhūyas gantā surālayam evam uktvā tu vaikuṇṭhaḥ dadau ekam raveḥ tadā śveta kuṇḍalinam dṛptam tam jagrāha raviḥ mudā indrasya api tatas paścāt rakta kuṇḍalinam dadau athā uvāca tadā rudram devaḥ kamala saṃsthitaḥ ye ca vratam tvadīyam vai dhārayiṣyanti mānavāḥ āhūya ca samudram sa pratyuvāca avicārayan kuruṣva ābharaṇam strīṇām lakṣaṇam yat vilakṣaṇam sa ca āha mama nāmnā idam bhavet puruṣa lakṣaṇam prayaccha asya viṣāṇam vai niṣkṛṣṭam yat tvayā adhunā ṛte vināyakam tat vai daivayogāt na kāmataḥ gṛhāṇa etat sāmudram yat tvayā parikīrtitam strī puṃsoḥ lakṣaṇam śreṣṭham sāmudram iti viśrutam imam ca sa viṣāṇam vai kuru deva vināyakam viṣāṇam dadmi ca asya aham tava vākyāt na saṃśayaḥ yadā tu ayam viṣāṇam ca muktvā tu vicariṣyati tadā viṣāṇa muktaḥ san bhasma ā etam kariṣyati evam astu iti tam ca uktvā viṣāṇam tad kare dadau sa viṣāṇa karaḥ adya api dṛśyate pratimā nṛpa bhīma sūnoḥ mahā bāhoḥ vighnam karttum mahātmanaḥ etat rahasyam devānām mayā te samudāhṛtam yaḥ idam śrāvayet vidvān brāhmaṇān vedapāragān kṣatriyān ca sva vṛtti sthān viś śūdrān ca guṇa anvitān nirvighnam sarva kāryāṇi sādhayet na atra saṃśayaḥ ṛddhim vṛddhim śriyam ca api vindeta bharata uttama iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpa varṇanam nāma dvāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca kena ayam bhīma jaḥ vipra pramatha adhipatiḥ kṛtaḥ bhartṛ tve ca api vighnānām adhikārī katham babhau sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi rāja indra yat ayam vighna kārakaḥ tat te vacmi mahā bāho śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ adhunā dṛṣṭvā karmāṇi siddhāni vinā vighnena bhārata agata kleśām prajām dṛṣṭvā garvitām kṛtsnaśas nṛpa vināyakaḥ samṛddhi artham prajānām viniyojitaḥ gaṇānām ca ādhipatye ca bhīmaḥ kañjaja sāttvataiḥ tata upasṛṣṭaḥ yaḥ tasya lakṣaṇāni nibodha me svapnā iva gāhate atyartham jalam muṇḍān ca paśyati kāṣāya vāsasaḥ ca eva kravyādān ca adhirohati vimanāḥ viphala ārambhaḥ saṃsīdati animittataḥ karaṭa ārūḍham ātmānam ambhasaḥ antara gam tathā pattibhiḥ ca āvṛtam yāntam saṅgamana antikam nṛpa paśyate kuru śārdūla svapna ante na atra saṃśayaḥ cittam ca vikṛta ākāram karavīra vibhūṣitam kumārī na ca bhartāram apatyam garbhiṇī tathā ācārya tvam śrotriyaḥ ca śiṣyāḥ ca adhyayanam tathā vaṇij lābham ca na āpnoti kṛṣim ca eva kṛṣīvalaḥ śukla pakṣe caturthyām tu vāsare dhiṣaṇasya ca bhadrāsana upaviṣṭasya svasti vācya dvijān śubhān vyomakeśam tu sampūjya pārvatīm bhīmajam tathā kṛṣṇam sa pitaram tāta pavamānam sitam tathā dhiṣaṇam ca indu putram ca koṇam ketum ca bhārata aśva sthānāt gaja sthānāt valmīkāt saṅgama adhradāt mṛttikām rocanām gandhān guggulam ca apsu nikṣipet yat āhṛtam hi eka varṇaiḥ caturbhiḥ kalaśaiḥ hradāt carmaṇi ānaḍuhe rakte sthāpyam bhadrāsanam tathā sahasrākṣam śatadhāram ṛṣibhiḥ pāvanam kṛtam tena tvām abhiṣiñcāmi pāvamānyaḥ punantu te bhagam te varuṇaḥ rājā bhagam sūryaḥ bṛhaspatiḥ lalāṭe karṇayoḥ akṣṇoḥ āpaḥ tat ghnantu te sadā snātasya sārṣapam tailam suveṇa audumbareṇa tu mitaḥ ca sammitaḥ ca eva tathā ca śālakaṃṭakaḥ kūṣmāṇḍaḥ rāja śreṣṭhāḥ te agnayaḥ svāhā samanvitāḥ dadyāt catuṣpathe śūrpe kuśān āstīrya sarvatas kṛta akṛtān taṇḍulān ca palala odanam eva ca matsyān pakvān tathā eva āmān māṃsam etāvat eva tu puṣpam citram sa gandham ca surām ca trividhām api mūlakam pūrikāḥ pūpān tathā eva uṇḍerikā srajam dadhi pāyasam annam ca guḍa veṣṭān samodakān dūrvā sarṣapa puṣpāṇām dattvā puṣpa añjali trayam putrān dehi dhanam dehi sarvān kāmān ca dehi me acalām buddhim me dehi dharāyām khyātim eva ca tatas śukla ambara dharaḥ śukla mālya anulepanaḥ evam vināyakam pūjya grahān ca eva vidhānataḥ karmaṇām phalam āpnoti śriyam prāpnoti anuttamām ādityasya sadā pūjām tilakam svāminaḥ tathā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpa varṇanam nāma trayoviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca narāṇām yoṣitām ca eva lakṣaṇāni mahāmate kruddhena yāni kṣiptāni īśvareṇa mahodadhau kṛṣṇasya vacanāt bhūyas samudreṇa arpitāni vai yathā guhena rāja indra strī puṃsām lakṣaṇāni vai proktāni kuru śārdūla tathā te kathayāmi vai śaktipātāt hate krauñce vyomakeśasya sūnunā asau api mahā tejāḥ praṇamya śirasā vibhum pitāmaham babhāṣa idam lakṣaṇam brūhi me vibho narāṇām yuvatīnām ca kautukam paramam mama yat mayā uktam purā deva prakṣiptam lavaṇārṇave prāptam ca vismṛtam bhūyas tat me brūhi hi aśeṣatas sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi deveśa bhīmasya ānanda vardhana lakṣaṇāni nibodha tvam puruṣāṇām aśeṣatas pūrvāhṇe maṅgalaiḥ yukte parīkṣeta vicakṣaṇaḥ pramāṇam saṃhatim chāyām gatim sarva aṅga lakṣaṇam danta keśa nakha śmaśru etat sarvam vicakṣaṇaḥ pūrvam āyuḥ parīkṣeta paścāt lakṣaṇam ādiśet kṣīṇe hi āyuṣi martyānām lakṣaṇaiḥ kim prayojanam aṣṭottaraśatam yasya uttamam tasya lakṣaṇam pramāṇa lakṣaṇam proktam samudreṇa śubha aśubham atas param pravakṣyāmi deha avayava lakṣaṇam pādaiḥ sa māṃsakaiḥ snigdhaiḥ raktam saumyaiḥ su śobhanaiḥ unnataiḥ sveda rahitaiḥ śirā hīnaiḥ ca pārthivaḥ yasya pāda tale rekhā sāṃkuśā iva prakāśate satatam hi sukham tasya puruṣasya na saṃśayaḥ śliṣṭa aṅgulī tāmra nakhau supārṣṇī uṣṇau śirā virahitau gūḍha gulphau ca bhīmaja śūrpa ākṛtī mahā bāho rūkṣau śveta nakhau tathā vakrau śira asantatau ca saṃśuṣkau virala aṅgulī pītau agamyā niratau kṛṣṇau pāna ratau sadā aṅguṣṭhau pṛthulau yeṣām te narāḥ bhāgya varjitāḥ kliśyante vikṛta aṅguṣṭhāḥ te narāḥ pāda gāminaḥ cipiṭaiḥ vikṛtaiḥ bhagnaiḥ aṅguṣṭhaiḥ ati ninditāḥ vakraiḥ bhagnaiḥ tathā hrasvaiḥ aṅguṣṭhaiḥ kleśa bhāginaḥ śūrpa ākāraiḥ ca vikṛtaiḥ bhagnaḥ vakraiḥ śirā tataiḥ sa svedaiḥ pāṇḍu rūkṣaiḥ ca caraṇaiḥ ati ninditāḥ yasya pradeśinī dīrghā aṅguṣṭham yā atikramet strī bhogam labhate nityam puruṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ kaniṣṭhāyām tu dīrghāyām suvarṇasya tu bhāginaḥ cipiṭāḥ viralāḥ śuṣkāḥ yasya aṅgulyaḥ bhavanti vai śvetaiḥ nakhaiḥ virūkṣaiḥ ca puruṣāḥ duḥkha jīvinaḥ kuśīlāḥ kunakhaiḥ jñeyāḥ kāma bhoga vivarjitāḥ vikṛtaiḥ sphuṭitaiḥ ūkṣaiḥ nakhaiḥ dāridrya bhāginaḥ indragopaka saṃkāśaiḥ nakhaiḥ nṛpatayaḥ smṛtāḥ śaṅkha āvarta pratīkāśaiḥ nakhaiḥ bhavati pārthivaḥ tāmraiḥ nakhaiḥ tathā aiśvaryam dhanyāḥ padma nakhāḥ narāḥ sūkṣmaiḥ upacitaiḥ tāmraiḥ nakhaiḥ nṛpatayaḥ smṛtāḥ romaśābhyām ca jaṅghābhyām duḥkha dāridrya bhāginaḥ bandhanam hrasva jaṅghānām aiśvaryam ca eva nirdiśet mṛgajaṅghāḥ ca rājānaḥ jāyante na atra saṃśayaḥ dīrgha jaṅghāḥ sthūla jaṅghāḥ nityam bhāgya vivarjitāḥ śṛgāla jaṅghāḥ puruṣāḥ nityam bhāgya vivarjitāḥ kākajaṃghāḥ narāḥ ye tu bhaveyuḥ duḥkha bhāginaḥ pīnajaṅghāḥ tathā aiśvaryam prāpnuvanti na saṃśayaḥ siṃha vyāghra samāḥ jaṅghāḥ dhaninaḥ parikīrtitāḥ pārthivānām bhavet roma ca ekaikam romakūpake paṃḍita śrotriyāṇām ca dve dve jñeye mahāmate tribhiḥ tribhiḥ tathā niḥsvāḥ mānavāḥ duḥkha bhāginaḥ keśāḥ ca eva mahā bāho ninditā pūjitāḥ tathā nimnaiḥ sva strī jitāḥ jñeyāḥ sa māṃsaiḥ rājya bhāginaḥ haṃsa bhāsa śukānām ca tulyā yasya gatiḥ bhavet anyeṣām api śastānām pakṣiṇām ca śubhā gatiḥ vṛṣa siṃha gaja indrāṇām gatiḥ bhoga vivardhinī jala ūrmi sadṛśī yā ca kāka ulūka samā ca yā gatiḥ dravya vihīnānām duḥkha śoka bhayaṅkarā śvāna uṣṭ mahiṣāṇām khara sūkarayoḥ tathā gatiḥ meṣa samā yeṣām te narāḥ bhāgya varjitāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthī kalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma caturviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ vāmāvarte tathā liṅge naraḥ kanyām prasūyate sthūlaiḥ sirālaiḥ viṣamaiḥ liṅgaiḥ dāridryam ādiśet ṛjubhiḥ vartula ākāraiḥ puruṣā putrabhāginaḥ nimna pāda upaviṣṭasya bhūmim spṛśati mehanaḥ duḥkhitam tam vijānīyāt puruṣam na atra saṃśayaḥ bhūmau pāda upaviṣṭasya gulphau spṛśati mehanaḥ īśvaram tam vijānīyāt pramadānām ca vallabham pārthivaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ samudra vacanam yathā pravāla sadṛśaiḥ snigdhaiḥ maṇibhiḥ pārthivaḥ bhavet pāṇḍuraiḥ malinaiḥ rūkṣaiḥ dīrgha vyāsaiḥ diśaḥ vrajet dhana rakṣāḥ tathā strīṇām bhoktāraḥ te bhavanti hi yuvatīnām mahā bāho niḥsvāḥ ca api bhavanti te na ulbaṇaiḥ ca api dhaninaḥ narāḥ vīrāḥ bhavanti hi mūtradhārā patet ekā valitā dakṣiṇā yadi sa bhavet pārthivaḥ pṛthvyāḥ samudra vacanam yathā bahu dhārāḥ tathā rūkṣāḥ sa śabdāḥ puruṣa adhamāḥ havi gandhi bhavet yasya dhana āḍhyaḥ śrotriyaḥ smṛtaḥ mūṣagandhiḥ bhavet putrī padmagandhiḥ nṛpaḥ smṛtaḥ śīghra maithuna gāmī yaḥ sa dīrgha āyuḥ atas anyathā alpa āyūḥ deva śārdūla vijñeyaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ tanu śukraḥ strī janakaḥ māṃsa gandhī ca bhogavān kiñcid raktam tathā kṛṣṇam bhavet yasya tu śoṇitam adhamaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ sadā duḥkha eka bhājanam pravāla sadṛśam snigdham bhavet yasya ca śoṇitam rājānam tam vijānīyāt saptadvīpā adhipam guha vistīrṇā māṃsalā snigdhā vastiḥ puṃsām praśasyate nirmāṃsāḥ vikaṭāḥ rūkṣāḥ vastiḥ yeṣām na te śubhāḥ gomāyu sadṛśī yasya śvāna uṣṭra mahiṣasya ca sa bhavet duḥkhitaḥ nityam puruṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ yaḥ ca eka vṛṣaṇaḥ tāta jale prāṇān vimuñjati strī cañcalaḥ tu viṣamaiḥ samaiḥ rājyam pracakṣate ūrdhva gaiḥ ca api hrasva āyuḥ śatañjīvī pralamba dhṛk sthūla sphic bhavati kṣemī dravya yuktaḥ sa māṃsa dhṛk dvi maṇḍalaḥ mahā bāho siṃha sphic sārvabhauma tā uṣṭra vānarayoḥ yaḥ tu dhārayet sphic mahāmate maṇḍūka sadṛśam yasya puruṣasya udaram bhavet sa bhavet pārthivaḥ puṣṭyā samudra vacanam yathā māṃsalaiḥ ṛjubhiḥ vṛttaiḥ pārśvaiḥ nṛpatayaḥ smṛtāḥ īśvaraḥ vyāghrapṛṣṭhaḥ tu senāyāḥ ca eva nāyakaḥ kūrmapṛṣṭhāḥ tu rājānaḥ dhana saubhāgya bhāginaḥ vistīrṇam hadayam yeṣām māṃsa loma citam samam śata āyuṣaḥ vijānīyāt bhoga bhājaḥ mahādhanān viralāḥ śuṣkāḥ tathā rūkṣāḥ dṛśyante aṅgulayaḥ kare tasya sidhyati vāṇijyam puruṣasya na saṃśayaḥ yajña yājī bhavet nityam bahu vittaḥ ca mānavaḥ śailam vā api atha vā vṛkṣaḥ kara madhye tu dṛśyate acalām śriyam āpnoti bahu bhṛtya samanvitaḥ śakti tomara bāṇa asi rekhā cāpa upamā tathā dhvaja bhrāpī atha vā śaṃkhaḥ kara madhye tu dṛśyate śrīvatsam atha vā padmam vajram vā cakama eva ca rājānam tam vijānīyāt para sainya vidāraṇam dakṣiṇe tu kara aṅguṣṭhe yavaḥ yasya tu dṛśyate yasya pāṇi tale rekhā kaniṣṭhā mūlam utthitā gatāḥ madhyam pradeśinyāḥ sa jīvet śaradaḥ śatam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthī kalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma pañcaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaḍaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ māyāvī viṣamā kukṣiḥ tathā kuhaka kṛt sadā rājā syāt nimnakukṣiḥ tu sārvabhaumaḥ mahā balaḥ vistīrṇābhiḥ maṇḍalābhiḥ unnatābhiḥ ca nābhibhiḥ valiḥ madhyaṅga tā vīrāḥ viṣamā ca viśeṣataḥ dhana hānim tathā śūlam nityam janayate vibho vāma a vārtā sadā śāntim karoti iti viduḥ budhāḥ karoti medhām dakṣiṇena saṃpravṛttā divaspate pārśva āyatā dīrgham āyuḥ aiśvaryam ūrdhvatas smṛtam gavāḍhya tām adhastāt tu karoti iti viduḥ budhāḥ śata patra karṇikā ābhā nābhiḥ yasya mahāmate bhūpa tvam kurute sā tu puruṣasya na saṃśayaḥ śastreṇa antam vrajet vīra strī bhogam ca āpnuyāt tathā ācāryaḥ bahu putraḥ ca yathāsaṅkhyam vinirdiśet agamyā gāminaḥ jñeyāḥ viṣamābhiḥ na saṃśayaḥ māṃsalaiḥ mṛdubhiḥ rājā syāt na atra saṃśayaḥ rājānaḥ sukhinaḥ ca api bhavanti iha na saṃśayaḥ avepanam māṃsalam ca pārthivānām na saṃśayaḥ khara roma citam vīraśirālam ca viśeṣataḥ adhanānām bhavet eva hṛdayam ṛbhavaḥ uttama sama vakṣasaḥ artha yutāḥ pīnaiḥ śūrāḥ smṛtāḥ budhaiḥ tanubhiḥ dravya hīnāḥ syuḥ asamaiḥ ca api akiñcanāḥ vadhyante ca api śastreṇa na atra kāryā vicāraṇā nirmāṃsaiḥ viṣamaiḥ vīra niḥsvaḥ nimnaiḥ pracakṣyate viṣamaiḥ artha hīnaḥ syāt duḥkha bhāgī sadā naraḥ śūraḥ syāt mahiṣa grīvaḥ mṛga grīvaḥ bhaya āturaḥ kambu grīvaḥ bhavet rājā lamba kaṇṭhaḥ agra lakṣaṇaḥ nimāṃsau romaśau bhagnau alpau vā api viśeṣataḥ bhavet aromaśam pṛṣṭham dhaninām bhīma sambhava sa lomaśam tathā vakram nirdhanānām balādhipa asvedanau unnatau ca tathā pīnau ṣaḍānana śūrāṇām īdṛśau aṃsau nagaja ānanda vardhana dīrgha bāhuḥ bhavet rājā samudra vacanam yathā pralamba bāhuḥ vijñeyaḥ naraḥ sarva guṇa anvitaḥ vāma āvarta bhujāḥ ye tu dīrgha āyata bhujāḥ ca ye sampūrṇa bāhuḥ rājā syāt iti āha sa payonidhiḥ grīvā ca vartula ākārā kambu rekhā samāvṛtā dīrgha grīvāḥ baka grīvā śuka grīvāḥ ca ye narāḥ uṣṭra grīvāḥ kari grīvāḥ sarve te nirdhanāḥ smṛtāḥ ibha aṅga sadṛśau vṛttau samau pīnau ca suvrata ājānu lambinau bāhū pārthivānām na saṃśayaḥ daridrāṇām lomaśau hrasvau bāhū jñeyau surottama taskarāṇām ca viṣamau sthūlau sūkṣmau ca suvrata bhavet ārbhava śārdūla tathā bhīruḥ ca mānavaḥ uttāna kara talaḥ dātā bhavati iti na saṃśayaḥ viṣamāḥ bhavanti viṣamaiḥ nimnāḥ ca api viśeṣataḥ kara talaiḥ deva śārdūla lākṣā ābhaiḥ īśvarāḥ smṛtāḥ agamyā gamanam pītaiḥ rūkṣaiḥ nirdhana tā smṛtā apeya pānam kurvanti nīla kṛṣṇaiḥ sadā eva hi nimnāḥ snigdhā bhavet nṛṇām rekhā kara tale guha dhaninām na daridrāṇām iti āha sa payonidhiḥ dhaninaḥ tu mahā bāho ye ghana aṅgulayaḥ narāḥ vadanam maṇḍalam yasya dharma śīlam tam ādiśet śuṇḍa vaktrāḥ narāḥ ye tu durbhagāḥ te na saṃśayaḥ hari vaktrāḥ jihma vaktrāḥ vikṛta āsyāḥ tathā narāḥ bhagna vatrāḥ karāla āsyā sarve te taskarāḥ smṛtāḥ sampūrṇa vaktrāḥ rājānaḥ gaja siṃha ānanāḥ tathā chāga vānara vaktrāḥ ca dhaninaḥ parikīrtitāḥ kṛṣi bhāgī bhavet nityam bahu vittaḥ ca mānavaḥ siṃha vyāghra gaja indrāṇām kapolaḥ sadṛśaḥ yadi mahā bhogī sa vijñeyaḥ senāyāḥ ca eva nāyakaḥ vadanam tu samam ślakṣṇam saumyam saṃvṛtam eva hi pārthivānām mahā bāho viparītam tu duḥkha dam strī mukham putra nāśāya maṇḍalam sukhitām vrajet dravya nāśāya vai dīrgham pāpa dam bhaya dam tathā dhūrtānām caturasram syāt putra hāni karam śṛṇu hrasvam kīnāśe pūrṇa kāntam ca bhoginām sthūla uṣṭhāḥ hanu mūlāḥ ca śuṣkaiḥ tīkṣṇaiḥ ca duḥkhitāḥ a sphoṭita agram snigdham ca natam mṛdu tathā guha sampūrṇam ca sadā śastam śmaśru bhūmipateḥ guha raktaiḥ ca alpaiḥ tathā rūkṣaiḥ śmaśrubhiḥ bhīma nandana narāḥ caurāḥ bhavanti eva paradāra ratāḥ tathā nirmāṃsau yasya vai karṇau saṃgrāmāt nāśam ṛcchati cipiṭābhyām bhavet rogī hrasvau ca kṛpaṇasya ca śaṅkukarṇaḥ ca bhūnāthaḥ sarva śatru bhayaṅkaraḥ dīrgha āyūḥ romaśābhyām tu vipulābhyām narādhipaḥ bhogī ca sa bhavet nityam deva brāhmaṇa pūjakaḥ śira avabaddhau krūrasya vyālambau ca viśeṣataḥ bhogī syāt nigaṇḍaḥ vai mantrī sampūrṇa gaṇḍakaḥ śubhabhāj śukanāsaḥ tu cirajīvī śuṣka nāsikaḥ kunda kuṇḍala saṅkāśaiḥ prakāśaiḥ daśanaiḥ nṛpaḥ ṛkṣa vānara dantāḥ ca nityam kṣudh paripīḍitāḥ hasti dantāḥ khara dantāḥ snigdha dantāḥ guṇa anvitāḥ karālaiḥ viralaiḥ rūkṣaiḥ daśanaiḥ duḥkha jīvinaḥ dvātriṃśat dantāḥ rājānaḥ ekatriṃśat ca bhogavān triṃśat dantāḥ narāḥ nityam sukha duḥkhi tva bhāginaḥ ūnatriṃśacya daśanaiḥ puruṣāḥ duḥkhabhāginaḥ kṛṣṇajihvaḥ bhavet preṣyaḥ sa valayā tu jihvayā śveta jihvāḥ narāḥ jñeyāḥ śauca ācāra samanvitāḥ padma patra samā jihvā sūkṣmā dīrghā su śobhanā sthūlā ca na ca vistīrṇā yeṣām te manuja adhipāḥ nimnā snigdhā ca hrasvā ca rakta agrā rasanā yadi kṛṣṇa tāluḥ naraḥ yaḥ tu sa bhavet kula nāśanaḥ sukha bhāgī duḥkha bhāgī pīta tāluḥ narādhipaḥ vikṛtam sphuṭitam rūkṣam tālukam na praśasyate padma tāluḥ bhavet rājā śveta tāluḥ dhaneśvaraḥ haṃsa svarāḥ narāḥ dhanyāḥ megha gambhīra niḥsvanāḥ krauṃca svanāḥ ca rājānaḥ bhogavantaḥ mahādhanāḥ cakravāka svanāḥ dhanyāḥ rājānaḥ dharma vatsalāḥ rūkṣa dīrgha svarāḥ krūrāḥ paśūnām sadṛśāḥ na tu puruṣāḥ kleśa bhāginaḥ cāṣa svanāḥ bhāgya yutāḥ bhinna kāṃsya svarāḥ ca ye kṣīṇa bhinna svarāḥ ye syuḥ adhamāḥ te prakīrtitāḥ pārthivāḥ tanu nāsāḥ ca dīrgha nāsāḥ ca bhoginaḥ hrasva nāsāḥ narāḥ ye tu dharma śīlāḥ tu te matāḥ hasti aśva siṃha nāsāḥ ca sūcī nāsāḥ ca ye narāḥ teṣām sidhyati vāṇijyam hayānām ca eva vikrayaḥ vikṛtā nāsikā yasya sthūla agrā rūpa varjitā pāpa karmā sa vijñeyaḥ sāmudra vacanam yathā dāḍimī puṣpa saṃkāśe bhavetām yasya locane bhūpatiḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ saptadvīpā adhipaḥ guha vyāghrākṣāḥ kopanāḥ jñeyāḥ karkaṭākṣāḥ kalipriyāḥ biḍāla haṃsa netrāḥ ca bhavanti puruṣa adhamāḥ mapūra nakula akṣāḥ ca narāḥ te madhyamāḥ smṛtāḥ āpiṅgala akṣāḥ rājānaḥ sarva bhoga samanvitāḥ bala sattva guṇa upetāḥ pṛthivī cakravartinaḥ dvi mātrā vīkṣaṇāḥ nityam jīvanti parama āśritāḥ tri mātrā syandinaḥ jñeyāḥ puruṣāḥ sukha bhāginaḥ catur mātrā nimeṣaiḥ ca nayanaiḥ īśvarāḥ smṛtāḥ dīrgha āyuṣaḥ dharma ratāḥ pañca mātrā nimeṣiṇaḥ hrasva karṇāḥ mahābhāgāḥ mahā karṇāḥ ca ye narāḥ dīrgha āyuṣaḥ śukti karṇāḥ śaṅkha karṇāḥ mahādhanāḥ dīrgha āyuṣaḥ dīrgha karṇāḥ lamba karṇāḥ tapasvinaḥ lalāṭena ardhacandreṇa bhavanti pṛthivīśvarāḥ vipulena lalāṭena mahā dhanapatiḥ smṛtaḥ rekhā pañca lalāṭe tu striyāḥ vā puruṣasya vā śatam jīvati varṣāṇām aiśvaryam ca adhigacchati catūrekhām aśītim tu tribhiḥ saptatim eva ca dvābhyām ṣaṣṭim tu rekhābhyām catvāriṃśat tathā ekayā arekhena lalāṭena vijñeyā pañcaviṃśatiḥ rekhā chedaiḥ tu vijñeyāḥ hīna madhya uttamāḥ narāḥ alpa āyuṣaḥ tathā alpābhiḥ vyādhibhiḥ paripīḍitāḥ triśūlam paṭṭiśam vā api lalāṭe yasya dṛśyate īśvaram tam vijānīyāt bhoginam kīrtim āśritam candra ākāram narendrāṇām go āḍhyam maṅgalam smṛtam viṣamam tu daridrāṇām śiraḥ dīrgham tu duḥkhinām nāga kumbha nibham rājñaḥ samam sarvatra bhoginaḥ kapilaḥ sphuṭitaiḥ rūkṣaiḥ sthūlaiḥ ca śikhareśayaiḥ duḥkhitā puruṣāḥ jñeyāḥ roma śmaśrubhiḥ eva ca rūkṣāḥ vivarṇāḥ nistejāḥ kharāḥ sthūlāḥ ca mūrdhajāḥ na atistokāḥ na bahuśas mūrdhajāḥ duḥkha bhāginaḥ viralāḥ ca mṛdu snigdhāḥ bhramara añjana saprabhāḥ kacāḥ yasya tu dṛśyante sa bhavet pṛthivīpatiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthī kalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma ṣaḍviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha saptaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ puruṣa lakṣaṇa varṇanam saṃkṣepataḥ mama vibho lakṣaṇāni nṛpasya tu śubhāni ca aṅga jātāni brūhi me vadatām vara śṛṇu vakṣya iṅga jātāni pārthivasya śubhāni ca pārthivaḥ jñāyate yaiḥ tu narāṇām madhya bhāgataḥ udyatāni tathā ṣaḍ vai gambhīrāṇi ca trīṇi vai dīrghāṇi ca api sūkṣmāṇi bhavanti yasya pañca vā nābhiḥ saṃdhiḥ svanaḥ ca iti gambhīrāṇi ca trīṇi vai sa rājā na atra sandehaḥ śṛṇuṣva eva unnatāni ca kṛkāṭikā tadhā ca āsyam nakhāḥ vakṣaḥ atha nāsikā kakṣe ca api mahā bāho ṣaḍ etāni viduḥ budhāḥ liṅgam pṛṣṭham tathā grīvā jaṅghāḥ hrasvāni suvrata jihvā raktā nakhāḥ ca eva sapta etāni mahāmate tvacaḥ kararuhāḥ keśāḥ daśanāḥ ṛbhavaḥ uttama sūkṣmāṇi etāni ca guha pañca ca api viduḥ budhāḥ nāsikā locane bāhū stanayoḥ antaram hanuḥ iti dīrgham idam proktam pañcakam bhūbhujām nṛpa kṣutam rājñām sakṛt dvis tris nāditam hrāditam tathā dīrgha āyuṣām prayuktam te hasitam ca viduḥ budhāḥ madhu piṅgaiḥ mahātmānaḥ narāḥ jñeyāḥ surādhipa bhīravaḥ hi kṛśa akṣāḥ tu caurāḥ maṇḍala cakrakaiḥ nīlotpala ābhaiḥ veda vidaḥ bhṛśam kṛṣṇaiḥ tathā arthitā śyāma akṣāḥ subhagāḥ jñeyāḥ dīna akṣaibhra daridra tā abhyunnatābhiḥ hrasva āyuḥ viśālābhiḥ sukhī bhavet bhruvaḥ bāla indu sadṛśāḥ dhaninām ārbhava uttama kṣīṇābhiḥ artha hīnāḥ syuḥ narāḥ jñeyāḥ surottama viralaiḥ unnataiḥ śaṃkhaiḥ dhanyāḥ syuḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ nimnaiḥ stuti artha saṃsaktāḥ unnataiḥ ca janādhipāḥ viṣama lalāṭāḥ vidhanāḥ sadā syuḥ deva sattama ācāryāḥ śukti sadṛśaiḥ narāḥ syuḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ unnata śirobhiḥ āḍhyāḥ narāḥ jñeyāḥ sadā guha vadha bandha bhāginaḥ vīrāḥ narāḥ ninna lalāṭinaḥ bhṛśam unnataiḥ ca mūrkhāḥ ca kṛpaṇāḥ ca tathā nataiḥ śubha āvaham manuṣyāṇām vadanam syāt yathā śṛṇu adīnam ānanam snigdham sa smitam ca viśeṣataḥ sa aśru dīnam tathā rūkṣam asnigdham ninditam guha asambhāvyam mukham jñeyam narāṇām naga dāraṇa akampam gubha dam jñeyam narāṇām hasitam guha nimīlita akṣam pāpasya hasitam ca ārbhava uttama āmaṇḍalam śiraḥ yasya sa gavā āḍhyaḥ naraḥ bhavet cipiṭa ākārita śirāḥ hanyāt vai pitarau naraḥ ghaṇṭā ākṛti śiraḥ dhvānam asakṛt sevate naraḥ nimnam śiraḥ nartha dam syāt narāṇām arbhava uttama bahulāḥ kapilāḥ sthūlāḥ viṣamāḥ sphuṭitāḥ tathā paruṣāḥ hrasvāḥ ati kuṭilāḥ daridrāṇām kacāḥ ghanāḥ iti uktam lakṣaṇam śubham vā aśubham eva ca yoṣitām tat idānīm te lakṣaṇam vacmi bhīmaja iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthīkalpe puruṣalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma saptaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ strī lakṣaṇa varṇanam śṛṇu idānīm mahā bāho strī lakṣaṇam anuttamam yat mayā uktam purā vīra nāradasya mahātmanaḥ ninditam ca praśastam ca strīṇām vakṣyāmi lakṣaṇam mātaram pitaram ca eva bhrātaram mātulam tathā dvijaiḥ tu saha vā āgamya kanyām vīkṣeta śāstra vid pāṇim eva ca jaṅghe ca kaṭi nāsā ūru eva ca jihvām ca uṣṭhau ca dantāḥ ca kapolam galakam tathā cakṣuḥ nāsāḥ lalāṭam ca śiraḥ keśān tathā eva ca romarājim svaram varṇam āvartāni tu vā punar yasyāḥ tu rekhā grīvāyām yā ca rakta anta locanā lalāṭe dṛśyate yasyāḥ triśūlam deva nirmitam bahūnām strī sahasrāṇām svāminīm tām vinirdiśet rājahaṃsa gatiḥ yasyāḥ mṛga akṣī mṛga varṇikā sama śukla agra dantā ca kanyām tām uttamām viduḥ maṇḍūka kukṣī yā kanyā nyagrodha parimaṇḍalā haṃsa svarā mṛdu vacāḥ yā kanyā madhu piṅgalā āyatau śravaṇau yasyāḥ surūpā ca api nāsikā bhruvau ca indrāyudha ākārau sā atyantam sukha bhāginī tanvī śyāmā tathā kṛṣṇā snigdha aṅgī mṛdu bhāṣiṇī śaṅkha kunda indu daśanā bhavet aiśvarya bhāginī vistīrṇam jaghanam yasyāḥ vedi madhyā tu yā bhavet maśakam tilakam vā api sā pūrvam janayet sutam gūḍha gulpha aṅguli śirāḥ alpa pārṣṇiḥ su madhyamā rakta akṣī rakta caraṇā sā atyantam sukha bhāginī vakra aṅguli talau pādau kanyām tām parivarjayet yena kenacid aṃśena māṃsam yasyāḥ vivardhate rāsabhīm tādṛśīm vidyāt na sā kalyāṇam arhati pāde pradeśinī yasyāḥ aṅguṣṭham samatikramet duḥśīlā durbhagā jñeyā kanyām tām parivarjayet pāde madhyamikā yasyāḥ kṣitim na spṛśate yadi ramate sā na kaumāre svacchandā kāma cāriṇī pāde anāmikā yasyāḥ kṣitim na spṛśate yadi dvitīyam puruṣam hatvā tṛtīye sā pratiṣṭhitā pāde kaniṣṭhā yasyāḥ tu kṣitim na spṛśate yadi dvitīyam puruṣam hatvā tṛtīye sā pratiṣṭhitā gulmavṛkṣa sanāmnī ca kanyām tām parivarjayet na etāḥ patiṣu rajyante yāḥ ca nakṣatra nāmikāḥ āvartaḥ pṛṣṭhatas yasyāḥ nābhim samanuvindati pṛṣṭha āvartā patim hanti na abhyāvartā pativratā yasyāḥ tu hasamānāyāḥ gaṇḍe jāyet kūpakam ramate sā na kaumāre svacchandā kārya kāriṇī yasyāḥ tu gacchamānāyāḥ ṭiṭṭīkāyati jaṅghikā putram vyavasyet sā kartum pati tve na atra saṃśayaḥ sthūla pādā ca yā kanyā sarva aṃgeṣu ca lomaśā sthūla hastā ca yā syāt vai dāsīm tām nirdiśet budhaḥ yasyāḥ ca utkaṭakau pādau mukham ca vikṛtam bhavet uttara uṣṭhe ca romāṇi sā kṣipram bhakṣayet patim trīṇi yasyāḥ pralambante lalāṭam udaram sphicau trīṇi bhakṣayate sā tu devaram śvasuram patim samudbhūṣita cāritrā guru bhaktā pativratā deva brāhmaṇa bhaktā ca mānuṣīm tām vinirdiśet nityam snātā sugandhā ca nityam ca priya vādinī alpa āśinī alpa roṣā ca devatām tām vinirdiśet hadayam syāt ca durgrāhyam mārjārī tām vinirdiśet nīceṣu ramate nityam rāsabhī tām vinirdiśet pratikūla karī nityam bandhūnām bhartuḥ eva ca svacchande lalitām ca eva āsurīm tām vinirdiśet bahu āśī bahu vākyā ca nityam ca apriya vādinī hinasti sva patim yā tu rākṣasīm tām vinirdiśet śauca ācāra paribhraṣṭā rūpa bhraṣṭā bhayaṅkarā prasveda mala paṅkā ca piśācīm tām vinirdiśet nityam snātām sugandhām ca māṃsa madya priya ādinīm vṛkṣa udyāna prasaktā ca gāndharvīm tām vinirdiśet capalā cañcalā ca eva nityam paśyet diśaḥ tathā cala svabhāvā lubdhā ca vānarīm tām vinirdiśet candra ānanām śubha aṅgīm tu matta vāraṇa gāminīm ārakta nakha hastām tu vidyāt vidyādharīm budhaḥ vīṇā vāditra śabdena vaṃśa gīta raveṇa ca puṣpa dhūpa prasaktām ca gāndharvīm tām vinirdiśet strīṇām tathā puṃstvavatām ca vīra yat lakṣaṇam pārthiva loka pūjyam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthī kalpe strīlakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma aṣṭāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca gakāra akṣara devasya gaṇeśasya mahātmanaḥ ārādhana vidhim brūhi sa aṅgam mantra samanvitam yathā iṣṭam ceṣṭataḥ siddhiḥ sadā bhavati kāmikā śveta arka mūlam saṅgṛhya kuryāt gaṇapatim budhaḥ aṅguṣṭha parva mātram tu padmāsana gatam tathā nāga yajñopavīta aṅgam śaśāṅka kṛta śekharam tṛtīye paraśum dadyāt caturthe modakam nyaset vāsobhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ raktaiḥ mālyaiḥ ca ārādhayet gaṇam evam pūjya agratas tasya bhojayet brāhmaṇam budhaḥ āśīrvādam tatas tasmāt prāpya siddhim avāpnuyāt bhaktyā kuru kula śreṣṭha śṛṇu mantra padāni vai gaṃ svāhā mūlamantraḥ ayam praṇavena samanvitaḥ gām namaḥ hadayam jñeyam gīṃ śiraḥ parikīrtitam śikhā ca gūm namaḥ jñeyaḥ gaiṃ namaḥ kavacam smṛtam gauṃ namaḥ netram uddiṣṭam gaḥ phaṭ kāmāstram ucyate gaṃ gaṇeśāya namaḥ gandha mantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ puṣpa ulkāya namaḥ puṣpa mantraḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ dhūpa ulkāya namaḥ dhūpa mantraḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ dīpolkāya namaḥ dīpa mantraḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ om gaṃ mahā ulkāya namaḥ bali mantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ om mahākarṇāya vidmahe vakratuṇḍāya dhīmahi tat naḥ dantiḥ pracodayāt gāyatrī japaḥ pūrvatas mahāgaṇapataye vīra svāhā dakṣiṇatas sadā maholkāya paścimatas kūśmāṇḍāya uttareṇa tu ekadanta tripurāntakāya āgneyyām vīra nirdiśet om śivadatta vikaṭa hara hāsa prāṇāya svā nairṛtyām svāhā vāyavyām padma daṃṣṭrāya narāya iti aiśānyām homayet budhaḥ na yadā vaśyā bhavati kṛṣṇa tila āhutim aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt tri rātreṇa rājā vaśyaḥ bhavati āditya abhimukhaḥ bhūtvā aṣṭa sahasram japet śukla caturthyām upoṣya gandha puṣpa ādibhiḥ arcanam kṛtvā tila tandulān juhuyāt apāmārga samidbhiḥ agnim prajvālya ekaviṃśati āhutīḥ yaḥ juhuyāt tri rātrāt śatrum vyāpādayati vṛkṣa mūle kajjalam saṅgṛhya saptabhiḥ mantritam kṛtvā netrāṇi añjayet yam paśyati sa vaśī bhavati puṣpam phalam mūlam ca aṣṭa sahasra abhimantritam kṛtvā yasmai dadāti sa vaśyaḥ bhavati sarve grahāḥ su prītāḥ bhavanti nagara dvāram gatvā aṣṭa sahasram dvāram nirūpayet puram dvāreṇa gṛhyate prāc mukhaḥ yajati saḥ uccāṭayati tṛṇāni lūnayati kāṣṭhāni chedayati pratimām nṛtyayati ākarṣayati stambhayati yojana śatāt strī puruṣān ākarṣayati om vakatuṇḍāya svāhā om ekadaṃṣṭrāya svāhā om kṛtakṛṣṇāya svāhā om gajakarṇāya svāhā om lambodarāya svāhā om vikaṭāya svāhā om dhūmravarṇāya svāhā om gaganakūjāya svāhā om vināyakāya svāhā om gaṇapataye svāhā om hastimukhāya svāhā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthī kalpe gaṇapatikalpavarṇanam nāma ekonatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha triṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ vināyaka pūjā vidhi varṇanam sarva jana priyaḥ bhavati śveta arka mūla aṅguṣṭha mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā dhūpa ādibhiḥ arcayitvā sarvān varṇān vaśam ānayati śvetacandanam aṅguṣṭha mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā puṣpa gandha ādibhiḥ arcayitvā śukla caturthyām aṣṭamyām vā balim kuryāt aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt dadhnā pāyasena rājānam vaśam ānayati raktacandana mayam gaṇapatim aṅguṣṭha mātram kṛtvā bhautikam balim dadyāt dadhi madhu ghṛta āhutīnām gaṇapatim aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt ātma prāpikām prajām vaśam ānayati rakta karavīra mūla aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kārayet rakta puṣpa gandha upahāraiḥ balim dadyāt tila lavaṇa ghṛtena aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt daśa grāmān vaśam ānayati śveta karavīra aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā tila piṣṭa dadhi ghṛta kṣīra haridrā miśreṇa aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt veśyām vaśam ānayati aśvattha mūla aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā gandha puṣpa dhūpa balim dattvā śatam juhuyāt śatrum vaśam ānayati arka mūla aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā gandha puṣpa dhūpa balīn dadyāt tinduka aṣṭaśatam juhuyāt śatrum vaśam ānayati bilva mūla mayam aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kṛtvā gandha puṣpa dhūpa arcitam kṛtvā trimadhu aktānām aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt rāja amātyān vaśam ānayati śirasi dhūpān dhṛtvā gacchet rāja dvāram vigrahe jayaḥ bhavati hasti danta mṛttikā mayam aṅguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kārayet gandha puṣpa dhūpa arcitam kṛtvā kṛṣṇa caturthyām nagnaḥ bhūtvā abhyarcayet sapta vārān japet nityam nārīṇām subhagaḥ bhavati vṛṣabha śṛṅga mṛttikā aṅguṣṭha mātram gaṇapatim kārayet gandha puṣpa arcitam kṛtvā guggulu dhūpam dadyāt ghoṣapatim vaśam ānayati atha vā valmīka mṛttikā aṃguṣṭha parva mātram gaṇapatim kārayet unmattaka kāṣṭhena agnim prajvālya āhutīnām aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt tila sarṣapa miśreṇa sarva dhūpam dadyāt trikaṭukena lepayet om gaṇapataye vakratuṇḍāya gaja dantāya gulagula iti ninādāya caturbhujāya trinetrāya muśala pāśa vajra hastāya sarva bhūta damanāya sarva loka vaśaṃkarāya sarva duṣṭa upaghāta jananāya sarva śatru vimardanāya sarva rājya samīhanāya rājānam iha vaśam ānaya hana hana paca paca vajrāṅkuśena gaṇeśa phaṭ svāhā om gām gīṃ gūm gaiṃ gauṃ gaḥ svāhā namaḥ hadayam mūlamantrasya om kaḥ śiraḥ om khaḥ śikhā om gaḥ hadayam om guḥ vaktram om gaiṃ netram om ghaḥ kavacam om ṅaḥ āvāhanam hadayasya āvāhana aṅgāni bhavanti om namaḥ hadayam mūlamantrasya om gāḥ śiraḥ om gaiḥ namaḥ śikhā om gauḥ namaḥ kavacam om gaṃ namaḥ netre om gaḥ phaṭ astram om aṅguṣṭha ulkāya svāhā āvāhanam hadayasya svāhā visarjanam hadayasya om gandha ulkāya svāhā gandha mantraḥ om dharma bhūta ulkāya svāhā puṣpa mantraḥ durjayāya pūrveṇa om dhūrjaṭaye dakṣiṇena om lambodarāya paścimatas om gaṇapataye uttaratas om gaṇādhipataye aiśānyām om mahāgaṇapataye āgneyyām om kūśmāṇḍāya nairṛtyām padma daṃṣṭra mālā prakarṣaṇī paraśu aṃkuśa pāśa paṭaha mudrāḥ aṣṭau mudrāḥ darśayitvā tatas karmāṇi kārayet kṛṣṇa tila āhutīnām aṣṭa sahasram juhuyāt rājānam vaśam ānayet āvāhana ādi ekādaśa mudrāḥ naivedya antam kramāt darśayet ārādhayet yena vidhinā trinetram śūlinam haram tena eva ārādhayet devam vighneśam gaṇapam nṛpa tat eva maṇḍalam ca asya aṅganyāsaḥ tathā eva ca naśyanti tasya vighnāni na ca ariṣṭam kadācana yaḥ ca upavāsam kṛtvā tu caturthyām pūjayet naraḥ sarve tasya samārambhāḥ sidhyeyuḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ yasya anukūlaḥ vighneśaḥ śivayoḥ kula nandana tasmāt ārādhayet enam bhakti śraddhā samanvitaḥ kuṅkuma aguru dhūpena tathā evā uṇḍīraka srajā śukla pakṣe caturthyām tu vidhinā anena pūjayet ekadante jagannāthe gaṇeśe tuṣṭim āgate pitṛ deva manuṣya ādyāḥ sarve tuṣyanti bhārata tasmāt ārādhayet enam sadā bhakti puraḥsaram karṇalepaiḥ tuṇḍikābhiḥ modakaiḥ ca mahīpate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthī kalpe vināyakapūjāvidhinirūpaṇam nāma triṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śivācaturthī pūjanam śivā śāntā sukhā rājan caturthī trividhā smṛtā māsi bhādrapade śuklā śivā lokeṣu pūjitā tasyām snānam tathā dānam upavāsaḥ japaḥ tathā kriyamāṇam śataguṇam prasādāt dantinaḥ nṛpa guḍa lavaṇa ghṛtānām tu dānam śubha karam smṛtam guḍa apūpaiḥ tathā vīra puṇyam brāhmaṇa bhojanam yāḥ tasyām nara śārdūla pūjayanti sadā striyaḥ guḍa lavaṇa pūpaiḥ ca śvaśrūm śvasuram eva ca tāḥ sarvāḥ subhagāḥ syuḥ ve vighra īśasya anumodanāt kanyakā tu viśeṣeṇa vidhinā anena pūjayet māghe māsi tathā śuklā yā caturthī mahīpate sā śāntā śānti dā nityam śāntim kuryāt sadā eva hi snāna dāna ādikam karma sarvam asyām kṛtam vibho kṛta upavāsaḥ yaḥ tasyām pūjayet vi ghnanāyakam lavaṇam ca guḍam śākam guḍa pūpān ca bhārata viśeṣataḥ striyaḥ rājan pūjayantaḥ gurum nṛpa guḍa lavaṇa ghṛtaiḥ vīra sadā syuḥ bhāgya saṃyutāḥ sukha āvahā ca su sukhā saubhāgya karaṇī param caturthī kuru śārdūla rūpa saubhāgya dā śubhā mahā puṇyam rūpa dam bhāgya dam tathā hasitam lalitam ca uktam ceṣṭitam ca sukha āvaham savilāsa bhuja kṣepaḥ caṃkramaḥ ceṣṭitam śubham kṛtyena pūjite ca īśe vighreśe śivayoḥ sute tadā sā sukha dā jñeyā caturthī vai sukhā iti ca purā maithunam āśritya sthitābhyām tu himācale bhīma umābhyām mahā bāho rakta binduḥ cyutaḥ kṣitau aṅga doṅga upakāraḥ ca aṅgānām tu pradaḥ nṛṇām saubhāgya ādi karaḥ yasmāt tasmāt aṅgārakaḥ mataḥ upavatsyati nā rājan nārī vā na anya mānasā gaṇeśam prathamam bhaktyā yojayet śaddhayā anvitaḥ pūrvam ca kṛta saṅkalpaḥ snānam kṛtvā yathāvidhi gṛhītvā mṛttikām vandet mantreṇa anena bhārata iha tvam vanditā pūrvam kṛṣṇena uddharatā kila tasmāt me daha pāpmānam yat mayā pūrva sañcitam imam mantram paṭhan vīraḥ ādityāya pradarśayet āditya raśmi sampūtām gaṅgā jala kaṇa ukṣitām dattvā mṛdam śirasi tām sarva aṅgeṣu ca yojayet tvam āpaḥ yoniḥ sarveṣām daitya dānava dyaukasām sveda aṇḍaja udbhidām ca eva rasānām pataye namaḥ taḍāgeṣu ca sarveṣu mānasa ādi saraḥsu ca nadīṣu devakhāteṣu su tīrtheṣu hradeṣu vai dhyāyan yaṭhan imam mantram tatas snānam samācaret tatas snātvā śuciḥ bhūtvā gṛham āgatya vai spṛśet dūrvā aśvatthau śamīm spṛṣṭvā gām ca mantreṇa mantra vid tvam dūrve amṛta nāmā asi sarva devaiḥ tu vanditā śamī mantram pravakṣyāmi tat nibodha mahīpate pavitrāṇām pavitrām tvam kāśyapī prathitā śrutau śamī śamaya me pāpam nūnam vetsi dharādharān śaktānām ca samudyogam aśvattha tvam kṣamasva me imam mantram paṭhan vīra kuryāt vai sparśanam budhaḥ tatas devyai tu gām dadyāt vīram kṛtvā pradakṣiṇām tasmāt spṛśāmi vande tvām vanditā pāpa hā bhava imam mantram paṭhan vīra bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ pradakṣiṇam tu yaḥ kuryāt arjunam kuru nandana pradakṣiṇīkṛtā tena pṛthivī syāt na saṃśayaḥ prakṣālya ca mṛdā pādau ācānta ugni gṛham viśet śarvāya śarvaputrāya kṣoṇī utsaṅga bhavāya ca kujāya lalitāṅgāya lohitāṅgāya vai tathā oṃkāra pūrvakaiḥ mantraiḥ svāhākāra samanvitaiḥ aṣṭottaraśatam vīra ardha ardham ardham eva ca bhakṣyaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ ca anyaiḥ śaktyā bhaktyā samanvitaḥ hutvā āhutīḥ tatas vīra devam saṃsthāpayet kṣitau sauvarṇam rājatam vā api śaktyā dāru mayam nṛpa devadāru mayam vā api śrīkhaṇḍa candanaiḥ api tāvat vivardhate puṇyam dātum śata sahasrikam anye tāmra maye pātre vaṃśa je mṛd maye api vā pūjayanti narāḥ śaktyā kṛtvā kuṅkuma keśaraiḥ puruṣa ākṛti kṛtam pātre imam mantraiḥ samarcayet guḍa odanam ghṛtam kṣīram godhūmān śāli taṇḍulān avekṣya śaktim dadyāt vai daridraḥ vittavān tathā vitta śāṭhyam na kartavyam vidyamāne dhane nṛpa vitta śāṭhyam hi kurvāṇaḥ na amutra bala bhāj bhavet śatānīkaḥ uvāca aṅgārakeṇa saṃyuktā caturthī naktabhojanaiḥ upoṣyā kati mātrā tu uta aho sakṛt eva tu caturthī sā caturthī sā yadā aṅgāraka saṃyutā caturthyām ca caturthyām ca vidhānam śṛṇu yādṛśam sauvarṇam tu kujam kṛtvā sa vināyakam ādarāt viṃśat palāni pātrāṇi viṃśati ardha palāni vā viṃśat karṣāṇi vā vīra viṃśat ardha ardham eva vā pratiṣṭhāpya graheśam vai vastraiḥ sampariveṣṭitam brāhmaṇāya sadā dadyāt dakṣiṇā sahitam nṛpa vācakāya mahā bāho guṇine śreyase nṛpa iti te kathitā puṇyā tithīnām uttamā tithiḥ yām upoṣya naraḥ rūpam divyam āpnoti bhārata kāntyātreya samam vīram tejasā ravi sannibham īdṛś rūpam samāpya iha yāti bhaumasadaḥ nṛpa prasādāt vighnanāthasya tathā gaṇapateḥ nṛpa paṭhatām śṛṇvatām rājan kurvatām ca viśeṣataḥ brahmahatyā ādi pāpāni kṣīyante na atra saṃśayaḥ ṛddhim vṛddhim tathā lakṣmīm labhate na atra saṃśayaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi caturthī kalpe sukhāvahāṅgārakacaturthīvratanirūpaṇam nāma ekatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvātriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ pañcamī dayitā rājan nāgānām nandi vardhinī pañcamyām kila nāgānām bhavati iti utsavaḥ mahān vāsukiḥ takṣakaḥ ca eva kāliyaḥ maṇibhadrakaḥ airāvataḥ dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ karkoṭaka dhanañjayau ete prayacchanti abhayam prāṇinām prāṇa jīvitām pañcamyām snapayanti iha nāgān kṣīreṇa ye narāḥ teṣām kule prayacchanti te abhaya prāṇa dakṣiṇām śaptāḥ nāgāḥ yadā mātrā dahyamānāḥ divāniśam nirvāpayanti snapanaiḥ gavām kṣīreṇa miśritaiḥ teṣām kule sarpa bhayam na bhavet iti niścayaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca mātrā śaptāḥ katham nāgāḥ kim samuddiśya kāraṇam katham ca ānanda karaṇam kasya vā samprasāda jam uccaiḥśravāḥ aśvaratnam śvetaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā ca abravīt kadrūḥ nāgānām jananī svasām kṛṣṇān ca vīkṣase bālān sarvam śvetam uta ambare sarva śvetaḥ haya varaḥ na asya kṛṣṇaḥ na lohitaḥ katham paśyasi kṛṣṇam tvam vinatā uvāca tām svasām kadrūḥ uvāca bīkṣe aham eka nayanā kṛṣṇa bāla samanvitam aham dāsī bhavitrī te kṛṣṇe keśe pradarśite āhūya putrān provāca bālā bhūtvā haya uttame tiṣṭhadhvam vipaṇe jeṣye vinatām jaya garddhinīm procuḥ te jihma buddhim tām nāgāḥ mātām vigṛhya tu tān śaśāpa ruṣā kadrūḥ pāvakaḥ vaḥ pradhakṣyati tasmin satre sa tigmāṃśuḥ pāvakaḥ vaḥ pradhakṣyati evam śaptvā ruṣā kadrūḥ kiñcid nā uktavatī tu sā mātrā śaptāḥ tathā nāgāḥ kartavyam na anvapatsata vāsukim duḥkhitam jñātvā brahmā provāca sāntvayan mā śucaḥ vāsuke atyartham śṛṇu mad vacana param yāyāvara kule jātaḥ jaratkārūḥ iti dvijaḥ bhavitā tasya putraḥ asau āstīkaḥ iti viśrutaḥ sa tat satram pravṛddham vai nāgānām bhaya dam mahat tat imām bhaginīm rājan tasya tvam pratidāsyasi jaratkārum jaratkāroḥ pradadyāḥ a vicārayan tat kartavyam aśaṅkena yadi iccheḥ śreyaḥ ātmanaḥ pitāmaha vacaḥ śrutvā vāsukiḥ praṇipatya ca punar jātam iva ātmānam menire bhujaga uttamāḥ proktam ca viṣṇunā pūrvam dharmaputrasya dhīmataḥ avaśyam tasya bhavitā nāgānām bhaya kārakam tasmāt kāla antarāt rājan sāgre varṣa śate gate tat satram bhavitā ghoram nāgānām kṣaya kārakam yāsyanti adharma bharitāḥ dandaśūkāḥ viṣa ulbaṇāḥ koṭi saṅkhyāḥ mahā rāja nipatiṣyanti aharniśam apūrve tu nimagnānām ghore raudra agni sāgare āstīkaḥ tatra bhavitā teṣām nauḥ vahni sāgare śrutvā sa ca agnim rājānam ṛtvijaḥ tad anantaram nivartayiṣyate yāgam nāgānām mohanam param pañcamyām tatra bhavitā brahmā provāca lelihān tasmāt iyam mahā bāho pañcamī dayitā sadā nāgānām ānanda karī dattā vai brahmaṇā purā kṛtvā tu bhojanam pūrvam brāhmaṇānām tu kāmataḥ visṛjya nāgāḥ prīyantām ye kecid pṛthivī tale ye nadīṣu mahā nāgāḥ ye sarasvati gāminaḥ ye ca vāpī taḍāgeṣu teṣu sarveṣu vai namaḥ nāgān viprān ca sampūjya visṛjya ca yathārthataḥ tatas paścāt tu bhuñjīta saha bhṛtyaiḥ narādhipa pūrvam madhuram aśnīyāt tatas bhuñjīta kāmataḥ mṛtaḥ nāgapuram yāti pūjyamānaḥ apsaraḥ gaṇaiḥ vimāna varam ārūḍhaḥ ramate kālam īpsitam iha ca āgatya rājā asau ayutānām varaḥ bhavet sarva ratna samṛddhaḥ syāt vāhana āḍhyaḥ ca jāyate pañca janmāni asau rājā dvāpare dvāpare bhavet ādhi vyādhi vinirmuktaḥ patnī putra sahāyavān tasmāt pūjyāḥ ca pālyāḥ ca ghṛta pāyasa guggulaiḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca daśanti ye naram vipra nāgāḥ krodha samanvitāḥ nāga daṣṭaḥ naraḥ rājan prāpya mṛtyum vrajati adhas adhas gatyā bhavet sarpaḥ nirviṣaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca nāga daṣṭaḥ pitā yasya bhrātā vā duhitā api vā mātā putraḥ atha vā bhāryā kim kartavyam vadasva me mokṣāya tasya vipra indra dānam vratam upoṣaṇam upoṣyā pañcamī rājan nāgānām puṣṭi vardhinī tvam evam ekam rāja indra vidhānam śṛṇu bhārata māsi bhādrapade yā tu kṛṣṇa pakṣe mahīpate mahā puṇyā tu sā proktā grāhyā api ca mahīpate jñeyāḥ dvādaśa ṣañcamyaḥ hāyane bharata ṛṣabha kṛtvā dāru mayān vā api atha vā mṛd mayān nṛpa pañcamyām arcayet bhaktyā nāgānām pañcakam nṛpa karavīraiḥ śatapatraiḥ jātī puṣpaiḥ ca suvrata brāhmaṇam bhojayet paścāt ghṛta pāyasa modakaiḥ anantaḥ vāsukiḥ śaṅkhaḥ padmaḥ kambalaḥ eva ca tathā karkoṭakaḥ nāgaḥ nāgaḥ hi aśvataraḥ nṛpa dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ śaṅkhapālaḥ kāliyaḥ takṣakaḥ tathā piṅgalaḥ ca tathā nāgaḥ māsi māsi prakīrtitāḥ vatsara ante pāraṇam syāt brāhmaṇān bhojayet bahūn itihāsa vide nāgam gairikeṇa kṛtam nṛpa tathā arcanā pradātavyā vācakāya mahīpate eṣa vai nāga pañcamyāḥ vidhiḥ proktā budhaiḥ nṛpa tava pitrā kṛtaḥ ca eva pituḥ mokṣāya bhārata suvarṇa bhāra niṣpannam nāgam dattvā tathā ca gām vyāsāya kuru śārdūla pituḥ ānṛṇyam āpnuyāḥ tava pitrā kṛtā hi evam pañcamī upāsanā nṛpa utsṛjya na āgatām vīra tava pūrva pitāmahaḥ puṣpa uttaram sadaḥ gatvā tathā puṣpa sadaḥ nṛpa daṣṭakaḥ mokṣyate teṣām śubham sthānam avāpsyati yaḥ ca idam śṛṇuyāt nityam naraḥ śraddhā samanvitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe nāgapañcamīvratavarṇanam nāma dvātriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha trayastriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca sarpāṇām kati rūpāṇi ke varṇāḥ kim ca lakṣaṇam kā jātiḥ tu bhavet teṣām keṣu yoni kuleṣu vā sarpāṇām kati rūpāṇi kim cihnam kim ca lakṣaṇam jātim kulam tadhā varṇān brūhi sarvam prajāpate katham vā jāyate sarpaḥ muñcet viṣam prabho viṣa vegāḥ kati proktāḥ kati eva viṣa nāḍikāḥ daṃṣṭrāḥ katividhāḥ proktāḥ kim pramāṇam viṣa āgame gṛhṇīte tu kadā garbham katham ca iha prasūyate kīdṛśī strī pumān ca eva kīdṛśaḥ ca napuṃsakaḥ tasya tat vacanam śrutvā kaśyapaḥ pratyabhāṣata śṛṇu gautama tattvena sarpāṇām iha lakṣaṇam māsi āṣāḍhe tathā jyeṣṭhe pramādyanti bhujaṅgamāḥ caturaḥ vārṣikān māsān nāgī garbham adhārayat tatas kārttika māse tu aṇḍakāni prasūyate aṇḍakānām tu vijñeye dve śate dve ca viṃśatī tāni eva bhakṣayet sā tu bhoga ekam ghṛṇayā tyajet svarṇa arka varṇāt vai tasmāt pumān sañjāyate aṇḍakāt tāni eva khādate sarpa ahorātrāṇi viṃśatim svarṇa ketaka varṇa ābhāt dīrgha rājīva sannibhāt tasmāt utpadyate strī vai aṇḍāt brāhmaṇa sattama śirīṣa puṣpa varṇa ābhā daṇḍakāt syāt napuṃsakaḥ tatas bhinatti ca aṇḍāni ṣaṣ māsena tu gautama tatas asau sapta rātreṇa kṛṣṇaḥ bhavati pannagaḥ āyuḥ pramāṇam sarpāṇām śatam viṃśa uttaram smṛtam mṛtyuḥ ca aṣṭavidhaḥ jñeyaḥ śṛṇuṣva atra yathākramam mayūrāt mānuṣāt vā api cakorāt gokhurāt tathā biḍālāt nakulāt ca eva varāhāt vṛścikāt tathā eteṣām yadi mucyeta jīvet viṃśa uttaram śatam sapta ahe tu tatas pūrṇe daṃṣṭrāṇām ca adhirohaṇam viṣasya āgamanam tatra nikṣipet ca punar punar evam jñātvā tu tattvena viṣa karmma ārabheta vai ekaviṃśati rātreṇa viṣa daṃṣṭrā su jāyate pañcaviṃśati rātraḥ tu sadyas prāṇa haraḥ bhavet ṣaṣ māsāt jāta mātraḥ tu kañcukam vai pramuñcati pādānām ca api vijñeye dve śate dve ca viṃśatī goloma sadṛśāḥ pādāḥ praviśanti kramanti ca sandhīnām ca asya vijñeye dve śate viṃśatī tathā aṃgulyaḥ ca api vijñeyāḥ dve śate viṃśatī tathā akāla jātāḥ ye sarpāḥ nirviṣāḥ te prakīrtitāḥ pañca saptati varṣāṇi āyuḥ teṣām prakīrtitam rakta pīta śukla dantāḥ anīlāḥ manda veginaḥ ete alpa āyuṣaḥ jñeyaḥ anye ca bhīravaḥ smṛtā dvātriṃśat daśanāḥ proktāḥ pannāgānām na saṃśayaḥ teṣām madhye catasraḥ tu daṃṣṭrāḥ yāḥ su viṣa āvahāḥ makarī karālī kālarātrī yamadūtī tathā eva ca sarvāsām ca eva daṃṣṭrāṇām devatāḥ parikīrtitāḥ prathamā brahma devatyā dvitīyā viṣṇu devatā tṛtīyā rudra devatyā caturthī yama devatā hīnā pramāṇataḥ sā tu vāmanetram samāśritā na asyām mantrāḥ prayoktavyāḥ na auṣadham na eva bheṣajam vaidyaḥ parāṅmukhaḥ yāti mṛtyuḥ tasyāḥ vilekhanāt makarīm māsikām vidyāt karālī ca dvi māsikā kālarātrī bhavet trīṇi caturaḥ yamadūtikā dadyāt kālarātrīm kaṭu yutam dūtīm vai sānnipātikam vidyāt kara ākṛtiḥ kālarātriḥ yāmyā kūrma ākṛtiḥ smṛtā makarī vātulā jñeyā karālī paittikī smṛtā śuklā tu makarī jñeyā karālī rakta sannibhā kālarātrī bhavet pītā kṛṣṇā ca yamadūtikā vāmā śuklā ca kṛṣṇā ca raktā pītā ca dakṣiṇā samāsena tu vakṣyāmi yathā etāḥ varṇataḥ smṛtāḥ śuklā tu brāhmaṇī jñeyā raktā tu kṣatriyā smṛtā vaiśyā tu pītikā jñeyā kṛṣṇā śūdrā tu kathyate atas param pravakṣyāmi daṃṣṭrāṇām viṣa lakṣaṇam daṃṣṭrāṇām tu viṣam nā asti nityam eva bhujaṅgame dakṣiṇam netram āsādya viṣam sarpasya tiṣṭhati mastakāt dhamanīm yāti tatas nāḍīṣu gacchati nāḍībhyaḥ padyate daṃṣṭrām viṣam tatra pravartate tat sarvam kathayiṣyāmi yathāvat anupūrvaśas aṣṭabhiḥ kāraṇaiḥ sarpaḥ daśate na atra saṃśayaḥ ākrāntaḥ daśate pūrvam dvitīyam pūrva vairiṇam tṛtīyam daśate bhītaḥ caturtham mada darpitaḥ pañcamam tu kṣudhā āviṣṭaḥ ṣaṣṭham ca iha viṣa ulbaṇaḥ saptamam pura rakṣā artham aṣṭamam kāla coditaḥ bala bhugna ākṛtim daṃṣṭrām ākrāntam tam vinirdiśet yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya gabhīram dṛśyate vraṇam vaira daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā ekam daṃṣṭrā padam yasya avyaktam na ca kalpitam bhīta daṣṭam vijānīyāt yathā uvāca prajāpatiḥ mada daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā dve ca daṃṣṭrā pade yasya dṛśyante ca mahā kṣatam kṣudhā āviṣṭam vijānīyāt yathā uvāca prajāpatiḥ viṣa ulbaṇam vijānīyāt daṃśam tam na atra saṃśayaḥ apatya rakṣaṇa arthāya jānīyāt tam na saṃśayaḥ mahānāgaḥ iti proktam kāladaṇḍam vinirdiśet trividham daṣṭa jātaiḥ tu lakṣaṇam samudāhṛtam daṣṭa anupītam vijñeyam kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā asādhyaḥ ca api vijñeyaḥ catur daṃṣṭra abhipīḍitaḥ grīvā bhaṅgaḥ bhavet kiñcid sandaṣṭaḥ viṣa yogataḥ itas daṃśaḥ tatas śuddhaḥ vyantaraḥ parikīrtitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe sarpadaṃṣṭrāvarṇanam nāma trayastriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ kāla lakṣaṇam kaśyapaḥ uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi kāla daṣṭasya lakṣaṇam śṛṇu gautama tattvena yādṛśaḥ bhavate naraḥ jihrā bhaṅgaḥ atha hṛd śūlam cakṣurbhyām ca na paśyati daṃśam ca dagdha saṃkāśam pakva jambu phala upamam vaivarṇyam ca eva dantānām śyāvaḥ bhavati varṇataḥ sarveṣu aṅgeṣu śaithilyam purīṣasya ca bhedanam bhagna skandha kaṭi grīvaḥ ūrdhva dṛṣṭiḥ adhomukhaḥ daṇḍena tāḍyamānasya daṇḍa rājī na jāyate daṃśe kākapadam su nīlam asakṛt jambū phala ābham ghanam ucchūnam rudhira ārdra seka bahulam kṛcchrāt nirodhaḥ bhavet hikkā śvāsa galagrahaḥ ca su mahān pāṇḍuḥ tvacā dṛśyate śuṣka aṅgaḥ pravadanti śāstra nipuṇāḥ tat kāladaṣṭam viduḥ daṃśe yasya atha śothaḥ pracalita valitam maṇḍalam vā su nīlam prasvedaḥ gātra bhedaḥ sravati ca rudhiram sa anunāsam ca jalpet danta uṣṭhābhyām viyogaḥ bhramati ca hṛdayam sannirodhaḥ ca tīvraḥ divyānām eṣa daṃśaḥ sthala vipula mayaḥ viddhi tam kāla daṣṭam dantaiḥ dantān spṛśati bahuśas dṛṣṭiḥ āyāsa khinnā sthūlaḥ daṃśaḥ sravati rudhiram kekaram cakṣuḥ ekam pratyādiṣṭaḥ śvasiti satatam sa anunāsam ca bhāṣet pāpam brūte sakala gaditam kāladaṇḍam tam āhuḥ grīvā bhaṅgaḥ calā nābhiḥ kāladaṣṭam vinirdiśet darpaṇe salile vā api ātma chāyām na paśyati manda raśmim tathā tīvram tejaḥ hīnam divākaram sa yāti nidhanam jantuḥ kāladaṇḍam vinirdiśet aṣṭamyām ca navamyām ca kṛṣṇa pakṣe caturdaśīm nāga pañcamī daṣṭānām jīvitasya ca saṃśayaḥ ārdrā āśleṣā maghā ābharaṇī kṛttikāsu viśeṣataḥ viśākhām triṣu pūrvāsu mūla svātī śata ātmake sarpa daṣṭāḥ na jīvanti viṣam pītam ca yaiḥ tathā śūnya āgāre śmaśāne ca śuṣka vṛkṣe tathā eva ca na jīvanti narāḥ daṣṭāḥ nakṣatre tithi saṃyute aṣṭa uttaram marma śatam prāṇinām samudāhṛtam teṣām madhye tu marmāṇi daśa dve ca api kīrtite śaṅkhe netre bhruvoḥ madhye vastibhyām vṛṣaṇa uttare eṣu dvādaśa marmeṣu daṃśaiḥ śastreṇa vā hataḥ na jīvati naraḥ loke kāla daṇḍam vinirdiśet dūtaḥ vā daṇḍa hastaḥ bhavati ca yugalam pāśa hastaḥ tathā vā rakta vastram ca kṛṣṇam mukha śirasi gatam eka vastraḥ ca dūtaḥ nāga udayam pravakṣyāmi īśānena tu bhāṣitam brahmaṇā tu purā sṛṣṭāḥ grahāḥ nāgāḥ tu anekaśas anantam bhāskaram vidyāt somam vidyāt tu vāsukim takṣakam bhūmiputram tu karkoṭam ca budham viduḥ padmam bṛhaspatim vidyāt mahāpadmam ca bhārgavam kulikaḥ śaṃkhapālaḥ ca dvau etau tu śanaiścaraḥ pūrva pādaḥ śaṃkhapālaḥ dvitīyaḥ kulikaḥ tathā śaniḥ prāk aṣṭame bhāge divārātre tu iha ucyate grahāḥ ca bhuñjate ca eva śeṣam bhāgasya lakṣaṇam ravivāre sadā jñeyau pādau daśa caturdaśa aṣṭa dvādaśa vai candre daśa ṣaṣṭhe kuje tathā guroḥ dvitīyaḥ ṣaṣṭhaḥ ca ṣoḍaśasya tu varjayet śanaiścara dine pādam tyajet ca eva su dāruṇam dvitīyam dvādaśam ca eva ṣoḍaśasya tu varjayet muhūrta ghaṭikāt ūrddhvam ghaṭikā caturtham bhāgam viṃśatiḥ ca kuhūsutam budbudam nimeṣam etat kālasya lakṣaṇam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe daṃśadaṣṭakadūtalakṣaṇam nāma catustriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ yamadūtī lakṣaṇam kaśyapaḥ uvāca sa viṣā daṃṣṭrayoḥ madhye yamadūtī tu vai bhavet na cikitsā budhaiḥ kāryā tam gatāsum viḥ nidaśet prahara ardham divārātrau ekaikam bhuñjate bahis ekasya ca samānam ca dvitīyam ṣoḍaśam tathā kāla daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā tad mātram sravate daṃṣṭrāḥ viṣam sarpasya dāruṇam nāḍī śate tu sampūrṇe dehe saṅkramate viṣam yāvat saṅkrāmayet bāhum kuñcitam vā prasārayet anena kṣaṇa mātreṇa viṣam gacchati mastake vardhate raktam āsādya tatas vātaiḥ śikhī yathā śikhaṇḍī āśrayam prāpya mārutena samīritaḥ tatas sthāna śatam prāpya tvacā sthānam viceṣṭitam tvacāsu dviguṇam vidyāt śoṇiteṣu caturguṇam pitte tu triguṇam yāti śleṣme vai ṣoḍaśam bhavet vāyau triṃśadguṇam ca eva majjā ṣaṣṭi guṇam tathā prāṇe ca ekārṇavībhūte sarva gātrāṇi sandhayet śrotre nirudhyamāne ca yāti daṣṭaḥ tu asādhya tām niṣkrānte tu tatas jīve bhūte pañcatvam āgate pṛthivī apaḥ tathā tejaḥ vāyuḥ ākāśam eva ca iti eṣām eva saṅghātaḥ śarīram abhidhīyate pṛthivī pṛthivīm yāti toyam toyeṣu līyate ākāśam ca evam ākāśe saha tena eva gacchati tṛtīye viṣa vege tu kampaḥ gātreṣu jāyate pañcame viṣa vege tu hikkā gātreṣu jāyate ṣaṣṭhe ca viṣa vege tu prāṇebhyaḥ api pramucyate sapta dhātu vahāḥ hi ete vainateyena bhāṣitāḥ tvacaḥ sthāne viṣe prāpte tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu arka mūlam apāmārgam priyaṅgum tagaram tathā tvacaḥ sthānam tatas bhittvā rakta sthānam pradhāvati viṣe ca raktam saṃprāpte tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya rakta gatam viṣam uśīram candanam kuṣṭham utpalam tagaram tathā bṛhatī vṛścikā kālī indra vāruṇi mūlakam sinduvāram tathā hiṅgum tṛtīye kārayet budhaḥ tasya pānam ca kurvīta añjanam lepanam tathā pitta sthāna gate vipra viṣa rūpāṇi me śṛṇu gātrataḥ pītakaḥ syāt vai diśaḥ paśyati pītikā prabalā ca bhavat mūrcchā na ca ātmānam vijānate pippalyaḥ madhukam ca eva madhu khaṇḍam ghṛtam tathā madhusāram alābūm ca jātim śaṅkaravālukām indravāruṇikā mūlam gavām mūtreṇa peṣayet nasyam tasya prayuñjīta pānam ālepana añjanam śleṣma sthānam tatas prāpte tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu gātrāṇi tasya rudhyante niḥśvāsaḥ ca na jāyate etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya śleṣma gatam viṣam trikuṭakī śleṣmātakaḥ lodhram ca madhusārakam etāni sama bhāgāni gavām mūtreṇa peṣayet tasya pānam ca kurvīta añjanam lepanam tathā tatra rūpāṇi vakṣyāmi vāyu sthāna gate viṣe ādhmāyate ca jaṭharam bāndhavān ca na paśyati īdṛśam kurute rūpam vṛṣṭi bhaṅgaḥ ca jāyate etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya vāyu gatam viṣam śoṇā mūlam priyālam ca raktam ca gajapippalīm bhārṅgīm vacām pippalīm ca devadārum madhūkakam madhūka sāram saha sinduvāram hiṅgum ca piṣṭāḥ guṭikām ca kuryāt dadyāt ca tasya añjana lepana ādi eṣaḥ agadaḥ sarpa viṣāṇi hanyāt añjanam ca eva nasyam ca kṣipram dadyāt viṣa anvite vāyu sthānam tatas muktvā majjā sthānam pradhāvati viṣe majja āgate vipra tasya rūpāṇi me śṛṇu dṛṣṭiḥ ca hīyate tasya bhṛśam aṅgāni muñcati etāni yasya rūpāṇi tasya majja āgatam viṣam ghṛta madhu śarkarā anvitam uśīram caṃdanam tathā etat āloḍya dātavyam pānam nasyam ca suvrata tatas praṇaśyate duḥkham tatas saṃpadyate sukham majjā sthānam tatas gatvā marma sthānam pradhāvati viṣe tu marma saṃprāpte śṛṇu rūpam yathā bhavet niśceṣṭaḥ patate bhūmau karṇābhyām badhiraḥ bhavet vāriṇā sicyamānasya romaharṣaḥ na jāyate daṃḍena hanyamānasya daṃḍa rājī na jāyate keśeṣu lucyamāneṣu na eva keśān pravedate yasya karṇau ca pārśve ca hasta pādam ca saṃdhayaḥ śithilāni bhavanti iha sa gatāsuḥ iti śrutiḥ etāni yasya rūpāṇi viparītāni gautama mṛtam tu na vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā vaidyāḥ tasya na paśyaṃti ye bhavanti kuśikṣitāḥ vicakṣaṇāḥ tu paśyaṃti maṃtra oṣadhi samanvitāḥ tasya agadam pravakṣyāmi svayam rudreṇa bhāṣitam mayūra pittam mārjāra pittam gandhanāḍī mūlam eva ca kuṃkumam tagaram kuṣṭham kāsamarda tvacam tathā etāni sama bhāgāni go mūtreṇa tu peṣayet kāla ahinā api daṣṭena kṣipram bhavati nirviṣaḥ kṣipram eva pradā tavyam mṛtasaṃjīvanī auṣadham aṃjanam ca eva nasyam ca kṣipram dadyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi paṃcamīkalpe dhātugataviṣakriyāvarṇanam nāma paṃcatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ kīdṛśam sarpa daṣṭasya sarpiṇyāḥ kīdṛśam bhavet kumāra
