daṣṭaḥ kīdṛś syāt sūtikā daṃśitasya ca rūpam napuṃsakena iha vyaṃtareṇa ca kīdṛśam etat ākhyāhi me sarvam ebhiḥ daṣṭasya lakṣaṇam kaśyapaḥ uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi nāgānām rūpa lakṣaṇam sarpa daṣṭasya ca tathā samāsāt dvija puṃgava atha sarpeṇa daṣṭasya ūrdhva dṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate sarpī daṣṭasya ca tathā adhas dṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate kanyā daṣṭasya vāmā syāt ṛṣṭiḥ dvijavara uttama kumāreṇa api daṣṭasya dakṣiṇā eva jāyate garbhiṇyāḥ vā atha daṣṭasya tathā svedaḥ ca jāyate romāṃcaḥ sūtikāyāḥ tu vepathuḥ ca api jāyate napuṃsakena daṣṭasya aṃgamardaḥ prajāyate napuṃsakaḥ tu saṃdhyāyām kaśyapena tu bhāṣitam daṣṭa rūpāṇi a jānan vai katham vaidya cikitsitam caturvidhāḥ iha proktāḥ pannagāḥ tu mahātmanā darvīkarāḥ maṃḍalinaḥ rājilāḥ vyaṃtarāḥ tathā darvīkarāḥ vātaviṣāḥ maṃḍalā paittikāḥ smṛtāḥ śleṣmalāḥ rājilrāḥ jñeyāḥ vyaṃtarāḥ sānnipātikāḥ raktam parīkṣayet eṣām sarpāṇām tu pṛthak pṛthak kṛṣṇam darvīkarāṇām tu jāyate na alpam ulbaṇam raktam ghanam ca bahuśas śoṇitam maṃḍalī kṛtam sarpāḥ jñeyāḥ tu catvāraḥ paṃcamaḥ nā upalabhyate brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyaḥ vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ ca eva caturthakaḥ vaiśye karṣa phalam dadyāt śūdre tri sthūṇam eva ca brāhmaṇena tu daṣṭasya dāhaḥ gātreṣu jāyate mūrcchā ca prabalā syāt vai na ātmānam abhijānate śyāma varṇam mukham ca syāt majjā staṃbhaḥ ca jāyate aśvagaṃdhā api apāmārgaḥ siṃduvāram surāmayam kṣatriyeṇa tu daṣṭasya kaṃpaḥ gātreṣu jāyate mūrchā mohaḥ tathā syāt vai na ātmānam abhivetti saḥ jāyate vedanā tasya ūrdhvam ca eva nirīkṣate arka mūlam apāmārgam priyaṃgum indravāruṇīm etat sarpiḥ samāyuktam pānam nasyam ca dāpayet vaiśyena api hi daṣṭasya śṛṇu rūpāṇi yāni tu mūrchā ca prabalā yasya ātmānam na abhinaṃdati aśva gaṃdhā sa go mūtrā gṛha dhūmam sa guggulam śirīṣa arka palāśena śvetā ca girikarṇikā go mūtreṇa samāyuktam pānam nasyam ca dāpayet eṣa vaiśyena daṣṭānām agadaḥ parikīrttitaḥ śūdreṇa api hi daṣṭasya śṛṇu tattvena gautama aṃgāni culuculāyaṃte śūdra daṣṭasya lakṣaṇam madhūka sāram madhu ca śvetām ca girikarṇikām etāni sama bhāgāni peṣayet śīta vāriṇā pāna lepa aṃjanaiḥ nasyaiḥ sukhī bhavati mānavaḥ aparāhne caret vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ saṃdhyā caraḥ bhavet āhāraḥ vāyupuṣpāṇi brāhmaṇānām viduḥ budhāḥ mūṣikā kṣatri yāṇām ca āhāraḥ dvijasattama vaiśyāḥ maṃḍūka bhakṣāḥ ca śūdrāḥ sarva āśinaḥ tathā vāma pārśve sadā vaiśyaḥ paścāt vai śūdraḥ ādaśet mada kāle tu saṃprāpte pīḍyamānāḥ mahāviṣāḥ avelāyām vai maithuna ārtāḥ bhujaṃgamāḥ puṣpa gaṃdhāḥ smṛtāḥ viprāḥ kṣatriyāḥ caṃdana āvahāḥ vaiśyāḥ ca ghṛta gaṃdhāḥ vai śūdrāḥ syuḥ matsya gaṃdhinaḥ vāsam teṣām pravakṣyāmi yathāvat anupūrvaśas vāpī kūpa taḍāgeṣu giri prasravaṇeṣu ca vasaṃti brāhmaṇāḥ sarpāḥ grāma dvāre catuṣpathe ārāmeṣu pavitreṣu śuciṣu āyataneṣu ca vasanti kṣatriyāḥ nityam toraṇeṣu saraḥsu ca śmaśāne bhasmaśālāsu palāleṣu taṭeṣu ca goṣṭheṣu pathi vṛkṣeṣu vipra vaiśyāḥ vasaṃti ca śūnya āgāre śmaśāne ca śūdrāḥ vipra vasaṃti ca śvetāḥ ca kapilāḥ ca eva ye sarpāḥ tu anala prabhāḥ manasvinaḥ sāttvikāḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ te budhaiḥ smṛtāḥ rakta varṇāḥ suvarṇa ābhāḥ pravāla maṇi saṃnibhāḥ sūrya prabhāḥ tathā vipra kṣatriyāḥ te bhujaṃgamāḥ nānā vicitra rājībhiḥ atasī varṇa sannibhāḥ bāṇa puṣpa savarṇa ābhāḥ vaiśyāḥ te vai bhujaṃgamāḥ kāka udara nibhāḥ kecid ye ca aṃjana sannibhāḥ kāka varṇāḥ dhūmra varṇāḥ te śūdrāḥ parikīrtitāḥ yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya daṃśam aṃguṣṭham aṃtaram bāla daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā yasya sarpeṇa daṣṭasya daṃśam dvi aṃgulam aṃtaram vṛddha daṣṭam vijānīyāt kaśyapasya vacaḥ yathā anaṃtaḥ prekṣate pūrvam vāma pārśve tu vāsukiḥ takṣakaḥ dakṣiṇena iha karkoṭaḥ pṛṣṭhatas tathā visaṃjñaḥ tiṣṭhate ca eva śaṃkhapālaḥ muhur muhur sarveṣām kurute rūpam kulikaḥ pannaga uttamaḥ anaṃtasya diśā pūrvā vāsukeḥ tu hutāśanī dakṣiṇā takṣakasya uktā karko ṭasya tu nairṛtī paścimā padmanābhasya mahāpadmasya vāyu jā uttarā śaṃkhapālasya aiśānī kaṃbalasya tu ananta kapilau viprau kṣatriyau śaṃkha vāsukī padma karkoṭakau śūdrau sadā jñeyau manīṣibhiḥ takṣakaḥ ca mahāpadmaḥ īṣat pītau babhū vatuḥ hayam yānam vṛṣam chatram rājānam atha pāvakam dharaṇīm utpādya dhṛtān etān siddhi karān viduḥ pūrṇa kumbhaḥ pātākā ca kāṃcanam maṇayaḥ tathā śirīṣam māṇikam kaṇṭhe jīvajīva iti suvrata eteṣām darśanam śreṣṭham kanyā ca ekaprasūyikā catuḥṣaṣṭiḥ samākhyātāḥ bhoginaḥ ye tu pannagāḥ adṛśyāḥ teṣu ṣaṭtriṃśat dṛśyāḥ triṃśat mahī carāḥ viṃśat ca sragviṇaḥ proktāḥ sapta maṃḍalinaḥ tathā rājīvantaḥ daśa proktāḥ darvyaḥ ṣoḍaśa paṃca ca duṃdubhaḥ ḍuṃḍubhaḥ ca eva ceṭabhaḥ ca iṃdravāhanaḥ nāgapuṣpa savarṇa ākhyāḥ nirviṣāḥ ye ca pannagāḥ evam eva tu sarpāṇām śata dvi navati smṛtam varāhakarṇīm gajapippalīm ca gāṃdhārikām pippala devadāru madhūka sāram saha siṃduvāram hiṃgum ca piṣṭvā guṭikā ca kāryā sumantuḥ uvāca lakṣaṇam sarva aināgānām rūpa varṇau viṣam tathā tasmāt saṃpūjayet nāgān sadā bhaktyā samanvitaḥ viśeṣataḥ tu paṃcamyām payasā pāyasena ca śrāvaṇe māsi paṃcamyām śukla pakṣe narāḥ dhipa dvārasya ubhayatas lekhyāḥ gomayena viṣa ulbaṇāḥ pūjayet vidhivat dvāram dadhi dūrvā akṣataiḥ kuśaiḥ gaṃdha puṣpa upahāraiḥ ca brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ ye tu asyām pūjaṃti iha nāgān bhakti puraḥsarāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi pañcamīkalpe śrāvaṇikanāgapañcamīvratavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭtriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumantuḥ uvāca tathā bhādrapade māsi paṃcamyām śraddhayā anvitaḥ atha ālekhya naraḥ nāgān kṛṣṇa varṇa ādi varṇakaiḥ pūjayet gaṃdha puṣpaiḥ ca sarpiḥ pāyasa guggulaiḥ tasya tuṣṭim samāyānti pannagāḥ takṣaka ādayaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śatarddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi paṃcamīkalpe bhādrapadikanāgapañcamīvratavarṇanam nāma saptatriṃśaḥ udhyāyaḥ sumantuḥ uvāca tathā ca āśvayuje māsi pañcamyām kuru naṃdana kṛtvā kuśa mayān nāgān gaṃdha āṃdyaiḥ saṃprapūjayet ghṛta udakābhyām payasā snapayitvā viśām pate yaḥ tu asyām vidhivat nāgān śuciḥ bhaktyā samanvitaḥ pūjayet kuru śārdūla tasya śeṣa ādayaḥ nṛpa nāgāḥ prītāḥ bhavanti iha śāṃtim āpnoti vā vibho sa śāṃti lokam āsādya modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ om kurukulle phaṭ svāhā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi paṃcamīkalpe samāptikathanam nāma aṣṭatriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca ṣaṣṭhyām phala aśanaḥ rājan viśeṣāt kārtike nṛpa rājya cyutaḥ viśeṣeṇa svam rājyam labhate ṣaṣṭhī tithiḥ mahā rāja sarvadā sarva kāma dā upoṣyā tu prayatnena sarvakālam jaya arthinā kārttikeyasya dayitā eṣā ṣaṣṭhī mahātithiḥ deva senā ādhipatyam hi prāptam tasyām mahātmanā asyām hi śreyasā yuktaḥ yasmāt skandaḥ bhava agraṇīḥ tasmāt ṣaṣṭhyām nakta bhojī prāpnuyāt īpsitam sadā dattvā arghyam kārtikeyāya sthitvā vai dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ prīyatām devasenānīḥ sampādayatu hṛdgatam paścāt bhuṅkte tu asau rātrau bhūmim kṛtvā tu bhājanam evam ṣaṣṭhyām vratam snehāt proktam skandena yatnataḥ ṣaṣṭhyām yaḥ tu phala āhāraḥ nakta āhāraḥ bhaviṣyati śuklā kṛṣṇāsu niyataḥ brahmacārī samāhitaḥ tasya siddhim dhṛtim tuṣṭim rājyam āyuḥ nirāmayam pāratrikam ca aihikam ca dadyāt skandaḥ na saṃśayaḥ svarge ca niyatam vāsam labhate na atra saṃśayaḥ devānām api vandyaḥ asau rājñām rājā bhaviṣyati yaḥ ca api śṛṇuyāt kalpam ṣaṣṭhyāḥ kuru kula udvaha tasya siddhiḥ tathā tuṣṭiḥ dhṛtiḥ syāt khyāti sambhavā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhīkalpavarṇanam nāma ekonacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca aho vratam mahat kaṣṭam saṃśayaḥ hṛdi vartate kārtikeyasya māhātmyam śrutvā janma tathā dvija jātiḥ śreṣṭhā bhavet vīre uta karma bhavet varam saṃśayaḥ tu mahān atra dṛṣṭvā me kṛttikāsutam imam artham purā pṛṣṭaḥ brahmā śiṣyaiḥ manīṣibhiḥ surajyeṣṭham sukha āsīnam abhigamya mahā ṛṣayaḥ praṇamya ca mahā bāho viśvāmitrasya vipra tām dṛṣṭvā vismayam āgatya kautūhala samanvitāḥ bhaktim śraddhām purodhāya praṇamya ānata kandharāḥ ṛṣayaḥ ūcuḥ bho brahman nāda kalpe hi brāhmaṇyam brūhi kim bhavet jāti adhyayana deha ātma saṃskāra ācāra karmaṇām bāhya ābhyantara sāmānya viśeṣāḥ yadi kṛtrimāḥ manaḥ vāc karma śārīra jāti dravya guṇa ātmakāḥ vastu bhūtāḥ parokṣaiḥ vā pramāṇaiḥ na viniścitāḥ vikalpaḥ ayam na puṣṇāti bhavataḥ śemuṣī balam śṛṇudhvam yoginaḥ vākyam sa tarkam śiṣya śreyase spaṣṭa yogya artha viṣayam pratyakṣam tāvat īkṣate kāryāḥ viśeṣāḥ veda uktāḥ na yuktam akṛtam vacaḥ tālu ādi karaṇānām ca vyāpāra anantaram śruteḥ vyāpārāt paratas tasya prāgabhāva viśeṣataḥ tasmāt dhūma agni vat vā artha phala bhāvaḥ avatiṣṭhate puruṣa anugatā jātiḥ brāhmaṇa tva ādikā asti ced dvi varṇa jāti bhedena pratyākṣa artha upalakṣaṇāt go varga madhyam ca gataḥ yathāśvaḥ nirdhāryate jñaiḥ su vicakṣaṇa tvāt manuṣya bhāvāt aviśiṣyamāṇaḥ tadvat dvijaḥ śūdra gaṇāt na bhinnaḥ manuṣya jāteḥ na paraḥ viśeṣaḥ yaḥ kalpyate sarva nara anuyāyī saṃskāra yuktāḥ hi kriyā viśiṣṭāḥ dvijanmanām śūdra viveka hetuḥ jīvaḥ api brāhmaṇaḥ proktaḥ yaiḥ a tattva jña mānavaiḥ prabhraṣṭa brāhmaṇa tvāḥ te jāyante viprasaṅgataḥ jarā janma antara kleśa duṣṭa grāha kulākulam śvānu śūkara cāṇḍāla kṛmi kūrma ādi kāyakam bhūri pāpa bhara ākrāntaḥ sa jīvaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ katham sapta vyādha kathāḥ viprāḥ manunā parikīrtitāḥ tam niśamya yaduśreṣṭha nityam jāti padam tyajet sapta vyādhāḥ daśārṇeṣu mṛgāḥ kālañjare girau cakravākāḥ sarit dvīpe haṃsāḥ sarasi mānase te api jātāḥ kurukṣetre brāhmaṇāḥ vedapāragāḥ prasthitāḥ dīrgham adhvānam mṛyam kim avasīdatha tasmāt na jīve brāhmaṇyam paśyāmaḥ hi kathañcana śastra ādimat bhārgava jāti yuktaḥ gaja aśva goja uṣṭra khara ādikānām śaktyā kṛtaḥ hi aṅga ja varṇa dharmaiḥ bhedaḥ sphuṭam lakṣaṇataḥ tad uttarāt na eva vikartanīyā brāhmaṇya jāti nṛṣu na asti kācid sita ādi asādhāraṇa tulya rūpāḥ sanātanaḥ aṅgeṣu na varṇa bhedaḥ sāṅketikam sukṛta leśa viśeṣa labdham vāṇijya bheṣaja kṛtām iva jāti bhedāḥ kim brāhmaṇāḥ ye sukṛtam tyajanti kim kṣatriyāḥ lokam apālayantaḥ svadharma hīnāḥ hi tathā eva vaiśyāḥ śūdrāḥ sva mukhya kriyayā vihīnāḥ evam pramāṇaiḥ pratiṣidhyamānām sāṅketikīm yāti naraḥ vyavasthām svakīya siddhām sva mataiḥ niṣiddhām na budhyate mūḍha manāḥ varākaḥ go mahiṣī aja vāji uṣṭra vāneya avi gaja adhipāḥ preṣya vārdhuṣika ākārya karaṇa udyata mānasāḥ vaṇij kāru kriyā āviṣṭāḥ divyāḥ te api ca ye dvijāḥ vinaṣṭāḥ te tu vijñeyāḥ kravyādāḥ ca kuśīlavāḥ palāṇḍu laśuna ādāḥ ca mṛgī uṣṭrī kṣīra pāyinaḥ māṃsa sarva rasa kṣīra kraya vikraya kāriṇaḥ punarbhū vṛṣalī veśyā cāṇḍāla strī niṣeviṇaḥ śūdra anna rasa puṣṭa aṅgāḥ preta vastra anna bhojanāḥ mṛta sūtaka labdha anna pāna ādi abhyavahāriṇaḥ brahma deva pitṛ bhūta manuṣyeṣu bahiṣkṛtāḥ mātsarya mada vidveṣa tṛṣṇā kāma tamaḥ mayāḥ hīna ācārāḥ hi ye kecid apare piśunāḥ dvijāḥ evam śāstra udita nyāya mārga bhraṣṭāḥ tu ye narāḥ viśiṣṭa gotra saṃskāra kalāpa sakala ātmakāḥ vedān adhyāpayantaḥ api te adhīyānāḥ śruti kramāt brāhmaṇa tvāt vihīyante durācāra vighāyinaḥ tasmāt na jātiḥ ekatra bhūtātmā asti anapāyinī na aśi tvāt atra ca ślokān mānavāḥ samadhīyate sadyas patati māṃsena lākṣayā lavaṇena ca tri aheṇa śūdraḥ bhavati brāhmaṇaḥ kṣīra vikayī gorakṣakān vāṇijikān tathā kāru kuśīlavān preṣyān vārdhuṣikān ca eva śūdrāḥ tān manuḥ abravīt śūdraḥ brāhmaṇa tām eti brāhmaṇaḥ ca eti śūdra tām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇa śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe kārtikeyavarṇane jātivarṇanam nāma catvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ vipra vat vaiśya rājanyau rākṣasāḥ rāvaṇa ādayaḥ śvāda cāṇḍāla dāsāḥ ca lubdhaka ābhīra dhīvarāḥ vṛṣalāḥ kecid te api vedān adhīyate yadā deśa antaram gatvā brāhmaṇyam kṣatriyam śritāḥ vyāpāra ākāra bhāva ādyaiḥ vipra tulyaiḥ prakalpitaiḥ vedān adhītya vedau vā vedam vā api yathākramam prodvahanti śubhām kanyām śuddha brāhmaṇa jāḥ narāḥ athavā adhītya vedān tu kṣatra vaiśyaiḥ tu vā narāḥ gauḍa pūrvām kṛtām eyuḥ jātim vā dākṣiṇātya jām a parijñāta śūdra tvāt brāhmaṇyam yānti kāmataḥ tasmāt na jñāyate bhedaḥ veda adhyāya kriyā kṛtaḥ śāstra kāraiḥ tathā ca uktam nyāya mārga anusāribhiḥ te sādhu matam ākarṇya santaḥ santi vimatsarāḥ ācāra hīnān na punaṃti vedāḥ yadi api adhītāḥ saha sadbhiḥ aṅgaiḥ śilpam hi veda adhyayanam dvijānām vṛttam smṛtam brāhmaṇa lakṣaṇam tu na tena kriyate kāryam strī ratnena iva ṣaṇḍhakaḥ śikhā praṇava saṃskāra sandhyā upāsana mekhalāḥ daṇḍa ajina pavitra ādyāḥ śūdreṣu api niraṅkuśāḥ prasaṅgaḥ api hi śūdrāṇām na śakyaḥ vinivāritum tasmāt na ete api lakṣyante vilakṣaṇa tayā nṛṇām yajñopavīta saṃskāra mekhalā cūlikā ādayaḥ ābhicārika mantra ādyaiḥ durlabha tva ādi bhāṣaṇaiḥ tapaḥ satya ādi māhātmyāt devatā samaya smṛtiḥ mantra śaktiḥ nṛṇām eṣām sarveṣām api vidyate śūdra brāhmaṇayoḥ tasmāt na asti bhedaḥ kathañcana śāpa anugraha kāri tvam śakti bhedaḥ na vidyate caura cāṭa ādi rājanya durjana abhihate nṛṇām ātma aduḥkha udaya apāyam sveṣu jantuṣu rakṣaṇam mā bhūt yuge kalau etad deśe ca akārya kṛt dvije syāt anya deśa kāla ādau dvijānām atiśāyinām saṃsāra ārakta cetaskāḥ moha andhatamasā āvṛtāḥ jāti dharmaḥ svayam kiñjit viśeṣaḥ śruti saṅgamāt asiddhaḥ śūdra jātīnām prasiddhaḥ vipra jātiṣu saṃskāraḥ yoni sādhyaḥ vā sāmagrī prabhavaḥ atha vā śūdrebhyaḥ atiśayam dhatte yaḥ sādhāraṇa tā guṇaḥ viprāṇām pañcadhā bhedaḥ kalpanīyaḥ tu paṇḍitaiḥ na jāti jaḥ trayī jaḥ vā viśeṣaḥ yukti bādhakāt svāntaḥ śarīra vṛtti sthaḥ śruti yogāt udeti yaḥ viśiṣṭa adhīti dharma tve kṛtrimā brahma saṅgatiḥ dṛśya svabhāvam kim abhīṣṭam etat brāhmaṇyam āhosvit adṛṣṭa rūpam sāmagrī abhāvāt paramam viśeṣam bhūdeva gātra stham abhūmidevāḥ sāmagrī anuṣṭhāna guṇaiḥ samagrāḥ śūdrāḥ yatas santi samāḥ dvijānām tasmāt viśeṣaḥ dvija śūdra nāmnoḥ na ādhyātmikaḥ bāhya nimittakaḥ vā hetu tvam ghaṭate nā eṣām jāti ādīnām asambhavāt jāteḥ akṛtaka tvāt ca adhīte na viśeṣataḥ saṃskāra atiśaya abhāvāt antarasya āgate paraiḥ dharmāt atiśayaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ krūra sāhasika ādiṣu tasmāt vipreṣu jāti ādi sāmagrī prabhavaḥ na saḥ sukha ādau na ca aiśvarye na ājñāyām na abhayeṣu api na vīrye na ākṛtau na akṣe na vyāpāre na ca āyuṣi na prajñāyām na vairāgye na dharme na parākrame śūdra brāhmaṇyoḥ bhedaḥ mṛgyamāṇaḥ api yatnataḥ ukta mātrā visambhūtiḥ vicāra krama kāribhiḥ vṛddha vṛndāraka adhīśaiḥ apradhṛṣyam idam vacaḥ na brāhmaṇāḥ candra marīci śubhrāḥ na kṣatriyāḥ kiṃśuka puṣpa varṇāḥ na ca iha vaiśyāḥ haritāla tulyāḥ śūdrāḥ na ca aṅgāra samāna varṇāḥ pāda pracāraiḥ tanu varṇa keśaiḥ sukhena duḥkhena ca śoṇitena tvak māṃsa medaḥ sthi rasaiḥ samānāḥ catuṣprabhedāḥ hi katham bhavanti varṇa pramāṇa ākṛti garbha vāsa vāc buddhi karma indriya jīviteṣu bala trivarga āmaya bheṣajeṣu na vidyate jāti kṛtaḥ viśeṣaḥ saḥ ekaḥ eva atra patiḥ prajānām katham punar jāti kṛtaḥ prabhedaḥ pramāṇa dṛṣṭānta naya pravādaiḥ parīkṣyamāṇaḥ vighaṭa tvam eti catvāraḥ ekasya pituḥ sutāḥ ca teṣām sutānām khalu jātiḥ ekā evam prajānām hi pitā ekaḥ evam pitrā eka bhāvāt na ca jāti bhedaḥ ye kauśikāḥ kāśyapa gautamāḥ ca kauṃḍinya māṇḍavya vaśiṣṭha gotrāḥ ātreya kautsa aṅgirasaḥ sa gargāḥ maudgalya kātyāyana bhārgavāḥ ca gotrāṇi nānāvidha jātayaḥ ca bhrātṛ snuṣā maithuna putra bhāvāḥ vaivāhikam karma na varṇa bhedaḥ sarvāṇi śilpāni bhavanti teṣām ye ca anye paṇḍitāḥ prāhuḥ deha brāhmaṇa tām narāḥ teṣām durdṛṣṭi timiram apanīya anukampya ca nyāya añjana auṣadhaiḥ divyaiḥ pariṇāma sukha āvahaiḥ upanītaḥ prayatnena su dṛṣṭim saṃvidadmahe mṛtimat tvāt ca nāśi tvam nāśi tvāt śeṣa bhūta vat deha ādhāra niviṣṭānām brāhmaṇyam na prakalpyate ekaikaḥ avayavaḥ teṣām na brāhmaṇyam samaśnute pṛthivī udaka vāyi agni pariṇāma viśeṣataḥ dehataḥ sarva bhūtānām brāhmaṇa tva prasaṅgataḥ saṃskartṛrṇām śarīrasya teṣām na brahma tā bhavet tasmāt na dehe brāhmaṇyam na api deha ātmakam bhavet varṇa apasada cāṃḍāla śvāda ādīnām prasajyate deha śakti guṇaiḥ kṣīṇaiḥ kāya bhasma ādi rūpa vat iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe brāhmaṇyavivekavarṇanam nāma ekacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvācatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ brāhmaṇa saṃskāra viveka varṇanam aparaiḥ ca sat ācāra yoga yuktaiḥ manīṣibhiḥ yat akāri mahāsattvaiḥ subhāṣitam idam śṛṇu jāti kula rūpa vayaḥ varṇa aneka śruta mada andhāḥ klībāḥ jñātvā bhava parivarte jātīnām koṭi śata sahasreṣu na ekān jāti viśeṣān indriya nivṛtti pūrvakān sarvān karma vaśāt gacchati atra kasya ekā śāśvatī jātiḥ nyāya jñaiḥ sa nirākāryaḥ vākyaiḥ nyāya anusāribhiḥ garbhādhānam puṃsavanam sīmantonnayanam tathā jātakarma nāmakarma tathā annaprāśanam ca vai cūḍa upanayanam ca asya vrata ādeśaḥ tathā eva ca iti evamādi saṃskāra vidhānaiḥ ye atisaṃskṛtāḥ te eva brāhmaṇāḥ yeṣām nairantaryeṇa kāmanāḥ yasmāt vai brāhmaṇāḥ jātāḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ kṛta saṃskṛtaiḥ na āyuḥ śaktiḥ hi kānti ādi viśeṣaḥ vidyate sphuṭaḥ tau vā brāhmaṇa gātra utthau saṃskṛta a saṃskṛtau narau iṣṭa aniṣṭa āpti anāptibhyām na bhidyete parasparam jñāna adhyayana mīmāṃsāḥ niyama indriya nigrahaiḥ vinā saṃskāra yoge api puṃsaḥ śūdrāt na bhinna tā saṃskāraḥ kriyamāṇaḥ ca na śūdre ca pravartate saṃskṛta aṅgaḥ ca pāpebhyaḥ na paśyati nivartate vilāsinī bhujaṃga ādi jana vat mada vihvalāḥ vyāmuhyanti sat ācārāt brāhmaṇa tvāt patanti ca saṃskṛtaḥ api durācāraḥ narakam yāti mānavaḥ niḥsaṃskāraḥ sat ācāraḥ bhavet vipra uttamaḥ sadā brāhmaṇyāt avikalpam sa paścāt duścaritaḥ naraḥ duranuṣṭhāna saktānām puṃsām puruṣa puṅgavaiḥ kim kvacid dṛṣṭam eva etat kim vā spardhā vidati ayam ācāram anuṣṭhintaḥ vyāsa ādi muni sattamāḥ garbhādhāna ādi saṃskāra kalāpa rahitāḥ sphuṭam vipra uttamāḥ śriyam prāptāḥ sarva loka namaskṛtāḥ jātaḥ vyāsaḥ tu kaivartyāḥ śvapākyāḥ ca parāśaraḥ śukyāḥ śukaḥ kaṇāda ākhyaḥ tathā ulūkyāḥ sutaḥ abhavat vaśiṣṭhaḥ gaṇikā ātmajaḥ mandapālaḥ muni śreṣṭhaḥ nāvika apatyam ucyate māṇḍavyaḥ muni rājaḥ tu maṇḍūkī garbha sambhavaḥ hariṇī garbha sambhūtaḥ ṛṣyaśṛṅgaḥ mahā muniḥ tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam śvapākī garbha sambhūtaḥ pitā vyāsasya pārthiva tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam ulūkī garbha sambhūtaḥ kaṇāda ākhyaḥ mahā muniḥ tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam gaṇikā garbha sambhūtaḥ vasiṣṭhaḥ ca mahā muniḥ tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam nāvikā garbha sambhūtaḥ mandapālaḥ mahā muniḥ tapasā brāhmaṇaḥ jātaḥ saṃskāraḥ tena kāraṇam labdha saṃskāra dehāḥ ca mahāpātakinaḥ narāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhīkalpe brāhmaṇasaṃskāravivekavarṇanam nāma dvācatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tricatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ kim ca anyat aparam yūyam veda mantra vidaḥ janāḥ praṣṭavyāḥ kasya saṃskāre viśeṣam upagacchata śukra śoṇita sambhūtaḥ śamala udbhava kīṭa vat niṣeka ādi śmaśāna antaiḥ vividhaiḥ vidhi vistaraiḥ teṣām gūḍha manaḥ kāya vāc viduṣṭaiḥ su ceṣṭitaiḥ a saṃyata manuṣyāṇām pakṣaḥ ayam dūṣyate mayā vaidika akhila saṃskāra sāra bhūtāḥ dvijātayaḥ sarva kārya karān sarvān vṛṣalān atiśerate stenaḥ go ghnaḥ surā pāṇaḥ para strī ramaṇa priyaḥ niṣiddha ācāra saṃsevī coraḥ cāṭaḥ mada uddhataḥ dhūrtaḥ naṭaḥ śaṭhaḥ pāpī sarva āśī sarva vikrayī vāc manaḥ kāya jaiḥ duṣṭaiḥ hatāḥ ye brāhmaṇa adhamāḥ śūdrāṇām yāni aniṣṭāni sampadyante svabhāvataḥ tasmāt mantraḥ agnihotram vā vedyām paśu vadhaḥ api vā hetavaḥ na hi vipra tve śūdraiḥ śakyā kriyā yathā saṃsāra anala santāpa viklavīkṛta mānasāḥ te janma maraṇa aṭavyām sukha amṛta pipāsavaḥ catur varṇāḥ narāḥ ye tu tad tad vīrye nara adhamāḥ teṣām sarva ātmanā sarvaiḥ dharmaiḥ sāṅkaryam īkṣyate tad anuṣṭhāna vaidharmya viyoga maraṇa ādibhiḥ asevya sevanaiḥ anyaiḥ śūdra vipra ādayaḥ samāḥ buddhyā śaktyā svabhāvena dharmaiḥ jāti ādibhiḥ śriyā kartavyaiḥ puṇya pāpābhyām śanais sarva śarīra gaiḥ bandhanaiḥ rodhanaiḥ nānā yātanā upāya pīḍanaiḥ daṇḍaiḥ adaṇḍa karaṇaiḥ viṣāda parivedanaiḥ sāttvikaḥ pratidharma ādyaiḥ rājasaiḥ citra veṣṭitaiḥ tāmasaiḥ tāpa moha ādyaiḥ dūyamānāḥ punar punar śleśma māruta pitta ādyaiḥ mahā bībhatsa darśanaiḥ kvacid vṛtti nivṛttibhyām amṛta anṛta hita ahitaiḥ alaṅkāra upayogena manmatha ādyaiḥ viceṣṭitaiḥ dhana lābha āśayāna eka jantu saṅghāta pātanaiḥ ātma sneha para dveṣa svīkṛta drava rakṣaṇaiḥ ati kṣība tva saṃkṣobha kṣuta kṣāma kṣamā āmayaiḥ yātanā upāya paiśunya śūnyatva upaśamaiḥ tathā apraśastaiḥ anuṣṭhānaiḥ samīpa sthāpadaḥ samāḥ hiṃsakāḥ prāṇinaḥ pāpa vitatha ālāpa bhāṣiṇaḥ sādhūnām bhāṣakāḥ stenāḥ nirdayāḥ pāradārikāḥ nīca karma samācārāḥ sarva bhakṣāḥ piśāca vat duṣkulīnāḥ durācārāḥ nṛpāṇām upajīvinaḥ viprakāryāḥ vikarma sthāḥ dhaninaḥ duṣṭa cetasaḥ lubdhakāḥ hariṇān hatvā vāsam kṛtvā yathā vane tathā khādanti piśunāḥ bahavaḥ ca kriyā vaśāt veda vādam adhīyānāḥ prāṇi ghāta abhiśaṃsinaḥ puṣṇanti kapaṭaiḥ arthān veda vikrayiṇaḥ adhamāḥ cāṭāḥ kārpaṭikāḥ kūrāḥ kadaryāḥ kalaha priyāḥ vācāṭa duṣṭa kulaṭāḥ aṭantaḥ bhāṭakaiḥ saha bhaṇḍa mānyāḥ bhaṭa āṭopaiḥ saṃkruddhāḥ su viluṇṭhakāḥ paryaṭāḥ bhāṭakāḥ jīvāḥ kaṇṭhaka śloka bhāṣiṇaḥ śūdra karma anutiṣṭhantaḥ nistapāḥ te nara adhamāḥ sevā adhyāpana vāṇijya kṛṣi ādi ārambha lambhitāḥ gṛhṇantaḥ sampadaḥ bāhayāt dravya dhānya dhana ādikāḥ krodhāt ābhyantarān doṣān tathā duṣṭa manorathān atyajantaḥ viśiṣṭānām śreṣṭhāḥ te kaca mardinaḥ na upadeyāni vastrāṇi nityam ādadate dvijāḥ dantikāḥ diṇḍikāḥ bhaṇḍāḥ caṇḍāḥ caṇḍāla ceṣṭitā vaitaṇḍakāḥ te nighnanti yathā siṃhaḥ mṛgān paśūn paribhūya avatiṣṭhante dhik tān riktān sa vairiṇaḥ tasmāt saṃsārikāḥ sattvāḥ citta kleśa kalaṅkitāḥ dauḥśīlya daurmanasya ādyaiḥ tulya jātīya bandhanāt śūdrām prarocate vipraḥ rāgiṇīm maithunam prati kāma kāma āturābhyaḥ tu rocante śūdra mānavāḥ maithunam prati brāhmaṇye te api tāsām sukha āvahāḥ ye tu jāti ādibhiḥ bhinnāḥ gavāśva uṣṭ mataṅga jāḥ anaḍvān eva goḥ eva kāmam puṣṇāti saṅgame ghoṭakāḥ ca ratim samyak kurvate vaḍavāsu ca tiryagjātiḥ striyā sākam kurvāṇā api hi maithunam na tasyāḥ kurute garbham naraḥ na api sukhāsikām tiraścā saha kurvāṇā maithunam manuja aṅganā na ādhatte tad kṛtam garbham na yuktam maithunam tayoḥ yena saṃkṣīyate bhedaḥ prasphuṭam dvija śūdrayoḥ bahubhiḥ jaḍa saṅghātaiḥ aviśiṣṭe pade ahani rāga dveṣa ādibhiḥ doṣaiḥ adhikam paripīḍite kulāla cakra vat bhrānta mānase viṣaya arṇave ghora duḥkha bhaya ākrānte samāje anīśvara ātmani janma mṛtyu jarā śoka aniṣṭa yoga agni pīḍite hīna sattva śarīra ādau na viśeṣaḥ vibhāvyate brāhmaṇyam brāhmaṇa āsaṅgāt brāhmaṇī ca upasevate āsevyate viṭam gatvā bandhakī ceṭakaiḥ api brāhmaṇyāt pracyavante anye mahāpātaka sevitāḥ vyalīka kalpanā eva eṣā tasmāt jāti ādi kalpanā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe varṇavyavasthāvarṇanam nāma tricatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catuścatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ heya upādeya tattva jñāḥ tyakta anyāya patha āgamāḥ jita indriya manaḥ vācaḥ sat ācāra parāyaṇāḥ niyama ācāra vṛtta sthāḥ hita anveṣaṇa tatparāḥ saṃsāra rakṣaṇa upāya kriyā yukta manorathāḥ svādhyāya bhakta hṛdayāḥ tyakta saṅgāḥ vimatsarāḥ viśokāḥ vimadāḥ sarva prāṇi hita eṣiṇaḥ sukha duḥkha samālokāḥ vivikta sthāna vāsinaḥ vrata upayukta sarva aṅgāḥ dhārmikāḥ pāpa bhīravaḥ nirmamāḥ nirahaṅkārāḥ dāna śūrāḥ dayā parāḥ satya brahma vidaḥ śāntā sarva śāstreṣu niṣṭhitāḥ vāc īśvareṇa devena nābheyena bhavat chidā brahmaṇā kṛta maryādāḥ te evam brāhmaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ sarvaloka hita arthāya nipuṇam su pratiṣṭhitam vṛhat tvāt bhagavān brahmā nābheyaḥ tasya ye janāḥ bhakti āsaktāḥ prapannāḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ te prakīrtitāḥ kṣatriyāḥ tu kṣata trāṇāt vaiśyāḥ vārtā praveśanāt ye tu śruteḥ drutim prāptāḥ śūdrāḥ tena iha kīrtitāḥ ye ca ācāra ratāḥ prāhuḥ brāhmaṇyam brahma vādinaḥ kṣamā damaḥ dayā dānam satyam śaucam dhṛtiḥ ghṛṇā mārdava ārjava santoṣa anahaṅkāra tapaḥ śamāḥ dharmaḥ jñānam apaiśunyam brahmacaryam amūḍha tā dhyānam āstikyam adveṣaḥ vairāgyam ca śama ātma tā pāpa bhīru tvam asteyam amātsaryam atṛṣṇa tā naiḥsaṅgyam guru śuśrūṣā manaḥ vāc kāya saṃyamaḥ ye evambhūtam ācāram anutiṣṭhanti mānavāḥ brāhmaṇyam puṣkalam teṣām nityam eva pravardhate te sva mata āsvāda labdha varṇa ācārāḥ mahā ojasaḥ sarva śāstra avirodhena pavitrīkṛta mānasāḥ sat jana abhimatāḥ prājñāḥ purāṇa āgama paṇḍitāḥ gīta gīta āgama ācārāḥ smṛti kārāḥ paṭhanti ca varṇa āśrama ācāra kṛtam karma siddhi ati anuttamam saṃsiddhāyām tu vārtāyām tatas teṣām svayam prabhuḥ maryādām sthāpayāmāsa yathā ārabdham parasparam ye vai parigṛhītāraḥ teṣām sattva bala adhikāḥ itareṣām kṣata trāṇān sthāpayāmāsa kṣatriyān upatiṣṭhanti ye tān vai yācantaḥ narmadāḥ sadā ye ca anye api abalāḥ teṣām vaiśya karmaṇi saṃsthitāḥ kīlāni nāśayanti sma pṛthivyām prāk atandritāḥ vaiśyān eva tu tān āha kīnāśān vṛttim āśritān śocantaḥ ca dravantaḥ ca paricaryāsu ye narāḥ nistejasaḥ alpa vīryāḥ ca śūdrān tān abravīt tu saḥ brāhmaṇa kṣatriya viśām śūdrāṇām ca parasparam śamaḥ tapaḥ damaḥ śaucam kṣāṃtiḥ ārjavam eva ca jñānam vijñānam āstikyam brahma karma svabhāva jam śauryam tejaḥ dhṛtiḥ dākṣyam yuddhe ca api apalāyanam dānam īśvara bhāvaḥ ca kṣātram karma svabhāva jam kṛṣi gorakṣa vāṇijyam vaiśya karma svabhāva jam yogaḥ tapaḥ dayā dānam satyam dharma śrutiḥ ghṛṇā jñānam vijñānam āstikyam etat brāhmaṇa lakṣaṇam śikhā jñāna mayī yasya pavitram ca tapaḥ mayam brāhmaṇyam puṣkalam tasya manuḥ svāyambhuvaḥ abravīt yatra vā tatra vā varṇe uttama adhama madhyamāḥ nivṛttaḥ pāpa karmebhyaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ sa vidhīyate śūdraḥ api śīla sampannaḥ brāhmaṇāt adhikaḥ bhavet brāhmaṇaḥ vigata ācāraḥ śūdrāt hīnataraḥ bhavet na surām sandhayet yaḥ tu āpaṇeṣu gṛheṣu ca yadī ekā sphuṭam eva jātiḥ aparā kṛtyāt param bhedinī kim nā asau pratipatti gocara patham yāyāt vibhaktyā nṛṇām śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe varṇavibhāgavivekavarṇanam nāma catuścatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ idam śruṇu mayā ākhyātam tarka pūrvam idam vacaḥ yuṣmākam saṃśaye jāte kṛte vai jāti karmaṇoḥ saṃsiddhim yānti manujāḥ jāti karma samuccayāt evam saṃsiddhim āyāti puruṣaḥ jāti karmaṇoḥ iti evam uktavān pūrvam śiṣyāṇām bodhane purā yogi īśvaraḥ mahā tejāḥ samāsāt na tu vistarāt iti pṛṣṭaḥ purā brahmā ṛṣīn provāca bhārata sa vitarkam idam vākyam viprarṣe jāti karmaṇoḥ tasmāt tvayā mahā bāho na kāryaḥ vismayaḥ nṛpa kārtikeyam prati sadā devānām durvidā gatiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhahasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ṣaṣṭhī kalpe kārtikeyavarṇanam nāma pañcacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṭcatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ yā iyam bhādrapade māsi ṣaṣṭhī ca bharata ṛṣabha su puṇyā iyam pāpa harā śivā śāntā guhapriyā snāna dāna ādikam sarvam yasyām akṣayyam ucyate ye asyām paśyanti gāṅgeyam dakṣiṇāpatham āśritam brahmahatyā ādibhiḥ pāpaiḥ mucyante na atra saṃśayaḥ tasmāt asyām sadā paśyet kārttikeyam nṛpa uttama pūjayanti guham ye asyām narāḥ bhakti samanvitāḥ yaḥ tu kārayate veśma su dṛḍham su pratiṣṭhitam dārvam śaila mayam ca api bhaktayā śraddhā samanvitaḥ gāṅgeyam yānam āruhya gacchet gāṅgeya sadma vai sammārjana ādi yaḥ karma kuryāt guha gṛhe naraḥ gaja aśva ratha yāna āḍhyam saināpatyam avāpnute rājñām pūjyaḥ sadā proktaḥ kārtikeyaḥ mahīpate kārttikeyam ṛte na anyam rājñām pūjyam pracakṣate saṅgrāmam gacchamānaḥ yaḥ pūjayet kṛttikāsutam sa śatrum jayate vīra yathā indraḥ dānavān raṇe tailam ṣaṣṭhyām na bhuñjīta na divā kuru nandana yaḥ tu ṣaṣṭhyām naraḥ naktam kuryāt hi bharata ṛṣabha tri kṛtvas dakṣiṇām āśām gatvā yaḥ śraddhayā anvitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām ṣaṣṭhī kalpe kārttikeyamāhātmayavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti ṣaṣṭhī kalpaḥ samāptaḥ atha saptacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śākasaptamīvrata varṇanam saptamyām sa upavāsaḥ tu nakta āhāraḥ api vā bhavet saptamyām devadevena labdham svam rūpam ādarāt aṇḍena saha jātaḥ vai aṇḍa sthaḥ buddhim āptavān aṇḍa sthasya eva dakṣeṇa bhāryām dattvā svakām sutām nāmnā rūpa iti rūpeṇa na anyā nārī tathā bhavet aṇḍa sthaḥ eva su ciram sthitaḥ mārtaṇḍaḥ iti atas dakṣa ājñayā viśvakarmā vapuḥ asya prakāśayan prakāśataḥ tatas nāma tasya jātam narādhipa dākṣāyaṇī tasya bhāryā vairāgyāt tanu madhyamā cintayāmāsa sā devī duḥkhāt nirvedam āgatā aho tejaḥ mayam rūpam kāntam kāntasya kāntimat na ca asya kiñcid paśyāmi aṅgam tejaḥ vimohitam śubham kanaka tulyam me rūpam kāntam su kāntimat sāmpratam śyāma tām yātam dagdham etasya tejasā tasmāt tapsye tapaḥ ca aham gatvā vai uttarān kurūn svām chāyām atra nikṣipya bhayāt śāpasya rūpiṇī nikṣipya uvāca tām bālām mā ca asmai vai vadiṣyasi evam sā niścayam kṛtvā gatā vai uttarān kurūn sva rūpam tatra nikṣipya vaḍavā rūpa dhāriṇī cacāra sā mṛgaiḥ sārdham bahūn varṣa gaṇān nṛpa asau api ca mārtaṇḍaḥ chāyām bhāryām amanyat śanim ca tapatīm ca eva dve apatye ca jajñivān atha tābhyām vivādaḥ abhūt āditya duhitroḥ dvayoḥ yamaḥ api yamunā bhrātā chāyayā tāḍitaḥ bhṛśam chāyā śaśāpa tam roṣāt yasmāt pāda udyataḥ mama tasmāt te karma bībhatsam prāṇinām prāṇa hiṃsanam bhaviṣyati ciram mūḍhaḥ ācandrārkam na saṃśayaḥ pādam ca yadi bhūmau tvam imam saṃsthāpayiṣyasi kṛmayaḥ bhakṣayiṣyanti mad śāpa kaluṣīkṛtam teṣām vivadamānānām mārtaṇḍaḥ abhyāgamat tatas yamaḥ api āha mahātmānam mārtaṇḍam loka pāvanam tāta nityam iyam ca api krūra bhāvena paśyati na ca asyāḥ su samā dṛṣṭiḥ asmāsu asti iti lakṣyate provāca atha sa tām chāyām mārtaṇḍaḥ bhṛśa kopanaḥ same apatye kim mūḍhe sama tvam na anupaśyasi yamaḥ provāca pitaram na iyam mātā pitar mama mātuḥ chāyā tu iyam pāpā śaptaḥ aham anayā pitar atha provāca mārtaṇḍaḥ mā te pādaḥ mahī tale māṃsam rudhiram ādāya kṛmayaḥ yāntu bhū talam yamunāyāḥ ca yat toyam gaṅgā tulyam bhaviṣyati narmadāyāḥ tapatyāḥ ca samam puṇyena vai dvija tad sāyujya tayā sāgram gaṅgā yāsyati śobhanā gaṅgām āsādya yamunā gaṅgā sā eva bhaviṣyati saurī ca vaiṣṇavī ca ubhe mahā pāpa bhaya apahe tvam putra lokapāla tvam brahmaṇaḥ ajñām sabhājayan evam saṃsthāpya svām bhāryām apatyāni tathā eva ca ājagāma sakāśam vai dakṣasya āha ca kāraṇam dakṣaḥ vijñāya tat sarvam mārtaṇḍam idam āha vai rūpam na paśyatī tubhyam sā bhāryā uttarān gatā rūpam te prakaṭiṣyāmi yadi śakṣyasi vedanām asau provāca śakṣye aham prakāśī kuru me vapuḥ atha sasmāra takṣāṇam smṛtaḥ eva ājagāma saḥ provāca dakṣaḥ takṣāṇam mārtaṇḍam vai prakāśaya takṣā provāca mārtaṇḍam vedanāḥ visahiṣyase visahiṣyetha provāca takṣāṇam dakṣa coditaḥ atha takṣā prakāśam vai tasya rūpam vibhāvasau mukhāt ārabhya pāda antam tatakṣa karaṇaiḥ svakaiḥ kiraṇaiḥ tudyamāneṣu tasya aṅgeṣu punar punar kṣaṇekṣaṇe mūrchayati mārtaṇḍaḥ vedanā āturaḥ tasya śāpa bhayāt takṣā pādau gulpha ādi yāvataḥ cakāra atha u nirākārāḥ aṅgulyaḥ na prakāśayat paryāptam takṣa karma idam vedanā mama bādhate takṣā provāca mārtaṇḍam vedanām jahi gopate karāt ārabhya gātrāṇi vilimpe deha jāni te atas ca imāni ceṣṭāni mārtaṇḍasya iha bhūpate itihāsa purāṇābhyām suparṇa guggulam tathā mārtaṇḍasya aṇḍa jam tejaḥ gṛhītvā kila bhārata cakāra vajram ajaram śatru lekhā ādi nāśanam mārtaṇḍaḥ parituṣṭaḥ abhūt labdhvā rūpam gata vyathaḥ jagāma sa kurūn vegāt sva bhāryā darśana utsukaḥ mṛga madhya gatām dṛṣṭvā vaḍavā rūpa dhāriṇīm aśva rūpam tatas kṛtvā sva bhāryām adhiruhya saḥ para puruṣa āśaṅkayā sā sthitā devasya saṃmukhī tejaḥ nāsā puṭābhyām tu yugapad sā akṣipat punar tatra jātau devabhiṣajau nāsatyau aśvinau iti tapatī śaniḥ ca sāvarṇiḥ chāyā apatyāni vai viduḥ yamunā yamaḥ ca pūrva uktau saṃjñā yāḥ ca tathā ātmajau bhāryā labdhā vapuḥ divyam tathā putrāḥ ca bhārata anena kāraṇena iṣṭā sadā devasya saptamī saptamyām sa upavāsaḥ tu rātrau bhuñjīta yaḥ naraḥ kṛtvā upavāsam ṣaṣṭhyām tu pañcamyām eka kāla bhuj dattvā su saṃskṛtam śākam bhakṣya bhojyaiḥ samanvitam devāya brāhmaṇebhyaḥ ca rātrau bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ mṛtaḥ ca svargam āyāti vimāna varam āsthitaḥ iha ca āgatya kāla ante nṛpaḥ śānti samanvitaḥ putra pautraiḥ parivṛtaḥ dātā syāt nṛpatiḥ ciram ye narāḥ rāja śārdūla śāka āhāreṇa saptamīm upoṣya labdham tat tīrtham pitryam vai rāja saṃjñikam kuruṇā tava pūrveṇa śāka āhāreṇa saptamīm dharma kṣetram kurukṣetram kṛtam tasya vivasvatā saptamī navamī ṣaṣṭhī tṛtīyā pañcamī nṛpa saptamī māgha māse tu navamī āśvayuje matā ṣaṣṭhī bhādrapade dhanyā vaiśākhe tu tṛtīyikā puṇyā bhādrapade proktā pañcamī nāgapañcamī iti etāḥ teṣu māseṣu viśeṣāḥ tithayaḥ smṛtāḥ śākam su satkṛtam kṛtvā yaḥ ca bhaktyā samanvitaḥ dattvā vipre yathāśaktyā paścāt bhuṅkte niśi vratī catubhiḥ vā api māsaiḥ tu pāraṇam prathamam smṛtam agastya kusumaiḥ ca atra pūjā kāryā vibhāvasoḥ vilepanam kuṅkumam tu dhūpaḥ ca eva aparājitaiḥ snānam ca pañcagavyena tam eva prāśayet tatas tat eva deyam viprāṇām śākam bhakṣyam atha ātmanā śubha śāka samāyuktam bhakṣya peya samanvitam dvitīye pāraṇe rājan śubha gandhāni yāni vai puṣpāṇi tāni devasya tathā śvetam ca candanam aguruḥ ca api dhūpaḥ atra naivedyam guḍa pūpakāḥ snānam kuśa udakena atra prāśanam gomayasya tu tṛtīye karavīrāṇi tathā raktam ca candanam dhūpānām guggulaḥ ca atra priyaḥ devasya sarvadā śālyodanam tu naivedyam dadhi miśram mahāmate kālaśākena ca vibho yuktam dadyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ tasya eva prāśanam dhanyam sarva pāpa haram śubham tṛtīye pāraṇasya ante mahat brāhmaṇa bhojanam śravaṇam ca purāṇasya vācanam ca api śasyate daivasya puratas tāta brāhmaṇānām tathā agratas brāhmaṇāt vācakāt śrāvyam na anya varṇa samudbhavāt atha tān brāhmaṇān sarvān bhaktyā śaktyā ca pūjayet vācake pūjite devaḥ sadā tuṣyati bhāskaraḥ karavīram yathā iṣṭam tu tathā raktam ca candanam yathā iṣṭam guggulam tasya yathā iṣṭam pāyasam sadā yathā iṣṭāḥ modakāḥ tasya yathā vai tāmra bhājanam yathā iṣṭam ca ghṛtam tasya yathā iṣṭaḥ vācakaḥ sadā purāṇam ca yatheṣṭam vai savituḥ kuru nandana iti eṣā saptamī puṇyā śāka āhvā gopateḥ sadā yām upoṣya naraḥ bhaktyā bhāgyavān ca prajāyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe śākasaptamīvratavarṇanam nāma saptacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ āditya māhātmya varṇanam śatānīkaḥ uvāca atra eva āhuḥ mahātmānaḥ samvādam puṇyam uttamam iha amutra hitam śāṃbaḥ papraccha jñānam uttamam prāpnoti vividhān kāmān katham ca madhusūdana anubhūya ucitam kālam katham muktim avāpnute dṛṣṭvā evam mama nirvedaḥ jātaḥ vyādhiḥ janārdana dṛṣṭvā imam jīvita āśā api rocate na hi me kṣaṇam kim tu evam akṛtārthaḥ asmi yat me prāṇāḥ na yānti hi saṃsāre na patiṣyāmi jarā vyādhi samanvite ādhi vyādhi vinirmuktaḥ yathā aham syām tathā vada vāsudevaḥ uvāca devatāyāḥ prasādaḥ anyaḥ sarvasya paramaḥ mataḥ upāyaḥ śāśvataḥ nityaḥ iti me niścitā matiḥ anumāna āgama ādyaiḥ ca samyak utpāditāḥ mayā yadā tām ca samuddiśya kṛtā tad vedinā tathā viśiṣṭā devatā samyak viśiṣṭena eva dehinā ārādhitā viśiṣṭam ca dadāti phalam īhitam śāmbaḥ uvāca astitve na ca sandehaḥ keṣāñcid devatām prati na asti iti niścayaḥ anyeṣām viśiṣṭāḥ tvam kathāḥ kuruḥ vāsudevaḥ uvāca pramāṇam asti yasya idam siddhāḥ yasya iha ca astitā pratyakṣeṇa api ca astitvam devatāyām prasādhyate tat ca avaśyam pramāṇam ca dṛṣṭam sarva śarīriṇām śāmbaḥ uvāca anumāna āgamābhyām ca tad artham prayojanam vāsudevaḥ uvāca anumāna āgamaiḥ gamyāḥ santi ca anyāḥ sahasraśas śāmbaḥ uvāca yā ca akṣa gocarā kācid viśiṣṭa iṣṭa phala pradā tām eva ādau mama ācakṣva kathayiṣyasi atha aparām vāsudevaḥ uvāca pratyakṣam devatā sūryaḥ jagat cakṣuḥ divākaraḥ tasmāt abhyadhikā kācid devatā na asti śāśvatī yasmāt idam jagat jātam layam yāsyati yatra ca kṛta ādi lakṣaṇaḥ kālaḥ smṛtaḥ sākṣāt divākaraḥ graha nakṣatra yogāḥ ca rāśayaḥ karaṇāni ca ādityāḥ vasavaḥ rudrāḥ aśvinau vāyavaḥ analaḥ lokāḥ sarve nagāḥ nāgāḥ saritaḥ sāgarāḥ tathā prasādāt asya lokaḥ ayam ceṣṭamānaḥ pradṛśyate astam yāti iti adṛśyena kim etat kathyate mayā tasmāt atas param na asti na bhūtam na bhaviṣyati itihāsa purāṇeṣu antarātmā iti gīyate bāhya ātmā eti suṣumṇā sthaḥ svapna sthaḥ jāgrataḥ sthitaḥ astam yāti iti adṛṣṭena kim etat kathyate mayā tasmāt atas param na asti na bhūtam na bhaviṣyati vaktum varṣa śataiḥ nā asau śakyaḥ saṃkṣepataḥ mayā tasmāt guṇa ākaraḥ khyātaḥ sarvatra ayam divākaraḥ jātāḥ matsya ādayaḥ samyak gatimantaḥ maheśvarāt maṇḍala vyatiriktam ca jānāmi paramārthataḥ tathā asya maṇḍalam kṛtvā yaḥ hi enam upatiṣṭhate prātar sāyam ca madhyāhne sa yāti paramām gatim tasmāt tvam iha duḥkhānām antam kartum yadi icchasi iha amutra ca bhogānām bhuktim muktim ca śāśvatīm aṅgaiḥ vṛtam vṛte ca eva sthāne śāstreṇa śodhite na bhayam vidyate teṣām prapannāḥ ye divākaram iha amutra sukham teṣām acchidram jāyate sukham sūryeṇa idam mama uddiṣṭam sākṣāt yat jñānam uttamam etat saṃkṣiptam uddiṣṭam kṣipra siddhi karam param yathā na anyat atas asti iti svayam tūryeṇa bhāṣitam upāyaḥ ayam samākhyātaḥ tava saṃkṣepataḥ tu iha yasmāt parataraḥ nā asti hita upāyaḥ śarīriṇām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe ādityamāhātmyavarṇanam nāma aṣṭacatvāriṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya māhātmya varṇanam vāsudevaḥ uvāca yatas tatas pravakṣyāmi snānam ādau samāsatas ācāntaḥ tam upālabhya mudrayā śuci śuddhayā kṛtvā nīrājanam putra saṃśodhya ca jalam tatas dvis ācamya atha samprokṣya tanum sapta akṣareṇa ca dattvā tena japitvā tam svakam dhyātvā arka vat hṛdi gatvā ca āyatanam śubhra mārka mārkī tanum yajet pūrakam kumbhakam kṛtvā recakam ca samāhitaḥ kṛtvā uṅkāreṇa doṣān tu hanyāt kāya ādi sambhavān vāyavya āgneya māhendra vāruṇībhiḥ yathākramam kilviṣam vāruṇa adbhiḥ ca hanyāt siddhi artham ātmanaḥ śoṣaṇam dahanam stambham plāvanam ca yathākramāt vāyu agni indra jana ākhyābhiḥ dhāraṇābhiḥ kṛte sati dhyātvā viśuddham ātmānam praṇamet arkam āsthitam sūkṣmam sthūlam tathā akṣāṇi sva sthāneṣu prakamya ca vinyasya aṅgāni kha ādīni hṛd ādyāni hṛdi ādiṣu kha svāhā hadayam bhānoḥ kham arkāya śiraḥ tathā ulkā svāhā śikhā arkasya yai ca hum kavacam param khāṃ phaṭ astram ca saṃhārāḥ ca āditas praṇavaḥ kṛtaḥ samprokṣya pūjayet sūryam gandha puṣpa ādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ tatas mūrtiṣu sarvāsu rātrau agnau prapūjayet prāc paścima udak abhyagrām prātar sāyam niśāsu vai sapta akṣareṇa tat mantram dhyātvā ca padma karṇikām prabhā maṇḍala madhya stham dhyātvā deham yathā purā raktacandana miśraiḥ vā vastraiḥ āvaraṇaiḥ śubhaiḥ āvāhana ādi karmāṇi rakṣām tu hṛdayena ca tad cittaḥ ca sadā kuryāt jñātvā karma kramam budhaḥ kṛtvā ca āvāhanam mantraiḥ ekatra sthāpanam tatas yāvat yāga avasānam tu sānnidhyam tatra kalpya ca dattvā pādya ādikām pūjām śaktyā vā arghyam nivedya ca eṣa karma kramaḥ proktaḥ sarveṣām yajana kramāt pravakṣyāmi japa sthānam padmeśa āvaraṇe tathā ādityam karṇikā saṃstham daleṣu aṅgāni pūrvaśas soma ādīn rāhu paryaṃtān grahān ca eva udak ādeḥ mūrtimat lokapālān ca kramāt āvaraṇeṣu atha tad astrāṇi ca rakṣā artham sva mantraiḥ pūjayet kramāt praṇavaiḥ ca abhidhānaiḥ ca caturthyām hi abhiyojitaiḥ sarveṣām kathitāḥ mantrāḥ mudrāḥ ca kathayāmi atas vyomamudrā ratiḥ padmā mahā śveta astram eva ca pañcamudrāḥ samākhyātāḥ sarva karma prasiddhaye uttānau tu karau kṛtyāḥ aṅgulyaḥ grathitāḥ kramāt mudrā iyam sarva mudrāṇām vyoma mudrā iti kīrtitā padma vat prasṛtāḥ sarvāḥ mahā śvetā raveḥ smṛtā java saṃnihitaḥ nityam ratha ārūḍhaḥ raviḥ smṛtaḥ hastau ūrdhva mukhau kṛtvā vāma aṅguṣṭhena yojitau dravyāṇām śodhane yojyāḥ rakṣā artham ca viśeṣataḥ anayā mudrayā sarvam rakṣitam śodhitam bhavet arghyam da tvā prayoktavyā pūjā ante ca viśeṣataḥ sa labheta īpsitān kāmān iha amutra na saṃśayaḥ rājya bhraṣṭaḥ labhet rājyam aputraḥ putram āpnuyāt prajñā medhā samṛddhīḥ ca ciram jīvati mānavaḥ surūpām labhate kanyām kulīnā puruṣaḥ dhruvam saubhāgyam strī kulīnā api kanyā ca puruṣa uttamam nitya yāgaḥ smṛtaḥ hi eṣa dhana dhānya sukha āvahaḥ prajā paśu vivṛddhiḥ ca niṣkāmasya api jāyate bhaktyā tam pūjayet yaḥ tu naraḥ puṇyataraḥ sadā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sūryamāhātmyavarṇanam nāma ekonapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ saptamīmāhātmya varṇanam vāsudevaḥ uvāca naimittikam tatas vakṣye yat jñātvā ca samāsatas saptamyām grahaṇe ca eva saṃkrāntiṣu viśeṣataḥ samyak ācamya sandhyāyām vāruṇam praṇipatya ca indriyāṇi ca saṃyamya kṛtam dhyātvā svapet adhas darbha śayyā gataḥ rātrau prātar snātaḥ su saṃyataḥ tatas sandhyām upāsya atha pūrva uktam ca manum japet juhuyāt ca tadā vahnim sūrya agnī parikalpya ca sūrya agni karaṇam vakṣye tarpaṇam ca samāsatas prakṣipya āstīrya darbhaḥ ca pātra ādi ālabhya ca kramāt pavitram dvi kuśam kṛtvā sa agram prādeśa sammitam tena pātrāṇi samprokṣya saṃśodhya adha vilokya ca paryagnikaraṇam kṛtvā tathā ājyotyavanam tridhā parimṛjya sruva ādīn śra darbhaiḥ samprokṣayet tatas abhūmau sthita pātreṇa viṣṭareṇa tu pāṇinā dānena yadu śārdūla na antarikṣe sthale kvacid dakṣiṇena sruvam gṛhya juhuyāt pāvakam budhaḥ hadayena kriyāḥ sarvāḥ kartavyāḥ pūrva coditāḥ arkāt āramya saṃjñā artham dadyāt tūṣṇīm hutim sthitaḥ varuṇāya śataiḥ māghe saptamyām varuṇam yajet yathāśaktyā tu viprebhyaḥ pradadyāt khaṇḍa veṣṭakān dadyāt ca dakṣiṇām śaktyā prāpnoti yācitam phalam evam vai phālgune sūryam caitre vaiśākhe eva ca vaiśākhe māsi dhātāram indram jyeṣṭhe yajet ravim āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe māsi nabham bhādrapade yamam tathā āśvayuji parjanyam tvaṣṭāram kārtike yajet mārgaśīrṣe ca mitram ca pauṣe viṣṇum yajet yadi tat sarvam āpnuyāt kṣipram bhaktyā śraddhā anvitaḥ vratī evam saṃvatsare pūrṇe kṛtvā vai kāñcanam ratham āditya pratimām madhye śuddha hemnā kṛtām śubhām ratnaiḥ alaṅkṛtām kṛtvā hema padma upari sthitām vṛtam dvādaśabhiḥ vipraiḥ kramāt māsa adhipa ātmabhiḥ madhye kṛtvā svam ācāryam pūjayitvā yathāśrutiḥ evam māsa adhipān viprān sampūjya atha nivedayet ācāryāya ratham chatram grāmam gāḥ ca mahīm śubhām evam bhaktyā yathāśaktyā hema ratna ādi bhūṣaṇam atas ūrdhvam na doṣaḥ atra vratasya a karaṇeṣu api bahvīḥ ca eva āśiṣaḥ dattvā pravadet prīyatām iti ādityaḥ yena kāmena tvayā ārādhitaḥ vrataiḥ tubhyam dadātu tam kāmam sampūrṇam bhavatu vratam ācāryān vipra rūpaiḥ tu praviṣṭaḥ bhāskaraḥ svayam dīna andha kṛpaṇebhyaḥ ca śaktyā dattvā ca dakṣiṇām kṛtvā evam saptamīm abdam rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ puruṣaḥ strī bhavet rājñām tādṛśām atha vallabhā śata yojana vistīrṇam niḥsapatnam akaṇṭakam niṣpanna maṇḍalam bhuṅkte sāgram varṣa śatam sukhī dadyāt vrata avasāne tu kṛtvā sarvam yathā uditam saḥ aśīti yojanam bhuṅkte vistīrṇam maṇḍalam nṛpaḥ evam piṣṭa mayam yaḥ api vitta hīnaḥ karoti nā ā ṣaṣṭi yojanam bhuṅkte dīrgha āyuḥ nīrujaḥ sukhī āpadaḥ na spṛśanti enam nīhārāḥ iva bhāskaram yatas evam tatas jñātvā vidhānam kalpa coditam iti etat kathitam sāmba purā sūryeṇa me śubham mayā asya eva prasādena prāptāḥ putrāḥ sahasraśas asurāḥ nirjitāḥ ca eva surāḥ sarve vaśīkṛtāḥ yadinā adhiṣṭhitam cakram idam sūrya aṃśubhiḥ svayam aham etam japan nityam yajan dhyāyan ca śaktitaḥ jātaḥ asmi sarva kāmānām pūjyaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ ca tejasā tvam abhyasya eva manasā vācā vā karmaṇā api vā śṛṇuyāt bhakti yuktaḥ yaḥ naraḥ śraddhā samanvitaḥ vidhānam āditas putra saptamīm kurute ca yaḥ sā iha prāpyā akhilam kāmam ārogyam ca jayam tathā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe saptamīmāhātmyavarṇanam nāma pañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vāsudevaḥ uvāca eka bhaktam sat ākhyātam ṣaṣṭyām naktam udāhṛtam ṣaṣṭhyām kecid vadanti iha saptamyām pāraṇam kila kṛta upavāsaḥ ṣaṣṭhyām tu pūjayet bhāskaram budhaḥ pūjayet devadeveśam śaṅkaram bhāskaram ravim evam hi caturaḥ māsān māgha ādīn pūjayet ravim ātmanaḥ ca api śudhi artham prāśanam gomayasya ca brāhmaṇān divya bhaumān ca bhojayet ca api śaktitas jyeṣṭha ādiṣu atha māseṣu śvetacandanam ucyate śvetāni ca api puṣpāṇi śubha gandha anvitāni vai kṛṣṇa agaruḥ tathā dhūpaḥ naivedyam pāyasam smṛtam tena eva brāhmaṇān tuṣṭān bhojayet ca mahāmate kārtika ādiṣu māseṣu agasti kusumaiḥ smṛtam pūjayet nara śārdūla dhūpaiḥ ca eva aparājitaiḥ naivedyam guḍa pūpāḥ tu tathā ca ikṣurasam smṛtam tena eva brāhmaṇān tāta bhojayasva sva śaktitaḥ kuśa udakam prāśayethāḥ snānam ca kuru śuddhaye tṛtīye pāraṇa asya ante māghe māsi mahāmate bhojanam tatra dānam ca dviguṇam samudāhṛtam iti eṣā kathitā putra rathāhvā saptamī śubhā mahāsaptamī vikhyātā mahā puṇyā mahā udayā yām upoṣya dhanam putrān kīrtim vidyām avāpnuyāt tathā akhilam kuvalayam candreṇa ca sama ūrciṣā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe mahāsaptamīvratavarṇanam nāma ekapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvipañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya pūjā varṇanam iti uktvā bhagavān devaḥ śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ antardhānam gataḥ vīram śāmbasya iha prapaśyataḥ śāmbaḥ api kṛtvā vidhivat saptamīm rathasaptamīm śatānīkaḥ uvāca ratha yātrā katham kāryā rathaḥ kāryaḥ ratham raveḥ imam artham purā pṛṣṭaḥ padmayoniḥ prajāpatiḥ rudreṇa kuru śārdūlaḥ āsīnaḥ kāñcane girau padmāsanam padmayonim sukha āsīnam prajāpatim śrī rudraḥ uvāca yathā divi bhramet tāta ratha ārūḍhaḥ raviḥ sadā rathena hi eka cakreṇa pañca areṇa tri nābhinā triguṇā ca rathopasthāt īvā daṇḍa pramāṇataḥ nābhyaḥ tisraḥ tu cakrasya trayaḥ kālāḥ prakīrtitāḥ ārāḥ pañca ṛtavaḥ tasya nemyaḥ ṣaṭ ṛtavaḥ smṛtāḥ muhūrtāḥ iṣavaḥ tasya śamyāḥ ca asya kalāḥ smṛtāḥ tasya kāṣṭhāḥ smṛtāḥ koṇāḥ akṣadaṇḍaḥ kṣaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ nimeṣāḥ ca asya karṣāḥ syāt īṣā daṇḍaḥ lavāḥ smṛtāḥ yuga akṣi koṭī te tasya artha kāmau ubhau smṛtau aśvarūpāṇi chandāṃsi vahante vāmatas dhuram gāyatrī ca eva triṣṭubh ca jagatī anuṣṭubh eva ca paṅktiḥ ca bṛhatī ca eva uṣṇih eva tu saptamī kulāla cakra vat yāti maṇḍalam sarvatodiśam yuga akṣa koṭī te tasya dakṣiṇe syandanasya tu ṛk yajurbhyām gṛhītena vicakra aśvena vai dhruve hrasete tasya raśmī tu maṇḍaleṣu uttarāyaṇe dakṣiṇe atha samṛddhe tu bhramataḥ maṇḍalāni tu ākṛṣyete dhruveṇa iha samam tiṣṭhati suvrata tadā sa abhyantaram devaḥ bhramate maṇḍalāni tu tathā eva bāhyatas sūryaḥ bhramate maṇḍalāni tu aśīti maṇḍala śatam kāṣṭhayoḥ ubhayoḥ api dhātā aryamā pulastyaḥ ca pulahaḥ ca prajāpatiḥ khaṇḍakaḥ vāsukiḥ ca eva sa karṇaḥ raśmiḥ eva ca grāmaṇīrathakṛtsnaḥ ca rathaujā aśvatarau ubhau rakṣaḥ hetiḥ prahetiḥ ca yātudhānau ca tau ubhau tathā grīṣmau tu dvau māsau mitraḥ ca varuṇaḥ ca ha ṛṣiḥ atriḥ vaśiṣṭhaḥ ca takṣakaḥ anantaḥ eva ca menakā sahajanyī ca ca hahā hūhūḥ indraḥ ca eva vivasvān ca aṅgirāḥ bhṛguḥ eva ca elāparṇaḥ tathā sarpaḥ śaṅkhapālaḥ ca pannagāḥ yātudhānau tathā sarpaḥ tathā brāhmaḥ ca tau ubhau śaradi ete punar śubhrāḥ nivasanti sma devatāḥ parjanyaḥ ca eva pūṣā ca bhāradvājaḥ sa gautamaḥ viśvācī ca ghṛtācī ca te ubhe puṇya lakṣaṇe nāgaḥ tu airāvataḥ ca eva viśrutaḥ ca dhanañjayaḥ senajit ca suṣeṇaḥ ca senānīḥ grāmaṇīḥ tathā āpaḥ vātaḥ ca dvau etau yātudhānau prakīrtitau aṃśau bhagaḥ ca dvau etau kaśyapaḥ ca kratuḥ tathā bhujaṅgaḥ ca mahāpadmaḥ sarpaḥ karkoṭakaḥ tathā āpaḥ vātaḥ ca dvau etau yātudhānau prakīrtitau citrāṅgadaḥ ca gandharva ūruṇāyuḥ ca eva tau ubhau pūṣā jiṣṇuḥ jamadagniḥ viśvāmitraḥ tathā eva ca kādraveyau mahā nāgau kambala aśvatarau ubhau gandharvaḥ dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ ca sūryavārcāḥ ca tau ubhau grāmaṇīḥ senajit ca eva satyajit ca mahā tapāḥ vada brahman kathām divyām yām aham praṣṭum āgataḥ diviṣṭham bhāskaram dṛṣṭvā namet kena vidhānataḥ śṛṇu rudra samāsena bhāskarasya nati kriyām yām kṛtvā roga duḥkha ārtāḥ mucyante pāpa sañcayāt sthaṇḍile maṇḍalam kṛtvā dvādaśa aṅgula mānataḥ pūjayitvā gaṇeśa ādīn vāsudevam ca sātyakim satyabhāmām tathā lakṣmīm umām devīm ca śaṅkaram tatas pradakṣiṇīkṛtya daṇḍa vat praṇamet sakṛt śatam sahasram ayutam lakṣam vā nija pāpataḥ dṛṣṭvā śaktim praṇamya atha sadā saṃyata mānasaḥ viprāya dakṣiṇām dadyāt nirucchvāsaḥ samāhitaḥ māṣakāṇām catuṣkam ca ayutam daśaguṇam diśet dakṣe daśaguṇam proktam dadyāt roga vimuktaye evam kṛte virūpākṣa sarva rogāt vimucyate idam rahasyam paramam śṛṇuyāt yaḥ hi mānavaḥ tasya rogāḥ vinaśyanti mārtaṇḍasya prasādataḥ anyat ca te pravakṣyāmi yat ca apṛṣṭam umāpate tat śṛṇuṣva mayā proktam ratha yantṛ niyāmakam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sūryavarṇanam nāma dvipañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tripañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya varṇanam tatra aruṇaḥ mayā pūrvam sārathye sanniyojitaḥ indreṇa māṭharaḥ nāma vāyunā kalmaṣeṇa tu kālena daṇḍaḥ mahā daṇḍa āyudhaḥ bhavatā śeṣāḥ mahā gaṇādhipaḥ vaiśākhena rājñā vasubhid āyudha aṅgārikau dvau agninā piṅgalaḥ saṃyantā mahā daṇḍa āyudhaḥ bhavatā śeṣaḥ mahā gaṇādhipaḥ alakādhipatinā viṣṇuḥ aśvibhyām kāla upakālau vā akṣa pradhānakau nara nārāyaṇābhyām kṣārau dhārau dhiṣaṇa kṛṣṇau vairāja śaṅkhapāla parjanya rajasām diśāsu vidiśāsu diśām pālanam viśvedevāḥ daduḥ oṃkāraḥ vaṣaṭkāraḥ vedanisvanaḥ pinākī vināyakaḥ śeṣaḥ anantaḥ vāsukiḥ ca nāga sahasreṇa ātma tulyena ādityasya ratham anuyānti gāyatrī sāvitrī rathe sthite ubhe sandhye sadā sā devatā yā ravi maṇḍalam na apaiti etat vai sarva daivatyam maṇḍalam brahma vādinam brahmayajña vādinīm yajñaḥ bhagavat bhaktānām parama ādityaḥ yam viṣṇuḥ māheśvarāṇām sthāna abhimāninaḥ hi ete sadā vai vṛṣabhadhvaja sarpāḥ vahanti vai sūryam yātudhānāḥ tu yānti ca sarve te pṛṣṭha gāḥ jñeyāḥ grahāḥ lokeṣu pūjitāḥ uparāga śikhī ca ubhau agratas na atra saṃśayaḥ manuṣya dharmāḥ dakṣiṇatas uttareṇa pracetasaḥ sambhavanti tathā kṛṣṇaḥ ubhau etau sadā agragau vāmena vītihotraḥ tu pṛṣṭhatas tu hariḥ sadā ratha pīṭhe kṣamā jñeyā antarāle nabhaḥ tathā āśritya ratha jām kāntim kham divaḥ samayaḥ sthitaḥ dhvajaḥ daṇḍaḥ ca vijñeyaḥ dhvaja agre vṛṣaḥ eva ca ṛddhiḥ vṛddhiḥ tathā śrīḥ ca patākā pārvatīpriya dhvaja daṇḍa agre garuḍaḥ tad agre varuṇālayaḥ mainākaḥ chatra daṇḍaḥ tu himavān chatram ucyate chatra daṇḍaḥ tathā kleśaḥ kleśam chatram viduḥ budhāḥ eteṣām eva devānām yathā vīryam tathā tapaḥ yathāyogam tathā sattvam yathā sattvam tathā balam tathā tapati asau sūryaḥ teṣām siddhaḥ sva tejasā bhūtānām aśubham karma vyapohanti ca kīrtitāḥ prīṇāti devān amṛtena sūryaḥ somena sūktena vivardhayitvā śuklena pūrṇā divasakrameṇa tam kṛṣṇa pakṣe vibudhāḥ pibanti pītam hi somam dvi kalā avaśeṣam kṛṣṇe tu pakṣe rucibhiḥ jvalantam sudhā amṛtam tat pitaraḥ pibanti ūrjāḥ ca saumyāḥ ca tathā eva kalpāḥ sūryeṇa gobhiḥ ca samṛddhitābhiḥ adbhiḥ punar ca eva samujjitābhiḥ māsa ardha tṛptiḥ tu matābhiḥ adbhiḥ māsena tṛptiḥ svadhayā pitṛrṇām dvyaśīti maṇḍala śatam īhanti abdena vai hayāḥ vīthyā agryayā vicarate nakṣatrāṇi yathā śaśī madhya gāḥ ca amarāvatyām yadā bhavati bhāskaraḥ vaivasvate saṃyamane uttiṣṭhan dṛśyate tadā sukhāyām ardha rātram tu vibhāyām astam eti ca sukhāyām atha vāruṇyām uttiṣṭhan dṛśyate tadā soma puryām vibhāyām tu madhya gaḥ ca aryamā yadā māhendrasya amarāvatyām uttiṣṭhati divākaraḥ ardha rātram saṃyamane vāruṇyām astam eti ca evam caturṣu pārśveṣu meroḥ kurvan pradakṣiṇam udaya astamane ca asau uttiṣṭhati punar punar pūrvāhṇe ca aparāhṇe ca dvau dvau devālayau punar uditaḥ vardhamāna abhirāma adhyāhnāt tapet raviḥ yatra udyan dṛśyate sūryaḥ sa teṣām udayaḥ smṛtaḥ praṇāśam gacchate yatra sa teṣām astam ucyate yojana agreṇa saṅkhyām tu muhūrtasya nibodha me pūrṇam śata sahasra āśam sahasram tu trilocana pañcāśat ca tathā alpāni sahasrāṇi adhikāni tu nimeṣa antara mātreṇa divi sūryaḥ prasarpati bhraman vai bhramamāṇeṣu ṛkṣeṣu vicarati asau indraḥ pūjayate sūryam uttiṣṭhantam dine dine madhyāhne ca yamaḥ paścāt astam yāntam apām patiḥ viṣṇuḥ bhavān aham rudraḥ pūjayāma niśā kṣaye evam agniḥ nirṛtiḥ ca vāyuḥ īśānaḥ eva ca pūjayanti krameṇa eva bhramamāṇam divākaram śreyaḥ artham deva śārdūla sarve brahma ādayaḥ surāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamīkalpe sūryagativarṇanam nāma tripañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catuṣpañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aho haṃsasya māhātmyam varṇitam bhavatā īdṛśam kathyatām punar evā idam māhātmyam bhāskarasya tu sarva ātmā sarva loka īśaḥ devadevaḥ prajāpatiḥ agnau prāsta āhutiḥ samyak ādityam upatiṣṭhati ādityāt jāyate vṛṣṭiḥ vṛṣṭeḥ annam tatas prajāḥ bhāva abhāvau hi lokānām ādityāt niḥsṛtau purā etat tu dhyāninām dhyānam mokṣam ca api eṣa mokṣiṇām atra gacchanti nirvāṇam jāyante asmāt punar prajāḥ kṣaṇāḥ muhūrtāḥ divasāḥ niśāḥ pakṣāḥ ca nityaśas māsāḥ saṃvatsarāḥ ca eva ṛtavaḥ atha yugāni ca sat ādityāt ṛte hi eṣā kāla saṅkhyā na vidyate ṛtūnām avibhāgāt ca puṣpa mūla phalam kutas kutas sasya viniṣpattiḥ tṛṇa oṣadhi gaṇāḥ kutas abhāvaḥ vyavahārāṇām jantūnām divi ca iha ca na avṛṣṭyā tapate sūryaḥ na avṛṣṭyā pariviśyate na avṛṣṭyāḥ vikṛtim dhatte vāriṇā dīpyate raviḥ vasante kapilaḥ sūryaḥ grīṣme kāñcana saprabhaḥ śvetaḥ varṇena varṣāsu pāṇḍuḥ śaradi bhāskaraḥ iti varṇāḥ samākhyātāḥ śṛṇu varṇa phalam hara kṛṣṇa ubhayāya jagataḥ tāmraḥ senāpatim vināśayati iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamīkalpe sūryamahimavarṇanam nāma catuṣpañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya ratha yātrā varṇanam ratha yātrā katham kāryā bhāskarasya iha mānavaiḥ phalam ca kim bhavet teṣām yātrām kurvanti ye raveḥ katham ca bhrāmayet devam ratha ārūḍham divākaram teṣām ca kim phalam proktam ye ca nṛtya karāḥ narāḥ bhramanti ye na ca devena nṛtya gīta parāyaṇāḥ prajāgaram ca kurvanti bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitāḥ teṣām ca kim phalam proktam ratham yacchanti ye raveḥ lokānām śreyase deva param kautūhalam hi me sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi bhūteśa gaṇeśaḥ asi trilocana śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ vacmi yathāpraśnam sa vistaram martya loke śānti hetoḥ lokānām loka pūjita tasmāt kāryau imau bhaktyā durbhikṣasya iha śāntaye śukla pakṣe tu saptamyām māsi bhādrapade hara ghṛtena abhyaṅgayet devam pañca pūta aṅga jena vai abhyaṅgayet maheśam yaḥ sarṣapaiḥ śraddhayā anvitaḥ dine dine jagannātham praviṣṭam varṇake ravim sa gacchet yānam ārūḍhaḥ gairikam kiṅkiṇīkṛtam śālyodanam khaṇḍa miśram vajram vajra samanvitam ārūḍhaḥ sa vimānam tu jvālā mālā ākulam śubham varṇa bhaktam pradātavyam praviṣṭasya iha varṇakam ghṛta pūrṇam khaṇḍaveṣṭam kāsāram modakam payaḥ dadhi odanam pāyasam ca saṃyāvam guḍa pūpakān abhyaṅgāya ghṛtam deyam sa yāti paramām gatim sa yāti paramam sthānam yatra devaḥ divākaraḥ tatas tam snāpayet devam pauṣe māsi vidhānataḥ saptamyām śukla pakṣasya śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ tathā tīrtha udakam upānīya anyat vā atha jalam śubham prayāgam puṣkaram devam kurukṣetram ca naimiṣam pṛthūdakam candrabhāgām śauram gokarṇam eva ca brahmāvartam kuśāvartam bilvakam nīlaparvatam gaṅgādvāram tathā puṇyam gaṅgāsāgaram eva ca kālapriyam mitravanam śuṇḍīrasvāminam tathā cakratīrtham tathā puṇyam rāmatīrtham tathā śivam vitastā harṣapaṃthāḥ vai tathā vai devikā smṛtā gaṅgā sarasvatī sindhuḥ candrabhāgā sa narmadā vipāśā yamunā tāpī śivā vetravatī tathā godāvarī payoṣṇī ca kṛṣṇā veṇyā tathā nadī śatarudrā puṣkariṇī kauśikī sarayūḥ tathā tathā āśramāḥ puṇyatamāḥ divyāni āyatanāni ca evam snāna vidhim kṛtvā arcayitvā praṇamya ca tri rātram sapta rātram vā māsam māsa ardham eva ca catvare lepayet vedim catur asrām śubhe kṛtām kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu māghasya saptamyām tripurāṃtaka kṛtvā agnikāryam vidhivat kṛtvā brāhmaṇa bhojanam śaṅkha bherī ninādaiḥ tu brahmaghoṣaiḥ ca puṣkalaiḥ puṇya aha ghoṣa vividhaiḥ brāhmaṇān svasti vācya ca rathena darśanīyena kiṅkiṇī jāla mālinā prīṇayitvā janam sarvam dakṣiṇā bhojana ādinā prapūjya brāhmaṇān divyān bhaumān ca api su vācakān itihāsa purāṇābhyām vācakaḥ brāhmaṇa uttamaḥ tatas devaḥ ca iṣṭaḥ ca sampūjyaḥ yatnataḥ tadā a yācitam caturthyām tu ṣaṣṭhyām naktam prakīrtitam saptamyām upavāsam tu āśramāt ropayet ratham agni kāryam tu vai kṛtvā rathasya puratas śiva ṣaṣṭhyām ca rātrau bhūteśa rathasya iha adhivāsanam brāhmaṇān bhojayitvā tu divyān bhaumān ca vācakān sitāyām māgha māse tu tasya devālaya agratas nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakaiḥ dīpavṛkṣa upaśobhitaiḥ śaṃkha tūrya ninādaiḥ ca brahmaghoṣaiḥ ca puṣkalaiḥ nagarasya uttaram dvāram śaṅkha bherī nināditam tatas pūrvam dakṣiṇam ca dvāram ca api tathā param evam hi kriyamāṇāyām yātrāyām vatsara avadhau mānavāḥ sukham edhante rājā jayati ca ahitān nīrujaḥ ca janāḥ sarve gavām śāntiḥ bhavet tathā yātrāyāḥ bhavanti hi voḍhāraḥ ca tathā vatsa sūrya lokam yajanti vai katham sañcālyate brahman sthāpitā pratibhā sakṛt pūrvam eva sahasrāṃśoḥ yāna hetoḥ mahātmanaḥ sarveṣām tu rathānām vai sa rathaḥ prathamaḥ smṛtaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā tu tatas tu anye syandanāḥ viśvakarmaṇā kalpitāḥ sarva devānām soma ādīnām anekaśas manunā ikṣvākave dattam martyaiḥ sampūjyatām raviḥ tasmāt na cālane doṣaḥ savituḥ calaḥ eva saḥ adṛṣṭam calate yasmāt tasmāt vai pārvatīpriya tat evam ratha yātrāsu dṛṣṭam bhānoḥ manīṣibhiḥ anyeṣām cālanam nā iṣṭam devānām pārvatīpriya brahma viṣṇu śiva ādīnām sthāpitānām vidhānataḥ tasmāt rathena devasya yātrā kāryā vidhānataḥ prajānām iha śānti artham pratisaṃvatsaram sadā kāñcanaḥ vā atha raupyaḥ vā vā dṛḍha akṣa yuga cakraḥ ca rathaḥ kāryaḥ su yantritaḥ āropya pratimām yatnāt yojayet vājinaḥ śubhān kuṅkumena samālabdhān cāmara sraj vibhūṣitān tu dhūpa mālya anulepanaiḥ dīna andha kṛpaṇa ādīn ca sarvān saṃtarpya śaktitaḥ sūryakratau tu vitate evam āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ yaḥ cintayati bhagna āśaḥ kṣudhā vāta prapīḍitaḥ yajñaḥ ca dakṣiṇā hīnaḥ savituḥ na praśasyate tasmāt nānāvidhaiḥ kāmaiḥ bhakṣya lehya samanvitaiḥ balim gṛhṇantu me devāḥ ādityāḥ vasavaḥ tathā marutā utha aśvinau rudrāḥ suparṇāḥ pannagāḥ grahāḥ asurāḥ yātudhānāḥ ca ratha sthāḥ yāḥ tu devatāḥ digpālāḥ lokapālāḥ ca ye ca vighna vināyakāḥ mā vighnam mā ca me pāpam mā ca me paripanthinaḥ saumyāḥ bhavantu tṛptāḥ ca devāḥ bhūta gaṇāḥ tathā ākṛṣṇena rajasā ṛcam ekām udāharet tatas puṇyāha śabdena kṛta vāditra niḥsvanaiḥ puruṣaiḥ ca api voḍhavyaḥ sūrya bhakti samanvitaiḥ triṃśadbhiḥ ṣoḍaśaiḥ vā api pratimām bhāskarasya tu rājñī ca nikṣubhā rudra bhārye tasya mahātmanaḥ nikṣubhām dakṣiṇe pārśve rājñīm ca api uttare tathā dvau eva brāhmaṇau tasmin divyaḥ bhaumaḥ ca pārśvayoḥ garuḍam pṛṣṭhatas ca asya valgamānam prakalpayet ātapatram tathā śvetam svarṇa daṇḍam anaupamam bhūteśa nānā varṇābhiḥ saptabhiḥ kāmanāśanaḥ sārathyam rudra kuryāt vai śreyaḥ artham ātmanaḥ sadā kṣatriyaiḥ ca api vaiśyaiḥ ca na tu śūdraiḥ kadācana nānāvidhaiḥ prekṣaṇakaiḥ purāṇa śravaṇena ca nānāvidhaiḥ brahma ghoṣaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ sthitvā tu tatra aṣṭamī antam navamyām calate punar sthite atra taiḥ pūjyamānaḥ yathā rājñā tathā nṛpaiḥ tatrastham pūjayanti sma brāhmaṇāḥ śraddhayā anvitāḥ śaṃkha vāditra nirghoṣaiḥ tathā prekṣaṇakaiḥ varaiḥ brahma ghoṣaiḥ ca vividhaiḥ samantāt dīpakaiḥ śubhaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ vitta dānaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ dīna andha kṛpaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ tripurāntaka tatra sthitaḥ pūjanīyaḥ bhavet paureṇa kṛtsnaśas pūjyamānaḥ tu ahorātram ratha ārūḍhaḥ tu tiṣṭhati trayodaśyām vyatītāyām caturdaśyām trilocana iti śro bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi ratha saptamī kalpe rathayātrāvarṇanam nāma pañcapañcāśattamaḥ udhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṭapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya ratha yātrā varṇanam śrī rudraḥ uvāca anugāḥ ca katham ca asya ke ca te kramāt bhūyas bhūyas suraśreṣṭha vistarāt mama śreyase pratīhāra ratham pūrvam nayet mārga viśuddhaye tasmāt anantaram rudra daṇḍanāyakam ādarāt piṅgalam ca tatas tasya pṛṣṭha gam ca ādarāt nayet rakṣakaḥ dvārakaḥ yasmāt ratha ārūḍhau tu pṛṣṭhatas ratha ārūḍhaḥ tathā diṇḍī devasya puratas sthitaḥ yuga akṣa cakra bhaṅgaḥ vā yathā na syāt trilocana īṣā bhaṅge dvija bhayam bhagne akṣe kṣatriya kṣayaḥ tulā bhaṅge tu vaiśyānām śayyā śūdra kṣayaḥ bhavet yuga bhaṅge tu anāvṛṣṭiḥ pīṭha bhaṅge prajā bhayam vyaṅgita pratimāyām tu rājñaḥ maraṇam ādiśet utpanneṣu evamādyeṣu utpāteṣu aśubheṣu ca brāhmaṇān vācayet bhūyas dadyāt dānāni ca eva hi prathamam ca agnaye svāhā svāhā somāya ca eva hi svāhā prajāpataye ca deyāḥ āhutayaḥ kramāt śam prajābhyaḥ tathā eva astu śam sat ātmani ca astu vai bhūḥ śāntiḥ astu deveśa bhuvaḥ śāntiḥ tathā eva ca svar ca eva astu tathā śāntiḥ sarvatra astu tathā raveḥ tvam deva jagataḥ sraṣṭā poṣṭā ca eva tvam eva hi prajāpāla graha īśāna śāntim kuru divaspate idam anyat ca vakṣyāmi śāntyā parama kāraṇam yātrā kāraṇa bhūtasya puruṣasya sva janmanaḥ duḥsthān grahān ca vijñāya graha śāntim samācaret prādeśa mātrāḥ karttavyāḥ samidhaḥ atha pramāṇataḥ arka mayyaḥ raveḥ kāryā pālāśyaḥ śaśinaḥ smṛtāḥ khādiryaḥ ca eva bhaumāya āpāmārgyaḥ abja sūnave āśvatthyaḥ ca atha jīvāya audumbaryaḥ sitāya ca asitāya śamī mayyaḥ dūrvā kāryaḥ tu rāhave ketave tu kuśāḥ kāryāḥ dakṣiṇāḥ ca api atas śṛṇu sūryāya śobhanām dhenum śaṃkham dadyāt atha indave raktam anaḍvāham bhaumāya kāñcanam soma sūnave jīvāya vāsasī deye śukrāya aśvam sitam hara śanaiścarāya gām nīlām rāhave bhāṇḍapāyasam chāgam tu ketave dadyāt śṛṇu eṣām bhojanāni api guḍa odanam tu sūryāya somāya ghṛta pāyasam haviṣyam annam bhaumāya kṣīra annam soma sūnave dadhyodanam tu jīvāya śukrāya atha ghṛta aśanam tila piṣṭān ca māṣāḥ ca sūryaputrāya dāpayet sauvīram āranālam ca svinna bījam ca kāñjikam yathā bāṇa prahārāṇām vāraṇam kavacam smṛtam tathā daiva upaghātānām śāntiḥ bhavati vāraṇam nityam ca niyama sthasya sadā sa anugrahāḥ grahāḥ grahāḥ pūjyāḥ sadā rudraḥ icchatā vipulam yaśaḥ śrī kāmaḥ śānti kāmaḥ vā graha yajñam samācaret vṛṣṭi āyuḥ puṣṭi kāmaḥ vā tathā eva abhicaran punar yā anapatyā bhavet nārī duṣprajāḥ ca api yā bhavet bālāḥ yasyāḥ pramriyante yā ca kanyā prajā bhavet graha yajñaḥ smṛtaḥ teṣām mānavānām manīṣibhiḥ tasmāt asau sadā kāryaḥ śreyaḥ artham jānatā hara dattapuṣpaḥ krūradṛś ca puṣpajaḥ dhiṣaṇaḥ tathā sita asitau tathā rudraḥ uparāgaḥ śikhī tathā ete grahāḥ mahā bāho vidvadbhiḥ pūjitāḥ sadā tāmrakāt sphāṭikāt raktacandanāt svarṇakāt api rājatāt āyasāt sīsāt grahāḥ kāryāḥ prayatnataḥ svarṇe vā atha paṭe lekhyāḥ yathāśāstram maheśvara yathāvarṇam pradeyāni vāsāṃsi kusumāni ca gaṃdhāḥ ca balayaḥ ca eva dhūpaḥ deyaḥ ca guggulaḥ ākṛṣṇena imam devāḥ agniḥ mūrdhā divaḥ kakud udbudhyasva yathāsaṃkhyam ṛcaḥ etāḥ prakīrtitāḥ śam naḥ devī tathā kāṃḍāt ketum kṛṇvan imāḥ kramāt pūrva uktāḥ samidhaḥ tu atra yathāśāstram prahomayet ekaikasya aṣṭaśatakam aṣṭāviṃśatiḥ eva vā śaktitas vā yathālābham dakṣiṇā tu vidhānataḥ mayā eṣā hi varaḥ dattaḥ pūjitāḥ pūjayiṣyatha graha adhīnāḥ nareṃdrāṇām ucchrayāḥ patanāni ca bhāva abhāvau ca jagataḥ tasmāt pūjyatamāḥ grahāḥ grahāḥ gāvaḥ narendrāḥ ca guravaḥ brāhmaṇāḥ tathā pūjitaḥ pūjayanti ete nirdahanti apamānitāḥ tathā samutthitām pīḍām grahaśāntyā praśāmayet yajvanām satya vākyānām tathā nitya upavāsinām japa homa parāṇām ca sarvam duṣṭam praśāmyati evam kṛtvā prajā śāntim kṛtvā ca svastivācanam punar sajjam ratham kṛtvā kuryāt prakamaṇam hara mārgam śeṣam nayitvā tu nayet devālayam ravim pūjayitvā tatas pūrvāḥ yāḥ proktāḥ ratha devatāḥ yathā pūjyāḥ grahāḥ sarve utpāteṣu trilocana ratha devāḥ tathā pūjyāḥ yāḥ sthitāḥ ratham āśritāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe ādityamahimavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭpañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha saptapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ratha yātrā varṇanam kṣīram yavāgūḥ brahmaṇe syāt paramānnam trilocana phalāni kārtikeyasya dadyāt bhūteśa prītaye puruhūtāya bhakṣyāṇi sa anugāya nivedayet haviḥ annam agnaye syāt agra annam viṣṇave tathā rākṣasebhyaḥ sa maireyam dadyāt māṃsa odanam hara saṃskṛtam piśita annam ca revatāya nivedayet tila annam pitṛrājāya dadyāt tripurasūdana āśvinābhyām apūpān tu vasubhyaḥ māṃsam odanam pitṛbhyaḥ pāyasam dadyāt ghṛta aktam madhunā saha kātyāyanyai yavāgūm ca śriyai dadyāt tathā dadhi khāḍava annam dhanapatau evam mitre trilocana māṃsa anna bhakta sūpān ca mātṛbhyaḥ vai nivedayet ullepikāḥ ca bhūtebhyaḥ jalam sūryāya vai hara dadyāt gaṇādhipataye modakān tripurāntaka śaṣkulyaḥ tu nairṛtāya deyāḥ syuḥ gaṇanāyaka sarva bhakṣyāṇi viśvebhyaḥ dātavyāni samantataḥ kṣīraudanam ṛṣibhyaḥ tu kṣīram nāgebhyaḥ eva hi udvartanam surā māṃsam tad vāhebhyaḥ ca bhārata ājyam ca brahmaṇe dadyāt tryambakāya tilān tathā svāhātanaye vai lājāḥ dātavyāḥ tripurāntaka bhāskarāya sadā dadyāt kovidāram trilocana rājavṛkṣam tathā indrāya haviṣyam pāvakāya ca deyam syāt karṇikāram tu aśvibhyām vṛṣabhadhvaja śriyai padmāni deyāni caṃḍikāya su caṃdanam puṣpāṇi apsarasām rudra mālatyāḥ parikīrttitam varuṇāya agnimantham tu phalam mūlam nirṛtaye bilvam dadyāt kuberāya kapittham marutām tathā vāsavebhyaḥ tu karpūram dadyāt dāru gaṇādhipe pitṛbhyaḥ piṇḍa mūlāni bhūtebhyaḥ ca bibhītakam gobhyaḥ yavān pradadyāt vai mātṛbhyaḥ ca akṣatān hara ṛṣibhyaḥ brahmavṛkṣam tu nāgebhyaḥ viṣam uttamam sāyam prātar tu madhyāhne sadā ekāgra manāḥ hara sarveṣām śaktitas bhaktyā dahet dhūpam vicakṣaṇaḥ śānti artham brāhmaṇebhyaḥ tu tilān dadyāt vicakṣaṇaḥ vaiśvānare vā juhuyāt ghṛtena sahitān hara devānām amṛtam hi ete pitṛrṇām hi svadhā amṛtam śaraṇam brāhmaṇānām ca sadā hi etān viduḥ budhāḥ kasyapasya aṅga jāḥ hi ete pavitrāḥ ca tathā hara snāne dāne tathā home tarpaṇe ihi aśane parāḥ ittham devān grahān ca eva pūjayitvā prayatnataḥ avatārya rathāt ca enam maṇḍale sthāpayet punar kṛtvā tu ārārtikam yatnāt dīpa toya yava akṣataiḥ kārpāsa bīja lavaṇa tuṣaiḥ durdṛṣṭi śāntaye vedīm āropayet paścāt patnībhyām saha suvrata daśāhikā iti vikhyātā yā pūjā bhū tale hara abhyaṅga bhojana ādyaiḥ tu pūjā satkāra maṇḍalaiḥ anena vidhinā pūjya daśa ahāni divākaram iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi rathasaptamīkalpa ādityamahimavarṇanam nāma saptapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ratha yātrā varṇanam yātrām bhagavataḥ bhaktyā bhāskarasya amita ojasaḥ sa para ardham tu varṣāṇām sūrya loke mahīyate tīrtha udakam tu yaḥ bhaktyā gaṃgāyāḥ ca tathā udakam bhaktyā varṇa trayam dadyāt bhāskarasya trilocana samāpya iha akhilān kāmān prāpnuyāt varuṇālayam rakta varṇam tu yaḥ dadyāt haviṣya annam guḍa odanam snāpayet yaḥ tu vā bhaktyā bhāskaram pūjayet tathā sa gacchet dīptimān rudra sūrya lokam na saṃśayaḥ sa yāti vāta sālokyam vāta tulya parākramaḥ sa lokam prāpnuyāt puṇyam mārutam na atra saṃśayaḥ sa lokam prāpnuyāt puṇyam yaḥ kuryāt mārgam ādarāt puṣpa prakara śobhā āḍhyam śubha toraṇa maṇḍitam śaṃkha tūrya nināda āḍhyam tathā prekṣaṇaka anvitam sa yāti paramam sthānam yatra devaḥ vibhāvasuḥ sa sukhī puṇyavān nityam modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ bhakta dāsa ādikam sarvam yaḥ dadāti raveḥ naraḥ samprāpya iha akhilān kāmān sūrya lokam avāpnuyāt durlabham deva śārdūla viśeṣāt puratas vrajan uttara abhimukham yāntam tathā vai dakṣiṇā mukham tatas vai dvādaśe varṣe kartavyam na antarā punar yātrāyāḥ ca api ye bhaṅgam kurvanti vṛṣabhadhvaja mandehāḥ nāma te jñeyāḥ rākṣasāḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ indra ādi devāḥ te jñeyāḥ gatāḥ ca paramam padam punar yātrā vidhim ca imam samāsāt kathayāmi te yam śrutvā sarva pāpebhyaḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ dyauḥ mahī ca dvi mūrti sthe yathāpūrvam pratiṣṭhite tathā eva rājñī dyauḥ jñeyā nikṣubhā pṛthivī smṛtā etābhyām api devībhyām yathā eva savituḥ tathā diṇḍinaḥ piṃgala ādīnām pṛthuḥ kāryaḥ ratha kramaḥ manasā cintayet anyām yathā sthāneṣu devatām dikpālān lokapālān ca kalpayet manasā eva tu maṃḍala mṛj mayam ca eva chandāṃsi āsyam prakīrtitam gāyatrī ca eva triṣṭubh ca jagatī anuṣṭubh eva ca paṃktiḥ ca bṛhatī ca eva uṣṇih eva ca saptamī yathā ukta karaṇāt rudra sadā śāntiḥ bhavet nṛṇām nāyakaḥ ca api sarveṣām devānām tu divākaraḥ digdeva anucarān ca eva pūjayet pūjyate śriyā tad tad bhūta kṛtam pādyam na pragṛhṇanti devatāḥ yātrā kāle tu samprāpte savituḥ dīkṣitām tanum ye drakṣyaṃti narāḥ bhaktyā te bhaviṣyanti akalmaṣāḥ paurṇamāsyām amāyām ca darśanam puṇya dam smṛtam saptamyām ca tathā ṣaṣṭhyām dine tasya raveḥ tathā āṣāḍhī kārttikī māghī tithyaḥ puṇyatamāḥ smṛtāḥ mahābhāgyam tithe puṇyam yathā śāstreṣu gīyate kārttikyām tu viśeṣeṇa mahākārtikī udāhṛtā evam kāla samāyogāt yātrā kālaḥ viśiṣyate darśanam ca mahā puṇyam sarva pāpa haram bhavet devaḥ ayam yajñapuruṣaḥ loka anugraha kāṃkṣayā pratimā avasthitaḥ bhūtvā pūjām gṛhṇāti anugrahāt snānāt dānāt japāt homāt saṃyogāt deva karmaṇaḥ kūrcānām vapanāt ca eva dīkṣitaḥ puruṣaḥ bhavet kacānām vāpanam kāryam sūryabhaktaiḥ sadā naraiḥ sūryakratau śuciḥ tu evam dīkṣitaḥ puruṣaḥ bhavet caturṇām api varṇānām bhaktyā sūryasya nityadā evam ye atra kariṣyanti te narāḥ nitya dīkṣitāḥ cīrṇa vratāḥ mahātmānaḥ te yāsyanti parām gatim iti eṣā kathitā rudra ratha yātrā divaspateḥ yām śrutvā vācayitvā sarva rogaiḥ vimucyate kṛtvā ca vidhivat bhaktyā yāti sūryasadaḥ naraḥ rathāhvā kathitā rudra samāsāt saptamī śubhā bhūyas api śrūyatām rudra saptamī gadataḥ mama iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe rathayātrā varṇanam nāma aṣṭapañcāśattamaḥ adhyāya atha ekonaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ṣaṣṭhyām upoṣitaḥ bhūtvā gandha puṣpa upahārataḥ brāhmaṇān bhojayet paścāt vitta śāṭhyam vivarjayet khaṇḍaveṣṭaiḥ modakaiḥ ca tathā ikṣu guḍa pūpakaiḥ atha saṃvatsare pūrṇe saptamyām kārayet budhaḥ kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu yaḥ kṛtvā ratham ārohitam ravim paśyet bhaktyā jagannātham sa yāti paramām gatim tṛtīyāyām aika bhaktam caturthyām naktam ucyate pañcamyām a yācitam syāt ṣaṣṭhyām ca evam upoṣaṇam saptamyām pāraṇam kuryāt dṛṣṭvā devam rathe sthitam pūjayitvā ca vidhinā śaktyā bhaktyā trilocana sauvarṇam tu ratham kṛtvā tāmra pātra upari sthitam iṃdranīlam atho yāmyām vāruṇyām marakatam hara śvetam pīta asitam ca api raktam ca andhaka sūdana etāni tāta vastrāṇi dikṣu sarvāsu vinyaset patākā ākāra saṃsthānam ghaṇṭā ābharaṇa bhūṣitam yathānyāyam pūjayitvā bhāskarāya nivedayet bhojayitvā atha vā viprān ācāryāya nivedayet yaḥ adhīte saptamī kalpam sa upākhyānam ca bhārata ācāryaḥ sa dvijaḥ jñeyaḥ varṇānām anupūrvaśas saurāṇām vaiṣṇavānām tu śaivānām pārvatīpriya alābhe tu suvarṇasya ratham rājatam ādiśet abhāve ca api tāmrasya rathaḥ piṣṭa mayaḥ smṛtaḥ sa hiraṇyaḥ mahādeva tāmra bhājanam āśritaḥ pūrva uktāya mahādeva vācakāya mahātmane sva śaktyā tu virūpākṣa vitta śāṭhyam vivarjayet eṣā puṇyā pāpa harā rathāhvā saptamī hara kathitā te mayā rudra mahatī iyam prakīrtitā snānam dānam atho homaḥ pūjā grahapateḥ hara śata sāhasram bhavet asyām kṛtam bhūdhara vidyate evam eṣā puṇyatamā māghe proktā tu saptamī brāhmaṇaḥ yāti deva tvam kṣatriyaḥ vipra tām vrajet vaiśyaḥ kṣatriya tām yāti śūdraḥ vaiśya tvam eti ca aputrā strī sutam vindet saumāgyam ca gaṇādhipa vidhavā ca api upoṣya imām saptamīm tripurāntaka evaṃvidhā saptamī te kathitā vṛṣabhadhvaja yām śrutvā mānavaḥ bhaktyā mucyate brahma hatyayā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata ardha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe rathasaptamīmāhātmyavarṇanam nāma ekonaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ratha yātrā varṇanam iti uktvā sa jagāma āśu surajyeṣṭham trilocanam ratha yātrā mahā bāho sūryasya iti amita ojasaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca yam ārādhya jagannātham mama pūrva pitāmahāḥ tuṣṭi artham brāhmaṇānām tu annam āpuḥ caturvidham tasya devasya māhātmyam śrutam ca bahuśas mayā karābhyām yasya deveśau ka viṣṇū loka pūjitau utpannau dvijaśārdūla lalāṭāt tripurāntakaḥ tasya devasya kaiḥ śakyāḥ vaktum sarvāḥ vibhūtayaḥ śrotum ārādhanam yena nistareyam bhava arṇavam dānaiḥ vṛta upavāsaiḥ vā homaiḥ jāpyaiḥ atha api vā ārādhitaḥ samastānām kleśānām hāni daḥ bhavet sā ekā vidyā hi vidyānām yayā tuṣyati sarva kṛt śrutānām api tat puṇyam yatra bhānoḥ prakīrtanam rahasyānām rahasyam tat yena haṃsaḥ prasīdati ekaḥ śreṣṭhatamaḥ maṃtraḥ tat ekam paramam vratam upoṣitam ca tat śreṣṭham yena bhānuḥ prasīdati sā ca ekā rasanā dhanyā mārtaṇḍam stauti yā sadā ślāghyānām api tau ślāghyau iha loke paratra ca sadā dvijaśārdūla bhānoḥ pūjā karau karau tat ekam kevalam dhanyam śarīram sarva jantuṣu sā jihvā kaṇṭha tālūkam atha vā pratijihvikā prākāraiḥ tu āvṛte viṣvak vṛthā tāni viduḥ budhāḥ śreyasām na hi samprāptau puruṣāṇām viceṣṭitam janmani aviphalā sevā kṛtā yā āśritya bhāskaram durga saṃsāra kāṃtāram apāram abhidhāvatām ratnānām ākaraḥ meruḥ sarva āścarya mayam nabhaḥ tīrthānām āśrayaḥ gaṃgā devānām āśrayaḥ raviḥ śrutaḥ me bahuśas siddhaiḥ gīyamānaiḥ tathā amaraiḥ ārādhayitum īśa īśam bhāskaram ca amita ojasam mārtaṇḍam bhuvana ādhāram smṛta mātra agha dāriṇam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryaparicaryāvarṇanam nāma ṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya mahimā varṇanam pravakṣyāmi yathāpūrvam viriñcena mahātmanā ṛṣīṇām kathitam pūrvam tam nibodha narādhipa ārādhanāya savituḥ mahātmā padmasaṃbhavaḥ yogam brahma param prāha mahā ṛṣīṇām yathā prabhuḥ viṣayāḥ durjayāḥ nṛrṇām indriya ākarṣiṇaḥ prabho vṛttayaḥ cetasaḥ ca api cañcalasya api durdharā rāga ādayaḥ katham jetum śakyāḥ varṣa śataiḥ api alpa āyuṣaḥ ca puruṣāḥ brahman kṛta yuge ipi amī duḥkha ambu magnāḥ puruṣāḥ prāpya brahman mahā plavam evam uktaḥ tadā brahma akriyā yogam mahātmanām teṣām ṛṣīṇām ācaṣṭa narāṇām hita kāmyayā ārādhayata viśveśam divākaram atandritāḥ bāhya ālambana sāpekṣāḥ tam ajam jagataḥ patim ijyā pūjā namaskāra śuśrūṣābhiḥ aharniśam vrata upavāsaiḥ vividhaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇam taiḥ taiḥ ca abhimataiḥ kāmaiḥ ye ca cetasi tuṣṭi dāḥ aparicchedya māhātmyam ārādhayata bhāskaram tad niṣṭhāḥ tad gata dhiyaḥ tad karmāṇaḥ tad āśrayāḥ saṃnyasadhvam sa vaḥ karttā samasta āvaraṇa kṣayam paraḥ parāṇām paramaḥ sa ekaḥ sumanasām paraḥ iti te brahmaṇaḥ śrutvā rahasyam ṛṣi sattamāḥ narāṇām upakārāya yoga śāstrāṇi cakrire kriyā yoga parāṇi iha mukti kārīṇi anekaśas ārādhyate jagannāthaḥ tad anuṣṭhāna tatparaiḥ paramātmā sa mārtaṇḍaḥ sarva īśaḥ sarva bhāvanaḥ tāni te kuru śārdūla sarva pāpa harāṇi aham saṃsāra arṇava magnānām viṣaya ākrāṃta cetasām haṃsa potam vinā nā anyat kiṃcid asti parāyaṇam uttiṣṭhan ciṃtaya ravim vrajan ciṃtaya gopatim bhuñjan ciṃtaya mārtaṃḍam svapān ciṃtaya bhāskaram janma mṛtyu mahā grāham saṃsāra ambhaḥ tariṣyasi graheśam īśam vara dam purāṇam jagat vidhātāram ajam ca nityam samāśritāḥ ye ravim īśitāram teṣām bhavaḥ nā asti vimukti bhājām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sūryayogamahimavarṇanam nāma ekaṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dviṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya diṇḍī saṃvādam sūryasya diṇḍinā sārdham sarva pāpa praṇāśanam brahmahatyā abhibhūtaḥ tu parā diṃḍiḥ mahā tapāḥ ārādhanāya devasya stotram cakre mahātmanaḥ śrutvā tasya arthataḥ stotram tutoṣa bhagavān raviḥ uvāca devadevaḥ tam diṇḍinam gaṇanāyakam ādityaḥ uvāca varam vṛṇīṣva dharma jña yat te manasi vartate diṇḍiḥ uvāca eṣaḥ eva varaḥ ślāghyaḥ yat prāptaḥ asi mama antikam yathā eṣā brahmahatyā me āgatā loka garhitā bhavān jānāti sarva īśaḥ hadisthaḥ sarva dehinām tvad prasādāt mama īśāna nāśam āśu prayātu vai jñātam mayā hi mārtaṇḍe na aprasanne vibhūtayaḥ sukhāni tāni ca eva ante teṣām duḥkham na tat sukham yadā tu duḥkham āgāmi kim vā kasya eva bhakṣaṇāt jñāna dānena yena evam uttareyam bhava arṇavam iti uktaḥ tena mārtaṇḍaḥ kathayāmāsa yoga vid śrutvā yogam tu tam diṇḍiḥ nirbījam niṣkalam babhau viṣayāḥ durjayāḥ puṃbhiḥ indriya ākarṣiṇaḥ sadā indriyāṇām jayaḥ yuktaḥ kaḥ śaktānām kariṣyati aham mama iti vikhyātiḥ durjayam cañcalam manaḥ rāga ādayaḥ tathā tyaktum śakyāḥ janmāntaraiḥ yadi rāga ādibhiḥ amartya tvam prāpuḥ prakṣīṇa kalmaṣāḥ ādityaḥ uvāca yadi evam mukti kāmaḥ tvam gaṇanātha śṛṇuṣva tam kriyā yogam samastānām kleśānām hāni kārakam mām eva eṣyasi yuktvā evam ātmānam mad parāyaṇaḥ mad bhāvanāḥ mad yajanāḥ mad bhaktāḥ mad parāyaṇāḥ mama pūjā karāḥ ca eva mayi yānti layam narāḥ sarva bhūteṣu mām paśyat mama avasthitam īśvaram jaṅgama ajaṅgame jñāte mayi āsakte samantataḥ rāga lobha ādi nāśena bhavitrī kṛtakṛtya tā mayi āveśam dadhat bhūyas kuru mad rūpiṇīm tanum tasya āśritam samāviśya sarva bhāvena sarvadā pūjitā sā eva te bhaktyā dhyātā ca eva upakāriṇī gacchan tiṣṭhan svapan bhuñjaḥ tām eva agre ca pṛṣṭhatas vāsobhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ bhakṣyaiḥ gīta vādyaiḥ manoramaiḥ bhakti namraḥ gaṇa śreṣṭha prīṇayasva kṛtim mama rāgeṇa ākṛṣyate tāta gandharva abhimukham yadi mayi buddhim samāveśya gāyethāḥ yāḥ kathāḥ mama śrotavyāḥ prīti yogena mad sva rūpa udayāḥ kathāḥ evam samarpita manāḥ cetasaḥ ye atha āśrayāḥ a kṣīṇa rāga dveṣaḥ api mad priyaḥ paramaḥ param padam āpnoṣi mā bhaiṣīḥ mayi arpita manāḥ bhava diṇḍiḥ uvāca mad hitāya jagannātha kriyā yoga amṛtam mama ādityaḥ uvāca ākhyāsyate tat akhilam nirvikalpam gaṇādhipa sa ca diṇḍiḥ mahā tejāḥ jagāma āśu nabhogatim iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi diṇḍi ādityasaṃvādavarṇanam nāma dviṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāya atha triṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ āditya mahimā varṇanam praṇamya śirasā devam surajyeṣṭham caturmukham uvāca sa mahā tejāḥ diṇḍiḥ lokeśam ādarāt kriyā yoga amṛtam sarvam ākhyāsyati bhavān kila sa tvām pṛcchāmi aham brahman kriyā yogam nirantaram ehi ehi mad sakāśam ca mad samīpe gaṇādhipa brahmahatyā praṇaṣṭā te darśanāt eva tasya tu anugrāhyaḥ asi bhūteśa bhāskarasya amita ojasaḥ ārādhanāya bhūteśa yat īśe pravaṇam manaḥ bhagavantam anādi antam bhava dīkṣā guṇa anvitaḥ na hi a dīkṣā anvitaiḥ bhānuḥ jñātu stotum ca tattvataḥ draṣṭum vā śakyate mūḍhaiḥ praveṣṭum kutas eva hi bhavanti bhagavan saurāḥ tadā dīkṣā guṇa anvitāḥ na akṣīṇe jāyate puṃsām mārtaṇḍa abhimukhī matiḥ pradveṣam yāti mārtaṇḍe dvijān vedān ca nindati yaḥ naraḥ tam vijānīyāt pāpa bīja samudbhavam pākhaṇḍeṣu ratiḥ puṃsām hetuvāda anukūla tā jāyate viṣṇu māyā ambhaḥ patitānām durātmanām yadā pāpa kṣayaḥ puṃsām tadā veda dvija ādiṣu ravau ca devadeveśe śraddhām bhavati niścalā yadā su alpa avaśeṣaḥ tu narāṇām pāpa sañcayaḥ tadā dīkṣā guṇān sarve bhajante na atra saṃśayaḥ bhramatām atra saṃsāre narāṇām pāpa durgame ārādhaya iha tam bhaktyā prītim eṣyati bhāskaraḥ diṇḍiḥ uvāca kim lakṣaṇāḥ narāḥ dīkṣām arhanti padmasambhava karmaṇā manasā vācā prāṇinām yaḥ na hiṃsakaḥ bhāva bhaktaḥ ca mārtaṇḍe tasya dīkṣā guṇa anvitā brāhmaṇān ca eva devān ca nityam eva namasyati na ca drogdhā param vāde sa mārtaṇḍam samarcati sarvān devān ravim vetti sarva lokān ca bhāskaram tebhyaḥ ca na anyam ātmānam sa naraḥ saura tām vrajet devam manuṣyam anyam vā paśu pakṣi pipīlikān taru pāṣāṇa kāṣṭhāni bhūmi aṃbhaḥ gaganam diśaḥ ātmānam ca api deveśāt vyatiriktam divākarāt yaḥ na jānāti yatiṣu sa vai dīkṣā guṇān bhajet karmaṇā manasā vācā sa tu dīkṣām samarhati tām gatim na narāḥ yānti yām gatāḥ sūryam āśritāḥ yena sarva ātmanā bhānau bhaktyā bhāvaḥ niveśitaḥ gaṇeśvara kṛtārtha tvāt ślāghyaḥ sauraḥ sa mānavaḥ yaḥ kārayati deva arcām hṛdaya ālambanam raveḥ sa sapta puruṣān lokam bhānoḥ nayati mānavaḥ yāvanti ā abdāni deva arcā raveḥ tiṣṭhati mandire tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate deva arcā lakṣaṇa upetā tad gṛhe santataḥ vidhiḥ niṣkāmam ca manaḥ yasya sa yāti akṣara sāmya tām puṣpāṇi ca sugandhīni manojñāni ca yaḥ pumān prayacchati sahasrāṃśoḥ sadā prayata mānasaḥ dhūpān ca tān tān vividhān gandha āḍhyam ca anulepanam naraḥ saḥ anudinam yajñam karoti ārādhanam raveḥ yajñeśaḥ bhagavān pūṣā sadā kratubhiḥ ijyate bahu upakaraṇāḥ yajñāḥ nānā sambhāra vistarāḥ bhaktyā tu puruṣaiḥ pūjā kṛtā dūrvā aṅkuraiḥ api yāni puṣpāṇi hṛdyāni dhūpa gandha anulepanam dayitam bhūṣaṇam yat ca prītaye ca eva vāsasī yāni ca abhyavahāryāṇi ca phalāni vai prayaccha tāni mārtaṇḍe bhavethāḥ ca eva tad manāḥ ādyam tam bhuvana ādhāram yathāśaktyā prasādaya kṣīreṇa snāpayet bhānum graha īśam gopatim khagam dadhi kṣīra hradān puṇyān tatas lokān madhu cyutaḥ prayāsyati gaṇa śreṣṭha nirvṛttim ca vilakṣaṇām stotraiḥ gītaiḥ tathā vādyaiḥ brāhmaṇānām ca tarpaṇaiḥ ārādhya tam jagannātham mayā sargaḥ pravartitaḥ viṣṇuḥ ca pālayet lokān tam ārādhya divākaram rudraḥ ca prāptavān devīm bhavānīm tad prasādataḥ dīpyante ṛṣayaḥ ca api tam ārādhya divākaram toṣaya abdam hi tuṣṭaḥ asau bhānuḥ dvaṃdva praśānti daḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe śata arddha sāhasryām saṃhitāyām brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe brahmadiṇḍi saṃvāde ādityakriyāyogavarṇanam nāma triṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catuḥṣaṣṭitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ diṇḍiḥ uvāca upavāsaiḥ suraśreṣṭha katham tuṣyati bhāskaraḥ parihārān tathā ācakṣva ye tyājyāḥ ca upavāsibhiḥ smṛtaḥ sampūjitaḥ dhūpa puṣpa annaiḥ bhānuḥ ādarāt bhoginām upakārāya kim punar ca upavāsinām upāvṛttasya pāpebhyaḥ yaḥ tu vāsaḥ guṇaiḥ saha eka rātram dvi rātram vā tri rātram naktam eva ca upavāsī ravim yaḥ tu bhaktyā dhyāyati mānavaḥ niṣkāmaḥ puruṣaḥ diṇḍe sa brahma param āpnuyāt yam ca kāmam abhidhyāya māskara arpita mānasaḥ diṇḍiḥ uvāca brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ vaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ strībhiḥ ca kañja ja an ārādhya jagannātham gopatim dhvānta nāśanam tat ārādhaya sarva īśam bhāskaram jyotiṣām patim vāsobhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ bhakṣyaiḥ upavāsa parāyaṇaḥ tat ārādhaya mārtaṇḍam bhakti pravaṇa cetasā puṣpāṇi yadi te na snuḥ śasta pādapa pallavaiḥ dūrvāṅkaraiḥ api diṇḍe tad abhāve arcaya aryamam pūjitaḥ tuṣṭim atulām bhaktyā yāti ekacetasā yaḥ sat āyatane bhānoḥ kurute mārjana kriyām yāvatyaḥ pāṃsu kaṇikāḥ mārjyante bhāskara ālaye yaḥ ca anulepanam kuryāt bhānoḥ āyatane naraḥ mṛdā dhātu vikāraiḥ vā varṇakaiḥ gomayena vā upalepana kṛt yāti mad puram yānam āsthitaḥ udaka abhyukṣaṇam bhānoḥ yaḥ karoti sadā gṛhe vimānam ati śobhā āḍhyam sarva ṛtu sukha bhūṣitam samāpnoti naraḥ dattvā dīpakam bhāskara ālaye yaḥ tu saṃvatsaram pūrṇam tila pātra pradaḥ naraḥ vidhūtaḥ hanti vātena dātuḥ ajñānataḥ kṛtam pāpam kartuḥ gṛhe bhānoḥ divā rātrau narādhipa gīta vādya ādibhiḥ bhānum yaḥ upāste tama upaham prāpnoti gaṇāśārdūla kṛtvā pustakavācanam evam khageśvaraḥ bhaktyā yena bhānuḥ upāsitaḥ sa prāpnoti gatim ślādhyām yām yām icchati cetasā śakraḥ kratu śatena īśam ārādhya jyotiṣām patim brahmacāri gṛhasthānām vanasthānām gaṇādhipa na anyaḥ pūjyaḥ tathā strīṇām ṛte devam divākaram madhye parivrājakānām sahasrāṃśum mahātmanām mokṣa dvāram viśanti iha tam ravim vijita ātmanām evam sarva āśramāṇām hi sahasrāṃśuḥ parāyaṇam sarveṣām ca eva varṇānām graha īśaḥ vai gatiḥ parā śṛṇuṣva gadataḥ kāmyān upavāsān tathā aparān śṛṇu diṇḍe mahā puṇya phalakām saptamīm parām āditya ārādhanāya enām sarva pāpa harām śivām sā upoṣyā prathamam tāta vidhānam śṛṇu tatra vai a yācitam caturthyām tu pañcamyām eka bhojanam
