kartuḥ vāma unnatā tu patnīm dakṣiṇa avanatā hinasti āyuḥ andha tvam ūrddhva dṛṣṭiḥ karoti cintām adhomukhī dṛṣṭiḥ sarva pratimāsu evam śubha aśubham bhāskareṇa uktam brahmā kamaṇḍalu karaḥ catur mukhaḥ paṅkaja sthaḥ ca skandaḥ kumāra rūpaḥ śakti dharaḥ barhiketuḥ ca śuklaḥ catur viṣāṇaḥ dvipaḥ mahā indrasya vajrapāṇi tvam tiryak ūrdhva lalāṭa saṃstham tṛtīyam api locanam cihnam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne śrīsūryapratimālakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma dvātriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ viśva rūpa varṇanam nāradaḥ uvāca tatas adhivāsanam kuryāt vidhi dṛṣṭena karmaṇā aiśānyām diśi vai kuryāt adhivāsana maṇḍapam diśāsu vidiśāsu eva patākābhiḥ tu bhūṣitam āgneyyām diśi raktāḥ syuḥ kṛṣṇāḥ syuḥ yāmya nairṛte śvetā diśi aparasyām tu vāyavyām eva pāṇḍurā citrā tu pītā pūrvottare tathā śriyam āyuḥ jayam ca eva balam yaśaḥ yadu uttama dadāti sā vīra kṛtā sampad ardhe na saṃśayaḥ hitāya sarva lokānām mṛṇmayī pratimā bhavet subhikṣa kṣema dā nityam sarvā maṇi mayīkṛtā gāṅgeyā puṣṭi dā raupyā syāt vai kīrti pravartinī prajā vṛddhim tāmra mayīm kuryāt nityam asaṃśayaḥ bhūmeḥ lābham tu vipulam kuryāt aśma mayī sadā sāmbaḥ uvāca nāradaḥ uvāca sādhu sāmba mahā bāho śṛṇu me paramam vacaḥ sura jyeṣṭhaḥ śiraḥ tasya kapāle asya bṛhaspatiḥ ekādaśe tathā rudrāḥ kaṇṭham asya samāśritāḥ nakṣatrāṇi grahāḥ ca eva daśaneṣu samāśritāḥ sarva śāstra mayī devī jihvāyām ca sarasvatī diśaḥ ca vidiśaḥ ca eva sarvāḥ śrotreṣu saṃsthitāḥ ādityāḥ dvādaśa vibho bhruvoḥ madhye samāśritāḥ ṛṣayaḥ romakūpeṣu samudrāḥ jaṭhare sthitāḥ yakṣa kinnara gandharvāḥ piśācāḥ dānavāḥ tathā rākṣasāḥ ca gaṇāḥ sarve hṛdaye syuḥ sthitāḥ raveḥ nadyaḥ bāhu gatāḥ ca eva nagāḥ kakṣa antare sthitāḥ kaṭi deśe pṛthivī ādyāḥ liṅge sṛṣṭiḥ samāśritā jānunī ca aśvinī devau ūrū tasya acalāḥ smṛtāḥ sapta pātāla lokāḥ tu nakha madhye samāśritāḥ devaḥ kālāgni rudraḥ yaḥ danta anteṣu samāśritaḥ vyaṃgeṣu vāyavaḥ ca eva lokālokam carācaram vyāptam karma śarīreṇa vāyunā tasya vai vibhoḥ saḥ eṣa bhagavān arkaḥ bhūta anugrahaṇe sthitaḥ tat te sarvam pravakṣyāmi yathā uktam brahmaṇā purā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne pratimāpratiṣṭhākalpe viśvarūpavarṇanam nāma trayastriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ maṇḍala vidhi varṇanam nāradaḥ uvāca pratipacya dvitīyā ca caturthī pañcamī tathā daśamī trayodaśī ca eva paurṇamāsī ca kīrtitā ete saumyāḥ grahāḥ proktāḥ pratiṣṭhā yajña karmaṇi triṣu uttarāsu revatyām aśvinyām brāhma bhe tathā bharaṇyām ca eva nakṣatre bhānoḥ sthāpanam uttamam śodhayitvā tu vai bhūmim tuṣa keśa vivarjitām vālukā aṅgāra pāṣāṇa asthi vihīnām viśodhya tu maṇḍapaḥ tu pramāṇena daśa hastaḥ samaṃtataḥ maṇḍalam vṛkṣa śākhābhiḥ kārayet vidhi pūrvakam nadī saṅgama tīra utthām mṛttikām ca samānayet catur asram śriyā yuktam pūrvam kuṇḍam tu kārayet dakṣiṇe ca ardhacandram syāt vāruṇyām diśi vartulam padma ākāram tu vai kuryāt uttare ca vicakṣaṇaḥ toraṇāni tatas kuryāt pañca hastāni suvrata aśvatthaḥ ca śamī ca eva candanaḥ ca iti kīrtitāḥ śukla vastra samāyuktaḥ citra paṭṭa samanvitaḥ japa mālā anvitaḥ kuryāt toraṇāni vicakṣaṇaḥ agne āyāhi iti mantreṇa paścimam tu samarcayet kalaśān tu samādāya hema garbha samanvitān śveta candana paṅkena kaṇṭha svastika bhūṣaṇān ājighra iti ca mantreṇa kalaśān tu niveśayet dukūlaḥ citra paṭṭaiḥ ca veṣṭayet stambha mālikām dhvaja ādarśa patākābhiḥ cāmaraiḥ tu vitānakaiḥ śaṅkha ghaṇṭā ninādaiḥ ca geya maṅgala vācanaiḥ patākābhiḥ vicitrābhiḥ pūjā mālya upaśobhitam vicitra sraj vitāna āḍhyam prakīrṇa kusuma aṅkuram tad madhye tu kuśa āstīrṇe deva arcām sthāpayet budhaḥ patākām pīta varṇām tu pūrve śakrāya dāpayet āgneyyām rakta varṇa ābhām yama āśāyām yama upamān nīlāñjana sama prakhyām nairṛtyām ca pradāpayet vāruṇyām sita varṇām ca kṛṣṇām vāyavya gocare haritām yakṣarājāya aiśānyām sarva varṇikām vaidyā vediḥ iti mantreṇa vedyāḥ ālabhanam bhavet pūrva agrān uttara agrān ca kuśān āstīrya yatnatas yogeyoga iti mantreṇa kuśaḥ ca āstaraṇam bhavet śayyā tatra eva kartavyā divya āstaraṇa saṃyutā pūpakān su vicitrān vai modakān ca pradāpayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmba upākhyāne sūrya pratiṣṭhāyām maṃḍalavidhivarṇanam nāma catustriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi snāna karma vidhim tava snāpakaḥ tu mahā prājñaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ vedapāragaḥ abhijñaḥ saura śāstrāṇām aruṇaḥ yadu sattama bhojakaḥ bhojakaiḥ ca anyaiḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ ca tathā vṛtaḥ diśābhāge maṇḍalasya īśāne vai yathākramam hasta mātra pramāṇam tu bhadrapīṭham tu vinyaset maṃgalaiḥ brahmaghoṣaiḥ ca devam prāsādam ānayet bhadrapīṭham samādāya bhadram karṇa iti mantrataḥ sūtradhāraḥ tathā proktaḥ śukla ambara dharaḥ śuciḥ snāpayet kalaśam gṛhya devadevam vibhāvasum sāmudram toyam āhṛtya jāhnavam yāmunam tathā sārasvatam jalam puṇyam cāndrabhāgam sa saindhavam puṣkarasya jalam śreṣṭham giri prasravaṇa udakam anyat vā api śuci toyam nadīnada taḍāga jam yathāśaktyā upāhṛtya kalaśaiḥ kāñcana ādibhiḥ bhojakāḥ ca aṣṭabhiḥ sūryam kalaśaiḥ snāpayanti vai tatas tu maṇi ratnāni sarva bīja oṣadhīḥ tathā brāhmī suvarcalā mustā viṣṇukrāntā śatāvarī dūrvā ca śibipuṣpī ca priyaṅgūḥ rajanī vacā sambhṛtya etān tu sambhārān snāna karma vibhāga vid balā aśvattha śirīṣāṇām pallavaiḥ kuśa saṃyutaiḥ kāñcanaiḥ rājataiḥ tāmraiḥ mṛṇmayaiḥ kalaśaiḥ tathā sa akṣataiḥ sa hiraṇyaiḥ ca sarva oṣadhi samanvitaiḥ gāyatryā paripūtaiḥ tu ṣoḍaśaiḥ snāpayet ravim kuśa uttarām tatas kṛtvā vedim pakva iṣṭakā mayīm tasyām vedyām samāropya paridhāpya ca vāsasī pratimām abhiṣiñcet ca sa upavāsaḥ prayatnataḥ mūrdhni sarva oṣadhīḥ kṛtvā tathā eva āmalakāni ca mantreṇa mṛttikām ca api mantrataḥ ca jalam tathā ādiḥ tvam sarva bhūtānām devatānām ca sarvathā rasānām pataye tubhyam āhvānam ca kṛtam mayā ittham paurāṇikaiḥ maṃtra aivaidikaiḥ ca viśeṣataḥ kāryam hi vāruṇam snānam devasya yadu naṃdana ittham uccārayet vācam kuryāt snānam vicakṣaṇaḥ devāḥ tvām abhiṣiñcantu brahma viṣṇu śiva ādayaḥ vyomagaṅgā ca pūrṇena dvitīya kalaśena tu śakra ādayaḥ abhiṣiṃcantu lokapālāḥ sura uttamāḥ vāriṇā paripūrṇena padma patra sugandhinā pañcamena abhiṣiñcantu nāgāḥ ca kalaśena tu himavat hemakūṭa ādyāḥ ca abhiṣiñcantu vāriṇā nairṛta udaka pūrṇena ṣaṣṭhena kalaśena tu sarva tīrtha ambu pūrṇena padma reṇu su vāsinā saptamena abhiṣiñcantu ṛṣayaḥ sapta ye varāḥ vasavaḥ ca abhiṣiñcantu kalaśena aṣṭamena vai samudra jyeṣṭhā iti mantreṇa kṣālayet mṛttikā anvitam sinīvālī iti mantreṇa dadyāt valmīka mṛttikām yajñam yajña iti mantreṇa dadyāt pañcakaṣāyikam pañcagavyam pavitram ca āharet tāmra bhājane āpyāyasva iti ca kṣīram dadhikrāvṇā iti vai dadhi yāḥ oṣadhī iti maṃtreṇa snānam oṣadhibhiḥ kramāt śiraḥ snānam tatas dadyāt māna stoka abhimantritam viṣṇoḥ arāṭa mantreṇa dadyāt gandha udakam śubham jātavedasam uccārya vastra pūtena vāriṇā tatas āvāhayet devam rakta mālya ambaram śubham yajña bhāgam gṛhāṇa arghyam arka deva namaḥ astu te hiraṇyena tu pātreṇa devāya arghyam pradāpayet pārthivaiḥ prathamam kalaśaiḥ snāpayet bhāskaram budhaḥ śaṅkham ādāya devasya tatas mūrdhani śaṅkara dattvā puṣpāṇi devasya mūrdhni yatnāt vicakṣaṇaḥ prathamam snāpayet devam vāriṇā yadunandana rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām ghṛta ādyaiḥ labhate phalam ye ete kathitāḥ yajñāḥ eteṣām kramaśas phalam arcām ca kuru śārdūla dṛṣṭvā vai labhate phalam na prāśnanti yathā kākāḥ tīrtham loka vigarhitāḥ bhūmau gatam yathā ca eva prāśnāti yadu naṃdana rogam prāpnoti kartā vai duḥkham kārayitā tathā tatas vardhanikām gṛhya vāri dhārām samutsṛjet yatna kramam prakurvāṇaḥ puṣpa mālām pradāpayet yuñjāni iti ca mantreṇa rocanām tasya dāpayet ārārtikam ca vai kuryāt dīrgha āyuḥ tvāya varcase bhojakāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ ca eva kriyām kuryuḥ prayatnataḥ teṣām pravakṣyāmi vibho śṛṇu ca ekamanāḥ kila sampūrṇa gātraḥ matimān śāstra jñaḥ priya darśanaḥ kulīnaḥ śraddadhānaḥ ca ārya deśa samudbhavaḥ na sthūlaḥ na kṛśaḥ dīrghaḥ saura śāstra viśāradaḥ pañcaviṃśati tattva jñaḥ sthāpakaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ varjanīyān ca vakṣyāmi yaiḥ tu karma na kārayet hīnāṅgaḥ ca adhikāṅgaḥ ca vāmanaḥ vikaṭaḥ tathā na ati gauraḥ na kṛṣṇaḥ ca snāpanāya prayojayet aśuci vrata saṃyuktaḥ śyāma dantaḥ atha matsarī kopanaḥ duṣṭa śīlaḥ ca yuvā vā vṛddhaḥ eva ca śvitrī kuṣṭhī ca rogī ca kāṇaḥ durmatiḥ eva ca saṃkīrṇaḥ jāti hīnaḥ ca tathā na vṛṣalī patiḥ kubjaḥ ca adhas tathā vyaṃgaḥ khalvāṭaḥ vikala indriyaḥ tithi nakṣatra yogānām vārāṇām ca tathā vibho sūcakaḥ jīvikā artham hi yaḥ ca mūlyena pāṭhayet īdṛśān snāpakān sarvān varjayeta prayatnataḥ tasmāt sarva prayatnena parīkṣyāḥ snāpakāḥ budhaiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāṃba upākhyāne sūryapratiṣṭhāsnānavidhivarṇanam nāma pañcatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṭtriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya pratiṣṭhā varṇanam nāradaḥ uvāca sahasra śīrṣā puruṣaḥ maṇḍapam yatnataḥ viśet tatas anye ca śucau deśe a saṃspṛṣṭa upalepane maṇḍalam pañca varṇaiḥ tu ālikhet caturasrakam patākā toraṇa chatra dhvaja mālya ādi alaṃkṛtam vicitra su vitāna āḍhyam prakīrṇa kusuma utkaraiḥ tasya madhye kuśa āstīrṇe mūrtiḥ sthāpyā vivasvataḥ tatra asya āvāhanam kṛtvā dadyāt arghyam vivasvate suvarṇa madhuparka ādi kṛtvā tatra vidhānataḥ devasya darśayet gām ca sa vatsām rohiṇīm śubhām yajñopavītam ātithyam tathā abhyaṅgam tathā eva ca avyaṅgam yadu śārdūla śrāvaṇe māsi bhāskaram mālābhiḥ ca vicitrābhiḥ ābaddhābhiḥ anekaśas tatas dhūpam nivedya āśu pratimā agre prayatnataḥ sahasra śīrṣā puruṣaḥ maṇḍapam ca praveśayet namaḥ śambhava iti mantreṇa śayyāyām viniveśayet punar eva ca vakṣyāmi saṅkalīkaraṇam śubham snāpane tu yathā kāryaḥ sva dehe nyāsaḥ uttamaḥ pratimāyām tathā kāryaḥ yathā ca ālambhanam budhaḥ om hum khaṣolkāya namaḥ mūlamantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ ādityaḥ ayam svayam devaḥ hi akṣareṇa upabṛṃhitaḥ oṃkāram vinyaset mūrdhni huṃkāram nāsikā upari khakāram ca lalāṭe tu ṣakāram vadane nyaset lakāram ca eva kaṃṭhe tu kakāram hṛdaye nyaset yakāram tu bhuje vāme nakāram dakṣiṇe bhuje makāram vāma kukṣau ca visargam dakṣiṇe nyaset oṃkāram tu sadā dhyāyet jvālā mālā samākulam huṅkāram śuddha varṇa ābham prasuvantam alam śubham taruṇa āditya varṇa ābham khakāram cintayet budhaḥ ṣokāram tu mahā bāho hema varṇam vicintayet śukla padma nibha ākāram akāram ciṃtayet budhaḥ jātī kusuma saṃkāśam hrīṃkāram sarva varṇakam kṣīra varṇam sakāram tu cintayet satatam budhaḥ nakāram hima kunda ābham makāram amṛta akṣaram hrīṃkāram vidyut saṃkāśam hrīṃkāram sarva varṇakam kṣīra varṇam sakāram tu cintayet satatam budhaḥ nakāram svarṇa varṇa ābham makāram kanaka prabham tatas devam mahātmānam sahasrakiraṇam ravim prasāda abhimukham devam śayanīye niveśayet agni kāryam tatas kuryuḥ agnikuṇḍeṣu vai dvijāḥ tatas araṇyām samutthāpya agnim laukikam eva vā prajvālya agnim vidhānena kuryāt homam vicakṣaṇaḥ bahvṛcaḥ pūrva kāṇḍeṣu yāmyām madhyandinaḥ tathā śamī pālāśa udumbarāṇi hi apāmārgaḥ tathā eva ca dvādaśa tu sahasrāṇi aṣṭau catvāri eva ca ullikhya abhyukṣya tena eva agnim dūtam iti smṛtāḥ jātakarma tathā proktam prāṇāyāmam viduḥ budhāḥ annaprāśana mantreṇa annaprāśanam ādiśet jyeṣṭham agra iti mantreṇa tena cūḍa upakarmaṇi agnihotra ādikam karma yajña karmāṇi yāni ca mahāvyāhṛti mantreṇa hotavyāni samantataḥ mātṛrṇām yajña bhūtānām bali karma pradāpayet tri rātram pañca rātram ca ahar rātram atha api vā tatas tu alaṅkṛtām snātām maṇi ratnaiḥ vibhūṣitām kṛta rakṣām prayatnena pratimām adhivāsayet devāgārāt atha aiśāne digbhāge divya mandiram kṛtvā kuśa paristīrṇe vara āstaraṇa saṃvṛte pūrva śīrṣām tathā śayyām śuklām śukla ambara uttarām tasyām āveśayet samyak mahā śvetam upāharet nikṣubhā dakṣiṇe pārśve vāme rājñī ca kīrtitā tasyām saṃveśitāyām tu śarvaryām pratimām raveḥ vaset tām rajanīm tatra stūyamānaḥ catudiśam brāhmaṇaiḥ bandibhiḥ ca api gīta jñaiḥ cāraṇaiḥ tathā prabhātāyām tu śarvaryām bodhayet ṛc vidhānataḥ haviṣyam bhoktu kāmān tu brāhmaṇān bhojakān tathā dakṣiṇābhiḥ ca sampūjya taiḥ kṛta svastivācanaḥ tatas garbhagṛha sthāya madhye kṛtvā tu piṇḍikām dattvā arghyam sthāpayet tatra yajamānaḥ sahāyavān śaṅkha dundubhi nirghoṣaiḥ jala dhārā saha akṣataiḥ kṛtyā puṇyāha śabdam tu ālayasya pradakṣiṇām śubha lagne dine ṛkṣe pūrvāhṇe bhānave kṣaṇe muhūrte ca śubhe bhānoḥ pratimām sthāpayet budhaḥ na adhomukhīm na ūrdhva mukhīm na pārśva avanatām tathā samām abhimukhīm ca imām pratimām tu niveśayet nikṣubhā dakṣiṇe pārśve rave rājñī tu vāmataḥ tatas tad upahāra artham sambhāram prāk tam āhṛtaiḥ modaka āyūṣika apūpa śaṣkulī bhūtaśīrṣakaiḥ kṛsaraiḥ pāyasa unmiśraiḥ sarva dikṣu kṣipet balim agnaye rakta netrāya jvālā mālā arcitāya vai śaktihastāya tīvrāya tathā ca eva aja vāhine āgreyyām agri mantreṇa vahneḥ āvāhanam smṛtam daṇḍa hastāya kṛṣṇāya mahiṣottama vāhine sūryaputrāya devāya dharmarājāya vai namaḥ sarva bāhya adhipataye virūpa ākhyāya vai namaḥ vāruṇyām pāśa hastāya varuṇāya iti kalpayet mantreṇa āvāhanam vidyāt pañca nadyaḥ sarasvatīm prāṇa ātmakāya dhūpāya avyaṅgāya anilāya ca tasya api āvāhanam vidyāt yat deva adeva heḍanam gadā hastāya somāya śuṣmiṇe nṛ gatāya ca gadā paṭṭiśa hastāya soma rājāya vai namaḥ īśāvāsyam ca guhyā vai soma mantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ kṛṣṇa ajina niṣaṇṇāya namaḥ lambodarāya ca gaṇa adhipataye deva nīlakaṇṭhāya śūline virūpākṣāya rudrāya trailokya adhipate namaḥ abhi tvā śūra naḥ mantraḥ īśānāya prakalpayet sarva nāga adhirājāya śveta varṇāya bhogine pañcarātra ādibhiḥ nyāsaḥ hi aṃganyāsaḥ prayujyate sūryakratum mahā puṇyam na eva kuryāt adakṣiṇam sā tu vṛddhi karā nityam sānnidhyāt ca sadā bhavet upāsate tri rātram ye bhānoḥ yātrā abhivāsane ātmīyam parakīyam vā pratimā sthāpanam raveḥ daśānām aśvamedhānām vājapeya śatasya ca phalam prāpnoti puruṣaḥ pratiṣṭhāpya divākaram yāvat kīrtiḥ puṇya kṛtā bhānoḥ sthāne niveśite tāvat sa tu yaduśreṣṭha sūrya loke mahīyate dhruvā dyauḥ ca dhruvā pṛthvī dhruvam viśvam idam jagat sthāpayitvā ravim bhaktyā vidhi dṛṣṭena karmaṇā māse māse ṛtu phalam labhante na atra saṃśayaḥ eka ahena api yat bhānoḥ pūjayā prāpyate phalam kṛtvā api su mahat pāpam yaḥ paścāt sevate ravim na bhavet iṣṭakānām ca dravaṇam bhūmi saṃmiti khaṇḍa sphuṭita saṃskāram kṛtvā yat phalam āpyate sikatāyām api gṛham yaḥ tu kuryāt vibhāvasoḥ śrī bhāgī bhavati naraḥ niketa kārī kalpānām vasati śatam sa sūrya loke iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne sūryapratiṣṭhāvarṇanam nāma ṣaṭtriṃśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca yaḥ prāsādam racayati pumān devatānām prayatnāt tatra prītyā sapadi kurute sthāpanām bhānu bhaktaḥ ye mānavāḥ tridaśa mūrti niketanāni kurvanti sādhu jana dṛṣṭi manoharāṇi teṣām mṛte api a paramārtha maye śarīre loke paribhramati kīrti mayam śarīram sādhāraṇam vidhānam śṛṇu devānām pratiṣṭhāpane vīra snātaḥ bhuktaḥ vastra alaṅkṛta kusumaiḥ gandhaiḥ pratimāyāḥ āstīrṇāyām śayyāyām sthāpanam kuryāt suptāyām tu sa nṛtya gītaiḥ jāgaraṇaiḥ samyak eva adhivāsya daivajñena pratidiṣṭa kāle saṃsthāpanam kuryāt abhyarcya kusuma gandha anulepanaiḥ śaṅkha tūrya nirghoṣaiḥ prādakṣiṇyena nayet āyatanasya prayatnena kṛtvā balim pratimām abhyarcya brāhmaṇān ca sādhūn dattvā hiraṇya kalaśam vidhinā nikṣipet piṇḍikā madhye su śvabhre sthāpaka daivajña dvijān samyak viśeṣataḥ abhyarcya akalpa antam bhogī bhavati iha paratra sukhī viṣṇoḥ bhāgavatāḥ matāḥ ca savituḥ śambhoḥ sa bhasma dvijāḥ mātṛrṇām api mātṛ maṇḍala vidaḥ viprāḥ viduḥ brāhmaṇāḥ sāmānyam idam devānām adhivāsanam bhavati mayā kathitam kriyamāṇam idam dṛṣṭvā devānām pratiṣṭhāpanam idam te kathitam rājan pratiṣṭhāpanam āditas yat kṛtvā savituḥ snānam naraḥ yāti manogatim ittham kuryāt naraḥ bhaktyā savituḥ sthāpanam budhaḥ itihāsa purāṇasya śravaṇam pāpa nāśanam tābhyām hi śravaṇāt vīra sānnidhyam yāti bhāskaraḥ kṛte tu āyatane tasmin ye ca anye ca api devatāḥ tasmāt kāryam budhaiḥ nityam dharma śravaṇam āditas vācakam pūjayitvā tu brāhmaṇān upapūjya ca kārayet vācanam vīra pustakasya agratas raveḥ iti eṣa kathitaḥ vīra pratiṣṭhā kalpaḥ āditas kṛtvā dṛṣṭvā ca śrutvā ca yam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne pratiṣṭhāpanavidhivarṇanam nāma saptatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca yat uktam brahmaṇā pūrvam ṛṣabha adhipate puras kṛtāni upari cihnāni vāhanāni dhvajāni tu kīrtitaḥ sa ca tasya iha pramāṇam gadataḥ śṛṇu prāsāda vyāsa tulyasya dhvaja vaṃśa pramāṇataḥ devāgārasya ye proktāḥ mañjarī kalaśa ādayaḥ atha vā tad pramāṇaḥ tu dhvaja daṇḍaḥ prakīrtitaḥ antargṛhasya yā vedī sūtrataḥ parikalpitā tasyāḥ vyāsaḥ bhavet vaṃśaḥ prasādasya yadu uttama atha vā mūlasūtreṇa yaḥ vyāsaḥ antargṛhasya tu prāsādavyāsaḥ iti te proktaḥ ca iha na saṃśayaḥ catur hastāḥ bhavanti ete praśastāḥ kṛṣṇa nandana aṣṭa hasta pramāṇaḥ tu viṃśa ardhasya pramāṇataḥ sāmānyaḥ dhvaja daṇḍaḥ tu sarva sādhāraṇaḥ mataḥ daṇḍa pāṇi dhvajaḥ yaḥ tu smṛtaḥ ṣoḍaśa hastavān viṃśat hastāt paraḥ daṇḍaḥ na kāryaḥ sarvathā raveḥ catur aṅgula vistīrṇaḥ su vṛttaḥ dvi aṅgula upari na ati sūkṣmaḥ na ca sthūlaḥ na kāryaḥ nata parvakaḥ kartavyaḥ su dṛḍhaḥ sūkṣmaḥ eva hi vakraḥ putra vināśāya savraṇaḥ artha vināśanaḥ daśā ete kīrtitāḥ bhedāḥ dhvajasya ānanda sammitāḥ dvādaśa hastaḥ tu jaitreyaḥ śatru hantā kalā anvitaḥ jayāvahaḥ tu viṃśārdhaḥ nandaḥ āditya sannibhaḥ upendraḥ aṣṭādaśaḥ proktaḥ tathā indraḥ viṃśatiḥ smṛtaḥ dhvaja daṇḍaḥ mahā bāho atha vā vāstu mānataḥ mañjarī mānataḥ vā api tad ardhena athavā vibho patākā vai śubhā kāryā dhvaja vaṃśa avalambinī devāgārasya śikharāt tri bhāga parimārjanī sā proktā daśadhā vīra mānataḥ mānataḥ tathā aṅkuraḥ pallavaḥ ca eva skandhaḥ śākhā tathā eva ca patākā kadalī vīra ketuḥ lakṣma jayaḥ tathā aṅkuraḥ dvayaṃgulaḥ proktaḥ pallavaḥ catur aṅgulaḥ skandhaḥ ṣaṣ aṅgulaḥ proktaḥ śākhā ca aṣṭa aṅgulaḥ matā ekādaśa patākā tu kadalī ca caturdaśa ketuḥ tu ṣoḍaśaḥ proktaḥ lakṣmā aṣṭādaśam ucyate jayāḥ viṃśati vai proktāḥ etāvat tu aṅgulāni tu devāgārasya kumbhasya prasannā sā pramārjanī aṅkura iti patākā sā vijñeyā yadu nandana tri bhāga mārjanī skandhaḥ śākhāḥ vai pañcamasya tu ṣaṣṭhasya uktā patākā tu kadalī saptamasya tu vṛṣasthāna avamārgī tu dhvajaḥ tu parikīrtitaḥ gajaḥ meṣaḥ atha mahiṣaḥ kabandhaḥ tu vṛṣaḥ tathā evam daśavidhā proktā patākā tattva darśibhiḥ kartavyā sā yathāpūrvam tat śṛṇu tvam narādhipa śukla vastra mayī citrā sa ghaṇṭā su manoharā nānā cāmara sampannā kiṅkiṇī jāla maṇḍitā kāñcanaḥ vā atha raupyaḥ vā maṇi ratna mayaḥ api vā raṅgakaiḥ likhyate vā api tad vāhana sama ākṛtiḥ garutmān ātmān tu dhvajaḥ viṣṇoḥ īśvarasya dhvajaḥ vṛṣaḥ brahmaṇaḥ paṅkajam kāryam raveḥ dharmaḥ smṛtaḥ dhvajaḥ godhā ca api umā devyāḥ raivatasya hayaḥ smṛtaḥ pāvakasya tathā meṣaḥ āsuḥ gaṇapateḥ mataḥ brahmarṣīṇām kuśaḥ proktaḥ iti eṣā dhvaja kalpanā viṣṇoḥ dhvaje tu sauvarṇam daṇḍam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ patākā ca api pītā syāt garuḍasya samīpa gā īśvarasya dhvaje daṇḍaḥ rājataḥ yadu nandanaḥ patākā ca api śuklā syāt vṛṣabhasya samīpa gā pitāmahadhvaje daṇḍaḥ smṛtaḥ tāmra mayaḥ budhaiḥ padma varṇā patākā syāt paṅkajasya samīpa gā ādityasya ca sauvarṇaḥ dhvaje daṇḍaḥ prakīrtitaḥ pañca varṇā patākā syāt dharmasya adhogatā nṛpa kiṅkiṇī jāla sampannā nāna budbuda sannibhā puṣpa mālā upasampannā nānā vādibhiḥ āvṛtā patākā bahu varṇā syāt kuñjarasya samīpa gā āyasaḥ ca api daṇḍa uktaḥ yama cihnam vicakṣaṇaiḥ patākā varṇataḥ kṛṣṇā mahiṣasya samīpa gā jalādhipa dhvajaḥ daṇḍaḥ rājataḥ parikīrtitaḥ patākā sarvatas śvetā vicitrā sā ca kathyate dhvaje ca api kuberasya daṇḍaḥ maṇi mayaḥ smṛtaḥ patākā ca api raktā syāt nara pāda samīpa gā patākā varṇataḥ śuklā tālasya adhas gatā smṛtā patākā rohiṇī tatra makarasya samīpa gā māyūram kārttikeyasya cihnam lokeṣu gīyate triloha daṇḍam ārūḍham bahu ratna vibhūṣitam bahu varṇaka citrā tu patākā kathitā budhaiḥ hasti danta bhavam daṇḍam kuryāt gaṇapateḥ nṛpa tāmra daṇḍam samāruḍham saṃśuddham sampratiṣṭhitam śuklā patākā kartavyā su pramāṇā mahīpate mātṛrṇām ca api kartavyaḥ nā eka rūpaḥ dhvajaḥ budhaiḥ cāmuṇḍā mandire kāryaḥ śiraḥ mālā ākulaḥ dhvajaḥ nīlā patākā kartavyā daṇḍaḥ loha mayaḥ tathā rītīm ayaḥ ca mātṛrṇām revatasya ca kārayet patākā kṛṣṇa varṇā tu hariṇasya samīpa gā bhagavatyāḥ dhvajaḥ daṇḍaḥ sarva ratna mayaḥ smṛtaḥ patākā tu tri varṇā syāt siṃhasya adhas gatā nṛpa evaṃvidham imam kṛtvā dhvajam lakṣaṇa lakṣitam tatas sarva oṣadhībhiḥ ca snāpayitvā prayatnataḥ kalpayitvā śubhām vedim kalaśaiḥ upaśobhitām tasyām vedyām samāropya tām rātrim adhivāsayet nānā kusuma citrām ca srajam tasya anulambayet bali karma tatas kṛtvā kṛsara apūpaka ādibhiḥ palāla pūpikābhiḥ ca dadhi pāyasa sūpakaiḥ uddiśya lokapālebhyaḥ balim dadyāt ca vāyasaiḥ brāhmaṇān svasti vācya atha kṛtvā puṇya aha maṅgalam vāditra kṛta nirghoṣam jalam saṃskāra saṃyutam nānā budbuda sapannam veṣṭitam nava vāsasā śubhe lagne dine ṛkṣe dhvajam ca āropayet budhaḥ tasmāt devālayam prājñaḥ dhvaja hīnam na kārayet śrīkaraḥ śrīnivāsaḥ ca jaya jaitra upaśobhita vyoma rūpa mahā rūpa dharma ātman tvam ca vai gateḥ sānnidhyam kuru daṇḍe asmin sākṣī ca dhruva tām vraja kuru vṛddhim sadā kartuḥ prāsādasya arka vallabha mantreṇa anena rāja indra śvabhre daṇḍe niveśayet patākām pūrva mantreṇa sthityā pūrva mukhaḥ nṛpa kṣipet ūrdhvam atha ākāśam prāsāda śikharāt vibhoḥ yajamānaḥ tatas paśyet patākām yadunandana prāsāda puratas vā api patākām pātayet yadi āgneyyām agni lokam tu yāmyām yama sadaḥ bhajet naiṛtyām naiṛtam lokam vāruṇyaḥ vāruṇam vrajet vāyavye vāyum āpnoti saumyāyām somam āpnuyāt aiśānyām īśam āpnoti kartā vai devaveśmanaḥ yaḥ evam kārayet bhaktyā dhvajasya āropaṇam raveḥ tejasā ambuja saṃkāśaḥ kāntyā ca ambuja sannibhaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne dhvajāropaṇavidhivarṇanam nāma aṣṭatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sāmbaḥ uvāca tvad prasādāt mayā prāptam rūpam etat purātanam pratyakṣa darśanam ca api bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ devasya paricaryāyāḥ pālanam kaḥ kariṣyati na dvijāḥ parigṛhṇanti devasya svīkṛtam dhanam avajñayā ca kurvanti ye kriyām lobha mohitāḥ a pāṅkteyāḥ bhavanti iha te vai devalakāḥ dvijāḥ deva svam brāhmaṇa tvam ca yaḥ lobhāt upajīvati sa pāpa ātmā naraḥ loke gṛdhra ucchiṣṭena jīvati tatas na brāhmaṇaḥ kaścid deva caryām kariṣyati vidhi jñam jñānavantam ca paricaryā kṣamam tathā devaḥ eva tam ākhyātum tasmāt tam śaraṇam vraja kṛta pūrvāhṇikam vīra vipram gauramukham nṛpa mayā bhānoḥ prasādena kāritam vipulam gṛham sa patnīkam sa sainyam ca pṛthivyām sāravat sthitam sarvam tasmin mayā dattam kṛtam mūrteḥ ca maṇḍalam tasmāt iṣṭvā viśiṣṭebhyaḥ deyam dānam manogatam tat sarvam mama samprītyā gṛhāṇa tvam mahā mune sāmba vākyam idam śrutvā pratyuvāca mahā muniḥ bravīmi aham aśeṣeṇa yathāvat anupūrvaśas brahma vidyā praṇītāni sva karmāṇi dvijātayaḥ kurvāṇāḥ na prahīyante anyathā bhinna vṛttayaḥ kṣāntiḥ adhyāpanam jāpaḥ satyam ca yadu nandana yadi deva artha dānam syāt tatas devalakāḥ dvijāḥ deva dravya abhilāṣaḥ ca brāhmaṇyam tu vimuñcati devadvāre ca yat dānam brāhmaṇāya prayacchati dvau etau pāpa kartārau ātma doṣeṇa mānavau deva artha dānam vārṣṇeya yat gṛhītvā ca yaḥ dvijaḥ śrāddhe vā yadi vā satre tat juhoti dadāti vā bhinna vṛttaḥ dvijaḥ pāpaḥ rākṣasaḥ saḥ abhijāyate annāni upaspṛśet nīcā sā paṅktiḥ pāpam ācaret uddhariṣyati ca ātmānam iti eṣā kalpanā adhamā tasmāt rājā na deva artham vipre dadyāt kathañcana brahmasūtram aham chittvā gamiṣyāmi iti gamyatām sāmbaḥ uvāca śrutam vā dṛṣṭa pūrvam vā tat me vyākhyātum arhasi tasya adhikāraḥ deva anne devatānām ca pūjane sāmbaḥ uvāca kasya putraḥ dvijaśreṣṭha kimācāraḥ kimākṛtiḥ nikṣubhāyām sutaḥ vīraḥ āditya ātmajaḥ ucyate sāmbaḥ uvāca katham sa nikṣubhā putraḥ katham vīrasutaḥ tathā mānuṣa tvam gatā devī nikṣubhā kila yādava gatā śāpam avāpya iha bhāskarāt loka pūjitā sujihvāḥ nāma dharma ātmā ṛṣi putraḥ purā anagha tasya ātmajā samutpannā nikṣubhā sā vara aṅganā rūpeṇa apratimā loke hāra līlā matā tu sā viharantī yathānyāyam samiddhe pāvake tathā atha tām devadeveśaḥ hi aṃśumālī dadarśa ha rūpa yauvana sampannām tatas kāma vaśam gataḥ cintayāmāsa deveśaḥ katham tām vai bhajāmi aham anayā avahṛtaḥ yaḥ ayam pāvakaḥ deva pūjitaḥ vanam āviśya tanvaṅgīm bhajeyam loka pūjitām iti sañcintya deveśaḥ sahasrāṃśuḥ divaspati viveśa pāvakam vīra tad putraḥ ca abhavat tadā tatas vilāsa lāvaṇya rūpa yauvana śālinī samiddham laṅghayitvā agnim jagāma āyata locanā kruddhaḥ sva rūpam āsthāya dṛṣṭvā kanyām sa pīḍitaḥ karam kareṇa saṅgṛhya tatas tām havyavāhanaḥ uvāca yadu śārdūla na uditaḥ bhāskareṇa tu jaraśabdaḥ iti khyātaḥ vaṃśa kīrti vivardhanaḥ agni jātyāḥ magāḥ proktāḥ soma jātyāḥ dvijātayaḥ bhojaka āditya jātyāḥ hi divyāḥ te parikīrtitāḥ atha utpannām prajām jñātvā dhyāna yogena vai ṛṣiḥ patitaḥ syāt mahā tejāḥ ṛgjihvaḥ su mahāmatiḥ śāpam udyamya tejasvī ṛgjihvaḥ vākyam abravīt ātma aparādhāt kāminyāḥ yathā garbhaḥ nala āvṛtaḥ sambhūtaḥ te mahābhāge apūjyaḥ ayam bhaviṣyati putra śoka abhisantaptā bālā paryākula īkṣaṇā cintayāmāsa duḥkha ārtā tam ekam jvalana ākṛtim ayam dattaḥ mahā śāpaḥ pūjyatām kartum arhasi āgneyam rūpam āśritya ca idam vacanam abravīt tena utsṛṣṭam mahā śāpam na anyathā kartum utsahe tava putram vidhāsyāmi ca apūjyam vedapāragam vaṃśaḥ ca su mahān tasya nivasiṣyati bhū tale mama aṅgāni mahātmānaḥ vāśiṣṭhāḥ brahma vādinaḥ mad gāyanāḥ mad yajanāḥ mad bhaktāḥ mad parāyaṇāḥ mama śuśrūṣakāḥ ca eva mama ca vrata cāriṇaḥ tvām ca mām ca yathānyāyam vedam tattva artha darśinaḥ pūjayiṣyanti niratāḥ sadā mad bhāva bhāvitāḥ mad karmaṇām mad aṅgānām mad bhāva viniveśanāt virajāḥ mad prasādena mām eva eṣyanti asaṃśayam jaṭā śmaśru dharāḥ nityam sadā mayi parāyaṇāḥ pañca kāla vidhāna jñāḥ vīra kālasya yajvinaḥ pūrṇa ika dakṣiṇe pāṇau varma vāmena dhārayan pati dānena vadanam pracchādya niyataḥ śuciḥ prāṇam hi mahatām kṛtvā tatas bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ ayamāt ca aprasādāt ca vyākula indriya cetasā vidhi hīnam maṃtra hīna ye vai yakṣyanti mām atas maga vaṃśe mahātmānaḥ veda vedāṅga pāragāḥ evam āśvāsya tām devīm bhāskaraḥ vāritaskaraḥ anta dardhe mahā tejāḥ sā ca harṣam avāpa ha evam ete samutpannāḥ bhojakāḥ kṛṣṇa nandana viṣṇu bhāste tathā ādityāḥ utpannāḥ loka pūjitāḥ tvadīyasya asya me vīra tathā bhāskara pūjane tasya gauramukhasya idam vākyam śrutvā sa yādavaḥ sāmbaḥ jāmbavatī putraḥ praṇamya śirasā uktavān bhojakāḥ dvijaśārdūla yena tān ānayāmi aham na aham jāne mahā bāho vasante yatra vai magāḥ jānīte tān raviḥ vīra tasmāt tam śaraṇam vraja jagāda bhāskaram sa ambaḥ kaḥ te pūjām kariṣyati na yogyāḥ paricaryāyām jambūdvīpe mama anagha mama pūjākaram gatvā śākadvīpāt iha ānaya lavaṇodāt pare pāre kṣīrodena samāvṛtaḥ jambūdvīpāt paraḥ yasmāt śākadvīpaḥ iti smṛtaḥ tatra puṇyāḥ janapadāḥ catur varṇa samanvitāḥ magāḥ ca magagāḥ ca eva gānagāḥ mandagāḥ tathā magāḥ brāhmaṇa bhūyiṣṭhāḥ magagāḥ kṣatriyāḥ smṛtāḥ vaiśyāḥ tu gānagāḥ jñeyāḥ śūdrāḥ teṣām tu mandagāḥ na teṣām saṅkaraḥ kaścid dharma āśraya kṛte kvacid dharmasya asya vicāraḥ vā hi ekatas sukhinaḥ prajāḥ tebhyaḥ vedāḥ tu catvāraḥ sa rahasyāḥ mayā uditāḥ te ca dhyāyanti mām eva yajante mām ca nityaśas mad mānasāḥ mad yajanāḥ mad bhaktāḥ mad parāyaṇāḥ mama śuśrūṣakāḥ ca eva mama ca vrata cāriṇaḥ avyaṅga dhāriṇaḥ ca eva vidhi dṛṣṭena karmaṇā kurvanti te sadā bhadrām mama pūjām mama anugāḥ tathā devāḥ sa gandharvāḥ siddhāḥ ca saha cāraṇaiḥ viharante ramante ca dṛśyamānāḥ ca taiḥ saha jambūdvīpe tu aham viṣṇuḥ veda vedāṅga pūjitaḥ śakraḥ aham śālmalīdvīpe krauñcadvīpe hi aham bhagaḥ plakṣadvīpe tu aham bhānuḥ śākadvīpe divākaraḥ puṣkare ca smṛtaḥ brahmā tatas ca aham maheśvaraḥ tān magān mama pūjā artham śākadvīpāt iha ānaya āruhya garuḍam sa amba śīghram gatvā a vicārayan tathā iti gṛhya tām ājñām raveḥ jāmbavatī sutaḥ punar dvāravatīm gatvā kāntyā atīva samanvitaḥ ākhyātavān pituḥ sarvam svakīyam devadarśanam śākadvīpam anuprāpya samprahṛṣṭa tanūruhaḥ tatra apaśyat yathā uddiṣṭān sāmbaḥ tejasvinaḥ magān vivasvantam pūjayantaḥ dhūpa dīpa ādibhiḥ śubhaiḥ saḥ abhivādya ca tān pūrvam kṛtvā api eṣām pradakṣiṇām pṛṣṭvā ca anāmayam teṣām praśaṃsā sāma pūrvakam yūyam hi puṇya karmāṇaḥ draṣṭavya arthe śubha arthinaḥ ratāḥ ye arkasya pūjāyām yeṣām ca eva vara pradaḥ tanayam vitta mām viṣṇoḥ sāmbam nāmnā ca viśrutam candrabhāgā taṭe ca api mayā sūryaḥ niveśitaḥ tena aham preṣitaḥ ca atra uttiṣṭhadhvam vrajāmahe te tam ūcuḥ tatas sāmbam evam etat na saṃśayaḥ asmākam api devena vyākhyātām pūrvam eva hi aṣṭādaśa kulāni iha magānām veda vādinām yāsyanti ye tvayā sārdham yathā devena bhāṣitam tatas tāni daśa aṣṭau ca kulāni iha samantataḥ kṛtvā ājñām tu raveḥ sa ambaḥ kṛtsnam tu evam nyavedayat mama pūjā karāḥ hi ete prajānām śānti kārakāḥ mama pūjām kariṣyanti vidhāna uktām yadu uttama iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne bhojaka ānayanam nāma ekonacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catvāriṃśat adhika śatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ evam saḥ ānayitvā tu magān sāmbaḥ mahīpate sa mahātmā purā sāmbaḥ candrabhāgā sarit taṭe puram niveśayāmāsa sthāpayitvā divākaram kṛtvā dhana samṛddham tu bhojakānām samarpayat tat puram savituḥ puṇyam triṣu lokeṣu viśrutam sāṃbena kāritam yasmāt tasmāt sāmbapuram smṛtam satkṛtya sthāpitāḥ sarve ātma nāma aṅkite pure magānām tu sat ācāraḥ dṛṣṭa ācāra kula ucitaḥ deva śuśrūṣaṇam gītam veda proktena karmaṇā kṛtakṛtyaḥ tadā sāmbaḥ varam labdhvā punar yuvā ādidevam sura jyeṣṭham ādityam praṇipatya saḥ anantaram magān sarvān praṇipatya abhivādya ca prasthitaḥ nirmalaḥ sa ambaḥ purīm dvāravatīm tadā magānām kāraṇa arthena prārthitāḥ bhoja vaṃśa jāḥ kanyā dānam kṛtam teṣām magānām bhojaka uttamaiḥ sarvāḥ tāḥ sahitāḥ kanyāḥ pravāla maṇi bhūṣitāḥ arcayitvā tu tāḥ sarvāḥ preṣitāḥ savituḥ gṛham punar gatvā tu sa aṃbena pṛṣṭaḥ devaḥ divākaraḥ magānām jñānam ākhyāhi vedān avyaṅgam eva ca sāmbasya vacanam śrutvā bhāskaraḥ vākyam abravīt pṛccha tvam nāradam gatvā sa te sarvam vadiṣyati sa ca api āha tatas sāmbam na jāne jñānam uttamam bhojakānām yaduśreṣṭha jñānam vyāsaḥ mahā muniḥ tam gatvā paripṛccha tvam praṇamya śirasā munim kṛṣṇa anurodhāt te sarvam sa vakṣyati na saṃśayaḥ vyāsa āśramam sa gatvā tu praṇamya śirasā munim kṛta añjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā idam vacanam abravīt śākadvīpam mayā gatvā ānītāḥ maga puṅgavāḥ bālāḥ yauvana sampannāḥ sanniviṣṭāḥ maga uttamāḥ satkṛtya pūjayitvā tu puram teṣām samarpitam bhoja vaṃśa samutpannāḥ kanyakāḥ samalaṅkṛtāḥ varayitvā kṛtam teṣām vipra praṇayanam śubham aho sabhāgyāḥ ślāghyāḥ ca kṛta puṇyāḥ ca te sadā pūjāyām ye ratāḥ bhānoḥ yeṣām ca eva vara pradaḥ paryāptam sarvam eteṣām iha ca āmuṣmikam phalam anitye sati mānuṣye deva pūjā ratāḥ hi ye jñānam prati tathā ca eṣām hadaye saṃśayaḥ mama katham pūjā karāḥ hi ete ke magāḥ ke ca bhojakāḥ jñānam kim paramam teṣām jñeyaḥ teṣām kaḥ eva tu divyā iti te katham proktāḥ kimartham kūrca dhāraṇam saura vratam kim artham tu vācakāḥ te katham smṛtāḥ atha ahi kañcukasya aṅgam kim pramāṇam ca kasya vai kasya vai kā samākhyātā yat utpannam katham smṛtam katham devān ca gāyanti yajñam kurvanti te katham agnihotram ca kim teṣām pañca dolāḥ ca kāḥ smṛtāḥ etat sarvam samākhyāhi bhojakānām viceṣṭitam sāmbasya vacanam śrutvā kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaḥ muniḥ kālī sutaḥ mahā tejāḥ uvāca paramam vacaḥ sādhu sādhu yaduśreṣṭha sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi suvrata durjñeya ceṣṭitam kiñcid bhojakānām na saṃśayaḥ yathā ākhyātam vasiṣṭhena tathā te vacmi kṛtsnaśas magānām caritam śreṣṭham śṛṇu tvam kṛṣṇa nandana jñāna vedinaḥ eva ete karmayogam samāśritāḥ śrūyante ṛṣayaḥ sarve maunena niyama sthitāḥ muni caryā kṛtaḥ te api śākadvīpa nivāsinaḥ vacaḥ sūrya samākhyātam kāraṇam ca varam tathā arcāyām te ca te nityam arcayantaḥ ca te smṛtāḥ bhoja kanyāsu jāta tvāt bhojakāḥ tena te smṛtāḥ brāhmaṇānām yathā proktaḥ vedāḥ catvāraḥ eva tu brahmaṇā uktāḥ tathā vedāḥ magānām api suvrata te eva viparītāḥ tu teṣām vedāḥ prakīrtitāḥ vedāḥ hi ete magānām tu purā uvāca prajāpatiḥ magāḥ vedam adhīyante vedāṅgāḥ tena te smṛtāḥ śeṣaḥ na hi mahābhāgaḥ sarva sattva sukha āvahaḥ vanditavyaḥ magānām tu astramantreṇa nityaśas yathā srajaḥ dvijānām tu pūjā kāle pramīyate sarva saṃskāra yajñeṣu yathā darbhāḥ dvijātiṣu pavitrāḥ kīrtitāḥ teṣām tathā dharmaḥ magasya tu ebhiḥ jayanti bhūyiṣṭham tasmin dvīpe maga adhipāḥ vidyāvantaḥ kula śreṣṭhāḥ śauca ācāra samanvitāḥ yajña avasaktāḥ bhaktāḥ ca japantaḥ mantram āditas sarveṣām brāhmaṇānām tu sāvitrī parikalpyate asmākam tu yaduśreṣṭha mahā vyāhati pūrtikā na ca api kiñcid smṛtikam spṛśet ca tat ca api na atra eva ca saṃspṛśet hi śvasanti an icchan tu parikṣipet tu sva abhīṣṭa sūryam tu namet sadā eva yathā yajñam hi mantreṇa veda proktena karmaṇā yathā agnihotram prathitam dvijānām tathā adhvahotram vihitam magānām pañca dhūpāḥ pradātavyāḥ siddhiḥ asya iha sarvadā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakotpattivarṇanam nāma catvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sāmbaḥ uvāca vrata bandhaḥ tu asau proktaḥ teṣām jātiḥ ca kā smṛtā vyāsaḥ uvāca te pṛṣṭāḥ bhavatā sarve bhojakānām kumārakāḥ kim ākhyātam tatas taiḥ tu tat eva ācakṣva kṛtsnaśas sāmbaḥ uvāca sanniveṣāḥ mayā proktāḥ bhojakānām samantataḥ tatas tu bhagavān prāha vākyam vākya viśāradaḥ ye tvayā uktā śrutāḥ sāmba bhojakānām kumārakāḥ mama eva ete magāḥ jñeyāḥ aṣṭau śūdrāḥ mad aṅga jāḥ dattāḥ bhoja kula utpannāḥ daśabhyaḥ daśa kanyakāḥ tatas tu mandakebhyaḥ api dattāḥ ca aṣṭau hi kanyakāḥ tatas niveśitam teṣām mayā sā amba puram smara dāsa kanyāḥ tu yāḥ ca aṣṭau bhoja kanyāḥ ca yāḥ daśa etāḥ teṣām kumārāṇām jñeyāḥ tāḥ daśa ca aṣṭa ca tatra te bhoja kanyāsu dvijaiḥ utpāditāḥ sutāḥ bhojakāḥ tān gaṇān prāhuḥ brāhmaṇān divya saṃjñitān dāsa kanyāsu ye jātāḥ mandagaiḥ antya saṃjñitaiḥ madaṅgāḥ nāma te jñeyāḥ savituḥ paricārakāḥ svadharmaiḥ yaṣṭum ārabdhaiḥ śākadvīpe arcitaḥ raviḥ avyaṅga dhāriṇaḥ martyāḥ pūjayante divaspatim dṛṣṭvā vyaṅgam tu vai teṣām kautūhala samanvitaḥ sa ambaḥ prāha namaskṛtya bhūyas satyavatī sutam kutas eṣa samutpannaḥ kasmāt ca sa śuciḥ smṛtaḥ bandhanīyaḥ kadā ca ayam kimartham ca eva dhāryate kim pramāṇam ca bhagavan vyaṅgaḥ ca ayam kim ucyate śrutvā evam vacanam vyāsaḥ jāmbavatyāḥ sutasya ca uvāca kuru śārdūla sa ambam kālī sutaḥ sa tu vyāsaḥ uvāca etat ca me yathā uktaḥ tvam jātiḥ eṣām na saṃśayaḥ avyaṅgasya api te vacmi lakṣaṇam gadataḥ śṛṇu iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakajātivarṇanam nāma ekacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvicatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vyāsaḥ uvāca devatāḥ ṛṣayaḥ nāgāḥ gandharva apsarasām gaṇāḥ yakṣa rakṣāṃsi vai bhānau nivasanti ṛtu kramāt sva sthānam ājagāma āśu namaskṛtya divākaram gāṅgeya bhūṣitam divyam na ati rakta sitam śubham nāga rāja aṅga sambhūtaḥ dhṛtaḥ yasmāt ca bhānunā nityam ca dhāraṇāt tasya bhavet prītaḥ divākaraḥ na dhārayanti ye tu evam bhojakāḥ pūjakāḥ raveḥ saura hīnāḥ na te yājyāḥ ucchiṣṭāḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ smṛti ācāre te hi bhagnāḥ ravim na arhanti pūjitum ittham jñātvā na sandehaḥ hi avyaṅgena vinā raviḥ nāga rājasya saṃspṛṣṭaḥ hi ārasuḥ tena saṃsmṛtaḥ pramāṇena aṅgulānām tu śatāt hi śatam uttaram utkṛṣṭaḥ ayam pramāṇena madhyamaḥ viṃśat uttaraḥ tad ākṛtiḥ kṛtaḥ ca eṣa nirmitaḥ viśvakarmaṇā madhyame bhojakānām tu paraḥ śataḥ udāhṛtaḥ tena asya dhāraṇāt vīra śuciḥ eva tadā bhavet haviḥ homa ādikāḥ sarvāḥ bhavanti asya kriyāḥ śubhāḥ avyaṅgaḥ patita aṅgaḥ ca avyaṅgaḥ atha mahīpate eṣa sāraḥ ca sā ramyā vai jñeyā jaya nāmabhiḥ arha iti pūjāyām dhātoḥ pratyayaḥ smṛtaḥ pūjitaḥ ca pavitraḥ ca yasmāt tena arhakaḥ smṛtaḥ sāra sārtaḥ smṛtam rūpam pradhānam sāraḥ ucyate bhaktau smṛtau dhātuḥ tasmāt sārasanaḥ smṛtaḥ sa jñeyaḥ patita aṅgaḥ tu nitya yajñaiḥ upāhṛtaḥ iti ete kathitāḥ vīra avyaṅgāḥ vyaṅga bhojakāḥ śaśāṅka mauliḥ antye tu saṃsthitaḥ yadu naṃdana pṛthvī mūlam āśritya sthitā ca yadu sattama mūla aśanāḥ tu apaḥ sā amba madhye devaḥ vibhāvasuḥ tāsām anantaram vātaḥ ākāśaḥ agre samāsthitaḥ svar lokaḥ ca agram āśritya sthitaḥ vyaṅgasya yāvatā evam deva mayaḥ sa aṃbaḥ evam loka mayaḥ tathā dhāraṇīyaḥ mahān bhaktyā pūjakaḥ prītaye raveḥ pūjā phalam na teṣām syāt narakam ca vrajanti hi tathā teṣām bhavet nityam avyaṅgaḥ bhojakaḥ sadā bandhane kāraṇam vīra bhūṣaṇāni ca suvrata iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmbopākhyāne vyaṅgotpattiḥ nāma dvicatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tricatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrutvā evam eva sāmbena vyāsāt satyavatī sutāt avyaṅgasya ca utpattim punar āgāt mahāmatiḥ athā gatya mahā tejāḥ sāmbaḥ gatvā āśramam punar nāradasya mahā bāhoḥ nāradam vākyam abravīt snānam ācamanam ca evam arghya dānam mahātmane sāmbasya vacanam śrutvā nāradaḥ muni sattamaḥ uvāca kuru śārdūla sāmbam jāmbavatī sutam snānam ācamanam ca eva svarṇa dānam tathā eva ca ācāntaḥ tris tatas snātvā vāsasī nirmale śubhe udak mukhaḥ prāc mukhaḥ vā api ācāmet ca prayatnataḥ apsu sūryaḥ tathā agniḥ ca mātā devī sarasvatī tasmāt uttīrya ca ācāmet na ācāmet tu jalāśaye upaviśya śucau deśe prayataḥ prāc udak mukhaḥ prasannāḥ tris pibet tvā apaḥ prayataḥ su samāhitaḥ sammārjanam tu dvis kuryāt tribhiḥ abhyukṣaṇam punar mūrdhānam khāni ca ātmānam upaspṛśya anu pūrvaśas ācāntaḥ arkam namaskṛtya śauceṣu śuci tām iyāt kriyām yaḥ kurute mohāt an ācamya iha nāstikaḥ bhavanti iha kriyāḥ sarvāḥ vṛthā tasya na saṃśayaḥ śuci kāmāḥ hi vai devāḥ vedaiḥ evam udāhṛtāḥ ina upāsā kṛtaḥ ca eva sarve devāḥ prayatnataḥ śaucam eva praśaṃsanti śauca aṅgaiḥ hi vidhīyate ācāntaḥ maunam āsthāya devāgāram tatas vrajet śvāsa rodha nimittam tu prāṇam ācchādya vāsasā śiraḥ prāvṛtya yatnena keśa udaka nivṛttaye tatas pūjām raveḥ kuryāt puṣpaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ śubhaiḥ gāyatrīm sa śiraskām ca yajamānaḥ prayatnataḥ puṣpa añjalim tatas gṛhya tad śikhāyām prayatnataḥ dhūpa velāḥ smṛtāḥ pañca dhūpeṣu eva tu pañcasu havana ādyāḥ kriyāḥ pañca rakṣiṣye aham tathā punar daṇḍanāyaka velā tu pratyūṣe ṛkṣa darśanāt na ājñā velā pradoṣaḥ tu tattva kāryam vijānatā tri kālam tu raveḥ pūjā kartavyā sūrya darśanāt tathā eva maṇḍale deyam nīcāhne jvalanāya ca padmāni karavīrāṇi tathā rakta utpalāni ca kusuma udaka miśrāṇi kuruṃṭa kusumam tathā gandha ādīni ca divyāni kṛtvā vai tāmra bhājane arghya pātram tadā gṛhya kuryāt āvāhanam raveḥ ehi sūrya sahasrāṃśo tejorāśe jagatpate anukampya mām deva gṛhāṇa arghyam divākara anena āvāhanam kṛtvā jānubhyām avanīm gataḥ om namaḥ bhagavate ādityāya viśvāya kha īśāya brahmaṇe loka kartṛṇe īśānāya purāṇāya sahasrākṣāya te namaḥ om bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar om mahaḥ om janaḥ om tapaḥ om satyam brahmaṇe muṇḍe madhye puratas ādityāya namaḥ nāradaḥ uvāca sāvitryāḥ ca pare tantre trailokya trāṇa kāriṇe paritas parigṛhya atha dhūpa bhājanam utkṣipet tvam ekaḥ eva rudrāṇām vasūnām ca purātanaḥ devānām gīrbhiḥ abhitas saṃstutaḥ śāśvataḥ divi pūrvāhṇe ca tvayā tena madhyāhne ca apareṇa tu om namaḥ bhagavate jñāna ātmane tvām ca viṣṇoḥ tat paramam padam sadā paśyaṃti sūrayaḥ divākaraḥ tu sāyāhne mantreṇa arghyam nivedayet namaḥ varuṇāya śambhave om ākṛṣṇena rajasā vartamānaḥ niveśayan amṛtam martyam ca anena vidhinā dattvā dhūpam sūryāya bhojakaḥ mantreṇa mihirāya iti nikṣubhāya iti nityaśas tatas rājñai namaḥ ca iti nikṣubhāyai tatas namaḥ daṇḍanāyaka saṃjñāya piṅgalāya ca vai namaḥ tathā rājñāya srauṣāya tathā īśāya garutmate maheśvarāya dadyāt tu tathā vyomāya yādava om brahmaṇe muṇḍa pataye ādityāya puruṣa īśvarāya sūryāya namaḥ namaḥ om aneka kāntaye natvā śeṣāya vāsuki takṣaka karkoṭakāya padma śaṅkha kulikebhyaḥ nāga rājebhyaḥ namaḥ tala sutala pātāla atala vitala rasātala ādi vāsibhyaḥ daityā dānava piśācebhyaḥ namaḥ tatas pradakṣiṇam kuryāt mātṛkābhyaḥ namaḥ namaḥ om grahebhyaḥ namaḥ om daṇḍanāyakāya namaḥ om mārtaṃḍāya namaḥ om vināyakāya namaḥ evam uddiśya nāmāni dhūpam dattvā varānana sūryaguptaiḥ abhiṣṭūya evam vijñāya te tatas arcitaḥ tvam yathā śaktyā mayā bhaktyā vibhāvaso aihika āmuṣmikīm nātha kārya siddhim vadasva me evam triṣavaṇam snātvā yaḥ arcayet praṇataḥ ravim sa putravān arogī ca mṛtaḥ saṃlīyate ravau puṣpam śreṣṭham yadā na syāt patrāṇi samupāharet sarvam na syāt yadā ca eva praṇipātena pūjayet aśaktaḥ praṇipātasya manasā pūjayet ravim asambhave tu dravyāṇām vidhiḥ eṣa prakīrtitaḥ uccāraṇāt ca vai teṣām dhūpa prītaḥ bhavet raviḥ śiraḥ nāsā mukham ca eva bhṛśam āvṛtya yatnataḥ pūjayet bhāskaram vīra śithilam tu na kārayet tasmāt yuktam sadā kāryam pūjyate ca divākaraḥ dhūpena pūjyamānam tu narāḥ paśyanti yādava yānti te paramam sthānam yat na paśyanti sūrayaḥ kriyamāṇam tathā arkam ca bhaktyā paśyanti ye narāḥ sarvān kāmān iha prāpya te yānti paramam padam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne dhūpādivividhavarṇanam nāma tricatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catuścatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ athā ājagāma bhagavān vyāsaḥ dvāravatīm purīm draṣṭum nārāyaṇam devam śaṅkha cakra gadā dharam tam āgatam ṛṣim dṛṣṭvā vāsudevaḥ viśām pate abhyutthāya mahā tejāḥ pūjayāmāsa bhārata śākadvīpam itas gatvā jñāninaḥ mokṣa gāminaḥ tān dṛṣṭvā rūpataḥ vipra praveśāt karmataḥ tathā katham ete kṣaṇam api tiṣṭhante pṛthivī tale yeṣām raviḥ sadā pūjyaḥ teṣām muktiḥ sadā vaset na a gatvā bhojaka tvam hi mokṣam āpnoti kaścana vyāsaḥ uvāca dhanyāḥ ete mahātmānaḥ bhojakāḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ jñāninaḥ karma niṣṭhāḥ ca sadā mokṣa gatim gatāḥ annena oṣadhibhiḥ ca eva ājya homaiḥ ca kṛtsnaśas homam ca śāśvatam kṛtvā param homam tatas śritāḥ para homasya karaṇāt pūta ātmānaḥ hi akalmaṣāḥ viśanti paramām divyām bhāskarīm taijasīm kalām karmaṇaḥ sādhane ca ekā tatra ca agnau pratiṣṭhitā vāyu mārga sthitā vyomni dvitīya antar prakāśikā tatas param tṛtīyā tu tat smṛtam sūrya maṇḍale kṣarākṣaraḥ tu vijñeyaḥ mahā sūryaḥ tathā eva ca sa tattvaḥ sakalaḥ proktaḥ tattva hīnaḥ tu niṣkalaḥ tṛṇa gulma latā vṛkṣa vṛka siṃha dvija adhipān sura siddha manuṣyān ca sthala jān jalajān haret yadā kalpa ātmakaḥ ca eva dvitīyām tanum āśritaḥ niṣkalaḥ tu sadā jñeyaḥ saṃsthitaḥ taijasīm kalām dvitīyā yā tanuḥ tasya akṣaram tatparam padam deva yānam tu panthānam karma yogena saṃsthitā āditya siddha antaritāḥ sāṅkhya yoga vidaḥ ca ye akāram tattvataḥ ca api dhyāyante puruṣottama tri akṣaram ca tam oṃkāram sārdha mātrā traye sthitam vadanti ca ardha mātra stham makāram vyañjana ātmakam dhyāyanti ye makārīyam jñānam te hi sat ātmakam makāraḥ bhagavān devaḥ bhāskaraḥ parikīrtitaḥ makāra dhyāna yogāt ca magāḥ hi ete prakīrtitāḥ bhojayanti sahasrāṃśum tena te bhojakāḥ smṛtāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakasyotpattivarṇanam nāma catuścatvāriṃśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhojaka jñāna varṇanam vāsudevaḥ uvāca jñāna upalabdhim vipra indra bhojakānām mahā mune brūhi tattvam dvijaśreṣṭha kautukam paramam mama vyāsaḥ uvāca asthi sthūlam snāyu yutam māṃsa śoṇita lepanam carma avanaddham durgaṃdhi pūrṇam mūtra purīṣayoḥ jarā śoka samāviṣṭam roga āyatanam āturam kapālam vṛkṣa mūlāni kucailam asahāya tā sama tā sarva bhūteṣu evam muktasya lakṣaṇam tile tailam gavi kṣīram kāṣṭhe pāvaka santatiḥ upāyam cintayet asya dhiyā dhīraḥ samāhitaḥ buddhīndriyāṇi saṃyamya śakunān iva pañjare prāṇāyāmaiḥ dahet doṣān dhāraṇābhiḥ ca kilbiṣam pratyāhāreṇa saṃsargān dhyānena anīśvarān guṇān dhyāyamānasya dahyante ca ante doṣāḥ yathā agninā tathā indriya kṛtāḥ doṣāḥ dahyante prāṇanigrahāt cittam cittena saṃśodhya bhāvam bhāvena śodhayet cittasya ati prasādena bhāti karma śubha aśubham parvāhṇe lohitam rūpam prathamam ṛc mamayam smṛtam yajuḥ mayam dvitīyam tu śvetam mādhyāhnikam smṛtam kṛṣṇam tṛtīyam sāyāhne sāmnaḥ rūpam tu tat kṛtam prathamam rājasam deva dvitīyam sāttvikam smṛtam tṛtīyam tāmasam rūpam traiguṇyam tasya kalpitam trayāṇām vyatirekeṇa caturtham sūrya maṇḍalam oṃkāra praṇavaiḥ yuktāḥ dhyāna nirbhūta kalmaṣāḥ sthitāḥ padmāsane vīrāḥ na abhisaṃnyasta pāṇayaḥ suṣumnā nāḍikā mārgam kumbha recaka pūrakaiḥ padāṅguṣṭha anvitaḥ svinnam ūrdhvam utkṣepayet kramāt nābhi deśe tu tam dṛṣṭvā devam agnim anāmayam somam ca hadaye dṛṣṭvā mūrdhni vā agni śikhām tatas vāta raśmibhiḥ āsādya tam bhittvā maṇḍalam param deva arcanam mahā bāho kīrtitaḥ keśisūdana prathamam hadayam sthānam dvitīyam ca agnim āśritam tṛtīyam nābhi saṃstham ca caturtham sūrya maṇḍalam sthānam param vai paramātma saṃstham bhānoḥ sureśasya vadanti tad jñāḥ jñeyaḥ sa mokṣaḥ ca nṛṇām saḥ eva saṃsāra vicchitti karam padam tatas idam magānām caritam mayā te prakhyāpitam yāna vareṇa yuktam jñātvā tu imam mokṣa vidaḥ vadanti siddhāḥ ca tat sthānam avāpnuvanti yat mayā uktam idam jñānam deyam śraddhāvatām nṛṇām nāstikānām abuddhīnām na deyam bhūtim icchatā nārāyaṇam mahā bāho jagāma āyatanam hareḥ khyātaḥ yaḥ triṣu lokeṣu gaṃgayā paritoṣitaḥ badaryā maṇḍitaḥ vīra nara nārāyaṇa āśramaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe bhojaka jñāna varṇanam nāma pañcacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṭcatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca ye ete bhojakāḥ proktāḥ devadevasya pūjakāḥ na anyam bhojyam atha eteṣām brāhmaṇaiḥ ca kadācana bhāskarasya priyāḥ hi ete pūjya tvam ca tathā gatāḥ divyāḥ ca ete smṛtāḥ viprāḥ āditya ambhaḥ samudbhavāḥ kim kurvāṇāḥ tathā karma bhojya tām yānti me vada imam artham purā pṛṣṭaḥ vāsudevaḥ mahīpate kṛtavarmaṇā purā rājan tathā sāmbaḥ mahā balaḥ gatau sāmba purīm vīra tathā nārada parvatau āditya karmaṇaḥ loke deva anna khyātim āgatāḥ āgatāḥ te purīm vīra puṇyām dvāravatīm vibhoḥ tau ṛṣī divam āruḍhau rājan nārada parvatau vāsudevam mahā tejāḥ hārdikyaḥ vākyam abravīt tau ṛṣī divyam ākhyātau yau tau nārada parvatau abhojyāḥ kila ete vai brāhmaṇānām janārdana vāsudevaḥ uvāca na te bhojyāḥ mahā bāho bhojyāḥ bhojāḥ ca sarvadā tat śrūyatām yaduśreṣṭha yat kāryam ca api taiḥ vibho yatamānaiḥ mahā bāho tat iha ekamanāḥ śṛṇu vṛṣalī yasya vai bhāryā yaḥ ca a vyaṅgam na dhārayet abhojyaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ bhojakaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ ādityam yadu śārdūla tathā ca vidhinā vibho jātakarma ādayaḥ yasya na saṃskārāḥ kṛtāḥ vibho āruṇeyaiḥ ca mantraiḥ ca sāvitrīm na ca vai paṭhet pitṛ deva manuṣyāṇām bhūtānām bhāskarasya tu a kṛtvā vidhivat pūjām yaḥ tu bhuṅkte sa dharma hā abhyaṅgena vihīnaḥ yaḥ śaṃkha hīnaḥ tathā eva ca śirasā dhārayet keśān sa jñeyaḥ bhojaka adhamaḥ deva arcanam tathā homam snānam tarpaṇam eva ca dānam brāhmaṇa pūjām ca kurvataḥ bhojakasya tu abhyaṅgaḥ yadu śārdūla pavitraḥ paramaḥ smṛtaḥ bhojakānām yadu śreṣṭha tasya mūle sthitaḥ hariḥ madhye brahmā mahā tejāḥ agre go śruti bhūṣaṇaḥ ṛgvedaḥ yasya mūla sthaḥ madhye sāmāni kṛtsnaśas yajurvedaḥ tathā śreṣṭhaḥ ca atharva sahitaḥ sthitaḥ trayaḥ agnayaḥ tathā rājan trayaḥ lokāḥ sthitāḥ kramāt abhojyaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ saḥ aśuciḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ ye prayacchanti śūdrāṇām vikrīṇanti ca bhojakāḥ te adhamāḥ bhojakāḥ jñeyāḥ ye ca deva sva hāriṇaḥ na te deva priyāḥ tāta vijñeyāḥ bhojaka adhamāḥ brāhmaṇānām puroḍāśaḥ yathā kāya viśodhanaḥ bhojakānām tathā vīra naivedyam kāya śodhanam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne bhojaka varṇanam nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vāsudevaḥ uvāca atra pṛṣṭaḥ yathā devaḥ bhāskaraḥ deva pūjitaḥ aruṇena mahā bāho ke priyāḥ bhojakāḥ tathā pūjāyām tava ke yogyāḥ ke na yogyāḥ bhavanti ca iti pṛṣṭaḥ sa bhagavān aruṇena divākaraḥ yat uvāca mahā bāho tat iha ekamanāḥ śṛṇu bhāskaraḥ uvāca para dārān para dravyam ye na hiṃsanti bhojakāḥ vāṇijyam kṛṣi sevām tu vedānām nindanam ca ye kurvanti bhojakāḥ jñeyāḥ sarve te mama vairiṇaḥ yeṣām bhāryā saṅgrahaṇam karṣaṇam ye prakurvate nṛpa sevām khaga śreṣṭha vijñeyāḥ patitāḥ tu te bhuñjate ye ca śūdra annam jñeyāḥ te śatravaḥ mama pūjā kṛtā tu yā taiḥ tu tathā arghyam ca khaga uttama pūjām tām atha ca api arghyam na aham gṛhṇāmi khecara ye ete kathitāḥ vīra ye ca śaṅkha vivarjitāḥ nirmālyam ye madīyam tu naivedyam kuṅkumam tathā yajante ye ca sāvitrīm mahāśvetām ca gopateḥ ye na jānanti me mudrām kiṅkarāṇām ca nāmataḥ na ete pūjayitum śaktāḥ ye priyāḥ mama bhojakāḥ tān śṛṇuṣva khaga śreṣṭha bhūtvā ca ekāgra mānasaḥ deva dvija manuṣyāṇām pitṛrṇām ca api pūjakāḥ te priyāḥ mama vai nityam śaktāḥ pūjayitum ravim yeṣām muṇḍam śiraḥ nityam ye ca abhyaṅga samanvitāḥ vādayanti ca ye śaṅkham divyāḥ te bhojakāḥ matāḥ tri kālam ye ca mām nityam su snātāḥ krodha varjitāḥ pūjayanti khaga śreṣṭha te priyāḥ mama bhojakāḥ vāre madīye naktam tu ṣaṣṭhyām ye ca prakurvate saptamyām upavāsam tu tathā saṅkramaṇe mama divyāḥ te brāhmaṇāḥ jñeyāḥ bhojakāḥ mama pūjakāḥ pūjayanti ca ye viprān mad bhaktāḥ mad parāyaṇāḥ te priyāḥ satatam mahyam bhojakāḥ garuḍāgraja na te pūjyāḥ na vandyāḥ ca ye dviṣanti ca mām sadā ye kurvanti mahā yajñān bhojakāḥ garuḍāgraja pitṛ deva manuṣyāṇām pūjā artham santatam khaga priyāḥ te satatam vīra bhojakānām tathā uttamāḥ mama vāre ca ye vīra tathā ṣaṣṭhyām ca keśava na rātrau bhuñjate prājñāḥ mad priyāḥ te magāḥ khaga ittham bhūtāḥ bhojakāḥ yā māgha māse ca saptamī puṣpāṇām karavīrāṇi tathā raktam ca candanam vācakaḥ brāhmaṇānām tu naivedyam modakāḥ tathā ghṛta āhutyaḥ guggulaḥ ca kṣīreṇa snapanam tathā vādyānām śaṅkha śabdaḥ ca nṛtyam nāṭyam matam mama pañca varṇā patākā astu śvetam chatram ca me priyam na anya varṇaiḥ kṛtā pūjā tathā prīṇāti mām khaga yathā kṛtā bhojakena pūjā prīṇāti mām sadā vāsudevaḥ uvāca iti uktvā bhagavān devaḥ cāruṇāya purā anagha lakṣaṇam bhojakānām tu tatas merum atha akramat evam bhojyāḥ bhojakāḥ tu na ca abhojyāḥ kadācana anuṣṭhāna vihīnāḥ ye na te bhojyāḥ tu bhojakāḥ bhaumāḥ tu brāhmaṇāḥ ye tu anuṣṭhāna vivarjitāḥ na asti pūjyatamam kiñcid māṅgalyam pāvanam tathā caturṇām iha varṇānām muktvā bhojakam uttamam tasya bhuṅkte svayam bhānuḥ brahmā viṣṇuḥ tathā śivaḥ tathā iha sarva bhūtānām bhojakaḥ pūjyaḥ ucyate tīrthānām tu kurukṣetram sarasām sāgaraḥ yathā tathā pūjyatamaḥ jñeyaḥ pūjyānām bhojakaḥ vibho viśeṣeṇa ca saurāṇām bhojakaḥ pūjyaḥ ucyate bhartā pūjyaḥ yayā strīṇām śiṣyāṇām ca yathā guruḥ bhojakaḥ tu tathā pūjyaḥ saurāṇām hṛdika ātmaja evam pūjyāḥ tathā bhojyāḥ bhojakāḥ hṛdika ātmaja atha kim bahunā uktena śrūyatām vacanam mama na asti vedāt param śāstram na asti gaṅgā samā sarit na asti bhānu samaḥ devaḥ na asti mātṛ samā gatiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne bhojakalakṣaṇavarṇanam nāma saptacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ adha sāmbaḥ mahā tejāḥ dṛṣṭvā cakram pituḥ kare jvālā mālā karālam tu mahatā tejasā anvitam etat ākhyāhi me sarvam śrotu kāmasya kautukāt vāsudevaḥ uvāca sādhu sādhu mahā bāho sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi aham tvayā śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ putra cakrasya vidhi nirṇayam divyam varṣa sahasram tu bhānum ārādhya śraddhayā prāptam cakram mayā tasmāt bhāskarāt loka pūjitāt nabhaḥ gaḥ pañcaka ārūḍhaḥ sthitaḥ sākṣāt divākaraḥ grahāḥ soma ādayaḥ yasya saṃsthitāḥ nābhi maṇḍale ādityāḥ dvādaśa samāḥ areṣu kramaśas tathā proktam pathiṣu tattvāni pṛthivī ādīni yāni vai etaiḥ tattvaiḥ parivyāptam cakram kāla ātmakam param saṃkṣepāt te mayā ākhyātam dattam cakram iva aparam sāmbaḥ uvāca idam tāvat mama ācakṣva jñātum icchāmi tattvataḥ vāsudevaḥ uvāca kamalam hi ṛtubhiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ ṣaṣ dalam ca akṣaya āśritam puruṣa dhiṣṭhitam tat hi tatra sa aṅgaḥ raviḥ sthitaḥ māsāḥ arāḥ mahā bāho pakṣāḥ ca pradhayaḥ smṛtāḥ pathinā abhiṣu yoge ca yoga ākhyāḥ tapana ādibhiḥ nakṣatrāṇi grahāḥ ca eva sadā ca atra sthitāḥ smṛtāḥ etaiḥ vyāptam idam cakram sthūla sūkṣma prabhedataḥ atra uddiṣṭeṣu kāleṣu ye na uddiṣṭāḥ mayā tava yat te kāla ātmakam cakram idam saṃkṣepataḥ mayā kathitam tat viniṣkrāntam pradīptāt sūrya maṇḍalāt asurāṇām vadhāya idam mayā labdham divākarāt ārādhya tapasā sūryam purā kalpe jagadgurum atas sampūjyayāmi enam grahaiḥ tattvaiḥ vṛtam sadā tejasā ravi saṃkāśaḥ puṣpottara puram vrajet tasmāt tam mad kula ānandam mitram sampūjayāmi aham piṣṭa gandha ādibhiḥ vā api rakta varṇaka miśrakaiḥ phalaiḥ pakvaiḥ oṣadhibhiḥ tathā dūrvā aṅkuraiḥ kuśaiḥ dhūpaiḥ ca vividhaiḥ gandhaiḥ tathā vastraiḥ ca bhūṣaṇaiḥ vitāna śobhā sikataiḥ palāśaiḥ upaśobhitaiḥ chatra cāmara ghaṇṭābhiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ darpaṇa ādibhiḥ nṛtya vāditra gītaiḥ ca vedaiḥ puṇya kathā svanaiḥ sarvatra jaya ghoṣaiḥ ca sampūrṇe pūjayanti ye sampūrṇān vividhān kāmān nirvighnān prāpnuvanti te bhavanti niyatāḥ sāmba tasya sa anugrahāḥ grahāḥ arkasya sarva yajñānām śreṣṭham siddhi pradaḥ bhṛśam puṇyaḥ dharmaḥ tathā puṣṭyaḥ śatrughnaḥ ca viśeṣataḥ śvetaḥ pītaḥ ca kṛṣṇaḥ ca api vibhāgaśaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne kālacakra varṇanam nāma aṣṭacatvāriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonapañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sāmbaḥ uvāca kim pramāṇam likhet cakram tatra padmam ca kim bhavet nemi pradhi āra nābhīnām vibhāgaḥ kriyate katham vāsudevaḥ uvāca catuḥṣaṣṭi aṅgulam cakram kṛtvā vṛttam pramāṇataḥ aṣṭa aṅgulā bhavet nemiḥ sā iyam vibhavataḥ sadā ara kṣetram ca padmasya kaṇikā kesarāṇi ca patra sandhiḥ ca pāda aṅgam kramāt tatra api bhidyate unnatam kamalam tat tu kuryāt nābhyām na saṃśayaḥ ākīrṇāḥ saṃvibhaktāḥ ca kartavyāḥ pradhayaḥ kramāt aṅgula sthūla mūlam syāt ara agram triguṇam tatas bhūmiḥ pītā bahis jñeyā karṇikā kesarāṇi ca śeṣam raktam samuddiṣṭam saṃhatāḥ patra sandhayaḥ nābhi nemi antare lekhāḥ sitāḥ ca aṅgula mānataḥ aparāhṇe atha pūrvāhṇe varuṇam āvāhayet sadā cakram evam samuddiṣṭam yajana artham mayā tava yajñena anena sambaddhaḥ dīkṣitaḥ ca arka maṇḍale ittham me bhānunā pūrvam idam uktam varānana sāmbaḥ uvāca ke mantrāḥ cakrayajñe asmin devatānām prakīrtitāḥ yajña kramaḥ ca kaḥ proktaḥ rūpam kim ca pṛthak pṛthak vāsudevaḥ uvāca karṇikāyām daleṣu evam aṅgāni hṛdaya ādi ca nāma mantrāḥ caturthī aṃtāḥ teṣām pūrva ukta koṭayaḥ namaskāraḥ ca sarvatra eṣaḥ eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ svāhā antāḥ homa kāle ca karmasu anyeṣu te punar yathā karma avasānāḥ ca prayoktavyāḥ samāsatas om khaṣolkāya vidmahe divākarāya dhīmahi tat naḥ sūryaḥ pracodayāt sāvitrī ca mahā bāho caturviṃśa akṣarā matā evam mantrāḥ prayoktavyāḥ sarva karmasu ataṃdritaiḥ tasmāt sarva prayatnena mantrān jñātvā vidhim tathā sāmbaḥ uvāca āditya maṇḍale dīkṣā kasya kāryā katham ca sā vāsudevaḥ uvāca brāhmaṇam kṣatriyam vaiśyam kulīnam śūdram eva ca puruṣam vā striyam vā api dīkṣayet sūrya maṇḍale guruḥ tam dīkṣayet vipraḥ kalpa jñaḥ satya vāc śuciḥ ṣaṣṭhyām agnim samādhāya pūrva ukta vidhinā kramāt sampūjya arkam tathā vahnau hutvā vai haviṣā ravim śiṣyam snātam atha ācāntam khasa ulkā ākṛti vigraham sva aṅgaiḥ ālabhya ca aṅgeṣu darbhavadbhiḥ tathā akṣataiḥ puṣpaiḥ sampūjya ca aṅgāni deyaḥ kāryaḥ baliḥ tathā bhavet ghṛta guḍa kṣīraiḥ tandulaiḥ ca pramāṇataḥ dattvā śiṣṭāya muktvā evam dattvā ante dantadhāvanam kṣīram vṛkṣa udbhavam tasmai dvādaśa aṅgula sannibham danta śliṣṭe apanīte ca tena prācyām kṣipet tatas maitrāvāruṇam īśānam vakram saumya samāśritam yām diśam dantakāṣṭhasya mukham paśyati tad patim arcayet tena śāṃtiḥ syāt iti uktam bhānunā svayam sthāpayeta svayam ca api varam śrutvā samāhitaḥ ācamya kṛta rakṣaḥ tu kṛta dravya adhivāsanaḥ hadayena namet prātar snātvā hutvā hutāśanam svapnam pṛcchet yathā dṛṣṭam śubham saṃvādayet ca tam hadayena aśubhe dṛṣṭe śata homam samācaret svapne paśyati harmyāṇi devatānām hutāśanam nadī yānāni ramyāṇi udyāna upavanāni ca patra puṣpa phala āḍhyāni kamalāni ca rājatam rājānam śaurya sampannam dhana āḍhyam kṣatriya uttamam śuśrūṣaṇa param śūdram yadi tattva artham ādiśet praśastam bhāṣaṇam ca eva yathā sambhavataḥ matam etaiḥ sparśanam eteṣām śreṣṭham ārohaṇam tatas vāhanāni praśastāni prāsādam nāvam eva ca parvatam ca samāruhya vipulām bhārgavīm bhajet pītvā surām samudram ca dadhi ājyam kṣīram eva ca somam māṃsam haviḥ bhuktvā kāśyapīm labhate naraḥ labdhvā vastrāṇi ratnāni vividha ābharaṇāni ca vāhanāni mahīm gāḥ ca dhānya upakaraṇāni ca samṛddhim āpnuyāt kiñcid svapnānām darśanam śubham tasmāt anyat aniṣṭam syāt tasmāt yuktā pratikriyā tarpayitvā dvijān śiṣṭān ānamya pūrvavat gurum sṛṣṭi krameṇa bhṛti artham mukti artham na anyathā bhavet viśuddheṣu viśuddham tam dhyātvā ca āditya vat kramāt niyojayet pṛthivyāḥ ca tatas prabhṛti sarvaśas āditya maṇḍalam śuddham sarva muktam niyojayet evam tu manasā dhyātvā juhuyāt ca eva tam śatam sarvaiḥ mantraiḥ kramāt evam dīkṣā proktā vara aparā kṛtvā eva puṣpapātam tu tasmin āditya maṇḍale baddhvā āsyam añjalau puṣpam kṛtvā dattvā ca mantritam kṣipet vai kula śuddhi artham nāma artham ca viśeṣataḥ sampūjya śrāvayet tatra samayān arka bhāṣitān prātar sāyam madhyāhne raveḥ abhimukhaḥ sthitaḥ upasthānam sadā kuryāt arcanam ca sadā naraḥ a dṛṣṭvā arkam na bhoktavyam divā rātrau hutāśanam dṛṣṭvā bhoktavyam arka ākhyam na bhoktavyam kadācana na laṅghyā pratimā chāyā na laṅghyāḥ tithayaḥ kvacid nakṣatrāṇi grahāḥ yogāḥ māsāḥ māsa adhipāḥ ca ye kālaḥ saṃvatsaraḥ ca api yaḥ kaścid kālaḥ ucyate tasmāt kāla adhipaḥ sūryaḥ svayam kālaḥ ca paṭhyate cetana acetanasya api sarva ātmā yaḥ prakīrtitaḥ stutyaḥ vandyaḥ sadā pūjyaḥ tvayā ayam sarvathā nṛpa manasā karmaṇā vācā deva nindām parityajet iti eṣā paramā dīkṣā tava saṃkṣepataḥ mayā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sāmba upākhyāne sūrya dīkṣā varṇanam nāma ekonapañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ āditya pūjā vidhi varṇanam vāsudevaḥ uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi yathā pūjyaḥ divākaraḥ sthaṇḍile yadu śārdūla nibodha ekāgra mānasaḥ maṇḍalaiḥ aṣṭabhiḥ kāryam cakram kāla ātmakam śubham pūjanīyaḥ sadā madhye sahasrakiraṇa āyudhaḥ aruṇam pūjayet prājñaḥ sadā deva agrajam śubham dakṣiṇe pūjayet devīm nikṣubhām bhāskarasya tu revatam dakṣiṇe pārśve uttare piṅgalam sadā saṃjñām ca yadu śārdūla śreyase satatam budhaḥ āgneyyām lekhakam vīra nairṛtyām aśvinau tathā vāyavyām pūjayet devam manum vaivasvatam vibhum aiśānyām pūjayet devīm yamunām loka pāvanīm dvitīya āvaraṇe vīra pūrvatas pūjayet viyat dakṣiṇe ca tatas devīm paścime garuḍam tathā uttare nāga rājānam putram airāvatam śubham āgneyyām pūjayet helim prahelim nairṛte tathā vāyavyām urvaśīm devīm īśāne vinatām tathā tṛtīya āvaraṇe pūrve pūjayet gurum ādarāt paścime tu arkaputram tu uttare dhiṣaṇam tathā aiśāne śaśiputram tu somam āgneya maṇḍale pūjayet dakṣiṇe koṇe nairṛte rāhum ādarāt vāyavye vikacam vīra pūjayet satatam budhaḥ caturtha āvaraṇe devam pūjayet lekham ādarāt āgneye śāṇḍilīputram dakṣiṇe dakṣiṇa adhipam virūpākṣam nairṛte devam jaleśam paścime tathā vāyuputram ca vāyavyām satatam pūjayet naraḥ īśāne devam īśānam pūjayet satatam budhaḥ uttare yakṣarājānām kuberam pūjayet budhaḥ pañcame pūjayet vīra sadā sva āvaraṇe dvijāḥ pūrvatas paramām devīm mahāśvetām mahāmatiḥ śriyam ṛddhim vibhūtim ca dhṛtim ca eva unnatim tathā pṛthivīm yadu śārdūla mahā kīrtim tathā eva ca indram viṣṇum ca aryamaṇam bhagam parjanyam eva ca vivasvantam tathā arkam ca tvaṣṭāram kiraṇa ujjvalam pūjayet varuṇam ṣaṣṭhe ca evam etān divākarān aruṇam sa ratham vīra saptame pūjayet budhaḥ tathā aśva anya duśārdūla sadā ca āvaraṇe budhaḥ yakṣa rakṣāṃsi gandharvān māsān pakṣān ahāni tu saṃvatsaram tathā putra hi etān saṃpūjayet purā yaḥ evam pūjayet devam bhāskaram satatam naraḥ mūlamantra akṣarāṇi iha ca aṅgāni paricakṣate iti uktvā bhagavān devaḥ jagāma āśu gṛham raviḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sāmbopākhyāne ādityapūjāvidhivarṇanam nāma pañcāśadadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekapañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca atha rājā mahā tejāḥ śatānīkaḥ dvijottamam praṇamya śirasā bhaktyā sumantum vākyam abravīt aho devasya māhātmyam bhāskarasya amita ojasaḥ kīrtitam bhavatā mahyam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam tasmāt na arka samam devam loke paśyāmi suvrata śrutvā evam deva māhātmyam bhāskarasya amita ojasaḥ kīrtitam bhavatā mahyam aśvamedha śatāt varam divākara prasādāt vai su prasannāt vṛṣadhvajāt śrutāḥ me bahavaḥ dharmāḥ śruti smṛti uditāḥ tathā vaiṣṇavāḥ śaiva dharmāḥ ca tathā paurāṇikāḥ śrutāḥ śṛṇvataḥ nā asti me tṛptiḥ amṛtasya evam eva ca aśvamedha ādayaḥ yajñāḥ bahu sambhāra vistarāḥ hitāya sarva martyānām sarva pāpa bhaya apaham saura dharma param puṇyam pavitram pāpa nāśanam śrutvā tu vacanam rājñaḥ vyāsa śiṣyaḥ mahā muniḥ praṇamya śirasā vyāsam idam vacanam abravīt śrūyatām abhidhāsyāmi sukha upāyam mahā phalam raviṇā kathitam pūrvam aruṇasya viśām pate kṛṣṇasya brahmaṇaḥ vīra śaṅkarasya na vidyate saṃsāra arṇava magnānām sarveṣām prāṇinām ayam saura dharmatamaḥ śrīmān hitāya jagatā uditaḥ yaiḥ ayam śānta hṛdayaiḥ sūrya bhaktaiḥ bhaga arthibhiḥ eka kālam dvi kālam vā tri kālam nityam eva ca stuvanti ye sadā bhānum na te prakṛti mānuṣāḥ svarga lokāt paribhraṣṭāḥ te jñeyāḥ bhāskarāḥ bhuvi na anarkaḥ kīrtayet arkam na anarkaḥ arkam avāpnuyāt ṣoḍaśa aṅgā ca sā proktā raviṇā iha divaukasām prātar snānam japaḥ homaḥ tathā deva arcanam nṛpa dvijānām pūjanam bhaktyā pūjā go śvatthayoḥ tathā itihāsa purāṇebhyaḥ bhakti śraddhā puraskṛtam śravaṇam rāja śārdūla veda abhyāsaḥ tathā eva ca mad bhaktyā jana vātsalyam pūjāyām ca anumodanam pustakasya sadā śreṣṭha mama atīva priyam surāḥ mad kathā śravaṇam nityam svara netra aṅga vikriyā mama anusmaraṇam nityam bhaktyā śraddhā puraskṛtam ṣoḍaśa aḍgā bhaktiḥ iyam yasmin mlecche api vartate vipra indraḥ sa muniḥ śrīmān sajātyaḥ sa ca paṇḍitaḥ tasya aham na praṇaśyāmi sa ca me na praṇaśyati aṣṭādaśa ardha kakṣāyāḥ param ca aṣṭabhiḥ udbhavaiḥ rodhayitvā mahā bāho tathā jñānatareṇa tu durga pālam vijitya āśu bhāskara ardham tu durjayam jitvā ca pura rājānām mahā tejam anaupamam manasā acalayā bhaktyā yaḥ mām dhyāyati mānavaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe saura dharma varṇanam nāma ekapañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvipañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūra dharmeṣu praśna varṇanam sūrāya durlabham dānam sūra homaḥ ca durlabhaḥ tau karau ślāghya tām prāptau yau pūjām cakratuḥ raveḥ sā eva ekā rasanā dhanyā stotram yā kurute raveḥ tat manaḥ puṇya tām prāptam yat hitvā viṣayam nṛpa niścalā ca raveḥ līlā nirbhīkā krodha varjitā śatānīkaḥ uvāca tvad prasādāt dvijaśreṣṭha kautūhalam atīva me yat puṇyam sthāpite sūrye kṛte sūrya ālaye ca yat sthāne kṛte ca yat puṇyam tathā nīrājane kṛte nīlauṣadhi pravāpena nṛtya maṅgala vāditaiḥ sumānām maṇḍape yat ca puṣpa mālā avalambanāt pūjā bhakti viśeṣaiḥ ca gṛha mālā avalambane puṣpa dāna viśeṣeṇa dhūpa dīpaiḥ ca yat phalam vastra alaṅkāra dāne tu puṇya śravaṇa kīrtane magānām mad prasādena abhivādana pūjane iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi sūradharmeṣu praśnavarṇanam nāma dvipañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tripañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumatiḥ ca raveḥ bhaktaḥ pāṇḍaveya mahāmate atas te nikhilam vacmi śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ nṛpa kalpa ādau sṛjataḥ vīra brahmaṇaḥ vividhāḥ prajāḥ ahaṃkāraḥ mahān āsīt na asti loke mad uttamaḥ ciṃtayantaḥ atha te devāḥ keśavaḥ ca narādhipa vivādaḥ tu mahān āsīt kañja ambu nagaukasām aham kartā vikartā aham pālakaḥ aham jagat prabhuḥ iti āha bhagavān brahmā kṛṣṇa bhīmau samarcitau tathā etya śaṃkaraḥ kruddhaḥ kaḥ śaktaḥ mad ṛte bhuvi saṃhartum jagat etat hi sraṣṭum pālayitum tathā na vā śaktaḥ jagat sraṣṭum saṃhartum rakṣitum tathā evam teṣām pravadatām kruddhānām ca parasparam samāviśat tadā ajñānam tamaḥ moha ātmakam vibho atyartham moham āpannāḥ na jānanti iha kiñcana a paśyantaḥ mithas te tu niṣaṇṇāḥ kṣmā tale vibho āramanti hi ye ca anye te divākaram āsthitāḥ tamasā mohitāḥ sarve nidrā vat krānta cetasaḥ manāk jñānena ca ākrāntāḥ kim kuryāma iti mohitāḥ atha bhūta adhipaḥ devaḥ go śruta ābharaṇa ujjvalaḥ candra ardha kṛta śobhaḥ tu śītala aṃśu viśodhitaḥ a paśyan abravīt devam mādhavam bhūdharam harim mahādevaḥ uvāca kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahā bāho kva gataḥ tvam mahāmate brahmā ca kva gataḥ vīra na aham paśyāmi vām kvacid kṣmādharam pṛthivīm vṛkṣān deva gandharva dānavān vipulam sāgaram sindhūn nahi paśyāmi kiñcana brūhi me deva śārdūla vrīḍā me atīva jāyate śaṅkarasya vacaḥ śrutvā hariḥ vacanam abravīt śoka gadgadayā vācā tamasā mohitaḥ nṛpa viṣṇuḥ uvāca mama api mohitam cetaḥ tamasā atīva śaṅkara pṛcchāvaḥ tam mahātmānam yadi te rocate hara hitvā darpam ahaṅkāram samam āsthāya kevalam iti evam gadataḥ vākyam viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahā bāho bhīma bhīma mahāmate mama atīva manaḥ buddhī tamasā vaśam āgate na śṛṇomi na paśyāmi nidrā moha vaśam gataḥ tamasā vyāṣṭatam devau na jāne kva gatam mahaḥ atha teṣām pravadatām brahma ādīnām divaukasām darpa krodha bhaya ārtānām tamasā ākrānta cetasām teṣām darpa apahārāya prabodha artham ca gopateḥ tejaḥ rūpam samudbhūtam aṣṭa śṛṅgam anaupamam jvālā mālā vṛtam vīra bahu rūpam ca bhāsate śata yojana vistīrṇam gatam ūrdhvam bhramat tathā prakāśam tejasā tasya jagat sarvam idam nṛpa pureṣu antar yathā vīra ambujasya arcibhiḥ sadā dṛṣṭvā parasparam sarve huṅkāra ādi vikāriṇaḥ tatas vismayam āsīnaḥ dṛṣṭa gopatayaḥ nṛpa aho tejaḥ samuddhūtam asmākam śreyase nṛpa prakāśāya ca lokānām sarve paśyāma kim nu idam jñānāya ūrdhvam gataḥ brahmā ca adhastāt tripurāntaka tiryak jagāma deveśaḥ cakra ambu ja gadā adharaḥ a labdhvā tasya te sarve pramāṇam gairika adhipāḥ kaḥ ayam kimātmakaḥ ca ayam kim idam tejasām nidhiḥ aho asya darśanāt sarve sañjātāḥ jñāninaḥ vayam kṛta añjali puṭāḥ sarve ca astuvan tridivaukasaḥ stuvatām api atha eteṣām sahasrakiraṇaḥ raviḥ ātmānam darśayāmāsa kṛpayā parayā vṛtaḥ jñātvā bhaktim mahā bāho brahma ādīnām mahā upamām atha te vyomni deveśam dadṛśuḥ parameśvaram kṛttikābhiḥ a saṃspṛṣṭam yat vā tat kārtikā sthitam tathā hasta vihīnam ca saptarṣi rahitam tathā sakalam niṣkalam ca eva sadā eka ākāra rūpiṇam tat dṛṣṭvā aneka śirasam aneka caraṇam tathā aneka ānanam akṣībam sahasrākṣam anaupamam dṛṣṭvā evam devadevasya rūpam bhānoḥ mahātmanaḥ kṛta añjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā brahmā stotum pracakrame praṇamya śirasā bhānum idam vacanam abravīt bhāskarāya namaḥ nityam khasa ulkāya namaḥ namaḥ viṣṇave kālacakrāya somāya amita tejase tamaḥ ghnāya su rūpāya tejasām nidhaye namaḥ arthāya kāmarūpāya dharmāya amita tejase mokṣāya mokṣa rūpāya sūryāya ca namaḥ namaḥ śubhāya śubha rūpāya śubha dāya śubha ātmane śāntāya śānta rūpāya śāntaye asmāsu vai namaḥ namaḥ te brahma rūpāya brāhmaṇāya namaḥ namaḥ evam stutvā ravim brahmā śraddhayā parayā vibho tūṣṇīm āsīt mahābhāga prahṛṣṭena antarātmanā tripurāriḥ mahā tejāḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim mahādevaḥ uvāca maheśa jaya kāntīśa jaya kāla īśa śaṅkara artha kāma īśa dharma īśa jaya mokṣa īśa śarma da jaya vedāṅga rūpāya graha rūpāya vai namaḥ satyāya satya rūpāya surūpāya śubhāya ca krodha lobha vināśāya kāma nāśāya vai jaya kalmāṣapakṣi rūpāya yati rūpāya śambhave viśvāya viśvarūpāya viśvakarmāya vai jaya jaya ūṅkāra vaṣaṭkāra svāhākāra svadhā maya jaya aśvamedha rūpāya ca agni rūpa aryamāya ca saṃsāra arṇava pītāya mokṣa dvāra pradāya ca īśaḥ api evam ahīna aṅgam stutvā bhānum prayatnataḥ virarāma mahā rāja praṇamya śirasā ravim atha viṣṇuḥ mahā tejāḥ kṛta añjali puṭaḥ ravim uvāca rāja śārdūla bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ viṣṇuḥ uvāca divākaram ravim bhānum mārtaṇḍam bhāskaram bhagam indram viṣṇum harim haṃsam arkam lokagurum vibhum trinetram tri akṣaram tri aṅgam trimūrtim trigatim śubham ṣaṇmukhāya namaḥ nityam trinetrāya namaḥ namaḥ caturviṃśati pādāya namaḥ dvādaśa pāṇaye devānām pataye nityam varṇānām pataye namaḥ tvam brahmā tvam jagannāthaḥ rudraḥ tvam ca prajāpatiḥ bṛhaspatiḥ budhaḥ tvam hi tvam śukraḥ tvam vibhāvasuḥ namaḥ te jñāna rūpāya yajñāya ca namaḥ namaḥ prasīda asmāsu deveśa bhūteśa kiraṇa ujjvala saṃsāra arṇava magnānām prasādam kuru gopate pradadhyau nṛpa śārdūla ravim tad gata mānasaḥ evam te nara śārdūla devāḥ brahma ādayaḥ anagha stuvanti tam mahātmānam sahasrakiraṇam ravim iti evam stuvatām teṣām ravim bhaktyā mahātmanām atha tuṣṭaḥ raviḥ teṣām brahma dīnām jagatpatiḥ vijñāya bhaktim paramām śraddhām ca paramām vibhuḥ uvāca sa mahā tejāḥ prahṛṣṭena antarātmanā graha īśaḥ vyoma ca ārūḍhaḥ tejasā prajvalan diśaḥ brahmāṇam viṣṇum īśānam āmantrya etān viśām pate dṛṣṭvā tān praṇatān sarvān śirobhiḥ avanim gatān kṛtvā tu vacanam bhānoḥ brahmā lokaguruḥ nṛpa jagāma śirasā bhūmau uvāca sa kṛtāñjaliḥ kṛtakṛtyaḥ asmi deveśa pūtaḥ ca asmi khagādhipa a paśyataḥ ca deveśa mūḍham āsīt manaḥ mama gatvā śirobhiḥ avanim aṣṭa aṅgaiḥ patitasya ca brahmaṇaḥ vacanam śrutvā pūṣā devaḥ jagatpatiḥ tathā iti āha mahā rāja virāṭa praśraya anvitam brahmaṇe ca varam dattvā rājan devaḥ divākaraḥ uvāca tryambakam devam śaśāṅka kṛta śekharam varam varaya bhūteśa bhūbhṛt jā dayita anagha bhāskarasya vacaḥ śrutvā īśvaraḥ tripurāntaka gatvā tu śirasā bhūmau praṇamya uvāca bhāskaram mahādevaḥ uvāca gataḥ aham paramām siddhim gataḥ ca paramām gatim na a prāpyam asti deveśa na a sādhyam mama kiṃcana acalām dehi me bhaktim ātmanaḥ caraṇam naya vyomakeśa vacaḥ śrutvā pūṣā devaḥ divākaraḥ nārāyaṇa mahā bāho varam varaya go dhara śrutvā tu bhāskara vacaḥ kīlāla janakaḥ hariḥ uvāca parayā bhaktyā natvā ca śirasā ravim nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca yena aham sarva devānām uttamaḥ syām jagatpate prajānām pālanam deva devānām ca graha adhipa varṇānām āśramāṇām ca varṇa dharmasya vā vibho duṣṭa daitya vināśāya lokānām pālanāya ca sṛṣṭaḥ aham bhavatā pūrvam kalpa ādau ca kṛtaḥ anagha vyādhiḥ duḥkham manaḥ rogam dāridryam santati kṣayaḥ evam tvām gopate deva bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme sūrya tejaḥ varṇanam nāma tripañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha catuḥpañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ trayī upākhyāna varṇanam śrutvā tu vacanam bhānuḥ viṣṇoḥ amita tejasaḥ uvāca kuru śārdūlaḥ ādityaḥ kṛpayā anvitaḥ ādityaḥ uvāca kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa mahā bāho śṛṇu me paramam vacaḥ yad artham prārthitaḥ kṛṣṇa tat sarvam te bhaviṣyati deva dānava yakṣāṇām gandharva uraga rakṣasām ajeyaḥ tvam mahā bāho bhaviṣyasi na saṃśayaḥ brahmā api satatam śaktaḥ jagat sraṣṭum bhaviṣyati saṃhartum śaṅkaraḥ ca api mad prasādāt bhaviṣyati tvām ārādhya bhaviṣyāmaḥ vayam sarve sura uttamāḥ katham ārādhayāmaḥ hi bhavantam śraddhayā anvitāḥ bhavataḥ hi na paśyāmaḥ mūrtim parama pūjitām jvālā mālā ākulam sarvam aneka ākṛti ca adbhutam bhaktim vinā pūjayitum na śakyante divaukasaḥ tasmāt darśaya tām mūrtim ātmanaḥ yā parā matā yena tvām pūjayitvā tu vayam siddhāḥ bhavāmahe sūryaḥ uvāca sādhu sādhu mahādeva sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi suvrata śṛṇu ca ekamanāḥ kṛtsnam gadataḥ mama mānada śreyase sarva lokānām ādi madhya anta kṛt sadā ekā me rājasī mūrtiḥ brahma iti parikīrtitā sṛṣṭim karoti sā nityam kalpa ādau jagatām vibho dvitīyā sāttvikī proktā yā parā parikīrtitā jagat sā pālayet nityam duṣṭa daitya vināśinī tṛtīyā tāmasī jñeyā īśā iti ṣa rikīrtitā trailokyam saṃharet sā tu kalpa ante śūlapāṇinī caturthī tu guṇaiḥ hīnā satya ādibhiḥ anuttamā sā ca aśakyā kvacid draṣṭum sthitā sā ca abhavat sadā tayā tatam idam sarvam yat ca udgītham tu me gatiḥ niṣkalā sakalā sā tu surūpā rūpa varjitā antargatā ca lokānām na ca karma phalam gatā tiṣṭhamānā api aliptā sā padma patram iva ambhasā a naṣṭā ca sadā ṣaḍbhiḥ sapta atītya vyavasthitā catustanā ca sā ṣaḍbhyaḥ turīya ākhyā su pūjitā na sā spraṣṭum tvayā śakyā hariṇā brahmaṇā na ca mām an ārādhya bhūteśa vyoma rūpam kadācana ahaṃkāra vimūḍhānām tamasā ca trilocana prakāśāya ca lokānām jvālā mālā samākulam yasya saṃdarśanāt eva yūyam sarve prabodhitāḥ tasmāt ārādhayasva enam a spṛṣṭam gamana upamam mad mūrtim yena tām divyām drakṣyasi tvam trilocana dakṣiṇe līyate brahmā vāme tasya janārdanaḥ gāyatrī līyate tasya hṛdaye loka mātaraḥ līyante mūrddhni vai vedaḥ sa ṣaṣ aṅga padakramaḥ ākāśam vyoma iti āhuḥ pṛthivī nikṣubhā matā nikṣubhā dayitā mama tasmāt ārādhaya vyoma tvam brahmā keśavaḥ tathā tatas yāsyasi saṃsiddhim ṣaṣ aṅgām paramām śubhām kalāpa grāmam āśritya śaṅkha cakra gadā dharaḥ ārādhayatu mām bhaktyā vyoma rūpam janārdanaḥ antarikṣa gatam tīrtham puṣkaram loka pāvanam evam mām satatam yūyam samārādhya jagatpatim samānām ca su divyānām sahasra trayam ādarāt tatas drakṣyatha me mūrtim paramām yām viduḥ budhāḥ kadamba golaka ākārām raśmi mālā ākulām parām atha nārāyaṇaḥ devaḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim kṛta añjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā idam vacanam abravīt viṣṇuḥ uvāca tam ārādhya vayam sarve yāsyāmaḥ siddhim uttamām kīdṛś vyoma tu aham brahmā haraḥ ca tripurāntakaḥ ārādhayāmahe deva bhaktyā śreyaḥ artham ātmanaḥ yena siddhim gamiṣyāmaḥ tam ārādhya divākaram tasmāt naḥ lakṣaṇam brūhi vyomnaḥ parama pūjita catuṣpañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañja pañcāśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ādityaḥ uvāca sādhu sādhu suraśreṣṭha sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi bhūdhara śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ kṛṣṇa gadataḥ nikhilam mama tvām ārādhya ca cakrāṃkam śaṃkaraḥ vṛttam ādarāt yathā iṣṭam ṛbhavaḥ sarve bhaktyā mām pūjayaṃtu vai tatas brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ śrutvā vākyam vibhāvasoḥ asmābhiḥ bhagavān pṛṣṭaḥ stejasā prajvalaṃti ca saṃbhūtāḥ jñāninaḥ sarve bhavataḥ darśanāt vayam vayam tvad mūrtayaḥ sarve tejasā tava saṃvṛtāḥ utpatti sthiti nāśāya lokānām tava śāsanāt sthitāḥ sarve surajyeṣṭha lokapālāḥ ca kṛtsnaśas adhunā sādha yāma iha vyomnaḥ pūjām vrajāmahe ittham teṣām vacaḥ śrutvā bhāskaraḥ vāritaskaraḥ uvāca brahma viṣṇu īśān sāma pūrvam idam vacaḥ ādityaḥ uvāca yūyam mad mūrtayaḥ sarve yuṣmākam aham eva hi yat etat darśanam devāḥ ca yat uttamam jvālā mālā ākulam śubhram śāṃḍileyam iva ujjhitam yuṣmākam deva śārdūlāḥ tat nibodhata kāraṇam ahaṃkāra vimūḍhānām mithas kalahinām tathā prabodha artham hi yuṣmākam tamasaḥ nāśanāya ca pravartanāya sarveṣām karmaṇām ca pradarśitam tasmāt evam viditvā tu na ahaṃkāraḥ kadācana mānam darpam ahaṃkāram pūrvam tyaktvā su dūratas ārādhayata mām bhaktyā satatam śraddhayā anvitāḥ jagāma adarśanam teṣām paśyatām eva bhārata atha te vismitāḥ sarve brahma viṣṇu pinākinaḥ bṛhadbhānuḥ mahātejāḥ lokadīpaḥ vibhāvasuḥ yena sarve vayam trātā nighnatā vipulam tamaḥ ārādhayāmaḥ tam sarve gatvā sthānāni kṛtsnaśas tat vyoma pūjayitvā tu parayā śraddhayā vibhoḥ āmaṃtrya te mithas sarve gatāḥ pūjā artham ādarāt jagāma puṣkaram brahmā śālagrāmam janārdanaḥ ārādhayanti tam devam bhāskaram vāritaskaram vyomni kṛtvā catuṣkoṇam brahmā nityam apūjayat apūjayat sadā vṛttam vyomam bhaktyā samanvitaḥ divya varṣa sahasra aṃte pūjayaṃtaḥ divākaram gaṃdha mālya upahāraiḥ tu nṛtya gīta pravāditaiḥ atoṣayat mahātmānam kurvāṇāḥ tapaḥ uttamam atha teṣām mahā rāja prasannaḥ bhuvanādhipaḥ darśayāmāsa loka ātmā yugapad vai vibhāvasuḥ kṛṣṇa ātmā ca mahā tejāḥ caturdhā yogataḥ nagha gatvā ekena suraśreṣṭham saḥ bravīt paramam vacaḥ sa tatāpa tathā anyena ratha ārūḍhaḥ divam sadā evam yoga balāt bhānuḥ kṛtavān mahat adbhutam ugre tapasi vartantam dṛṣṭvā ca enam caturmukham uvāca tam mahā rāja bhāskaraḥ caturānanam paśya paśya suraśreṣṭha vara dam mām upāgatam dṛṣṭvā jagāma praṇataḥ hi avanim mukha paṃkajaiḥ uvāca paramam vākyam kṛta aṃjali puṭaḥ sthitaḥ namaḥ te bhūta bhavya īśa bhūta āde bhūtabhāvana ādityaḥ uvāca evam eva yathā āttha tvam na asti tatra vicāraṇā tvam me prathama jaḥ putraḥ saṃbhūtaḥ kāraṇāt purā yam icchasi surajyeṣṭha mā tvam śaṃkām kuru prabho kartum śaknomi sṛṣṭim ca prasādāt tava gopate kṛtākṛtā hi me deva sṛṣṭiḥ na iha prasidhyati ādityaḥ uvāca tatas yāsyati te siddhim kṛtsnā sṛṣṭiḥ caturmukha tam vai vyoḍham lokanātham jagatpatim punar āha surajyeṣṭhaḥ praṇamya śirasā ravim ādityaḥ uvāca yat me rūpam mahat vyoma pṛṣṭha śṛṃgam anuttamam indraḥ pūrvadiśaḥ bhāge āgneyyām śāṃḍilīsutaḥ dakṣiṇasyām yamaḥ nityam nairṛtyām atha nirṛtiḥ paścimāyām tu varuṇaḥ vāyavyām tu sadāgatiḥ aiśānyām śaṃkaraḥ devaḥ madhye tvam viṣṇunā saha śrutvā etvam vacanam bhānoḥ vedhāḥ prītyā tam abravīt kṛtakṛtyam tathā ātmānam manyate ca narādhipa cakāra ca tathā sarvam bhāska ra uktam aśeṣatas dadarśa tatra bhūteśam tapaḥ tīvram samāśritam kapardinam śūla dharam candra arka kṛta śekharam pūjayaṃtam param vyoma suvratam teja sa anvitam gandha mālya upahāraiḥ ca nṛtya gīta pravāditaiḥ saṃpūjya eva mahat vyoma jagāma śirasā mahīm dṛṣṭvā evam pūjayantam ca bhāskaraḥ tripurāṃtakam tuṣṭā uvocat mahā tejāḥ go śruta ābharaṇam haram bhīma tuṣṭaḥ asmi te vatsa varam mattaḥ vṛṇuṣva vai tava aṃtikam aham prāptaḥ vara daḥ bhūbhṛt ālaya śrutvā evam vacanam bhānoḥ mahādevaḥ mahīpate uvāca praṇataḥ bhūtvā aṣṭāṃgaiḥ bhū talam gataḥ śubha ālaya śubha ādhāra vikartana śubha ānana ādityaḥ uvāca lalāṭāt tvam samutpannaḥ putraḥ putravatām vara mahādevaḥ uvāca prayaccha me varam bhāno dehi bhaktim mama acalām deva dānava gaṃdharva yakṣa rakṣaḥ gaṇān tathā nirjitya aham yathā deva yuga ante saṃhare prajām ādityaḥ uvāca etat triśūlam paramam tava śastram bhaviṣyati īśāne ca tathā bhāge vyomnaḥ vāsaḥ bhaviṣyati mahādevaḥ uvāca evam bhavatu me deva yaḥ prasādaḥ tvayā kṛtaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmanirupaṇam nāma pañcapañcāśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ ittham dattvā varam bhānuḥ īśvarāya viśām pate śālagrāmam jagāma āśu varam dātum hareḥ nṛpa kṛṣṇa ajina dharam śāntam prajvalantam sva tejasā gandha mālya upahāraiḥ ca nṛtya gīta pravāditaiḥ evam saṃpūjya tat vyoma bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ jagāma śirasā bhūmim hṛdi dhyāyan divākaram viṣṇum tam praṇatam dṛṣṭvā tuṣṭaḥ devaḥ vibhāvasuḥ uvāca viṣṇum āmaṃtrya paśya mām āgatam hare tat vākyam keśavaḥ śrutvā śirasā ca mahīm gataḥ āditya arka rave bhāno bhaga pūrṇa divākara saṃsāra arṇava magnānām trāhi deva vṛṣadhvaja viṣṇoḥ vacanam ākarṇya harṣam prāpya divākaraḥ uvāca kuru śārdūla harṣa gadgadayā girā sādhu kṛṣṇa mahā bāho tuṣṭaḥ ūham tava keśava niśamya te parām bhaktim śraddhām ca puruṣottama niśamya vacanam bhānoḥ viṣṇuḥ bhaktyā samanvitaḥ kṛta aṃjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā idam vacanam abravīt prayaccha tu acalām bhaktim yathā śatrum parājaye tathā mama varam dehi sarva arāti vināśanam lokānām pālane yuktim balam vīryam yaśaḥ sukham sādhu sādhu mahā bāho brahmaṇaḥ tvam jaghanya jaḥ bhaktaḥ ca api mama atyaṃtam brahmaṇyaḥ ca sadā anagha sarva āyudha varam vīra sarva arāti vināśanam mahā prasādam iti uktvā jagāma śirasā mahīm bhāskaraḥ api varam dattvā keśavāya amita ojase jagāma āśu mahā rāja sva puram vibudha adhipaḥ lokānām pālane śaktim balam vīryam yaśaḥ sukham dattvā kṛṣṇāya deveśaḥ tathā anyat api kāṃkṣitam evam brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ pūjayitvā divākaram śaktimaṃtaḥ babhūvuḥ te sarga ādīnām pravartane iti te kathitam puṇyam ākhyānam pāpa nāśanam yaḥ idam śṛṇuyāt nityam paṭhet stotra trayam ca yaḥ saḥ agneyam yānam ārūḍhaḥ yāti bhānoḥ padam vidyā arthī labhate vidyām prasādāt bhāskarasya tu tejasā ravi saṃkāśaḥ prabhayā pṛśni sannibhaḥ modate su ciram kālam jñāninām uttamaḥ bhavet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme traisuropākhyānavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭpaṃcāśaduttaraśata tamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca yāsyāmi dvija śārdūla prapanna timira apahaḥ etat me mahat āścaryam śaṃsa bhūmim katham vrajet deva ādīnām praṇetā yaḥ yaḥ bhuvi prasavaḥ vibhuḥ sa janmani katham puṇyām buddhim cakre vidām vara gobhiḥ pālayate kṛtsnam ātmanaḥ yaḥ svayam raviḥ mahābhūtāni bhūtātmā yaḥ cakāra dadhāra ca yena gobhiḥ samākrāṃtāḥ vipra lokāḥ caturdaśa yaḥ antakāle jagat pītvā kṛtvā vajra mayam vapuḥ lokam ekārṇavam cakre dṛśyate svena karmaṇā yaḥ purāṇe purāṇa ātmā tejasām rūpam āsthitaḥ api sṛṣṭvā dvijaśreṣṭha yaḥ sasarja vasuṃdharām dadau kṛtvā vasumatīm surāṇām sura sattamaḥ yaḥ sthitaḥ hi analam pītvā saṃvatsara mayaḥ ca yaḥ pātāla stha ūrṇava rasam madhya toya mayam haviḥ sahasra śirasam devam sahasra akṣam sahasraśas hariḥ ca vakṣasaḥ yasya lalāṭāt yasya śaṃkaraḥ yena te nihatāḥ daityāḥ maṃdehāḥ nāma nāmataḥ brahma ādīnām durādharṣaḥ yaḥ sadā vighna nāśanaḥ sarva deva mayam kṛtvā sarva āyudha dharam vapuḥ eka cakra ratha ārūḍhaḥ garuḍāgraja sārathiḥ kara ante yaḥ jagat sarvam saha dānava rākṣasam prakāśatamam a spṛṣṭam vapuḥ yasya sadā dvija nāśayet yaḥ tu satatam tamaḥ lokasya śāṃtaye nāśayitvā tamaḥ yaḥ tu kriyāḥ sarvāḥ pravartayet yoktrāṇi dakṣiṇā dīkṣya musala ulūkhalāni ca gārhapatyena vidhinā tadvat dhāryeṇa karmaṇā agnim āhavanīm ca eva vedim ca eva kuśam srucam sarvān imān ca yaḥ cakre havyabhāga pradān mukhe havya ādān ca surān yajñe kavya ādān ca pitṝn api bhāga arthe madhudhānāya cakre yaḥ yajña karmaṇi pūṣaṇam ca sutam somam pavitrāmaraṇīm api yajñāni ca dravyāṇi yajñān ca api sa ṛtvijaḥ sadasyān yajamānān ca medhāvinaḥ tathā uttamān vibabhāja purā sarvam pārameṣṭhayena karmaṇā yuga anurūpaḥ yaḥ kṛtvā lokān anuvaram kramāt kṣaṇān kalāḥ ca kāṣṭhāḥ ca kāla vaikalyam eva ca muhūrtāḥ tithayaḥ māsāḥ pakṣāḥ saṃvatsarāḥ tathā ṛtavaḥ kāla yogāḥ ca pramāṇam vividham nṛṣu āyuḥ kṣetrāṇi apacaya upacayān ca eva yaḥ akarot sṛṣṭāḥ lokāḥ trayaḥ naṃtāḥ yena jñānena vartmanā sarva bhūta gaṇāḥ sṛṣṭāḥ sarva bhūta ātmanā sadā yaḥ gatāgati potena trātā asti jagat īśvaraḥ yaḥ gatiḥ vṛṣa yuktānām gatiḥ yaḥ a pāpa karmaṇām dhātu vaidyasya yaḥ vettā catur āśrama saṃśrayaḥ diś aṃbara anubhūtaḥ ca vāyuḥ vāyu vibhāvanaḥ agnīṣoma ātmakam jyotiḥ yogīśaḥ kṣaṇadā aṃtakaḥ yaḥ param śrūyate jyotiḥ yaḥ param śrūyate tapaḥ yam param paramam prāhuḥ paramātmānam acyutam brahma ādibhiḥ stutaḥ devaḥ yaḥ ca daitya aṃta kṛt vibhuḥ yuga aṃteṣu ataṃkaḥ yaḥ tu yaḥ ca loka aṃtaka uttamaḥ vettā yaḥ veda viduṣām prabhuḥ yaḥ prabhaviṣṇunām mānuṣāṇām manaḥ bhūtaḥ tapaḥ bhūtaḥ tapasvinām ākāśa prasavaḥ vāyuḥ vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ hutāśanaḥ rasāt hi śoṇitam bhavati śoṇitāt māṃsam ucyate śukrāt garbhaḥ samabhavat rasa mūlena karmaṇā tatas kṣmāsaṃbhavaḥ jñeyaḥ dvitīyaḥ rāśiḥ ucyate śukram soma ātmakam vidyāt ātma rūpam yad
