ātmakam bhavaḥ rasa ātmakaḥ teṣām vīryam ca śaśi pāvakam kaphasya pṛthivī sthānam pittam nābhau pratiṣṭhitam nābhi koṣṭha aṃtara stham tu tatra devaḥ divākaraḥ pittam agniḥ smṛtaḥ yasmāt agnīṣoma ātmakam jagat vāyuḥ praveśam saṃcakre saṃgataḥ paramātmanā prāṇaḥ apānaḥ samānaḥ ca udānaḥ vyānaḥ eva ca apānam paścime kāye udāna ūrdhvam śarīra gaḥ bhūta avāptiḥ tatas tasya jāyati iṃdriya gocarā pṛthivī vāyuḥ ākāśaḥ āpaḥ jyotiḥ ca paṃcamaḥ tasya iṃdriyāṇi piṣṭāni svam svam yogam pracakramuḥ pārthivam deham āhuḥ tu prāṇa ātmānam ca mārutam nidrā hi ākāśa yoniḥ ca jala āśraye pravartate jyotiścakṣuṣi tad janma tad aṃśaḥ tāmasaḥ smṛtaḥ grāmāḥ ca viṣayāḥ ca eva yasya vīryam pravartitam evam yaḥ sṛjate lokān sa deva asura mānavān sa katham devadeveśaḥ garbham eṣyati ca aṃśumān yathā udaram adityāḥ tu yaḥ svayam ca aviśat purā āścaryam paramam pṛcche tvām aham bhāskarasya vai etat āścaryam ākhyānam kathayasva mahā mune samākhyāhi balam vīrya bhānoḥ amita tejasaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme sūryāvatārakathāprastāvavarṇanam nāma saptapaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumaṃtuḥ uvāca praśna bhāraḥ mahān tāta tvayā uktaḥ raśmimālini yathāśakti tu vakṣyāmi śrūyatām bhānavam yaśaḥ bhānoḥ prabhāva śravaṇe yasya te matiḥ utthitā haṃta bhānoḥ pravṛttim ca śṛṇu divyām mayā īritām sahasra āsyam sahasra akṣam sahasra kiraṇam ca yam pātrāṇi samatītāni veda dīkṣī carum śubham śrotriyam śūrpa musalam prokṣaṇam dakṣiṇāyanam adhvaryum sāmagam vipram sadasyam sadanam tathā yūpam samidh sruvam darvīm musala ulūkhalāni ca prāgvaṃśam jayabhūtim ca hotāram cayanam ca yat rahasyāni pramāṇāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca pratiṣṭhitāni dārḍhyam ca sthaṃḍilāni kuśān tathā agrebhujī somabhujām yaḥ ca triṣu udāhṛtaḥ āyurveda vidaḥ viprāḥ yajaṃte śāśvatam vibhum tasya bhānoḥ sureśasya vīra caṃdana mālinaḥ prāhuḥ bhāva sahasrāṇi samatītāni anekaśas bhūyas ca eva bhaviṣyaṃti vinaśyaṃti dine dine yat pṛcchasi mahā rāja puṇyām divyām kathām śubhām tām aham tvam pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu sarvam aśeṣatas hita artham sarva martyānām lokānām prabhavāya ca bahuśas sarva bhūta ātmā svayam samabhijāyate tathā samabhavat devaḥ kaśyapasya aditeḥ sutaḥ tuṣṭaḥ dattvā varam vīra virañcasya mahātmanaḥ yam yam janayate putram aditiḥ kaśyapāt vibhoḥ sa sa yāti vināśam vai tad kṣaṇāt eva bhārata dṛṣṭvā sutān naśyamānān putra śoka anvitā jagāma kaśyapa abhyāśe śoka vyākulita īkṣaṇā sā apaśyat tam ca mārīcam munim dīptam tapaḥ nidhim ādyam devagurum vipram divyam triṣavaṇa aṃbubhiḥ tejasā vahni saṃkāśam sauram vṛka sama prabham nyasta daṇḍa śriyā yuktam baddha kṛṣṇa ajina aṃbaram atha aditiḥ ca dṛṣṭvā evam bhartāram amita ojasam śoka gadgadayā vācā idam vacanam abravīt śrutvā tu vacanam tasyāḥ kaśyapaḥ muni sattamaḥ tad vākya muktam tam sarvam yat uktam tasya jāyayā kaśyapasya vacaḥ śrutvā kañjajaḥ vākyam abravīt iti uktvā yānam āruhya āgneyam padma locanaḥ aditiḥ kaśyapaḥ brahmā jagmuḥ vipulam āśritāḥ te muhūrtena saṃprāptāḥ sūrya lokam su varcasam ādityam praṣṭum icchanti tejasām rāśim uttamam gacchantaḥ te ca vistīrṇām ādityasya parām sabhām ṣaṭpada udgīta ninadām sa abhagaiḥ tu samīritām kratavaḥ bahvṛca mukhāḥ proktāḥ puṇyavat akṣarāḥ tuṣṭuvuḥ puruṣa vyāghram vitateṣu ca karmasu yajña sandhau veda vidām padakrama vidām tathā ghoṣeṇa parama ṛṣīṇām sarvam tatra nināditam yajña saṃstava vidbhiḥ ca śikṣā vidbhiḥ tathā dvijaiḥ aṣṭādaśa purāṇa jñaiḥ sarva vidyā viśāradaiḥ mīmāṃsā hetuvāda jñaiḥ sarva vāda viśāradaiḥ lokāyatika mukhyaiḥ ca tuṣṭuvuḥ sūryam īritam japa homa parān yogyān dadṛśuḥ kaśyapa ādayaḥ tasyām sabhāyām āste sa raśmi mālī divākaraḥ sura asura guruḥ śrīmān śuśubhe vīra māyayā upāsate ca tatra eva prajānām patim īśvaram dakṣaḥ pracetāḥ pulahaḥ marīciḥ ca dvijottamaḥ bhṛguḥ atriḥ vaśiṣṭhaḥ ca gautamaḥ nāradaḥ tathā divyāḥ ātmā aṃtarikṣam ca vāyuḥ tejaḥ balam mahī prakṛtiḥ ca vikārāḥ ca yat ca anyat kāraṇam mahat sāṃga upāgāḥ ca catvāraḥ vedāḥ lokapate tathā lavāḥ ca ṛtavaḥ ca eva saṃkalpa praṇavāḥ tathā arthaḥ dharmaḥ ca kāmaḥ ca mokṣaḥ ca sa viśeṣataḥ vṛkaḥ viṣṇu sutaḥ putraḥ puṣpajaḥ dhiṣaṇaḥ tathā mārutaḥ viśvakarmā ca aśvi nau anya vāhanau evam uktaḥ su vacanaiḥ bhānunā prabhaviṣṇunā jagāma kaśyapaḥ vīra saha adityā svam āśramam bhūtātmānam mahātmānam divyam varṣa sahasrakam surāṇām śaraṇam devaḥ ca asurāṇām vināśanaḥ prahatya daitya saṃghān ca surāṇām nāda vardhane abhavat parama ānandaḥ sarveṣām tatra tasthuṣām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe saura dharmeṣu sūryotpattiḥ nāma aṣṭapañcāśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumaṃtuḥ uvāca dakṣaḥ prajāpatiḥ ca eva namaskāram cakāra ha vidyotamānaḥ vapuṣā sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ upātiṣṭhata deveśam bhānum ca ṛṣi gaṇaiḥ saha evam te deva gaṃdharvāḥ upāgāyaṃta bhaktitaḥ utpannam dvādaśa ātmānam bhāskaram vāritaskaram indraḥ vivasvān pūṣā ca tvaṣṭā ca savitā tathā bhargaḥ om aśumān aryamā arkaḥ pṛśniḥ mārtaṃḍaḥ eva ca iti ekādaśe eva ete dvādaśaḥ viṣṇuḥ ucyate evam dvādaśadhā jātam aṃśumaṃtam mahā adbhutam stuvanti devatāḥ sarve gatāḥ ca tarasā mahīm mṛgavyādhaḥ ca śarvaḥ ca mṛgāṃka aṃkaḥ mahā yaśāḥ ajaikapād ahirbudhnyaḥ patiḥ kācaḥ paraṃtapaḥ damanaḥ ca īśvaraḥ ca eva kapālī ca viśām pate aśvinau vasavaḥ ca aṣṭau garuḍaḥ ca mahā balaḥ viśvedevāḥ ca sādhyāḥ ca tasthuḥ prāṃjalayaḥ nṛpa nāga rājaḥ mahā rāja vāsukiḥ prāṃjaliḥ sthitaḥ anye ca bahavaḥ nāgāḥ rākṣasāḥ ca mahā balāḥ tārkṣyaḥ ca ariṣṭanemiḥ ca garuḍaḥ ca mahā balaḥ aruṇaḥ ca aruṇiḥ ca eva tatra prāṃjalayaḥ sthitāḥ prāha devaguruḥ śrīmān suraiḥ sarvaiḥ mahā ṛṣibhiḥ yasmāt prekṣayate sarvam prabhaviṣṇuḥ sanātanaḥ tasmāt loka īśvaraḥ śrīmān vivasvān ca bhavatu iti deva dānava yakṣāṇām gaṃdharva uraga rakṣasām evam uktvā tu bhagavān sārdham devarṣibhiḥ prabhuḥ yā gatiḥ yajña śīlānām yā gatiḥ puṇya karmaṇām yā gatiḥ siddha yogānām yā gatiḥ ca mahātmanām yasya aṣṭaguṇam aiśvaryam samabhūt deva sattamam yam prāpya śāśvatam viprāḥ na āvartante bhava arṇave vālakhilya ādayaḥ ye ca sarva āśrama nivāsinaḥ sevaṃte yam yata ātmānaḥ duścaram vratam āsthitāḥ sahasramūrdhā rakta akṣaḥ śeṣa ādibhiḥ anuttamaiḥ sarve ca yam yata prāṇāḥ dhyāyanti brahma rūpiṇam yam veda vidaḥ gāyaṃti vettāram yajña dāyi nam tam putram dvādaśa ātmānam kaśyapaḥ prāpya sattamam madhu piṃgalaḥ mahā bāhuḥ kaṃbu grīvaḥ hasan iva saḥ uvāca mahā tejāḥ kaśyapam ca ṛṣi satta mam dattvā varam purā vipra viraṃcasya mahātmanaḥ tasmāt tvam ṛṣi śārdūla kuru sṛṣṭim anaupamām evam ārādhya deveśam brahmā sṛṣṭim avāptavān ārādhya kaśyapaḥ ca api bhāskaram sutam āptavān iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ubhayasaptamīmahātmye sūryāvatāravarṇanam nāma ekonaṣaṣṭi uttara śatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca brahma ādayaḥ api yam nityam pūjayaṃti vidhānataḥ brahmā viṣṇuḥ surāḥ brahman tam ārādhya divākaram dadṛśuḥ tasya kiṃbhūtam rūpam yat tat mahā adbhutam sumantuḥ uvāca ārādhya devam īśānam bhāskaram sūti vācakam kaviṣṇū kuru śārdūla jagmatuḥ tau himācalam gopateḥ antikam vīra prahṛṣṭau vibhu darśane kuṃda iṃdu saṃnibham draṣṭum kaṃja jaḥ ca acyutaḥ ca tau dadṛśatuḥ mahātmānam caṃdra ardha kṛta śekharam pūjayaṃtam vivasvaṃtam bhāskaram vīra vat nṛpa ārcya ūcatuḥ mahātmānam kaviṣṇū tam trilocanam bho bho bhīma suraśreṣṭha paśyāvām iha ca āgatau praṇamya śirasā bhūmau kṛtvā pūjām vidhānataḥ uvāca madhuram vākyam śikṣā akṣara samanvitam harṣa gadgadayā vācā diśaḥ san nādayan iva dṛṣṭavaṃtau param kiṃcid rūpam devasya śaṃkaram niśamya vacanam vīra śaṃkarasya mahātmanaḥ ūcatuḥ tau mahātmānau kaviṣṇū deva sattamau ārādhayitum evā api hi āgatau teṃtikam ca tam tasmāt ārādhayāmaḥ hi ekībhūya vibhāvasum śrutvā tu vacanam vīra kaṃja ja acyutayoḥ haraḥ tathā iti āha mahā bāho harṣāt utphulla locanaḥ atha te rāja śārdūla vivigo gatayaḥ nṛpa jagmuḥ tam parvata śreṣṭham udayācalam āśu vai tam āsādya nagam puṇyam śṛṃgaiḥ tribhiḥ alaṃkṛtam nānā dhātu pinaddha aṅgam nānā dhātu vibhūṣitam ārādhanāya vidhivat yatnam cakruḥ vibhāvasoḥ divya varṣa sahasra aṃte tapaṃtaḥ saṃsthitāḥ nage sthāṇu vat saṃsthitaḥ bhūmau ūrdhvabāhuḥ trilocanaḥ paṃca agnim bhajamānaḥ tu sthitaḥ viṣṇuḥ avāk śirāḥ evam varṣa sahasra ante tapaḥ cakruḥ su dāruṇam atha brahma īśa viṣṇūnām kurvatām tapaḥ uttamam tuṣṭaḥ uham bhavatām dātu miha āyātaḥ varam svayam sumantuḥ uvāca niśamya vacanam bhānoḥ śāṃtam hṛdyam manoramam praṇamya śirasā keśāḥ idam vacam abruvan kṛtakṛtyāḥ vayam sarve prasādāt tava gopate tvām ārādhya purā deva tvattaḥ prāpya varam śubham utpatti sthiti nāśānām vayam sarve divākara saṃbhūya iha samarthāḥ vai tvad prasādāt na saṃśayaḥ yat te paramakam rūpam durlabham durdṛśam tathā teṣām tat vacanam śrutvā brahma viṣṇu īśa bhāṣitam darśayāmāsa tat rūpam adbhutam loka pūjitam bhūḥ pādau dyauḥ śiraḥ ca api tatra agnī locane mate pāda aṃgulyaḥ piśācāḥ ca hasta aṃgulyaḥ ca guhyakāḥ viśve devāḥ smṛtāḥ tasya jaṃghā saṃghāḥ sura uttamāḥ yakṣāḥ kukṣiṣu saṃlīnāḥ keśāḥ ca apsarasām gaṇāḥ dṛṣṭi dhṛṣṭyaḥ ca vipulāḥ keśāḥ vīra aṃśavaḥ smṛtāḥ tārakāḥ roma rūpāṇi romāṇi ca mahā ṛṣayaḥ bāhavaḥ vidiśaḥ tasya diśaḥ śrotre narādhipa aśvinau śravaṇe ca asya nāsā vāyuḥ mahā balaḥ satyam asya abhavat vāṇī jihvā devī sarasvatī grīvā aditiḥ mahā devī tāluḥ rudraḥ ca vīryavān dvāram svargasya nābhiḥ vai mitraḥ tvaṣṭā picaṃḍakaḥ mukham vaiśvānaraḥ ca asya vṛṣaṇau ca bhagaḥ tadā hṛdayam bhagavān brahmā hi udaram kaśyapaḥ muniḥ pṛṣṭhe asya vasavaḥ devāḥ marutaḥ sarva saṃdhiṣu sarva chaṃdāṃsi daśanāḥ jyotīṃṣi vimalā prabhā prāṇaḥ rudraḥ mahādevaḥ kukṣau ca asya mahā arṇavāḥ udare ca asya gaṃdharvāḥ bhujagāḥ ca mahā balāḥ lakṣmīḥ medhā dhṛtiḥ kāṃtiḥ sarvāḥ vidyāḥ ca vai kaṭau lalāṭam asya paramam vayaḥ sthānam parātmanaḥ sarva jyotīṃṣi jānīhi tapaḥ cakraḥ ca deva rāj stanau kukṣau ca vedāḥ ca te iṣṭau ca asya makhāḥ smṛtāḥ yaṣṭavya paśubaṃdhāḥ ca dvijānām tāni ca sarva deva mayam dṛṣṭvā rūpam arkasya te nṛpa brahmā haraḥ hariḥ devāḥ param vismayam āgatāḥ praṇamya śirasā devam vepamānāḥ dharām gatāḥ samīkṣya rūpam te deva bhīmam jvālā samākulam diś jñānam hṛtam asmākam tat prasīda jagatpate upasaṃhara viśvātman draṣṭum śaktāḥ na te vayam iti teṣām vacaḥ śrutvā devadevaḥ divākaraḥ ādityaḥ uvāca etat mayā prasannena yuṣmākam śreyase anaghāḥ darśitam pūjitena iha yoginām yat mahā ālayam brahma īśa acyutāḥ ucuḥ tvām ārādhya jagannātham na a prāpyam iha vidyate evam uktvā aditeḥ putraḥ jagāma adarśanam raviḥ evam brahma ādayaḥ devāḥ pūjayitvā divākaram gatāḥ te paramām siddhim gaṃdharvāḥ ṛṣayaḥ tathā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe saura dharmeṣu brahma ādīnām sūryarūpadarśanavarṇanam nāma ṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūrya pūjā phala praśna varṇanam śatānīkaḥ uvāca na asti āditya samaḥ devaḥ na asti āditya samā gatiḥ āditya mūlam akhilam trailokyam na atra saṃśayaḥ rudra iṃdra upeṃdraka iṃdrāṇām vipra iṃdra tridivaukasām sarva ātmā sarva loka īśaḥ mahādevaḥ prajāpatiḥ bhāva abhāvau hi loka nāma ādityāt niḥsṛtau purā kṣaṇāḥ muhūrtāḥ divasāḥ rātri pakṣāḥ ca kṛtsnaśas māsāḥ saṃvatsarāḥ ca eva ṛtavaḥ ca yugāni ca saḥ eṣa kālaḥ ca agniḥ ca dvādaśa ātmā prajāpatiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe saptamīkalpe brāhme parvaṇi saura dharme sūryapūjāphalapraśnavarṇanam nāma ekaṣaṣṭyutaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumantuḥ uvāca bhānum pratiṣṭhāpya naraḥ sarva deva mayam vibhum prāpnoti amara tām vīra tejasā ravi sannibhaḥ yaḥ bhānum dveṣṭi saṃmohāt sarva deva namaḥ skṛtam naraḥ naraka gāmī syāt tasya saṃbhāṣaṇāt api bhānum iṣṭam pratiṣṭhāpya sarva yatnaiḥ vidhānataḥ yat puṇya phalam āpnoti tat ekāgra manāḥ śṛṇu tad phalam koṭi guṇitam sthāpya bhānum labhet naraḥ yaḥ bhānum sthāpayet bhaktyā vidhi pūrvam narādhipa sarva aṃga muditam puṇyam labhet koṭi guṇam naraḥ mātṛ jān pitṛ jān ca eva yatra ca udvahate striyam atha vā rājyam ākāṃkṣet jāyate saṃbhava aṃtare iha eva dhanavān śrīmān soṃte arka tvam avāpnuyāt trisaṃdhyam kīrtayet vyoma kṛtvā biṃbena pārthivam śata ekādaśakam yāvat tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu anena saha dehena bhānuḥ saṃtiṣṭhate kṣitau pāpa hā sarva martyānām darśanāt sparśanāt api uddhārayet ca saṃsthāpya kulānām ekaviṃśatim gīrvāṇaiḥ sahitaḥ nityam modate divi sūra vat bhakṣya lehya rasaiḥ ca eva kṛta dīpaiḥ alaṃkṛtaiḥ nānā rasa māyuktam nānā gaṃdha samanvitam tasya dakṣiṇa pārśve tu vinyaset agurum budhaḥ dadyāt vai paścime bhāge śrīkhaṃḍam caṃdanam śubham uttare caṃdanam dadyāt raktam dadyāt ca pūrvatas evam vitta anusāreṇa kṛtvā vibhava vistaram kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu saptamyām bhāska rasya nivedayet tejasā ravi saṃkāśaḥ prabhayā arka sama prabhaḥ pāṃsunā krīḍamānaḥ yaḥ kuryāt vyoma hi akāryataḥ sa rājan bhavate rājā parvateṣu samaṃtataḥ sarveṣām eva pātrāṇām param pātram vibhāvasuḥ etat saṃtārayet yasmāt atīva naraka arṇavāt tasya pātrasya māhātmyam dhruvam akṣayam ādiśet ravau dattam hutam japtam balim pūjām nivedayet ananta phalam ādiṣṭam brahma ādi sura sattamaiḥ bhaktyā vitta anusāreṇa yaḥ kuryāt ālayam raveḥ vitta śāṭhyena yaḥ kuryāt vittavān api mānavaḥ na sa phalam avāpnoti pralobha ākrāṃta mānasaḥ bhāga dvayam ca dharma arthe anityam jīvanam yatas yat mayā koṭi guṇitam kṛtam syāt iṣṭa kāmyayā dvi parārdha guṇam puṇyam śailaje api viduḥ budhāḥ mṛd śailena samam jñeyam puṇyam āḍhya daridrayoḥ śaila uttham iṣṭakābhiḥ vā dṛḍham dāru mayam śubham gairikam yānam āruhya yaḥ kuryāt hṛta bhūṣaṇaḥ krīḍamānaḥ api yaḥ kuryāt bāla bhāve arka maṃdiram puṣpa mālā ākulam divyam dhūpa gaṃdha ādi vāsitam apsaraḥ gaṇa saṃkīrṇam sarva kāma mukha pradam tatra rūḍhaḥ mahā rāja vatsaram vṛndam uttamam uṣitvā bhāskara pure pūjyamānaḥ tu daivataiḥ dharma artha kāma saṃpannaḥ yaśasā ca narādhipa paśyan pariharan jaṃtūn mārjanyā mṛdu sūkṣmayā śanais saṃmārjanam kuryāt cāṃdrāyaṇa phalam bhavet putra artham deha jīrṇāyāḥ vandhyāyāḥ ca viśeṣataḥ roga ārtānām ca bhūtānām ārogya artham prapūjayet gṛhītvā gomayam svaccham sthāne ca patitam śubhe paśyet tu sukhitān jaṃtūn cāṃdrāyaṇa śatam labhet yaḥ kuryāt sarva kāryāṇi vastra pūtena vāriṇā sa muniḥ sa mahā sādhuḥ sa gacchet paramām gatim kṣaranti sarva dānāni yajña homa bali kriyāḥ akṣaram tu mahā dānam sukha dam sarva dehinām nairaṃtaryeṇa yaḥ kuryāt pakṣam saṃmārjana arcanam varṣam ekam śatam divyam sura loke mahīyate tasya aṃte ca catur veda surūpaḥ priya darśanaḥ ādyaḥ sarva guṇa upetaḥ rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ saṃparkeṇa api yaḥ kuryāt naraḥ karma bhaga ālaye saḥ upi saumanasam gatvā puram krīḍati nityaśas tāvat bhramaṃti saṃsāre duḥkha śoka pariplutāḥ yaḥ kuryāt kuṭṭimām bhūmim darpaṇa udara sannibhām nānā varṇa vicitrām ca vicitra kusuma ujjvalām ramyām manoramām saumyām arka āyatana saṃsadi yāvat daṃḍā bhavet bhūmiḥ samaṃtāt ca su śobhanā kārayet citra śāstra jñaiḥ citra karma arka maṃdire yāvat sa deva rūpāṇi graha rūpāṇi lekhayet bhavet bhūmiḥ samaṃtāt ca yaḥ kuryāt arka maṃdi ram ārāma āvasatha ādīnām labhet āmūlyakam phalam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe sauradharmavarṇanam nāma dviṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ saura dharmeṣu puṣpa pūjā varṇanam snāna kāle prakurvīta jaya śabda ādi maṃga lam hema rūpa ādi pātreṣu kalpitam gomaya ādibhiḥ nānā varṇaka saṃyuktaiḥ akṣataiḥ tila taṃdulaiḥ svacchaiḥ ca dadhi saṃmiśraiḥ yathāśobham prapūritaiḥ dravya pīṭha pradīpāḥ ca bhūta aśvattha ādi pallavaiḥ auṣadhībhiḥ ca medhyābhiḥ sarva bījaiḥ yava ādibhiḥ saptamī ādiṣu sarveṣu ṣaṣṭhī ādiṣu viśeṣataḥ śaṃkha bherī ādibhiḥ kuryāt vādya ghoṣam su śobhanam kuryāt nīrājanam ca eva śaṃkha vāditra maṃgalaiḥ yāvat nīrājanam kuryāt parvāṇi vidhivat ravau snānam daśaguṇam jñeyam mahat puṇyam narādhipa ṛbhavaḥ vīram uddiśya deha śuddhim ca śāśvatīm varṣa koṭi sahasreṇa yat pāpam samupārjitam ghṛta abhyaṃgena sūryasya dahet sarvam na saṃśayaḥ saptamyām ca kṛta snānaḥ yajet sūryam sakṛt naraḥ sakṛt āḍhakena payasā yaḥ bhānum snāpa yet naraḥ snāpya dadhnā sakṛt bhānum sa triloke mahīyate uddhṛtya śāli piṣṭena vāyu lokeṣu pūjyate snānam ikṣu rasena iha yaḥ sūrye sakṛt ācaret śrīkhaṃḍa vāriṇā snāpya sakṛt bhānum narāḥ dhipa caṃdra aṃśu nirmalaḥ śrīmān caret ātreya maṃdire sa sarva kāma tṛpta ātmā rākā adhipa puram vrajet āpaḥ hiṣṭhā iti japyena gaṃgā toyena bhārata snāpya bhānum sakṛt mantraiḥ saptamyām samupoṣitaḥ pitṛn uddiśya yaḥ bhānum snāpayet śīta vāriṇā tṛptāḥ svarga vrajanti āśu pitaraḥ narakāt api bhānum śīta aṃbunā snāpya dhārā uṣṇa payasā saha etat snāna trayam kṛtvā pūjayitvā tu bhārata mṛd kumbhāt tāmra kumbhaiḥ tu snānam śataguṇam matam raupyaiḥ pāda uttaram puṇyam darśanāt sparśanam param sparśanāt arcanam śreṣṭham ghṛta snānam atas param iha amutra kṛtam pāpam ghṛta snānena naśyati sapta janma kṛtam pāpam purāṇa śravaṇena tu daśa aparādhān toyena kṣīreṇa tu śatam kṣamet sahasram kṣamate dadhnā ghṛtena api ayutam kṣamet nairantaryeṇa yaḥ māsam ghṛta snānam samācaret daśa ekādaśa kulāni iha nayet sūryasya maṃdiram snānam pala śatam jñeyam abhyaṃgaḥ pañcaviṃśatiḥ palānām dvi sahasreṇa mahāsnānam ati śrutiḥ ghṛta abhyaṃgam ghṛta snāna bhānoḥ kuryyāt dvijottama yaḥ ca godhūma cūrṇaiḥ tu kaṣāyaiḥ darbha saṃmitaiḥ gaṃdha toyena saṃmiśram udakāt dvādaśa uttaram pañcagavya samāyuktam arghyam śataguṇam nṛpa yoṣṭāṃga garbham āpūrya bhānoḥ mūrdhni nivedayet daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi ramate ca arka maṃdire āpaḥ kṣīram kuśa agrāṇi ghṛtam dadhi tathā madhu raktāni karavīrāṇi tathā raktam ca aṣṭa aṃgaḥ eṣa arghaḥ vai brahmaṇā parikīrtitaḥ tasmāt śataguṇam puṇyam mṛd pātreṇa narādhipa tāmra arghya pātra dānena puṇyam śataguṇam matam pālāśa padma patrābhyām tāmra pātre phalam labhet raupya pātreṇa vijñeyam lakṣa arghyam na atra saṃśayaḥ evam snāna arghya naivedya bali dhūpa ādiṣu kramāt pātra aṃtara viśeṣeṇa tad phalam tu uttarottaram tāmra pātra pradānena tasmāt śataguṇam ravau suvarṇa pātram yaḥ dadyāt bhāskarāya mahīpate na śakyam tasya tat vaktum puṇyam pātra viśeṣataḥ tat anaṃta phalam jñeyam bhaktiḥ eva atra kāraṇam varṣa koṭi śatam divyam sūrya loke mahīyate gaṃdha anulepanam puṇyam dviguṇam candanasya tu gaṃdhāt caturguṇam jñeyam puṣpam aṣṭaguṇam nṛpa kṛṣṇa aguru viśeṣeṇa dviguṇam phalam ādiśeta tasmāt śataguṇam puṇyam kuṃkumasya vidhīyate caṃdana aguru karpūraiḥ ślakṣṇa piṣṭaiḥ sa kuṃkumaiḥ bhānum paryāptam ālipya kalpa koṭim vaset divi bhaktyā nivedya arkāya tālavṛṃtam narādhipa daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi vīra lokam mahīyate māyūram vyajanam dattvā sūryāya atīva śobhanam varṣa koṭi śatam pūrṇam prabhaṃjana pure vaset puṣpaiḥ araṇya saṃbhūtaiḥ patraiḥ vā giri sambhavaiḥ ātma ārāma bhavaiḥ ca eva puṣpaiḥ saṃpūjayet ravim puṣpa jāti viśeṣeṇa bhavet puṇyam tatas adhikam tapaḥ śīla guṇa upetaḥ iti hāsa vidi dvije evam puṣpa viśeṣeṇa phalam tad adhikam bhavet jñeyam puṇyam rasa jñena yathā syāt tat nibodha me sadā puṣpa sahasrebhyaḥ karavīram viśiṣyate kuśa puṣpa sahasrebhyaḥ śamī patram viśiṣyate śamī puṣpa sahasrebhyaḥ nṛpa nīlotpalam param sarvāsām puṣpa jātīnām pravaram nīlam utpalam kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca vaset arka pure śrīmān sūrya tulya parākramaḥ śeṣāṇām puṣpa jātīnām yat phalam parikīrtitam śamī puṣpam bṛhatyāḥ ca kusumam tulyam ucyate śveta maṃdāra kusumam sita puṣpam ca tad samam nala caṃpaka punnāga mudgarāṇām samāḥ smṛtāḥ gaṃdha hīnam api grāhyam pavitram yat kuśa ādikam mudgarāṇi kadaṃbāni rātrau deyāni sūraye divā aśeṣāṇi puṣpāṇi tyajet upahatāni ca alābhe bata puṣpāṇām patrāṇi api nivedayet phalānām api alābhena tṛṇa gulma oṣadhīḥ api oṣadhīnām abhāve tu bhaktyā bhavati pūjitaḥ māgha asite api sumanāḥ saḥ anaṃta phalam aśnute aśoka śveta maṃdāra karṇikāra āṃdhukaiḥ tathā karavīra arka kahlāra śamī tagara kesaraiḥ sa tat phalam avāpnoti tat ekāgra manāḥ śṛṇu sūrya koṭi pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sarva kāmibhiḥ puṣpa mālā parikṣiptaiḥ gīta vāditra nāditaiḥ sūrya kanyā samākīrṇaiḥ devānām ca su durlabhaiḥ dodhūyamānaḥ camaraiḥ stūyamānaḥ sura asuraiḥ saṃpūjya śraddhayā bhānum arka loke mahīyate sūryasya upari yaḥ kuryāt śobhanam puṣpa maṃḍalam śobhitam puṣpa sraj dāmaiḥ āpīṭha antam pralaṃbitaiḥ sarveṣām upariṣṭāt ca vaset arkapure sukhī puṣpetara puram divyam śrayate na atra saṃśayaḥ akṣayam modate kālam a tiraskṛta śāsanaḥ saura ādi sarva lokeṣu yatra iṣṭam tatra yāti saḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmeṣu puṣpapūjāvarṇanam nāma triṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca sumantuḥ uvāca śṛṇu tvam hi mahā rāja sarva dam loka pūjitam brahma īśa upeṃdra devānām trayāṇām api bhārata sukha āsīnam surajyeṣṭham manovatyām caturmukham praṇamya śirasā bhūmau viṣṇu īśau vākyam ūcatuḥ sādhu sādhu jagannātha sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi vām iha svayam utpādya puṣṇāṇi yaḥ sūryam pūjayet svayam tāni sākṣāt pragṛhṇāti tad bhaktyā satatam raviḥ yaḥ tu ārāmam raveḥ kuryāt āmra bilva ādi śobhitam agasti kadalī khaṃḍaiḥ tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu yāvat hi patram kusumam bījam sūta phalāni ca tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi sūra loke mahīyate sa ghṛtam guggulam dadyāt rājan vā kaṃdurum tathā kṛṣṇa agurum ca karpūra dhūpam dadyāt divākare nairaṃtaryeṇa yaḥ tasya rājan puṇya phalam śṛṇu kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca bhuktvā sūryapure bhogān tasya aṃte kṣmādhipaḥ bhavet guggulum ghṛta saṃyuj tam yakṣaḥ gṛhṇāti śabda kṛt kṛṣṇāṃśau kṛṣṇa saptamyām yaḥ sa ājyam guggulum dahet sa ca asau sauram āsādya varṣāṇām ca daśa arbudam devadārum namerum ca śrīvāsam kuṃdurum tathā śrīphalam ca ājya saṃyuktam dagdhvā āśrayam avāpnuyāt evam saugadhikam rūpam ṣaṣ sahasra guṇa uttaram agurum daśa sāhasram sa ghṛtam dviguṇam bhavet anaṃta phala dam devam sadā kuṃduru kāmukam dvi sahasra palānām tu mahiṣākṣasya gugguloḥ śodhayet pāpa saṃyuktam puruṣam na atra saṃśayaḥ kṛṣṇa aguru bhavam dhūpam tuṣa agniḥ iva kāṃcanam kapāṭa dvāra kuḍya ādi tiryak ūrdhvam sa vedikam vāsayet puṣpa mālābhiḥ dhūpaiḥ ca api sugaṃdhibhiḥ āpūrayan diśaḥ sarvāḥ nānā gaṃdha samanvitaiḥ kalpa koṭi śatam divyam tejasā vahni sannibhaḥ śata āvṛtam tu yaḥ kuryāt evam gandhaiḥ bhaga ālayam sūrya loke vaset devaḥ yuvābhyām jitaḥ tadvat śuklaiḥ ca saṃvītam paṭṭasūtraiḥ vinirmitam dattvā upavītam sūryāya bhavet vedāṃga pāragaḥ vāsāṃsi su vicitrāṇi sūra loke mahīyate truṭi mātram tu yaḥ dadyāt ūrṇā vastram sa paṃkajam bhāskarasya uttamāṃgeṣu tasya puṇyam bravīmi aham indrasya ardhāsane tiṣṭhet yāvat rindrāḥ caturdaśa evam vitta anusāreṇa sarvam jñeyam samāsatas sarveṣām hema pātrāṇām mukuṭānām ca sarvaśas arka patra puṭam cūrṇam madhuparṇa samanvitam śāli taṃḍula prasthasya kuryāt annam su saṃskatam sūryāya ca carum dattvā saptamyām tu viśeṣataḥ saṃyāvam kṛśaram pūpam pāyasam yāvakam tathā dadhi odana rasa āla anna modakān guḍa pūpakān yāvaṃtaḥ taṇḍulāḥ tasmin naivedye parisaṃkhyayā tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi sūra loke mahīyate guḍa khaṃḍa kṛtānām ca bhakṣyāṇām vinivedane ghṛtena plāvitānām ca phalam śataguṇam labhet rasāla khādyaka ādyānām bhakṣyāṇām phalam iṣyate yathā kāla upalabdhāni bhakṣyāṇi vividhāni ca nivedya arkāya paramam sthānam prāpnoti pūjanāt prajvālya ghṛta dīpam tu bhāskarasya ālaye śubham yaḥ kuryāt kārtike māsi śobhanām dīpa mālikām saptamyām atha ṣaṣṭhyām vā amāvāsyāyām atha api vā bhāskara ayuta saṃkāśaḥ tejasā bhāsayan diśaḥ divya ābharaṇa saṃpannaḥ kulam uddhṛtya sarvaśas yāvat pradīpa saṃkhyānam ghṛtena āpūrya bodhitam tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate pūrvasmāt dviguṇam puṇyam labhate na atra saṃśayaḥ dīpa vṛkṣam samudbodhya bhāskara āyataneṣu bhoḥ śirasā dhārayet dīpam bhāskarasya agratas niśi bhāskara ayuta saṃkāśaḥ vimānaiḥ arka sannibhaiḥ anna dātā tu yaḥ vīra vīra loke mahī yate bhāskarasya agratas dattvā darpaṇam nirmalam śubham paryaṃke śobhitam kṛtvā śveta mālyaiḥ sa candanaiḥ vṛka arka nirmalaḥ śrīmān divya ābharaṇa rūpadhṛk kṛtvā pradakṣiṇam bhaktyā śraddadhānaḥ raveḥ naraḥ kṛtvā pradakṣiṇam yaḥ tu namaskāram prayojayet rājasūya aśvamedhābhyām sakalam vindate phalam namaskāraḥ smṛtaḥ yajñaḥ sarva yajña uttama uttamaḥ namaskṛtvā sahasrāṃśum aśvamedha phalam labhet sa yām gatim avāpnoti na tām kratu śataiḥ api abhijñāpya upahāreṇa pūjayā phalam aśnute śvetam mahā dhvajam kṛtvā kṛtvā cāpam ca raṃgakam kiṃkiṇī jāla nirghoṣam mayūra chatra bhūṣitam sa śatena vimānānām sarva deva namaskṛtaḥ dhvaja mālā ākulam kuryāt yaḥ prāṃteṣu bhaga ālayam mahā dhvaja aṣṭakam ca api diś vidikṣu nivedayet śata candra aṃśu vimalam muktā dāma upaśobhitam maṇi daṃḍa mayam chatram dadyāt vā kāṃcana ādikam sa dhāryamāṇa chatreṇa hema daṃḍa upaśobhinā yaḥ śṛṃkhalā samāyuktām mahā ghaṇṭām mahā svanām kāṃsya loha mayīm vā api nibadhnīyāt bhagālaye śobhanaḥ syāt naraḥ śrīmān bhagasya atīva vallabhaḥ bherī mṛdaṃga paṭaha jharjharī mardala ādikam daśa kāṃsya ādi vāditram yaḥ bhagāya nivedayet sa vimānaiḥ mahābhāgeḥ vaṃśa vīṇā ayuta svanaiḥ su saṃgītaka dānena sa vādyena viśeṣataḥ yathā iṣṭam bhāskare loke modate kālam akṣayam mahā mahā svanam dattvā śaṃkha yugmam bhaga ālaye vimānam bahu varṇa ābham madhye paṃkaja bhūṣitam kiṃkiṇī jāla saṃpannam varṇakaiḥ ca upaśobhitam puṣpa mālā prabham vā api ghaṃṭā cāmara bhūṣitam dukūla paṭṭa deva aṃgaiḥ vastraiḥ vā varṇaka anvitaiḥ paṭṭa ādi vastra taṃtūnām parisaṃkhyā tu yā bhavet bhaga āhutyā jagat sarvam sṛṣṭi dvāreṇa dhāryate bhagam uddiśya rāja iṃdra sa yāti paramām gatim puṣpa dhūpa jala upetam kāle kāle viśeṣataḥ mahāśveta ādi mātṛrṇām tri kalpānām ca sarvaśas yaḥ kṛtvā sakṛt api evam sarva dikṣu balim haret sa naraḥ ca sahasrāṇi śāṃḍileya pure vaset saura saṃdhyā balim kṛtvā dina aṃte satatam raveḥ varṣa ayuta śatam sāgram bhaga loke mahīyate dadhi odana payobhiḥ yaḥ pūritam pātram āvṛtam puṣpa dhūpa arcitam ca eva vitāna upari śobhitam śirasā dhārayet pātram śanais gacchet pradakṣiṇam ravi āyatana paryante śaṃkha vīṇā ādi nisvanaiḥ darpaṇaiḥ dhūpa mālābhiḥ geya nṛtya ādi śobhitam bhānoḥ hi smṛti śīlaḥ ca tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu divyam varṣa sahasram tu divyam varṣa śatam tathā kṛṣṇām tu ṣaṣṭhīm naktena yaḥ ca kṛṣṇām ca saptamīm devaiḥ tu bhuktam madhyāhne pūrvāhṇe ṛṣibhiḥ tathā aparāhṇe tu pitṛbhiḥ saṃdhyāyām guhyaka ādibhiḥ sarvāḥ velāḥ hi atikramya saurāṇām bhojanam param bhuṃjānaḥ nakta kāle tu sūrya bhakti parāyaṇaḥ haviṣya bhojanam snānam āhārasya ca lāghavam agnikāryam adhaḥśayyām nakta bhojī samācaret kṛṣṇa aṣṭamyām prayatnena kṛtvā naktam vidhānataḥ naraḥ mārgaśire māsi aṃśumān iti pūjayeta vidhivat prāśya go mūtram anāhāraḥ niśi svapet puṣye pi evam sahasrāṃśum bhānumaṃtam uśaṃti ca vājapeya phalam prāpya ghṛtam prāśya labhet naraḥ māghe divākaram nāma kṛṣṇa ṣaṣṭhyām narottama niśi pītvā tu go kṣīram gomedha phalam āpnuyāt mārtaṃḍam phālgune māsi pūjayitvā gavām payaḥ haviṣya āśī sūrya loke apsarobhiḥ saha modate vaiśākhe caṇḍakiraṇam pūjayet ca payovrataḥ varṣāṇām ayutam sāgram modate sūrya saṃnidhau jyeṣṭhe divaspatim pūjya gavām śṛṃgodakam pibet gavām koṭi pradānasya nikhilam phalam ā pnuyāt āṣāḍhe tu arka nāmānam iṣṭvā prāśya ca gomayam prayāti arka sa lokam tu varṣāṇām ca śatam śatam śrāvaṇe aryama nāmānam pūjayitvā payaḥ pibet varṣāṇām ayutam sāgram modate bhāskara ālaye māsi bhādrapade ṣaṣṭhyām bhāskaram nāma pūjayet māsi ca āśvayuje ṣaṣṭhyām bhaga ākhyam nāma pūjayet māse tu kārtike ṣaṣṭhyām śakra ākhyam nāma pūjayet dūrvā aṃkuram sakṛt prāśya rājasūya phalam labhet varṣa ante bhojayet viprān sūrya bhakti parāyaṇān śaktyā hiraṇya vāsāṃsi bhaktyā tebhyaḥ nivedayet nivedayet ca sūryāya kṛṣṇām gām ca payasvinīm kṛṣṇaṣaṣṭhīvratam bhaktyā tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu modate sūrya loke tu sa naraḥ śāśvatīḥ samāḥ puṇyeṣu ahaḥsu sarveṣu viṣuvat grahaṇa ādiṣu dāna upavāsa homa ādyaiḥ akṣayam khaga jāyate sumantuḥ uvāca iti uktavān purā bhānuḥ aruṇāya viśām pate kṛṣṇaṣaṣṭhīvratam puṇyam sarva pāpa bhaya apaham kṛtvā idam puruṣaḥ bhaktyā bhāskarasya mahātmanaḥ prayāti paramam sthānam bhānoḥ amita tejasaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhmeparvaṇi saptamīkalpe sūryaṣaṣṭhīvratavarṇanam nāma catuḥṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumantuḥ uvāca dharma kāma artha mokṣāṇām pratipādanam uttamam jita iṃdriyaḥ satya vādī śāli godhūma gorasaiḥ pakṣayoḥ saptamīm yatnāt upavāsena yāpayet trisaṃdhyam arcayet bhānum śāṃḍileyam ca suvrata māsi pūrṇe tu saptamyām ghṛta ādibhiḥ ariṃdama kṛtvā snānam mahā pūjām sūryadevasya bhojayet ca dvijān aṣṭau bhaga arcā śubha lakṣaṇām gām ca dattvā mahā rāja kapilām bhāskarāya tu sūrya koṭi pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ apsaraḥ gaṇa saṃkīrṇaiḥ mahā vibhava saṃyutaiḥ saṃgīta nṛtya vādya ādyaiḥ gaṃdharva gaṇa śobhitaiḥ dodhūyamānaḥ camaraiḥ stūyamānaḥ sura asuraiḥ sahasra kiraṇa ābhāsaḥ sauraiḥ sūrya samanvitaiḥ sa yāti paramam sthānam yatra āste raviḥ aṃśumān roma saṃkhyā tu yā tasyāḥ tad prasūtiḥ kuleṣu ca yogāt duḥkhāntam āpnoti jñāna yogam pravartate iti evam te samākhyātam bhava arṇava vyapohanam saura mokṣa krama upāyam sūra āśraya niṣevaṇam piṇyākam ghṛta saṃyuktam bhuṃjānaḥ sa jita indriyaḥ sa upavāsaḥ ca saptamyām bhavet ubhaya pakṣayoḥ ghṛta abhiṣekam aṣṭamyām kuryāt bhānoḥ narādhipa gām ca dayāt dineśāya taruṇīm nīla saṃnibhām indranīla pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ śikhi saṃyutaiḥ śyāmāka kṣīra nīvāraiḥ jita krodhaḥ jita indriyaḥ ṣaṣṭhyām vā api atha saptamyām upavāsa paraḥ naraḥ aṣṭamyām tu mahāsnānam pañcagavya ghṛta ādibhiḥ valmīka ja ādi mṛdbhiḥ ca go mūtra śakṛt ādibhiḥ tvagbhiḥ ca kṣīravṛkṣāṇām snāpayitvā pramārjayet saurabheyīm tatas dadyāt rakta ābhām rakta māline padmarāga pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ hasti saṃyutaiḥ gatvā āditya puram ramyam modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ śāli annam pāyasaiḥ yuktam bhuñjānaḥ ca jita indriyaḥ bhānave pāṭalām dadyāt vaiṣṇavīm taruṇīm nṛpa puṣparāga prabhaiḥ yānaiḥ nānā haṃsa ādi yāyibhiḥ gacchet sūryapuram ramyam modate śāśvatīḥ samāḥ vaiśākhe vīra māse tu yaḥ kuryāt naktabhojanam sūrye khaṃḍa ājya saṃmiśram sakṛt dadyāt nivedanam gām ca dadyāt mahā rāja bhāskarāya śubha ānana sāmānyam ca vidhim kuryāt prayuktaḥ yaḥ mayā tava śuddha sphaṭika saṃkāśaiḥ yānaiḥ barhiṇa vāhanaiḥ saṃprāpte śrāvaṇe māsi yaḥ kuryāt naktabhojanam kṣīra ṣaṣṭika bhaktena sarva sattva hite rataḥ pīta varṇām ca gām dadyāt bhāskarāya mahātmane sāmānyam akhilam kuryāt vidhānam yat prakīrtitam sa vicitraiḥ mahā yānaiḥ haṃsa sārasa gāmibhiḥ gatvā ādityapuram śrīmān pūrva uktam labhate phalam huta śeṣa haviṣya āśī vṛkṣa mūlam upāśritaḥ svapyāt āyatane rātrau sarva bhūta anukampakaḥ dadyāt gām rohiṇīm śreṣṭhām bhāskarāya mahātmane cakravāka samāyuktaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ modate sa mahābhāgaḥ yāvadā bhūtasaṃplavam śrīmān āśvayuje māsi yaḥ kuryāt naktabhojanam dadyāt gām padma varṇa ābhām bhānave amita tejase divya ābharaṇa saṃpannām taruṇīm ca payasvinīm svasti mauktika saṃkāśaiḥ iṃdranīla upaśobhitaiḥ jīvaḥ jīvaka saṃyukta vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ divākarāya gām dadyāt jvalana arka sama prabhām mahāsiṃha kṛta āropaiḥ sūrya vat modate sukhī mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi yaḥ kuryāt naktabhojanam yat ca annam payasā yuktam bhuñjānaḥ sa jita indriyaḥ prayacchet gām tathā raktām nānā alaṃkāra bhūṣitām sūryāya kuru śārdūla vidhim ca api samācaret sita padma nibhaiḥ yānaiḥ śveta aśva ratha saṃyutaiḥ ahiṃsā satya vacanam asteyam kṣāṃtiḥ ārjavam triṣavaṇa agnihavanam bhū śayyā naktabhojanam etān guṇān samāśritya kurvāṇaḥ vratam utta mam iti evamādīn niyamān caret sūryavratī sadā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe ubhayasaptamīvarṇanam nāma paṃcaṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sūryabhaktā tu yā nārī dhruvam sā puruṣaḥ bhavet strī putram uttamam sā ced kāṃkṣate śṛṇu tat vratam nikṣubha arka ākhyam ākhyātam sadā prīti vivardhanam saptamyām atha ṣaṣṭhyām vā saṃkrāṃtau ca raveḥ dine haviṣā haviḥ homam tu sa upavāsaḥ samācaret nikṣubhām kāṃsya niṣpannām kṛtvā svarṇa mayīm śubhām rājatīm vā atha vā varṣam snāpayet ca ghṛta ādibhiḥ gaṃdha mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtya vastra yu gmaiḥ ca śobhanaiḥ bhakṣya bhojyaiḥ aśeṣaiḥ ca vitāna dhvaja cāmaraiḥ bhojayet sūrya bhaktān ca śukla vastra avaguṇṭhitān kṛtvā śirasi tat pātram vitāna chatra śobhitam tad piṃḍyām sthāpayet pātram upaśobhā samanvitam pradakṣiṇīkṛtya ravim praṇipatya kṣamāpayet samāpya tat vratam puṇyam śṛṇuyāt pha lam aśnute yathā iṣṭam bhānave loke sauraiḥ sārdham pramodate varṣa koṭi sahasrāṇi varṣa koṭi śatāni ca naṃdate asau mahābhāga viṣṇu loke mahīyate brahma lokam samāsādya param sukham avāpnuyāt brahma lokāt paribhraṣṭaḥ śrīmān sura su pūjitaḥ yāvat nā āpnoti maraṇam tāvat bhramati karmaṇā su nirvedāt sa vairāgyam vairāgyāt jñāna saṃbhavaḥ jñānāt pravartate yogaḥ yogāt duḥkhāṃtam āpnuyāt iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme nikṣubhāvratavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumantuḥ uvāca ṣaṣṭhyām ca api atha saptamyām niyatā brahmacāriṇī varṣam ekam na bhuṃkte yā mahābhāga jigīṣayā pratimām kṛtvā nikṣubhāṃkā iti viśrutām snāna ādyam ca vidhim kṛtvā pūrva uktam labhate guṇam jāṃbūnada mayaiḥ yānaiḥ catur dvāraiḥ alaṃkṛte kramāt āgatya loke asmin rājānam patim āpnuyāt yā nārī upavaset evam kṛṣṇām ekām tu saptamīm varṣa aṃte pratimām kṛtvā śāli piṣṭa mayīm śubhām pīta anulepanaiḥ mālyaiḥ pīta vastraiḥ ca pūjayet pūrva uktam akhilam kṛtvā bhāskarāya nivedayet sapta bhīmaiḥ mahā yānaiḥ daṃti cāmīkara prabhaiḥ varṣa koṭi śatam sāgram sūrya loke mahīyate kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu saptamyām yā nārī tu dṛḍha vratā varṣa ante sarva gandha āḍhyam nikṣubha arkam nivedayet suvarṇa maṇi muktābhyām bhojayitvā maga aṃganām yathā iṣṭam bhānave loke bhogān bhuktvā tu kṛtsnaśas evam yā kurute rājan vratam pāpa bhaya apaham nikṣubha arkam idam puṇyam sā yāti paramam padam varṣam ekam mahā bāho śraddhayā parayā anvitaḥ varṣa aṃte vai bhojayet vīra dāṃpatyam bhojakeṣu vai bhojayitvā tu dāṃpatyam bhogakānām mahā balaiḥ kṛtvā tāmra maye pātre vajra pūrṇaiḥ alaṃkṛtam nikṣubha arkam tu sauvarṇam dattvā tābhyām tu śaktitas iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharmeṣu nikṣubhārkavratam nāma saptaṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumantuḥ uvāca eka bhaktena yā nārī kārttikam kṣapayet nṛpa kṣamā hiṃsā ādi niyamaiḥ saṃyatā brahmacāriṇī guḍa ājya miśram śāli annam bhāskarāya nivedayet pakṣayoḥ ubhayoḥ tāta śradayā parayā anvitā puṣpāṇām karavīrāṇām guggulam sa ājyam ādiśet saptamyām tāta ṣaṣṭhyām vai upavāsa ratiḥ bhavet iṃdranīla pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ varṣa ayuta śatam sāgram sūra loke mahīyate kṣamā satyam dayā dānam śaucam iṃdriya nigrahaḥ sūrya pūjā agni havanam saṃtoṣaḥ steya varjanam sarva vrateṣu ayam dharmaḥ sāmānyaḥ daśadhā smṛtaḥ niḥśeṣam aham vakṣyāmi māsāt māsavratam prati mārgaśīrṣe śubhe māsi vyoma pṛṣṭhe vinirmitam tāmra pātra ādikaiḥ ca eva api apsaraḥ gaṇa sevitaiḥ sarva deva kadaṃbeṣu saṃprāpya vimalām śriyam kramāt āgatya loke asmin rājānam patim āpnuyāt tāmra pātra ādi kāṃsyam vā kṛtvā tatra nivedayet mahā puṣpaka yānena divya gaṃdha pravāhinā saṃprāpya etam kramāt lokam yathā iṣṭam vidate patim māghe ratham aśvayujam dīpa mālya vibhūṣitam piṣṭa sānu samāḥ yuktam kṛtvā āyatanam ānayet mahā ratha upamaiḥ yānaiḥ śveta aśva vara saṃyutaiḥ varṣa ayuta śatam sāgram sūrya loke mahīyate sarva amarāṇām lokeṣu prāpya bhogān yathā īpsitān kramāt āgatya loke asmin yatheṣṭam patim āpnuyāt pratimām phālgune māsi kṛtvā piṣṭa mayī raveḥ gaṃdha mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtya sthāpayet bhāskarāḥ laye punar etya imam lokam yathā iṣṭam viṃdate patim kṛtvā aruṇam tathā caitre gaṃdha mālya upaśobhitam śarad iṃdu pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ varṣa ayuta śatam sāgram sūrya loke mahīyate abhīṣṭam patim āsādya labhet bhogān su durlabhān taṃḍula āḍhaka piṣṭena kṛtvā vai meru parvatam nikṣubha arka samāyuktam sarva dhātu vibhūṣitam nānā alaṃkāra saṃpannam nānā mālya vibhūṣitam nānāvidhaiḥ ca yānaiḥ tu sūrya loke mahīyate saura ādi sarva lokeṣu bhuktvā bhogān aśeṣatas kramāt āgatya loke asmin rājānam patim āpnuyāt dvitīyam ca tathā padmam āṣāḍhe piṣṭam uttamam sarva bīja rasaiḥ pūrṇam kṛtvā tu śubhra lakṣaṇam nānā keśara gaṃdha āḍhayam sarva ratna vibhūṣitam varṣa koṭi śatam sāgram sūrya loke mahīyate prāptā tu sarva bhoga āḍhayam taruṇam viṃdate patim svacchaṃda gāmibhiḥ yānaiḥ nānā varṇa vibhūṣitaiḥ varṣa koṭi śatam sāgram sūrya loke mahīyate saṃprāpya vividhān bhogān bahu āścarya samanvitān kramāt lokam imam prāpya rājānam viṃdate patim kṛtvā bhādrapade māsi vyoma śāli mayam nṛpa vitāna dhvaja chatra āḍhyam nānā mālā vibhūṣitam varṣa koṭi sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate saṃprāpya vividhān bhogān sarvān nimiṣa saṃbhavān kramāt āgatya loke asmin rājānam viṃdate patim kṛtvā ca āśvayuje māsi vipulam dhānya parvatam suvarṇa vastra gaṃdha āḍhyam bhāskarāya nivedayet varṣa koṭi sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate asmin loke ca ā saṃprāptā rājānam viṃdate patim candra agni bhāskarāṇām tu kāṃti tejaḥ prabhā anvitam yaṃ yam kāmam samuddiśya nara nārī napuṃsakāḥ pūjayanti ravim bhaktyā tat sarvam prāpnuvaṃti hi iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharmeṣu kāmapradastrīvratavarṇanam nāma aṣṭa ṣaṣṭi uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sumantuḥ uvāca mṛd mayam dāru jam śailam pakva iṣṭakam atha api vā kṛtvā maṭham gṛham vā api yathā vibho va saṃbhavāt sūryāya ittham gṛham dadyāt sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt kṛtvā eka bhaktam hemaṃte māgha māsa matam dritaḥ śvetaiḥ caturbhiḥ saṃyuktam turagaiḥ samalaṃkṛtam śveta dhvaja patākābhiḥ chatra cāmara darpaṇaiḥ taṃḍula āḍhaka piṣṭena kṛtvā bhānum narādhipa tam rātrau rājamārgeṇa śaṃkha bherī ādi nisvanaiḥ bhramayitvā śanais paścāt sūryāyatanam āviśet tatra jāgara pūjābhiḥ pradīpa āvali śobhitaiḥ prekṣaṇīyaiḥ pradānaiḥ ca kṣapayitvā śanais kṣapām prabhāte snapanam kṛtvā madhu kṣīra ghṛtena ca dīna andha kṛpaṇebhyaḥ annam yathāśaktyā ca dakṣiṇām ratham saṃvāhana upetam bhāskarāya nivedayet bhuktvā ca bāṃdhavaiḥ sārdham praṇamya arka gṛham vrajet sarva vratānām pravaram maṃtra dharma anvitaḥ sadā sūrya ayuta pratīkāśaiḥ vimānaiḥ sārvakāmikaiḥ kalpa ayuta śatam sāgram tatas rājā bhavet kṣitau paṃca bali samāyuktam mṛdu ṣaṣ vāstu kalpitam sarva upakaraṇa upetam sūryam saṃjñām prakalpayet saṃjñādevī samāyuktam paiṣṭa āśā āḍhyam nivedayet saura jñāna artha tattva jñam ācāryam udaya anvitam saṃpūjya gaṃdha puṣpa ādyaiḥ vastra alaṃkāra cāmaraiḥ bhakṣya bhojyaiḥ aśeṣaiḥ ca tatas śayyām nivedayet tad ūrṇā tūla vastrāṇām parisaṃkhyā tu yāvatī tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi sūrya loke mahīyate sura ādi sarva lokeṣu bhuktvā bhogān aśeṣatas kāmāt āgatya loke asmin rājā bhavati dhārmikaḥ daśa gobhiḥ saha vṛṣam tāḥ vṛṣa ekādaśāḥ smṛtāḥ sūryāya vinivedya iha yat phalam labhate śṛṇu dvādaśa āditya tulya ātmā aṇima ādi guṇaiḥ yutaḥ sa vṛṣam go śatam dattvā bhāskarāya narādhipa triḥsapta kula jaiḥ sārdham śṛṇu yat phalam āpnuyāt vara koṭi pratīkāśaiḥ sarva kāma samanvitaiḥ mahāyānaiḥ asaṃkhyeyaiḥ amara asura pūjitaiḥ dvādaśa āditya saṃkāśaḥ divākaraḥ iva aparaḥ gatvā āditya puram ramyam krīḍate sūrya maṃḍape moha kaṃcukam utsṛjya viśati āditya maṃḍale sarvajñaḥ sūra paramaḥ śuddhaḥ sva ātmani avasthitaḥ sarvagaḥ paripūrṇa tvāt sūrya vat dīptimān bhavet yaḥ dadyāt ubhaya mukhīm saurabheyīm divākare sapta dvīpām mahīm dattvā yat phalam tat avāpnuyāt pāda dvayam śiraḥ ardham ca sa śaila vana kānanā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe godānavarṇanam nāma saptati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bhojaka bhojana anuṣṭhāna varṇanam śatānīkaḥ uvāca magānām brūhi me dharmam samāsa vyāsa yogataḥ sumantuḥ uvāca yaḥ eṣa dharmaḥ sūrya iti tava ākhyātaḥ mayā anagha sarveṣām eva varṇānām maga dharma niṣevaṇam brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyāḥ vaiśyāḥ strī śūdraḥ vā magāśramī yaḥ pūjayati mārtaṃḍam sa yāti paramām gatim kuryāt magaḥ mahā bāho mukham āvṛtya yatnataḥ a saṃpūjya ravim mohāt na bhuṃjīta kadācana eṣa dharmaḥ paraḥ jñeyaḥ śeṣaḥ bhavati mānavaḥ a pūjayitvā bhuṃjānaḥ viṣṭhām bhuṅkte ca vai magaḥ devam samāśritaiḥ pūjā kartavyā iyam tribhiḥ sadā manasā pūjayet yogī puṣpaiḥ ca araṇya saṃbhavaiḥ deva artha puṣpa hiṃsāyām na bhavet tasya hiṃsakaḥ magī maithuna varjyaḥ syāt śrīmān gṛha maga āśramī deva arthe pacanam yeṣām saṃtāna artham tu maithunam arthaḥ dāna artham uddiṣṭaḥ narakam hi viparyayāt jīva tṛtīya bhāge api na prakurvīta vā arcanam vācaḥ arthe brahmacārī yaḥ sūrya pūjā agni tatparaḥ bhavet jita iṃdriyaḥ śāṃtaḥ naiṣṭhikaḥ vā sarva gaṃdha vinirmuktaḥ kaṃda mūla phala aśanaḥ mama vaikhānasaḥ jñeyaḥ sūrya pūjā agni tatparaḥ nivṛttaḥ saṃgamebhyaḥ tu sūrya dhyāna rataḥ sadā jñeyaḥ pūjā niṣṭhaḥ jita iṃdriyaḥ muṃḍa upanayanaḥ vyaṃgī śukla vāsaḥ samanvitaḥ atha avyaṃgaḥ mahā rāja dhārayet yaḥ tu bhojakaḥ dhvaṃsanam sarva duṣṭānām sarva pāpa bhaya apaham dṛṣṭi pūtam nyaset pādam satya pūtam vacaḥ vadet saura dhyāna ratāḥ śāṃtāḥ saura dharma parāyaṇāḥ sarve eva āśramāḥ jñeyāḥ bhāskara aṃga samudbhavāḥ bhojaka aṣṭavratam dhāryam raviṇā uktam anaupamam saura bhakte sadā kṣāṃtiḥ ahiṃsā sarvadā śamaḥ saṃtoṣaḥ satyam asteyam brahmacaryam tathā aṣṭamam yathā saṃbhava pūjābhiḥ karmaṇā manasā girā saura bhaktiḥ sadā kāryā bhojakeṣu viśeṣataḥ sva dehāt nirviśeṣam hi bhojakān pālayet budhaḥ bhaya dāridrya rogebhyaḥ teṣām kuryāt priyāṇi vai sūryasya paripūrṇasya kim nāma kriyate naraiḥ yat kṛtam bhojakānām vai tat kṛtam syāt raveḥ nṛpa su dūram api gaṃtavyam magānām yatra vai gaṇaḥ ājñām kṛtvā yathānyāyam aśvamedha phalam labhet deva āśrama gataḥ bhaktyā deva arcām pūjayet nṛpa bhojayitvā yathānyāyam sūrya loke mahīyate dattvā sthānam tathā śaucam vāruṇam lokam āpnuyāt śveta biṃdu parīta aṃgam dhyāna śrama vikarśitam saṃvījya tālavṛṃttena vāyu loke mahīyate kṣudh pipāsā āturam śrāṃtam malinam rogiṇam tathā pālayitvā yathā śaktyā sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt patita aśasta saṃkīrṇa caṃḍāla ādīnām pakṣiṇām kāruṇyāt sarva bhūtānām deyam annam sva śaktitaḥ ati alpam api kāruṇyāt dattam bhavati ca akṣayam tasmāt sarveṣu bhūteṣu deva kāruṇyam ucyate abhāve tṛṇa bhūmi annam patram dhana phalāni ca dattvā a gatāya praṇataḥ svargam yāti priyeṇa vā na hi īdṛś svarga yānāya yathā loke priyam vacaḥ iha amutra sukham teṣām vāc yeṣām madhurā bhavet amṛta syaṃdinī vācam caṃdana sparśa śītalām alam dānena rāja iṃdra pūjayā adhyāpanena vā pūjā abhibhāṣaṇam dṛṣṭiḥ pratyekam svarga hetavaḥ saṃpṛcchet idam āgatam bhaktyā kuśalam praśnam ādarāt gamane tasya vaktavyam paṃthānaḥ saṃtu te śivāḥ āśīrvādam idam vākyam sarva kāleṣu sarvadā namaskāra ādi vākyeṣu svasti maṃgala vādane evamādi ca vā ācāram anuṣṭhāya sat āśramī aśeṣa pāpa nirmuktaḥ sūrya loke mahīyate ākruṣṭe tāḍite vā api yaḥ na ākrośet na tāḍayet vākyāt adhikṛtaḥ svasthaḥ sa duḥkhāt parimucyate sarveṣām eva tīrthānām kṣāṃtiḥ parama pūjitā tasmāt pūrva prayatnena kṣāṃtiḥ kāryā kriyāsu vai jñāna yoga tapaḥ yasya yajña dānāni satkriyā marma asthi prāṇa hṛdayam nirdahet apriyaṃvacaḥ na vacaḥ hi apriyam tasmāt bhojakeṣu viśeṣataḥ kṣamā dānam tviṣaḥ satyam kṣamā ahiṃsā arka saṃbhavāḥ sumantuḥ uvāca punar śṛṇu mahā rāja dharmam āditya saṃmatam kvacid gacchan yadā paśyet sūrya arcā saṃprapūjanam yatra pūjā tatas gacchan sa sūryaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ snāna naivedya vastraiḥ ca nānā alaṃkāra bhūṣaṇaiḥ yathāvibhavam āśritya namaskāra ādi saṃstavaiḥ dṛṣṭvā āyatanam ākramya namaskṛtya ravim vrajet upaśrutya avanim gatvā bhojakam pūjayet budhaḥ ratha aśva gaja yānebhyaḥ hi avatīrya magāt nṛpa magānām bhojanam bhaktyā śaktyā dānam prakalpayet daśa pūrvān daśa parān ātmanā saha bhārata pitaraḥ sarva devānām sūryam āśritya saṃsthitāḥ prīte sūrye tu te sarve prītāḥ syuḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ yaḥ paśyati prasanna ātmā yaḥ na dveṣṭi na kāṃkṣati śabda ādīnām tu saṃbhogam sa vijñeyaḥ jita iṃdriyaḥ jñāna vijñāna sampannaḥ sūrya bhaktyā samanvitaḥ sūrya dharmāt bhavet jñānam jñānāt vairāgya saṃbhavaḥ sūrya yogāt ca sarvajñaḥ paripūrṇaḥ su nirvṛtaḥ sarveṣām eva bhūtānām uttamaḥ puruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ puruṣebhyaḥ dvijaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ dvijebhyaḥ graṃtha pāragaḥ jñāna artha koṭi koṭibhyaḥ variṣṭhāḥ yoginaḥ matāḥ yoga jñāḥ yoga niṣṭhāḥ ca pitaraḥ yoga saṃbhavāḥ yaḥ ca dravya kalāpa ātmā dakṣiṇā haviḥ ṛtvijaḥ ṛk yajuḥ sāma yogaiḥ ca deva yajñaḥ prakīrtitaḥ brahmacaryam tapaḥ maunam kṣāṃtiḥ āhāra lāghavam iti etat tapasām rūpam su dhīram paṃca lakṣaṇam yat ca diṣṭam viśiṣṭam ca nyāya prāptam ca yat bhaveta vivardhanīm sahasrāṇām sarva sasya prarohiṇīm dadyāt bhūmim jala upetām bhūmidānam tat ucyate eka chatrām mahīm kṛtvā dvijebhyaḥ pratipādayet saṃpūrṇām parvata araṇyaiḥ bhūmi dānam tat ucyate kanyām alaṃkṛtām dadyāt adhanāya narādhipā sarva doṣa vinirmuktām kula yogyām alaṃkṛtām madhyama uttama vastrāṇām yaḥ dadyāt ahatāni ca etat samāsatas jñeyam vastra dānasya lakṣaṇam brahma viṣṇu samādhikya kāṃti śīla parāyaṇaḥ ahar rātram na bhuñjīta hi upavāsasya lakṣaṇam catvāriṃśat samāyuktam piṃḍānām hi śata dvayam māse hi adya ayathākāmam idam cādrāyaṇam smṛtam ṛṣibhiḥ sarva śāstra jñaiḥ tapaḥ niṣṭhaiḥ jita iṃdriyaiḥ sūrya avāṃtara sthānāni puṇya kṣetrāṇi nirdiśet mṛtānām teṣu sūrya tvam saura kṣetreṣu dehinām kuryāt udyānam āvasatha tīrtheṣu etāni yaḥ kuryāt saḥ akṣayam labhate phalam kṣāntiḥ spṛhā tathā satyam dānam śīlam tapaḥ śrutam etat aṣṭa aṃgam uddiṣṭam param pātrasya lakṣaṇam yajña upavāsa dānāni ca saṃpūrṇam labhate bhaktyā bhojayitvā tu bhojakān sūre bhaktiḥ kṣamā satyam daśa iṃdriya vinigrahaḥ sūryabhaktam dvijam bhaktyā yaḥ śrāddheṣu ca bhojayet sūryabhaktena yat bhuktam bhānu nāma āśrayam nṛpa tasmāt śrāddhe viśeṣeṇa puṇyeṣu divaseṣu ca a saṃyataḥ saṃyataḥ vā sarva avasthām gataḥ api vā saḥ api yām gatim āpnoti na tām yajña śataiḥ api tasmāt mānyaḥ ca pūjyaḥ ca rakṣaṇīyaḥ ca sarvadā bhojakaḥ kuru śārdūla saureṇa gatim icchatā sūrya vat sa hi draṣṭavyaḥ pūjanīyaḥ ca bhārata saura āśrameṣu vijñeyam tat puṇyam ayuta adhikam ca api rājā bhavati bhū tale uddhṛtya śata sāhasram sūrya loke mahīyate dattvā tu lomaśām rājan bhojakāya śubhām bṛhat śaṃkham dadāti yaḥ bhaktyā tathā divye ca pāduke yuga koṭi śatam divyam sūrya loke mahīyate bhavet iha āgataḥ śrīmān sukha āḍhyaḥ vedapāragaḥ yaḥ karoti gṛham bhānoḥ tat sthānam ca uttamam bhavet śobhitam puṣpa patra ādyaiḥ nyaset tatra āsane surāḥ purastāt tasya saṃsthāpya ācāryam pūjayet sadā yaḥ evam nyāyataḥ vakti saura dharmam śṛṇoti ca āyuḥ vidyām yaśaḥ kīrtim upalabhya ravim japet śatānīkaḥ uvāca sādhu sādhu mahā bāho sādhu pṛṣṭaḥ asmi bhārata kīrtayāmi atha tam puṇyam saṃvādam pāpa nāśanam garuḍa aruṇayoḥ rājan purāvṛttam narādhipa sukha āsīnam purā rājan aruṇam sūrya sārathim dharmāṇām uttamam dharmam sarva pāpa praṇāśanam saura dharmam khaga śreṣṭha brūhi me kṛtsnaśas anagha aruṇaḥ uvāca śṛṇu tvam kīrtayāmi eṣa sukha upāyam mahat phalam ajñāna arṇava magnānām sarveṣām prāṇinām ayam jarā bhūta mahā grāhe tṛṣṇā velā ākula apare mānuṣyam durlabham prāpya ye arcayaṃti divākaram teṣām hi saphalam janma kṛtārthāḥ te nara uttamāḥ ye smaraṃti sadā sūryam na te duḥkhasya bhāginaḥ vividhāni manojñāni vividha ābharaṇāḥ striyaḥ dhanam vā dṛṣṭa paryaṃtam sūrya pūjā vidheḥ phalam ye vāṃchanti mahā bhogān rājyam vā tridaśāḥ laye saubhāgyam kāṃtim atulām bhogam tyāgam yaśaḥ śriyam saundaryam jagataḥ khyātiḥ kīrtiḥ dharma ādayaḥ smṛtāḥ tasmāt saṃpūjayet sūryam sarva deva gaṇa arcitam lobhaḥ teṣām manuṣyāṇām ye ravim śaraṇam gatāḥ yeṣām iha īśvare bhānau nityam sūrye gatam manaḥ yaḥ evam pūjayet bhānum śraddhayā parayā anvitaḥ mucyate sarva pāpebhyaḥ sa naraḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ ḍākinyaḥ vividha ākārāḥ rākṣasāḥ sa piśācakāḥ na tasya pīḍām kurvaṃti tathā anyāḥ ca vibhīṣaṇāḥ śatravaḥ nāśam āyānti saṃgrāme jayam āpnuyāt na rogaiḥ pīḍyate vīraḥ āpadaḥ na spṛśaṃti tam dhanam āyuḥ yaśaḥ vidyā prabhāvaḥ hi atulam tathā śubhena upacayam yāṃti nityam pūrṇa manorathāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe garuḍa aruṇa saṃvāde sauradharmavarṇanam nāma trisaptati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aruṇaḥ uvāca pūjayitvā ravim bhaktyā brahmā bahma tvam āgataḥ viṣṇu tvam ca api deveśaḥ viṣṣuḥ āpa tad arcanāt śaṃkaraḥ api jagannāthaḥ pūjayitvā divākaram mātaraḥ deva gaṃdharvāḥ piśāca uraga rākṣasāḥ pūjayanti sadā bhānum īśānam sura nāyakam yaḥ na pūjayate sūryam bhāskaram tama sūdanam dharma artha kāma mokṣāṇām na naraḥ bhājanam bhavet tasmāt kāryam hi tat dhyānam yāvajjīvam pratijñayā yaḥ tu saṃtiṣṭhate nityam vinā sūryasya pūjanāt varam prāṇa parityāgaḥ śirasaḥ vā atha chedanam sūryam saṃpūjya bhuñjīta tridaśa īśam divākaram manuṣya carmaṇā naddhaḥ sa raviḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ sūrya bhakta āgamāḥ ca eva sūrya arcana parāyaṇāḥ saṃyatāḥ dharma saṃpannāḥ dharma ādīn sādhayanti te para upakāra niratāḥ guru śuśrūṣaṇe ratāḥ śāṃtā sva aṃta gatā bhadrā nityam svāgata vādinaḥ su alpa vācaḥ su manasaḥ śūrāḥ śāstra viśāradāḥ śauca ācāra su saṃpannāḥ dayā dākṣiṇya gocarāḥ daṃbha matsara nirmuktāḥ tṛṣṇā lobha vivarjitāḥ saṃvibhāga parāḥ proktāḥ na śaṭhāḥ ca api akutsitāḥ viṣayeṣu api nirlepāḥ padma patram iva aṃbhasā na dīnāḥ māninaḥ ca eva na ca roga vaśa anugāḥ bhavanti bhāvitātmānaḥ su snigdhāḥ sādhu sevitāḥ na pāṇi pāda vāc cakṣuḥ śrotra śiśna udare ratāḥ capalāni na kurvaṃti sarva vyāsaṃga varjitāḥ sūrya āsana ratāḥ śāṃtāḥ ṣaḍakṣara manogatāḥ iti ācāra samāyuktāḥ bhavanti bhuvi mānavāḥ pūjanīyaḥ raviḥ nityam guṇeṣu eteṣu vartate sarveṣām eva pātrāṇām atipātram divākaraḥ patantam trāyate yasmāt atīva naraka arṇavāt tasya pātra atipātrasya māhātmyam dānam aṇu api dravyeṇa api hi yaḥ kuryāt naraḥ karma tad ālaye saḥ api deha kṣaye jñānam prāpya śāṃtim avāpnuyāt sarva dvija kadaṃbeṣu kaścid jñānam avāpnuyāt kaścid etat tu me divyam labdhvā jñānam vimuñcati tāvat bhramaṃti saṃsāre duḥkha śoka pariplutāḥ sūryasya ālepanam puṇyam dviguṇam candanasya tu candanāt agurau jñeyam puṇyam aṣṭaguṇa uttaram kṛṣṇa agurau viśeṣeṇa dviguṇam phalam iṣyate tasmāt śataguṇa puṇyam kuṃkumasya vidhīyate sūrya yajña upakaraṇam kṛtvā alpam yadi vā bahu bhāvāt vitta anusāreṇa sūrya loke mahīyate yat api iṣṭam aniṣṭam ca nyāyena ubhayam āgatam karma śāṭhyena yaḥ kuryāt duḥkhena api tad arcanam saḥ api dvijaḥ divam yāti karmaṇā pāpa varjitaḥ sūrya pūjā vidhim kuryāt yaḥ icchet śreyaḥ ātmanaḥ tvaritam jīvitam yāti tvaritam yauvanam tathā yāvat na abhyeti maraṇam yāvat na ākramate jarā ittham vijñāya deveśam pūjayasva divākaram ye bhaktyā devadeveśam sūryam śāṃtam ajam prabhum gopatim pūjayitvā tu prahṛṣṭena aṃtarātmanā kṛta aṃjali puṭaḥ bhūtvā purā brahmā abravīt idam devamārga praṇetāram praṇataḥ asmi ravim sadā śāśvatam śobhanam śuddham citrabhānum divaspatim devadeveśam īśa īśam praṇataḥ asmi divākaram arkam aryamaṇam ca indram viṣṇum īśam divākaram yaḥ idam śṛṇuyāt nityam brahmaṇā uktam stavam param sa hi kīrtim parām prāpya punar sūryapuram vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe garuḍa aruṇa saṃvāde sūryastutiḥ nāma catuḥsaptati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ garuḍaḥ uvāca aribhiḥ pīḍitāḥ ye ca vināyaka hatāḥ ca ye kartavyam kim bhavet teṣām ātmanaḥ śreyase anagha aruṇaḥ uvāca nānā roga hatānām tu arditānām tathā aribhiḥ āditya ārādhanam muktvā na anyat śreyaskaram param tasmāt ārādhayet nityam sarva roga vināśanam graha upaghāta haṃtāram rāja upadrava nāśanam garuḍaḥ uvāca śāpena brahma vādinyāḥ paśya aṃgam dvijasattama evam mattasya me tāta kim kāryam avaśiṣyate yena aham karmaṇā kalpaḥ bhaveyam patravān punar yat kṛtvā kalpa tām prāpya pūjayāmi divākaram aruṇaḥ uvāca pūjayasva jagannātham bhāskaram timira apaham sūrya agni kāryam satatam śuddha cittaḥ samācara mahā śāṃti karam khyātam sarva upadrava nāśanam graha upaghāta haṃtāram śubha kāryaṃkaram param garuḍaḥ uvāca na aham śaktaḥ asmi vai kartum pūjām dinakarasya ca na ca agni kāryam śaknomi kartum vikala tām gataḥ tasmāt me kuru śāṃti artham agni kāryam khaga adhipa mahāśāṃtiḥ iti khyātam śāṃtaye mama suvrata aruṇaḥ uvāca akalpaḥ tvam na śaknoṣi mahā vyādhi prapīḍitaḥ aham karomi te putra śāṃtaye pāvaka arcanam yat kṛtam mama ca arkeṇa purā śāṃti dama ādarāt sarva pāpa haram puṇyam mahā vipra vināśanam mahodayam śātikaram lakṣa homa vidhi smṛtam tṛpti dam sarva devānām bhāskara priyam uttam āgneyyām diśi lipya atha sthaḍilam gomayena tu mahāvyāhṛtibhiḥ vīra lakṣa homam samācaret ārakta deha rūpāya raktākṣāya mahātmane dharādharāya śāntāya sahasra akṣiśirāya ca adhomukhāya śvetāya svāhā pūrva āhutim sṛjet caturmukhāya śāṃtāya padmāsana gatāya ca padma varṇāya vedhāya kamaṇḍalu dharāya ca dvitīya ūrdhva mukhāya iha svāhākāra āhutim sṛjet hema varṇāya dehāya airāvata gatāya ca sahasrākṣa śarīrāya pūrva diśi unmukhāya ca deva adhipāya ca indrāya vihastāya śubhāya ca svāhākāram ca utsṛjet eva tṛtīya vadanāya ca dīptāya vyakta dehāya jvālā mālā ākulāya ca yamāya dharmarājāya dakṣiṇa āśā mukhāya ca kṛṣṇa aṃbara dharāya iha svāhā āhutim an utsṛjet nīla jīmūta varṇāya rakta aṃbara dharāya ca muktāphala śarīrāya piṃga akṣāya mahātmane śukla vastrāya pītāya divya pāśa dharāya ca svāhākārāya ca tathā paścima abhimukhāya ca kṛṣṇa piṃgala netrāya vāyavya abhimukhāya ca nīladhvajāya vīrāya tathā ca indrāya vedhase svāhā iti pavanāya iha āhutim ca utsṛjet budhaḥ gadā hastāya sūryāya citra sraj bhūṣaṇāya ca mahodarāya śāṃtāya svāhā adhipataye tathā śvetāya śveta varṇāya citrākṣāya mahātmane śāṃtāya śāṃta rūpāya pināka vara dhāriṇe īśāna abhimukhāya iha dadyāt īśāya ca āhutim evam devam mahātmānam pāvakam vidhivat khaga lakṣa homam ca vidhivat kṛtvā śāṃtikam ācaret bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar iti svā hā lakṣa homa vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ śāṃti artham sarva lokānām tatas śāṃtikam ācaret sahasrakiraṇaḥ devaḥ sapta aśva ratha vāhanaḥ karotu te mahā śāṃtim graha pīḍā nivāriṇīm tri cakra ratham ārūḍhaḥ apām sāra mayam tu yaḥ daśa aśva vāhanaḥ devaḥ ātreyaḥ ca amṛta sravaḥ śītāṃśuḥ amṛta ātmā ca kṣaya vṛddhi samanvitaḥ somaḥ saumyena bhāvena grahapīḍām vyapohatu aṃgārakaḥ agni sadṛśaḥ graha pīḍām vyapohatu pīta mālya aṃbara dharaḥ budhaḥ pīḍām vyapohatu tapta gairika saṃkāśaḥ sarva śāstra viśāradaḥ bṛhaspatiḥ iti khyāta arthaśāstra paraḥ ca yaḥ śāṃtena cetasā saḥ api pareṇa su samāhitaḥ graha pīḍām vinirjitya karotu tava śāṃtikam hima kuṃda iṃdu varṇa ābhaḥ daitya dānava pūjitaḥ maheśvaraḥ tatas dhīmān mahāsauraḥ mahāmatiḥ sūrya arcana paraḥ nityam śukraḥ śukla nibhaḥ tadā nīti śāstra paraḥ nityam graha pīḍām vyapohatu nānā rūpa dharaḥ vyakta avijñāta gatiḥ ca yaḥ eka cūlaḥ dvi cūlaḥ ca tri śikhaḥ paṃca cūlakaḥ aneka śikharaḥ ketuḥ sa te pīḍām vyapohatu ete grahāḥ mahātmānaḥ sūrya arcana parāḥ sadā śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te hṛṣṭāḥ sadā kālam hita īkṣaṇāḥ sumantuḥ uvāca kamaṇḍalu dharaḥ śrīmān deva gaṃdharva pūjitaḥ sura jyeṣṭhaḥ mahā tejāḥ brahma śabdena divyena brahmā śāṃtim karotu te pīta aṃbara dharaḥ devaḥ ātreyī dayitaḥ sadā śaṃkha cakra gadā pāṇiḥ śyāma varṇaḥ catur bhujaḥ śaṃkha cakra gadā pāṇiḥ mādhavaḥ madhusūdanaḥ sūrya dhyāna paraḥ nityam viṣṇuḥ śāṃtim karotu te śaśi kuṃda iṃdu saṃkāśaḥ viśruta ābharaṇaiḥ iha catur bhujaḥ mahā tejāḥ puṣpa ardha kṛta śekharaḥ gotrāriḥ viśva nilayaḥ tathā ca kratudūṣaṇaḥ āditya deha saṃbhūtaḥ sa te śāṃtim karotu vai iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe saura dharmeṣu ṣaṭsaptati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aruṇaḥ uvāca akṣamālā arpita karā kamaṃḍalu dharā śubhā brahmāṇī saumya vadanā āditya ārādhane ratā śāṃtim karotu su prītā āśīrvāda parā khaga mahāśvetā iti vikhyātā ādi tya dayitā sadā hima kuṃda iṃdu sadṛśā mahā vṛṣabha vāhinī triśūla hasta āvaraṇā viśruta ābharaṇā satī catur bhujā catur vaktrā tri netrā pāpa nāśinī vṛṣadhvaja arcana ratā rudrāṇī śāṃti dā bhavet mayūra vāhanā devī siṃdūra aruṇa vigrahā śakti hastā mahā kāyā sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitā sūrya bhaktā mahā vīryā sūrya arcana ratā sadā kaumārī vara dā devī śāṃtim āśu karotu te gadā cakra dharā śyāmā pīta aṃbara dharā khaga catur bhujā hi sā devī vaiṣṇavī sura pūjitā sūrya arcana parā nityam sūrya eka gata mānasā śāṃtim karotu te nityam sarva asura vimardinī airāvata gaja ārūḍhā vajra hastā mahā balā sarvatralocanā devī varṇataḥ karbura aruṇā siddha gaṃdharva namitā sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitā iṃdrāṇī te sadā devī śāṃtim āśu karotu vai śyāma avadātā yā devī śaṃkha cakra gadā dharā tejayantī iti nimiṣān pūjayaṃtī sadā ravim vārāhī vara dā devī tava śāṃtim karotu vai ardha kośā kaṭī kṣāmā nirmāṃsā snāyu baṃdhanāt karāla vanā ghorā khaḍga ghaṃṭā udgatā satī kapāla mālinī krūrā khaṭvāṃga vara dhāriṇī āraktā piṃga nayanā gaja carma avaguṃṭhitā go śruta ābharaṇā devī preta sthāna nivāsinī śivā rūpeṇa ghoreṇa śiva rūpa bhayaṃkarī cāmuṃḍā caṃḍa rūpeṇa sadā śāṃtim karotu te caṃḍa muṃḍa karā devī muṃḍa deha gatā satī ākāśa mātaraḥ devyaḥ tathā anyāḥ loka mātaraḥ bhūtānām mātaraḥ sarvāḥ tathā anyāḥ pitṛ mātaraḥ vṛddhiśrāddheṣu pūjyaṃte yāḥ tu devyaḥ manīṣibhiḥ mātre pramātre tanmātre iti mātṛ mukhāḥ tathā pitāmahī tu tad mātā vṛddhā yā ca pitāmahī iti etāḥ tu pitāmahyaḥ śāṃtim te pitṛ mātaraḥ sarvāḥ mātṛ mahā devyaḥ sva āyudha avyagra pāṇayaḥ jagat vyāpya pratiṣṭhantyaḥ bali kāmāḥ mahā udayāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu tāḥ nityam āditya ārādhane ratāḥ śāṃtena cetasā śāṃtyaḥ śāṃtaye tava śāṃti dā pīta śyāmā ati saumyena snigdha varṇena śobhanā lalāṭa tilaka upetā caṃdra rekhā ardha dhāriṇī citra aṃbara dharā devī sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitā varā strī maya rūpāṇām śobhā guṇa su sampadā bhāvanā mātra saṃtuṣṭā umā devī vara pradā sākṣāt āgatya rūpeṇa śāṃtena amita tejasā śāṃtim karotu te prītā ādityā rādhane ratā aruṇaḥ uvāca abalaḥ bāla rūpeṇa khaṭvāṃga śikhi vāhanaḥ pūrveṇa vadanaḥ śrīmān tri śikhaḥ śakti saṃyutaḥ kṛttikāyāḥ ca rudrasya ca aṃga udbhūtaḥ sura arcitaḥ śāṃtim karotu te nityam balam saukhyam ca tejasā ātreyī balavān devaḥ ārogyam ca khaga adhipa śūla hastaḥ mahā prājñaḥ nadīśaḥ ravi bhāvitaḥ śāṃtim karotu te śāntaḥ dharme ca matim uttamām mahodaraḥ mahā kāyaḥ snigdha aṃjana sama prabhaḥ nāga yajñopavītena nānā ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ sarva artha saṃpadā uddhāraḥ gaṇādhyakṣaḥ vara pradaḥ karotu te mahā śāṃtim bhāskara arcana tatparaḥ iṃdranīla nibhaḥ tri akṣaḥ dīpta śūla āyudha udyataḥ rakta aṃbara dharaḥ śrīmān kṛṣṇa aṃgaḥ nāgabhūṣaṇaḥ pāpa apanodam atulam alakṣyaḥ mala nāśanaḥ karotu te mahā śāṃtim prītaḥ prītena cetasā vara aṃbara dharā kanyā nānā alaṃkāra bhūṣitā tridaśānām ca jananī puṇyā loka namaskṛtā śāṃtim karotu te mātā bhuvanasya khaga adhipa snigdha śyāmena varṇena mahā mahiṣa mardanī dhanuḥ cakra praharaṇā khaṅga paṭṭiśa dhāriṇī ātarjanī āyata karā sarva upadrava nāśinī śāṃtim karotu te durgā bhavānī ca śivā tathā ati sūkṣmaḥ hi ati krodhaḥ tri akṣaḥ bhṛṃgiriṭiḥ mahān sūrya ātmakaḥ mahā vīraḥ sūrya eka gata mānasaḥ pracaṃḍa gaṇa sainya īśaḥ mahā ghaṃṭā akṣa dhārakaḥ akṣa mālā arpita karaḥ ca akṣacaṃḍeśvaraḥ varaḥ caṃḍa pāpa haraḥ nityam brahmahatyā vināśanaḥ śāṃtim karotu te nityam āditya ārādhane rataḥ karoti ca mahā yogī kalyāṇānām paraṃparām ākāśa mātaraḥ divyāḥ tathā anyāḥ deva mātaraḥ sūryāyaṇa parāḥ devyaḥ jagat vyāpya vyavasthitāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu me nityam mātaraḥ sura pūjitāḥ mātaraḥ rudra rūpāḥ ca gaṇānām adhipāḥ ca ye vighna bhūtāḥ tathā ca anye diś vidikṣu samāśritāḥ siddhim kurvaṃtu te nityam bhayebhyaḥ pāṃtu sarvatas aiṃdra ādayaḥ gaṇāḥ ye tu vajra hastāḥ mahā balāḥ hima kunda iṃdu sadṛśāḥ nīla kṛṣṇa aṃga lohitāḥ divya āṃtarikṣāḥ bhaumāḥ ca pātāla tala vāsinaḥ aiṃdrāḥ śāṃtim prakurvaṃtu bhadrāṇi ca punar punar āgneyyām ye bhṛtāḥ sarve dhruva hatyā anuṣaṃgiṇaḥ sūrya anuraktāḥ rakta ābhāḥ japā suma nibhāḥ tathā virakta lohitāḥ divyāḥ āgneyyām bhāskara ādayaḥ āditya ārādhana parāḥ āditya gata mānasāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te nityam prayacchaṃtu balim mama ye tu satatam daṇḍa pāṇayaḥ āditya ārādhana parāḥ kam prayacchantu te sadā aiśānyām saṃsthitāḥ ye tu praśāṃtāḥ śūla pāṇayaḥ bhasma uddhūlita dehāḥ ca nīla kaṇṭhāḥ vilohitāḥ divya āṃtarikṣāḥ bhaumāḥ ca pātāla tala vāsinaḥ sūrya pūjā karāḥ nityam pūjayitvā aṃśumālinam tatas su prīta manasaḥ lokapālaiḥ nvitāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu me nityam kam prayacchaṃtu pūjitāḥ amarāvatī purī nāma pūrva bhāge vyavasthitā vidyādhara gaṇa ākīrṇā ratna prākāra rucirā mahā ratna upaśobhitā tatra devapatiḥ śrīmān vajrapāṇiḥ mahā balaḥ airāvata gaja ārūḍhaḥ gairika ābhaḥ mahā dyutiḥ deva iṃdraḥ satatam hṛṣṭaḥ āditya ārādhane rataḥ sūryapraṇāmaḥ paramām śāṃtim te adya prayacchatu āgneya diś vibhāge tu purī tejasvatī śubhā nānā deva gaṇa ākīrṇā nānā ratna upaśobhitā tatra jvālā samākīrṇaḥ dīpta aṃgāra sama dyutiḥ āditya ārādhana rataḥ āditya gata mānasaḥ śāṃtim karotu te devaḥ tathā pāpa parikṣayam vaivasvatī purī ramyā dakṣiṇena mahātmanaḥ sura asura śata ākīrṇā nānā ratna upaśobhitā tatra kunda iṃdu saṃkāśaḥ hari piṃgala locanaḥ mahā mahiṣam ārūḍhaḥ kṛṣṇa sraj vastra bhūṣaṇaḥ antakaḥ atha mahā tejāḥ sūrya dharma parāyaṇaḥ āditya ārādhana paraḥ kṣema ārogye dadātu te nairṛte diś vibhāge tu purī kṛṣṇā iti viśrutā moha rakṣaḥ gaṇa āśauca piśāca preta saṃkulā khaḍga pāṇiḥ mahā tejāḥ karāla vadana ujjvalaḥ rakṣa iṃdraḥ vasate nityam āditya ārādhane rataḥ karotu me sadā śāṃtim dhanam dhānyam praya cchatu paścime tu diśaḥ bhāge purī śuddhavatī sadā nānā bhogi samākīrṇā nānā kinnara sevitā śāṃtim karotu me prītaḥ śāṃtaḥ śāṃtena cetasā yaśovatī purī ramyā aiśānīm diśam āśritā nānā gaṇa samākīrṇā śubha ālayā tejaḥ prākāra paryantā anaupamyā sadaḥ jvalā tatra kuṃda iṃdu saṃkāśaḥ ca ambuja akṣaḥ vibhūṣitaḥ īśānaḥ paramaḥ devaḥ sadā śāṃtim prayacchatu deva adevāḥ śubha ayuktāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā te sarve muditāḥ devāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā sarasvatī sūrya bhaktā śāṃti dā vidadhātu me cāru cāmīkara sthā yā saroja karapallavā sūrya bhakti āśritā devī vibhūtim te prayacchatu iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe sauradharmavarṇanam nāma aṣṭasaptati uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ aruṇaḥ uvāca kṛttikā paramā devī rohiṇī ca varānanā śrīmat mṛgaśiraḥ bhadrā ārdrā ca api aparā ujjvalā punarvasuḥ tathā puṣyaḥ āśleṣā ca tathā adhipa sūrya arcana ratāḥ nityam sūrya bhāva anubhāvitāḥ nakṣatra mātaraḥ hi etāḥ prabhā mālā vibhūṣitāḥ maghā sarva guṇa upetā pūrvā ca eva tu phālgunī svātī viśākhā varadāḥ dakṣiṇām diśam āśritāḥ tava api śāṃtikam dyotam kurvaṃtu gagana uditāḥ anurādhā tathā jyeṣṭhā mūlam sūrya puraḥsarā pūrvāṣāḍhāḥ mahā vīryāḥ āṣāḍhā ca uttarā tathā abhijit nāma nakṣatram śravaṇam ca bahu śrutam etāḥ paścimatas dīptāḥ rājaṃte ca anu mūrtayaḥ bhāskaram pūjayanti etāḥ sarvakālam su bhāvitāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te nityam vibhūtim ca maharddhikām dhaniṣṭhā śatabhiṣā tu pūrvabhādrapadā tathā uttarā bhādra revatyau ca āśvinī ca mahāmate bharaṇī ca mahā devī nityam uttaratas sthitāḥ sūrya arcana ratāḥ nityam āditya gatamāḥ nasāḥ śāṃtim kurvatu te nityam vibhūtim ca maharddhikām meṣaḥ mṛga adhipaḥ siṃhaḥ dhanuḥ dīptimatām varaḥ pūrveṇa bhāsayaṃti ete sūrya yoga parāḥ śubhāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te nityam bhaktyā sūrya pada ambuje vṛṣaḥ kanyā ca paramā makaraḥ ca api buddhimān ete dakṣiṇa bhāge tu pūjayaṃti ravim sadā bhaktyā paramayā nityam śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā mithunam ca tulā kuṃbhaḥ paścime ca vyavasthitāḥ japanti ete sadākālam ādityam grahanāya kam śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te nityam khakholkā jñāna tatparāḥ sa tapaḥ datta puṣpābhyām ye smṛtā satatam budhaiḥ ṛṣayaḥ sapta vikhyātāḥ dhruva aṃtāḥ prarama ujjvalāḥ bhānu prasādāt saṃpannāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā kaśyapaḥ gālavaḥ gārgyaḥ viśvāmitraḥ mahā muniḥ muniḥ dakṣaḥ vaśiṣṭhaḥ ca mārkaṇḍaḥ pulahaḥ kratuḥ nāradaḥ bhṛguḥ ātreyaḥ bhāradvājaḥ ca vai muniḥ vālmīkiḥ kauśikaḥ vātsyaḥ śākalyaḥ atha punarvasuḥ śālaṃkāyanaḥ iti ete ṛṣayaḥ atha mahātapāḥ sūrya dhyāna eka paramāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā muni kanyāḥ mahābhāgāḥ ṛṣi kanyāḥ kumārikāḥ sūrya arcana ratāḥ nityam śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā siddhāḥ samṛddha tapasaḥ ye ca anye vai mahā tapāḥ vidyādharāḥ mahātmānaḥ garuḍaḥ ca tvayā saha āditya paramāḥ hi ete āditya ārādhane ratāḥ siddhim te saṃprayacchaṃtu āśīrvāda parāyaṇāḥ namuciḥ daitya rājā idraḥ śaṃkukarṇaḥ mahā balaḥ graha adhipasya devasya nityam pūjā parāyaṇāḥ balam vīryam ca te ṛddhim ārogyam ca bruvaṃtu te mahā āḍhyaḥ yaḥ hayagrīvaḥ prahlādaḥ prabhayā anvitaḥ tān eka agni mukhaḥ daityaḥ kālanemiḥ mahā balaḥ ete daityāḥ mahātmānaḥ sūrya bhāvena bhāvitāḥ tuṣṭim balam prayacchaṃtu surārayaḥ satatam ca śubha ātmānaḥ puṣṭim kurvaṃtu te sadā daitya patayaḥ mahābhāgāḥ daityānām kanyakāḥ śubhāḥ kumārāḥ ye ca daityānām śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā āraktena rakta anta āyata locanāḥ mahābhāgāḥ kṛta āṭopāḥ śaṃkha ādyāḥ kṛta lakṣaṇāḥ anaṃtaḥ nāga rāja iṃdraḥ āditya ārādhane rataḥ mahā pāpa viṣam hatvā śāṃtim āśu karotu te tejasā ca ati dīptena kṛta svastika lāṃchanaḥ nāga rāj takṣakaḥ śrīmān nāma koṭyā samanvitaḥ karotu te mahā śāṃtim sarva doṣa viṣa apahām ati kṛṣṇena varṇena sphuṭa adhikaṭa mastakaḥ kaṃṭha rekhā traya upetaḥ ghora daṃṣṭra āyudha udyataḥ karkoṭakaḥ mahā nāgaḥ viṣa darpa bala anvitaḥ viṣa śastra agni saṃtāpam hatvā śāṃtim karotu te khyātaḥ padmaḥ mahā nāgaḥ nityam bhāskara pūjakaḥ sa te śāṃti śubham śīghram acalam saṃprayacchatu śyāmena deha bhāreṇa śrīmat kamala locanaḥ viṣa darpa bala unmattaḥ grīvāyām rekhayā anvitaḥ śaṃkhapāla śriyā dīptaḥ sūrya pāda abja pūjakaḥ mahāviṣam gara śreṣṭham hatvā śāṃtim karotu te ati gaureṇa dehena caṃdra ardha kṛta śekharaḥ dīpa bhāge kṛta āṭopa śubha lakṣaṇa lakṣitaḥ kulikaḥ nāma nāga indraḥ nityam sūrya parāyaṇaḥ apahṛtya viṣam ghoram karotu tava śāṃtikam aṃtarikṣe ca ye nāgāḥ ye nāgāḥ svarga saṃsthitāḥ giri kaṃdara durgeṣu ye nāgāḥ bhuvi saṃsthitāḥ pātāle ye sthitāḥ nāgāḥ sarve yatra samāhitāḥ sūrya pādāḥ arcana āsaktāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā nāginyaḥ nāga kanyāḥ ca tathā nāga kumārakāḥ sūryabhaktāḥ sumanasaḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā yaḥ idam nāma saṃsthānam kīrtayet śṛṇuyāt tathā na tam sarpāḥ vihiṃsati na viṣam kramate sadā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe saura dharmavarṇanam nāma ekonāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śāntika varṇanam gaṃgā puṇyā mahādevī yamunā narmadā nadī gautamī ca api kāverī varuṇā devikā tathā pūjayaṃti sadā nadyaḥ sūrya sadbhāva bhāvitāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te nityam sūrya dhyāna eka mānasāḥ niraṃjanā nāma nadī śoṇaḥ ca api mahā nadaḥ maṃdākinī ca paramā tathā sannihitā śubhā etāḥ ca anyāḥ ca bahavaḥ bhuvi divi aṃtarikṣake sūrya arcana ratāḥ nadyaḥ kurvaṃtu tava śāṃtikam yakṣa koṭi parīvāraḥ yakṣa saṃkhyeya saṃyutaḥ mahā vibhava saṃpannaḥ sūrya pāda arcane rataḥ sūrya dhyāna eka paramaḥ sūrya bhāvena bhāvitaḥ śāṃtim karotu te prītaḥ padma patra āyata īkṣaṇaḥ manohareṇa hāreṇa kaṃṭha lagnena rājate yakṣiṇī yakṣa kanyābhiḥ parivārita vigrahaḥ sūrya arcana samāsaktaḥ karotu tava śāṃtikam suciraḥ nāma yakṣa iṃdraḥ maṇi kuḍala bhūṣitaḥ bahu yakṣa samākīrṇaḥ yakṣaiḥ namita vigrahaḥ sūrya pūjā paraḥ yuktaḥ karotu tava śāṃtikam pāṃcikaḥ nāma yakṣa iṃdraḥ kaṃṭha ābharaṇa bhūṣitaḥ yakṣa vṛnda samākīrṇaḥ yakṣa koṭi samanvitaḥ sūrya arcana karaḥ śrīmān karotu tava śāṃtikam dhṛtarāṣṭraḥ mahā tejāḥ nānā yakṣa adhipaḥ khaga divya paṭṭaḥ śukla chatraḥ maṇi kāṃcana bhūṣitaḥ sūrya prasāda saṃpannaḥ karotu tava śāṃtikam virūpākṣaḥ ca yakṣa iṃdraḥ śveta vāsāḥ mahā dyutiḥ nānā kāṃcana mālābhiḥ upaśobhita kaṃdharaḥ sūrya pūjā paraḥ bhaktaḥ kaṃja akṣaḥ kaṃja sannibhaḥ tejasā āditya saṃkāśaḥ karotu tava śāṃtikam aṃtīrakṣa gatāḥ yakṣāḥ ye yakṣāḥ svarga gāminaḥ nānā rūpa dharāḥ yakṣāḥ sūrya bhaktāḥ dṛḍha vratāḥ tad bhaktāḥ tad gamanasaḥ sūrya pūjā samutsukāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te hṛṣṭāḥ śāṃtāḥ śāṃti parāyaṇāḥ yakṣiṇyaḥ vividha ākārāḥ tathā yakṣa kumārakāḥ yakṣa kanyāḥ mahābhāgāḥ sūrya ārādhana tatparāḥ śāṃtim svastyayanam kṣemam balam kalyāṇam uttamam siddhim ca āśu prayacchaṃtu nityam ca su samāhitāḥ parvatāḥ sarvatas sarve vṛkṣāḥ ca eva maharddhikāḥ sūrya bhaktāḥ sadā sarve śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā sāgarāḥ sarvatas sarve gṛha araṇyāni kṛtsnaśas sūryasya ārādhana parāḥ kurvaṃtu tava śāṃtikam rākṣasāḥ sarvatas sarve ghora rūpāḥ mahā balāḥ sthala jāḥ rākṣasāḥ ye tu aṃtarikṣa gatāḥ ca ye pātāle rākṣasāḥ ye tu nityam sūrya arcane ratāḥ śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sarve tejasā nitya dīpitāḥ pretāḥ preta gaṇāḥ sarve ye pretāḥ sarvatomukhāḥ ati dīptāḥ ca ye pretāḥ ye pretāḥ rudhira aśanāḥ aṃtarikṣe ca ye pretāḥ tathā ye svarga vāsinaḥ pātāle bhū tale vā api ye pretāḥ kāmarūpiṇaḥ tejasā tasya devasya śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā ye piśācāḥ mahā vīryāḥ vṛddhimaṃtaḥ mahā balāḥ nānā rūpa dharāḥ sarve sarve ca guṇavattarāḥ aṃtarikṣe piśācāḥ ye svarge ye ca mahā balāḥ pātāle bhū tale ye ca bahu rūpāḥ manojavāḥ yasya aham sārathiḥ vīra yasya tvam turagaḥ sadā tejasā tasya devasya śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te añjasā apasmāra grahāḥ sarve sarve ca api jvara grahāḥ pātāle tu grahāḥ ye ca ye grahāḥ sarvatas gatāḥ haraḥ yasya sadā vāme lalāṭe kaṃja jaḥ sthitaḥ tejasā tasya devasya śāṃtim kurvaṃtu te sadā iti deva ādayaḥ sarve sūrya yajña vidhāyinaḥ kurvaṃtu jagataḥ śāṃtim sūrya bhakteṣu sarvadā graha uttamāya devāya jayaḥ kalyāṇa kāriṇe jayaḥ padma vikāśāya budha rūpāya te namaḥ jayaḥ dīpti vidhānāya jayaḥ śāṃti vidhāyine gāyatrī deha rūpāya sāvitrī dayitāya ca dharādharāya sūryāya mārtaṃḍāya namaḥ namaḥ sumaṃtuḥ uvāca evam hi kurvataḥ śāṃtim aruṇasya mahīpate tejasā budha saṃkāśaḥ valena hariṇā samaḥ saṃpūrṇa avayavaḥ rājan yathāpūrvam tathā bhavat evam anye api rāja iṃdra mānavāḥ ye ca rogiṇaḥ karaṇīyam ca rāja iṃdra mānavaiḥ ca prarogibhiḥ graha upaghāte durbhikṣe utpāteṣu ca kṛtsnaśas pūjayitvā prasūktam tu dhyātvā vīram prayatnataḥ vāruṇaiḥ ca tathā sūktaiḥ homam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ idam ca śāṃtikam kuryāt balim dayāt prayatnataḥ evam kṛte śriyam devāḥ varṣaṃte kāmanāḥ nṛṇām iti evam śāṃtika adhyāyam yaḥ paṭhet śṛṇuyāt api sa vijitya raṇe śatrum mānam ca paramam labhet akṣayam modate kālam atiraskṛta śāsanaḥ bhavet āditya sadṛśaḥ tejasā prabhayā tathā yān uddiśya paṭhet vīra vācakaḥ mānavaḥ bhuvi na akāle maraṇam tasya na sarpaiḥ ca api daśyate na viṣam kramate dehe na jaḍa āṃdhyam na mūka tā ye rogāḥ ye mahā utpātāḥ ye ahayaḥ ca mahā viṣāḥ te sarve praśamam yānti śravaṇāt asya bhārata yat puṇyam tīrthānām gaṃgā ādīnām viśeṣataḥ tat puṇyam koṭi guṇitam prāpnoti śravaṇa ādibhiḥ daśānām rājasūyānām anyeṣām ca viśeṣataḥ jīvet varṣa śatam sāgram sarva vyādhi vivarjitaḥ śaraṇa āgata dīna ārta mitra viśrabha ghātakaḥ duṣṭaḥ pāpa samācāraḥ pitṛ hā mātṛ hā tathā śravaṇāt asya pāpebhyaḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ sūryabhakte sadā deyam sūryeṇa kathitam purā aruṇasya mahā bāho garuḍasya aruṇena ca garuḍena purā proktam bhojakānām mahātmanām sūryaśarma sukha ādīnām śākadvīpe mahīpate taiḥ ca api kathitam puṇyam muneḥ vyāsasya dhīmataḥ tena api kathitam puṇyam sarva pāpa bhaya apaham iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe garuḍa aruṇa saṃvāde śāṃtikam varṇanam nāma aśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śatānīkaḥ uvāca paṃca prakāram dharmam me vada smārtam yathākramam paṃcadhā varṇitam dharmam śṛṇu rājan samāsatas yathā uktam bhāskareṇa iha aruṇasya mahātmanaḥ praṇamya śirasā devam uvāca garuḍāgrajaḥ evam pṛṣṭaḥ tu bhagavān aruṇena khaga adhipaḥ uvāca parayā prītyā pūjayitvā mahīpate bhāskaraḥ uvāca smṛti dharmam veda mūlam śṛṇu tvam garuḍāgraja pūrva anubhūtam yat dhyānam atha tat smaraṇam smṛtiḥ dharmaḥ kriyā ātmā nirdiṣṭaḥ śreyaḥ abhyudaya lakṣaṇaḥ sa ca pañcavidhaḥ proktaḥ veda mūlaḥ sanātanaḥ asya śabdasya anuṣṭhānāt svargaḥ mokṣaḥ ca jāyate anūruḥ uvāca bhāskaraḥ uvāca veda dharmaḥ smṛtaḥ tu ekaḥ āśramāṇām sa tad paraḥ varṇa āśramaḥ tṛtīyaḥ tu guṇa naimittikaḥ yathā sa varṇa āśrama daṃḍaḥ tu bhikṣā daṃḍa ādikaḥ yathā varṇa āśrama āśrama tvam ca yodhi kṛtya pravartate sa varṇa āśrama dharmaḥ tu daṃḍa ādyā mekhalā yathā yathā mūrdhābhiṣiktasya prajānām pālanam param naimittikaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ jāti dravya guṇa āśrayaḥ eṣa tu dvividhaḥ proktaḥ samāsāt aviśeṣataḥ śrutyā saha virodhe tu bādhyate viṣayam vinā smṛti śāstra vikalpaḥ tu ākāṃkṣā pūraṇe sati veda mūle sthitam tu etat anuṣṭhānam kriyā satī evam śakya vidhānam tu nyāyaḥ hi evam vyavasthitaḥ niṣedha vidhi rūpam tu dvidhā śāstram khaga adhipa paṃca prakārāḥ smṛtayaḥ evam śiṣya vyavasthitāḥ tridhā caturdhā dvedhā vai ekadhā bahudhā khaga dṛṣṭa arthā tu smṛtiḥ kācid adṛṣṭa arthā tathā aparā anuvāda smṛtiḥ tu anyā dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭā tu paṃcamī sarvāḥ etāḥ veda mūlāḥ smṛtāḥ vai ṛṣibhiḥ svayam aruṇaḥ uvāca yāḥ etāḥ bhavatā proktāḥ smṛtayaḥ parva gopane etāsām lakṣaṇam brūhi samāsāt eva sattama dṛṣṭa arthā kā matā deva adṛṣṭa arthā ca kā bhavet dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭa svarūpā kā nyāya mūlā ca kā bhavet anuvāda smṛtiḥ kā syāt adṛṣṭā adṛṣṭā tu kā bhavet uvāca tam khagam vīram praṇatam vinaya anvitam ādityaḥ uvāca ṣaḍguṇasya svarūpam tu prayogāt kārya gauravāt samayānām upāyānām yogaḥ vyāsa samāsataḥ adhyakṣāṇām ca nikṣepaḥ karaṇānām nirūpaṇam dṛṣṭārthā iyam smṛtiḥ proktā ṛṣibhiḥ garuḍāgraja saṃdhyā upāstiḥ tathā kāryā śunaḥ māṃsam na bhakṣayet adṛṣṭa arthā smṛtiḥ proktā manunā vinatā ātmaja pālāśam dhārayet daṃḍam ubhaya arthāḥ viduḥ budhāḥ śrutau dṛṣṭam yathā kāryam smṛtaḥ tat tādṛśam yadi ukta anuvādinī sā tu pārivrājyam tathā gṛhāt uktaḥ dharmaḥ ca saṃkṣepāt paribhāṣā ca tad gatā tad sādhanam ca deśa ādi ittham iti abravīt raviḥ brahmāvartaḥ paraḥ deśaḥ ṛṣi śastaḥ tu anaṃtaraḥ kṛṣṇasāraḥ tu vicaret mṛgaḥ yatra svabhāvataḥ yajñiyaḥ sa tu deśaḥ syāt mleccha deśaḥ tatas paraḥ brahma ādīnām ca devānām brāhmaṇa ādeḥ tathā eva ca sādhana tvam manuḥ prāha veda mūlam sanātanam upalabhya yathātattvam sa ca darśitavān ṛṣiḥ samyak saṃsādhanam dharmaḥ kartavyaḥ tu adhikāriṇā niṣkāmena sadā vīra kāmyam rūpa anvitena ca ācāra yuktaḥ śraddhāluḥ veda jñaḥ adhyātma ciṃtakaḥ karmaṇām phalam āpnoti nyāya arjita dhanaḥ ca yaḥ aruṇaḥ uvāca brahmāvarta ādi deśānām samastānām vibhāvaso vibhāgam brūhi deva iṃdra saṃmānaya graha adhipa ādityaḥ uvāca tam deva nirmitam deśam brahmāvartam pracakṣate ā samudrāt tu vai pūrvāt ā samudrāt tu paścimāt tayoḥ eva antaram giryoḥ āryāvartam viduḥ budhāḥ etān vijñāya sat deśān saṃśrayeta prayatnataḥ śūdraḥ tu yasmin tasmin vā nivaset vṛtti karśitaḥ eṣā dharmasya vai jyotiḥ samāsāt kathitā tava iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamī kalpe saura dharmeṣu aruṇa āditya saṃvāde smṛtibhedavarṇanam nāma ekāśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca uktam dharmasya rūpam tu sādhikāram sanātanam atas param pravakṣyāmi dharmam āśramiṇām khaga catvāraḥ āśramāḥ proktāḥ ekaḥ eva caturvidhaḥ gāyatraḥ brahmacārī tu prājāpatyaḥ dvitīyakaḥ catvāraḥ āśramāḥ proktāḥ sa vedāḥ sama dharmakāḥ atas param pravakṣyāmi saṃskāram dharma siddhaye garbhādhānam ṛtau kāryam hṛṣṭayoḥ tu samantrakam kāryam puṃsavanam mātuḥ tṛtīye māsi saṃyutaiḥ sīmantaḥ saptame garbhe ṣaṣṭhe vā saptame api vā pātra saṃskārakāḥ iṣṭāḥ garbhādhāna ādayaḥ trayaḥ jātakarma ādayaḥ sarve saṃskārāḥ puruṣasya tu jātasya prāśanam yatra svarṇāḥ dīnām sa mantrakam prakāśaḥ nāma kartavyam dine tu ekādaśa īrtha vat dharma śāstra ādi saṃyuktam ṣaṣṭhe annaprāśanam khaga prathame abde tṛtīye vā cūḍākarma vidhīyate aṣṭame daśame vā api brāhmaṇasya upanāyanam puruṣasya tathā ca anya jātīyānām viśeṣataḥ ekādaśe dvādaśe vā kārya kṣatriya vaiśyayoḥ sāvitram vaidikam ca eva mahānāmnī mahāvratam tathā aupaniṣadam ca abdam godānam ca suvarṇakam veda eka deśa pāṭhasya uktam gṛhye prapañcakam uktā guroḥ tu śuśrūṣā dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭa artha sādhanam ubhayoḥ vā tathā ca anyā yathānyāyam yathāśrutam toṣaḥ parasparasya iti etāvān dharma saṃgrahaḥ jñātvā vedam brahmacārī graṃtha arthāni anyathāvidhi naiṣṭhikaḥ ca vidhānam tu yāvatklībam vidhīyate vidyā ante abhīṣṭa dānam ca anujñātaḥ gṛhī bhavet niṣkāsanam guru gṛhāt gṛhasthasya yathā bhavet naiṣṭhikaḥ ca tathā snānam kuryāt samyak yathāvidhi udvahet vai tatas bhāryām savarṇām lakṣaṇa anvitām saptamīm pañcamīm ca eva kanyakām pitṛ mātṛtaḥ udvaheta dvijaḥ bhāryām asamāna ārṣa gotra jām vikalpena eva mantavyam ṛṣīṇām vividhā śrutiḥ aṣṭau vivāhāḥ varṇānām saṃskāra ākhyāḥ iti śrutiḥ yaḥ tu doṣavatīm kanyām an ākhyāya praya chati tasya kuryāt nṛpaḥ daṃḍam svayam ṣaṇṇavatim paṇān pituḥ gṛhe tu yā kanyā rajaḥ paśyati asaṃskṛtā yaḥ tu tām varayet kanyām brāhmaṇaḥ jñāna durbalaḥ aśrāddheyam a pāṅkteyam tam vidyāt vṛṣalī patim sarva doṣān hi vikhyāpya striyāḥ vā puruṣasya vā gaurī kanyā pradhānā vai madhyamā kanyakā smṛtā rohiṇī tad samā jñeyā adhamā tu rajasvalā anūruḥ uvāca gaurī tu kā matā kanyā rohiṇī ca jagatpate bhāskaraḥ uvāca asaṃprāpta rajāḥ gaurī prāpte rajasi rohiṇī avyañjana yutā kanyā kuca hīnā ca nagnikā sapta varṣā bhavet gaurī daśa varṣā tu nagnikā dvādaśe tu bhavet kanyā atas ūrdhvam rajasvalā gatim iṣṭām tathā lokān hanyāt tu rajasā pituḥ tasmāt avyañjana upetām arajaska payodharām na anya upabhuktām soma ādyaiḥ dadyāt duhitaram pitā annam tasya na bhoktavyam vṛthā pākaḥ hi sa smṛtaḥ vṛthā pākasya bhuktvā annam prāyaścittam samācaret prāṇāyāmam tris abhyasya ghṛtam prāśya viśuddhi ati vivāhayet eka gotrām samāna pravarām khaga udvāhayet sagotrām ca tanayām mātulasya ca ṛṣibhiḥ ca eva tulyaḥ yaḥ dvijaḥ cāṃdrāyaṇam caret asapiṇḍā tu yā mātuḥ asagotrā ca yā pituḥ sā praśastā dvijātīnām dārakarmaṇi maithune aruṇaḥ uvāca sā praśastā dvijātīnām dārakarmaṇi maithune ādityaḥ uvāca na udvahet kapilām kanyām na adhika aṃgīm na rogiṇīm na alomikām na atilomām na ca akūṭām na piṅgalām ṛkṣa vṛkṣa nadī nāmnīm na anya parvata nāmikām na yakṣa ahi preṣya nāmnīm ca ati bhīṣaṇa nāmikām yasyāḥ tu na bhavet bhrātā na vijñāyeta vai pitā na upagacchet hi tām prājñaḥ putrikā dharma śaṃkayā haṃsa svarām eka varṇām madhu piṃgala locanām tādṛśīm varayet kanyām gṛha arthī khaga sattama sarve te narakam yāṃti dātṛ yājaka paṃcamāḥ klībe deśa aṃtara sthe vā patite vrajite tathā khaṃja vāmana kubjeṣu gadgadeṣu jaḍeṣu ca na śrāddham tu kaniṣṭhasya vikulāya ca kanyakā varaḥ ca kula śīlābhyām na śuddhyeta kadācana na maṃtrāḥ kāraṇam tatra na ca kanyā vṛtā bhavet udvāhitā tu yā kanyā na ca prāptā tu maithunam samākṣipya matām kanyām pitā tu akṣatayonikām kula śīlavate dadyāt na syāt doṣaḥ khagādhipa anūruḥ uvāca ete aṣṭau prabhavāḥ proktāḥ vivāhāḥ ye jagatpate lakṣaṇam brūhi ca eteṣām samāsāt timira apaha ādityaḥ uvāca śubhām lakṣaṇa saṃpannām kula śīla guṇa anvitām alaṃkṛtya arhate dānam vivāhaḥ brāhmaḥ ucyate alaṃkṛtya eva kanyāyāḥ prājāpatyaḥ saḥ ucyate savarṇāyāḥ sagotrāyāḥ tam ārṣam ṛṣayaḥ viduḥ aṃtarvedyām samānīya kanyām kanaka maṃḍitām ṛtvije ca eva yat dānam vivāhaḥ daiva saṃjñakaḥ ete vivāhāḥ catvāraḥ dharma kāma artha dāyakāḥ aśulkāḥ brahmaṇā proktāḥ tārayaṃti kula dvayam caturṣu eteṣu dattāyām utpannaḥ yaḥ sutaḥ striyām dātuḥ pratigrahītuḥ ca punāti āsaptamān pitṛn prīti hetuḥ sa gāṃdharvaḥ vivāhaḥ paṃcamaḥ mataḥ hatvā chittvā ca bhittvā ca krośaṃtīm rudatīm gṛhāt prasahya kanyā haraṇam rākṣasa udvāhaḥ ucyate śulkam pradāya kanyāyāḥ haraṇam vyasanāt api suptām mattām pramattām vā rahaḥ yatra upagacchati sa pāpiṣṭhaḥ vivāhānām paiśācaḥ ca aṣṭamaḥ adhamaḥ etān sa śulkān sāmānyān vivāhān caturaḥ viduḥ kevalam kṣatriyasya eva vīryam chittvā hi rākṣasaḥ prāpte pūrva vivāhe tu vidhiḥ vaivāhikaḥ śivaḥ doṣavatyāḥ pradāne tu dātuḥ ṣaṇṇavatiḥ damaḥ syāt tu śulka pradāne ca kanyāyāḥ ca apavarjane ākāṃkṣā tīrtha saṃrodhaḥ tyāga hetuḥ ca vakṣyate parasparasya saṃbaṃdhāt mokṣaḥ strīpuṃsayoḥ smṛtaḥ na syāt anyataraḥ prītaḥ roṣāt sāṃpratikāt api bādhate ced patiḥ bhāryām sa tu dveṣaḥ iti smṛtaḥ vṛttiḥ ābharaṇam śulkam lābhaḥ ca strīdhanam bhavet ākāṃkṣeta aṣṭa varṣāṇi bhartā api prasavam striyāḥ etām śulkasya tām bhuktvā anyām labdhum yadi icchati samastāḥ toṣayitvā arthaiḥ sūrya ūḍhām paramām varet catasraḥ brāhmaṇasya syuḥ bhāryāḥ rājñaḥ yatheṣṭataḥ a tīrtha gamanāt puṃsaḥ tīrthe saṃgāhanāt striyāḥ yaugapadye tu tīrthānām vivāha kramaśas vrajet tad sāmyam jīvaputrāḥ vā grahaṇa kramaśas upi aṣṭau vivāhāḥ varṇānām vainateyaḥ uśanti vai brāhmaḥ daivaḥ tathā ārṣaḥ ca prājāpatyaḥ khagāḥ dhipa gāṃdharvaḥ ca āsuraḥ rakṣaḥ paiśācaḥ tu aṣṭamaḥ adhamaḥ praśastāḥ kṣatriya ādīnām vipra ādīnām tu mānataḥ pratigraha ādayaḥ baddhāḥ vivāhāḥ brāhmaṇasya tu pāvanam puruṣāṇām tu vivāham paricakṣate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe saptamīkalpe brāhme parvaṇi sūryāruṇasaṃvāde vivāhavidhivarṇanam nāma dvyaśīti uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrāddha vidhi kathā varṇanam bhāskaraḥ uvāca kuryāt paṃca mahāyajñān adhikāraḥ dvijasya saḥ bhūta pitṛ amara brahma manuṣyāṇām yathāvidhi sadā kṛtyānām phala artham apare sthitāḥ nitya anityam iti prāhuḥ anuṣaṃgāt phalam pare adṛṣṭa niyama adṛṣṭam ārogya antam ca varjanam tisraḥ uṣṭakāḥ tu kartavyāḥ madhyāvartī caturthikā śāka pāyasa pūpaiḥ tu māṃsena tu caturthikā nityam naimittikam kāmyam vṛddhiśrāddham sapiṃḍanam pārvaṇam ca iti vijñeyam goṣṭha śuddhi artham uttamam karmāṃgam navamam proktam vaidikam daśamam smṛtam anūruḥ uvāca yat etat bhavatā proktam śrāddham dvādaśadhā vibho tasya sarvasya mā brūhi lakṣaṇam vai pṛthak pṛthak nityam kim ucyate śrāddham kim vā naimittikam bhavet kāmi ādi devadeveśaḥ eteṣām lakṣaṇam vada ādityaḥ uvāca vṛddhau yat kriyate śrāddham vṛddhiśrāddham tat ucyate sarvam pradakṣiṇam kāryam pūrvāhṇe tu upavītinā argha artham pitṛpātreṣu pretapātram pramocayet ye samānāḥ iti dvābhyām etat jñeyam sapiṃḍanam nityena tulyam śeṣam syāt ekoddiṣṭam striyāḥ api gobhyaḥ ca kriyate śrāddham tat goṣṭhaśrāddham ucyate bahūnām viduṣām saṃpad sukha artham pitṛ tṛptaye jñeyam puṃsavanam śrāddham tat ca karma aṃgam eva ca gacchet deśa aṃtare yaḥ tu śrāddham kuryāt tu sarpiṣā sarveṣām eva śrāddhānām śreṣṭham sāṃvatsaram matam mātuḥ ca khaga śārdūla vatsara aṃte mṛte ahani na aham tasya khaga śreṣṭha pūjām gṛhṇāmi naḥ hariḥ na brahmā na ca vai rudraḥ na ca anye devatā gaṇāḥ nareṇa khaga śārdūla bhojakena viśeṣataḥ mātā pitṛbhyām satatam varṣe varṣe mṛte ahani sa yāti narakam ghoram tāmisram nāma nāmataḥ tatas bhavati duṣṭa ātmā nagare sūkaraḥ khaga anūruḥ uvāca na jānāti dinam yaḥ tu na māsam vibudha adhipa mṛtau yatra mahā prājña pitarau sa katham naraḥ śrāddham karotu vai tābhyām vidhivat vatsara ātmakam ādityaḥ uvāca na jānāti naraḥ yaḥ tu mṛtānām vinatā ātmaja māsam dinam mṛtānām tu pitṛrṇām khaga sattama yathā kuryāt khaga śreṣṭha śṛṇu kṛtsnam samāsatas mṛtā aham yaḥ na jānāti mānavaḥ vinatā ātmaja tena kāryam amāyām ca śrāddham sāṃvatsaram khaga māse mārgaśire vīra
