kāmān tatas bhānu sadaḥ vrajet tvam niṃba kaṭuka ātmā asi āditya nilayaḥ tathā sarva roga haraḥ śāntaḥ bhava me prāśanam sadā brāhmaṇān bhojayitvā tu śaktyā dattvā tu dakṣiṇām bhuñjīta vāgyataḥ paścāt madhuram kṣāra varjitam iti eṣā varṣa paryantam kartavyā ca eva saptamī kurvāṇaḥ saptamīm etām sarva rogaiḥ pramucyate māheśvareṇa vidhinā pūjayet atra bhāskaram aṣṭamyām tu punar snātaḥ pūjayitvā divākaram dadyāt phalāni viprebhyaḥ mārtaṇḍaḥ prīyatām iti kharjūram nālikeram ca mātuliṅga phalāni ca mahā tapaḥ mahā śreṣṭham bhāskarasya viśām pate yat phalam pṛthivī dāne tat sarvam prāpnuyāt naraḥ sahasra śata dānasya phalam viṃdati mānavaḥ vaiśyaḥ api kṣatra tām yāti śūdraḥ vaiśya tvam eva ca sūta māgadha bandi ādyāḥ ye ca anye saṃkara udbhavāḥ te api yāṃti uttamam sthānam purāṇa śravaṇāt vibho itihāsa purāṇābhyām na tu anyat pāvanam nṛṇām yeṣām śravaṇa mātreṇa mucyate sarva kilbiṣaiḥ vidhinā rāja śārdūla śṛṇvatām yat phalam kila yathā uktam na atra saṃdehaḥ paṭhatām ca viśām pate śatānīkaḥ uvāca caritam rāmabhadrasya purāṇāni viśeṣataḥ katham tu vaiṣṇavāḥ dharmāḥ śiva dharmāḥ aśeṣatas saurāṇām ca api vipra indra ucyatām śravaṇe vidhiḥ vācanīyam katham ca api vācakaḥ dvijasattama lakṣaṇam ca asya me brūhi vācakasya mahātmanaḥ svarūpam ca asya me brūhi khaṣolkasya mahātmanaḥ pāraṇe pāraṇe pūjyaḥ vācakaḥ śrāvakaiḥ katham samāpte bhagavan kiṃkim deyam parvaṇi vācake samyak pṛṣṭaḥ asmi rāja indraḥ itihāsa purāṇayoḥ śravaṇe tu mahā bāho śrūyatām yat mayā purā pṛṣṭaḥ vocat mahā tejāḥ viriṃcaḥ bhagavān guruḥ haṃta te kathayāmi eṣa purāṇa śravaṇe vidhim itihāsa purāṇāni śrutvā bhaktyā viśeṣataḥ sāyam prātar tathā rātrau śuciḥ bhūtvā śṛṇoti yaḥ tasya viṣṇuḥ tathā brahmā tuṣyate śaṃkaraḥ tathā pratyūṣe bhagavān brahmā dina aṃte tuṣyate hariḥ mahādevaḥ tathā rātrau śṛṇvatām tuṣyate vibhuḥ pāraṇāni daśāheṣu eke kurvaṃti tāni bhoḥ bhavet vai rāja śārdūla śṛṇu teṣām ca yat phalam vidhānam vācakasya iha śṛṇvatām ca viśām pate śuddha vāsāḥ gṛhāt etya sthānam yat samaya anvitam na ati uccam na ati nīcam ca hi āsanam bhajate tatas vandanīyam prapūjya ca śrotṛbhiḥ kuru nandana vyāsapīṭham tu tat proktam guroḥ āsanam ādiśet na stheyam śrāvakaiḥ tasmāt vācakasya āsane nṛpa rāja āsane yathā bhṛtyaiḥ yathā putraiḥ pituḥ nṛpa yathā śiśuḥ guroḥ vīra sa teṣām hi guruḥ mataḥ deva arcām agratas kṛtvā brāhmaṇa arcām viśeṣataḥ upa viśya tatas paścāt śrāvakaḥ śṛṇuyāt nṛpa samastān āgatān kṛtvā tatas pustakam ādadet praṇamya śirasā tasya pustakasya viśām pate graṃthim ca śithilām kuryāt vācakaḥ kuru nandana patrāṇi bhagavān brahmā akṣarāṇi janārdanaḥ śaṃkaraḥ ca tathā sūtram paṃktayaḥ sarva devatāḥ pāvakaḥ ca tathā sūtre madhye bhānuḥ samāśritaḥ agre sthitāḥ grahāḥ sarve diśaḥ vā api tathā vibho smṛtaḥ meruḥ sadā śaṃkuḥ chidram ākāśam ucyate yaṃtra dvayam kāṣṭha mayam adhordhvam yat udāhṛtam dyāvāpṛthivyoḥ ca śaṃkhaḥ tathā caṃdraḥ udāhṛtaḥ namasyam pūjanīyam ca gṛhe sthāpyam vibhūtaye sa yāti paramam sthānam yatra devaḥ divākaraḥ nirūpya pātram rāja indra karābhyām gṛhya vācakaḥ praṇamya śirasā sarvān brahma ādīn vyāsam eva ca vālmīkim ca tathā rājan vidhim viṣṇum śivam ravim namaskāram atha eṣām tu paṭhitvā kuru naṃdana tatas asau vyāharet viprān vācakaḥ sapta svara samāyuktam kāle kāle viśām pate īdṛśāt vācakāt viprāt śrutvā śraddhā samanvitaḥ itihāsa purāṇāni rāmasya caritam tathā niyama sthaḥ śuciḥ śrotā śṛṇuyāt phalam aśnute brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyaḥ vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ ca api viśeṣataḥ aśvamedham avāpnoti sarvān kāmān avāpnute snātaiḥ gṛham samāgamya śrotṛbhiḥ vācakasya tu praṇamya śirasā vipram vācakam śraddhayā nṛpa āsanam ca samāśritya sthātavyam vācakasya tu saṃmukham rāja śārdūla vāgyataiḥ su samāhitaiḥ na vaktavyam mahā bāho śrāvakaiḥ saṃśayāt ṛte saṃśaye sati praṣṭavyaḥ vācakaḥ saṃprasādya tu vācakena api vaktavyam yat syāt teṣām nibodhanam anugrahāya sarveṣām aśeṣāḥ guravaḥ nṛpa namaskāra ādayaḥ śrāvyā śivam astu iti vā udyate vāgyataiḥ nṛpa śārdla varṇaiḥ sarvaiḥ mahīpate śūdrāṇām puratas vaiśyāḥ vaiśyānām kṣatriṇaḥ tathā ye ca saṃkara jāḥ rājan narāḥ te śūdra pṛṣṭhatas brāhmaṇam vācakam vidyāt na anya varṇa jam ādaret śrutvā anya varṇa jāt vācam vācakāt narakam vrajet ittham hi śṛṇvatām teṣām varṇānām anupūrvaśas māsi māsi bhavet rājan pāraṇam kuru nandana śreyaḥ artham ātmanaḥ rājan pūjayet vācakam budhaḥ māsi pūrṇe dvija śreṣṭhe dātavyam svarṇamāṣakam vācakāya dvijaśreṣṭha vaiśyena api trayam tathā śūdreṇa eva ca catvāraḥ dātavyāḥ svarṇa māṣakāḥ māsi māsi dvijaśreṣṭha śraddhayā vācakāya tu prathame pāraṇe rājan vācakam pūjya śaktitaḥ agniṣṭomasya yajñasya phalam viṃdati mānavaḥ kārtika ādīn samārabhya yāvat kārttikam acyuta agniṣṭomam gosavam ca jyotiṣṭomam tathā nṛpa sautrāmaṇim vājapeyam vaiṣṇavam ca tathā vibho māheśvaram tathā brāhmam puṃḍarīkam yajeta yaḥ āditya yajñasya tathā rājasūya aśvamedhayoḥ phalam prāpnoti rāja iṃdra māsaiḥ dvādaśabhiḥ kramāt ittham yajña phalam prāpya yāti lokān tathā uttamān śociṣkeśa gṛhe gatvā gacchet cailavile gṛhe dhiṣaṇasya gṛham gatvā tatas citraśikhaṃḍinaḥ evam eva nṛpa śreṣṭha na atra kāryā vicāraṇā phalam etat samuddiṣṭam śṛṇvatām satatam nṛṇām etat phalam vatsareṇa śṛṇvataḥ vidhitaḥ nṛpa etāni parimāṇāni vatsareṇa bhavaṃti vai śṛṇvatām nṛpa śārdūla dadatām vācakāya vai ekam ca dve tathā trīṇi catvāri ca viśām pate deyāni vācakāya iha māsi māsi narādhipa brāhmaṇa ādyaiḥ nṛpa śreṣṭha sarva varṇa vibhāgaśaḥ samāpte parvaṇi tathā vācakam pūjayet punar vācakam brāhmaṇam ca eva sarva kāmaiḥ prapūjayet hiraṇyam rajatam rukmam gāḥ ca kāṃsya upadohanāḥ yathā sa dakṣiṇam ca annam śrāddha kāle prakīrtitam tathā śrutam nṛpa śreṣṭha sa dakṣiṇam udāhṛtam vācakam pūjayet yasmāt paścāt lekhaka pūjanam samāpte parvaṇi vibho viśeṣeṇa eva ca arcayet vācakaḥ pūjitaḥ yena pūjitāḥ tena devatāḥ iti vedhāḥ sadā prāha devānām puratas purā tasmin tuṣṭe jagat sarvam tuṣṭam bhavati nityaśas tiṣṭhanti yasya śāstrāṇi jihvā agre pṛthivīpate dṛṣṭaḥ ca gocaraḥ tāta kaḥ tena sadṛśaḥ dvijaḥ tasmāt annam sadā pūrvam tasmai deyam viduḥ budhāḥ śrāddhe yasya dvijaḥ bhuṃkte vācakaḥ bhavanti pitaraḥ tasya tṛptāḥ varṣa śatam nṛpa yathā iha sarva devānām bhāskaraḥ pravaraḥ smṛtaḥ vispaṣṭam adbhutam śāṃtam spaṣṭa akṣara padam tathā budhyamānaḥ sadā atyartham graṃthātham kṛtsnaśas nṛpa brāhmaṇa ādiṣu varṇeṣu grantha artham vācayet nṛpa atas anyathā kathayitā jñeyaḥ asau vaktṛ nāmakaḥ deśe atha pattane rājan sa deśaḥ pravaraḥ smṛtaḥ te dhanyāḥ te mahātmānaḥ te kṛtārthāḥ na saṃśayaḥ na śobhate puram vīra vyāsa hīnam kadācana yathā arka hīnam hi dinam caṃdra hīnā yathā niśā tathā vyāsa vihīnam tu rājate na puram kvacid praṇamya vācakam bhaktyā yat phalam prāpyate naraiḥ tathā vyāsa samaḥ nā asti brāhmaṇaḥ bhuvi kaścana kurukṣetra samam tīrtham na dvitīyam pracakṣate na nadī gaṃgayā tulyā na devaḥ bhāskarāt varaḥ na aśvamedha samam puṇyam na pāpam brahmahatyayā daive karmaṇi pitrye ca pāvanaḥ paramaḥ nṛṇām na asti vyāsa samaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ iti iyam vaidikī śrutiḥ atha vipra sahasrāṇām vipraḥ ayam śreṣṭhaḥ īritaḥ upaviṣṭaḥ yadā bhuṃkte vyāsaḥ vai vipra maṇḍale śrāddhe tāta pavitrāṇi kathitāni purā mama brahmaṇā rāja śārdūla śṛṇu tāni yathāvidhi madhu pāyasam kālaśākaḥ tilāḥ ca kutapaḥ tathā rājatam ca api pātreṣu brāhmaṇeṣu atha vācakaḥ vācakaḥ ca yatiḥ ca eva tathā yaḥ ca ṣaḍaṃga vid ete sarve nṛpa śreṣṭha vijñeyāḥ paṃkti pāvanāḥ nāmanī vācakasya ete śṛṅga vā artham atha etayoḥ itihāsa purāṇāni jaya iti viditāni vai jaya upajīvī tena asau gataḥ khyātim tu vācakaḥ vispaṣṭam adbhutam śāṃtam spaṣṭa akṣaram idam tathā yudhyamānā utha vā atyartham graṃtha artham kṛtsnaśas nṛpa brāhmaṇa ādiṣu varṇeṣu grantha artham ca arpayet tathā trividham vācakam vidyāt sadā guṇa vibhedataḥ śrāvakam ca mahā bāho trividham guṇa bhedataḥ a budhyamānaḥ graṃtha artham abhīṣṭa utsāha varjitaḥ īdṛśam vācayet yaḥ tu vācakaḥ kṣmādhipa īśvara ca ajñānāt grantha dūṣakaḥ budhyate na ca kaṣṭāt ca sa jñeyaḥ vācaka adhamaḥ vispaṣṭam adbhutam śāṃtam rasa bhāva samanvitam a budhyamānaḥ graṃtha artham vācayet yaḥ tu vācakaḥ sa jñeyaḥ rājasaḥ rājan nidānīm sāttvikam śṛṇu vispaṣṭam adbhutam śāṃtam spaṣṭa akṣara padam tathā atti artham budhyamānaḥ tu graṃtha artham kṛtsnaśas nṛpa brāhmaṇa ādiṣu varṇeṣu ācāryaḥ vidhivat nṛpa yaḥ evam vācayet rājan sa jñeyaḥ sāttvikaḥ budhaiḥ śraddhā bhakti vihīnaḥ yaḥ lobhiṣṭhaḥ kaṭukaḥ yathā hetuvāda paraḥ rājan tathā asūyā samanvitaḥ nityām naimittikām kāmyām ādadat dakṣiṇām nṛpa vācakaḥ yaḥ mahā bāho śṛṇuyāt yaḥ tu mānavaḥ sa jñeyaḥ tāmasaḥ rājan śrāvakaḥ mānavaḥ api saḥ prasaṃgāt śṛṇuyāt yaḥ tu śraddhā bhakti vivarjitaḥ saṃtyajya sarva kāryāṇi bhaktyā śraddhā samanvitaḥ satatam pūjayet yaḥ tu vācakam śraddhayā mudā yaḥ evam śṛṇuyāt vīra sa jñeyaḥ sāttvikaḥ budhaiḥ vyāsaḥ pūjyaḥ śrāvakāṇām yathā vyāsa vacaḥ nṛpa tasmāt pūjyatamaḥ nā anyaḥ śrāvakāṇām nṛpa uttama yatas sa vai guruḥ teṣām jñāna dātā sadā nṛpa caturṇām iha varṇānām na anyaḥ bandhuḥ pracakṣyate vyāsāt ṛte nṛpa śreṣṭhaḥ iti iyam vaidikī śrutiḥ sa guruḥ sa pitā mātā sa baṃdhuḥ sa suhṛd tathā vācakaḥ nṛpa śārdūla vipra ādīnām aśeṣatas ittham vyāsaḥ guruḥ jñeyaḥ pūjyaḥ mānyaḥ dvijātibhiḥ śṛṇvaṃti ye narāḥ rājan sa teṣām guruḥ ucyate pūjā artham tasya samayaḥ śrāvakāṇām udāhṛtaḥ ye śṛṇvaṃti nṛpa śreṣṭha māsi māsi dadaṃti te svarṇa māṣakam ekasmai vācakāya pṛthak pṛthak dvādaśyām ca amāvāsyāyām atha vā ravi saṃkrame sā nityā dakṣiṇā tasyām yā ca śreyaḥ artham ātmanaḥ prāpte vā aparapakṣe ca dānam tasyai sva śaktitaḥ deyam syāt śrāvakaiḥ tāta tam muktvā na anyatas nṛpa prathamam tasya dātavyam śreyaḥ artham śrāvakaiḥ sadā a dattvā tasya saṃprayacchaṃti śrāvakāḥ kṛtvā avamānam atha taiḥ prāpyate yat phalam nṛpa brāhmaṇa ādyaiḥ samastaiḥ ca tat śṛṇuṣva varānana śūdra tvam brāhmaṇaḥ yāti kṣatriyaḥ yāti kāka tām jāyate ca tathā vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ cāṇḍāla tām vrajet tasmāt pūjyaḥ nṛpa śreṣṭha prathamam vācakaḥ budhaiḥ āpad kāle ca vṛddhau ca yatas ca asau guruḥ smṛtaḥ vaiśākhyām ayane vīra tṛtīyāyām ca suvrata kārttikyām atha mārgyām ca saṃpūjyaḥ prathamam bhavet hiraṇyam ca suvarṇam ca dhanam dhānyam tathā eva ca annam ca api tathā pakvam māṃsam ca kuru naṃdana na pīḍyate yathā dvaṃdvaiḥ tathā kāryam varānana hemaṃte lomaśāḥ deyāḥ chatram prāvṛṣi sattama upānahau kāla yogye kāle ca eva anulomaśaḥ ittham dvaṃdva vinirmuktaḥ sa yeṣām vācakaḥ nṛpa te dhanyāḥ śrāvakāḥ loke te gatāḥ paramam padam ātmanā tu katham vīra sukham icchet vicakṣaṇaḥ viṣama sthe gurau rājan yatas ca sa guruḥ smṛtaḥ vācaka śrāvakāṇām ca tasmāt dvaṃdvam vighātayet yatnaḥ kāryaḥ śrāvakaiḥ ca vācakasya janādhipa ittham pūjyaḥ sadā vyāsaḥ śreyaḥ artham prathamam nṛpa bhartā pūjyaḥ yathā strīṇām sarvāsām vai mahī pate śrāvakāṇām tathā rājan vācakaḥ pūjyaḥ ucyate upādhyāyaḥ tu śiṣyāṇām yathā bhāgavataḥ hariḥ saurāṇām ca yathā bhānuḥ śaivānām śaṃkaraḥ yathā vācakaḥ tu tathā pūjyaḥ śrāvakāṇām narādhipa dakṣiṇām dadatā nityam śrotavyam bhūtim icchatā pūrva ukta māṣakam tasmai vācakāya janādhipa yadā dātum na śaknoti māṣakam kāṃcanasya tu rajatasya tadā deyam māṣakam śreyase nṛpa tad abhāve hiraṇyam ca vitta śāṭhya vivarjitaḥ mṛttikā api hi dātavyā prāpnoti sat phalam śubham iti eṣā dakṣiṇā nityā māsi māsi bhavet nṛpa amale vāsasī rājan gaṃdha mālya vibhūṣaṇe jñātvā sarva samāptim tu pūjayet śrāvakaḥ dhuvam naimittikām ca nityām ca dakṣi ṇāma pradāya ca śṛṇoti ca sadā yaḥ tu tasya tat niṣphalam śrutam yathā ca dakṣiṇā hīnāt yajñāt na phalam aśnute tathā śrutam ca rāja iṃdra dakṣi ṇā rahitam smṛtam caturguṇā bhavet rājanyā nityā dakṣiṇā vibho samāpte parvaṇi vibho iti āha bhagavān śivaḥ iti eṣa kathitaḥ rājan purāṇa śravaṇe vidhiḥ snānam dānam japaḥ homaḥ pitṛ deva abhipūjanam vidhi pūrvam smṛtam jñeyam yathā iha phala dam nṛpa śārdūla purāṇa śravaṇam tathā yathā ayam kathitam tubhyam vidhinā śravaṇam mayā yathā uktam tu yathā jīvam yathā uktam brahma vādinā sa brāhmaṇaḥ mahā rāja sarva lokeṣu pūjitaḥ yathāśrutam mahā bāho tathā idam kathitam tava bhāskarasya tu māhātmyam māhātmyam vācakasya tu tathā ca saptamīkalpaḥ sarva pāpa bhaya apahaḥ bhaga lokam samāsādya triṣu lokeṣu gīyate daśānām rājasūyānām agniṣṭoma śatasya ca śravaṇāt phalam āpnoti pitāmaha vacaḥ yathā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe brāhme parvaṇi saptamīkalpe saura dharme ādityamāhātmyavācakamāhātmyapurāṇavidhivarṇanam nāma ṣoḍaśa adhika dviśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ pūrva ardhaḥ samāptaḥ ayam śrī nārāyaṇa arpaṇam astu iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe prathamam brāhmaparva samāptam viṣaya sūcī pātāla varṇanam śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ om namaḥ kamala dala nayana abhirāmāya śrī rāmacaṃdrāya oṃkāra alaṃkṛtena tribhuvana guruṇā brahmaṇā dṛṣṭa pūtam saṃbhoga ābhoga gamyam jana kaluṣa haram pauṣkaram vaḥ punātu jayati bhuvana dīpaḥ bhāskaraḥ lokakartā jayati ca śiti dehaḥ śārṅgadhanvā murāriḥ jayati ca śaśimauliḥ rudra nāma abhidheyaḥ jayati sakala mauliḥ bhānu mān citrabhānuḥ purāṇam saṃpravakṣyāmi yat uktam brahma yoginā purāṇa saṃhitām puṇyām papracchuḥ raumaharṣaṇim vaktum arhasi ca asmākam purāṇa artha viśārada munīnām vacanam śrutvā sūtaḥ paurāṇika uttamaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca vakṣye paurāṇikīm divyām kathām pāpa praṇāśinīm puṇyam pavitram āyuṣyam idānīm śṛṇuta dvijāḥ bhaviṣya purāṇam akhilam yat jagāda gadādharaḥ dharma praśaṃsanam ca atra brāhmaṇa ādi praśaṃsanam pratimā karaṇam ca eva sthāpana citra lakṣaṇam kāla vyavasthā sarga ādi pratisarga ādi lakṣaṇam purāṇa lakṣaṇam ca eva bhū golasya ca nirṇayam nirūpaṇam tithīnām ca śrāddha saṃkalpam antaram bhūtam bhavyam bhaviṣyam ca yuga dharma anuśāsanam uccāvaca avadhānam ca prāyaścitta ādikam ca yat ṣaṣṭyā adhika aṣṭa sāhasra nava śloka śata udbhavam paṃcataṃtra samāyuktam prati taṃtre ca viṃśatiḥ paṃca uttaram tathā adhyāyāḥ purāṇe asmin dvijottamāḥ trayāṇām āśramāṇām ca gṛhasthaḥ yoniḥ ucyate anye api su upajīvanti tasmāt śreṣṭhaḥ gṛhāśramī eka āśramam gṛhasthasya trayāṇām mūrti darśanam tasmāt gārhastham eva ekam vijñeyam dharma śāsanam taḍāgasya ca sānnidhye taḍāgam parivarjayet prapā sthāne prapā varjyā maṭha sthāne maṭham tyajet dharmāt eva apavargaḥ ayam tasmāt dharmam samāśrayet dharmaḥ ca arthaḥ ca kāmaḥ ca trivargaḥ triguṇaḥ mataḥ ūrdhvam gacchaṃti sattva sthāḥ madhye tiṣṭhaṃti rājasāḥ jaghanya guṇa vṛtti sthāḥ adhas gacchaṃti tāmasāḥ iha loke sukhī bhūtvā pretya ānaṃtyāya kalpate tasmāt artham ca kāmam ca yuktvā dharmam samāśrayet evam ca dharma kāma artham mokṣasya api ca mānavaḥ māhātmyam vā anutiṣṭhet ca sa ca anaṃtyāya kalpate tasmāt artham ca kāmam ca muktvā dharmam samācaret anādinidhanā śaktiḥ na eṣā brāhmī dvijottama karmaṇā prāpyate dharmaḥ jñānena ca na saṃśayaḥ tasmāt jñānena sahitam karmayogam samācaret jñāna pūrvā nivṛttiḥ syāt pravṛttiḥ vartate anyathā tasmāt nivṛttam saṃsevyam anyathā saṃsaret punar ārjavam ca anasūyā ca tīrtha anusaraṇam tathā satyam saṃtoṣaḥ āstikyam śraddhā ca indriya nigrahaḥ devatā abhyarcanam pūjā brāhmaṇānām viśeṣataḥ ahiṃsā satya vādi tvam apaiśunyam su kalpa tā śauca ācāraḥ ca anukaṃpā sarva varṇe śraddhā pūrvāḥ smṛtāḥ dharmāḥ śraddhā madhye tu saṃsthitāḥ śraddhā niṣṭhāḥ pratiṣṭhāḥ ca dharmāḥ śraddhā iva kīrtitāḥ prājāpatyam brāhmaṇānām śrutam sthānam kriyāvatām sthānam aindram kṣatriyāṇām saṃgrāmeṣu apalāyinām vaiśyānām amṛtam sthānam svadharmam anuvartatām gāṃdharvam śūdrajīvānām paricāreṇa vartatām aṣṭāśīti sahasrāṇām munīnām ūrdhvaretasām smṛtam sthānam tu yat sthānam tat eva guru vāsinām saptarṣīṇām tu yat sthānam śrutam tat vai vanaukasām prājāpatyam gṛhasthānām sthānam uktam svayaṃbhuvā yatīnām yata cittānām tat eva vana vāsinām hiraṇyagarbham yat sthānam tasmāt na āvartate punar yoginām amṛtam sthānam vyoma ākhyam parama ākaram ānaṃdam aiśvaram nāma sā kāṣṭhā paramā gatiḥ sṛṣṭi varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca idānīm vistaram ca eva vibhāgam rūpam aiśvaram vakṣye kalpa anusāreṇa manvatara śata anugam āsīt tamaḥ mayam sarvam aprajñātam alakṣaṇam tatra ca ekaḥ mahān āsīt rudraḥ parama kāraṇam ātmanā svayam ātmānam sañcitya bhagavān vibhuḥ manaḥ saṃsṛjate pūrvam ahaṃkāram ca pṛṣṭhatas ahaṃkārāt prajānāti mahābhūtāni pañca ca aṣṭau prakṛtayaḥ proktāḥ vikārāḥ ca eva ṣoḍaśa śabdaḥ sparśaḥ ca rūpam ca rasaḥ gaṃdhaḥ tathā eva ca prāṇaḥ apānaḥ samānaḥ ca udāna vyānau tathā eva ca sattvam rajaḥ tamaḥ ca eva guṇāḥ proktāḥ tu te trayaḥ tasmāt bhāgavataḥ brahmā tasmāt viṣṇuḥ ajāyata brahma viṣṇu mohana artham tatas śaṃbhuḥ tu tejasā brahmā viṣṇuḥ ca dvau etau udbhūtau bhagavat sutau upasaṃharate ca eva nānā bhūtāni sarvaśas evam māsaḥ ca varṣaḥ ca tathā ca aṣṭaśatam dvijāḥ evam buddhīndriyasya asya viṣṇoḥ ca nimiṣaḥ smṛtaḥ eteṣu sapta vikhyātāḥ adhas pātāla vāsinaḥ teṣām ādau ca madhye ca ante rudraḥ prakīrtitaḥ grasate jāyate lokān krīḍā artham tu maheśvaraḥ brahma loka parīpsūnām gatiḥ ūrdhvam prakīrtitā pṛthivīm ca aṃtarikṣam ca diśaḥ ca vidiśaḥ tathā samudrāṇām girīṇām ca adhas tiryak prasaṃkhyayā samudrāṇām ca vistāram pramāṇam ca tatas śṛṇu sthāvarāṇām ca śailānām devānām ca divaukasām catuṣpadānām dvipadām tathā dharma eka bhāṣiṇām sahasraguṇam ākhyātam sthāvarāṇām prakīrtitam sahasraguṇa śīlāḥ ca iti āha bhagavān muniḥ ṛṣiḥ tu prathamam kurvan prakṛtim nāma nāmataḥ tasyāḥ brahmā prakṛtyāḥ tu utpannaḥ saha viṣṇunā tasmāt buddhyā prakurute sṛṣṭim naimittikīm dvijāḥ pāda hīnān kṣatriyān ca tasmāt hīnān tu vaiśyakān caturtha pāda hīnān ca ācāreṣu bahiṣkṛtān pṛthivīm ca aṃtarikṣam ca diśaḥ ca eva api akalpayat lokālokasya saṃsthā ca dvīpānām udadheḥ tathā saritām sāgarāṇām ca tīrthāni āyatanāni ca ulkā nirghāta ketūn ca jyotīṃṣi āyatanāni ca utpannam tasya deheṣu bhūyas kālena pīḍayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ pātāla varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca kalpa abhikaraṇe tatra saṃsthitāḥ dvija puṅgavāḥ sanaṃdana ādayaḥ tatra saṃsthitāḥ brahmaṇaḥ sutāḥ virājaṃte tu devāḥ vai sthitā dāha vivarjitāḥ prājāpatyāt tu bhūrlokaḥ koṭi ṣaṭkena saṃyutaḥ āste yat yogibhiḥ pītvā yogam mṛtyoḥ param gatam gāyaṃti yatayaḥ gāthāḥ hi āstikāḥ brahma vādinaḥ yoginaḥ tāpasāḥ siddhāḥ jāpakāḥ parameṣṭhinam dvāram tu yoginām ekam gacchatām paramam padam tatra gatvā na śocaṃti sa viṣṇuḥ sa ca śaṃkaraḥ sūrya koṭi pratīkāśam puram tasya durāsadam na me varṇayitum śakyam jvālā mālā samākulam tatra nārāyaṇasya api bhavanam brahmaṇaḥ pure śeṣe tasya hariḥ śrīmān māyā sahacaraḥ paraḥ sa viṣṇuḥ loka kathitaḥ punarāvṛtti varjitaḥ prayānti ca mahātmānaḥ ye prapannāḥ janārdanam ūrdhvam brahmāsanāt pūrvam param jyotiḥ mayam śubham devyā saha mahādevaḥ cintyamānaḥ manīṣibhiḥ yogibhiḥ śata sāhasraiḥ vṛta eka tvaiḥ ca saṃvṛtaḥ tatra te yāṃti niyatāḥ dvijāḥ vai brahma vādinaḥ mahādeva para īśānāḥ tāpasāḥ brahma vādinaḥ nirmamāḥ nirahaṃkārāḥ kāma krodha vivarjitāḥ drakṣyaṃti brahmaṇā yuktāḥ rudra lokaḥ sa vai smṛtaḥ ete sapta mahar lokāḥ pṛthivyām parikīrtitāḥ mahī tala ādayaḥ ca adhas pātālāḥ saṃti vai dvijāḥ nṛpeṇa balinā ca eva pātālam svarga vāsinā śailam rasātalam viprāḥ śāṃkaram hi rasātalam suvarṇena muni śreṣṭhāḥ tathā vāsukinā śubham śaṃkukarṇena saṃbhinnam tathā namuci pūrvakam teṣām adhastāt narakāḥ raurava ādyāḥ ca koṭayaḥ pāpinaḥ teṣu pātyaṃte na te avanamitum kṣamāḥ pātālāḥ nāma adhas ca aṃte śeṣa ākhyā vaiṣṇavī tanuḥ kālāgni rudra yoga ātmā nārasiṃhaḥ api mādhavaḥ paṭhyate devaḥ nāga rūpī janārdanaḥ tad ādhāram idam sarvam sakala agnim upāśritam tam āviśya mahā yogī kālaḥ tad vadana analaḥ tāmasī śāṃbhavī mūrtiḥ kāla ātmā parameśvaraḥ saḥ eva garbham āśritya prakāśayati nityaśas iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge pātāla varṇanam nāma tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca etat brahmāṃḍam ākhyātam caturvidham idam mahat tad dvīpa pradhānaḥ jaṃbūḥ plakṣaḥ śālmalaḥ eva ca kuśaḥ krauṃcaḥ ca śākaḥ ca puṣkaraḥ ca eva saptamaḥ ete sapta mahā dvīpāḥ samudraiḥ saptabhiḥ vṛtāḥ dvīpāt dvīpaḥ mahān uktaḥ sāgarāt api sāgaraḥ kṣīroda ikṣurasodaḥ atha kṣārodaḥ ca ghṛta udakaḥ dadhyodaḥ kṣīrasalilaḥ jalodaḥ ca iti sāgarāḥ paṃcāśat koṭi vistīrṇā samudravalayā smṛtā dvīpaiḥ ca saptabhiḥ yuktāḥ yojanānām samānatas jaṃbūdvīpaḥ samastānām dvīpānām madhyatas śubhaḥ praviṣṭaḥ ṣoḍaśa adhastāt dvātriṃśat mūrdhni viṣkṛtaḥ mūle ṣoḍaśa sāhasram vistāraḥ tasya sarvatas himavān himakūṭaḥ ca dakṣiṇe nīlaḥ śvetaḥ ca śṛṃgī ca uttare varṣaparvataḥ lakṣa pramāṇau dvau madhye daśa hīnāḥ tathā apare sahasra dvitayam dīrghāḥ tāvat vistāriṇaḥ ca te bhāratam dakṣiṇam varṣam tatas kiṃpuruṣam smṛtam harivarṣam tathā eva anyat meroḥ dakṣiṇatas dvijāḥ caṃpakam ca uttaram varṣam tathā eva aśva hiraṇmayam uttarāḥ kuravaḥ ca eva yathā ete bhāratāḥ tathā nava sāhasram ekaikam eteṣām dvijasattamāḥ ilāvṛtam mahābhāgāḥ catvāraḥ tatra parvatāḥ viṣkaṃbhāḥ racitāḥ meroḥ yojana ayutam ucchritāḥ pūrveṇa maṃdaraḥ nāma dakṣiṇe gaṃdhamādanaḥ vipulaḥ paścime bhāge supārśvaḥ ca uttare sthitaḥ jaṃbūdvīpasya sā jaṃbūḥ nāma hetoḥ mahā ṛṣayaḥ mahāgaja pramāṇāni jaṃbūni asya phalāni ca patanti bhūbhṛtaḥ pṛṣṭhe śīryamāṇāni sarvaśas tīra sūtram samam prāpya vāyunā ca viśoṣitam jāṃbūnada ākhyam bhavati suvarṇam siddha bhūṣaṇam bhadrāśvaḥ pārśvatas meroḥ ketumālaḥ ca paścime varṣe dve tu muni śreṣṭhāḥ tayoḥ madhye ilāvṛtam tad ūrdhve vāsava sthānam tad ūrdhve śaṃkarasya ca tad ūrdhvam vaiṣṇavaḥ lokaḥ dugārlokaḥ tad ūrdhvatas jyotiḥ mayam param sthānam nirākāram hiraṇmayam jyotiścakra sthitaḥ śuddhaḥ niścalaḥ parameśvaraḥ biṃba ṣaṭka idri nābhau ca ratha cakram divāniśam dikpāla ādyāḥ grahāḥ tatra dakṣiṇāt uttarāyaṇam pratimāsam gataḥ paṃthāḥ hrāsa vṛddhi dina kṣayaḥ raviṇā laṃghitaḥ māsaḥ cāṃdraḥ khyātaḥ malimlucaḥ kṛtvā triṣu tu ahorātram tārā āmaya gatam vibhum yāme yāme ca udayaḥ ca deśe deśe ca śarvarī divā carati yaḥ sūryaḥ rātrau carati candramāḥ nakṣatrāṇi divā rātrau sūrya cakre pratiṣṭhitam deśāt nam ca avagamanam yatra tasmāt iva abhavat rātriṃdivam vijānīyāt jyotiścakre pratiṣṭhitam udaya astamanam na asti nakṣatrāṇām viśeṣataḥ yat nakṣatre ca yaḥ deśaḥ sa teṣām udayaḥ smṛtaḥ tatra astaḥ jīva śukrāṇām sūrya ādīnām ca sarvaśas tadā kāle niyoktavyāḥ bhārgavāḥ tādikī kriyā sūryaḥ somaḥ budhaḥ caṃdraḥ bhārgavaḥ ca eva śīghrakaḥ dakṣiṇāyanam āsthāya yadā carati raśmimān tadā sarva grahāṇām sa sūryaḥ udhastāt prasarpati vistīrṇa maṃḍalam kṛtvā tasya ūrdhve carate śaśī nakṣatra maṃḍalam kṛtsnam somāt ūrdhvam prasarpati nakṣatrebhyaḥ budhaḥ ca ūrdhvam budhāt ūrdhvam tu bhārgavaḥ candraḥ tu bhārgavāt ūrdhvam caṃdrāt ūrdhvam śanaiścaraḥ tasmāt śanaiścarāt ūrdhvam tatas saptarṣi maṃḍalam ṛṣīṇām ca eva saptānām dhruvaḥ ca ūrdhvam vyavasthitaḥ rāśi ardha à¥¥±dheṣu gatiḥ yatra tithīnām ca tithau smṛtā staṃbhate carate śīghram hrāse ca api dinakṣayaḥ pāda astam ca api śukrasya mahā astam tatra dṛśyate pādāḥ te pakṣa mātram syāt mahāḥ te yāma mātrakam cakre pakṣa ardha māsaḥ syāt aticāraḥ aṣṭa vāsarān bāla vṛddhaḥ tu śukrasya deśa sthe vā gaṇasya ca pādāt ūrdhvam mahāḥ tasya vaiśyasya dvijasa ttamāḥ śeṣa ardham bhārgavāḥ tasya śūdrāṇām atha garhitam varjayet vāsarān sapta iti ca ātharvaṇī śrutiḥ sūtaḥ uvāca trayāṇām eva varṇānām janmataḥ brāhmaṇaḥ prabhuḥ saṃsṛṣṭāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ pūrvam tapaḥ taptvā dvijottamāḥ havyānām iha kavyānām sarvasya api ca guptaye kavyāni ca eva pitaraḥ kim bhūtam adhikam tatas svakīyam brāhmaṇaḥ bhuṃkte vidadhāti dvijottamāḥ trayāṇām iha varṇānām bhāva abhāvāya vai dvijaḥ abhāvāya bhavet kruddhaḥ tasmāt pūjyaḥ sadā hi saḥ garbhādhāna ādayaḥ ca iha saṃskārāḥ yasya sattamāḥ catvāriṃśat tathā ca aṣṭau nirvṛttāḥ śāstrataḥ dvijāḥ sa yāti brahmaṇaḥ sthānam brāhmaṇa tvena saṃyutaḥ saṃskāra pūtaḥ prathamaḥ veda pūtaḥ dvitīyakaḥ vidyāpūtaḥ tṛtīyaḥ syāt tīrthapūtaḥ tu anaṃtaram kṣetra pūtam pravijñāya vipūtam pūjayet dvijāḥ pūtānām paramaḥ pūtaḥ gurūṇām paramaḥ guruḥ pūjayitvā dvijān devāḥ svargam bhuñjaṃti ca akṣayam manuṣyāḥ ca api deva tvam svam svam rājyam gatena saḥ yasya viprāḥ prasīdaṃti tasya viṣṇuḥ prasīdati tasmāt brāhmaṇa pūjāyām viṣṇuḥ tuṣyati tad kṣaṇāt yasmāt viṣṇu mukhāt vipraḥ samudbhūtaḥ purā dvijāḥ vedāḥ tatra eva saṃjātāḥ sṛṣṭi saṃhāra hetavaḥ tasmāt vipra mukhe vedāḥ ca arpitāḥ puruṣeṇa hi pūjā artham brahma lokānām sarva jñāna arthataḥ dhruvam pitṛ yajña vivāheṣu vahni kāryeṣu śāṃtiṣu praśastāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ nityam sarva svastyayaneṣu ca devāḥ bhuñjaṃti havyāni balim preta ādayaḥ asurāḥ dānam homam balim ca eva vinā vipreṇa niṣphalam bhuñjate ca asurāḥ tatra pretāḥ bhūtāḥ ca rākṣasāḥ tasmāt brāhmaṇam āhūya tasya pūjām ca kārayet kāle deśe ca pātre ca lakṣa koṭi guṇam bhavet śraddhayā ca dvijam dṛṣṭvā prakuryāt abhivādanam dīrgha āyuḥ tasya vākyena ciraṃjīvī bhavet naraḥ anabhivādinām vipre dveṣāt aśraddhayā api ca āyuḥ kṣīṇam bhavet puṃsām bhūmi nāśaḥ ca durgatiḥ āyuḥ vṛddhiḥ yaśoḥ vṛddhiḥ vṛddhiḥ vidyā dhanasya ca pūjayitvā dvijaśreṣṭhān bhavet na asti atra saṃśayaḥ svāhā svadhā svasti vivarjitāni śmaśāna tulyāni gṛhāṇi tāni adharmaḥ viṣamaḥ ca eva paśuḥ ca piśunaḥ tathā pāpiṣṭhaḥ naṣṭa kaṣṭau ca ruṣṭaḥ duṣṭaḥ ca muktakaḥ hṛṣṭaḥ kuṇṭhaḥ ca andhaḥ ca kāṇaḥ ca eva tathā aparaḥ caṇḍaḥ khaṇḍaḥ ca vaktā ca dattasya apaharaḥ tathā nīcaḥ khalaḥ ca vācālaḥ kadaryaḥ capalaḥ tathā malīmasaḥ ca te doṣāḥ ṣaḍviṃśatiḥ amī matāḥ eteṣām ca api vipra indrāḥ pañcāśītiḥ nigadyate śṛṇudhvam dvija śārdūlāḥ śāstre smin bruvataḥ kramāt paśuḥ caturvidhaḥ ca eva kṛpaṇaḥ api hi vai dvidhā dvidhā atha api ca pāpiṣṭhaḥ naṣṭaḥ saptavidhaḥ smṛtaḥ kaṣṭaḥ syāt pañcadhā jñeyaḥ ruṣṭaḥ api syāt dvidhā duṣṭaḥ syāt ṣaḍvidhaḥ jñeyaḥ puṣṭaḥ ca eva bhavet dvidhā hṛṣṭaḥ ca aṣṭavidhaḥ proktaḥ kuṇṭhaḥ ca eva tridhā uditaḥ andhaḥ kāṇaḥ ca tau dvau dvau syāt vai ca sa guṇaḥ aguṇaḥ dvau caṇḍau capalaḥ ca ekau aṇḍacaṇḍaḥ dviguḥ bhavet daṇḍa paṇḍau tathā jñeyau khala nīcau catur dvayam vācālaḥ ca kadaryaḥ ca kramāt tribhiḥ udāhṛtaḥ kadaryaḥ capalaḥ ca eva tathā jñeyaḥ malīmasaḥ pṛthak lakṣaṇam eteṣām śṛṇudhvam dvijasattamāḥ ucca āsanam guroḥ agre tīrthayātrām karoti yaḥ dvitīyaḥ ca adhamaḥ proktaḥ niṃditaḥ parikīrtitaḥ vācā eva madhurā ślakṣṇā hṛdi hālāhalam viṣam hari sevāḥ vihīnaḥ yaḥ sa paśuḥ yonitaḥ paśuḥ dṛṣṭam devam parityajya adṛṣṭam bhajate tu yaḥ āyuṣaḥ tu kṣaya arthāya śāstrā iyam ṛṣi saṃmataḥ yoga abhyāsam tatas hitvā tṛtīyaḥ ca adhamaḥ paśuḥ bahūni pustakāni iha śāstrāṇi vividhāni ca tasya sāram na jānāti saḥ eva jaṃbukaḥ paśuḥ saḥ api syāt piśunaḥ khyātaḥ praṇayāt vā dvitīyakaḥ mlānam ca api ca tikta annam yaḥ prayacchati durmatiḥ kṛpaṇaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ na svargī na ca mokṣa bhāj ku dātā ca mudā hīnaḥ sa krodhaḥ tu yajeta yaḥ saḥ eva kṛpaṇaḥ khyātaḥ sarva dharma bahiṣkṛtaḥ adoṣeṇa śubha tyāgī śubha kārya upavikrayī pitṛ mātṛ guru tyāgī śauca ācāra vivarjitaḥ pitroḥ agre samaśnāti sa pāpiṣṭhatamaḥ smṛtaḥ dvitīyaḥ tu sa pāpiṣṭhaḥ homa lopī tṛtīyakaḥ sādhu ācāram ca pracchāya sevanam ca api darśayet sa naṣṭaḥ iti vijñeyaḥ kraya krītam ca maithunam jīvet devala vṛttiḥ yaḥ bhāryā vipaṇa jīvakaḥ kanyā śulkena jīvet vā strīdhanena ca vā kvacid ṣaṭ eva naṣṭāḥ śāstre ca na svarga mokṣa bhāginaḥ sadā kruddham manaḥ yasya hīnam dṛṣṭvā prakopavān bhrukuṭī kuṭilaḥ kruddhaḥ ruṣṭaḥ paṃcavidha uditaḥ duṣṭaiḥ saha sat ālāpaḥ sa duṣṭaḥ saptadhā smṛtaḥ ekākī miṣṭam aśnāti vaṃcakaḥ sādhu niṃdakaḥ yathā sūkaraḥ puṣṭaḥ syāt tathā puṣṭaḥ prakīrtitaḥ nigama āgama taṃtrāṇi na adhyāpayati yaḥ dvijaḥ na śṛṇoti ca pāpa ātmā sa duṣṭaḥ iti ca ucyate śrutiḥ smṛtiḥ ca viprāṇām nayane dve vinirmite ekena vikalaḥ kāṇaḥ dvābhyām aṃdhaḥ prakīrtitaḥ dvija adhamaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ sa caṃḍaḥ śāstra niṃditaḥ piśunaḥ rāja gāmī ca śūdra sevakaḥ eva ca śūdra aṃganā āgamaḥ vipraḥ sa caṃḍaḥ ca dvija adhamaḥ pakva annam śūdra gehe ca yaḥ bhuṃkte sakṛt eva vā paṃca rātram śūdra gehe nivāsī caṃḍaḥ ucyate aṣṭa kuṣṭha anvitaḥ kuṣṭhī tri kuṣṭhī śāstra ninditaḥ kīṭa vat bhramaṇam yasya ku vyāpārī ku paṃḍitaḥ sa dvidhā śūkara paśuḥ niṃditaḥ siddha saṃmataḥ kapolena hi saṃyuktaḥ bhrukuṭī kuṭila ānanaḥ nṛpa vat daṃḍayet yaḥ tu sa daṃḍaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ dhanena tena itaram devam vā brāhmaṇān api sa kharaḥ ca paśu śreṣṭhaḥ sarva vedeṣu niṃditaḥ sa nīcaḥ iti vijñeyaḥ hi anācāraḥ tathā aparaḥ ṣaḍguṇa alaṃkṛteḥ sādhoḥ doṣāt mṛgayate khalaḥ vane puṣpa phala ākīrṇe śalabhaḥ kaṃṭakān iva daivena ca vihīnaḥ yaḥ kusaṃbhāṣām vadet tu yaḥ cāṃḍālaiḥ saha ālāpaḥ pakṣiṇām poṣaṇe rataḥ mārjāraiḥ ca api saṃbhuṃkte yat kṛtyam makarṭa uditam tṛṇa chedī loṣṭa madī vṛthā māṃsa aśanaḥ ca yaḥ capalaḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ para bhāryā rataḥ tathā nityakriyāḥ akurvāṇaḥ nityam sa ca malīmasaḥ anyāyena gṛham viṃdet anyāyena gṛha andhanam śāstrāt anyat gṛha maṃtram sa steyī brahma ghātakaḥ devaḥ api bhāvayet paścāt mānuṣaḥ api na saṃśayaḥ anyonya bhāvanā kāryā sa steyī yaḥ na bhāvayet guroḥ prasādāt jayati pitroḥ ca api prasādataḥ na poṣayati duṣṭa ātmā sa steyī ca aparaḥ smṛtaḥ sarveṣām ca savarṇānām dharmataḥ brāhmaṇaḥ prabhuḥ pṛthivīpālakaḥ rājā dharmacakṣuḥ udāhṛtaḥ tad vidaḥ gaṇanā abhijñāḥ anya viprāḥ pracakṣate gaṃgā hīnaḥ hataḥ deśaḥ viprahīnā yathā kriyā apradīpā yathā rātriḥ anādityam yathā nabhaḥ tathā asāṃvatsaraḥ rājā bhramati andhaḥ iva adhvani śmaśru yuktaḥ dvijaḥ pūjyaḥ sūryaḥ vipraḥ tu śmaśrulaḥ pratyak pradarśanāt puṇyam tri dinam kalmaṣa apaham darśane vrātya viprasya sūryam dṛṣṭvā viśudhyati jāti bhedāḥ ca catvāraḥ bhojakaḥ kathakaḥ tathā śiva liṃga arcana rataḥ śiva vipraḥ tu niṃditaḥ pravāsayet akṣatena sa putra paśu bāṃdhavaḥ avadhyaḥ sarva lokeṣu rājā rājyena pālayet deśa cakra vidaḥ pūjyāḥ horā cakra vidaḥ parāḥ sūrya cakra vidaḥ pūjyāḥ na avamanyet kathaṃcana gaṇa vipra samaḥ pūjyaḥ daivajñaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ saṃsthānam sūrya vipraḥ yaḥ sūrya viprasya sattamāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge paṃcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca caturṇām api varṇānām na anyaḥ baṃdhuḥ pracakṣate ṛte pituḥ dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ iti iyam naigamī smṛtiḥ trayaḥ api guravaḥ śreṣṭhāḥ tābhyām mātā paraḥ guruḥ ye sodarāḥ jyeṣṭha śreṣṭhāḥ uttarottarataḥ guruḥ dvādaśyām tu āmavāsyām atha vā ravi saṃkrame vāsāṃsi dakṣiṇā deyā maṇi muktāḥ yathāruci prāpte ca aparapakṣe tu bhojayet ca api śaktitas paścāt pravaṃdayet pādau maṃtreṇa anena sattamāḥ yā kukṣi vivare kṛtvā svayam rakṣati sarvatas namāmi jananīm devīm parām prakṛti rūpiṇīm kṛcchreṇa mahatā devyā dhāritaḥ aham yathā udare tvad prasādāt jagat dṛṣṭam mātar nityam namaḥ astu te pṛthivyām yāni tīrthāni sāgara ādīni sarvaśas vasanti yatra tām naumi mātaram bhūti hetave śiva rūpa namaḥ tasmai saṃsāra arṇava setave veda vedāṃga śāstrāṇām tattvam yatra pratiṣṭhitam ādhāraḥ sarva bhūtānām agrajanman namaḥ astu te brāhmaṇaḥ jagatām tīrtham pāvanam paramam yatas bhūdeva hara me pāpam viṣṇu rūpin namaḥ astu te pitāmaham ca praṇamet sarva ādau mātaram gurum mātāmaham ca tadanu ācāryam atha ṛtvijam mātṛ maṃtraiḥ ca prathamam praṇamet bhakti bhāvataḥ yathā agrajaḥ tathā jyeṣṭhaḥ pitṛvyaḥ api dvijottamāḥ dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭe ca sa guruḥ guruḥ mātā tathā guruḥ dṛṣṭa adṛṣṭaḥ tṛtīyaḥ syāt sūryaḥ agniḥ caṃdraḥ eva ca maṃtradātā guruḥ khyātaḥ saptamaḥ parikīrtitaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ svarga apavarga hetukaḥ dṛṣṭadevam ca yaḥ hitvā adṛṣṭam ca niṣevate yathā pitā jyeṣṭha pitā kanīyān ca tathā dvijāḥ jyeṣṭhaḥ bhrātā pitṛ tulyaḥ mānyaḥ satkāra bhāgyataḥ ācāryaḥ brahmaṇaḥ mūrtiḥ pitā mūrtiḥ prajāpateḥ mātā syāt pṛthivī mūrtiḥ bhrātaraḥ mūrtiḥ ātmanaḥ pitā syāt dharma mūrtiḥ sanātanaḥ sa ca api dṛṣṭa devaḥ syāt tad ājñām paripālayet sa yāti brahmaṇaḥ sthānam yasmāt na āvartate punar tasya pāda udaka snānāt gaṃgā nā arhati kevalam dvātrim śat kuṃḍaka śilā sparśane yādṛśam phalam tādṛśam koṭi guṇitam pitāmaha pradakṣiṇe śata mātṛ variṣṭhāḥ ca pitāmahyāḥ ca poṣaṇe guṇāḥ tad darśane viprāḥ saṃsāre na punar viśet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge guruguṇavarṇanam nāma ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca samākhyāmi iha vipra iṃdrāḥ itihāsam purātanam śravaṇe api ca dharma ātman śrūyatām yat mayā purā pṛṣṭaḥ uvocat mahā tejāḥ viriṃcaḥ bhagavān prabhuḥ haṃta te kathayāmi eṣa purāṇa śravaṇe vidhim itihāsa purāṇāni śrutvā bhaktyā dvijottamāḥ sāyam prātar tathā rātrau śuciḥ bhūtvā śṛṇoti yaḥ tasya viṣṇuḥ tathā brahmā tuṣyate śaṃkaraḥ tathā pratyūṣe bhagavān brahmā dina aṃte tuṣyate hariḥ mahādevaḥ tathā rātrau śṛṇvatām paṭhatām nṛṇām na ati ucchritam na ati nīcam sva āsanam bhajate tatas dikpatibhyaḥ namaskṛtya ūṃmkāra adhiṣṭhitān api pustakam dharmaśāstrasya dharma adhiṣṭhāna śāśvatam āgamānām śivaḥ devaḥ taṃtra ādīnām ca śāradā jāmalānām gaṇapatiḥ ḍāmarāṇām śatakratuḥ nārāyaṇaḥ bhāratasya tathā rāmāyaṇasya ca vāsudevaḥ bhavet devaḥ saptānām śṛṇu sattama ādityaḥ vāsudevaḥ ca mādhavaḥ rāma keśavau vanamālī mahādevaḥ saptānām sapta parvasu viṣṇu dharma ādikānām ca śivaḥ jñeyaḥ sanātanaḥ atha ca ādipurāṇasya viriṃciḥ parikīrtitaḥ śuddha odanam yava kṣīram pāyasam kṛsaram tathā kṛsarā annam ca vā dadyāt kramāt bali gaṇam viduḥ śāli bhaktam sa godhūmam tila akṣata vimiśritam paṭhet ca api vidhānena sa yāgaḥ ṣaṣ mayaḥ paraḥ śīta udakam madhu kṣīram sita ikṣvoḥ ca rasaḥ guḍaḥ sagarbhaḥ ca paraḥ jñeyaḥ ṣaṇmayaḥ ca aparaḥ baliḥ śāli taṃḍula prastham tu tad ardham vā tad ardhakam kṣīreṇa api ca saṃbhaktam yava kṣīram idam smṛtam kṣīram bhāga aṣṭakam grāhyam sapta bhāgena saṃsthitam haimaṃtikam sita ākhyam ca tāṃḍulam prapacet carum aśīti pala mānena siddham āsādayet tatas bhāga ardhena dadet paścāt mākṣikam vā sitām api guḍa miśreṇa yaḥ dadyāt saṃparkaḥ jāyate kvacid saṃpṛktam mākṣikeṇa api dadyāt ikṣu rasam budhaḥ gṛhītvā yācakaḥ śuddhaḥ śṛṇuta dvijasattamāḥ śṛṇute vā adhīyānaḥ yaḥ dadyāt haste ca pustakam samutthāya ca gṛhṇīyāt praṇamya vinivedayet pūrvasthaḥ śrāvakaḥ vipraḥ vikhyātaḥ tasya dakṣiṇe paścima āśā mukhena eva tarjanyā aṃguṣṭhayā saha prastareṇa api hastena vinyāsaḥ paṃḍitaiḥ sadā itas nyathā na kartavyaḥ kṛtvā nyāsam atha āpnuyāt asakṛt vinyaset viprāḥ pāvamānīm jale japet vedāṃta āgama vedānta vidhiḥ eṣa smṛtaḥ budhaiḥ yama diś saṃmukhe śrotā vācakaḥ ca uttarā mukhaḥ purāṇa bhārata ākhyāne eṣa vai kathitaḥ vidhiḥ rāmāyaṇe dharma śāstre harivaṃśe ca sattamāḥ itas anyathā yātudhānāḥ praluṃpaṃti phalam yatas tasmāt vidhi vidhānena śṛṇuyāt atha vā paṭhet śrutvā prati puṇya vidyām yaḥ aśnīyāt māṃsam eva tu yadi devālaye tīrthe vācayet śṛṇuyāt atha māhātmya śravaṇāt eva go dānasya phalam labhet pituḥ māhātmyam yat putraiḥ vācyam saṃsadi parvaṇi rudra māhātmya varṇanam durga agre śiva sūryasya vaiṣṇava ākhyānam eva ca yaḥ karoti vimūḍha ātmā gārdabhīm yonim āviśet anujñayā tathā pitroḥ hareḥ kuryāt pradakṣiṇam na viṣṇuḥ na ca brahmā ca na ca rudraḥ śacīpatiḥ jīvan na tarpayet mukhyam gaṃgāyām maraṇe api ca purāṇa śravaṇam puṇyam śūnyam bhāgavatam yadi vyartham bhāgavatam viprāḥ nārasiṃha vihīnakam ādiparvaṇi hīne tu bhārata ākhyam na dhārayet vinā āśvamedhikam viprāḥ vinā yajñānanam vinā bhāratam ca divā āroha dhāraṇa ādau varam vrajet vāyupurāṇam a śrutvā śāstram ca yaugikam vinā vāyu hīnam dehi kulam vṛthā tasya na dhārakam tathā vāyupurāṇam yat vihīnam śravyam anyakam yathā sundarakāṃḍena āraṇyam ca na dhārayeta laṃkām vinā ca ādi kāṃḍam tat likhitvā na dhārayet pārāśaram vinā vyāsam yājñavaktyam vinā makham dakṣam vinā na śaṃkham ca śaṃkha hīnam bṛhaspatim vahnīyam śravaṇa ādyena na ca yuktim athāpayet saṃsthāpanāt eva vinā na ca kim api rākṣasaiḥ na haret pustakam ca api na haret akṣarāṇi ṣaḍ ādya akṣarasya haraṇāt tāmrakuṣṭhī bhavet iha mukha vṛttasya haraṇāt yāvat ācaṃdratārakam sva akṣarasya haraṇe sva mātṛ haraṇe api yat yat bhāratam yat purāṇam stotra rūpāṇi tāni ca tāni veda āgama ādīni pustakeṣu api vācayet vedānām pustakam yatra likhitvā tat na vācayet pustakam nigamānām ca mantra vyākhyāna saṃgraham sphuṭam kṛtvā puras sthāpya yāvatkālam pravartate na vācayet ca vyākhyātā vācakaḥ api pravācayet pauṣkare ca pādam āśvamedham pade pade veda artham vācayet yasmāt viparītaḥ apavācakaḥ tau ubhau patitau jñeyau pāvamānī śatam japet ādi madhya avasāne ca mantre ca praṇavam diśet patrāṇi bhagavān brahmā ūrdhva dīrghāṇi yāni ca janārdanaḥ ca akṣarāṇi mātrā prakṛtiḥ avyayā lipī bhaṃgī maheśaḥ syāt tasyāḥ mātrā sarasvatī eka rekhā ca eka ātmā pādāt ca pāda vicyutiḥ catuṣpāda aṃtare yugmam yugam yugam bhārate ca itihāse ca purāṇe dvijasattamāḥ vaktṛ nāma akṣaraiḥ yuktam paṃkti bhedena sattamāḥ ātma saṃśuddhi saṃśuddhyā dhārayet dharma saṃhitām ripuḥ sūryaḥ tayārāmaḥ yakṣaḥ anantaḥ sarasvatī brāhmī ca yakṣiṇī ca eva gāyatrī navamī smṛtā viṣṇu ante ca bhavet muktiḥ pāda vicyutiḥ anaṃte vipulā kīrtiḥ sarasvatyām dhana āgamaḥ brāhmyā brahmatvam āpnoti yakṣiṇyā yakṣa mandiram brahma indra vaiṣṇavam śaivam śāktikam ca maheśvarī brahma rūpam ca itihāsam aiṃdram rāmāyaṇa ātmakam vaiṣṇavam paramam daivam yat śaivam tat lalāṭakam pāvakaḥ asya tathā mūle madhye bhāge śatakratuḥ agre sthitāḥ grahāḥ sarve diśām īśāḥ tathā dvijāḥ meruḥ sumeruḥ uddiṣṭaḥ saṃgavān kāmaḥ ucyate dvau āpṛthivyau pātālam tasya antar samudāhṛtam na śasyaḥ pūjanīyaḥ ca gṛhe sthāpyeta mānavaḥ yaḥ yasmai śūdraḥ viprāya vṛttim dadyāt ca mānavaḥ sa yāti brahmasadanam maṇivartma ādi kuṭṭimam na śasyaḥ pūjanīyaḥ ca gṛhe sthāpyeta mānavaḥ madhyam tasya haret āyuḥ pārśvavedhaḥ śivam haret aśaktaḥ bilva kāṣṭhasya tathā śrīparṇikasya ca na kāṣṭhasya navam śasyam na lauham yojayet kvacid prāk āraṃbha śloka śatam dharma śāstrasya vai likhet saṃhitāyām purāṇāyām yugma kalpam tad ardhakam tathā api ca akhila vyāsa lekhanāt saṃtati kṣayaḥ anāmātve hema yutām balākam cittam eva ca lekhane pārijātasya matsya māṃsa āśinam likhet vālmīki saṃhitāyāḥ ca lekhane ca tathā kvacid abrāhmaṇena likhitam niṣphalam parikīrtitam durvicāraḥ duṣṭa bhāryaḥ durmatiḥ ca api lekhakaḥ na likhet dharma śāstram ca purāṇam stotra saṃhitam vaṃgunyāt mukhyā yutaiḥ vā api pīta yogaiḥ atha api vā kṛṣṇe vāyu pradam vidyāt pīte vāyu kṣayaḥ bhavet rakte puṣṭim avāpnoti kṛṣṇe ca saṃpad āgamaḥ itihāsa purāṇānām vilikhet yat mukhāt śṛṇu vāyavya ādi mukhena eva kāṣṭha vedam ca saṃlikhet pūrvā mukhe ca artha hāniḥ uttare ca mukhe śriyaḥ maraṇam dakṣiṇa āsye tu paścima āsye dhana kṣayaḥ aśauce mṛtake sūtau amāyām ravi saṃkrame daridraḥ syāt janma ahe ca āyuṣaḥ kṣayaḥ lipi chaṃdaḥ pada jñaḥ ca yuvā dhīmān jita āsanaḥ nāṃdī nāgarakaiḥ varṇaiḥ śuddha nāgarakaiḥ api kāmarūpa akṣaraiḥ vā api yāvat ca saṃhitā gaṇaḥ yāvat akṣara saṃsthānam tāvat svarge mahīyate likhitvā yaḥ tu pāpa ātmā yāvat akṣara saṃkhyayā tāvatkālam tu narake pacyate na atra saṃśayaḥ kuṭuṃba bharaṇa artham tu gṛhṇīyāt vā api vetanam na jīvati sa duṣṭa ātmā dhana vastra phala anvitaḥ patitaiḥ antyajaiḥ mlecchaiḥ rogī kuṣṭhī kṣayī tathā rogī śilīpadaiḥ ca eva mūkaḥ api dharma saṃhataḥ etaiḥ vilikhitam yat ca dhārayet na gṛhāśramī hīna aṃgā pratimā ca eva pustakam māna hīnakam sa vai nārāyaṇaḥ khyātaḥ dhāraṇāt ca kutas api alam śaṃkaraḥ sa tu vijñeyaḥ dharma kāma phala pradaḥ aṣṭa aṃgulam bhavet yat ca tat kaniṣṭham iha ucyate etyāḥ patra kṛte mānam bhūrje mānam na vidyate dvādaśa aṃgulakam yat ca bhūrja taiḍa ādi nirmitam aṃgulānām pramāṇam yat tena api jñāna pustakam harivaṃśe svarṇa māne kṛte mūlya sahasrake yuge yuge pāda hīnam dharmam kuryāt yathāruci praṇamya śirasā sarvān vyāsa ādīn saṃhitā śrutān jaiminim ca tatas vyāsam śaṃkaram ca tathā harim namaskāram atha eṣām tu ādi madhya avasānake asaṃyukta akṣara padam spaṣṭa bhāga samanvitam sāma gāthāḥ samāśritya rāga yukta antaram paṭhet maṇivāraḥ dhanam yat syāt gaura aṃdhām saṃtikaḥ tathā śrīrāgaḥ ca eva hillolarāgaḥ vājāvikaḥ tathā evam prakramamāṇena śṛṇuyāt dharma saṃhitāḥ brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyaḥ vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ ca api viśeṣataḥ aśvamedham avāpnoti sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt śūdrāṇām puratas vaiśyaḥ vaiśyānām kṣatriyaḥ paraḥ kṣatriya ante tathā viprāḥ śṛṇuyuḥ ca agratas sadā na śūdraḥ kathayet dharmān tapā adhyāpane tathā śūdreṇa adhigatam na asti viśeṣāt śabda lakṣaṇam śva śṛgāla kharī kṣīram apeyam hi yathā bhavet evam śūdra mukhāt dharmāḥ na grāhyāḥ śabda saṃskṛtāḥ amedhyam śudhyate toyaiḥ śūdraḥ śrotā hi śudhyati evam śūdraḥ api aśuciḥ syāt yadi vyākaraṇa artha vid yaḥ śūdraḥ uddiśet dharmam tathā ca āgama vaidikam budhyamānaḥ sadā hi artham graṃtha artham kṛtsnam eva ca te dhanyāḥ te kṛtātmānaḥ te kṛtārthāḥ na saṃśayaḥ yathā arka hīnam divasaḥ caṃdra hīnā yathā niśā na rarāja sabhā tadvat vyāsena rahitāḥ dvijāḥ yad gṛhe nā eva śiśavaḥ na rarāja gṛham kvacid tathā eva sodara gehe dṛṣṭvā puṣkara darśanam aṅka māhātmya varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca śṛṇudhvam vipra saṃghātāḥ purāṇam deva saṃmatam tṛtīyam śaivam ākhyātam tatas bhāgavatam param paṃcamam ca tathā mātsyam bhaviṣyam ṣaṣṭham ucyate a sāmarthye ca mātsya uktam vaiṣṇavam ca bhaviṣyakam bhārate ca api parvam ca śāṃtibhaiṣmīyakam tathā parāśara matam gṛhyam gobhila uktāni yāni ca aṃtareṇa āgate martye śāstram na adhyāpayet kvacid maṃḍūke paṃca rātram tu sarpe rātri catuṣṭayam māsam ekam khare kāke sthāna tyāgāt na kutracid haṃse dinam anadhyāyam kṣudra jaṃtau na dūṣaṇam adhyāpayet guroḥ putram jñāninam dhārmikam śucim bhaktam śāṃtam vaiṣṇavam ca jita krodham jita iṃdriyam adhyātmā adhyāpayet ebhyaḥ śaṭham pāpa haram dviṣam nirarthakam maṃtharam ca viśuśrūṣum a yājakam ṣaṇḍam ca eva anṛjum kruddham kṛpaṇam vyasana arthinam niṃdakam ca a vidhi jñam ca dūratas parivarjayet atas vidyā vadati evam pāṭhayaṃtam dvijottamam mā dadyāt bhakti hīnāya durjanāya durātmane a pramādāya viprāya śucaye brahmacāriṇe anyāyena graham vidyām anyam pāṭhayate sukhāt ādhyātmikam vaidikam ca alaukikam vā atha yaḥ vadet mānam ādau praṇamya atha tatas adhīyīta suvrataḥ cūta bhoga samabhyāsāt daridraḥ ca abhijāyate vādabhāga samabhyāsāt dhana nāśāya jāyate yāni anuktāni śāstrāṇi mānanīyāni yāni ca lokānām jñāna vṛddhi artham yaḥ kuryāt dharma saṃgraham jñāna dātā ca lokānām teṣu dharmaḥ pravartate nigamānām jyotiṣāṇām vedānām nāṭakasya ca vyākhyāna saṃgraham kṛtvā kalau nāśam avāpnuyāt vedānām dharbha śāstrāṇām purāṇānām tathā eva ca mīmāṃsā jyotiṣām ca eva nāṭakānām viraṃcinī bhāga avasāne kathitaḥ purāṇa adhyāyaḥ eva ca puṣpakaḥ ca paricchedaḥ khaṃḍaḥ ca pratikhaṃḍakaḥ vyavahāraḥ ca arthaśāstram aśva śāstrasya ca eva hi mohāt kṛtvā homadhenum dattvā śuddhiḥ bhaviṣyati kṛtvā ca ākhyāyikā graṃtha svarūpān sa divam vrajet prātaḥkāle na kurvīt tathā madhyaṃdine dvijāḥ pakṣa aṃte bhūbhidāhe ca bhuvaḥ kaṃpe dinakṣaye pūtam syāt tad kṣaṇāt viprāḥ catuḥ paṃca akṣareṇa vā nārasiṃhasya vinyāse pūtaḥ bhavati tad kṣaṇāt muhūrta ardhena pūta tvam prabhoḥ yāṃti parām gatim striyaḥ vā niṃditaḥ vā api mlecchaḥ yāti parām gatim yaḥ mūḍhaḥ manyate doṣam tasya śaucam samācaret sa gardabhīm kharīm yonim praviśet na atra saṃśayaḥ nava ātmakaḥ bhairavaḥ ca daśamaḥ ca janārdanaḥ rudraḥ ekādaśaḥ ca eva arkārkaḥ ca api dvādaśaḥ trayoviṃśe ca bhūtātmā ṣaḍviṃśe manuḥ īritaḥ tithi ātmakam paṃcadaśe ṣoḍaśa ākhyā kalā aparā aṣṭādaśa akṣaraḥ maṃtraḥ purāṇa ātmakaḥ eva ca ūnaviṃśaḥ caṃdramāḥ syāt viṃśaḥ nārāyaṇaḥ vapuḥ jyotiḥ mayaḥ ca ekaviṃśaḥ dvāviṃśe keśava arcanam nakṣatrāṇi trayoviṃśe caturviṃśe ca tānakam paṃcaviṃśe ca tīrthāni ṣaḍviṃśe ca triyaṃbakaḥ aṣṭāviṃśe dhaneśaḥ ca ūnatriṃśe sarasvatī triṃśat yoge śivaḥ proktaḥ pātālam ekatriṃśake ahorātraḥ ca dvātriṃśe catustriṃśe ca jāhnavī paṃcatriṃśe tad aṃtaḥ syāt śate pūrṇe divākaraḥ lakṣe brahmā tathā koṭyām devaḥ nārāyaṇaḥ paraḥ pum prakṛti ātmakam ca anyat śāradā lipi mātṛkā śuddha brahma mayam nityam jñāna rūpam param mahat kṣaṇe brahma mayam yāti iti āha bhagavān manuḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāga iṃ.akamāhātmyakathanam nāma aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ pūrta nirṇaya varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca aṃtarvedim pravakṣyāmi brahmaṇā uktam yuga aṃtare devatā sthāpanam pūjā bahiveṃdiḥ udāhṛtā prapā pūrta ādikam ca eva brāhmaṇānām ca toṣaṇam dharmasya kāraṇam rājā dharmam etat bhavet nṛpaḥ tasmāt nṛpam samāśritya bahirvedī tatas bhavet saptāśītiḥ bahirvedī sāram eṣām tṛtīyakam devatā sthāpanam ca eva prāsāda karaṇam tathā taḍāga karaṇam ca eva tṛtīyam na caturthakam paṃcamam pitṛ pūjā ca guru pūjā puraḥsarā adhivāsaḥ pratiṣṭhā ca devatānām avikriyā pratimā karaṇam ca eva vṛkṣāṇām atha ropaṇam trividhā sā vinirdiṣṭā uttamā ca atha madhyamā kaniṣṭhā śeṣa kalpaḥ ca sarva kāryeṣu ayam vidhiḥ pūjā homa ādibhiḥ dānaiḥ mānataḥ ca tri bhāgataḥ tri aha sādhya vidhānena aṣṭāviṃśati devatāḥ pratyaham pūjayet tatra jāpakāḥ tatra ṣoḍaśa catvāraḥ yājakāḥ tatra trayoviṃśati devatāḥ braha dikpāla vāruṇyam pṛthivī ca śivaḥ tathā gaṇeśa graha dikpālān varuṇam ca śivam tathā saṃpūjya pūjyate yatra kaniṣṭhaḥ asau vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ eka vṛkṣaḥ ca eka rūpaiḥ pratimā kṣudra devatāḥ eṣām saṃskāra kāryeṣu pratimānām pariṣkriyā gaṇeśa graha dikpālān pūjayet upacārataḥ vāpī ādeḥ puṣkariṇyāḥ ca kṣipet gaṃgā jalam tatas ulūkhala dvayena api jīrṇānām tu kadācana setu prāsāda vāpīnām pratiṣṭhām na eva kārayet prāsādaḥ setavaḥ ca eva taḍāga ādyāḥ tathā eva ca tribhiḥ varṇaiḥ pratiṣṭhā arhāḥ jīrṇānām tu samudgatāḥ munayaḥ mānam icchanti amānam na hi dṛśyate tasmāt mānam pravakṣyāmi yat mānam yādṛśam phalam ṣaṣṭi hasta pramāṇena tat uktam vāraṇa uditam ekaṣaṣṭi hasta mitam prāsādam ca uttamam viduḥ madhyam tad ardham vijñeyam kaniṣṭham tat param smṛtam yaḥ taḍāgam navam kṛtvā jīrṇam vā nava tām nayet vāpī kūpa taḍāgāḥ ca udyāna pravahāḥ tathā guṇānām ca pramāṇena pratimānam vibhāgataḥ dviśatena śatena api prāsādasya eṣa niścayaḥ sahasra hasta vistāram dairghyeṇa aṣṭa adhikam bhavet taḍāgam tam vijānīyāt prathamam mānam īritam madhyam catur śatena api prastāve daśa hīnakam kaniṣṭham tri śatam ca eva prasthe syāt viṃśa hīnakam taḍāga mānam vijñeyam trivarga phala dāyakam atha puṣkariṇī pakṣe dve śate mānam uttamam taḍāge dviguṇā nemī māna ardhe gartam īritam tat kṣetram vāruṇam sthānam tri uditam tat bahis smṛtam caturtham ca eva gāṃdharvam paiśācam paṃcamam viduḥ yakṣa sthāna mitāḥ bhāge evam sarva kramāṇi hi pañca hīnam ca prastāve evam māna vidaḥ viduḥ ṣaṣṭi hastena nalinī prastāve turya hīnakam catuḥṣaṣṭi hasta mitā dīrghikā ca prakīrtitā agnau rogaḥ baṃdhu nāśaḥ ca yāmyām mṛtyuḥ ca ugraḥ prāpyate rākṣase ca bhītiḥ ca ugrā prāpyate vāyavīye tasmāt etāḥ varjanīyāḥ prayatnāt vipra ādīnām devatānām samāje meru sthāne yatra tatra eva kuryāt nadyāḥ tīre varjayet vā smaśāne taḍāgāt vai āśrama ādīn janānām yadā pratiṣṭhām na karoti mūḍhaḥ prāsāda vāpī ādiṣu pāpa cetāḥ yadā tu dīrghā sarasī taḍāga prāsāda kūpa ādiṣu nirmitāni yat apratiṣṭheṣu nipānakeṣu prāsāda kūpeṣu vana ādikeṣu tasmāt pratiṣṭhām vidhinā jala ādeḥ kuryāt yatheṣṭam prayataḥ manuṣyaḥ prasāde mṛd mayam puṇyam mayā etat kathitam dvijāḥ tasmāt caturguṇam proktam tṛṇa kāṣṭha maye tathā tasmāt daśaguṇam proktam kṛte dāru maye bhavet tatas daśaguṇam proktam iṣṭikā racite śubhe tatas ca śata sāhasram sauvarṇe dvijasattamāḥ yat atītam bhaviṣyat ca kulānām ayutam naraḥ viṣṇu lokam nayati āśu kārayitvā hareḥ gṛham kaniṣṭham madhyamam śreṣṭham kārayitvā hareḥ gṛham ardham ca vaiṣṇavam lokam mokṣam ca labhate kramāt hastānām poḍaśaiḥ yāvat prasthe syāt karahīnakam tṛṇavaṃśa maye mānam madhyam ca arka karam bhavet kaniṣṭham tāra hastam syāt uttamam paṃcaviṃśatiḥ sarva uttamam ca dvātriṃśat catuṣkoṇe mahā phalam aṣṭa koṇam na kartavyam tripuram ca kalau yuge sura veśmani yāvaṃtaḥ dvijendrāḥ paramāṇavaḥ kartuḥ daśaguṇam proktam āpāna paripālakaḥ patitam patamānam ca tathā arddha sphuṭitam tathā yaḥ kuryāt viṣṇu prāsādam jyotiḥ liṃgasya vā kvacid sūryasya api viriṃceḥ ca durgāyāḥ śrīdharasya ca svargāt bhraṣṭaḥ bhavet rājā dhanī pūjyatamaḥ api vā devī liṃgeṣu yonau vā kṛtvā devakulam naraḥ prāvṛṣ kāle sthitam toyam agniṣṭoma phalam labhet śarad kāla sthitam toyam yajña toyāt viśiṣyate nidāgha kāle pānīyam yasya tiṣṭhati vāpinaḥ eka aham tu sthitam toyam pṛthivyām dvijasattamāḥ pūrvam pitṛ kule sapta tadvat mātṛ kule dvijāḥ caturdaśam idam jñeyam śatalekham tatas śṛṇu pituḥ ūrdhvam kulam viṃśam mātuḥ ūrdhva kulam tathā tadvat param vijānīyāt bhāryāyāḥ paṃca eva ca paṃca vai mātṛtaḥ ca asya pituḥ mātāmahe kule paṃca paṃca vijānīyāt mātuḥ mātāmahasya ca guroḥ pitṛ kule paṃca tasya mātṛ kule tathā ācāryasya kule dvaṃdvam daśa rāja kulasya ca rājñaḥ mātāmaha kule paṃca ca eva prakīrtitāḥ ātmanā saha vipra iṃdrāḥ uddhāraḥ saṃmataḥ smṛtaḥ kuryāt deva arcanam tīrthe sva vimukte daśārṇave samuddharet kula śatam śṛṇu viṃśa kulam dvija mātuḥ mātāmahasya eva jātim dvaṃdvam udāhṛtam guroḥ saṃtānake dvaṃdvam tadvat yādavasāttvatau parapakṣasya ca ekam syāt ekaviṃśam kulam kramāt pānīyena vinā vṛttiḥ loke nā asti iti karhicit vāra svastham puṣpa khaṃḍam toye patati yāvati caṃdra raśmi vihīnam yat na amṛta tvāya kalpate tasmāt daśaguṇam kuṃḍe tasmāt daśaguṇam hrade devānām sthāpanam kuryāt avimukta phalam śubham susthitam duḥsthitam vā api śiva liṃgam na cālayet punar saṃsāra dharmeṇa sthāpayet a vicārayan bāhu daṃta ādi pratimāḥ viṣṇoḥ ca anyasya sattamāḥ na cālayet sthāpite ca vipra vṛkṣam na cālayet keśavam harivṛkṣam ca madhūkam kiṃśukam tathā na akāle sthāpayet jātu cālanāt brahma hā bhaveta devālayasya puratas kuryāt puṣkariṇī dvijāḥ brāhmaṇānām samāje ca rājadvāre catuṣpathe brāhmaṇa arthe ca mukham kuryāt ca sarvatas paścime puṣṭi kāmam tu uttare sarva kāma dam kuryāt dakṣiṇa pūrve tu arka hasta pramāṇataḥ taḍāge tu phalā hastam hastikam hrāsayet kramāt tṛpye hastam nalinī ādau atas hīnam na kārayet garta tṛṇam kalā hastam taḍāge atra pracakṣyate hīne hīnataram kuryāt hasta mānena hrāsayet yūpaḥ tathā khādiraḥ eva kāryaḥ śraiparṇikaḥ dhātri samudbhavaḥ ca mānaḥ tathā ṣoḍaśa hasta sammitaḥ ratnāt sa gaṇḍī yuga kāma yojitaiḥ hīnaḥ kāryaḥ śubha daḥ sarvadā syāt evaṃvidhaḥ ca eva taḍāga yūpaḥ madhye tathā ṣoḍaśa hasta saṃmitaḥ saṃpūrṇa māne kathitam pramāṇam hīne tu hīnam pravadaṃti tad jñāḥ hasta dvayam prāpitavyam taḍāge hastaḥ sa ardhaḥ puṣkariṇyām praropaḥ prādeśam vai hasta mānam kūpa yūpasya ropataḥ taḍāge ca api ārāme sthāpayet ca jala upari vāpyām garte puṣkariṇyām prakuryāt jala saṃmitam yāvat pratolī gata reṇu saṃga saṃkhyā gaṇaḥ no jaratām upaiti tāvat sureśaḥ sura loka vāsī prāsāda kṛt jātu na jāyate hi kim vā vācyaḥ puṣkariṇyā prabhāvaḥ kartā yaḥ syāt vāruṇaḥ brahma lokāt yāvat kālaḥ bāhu mātra uddhatā syāt dṛṣṭiḥ proktā na nivartet kadācid vinā arjunaiḥ badaraiḥ śailukaiḥ ca hīnam kuryāt śānalaiḥ pātilaiḥ ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge pūrtanirṇayaḥ nāma navamaḥ a dhyāyaḥ pūrta nirṇaya varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca śodhayet prathamam bhūmim mitām kṛtvā tatas dvijāḥ daśa hastena daṇḍena pañca hastena vā punar vāhayet sadā vṛṣabhaiḥ taḍāga arthe api bhūmikām devāgārasya yā bhūmiḥ śvetaiḥ ca vṛṣabhaiḥ api yā bhūmiḥ graha yāga arthe tat na vāhaiḥ api spṛśet ārāma arthe kṛṣṇa vṛṣaiḥ kṛṣā artha khananaiḥ api vāhayet tri dinam viprāḥ pañca vrīhīn ca vāpayet deva pakṣe saptaguṇaḥ ārāma karaṇe guṇaḥ mudga māṣau dhānya tilāḥ śyāmākaḥ ca iti pañcamaḥ masūraḥ ca kalāyaḥ ca sapta vrīhi gaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ sarṣapaḥ ca kalāyaḥ ca mudgaḥ māṣaḥ caturthakaḥ vrīhi trayam māṣa mudgau śyāmākaḥ mahiṣaḥ gaṇaḥ suvarṇamṛttikā grāhyā varṇānām anupūrvaśas bilva vṛkṣaiḥ iyam kuryāt yūpa śūna dhvaje dine aratni mātram vijñeyam praśastam yaṣṭi hastakam ūrṇā sūtra mayīm mūrtim kṛtvā kuryāt catuṣṭayam kṣīradāru garta yutam dvādaśa aṃgulam eva ca pūrva diś praṇave siddhiḥ paścima āśā gatiḥ śubhā maraṇe dakṣiṇāyām ca hāniḥ syāt uttare sthite nārasiṃhena manunā ca agnim prajvālya dāpayet māse ghaṭe tathā māsam kuryāt bhūmi parigraham sūtrayet kīlayet paścāt mahāmāne dvijottamāḥ īśāna abhimukhena eva kūpa pakṣe viduḥ budhāḥ a kṛtvā vāstuyāgam ca yaḥ taḍāgam samutsṛjet prāsāde ca tathā ārāme mahā kūpe tathā eva ca gṛha āraṃbhe ca vipra iṃdrāḥ dadyāt vāstu balim tatas śālaiḥ ca khādiraiḥ ca eva palāśaiḥ keśarasya ca sarpa ākāraḥ taḍāge ca kūpe kumbha ākṛtiḥ bhavet ārāme padma puṣpa ābhaḥ chatra kāraḥ tu maṃḍale kuryāt śuna ākṛtim setau viṣṇu gehe gada ākṛtim aśva ākāram ca aśvamedhe nara medhe nara ākṛtim go yāge ca vṛṣa ākāram gṛha yāge dhvaja ākṛtim śmaśāna go pracāra artham caitya vṛkṣa ālaya uttamāḥ cakra ākāraḥ lakṣa home koṭi home hala ākṛtiḥ nakṣatrāṇi tathā mūlam śasyate druma ropaṇe evam śasya uditām bhūmim śuddhām pūrva plava anvitām somam ca nāga rājānam tatas bījam su śodhayet ānayet dhārayet paścāt raudra tāpena tāpayet garbhādhānam tatas kuryāt viṣṇu maṃtram japan tridhā dehi mā iti ca maṃtreṇa saṃprokṣya daśa vāriṇā iti agṛhīta manunā pañcadhā parimaṃtritam tryaṃbakena iti maṃtreṇa bījam āropayet tatas bhāryām ṛtumatīm snātvā pañcame ahani sattamāḥ tena putra tvam āpnoti na atra kāryā vicāraṇā tulasyāḥ bījam ādāya vaiṣṇava ṛkṣe dvijaḥ ahani kurvaṃti sahakāra ādi ropaṇam ye nara adhamāḥ nadī tīre śmaśāne ca sva gṛhasya ca dakṣiṇe tulasī ropaṇam kṛtvā yāti kartā yama ālayam patra puṣpa phalānām ca rajaḥ reṇu samāgamāḥ yaḥ tu vṛkṣam prakurute chāyā puṣpa phala upagam pathi devālaye ca api pāpāt tārayate pitṝn atīta anāgatāḥ ca atas sa svargataḥ dvijāḥ tārayet vṛkṣa ropī ca tasmāt vṛkṣam praropayeta yatnena api ca vipra iṃdrāḥ aśvattha āropaṇam kuru śataiḥ putra sahasrāṇām ekaḥ eva viśiṣyate mukti hetuḥ sahasrāṇām lakṣa koṭīni yāni ca dhanī ca aśvattha vṛkṣe ca aśokaḥ śokanāśanaḥ plakṣaḥ bhāryā pradaḥ ca eva bilvaḥ āyuṣya daḥ smṛtaḥ tiṃdukāt kulavṛddhiḥ syāt dāḍimī kāminīpradaḥ kadaṃbe vipulā kīrtiḥ tiṃtiḍī dharma dūṣikaḥ jīvaṃtyāḥ roga śāṃtiḥ syāt keśaraḥ śatrumardanaḥ dhanapradaḥ ca eva vaṭaḥ vaṭaḥ śvetavaṭaḥ tathā panase maṃda buddhiḥ syāt kali vṛkṣaḥ śriyam haret kalivṛkṣam ca śākhoṭaḥ udarāvartakam tathā tathā ca markaṭī nīpa ropaṇāt saṃtati kṣayaḥ śiṃśapām ca arjunam ca eva jayaṃtī haya mārakān śrīvṛkṣam kiṃśukam ca eva ropaṇāt svargam ādiśet na pūrvām ropayet jātu samidham kaṃṭakī drumam kuśam padmam jalajānām ropaṇāt durgatim vrajet maṃdāre kula hāniḥ syāt śālmale śuka buddhimān niṃbe paśu vināśaḥ syāt chatrāke kula pāṃsalaḥ śatru vṛddhiḥ kākanāde bala pūge hata śriyaḥ sahakāra sahasrāt tu variṣṭham dhātakī dvayam tasmāt ca eva sahasrāt hi pāṭalā ekā viśiṣyate pāṭalānām śatāt paścāt eka raktavaṭaḥ bhavet vaṭānām dvi sahasrāt ca paṃcakam nāgakeśaram tasmāt variṣṭhaḥ śrīvṛkṣaḥ jaṃbū vṛkṣaḥ praśasyate tasmāt himavataḥ jñeyaḥ śrīparṇī vṛkṣaḥ uttamaḥ tiṃdukasya trayaḥ ca eva jaṃbū vṛkṣasya paṃcakam evam uktvā sa dharma ātmā kārayet kīdṛśam balam kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca janma traya ādikam pāpam vināśya svargam ādiśet śata ropī ca brahma tvam viṣṇu tvam ca sahasrake vaiśākhe kīrtim āpnoti jyeṣṭhe tu maraṇam vrajet āṣāḍhe kīrtim āpnoti śrāvaṇe paramām gatim bhādre dhana āgamaḥ ca eva āśvine kārtike kṣayaḥ tulasī trividhā loke kṛte śvetā praśasyate śrīvṛkṣasya ca vipra iṃdrāḥ sa bhavet brahma ghātakaḥ vṛkṣa chedī bhavet mūkaḥ ādhi vyādhi śatam bhajet sāyam prātar ca gharma aṃte śīta kāle dina aṃtare phalam āma kulatthaḥ ca māṣaḥ mudgāḥ tilāḥ yavāḥ avi kāka sakṛt cūrṇam yava cūrṇāni yāni ca go māṃsam udakam ca eva sapta rātram nidhāpayet tam ekam sarva vṛkṣāṇām phala puṣpa ādi vṛddhi dam tena udaka ādi sekaḥ ca kṛtaḥ vai vṛddhim ādiśet ādāya mardayet tena aśoke prasekaḥ syāt sahakārasya vṛddhimān dohadam sarva vṛkṣāṇām pūga ādīnām viśeṣataḥ daśaśirā bīja yutāt abhiṣekāt ca jīvati prāk prasūtiḥ gavā ādīnām chāga ādi mahiṣasya ca jarāsu toyam vṛkṣa agre sthāpayet a vicārayan parasya sahakārasya phalam syāt na atra saṃśayaḥ meṣasya ca vitālasya yavāgūm ca samāharet mṛtaḥ api jīvayet śīghram mriyamāṇaḥ api jīvati kṣīrikā tāmrakaiḥ patraiḥ dhūmam dadyāt dina trayam tatas prādhānyataḥ vakṣye drumāṇām matsya udakena siktena āmrāṇām vṛddhiḥ iṣyate pakva āmram rudhiram ca eva dāḍimānām praśasyate yava udakam sa go māṃsam ketakīnām praśasyate māṃsa pūti rasā majjā śoka tāle guvākake sa pūti māṃsam sa ghṛtam nālikerasya rohitam madhuyaṣṭi udakaiḥ sekāt sāmānyam nihitam bhavet jātīnām mallikānām ca kuṃdānām raṃtikasya ca kūrma māṃsam anna rasam viḍaṃgasya ca puṣpakam rathyā vṛkṣe pratiṣṭhāpya phalavān jāyate tatas dadyāt dhūpam dhānya madhye dhānya vṛddhiḥ ca jāyate mayūra patram ādāya chāga romāṇi sapta vai eraṃḍa taila yogena dadyāt dhūpam niśā āgame hiṃgu kusuma saṃyogāt mūṣikāṇām parinyaset kariviṣṭhām ṛcchaviṣṭhām kṛttikāyām samāharet niśā toye prasekaḥ syāt tat kṣātramūlakam haret aśvattha mūle daśa hasta mātram kṣetram pavitram puruṣottamasya bāhu viṃśa aṃtare ropet sahakāram sa dharma vid kalā hasta aṃtaram dhātrī bakulam vaṃjulam tathā śraiparṇikam ca punnāgam śrīvṛkṣam dviguṇam tarau vāpī ādīnām tu kūpānām eka vṛkṣa ādikasya ca śrīviṣṇoḥ vṛkṣa pakṣe ca varuṇeṣṭam ca kūpake gaṇeśam pūjayet kumbham dikpālān ca viśeṣataḥ agni kāryam vinā kuryāt prakuryāt ca satām gatim śrutvā kṛtim vidhānena anyeṣām vā tathā udbhavam anyeṣām ca eva vṛkṣe ca tathā ca tulasī vane vṛkṣān vā anena saṃskṛtya vāsobhiḥ abhiveṣṭayet śucyamānam idam jñeyam anyeṣām vā tathā udbhavam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca atha taṃtra vidhim vakṣye purāṇeṣu api gīyate śata vṛkṣa kṣudra vṛkṣe daśa dvādaśa vṛkṣake dṛṣṭi mātra aṃtare setau kūpa yāge samutsṛjet na kūpam utsṛjet jātu vṛkṣa yāge kathaṃcana tulasī vana yāge tu na ca anyam yāgam ācaret taḍāga yāge setu ādīn na ca ārāme kadācana na setum deva yāge tu taḍāgam na samutsṛjet taṃtre śrāddham pṛthak nā asti kartuḥ bhede pṛthak bhavet śiva liṃga sthāpanāyām na ca anyat deva sthāpanam viparīte kṛte ca api āyuḥ kṣayaḥ iti smṛtiḥ taḍāge puṣkariṇyāḥ vā ārāme api dvijottamāḥ māna hīne māna pūrṇe daśa haste na dūṣaṇam dvi sahasra adhikam yatra tad pratiṣṭhām samācaret daśa dvādaśa vṛkṣe ca ārāme pūrvavat dvijāḥ pratiṣṭhām bilva vṛkṣe ca anyathā karṇa vedhanam anaṃtaram pradātavyāḥ lājāḥ mūrdhni akṣata ādikam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi pūrva bhāge ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ pratimā lakṣaṇa varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca pratimā lakṣaṇam vakṣye yathāśāstram atas dvijāḥ pratimām lakṣaṇaiḥ hīnām gṛhītām na eva pūjayet śailajā dārujā tāmrī mṛdbhavā sarvakāmadā eka hastā dvi hastā vā sārdha hastā tathā api vā prāsāda mānam athavā athavā sarva lakṣaṇam aṣṭa aṃgula utsedhakam ca na gehe arcayet kṛtī devāgārasya yat dvāram tasmāt aṣṭa aṃgulena tu tri bhāga piṃḍikā kāryā dvau bhāgau pratimā bhavet aṃgulam vai bhavet vṛddhiḥ aśītiḥ catuḥ uttarā vistāra mānataḥ kāryam vadanam dvādaśa aṃgulam mukha tri bhāge cibukam lalāṭam nāsikām tathā karṇau nāsikayā grīvā tulyau vā niyatau tu yau nayane dvi aṃgule syātām tri bhāgā tārakā bhavet tṛtīya tārakā bhāge śubha dṛṣṭim vicakṣaṇaḥ pariṇāhaḥ tu śirasaḥ bhavet dvātriṃśat aṃgulaḥ tulyau nāsikayā grīvā mukhena hṛdaya aṃtaram bāhū ca bāhu tulyau ca ūrū jaṃghe ca jāghanam gulpha avasthnaḥ tu pādaḥ syāt hāṭitaḥ catur aṃgulaḥ ṣaṣ aṃgulaḥ tu vistāraḥ tulya aṃguṣṭha oṃ agula trayam pradeśinī ca tad tulyā hīnā śeṣān nakhānakham caturdaśa aṃgulaḥ pādasya āyāmaḥ parikīrtitaḥ evam lakṣaṇa saṃyuktā sā pūjyā pratimā śubhā adhara uṣṭhaḥ tathā eva ūru bhrū lalāṭa manīṣikam gaṃḍam ca niyatam mūrtau kuryāt aṅga samunnateḥ vatsa proktaḥ atimukuṭaḥ kaṭaka aṃgada hāravān cāru vicitra maṇi kuṇḍalā karābhyām kāṃcanīm mālām prodvahantīm śiroruhān evam lakṣaṇa saṃpannām kārayet vihita pradām su snigdhām vara dām saumyām dvitīya āśramiṇām imām nava tālaḥ bhavet viṣṇuḥ vāsudevaḥ tri tālakaḥ nṛsiṃhaḥ pañcatālaḥ syāt hayagrīvaḥ tu paṃcamaḥ nārāyaṇaḥ ca aṣṭa tālaḥ maheśaḥ pañca tālakaḥ nava tālā bhavet durgā lakṣmīḥ ca eva tri tālikā vāṇīm tri tālikām vidyāt savitā sapta tālakaḥ dakṣiṇe vāsudevasya kare cakram pratiṣṭhitam pārśve nalina siṃhau dvau subhadrām dakṣiṇe nyaset rukmiṇī vāma bhāge ca tad adhastāt divi iṃdrakam kṛta aṃjali puṭa sthaḥ ca nāradaḥ kapilaḥ tathā yat ugram vāsudevasya tathā nārāyaṇasya ca vaiparītyam vijānīyāt mādhavānām tathā eva ca tīrthe girau taḍāge ca samīpe sthāpayet sudhīḥ nagara grāma madhye vā brāhmaṇānām ca saṃsadi avimukte viśeṣaṇa siddha kṣetre daśa arṇake trīṇi uttara sahasrāṇi paṃca paṃca uttarāṇi ṣaḍ kulāni pūrvam vipra iṃdrāḥ samuddharati na anyathā kalau dāru mayaḥ kāryaḥ hi aśaktaḥ mṛd mayaḥ utha vā caṃdana agurubhiḥ kuryāt bilva śrīparṇikasya ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi kuṃḍānām atha nirṇayam tasya uddhāram ca saṃskāram śṛṇudhvam dvijasattamāḥ caturasram ca vṛttam ca pāda ardham ca ardhacaṃdrakam yoni ākāram caṃdrakam ca aṣṭa ardham atha paṃcamam sapta ardham ca nava ardham ca kuṃḍam daśakam īritam bhūmim saṃśodhya vidhivat tuṣa keśa ādi varjitām bhrāmayet ca ūrdhvatas tasyāḥ bhasma aṃgārāṇi yatnataḥ aṃkura arpaṇakam kuryāt sapta ahāt eva buddhimān aṣṭādaśa aṃgake kṣetre nyaset ekam bahis tatas māpayet tena mānena trivṛt tam kuṃḍam ujjvalam vṛttāni kālikā ādīni bahis trīṇi vivarjayet saṃparipātayet sūtram pāṭayet tad pramāṇataḥ paṃcadhā bhedite kṣetre kāmam vā vibhajet sudhīḥ nyaset purastāt eva aṃgam koṇa ardha ardha pramāṇataḥ yoni sthānam pratiṣṭhāpya aśvatthasya dala ākṛtiḥ sūtra dvayam tatas dadyāt kuṃḍam parimitam bhavet diśam prati yathānyāyam pātayet ca dvijottamāḥ śṛṃgāṭakam yugmapuṭam ṣaṣ asram kuṃḍa trayam budhāḥ jalāśaya ārāma kūpe nitye gṛha maye yathā bhavet kuṃḍam dvija saṃskāra karmaṇi deva pratiṣṭhā yāge ca gṛha vāstau caturthakam some aṣṭau paṃkajam proktam naramedha aśvamedhayoḥ aṃkura arpaṇa yāge ca vaiṣṇave yāga karmaṇi śiva devyoḥ ca janma ādau aṣṭamyām ca ardhacaṃdrakam mārjāra pauṣṭike vairam ramye ca śāṃtike tathā śāṃti pratiṣṭhā yāge tu śāktānām kāmya karmaṇi puraścaraṇa kāmyeṣu jvara ādīnām vimokṣaṇe evaṃvidheṣu kāryeṣu yonikuṃḍam praśasyate devatā tīrtha yātrā ādau mahā yuddha praveśane saure śāṃte pauṣṭike ca ṣaṣ puram kuṃḍam uttamam māraṇa uccāṭane ca eva tathā roga upaśāṃtaye vaiṣṇavānām koṭi home nṛpāṇām atiśocane aṣṭa asram abja kuṃḍam ca sapta asram nidhi sādhane rājñā sādhye ca paṃcāsram kanyā prāptau tris asrakam kuṃḍa anurūpataḥ kāryā mekhalā sarvatas budhaiḥ ayuta ādiṣu homeṣu mekhalām yojayet sudhīḥ ca atra api mūle sārdha aṃgulam tyajet muṣṭi haste samutsedhaḥ sārdha aṃgula pariṣkṛtaḥ aratni mātre kuṃḍe tu tris ca eka aṅgulataḥ kramāt eka hasta mite kuṃḍe veda agni nayana aṃgulāḥ paṃca mekhalakam vā atha lakṣa koṭyām ca yojayet eka aṃgula ādi mānena nemim saṃvardhayet sudhīḥ catur hasta mite kuṃḍe tāvat eva guṇa aṃgulāḥ sārdha aṃgula ādi mānena nemim saṃvardhayet sudhīḥ kuṃḍasya rūpam jānīyāt paramam prakṛteḥ vapuḥ ṣaṣ caturdhā guṇa āyāma vistāra unnati śālinī eka aṃgulam tu yoni agram kuryāt īṣat adhomukham ekaika aṃgulataḥ yonim kuṃḍa śūnyeṣu vardhayet sama madhye mekhalāyāḥ saparyā yā su lakṣaṇā sthāpayet kuṃḍa koṇeṣu yonim tām dvijasattamāḥ kuṃḍānām kalpayet nābhim sphuṭam ambuja sannibhām tat tu kuṃḍa anurūpam vā su vyaktam su manoharam yonikuṃḍe yonim abjam kuṃḍe nābhim ca varjayet yāvat dvaya pramāṇena ardha aṃgula kramāt bahis nābhim pravardhayet ekam kuṃḍānām rūpataḥ yathā tatra tatra bhavet kuṃḍam biṃba śūnyam na homayet śiva śakti samāyogāt kāmaḥ utpadyate yatas umā devī biṃbaḥ khyātaḥ sadāśivaḥ na kuryāt ekayā hīnam maraṇam ca samuddiśet trayodaśa aṃgulam hitvā vahni hastam atha api vā tasya dakṣiṇa digbhāge agratas maṃḍalam likhet tatra pūjā prakartavyā pūrva mānena ca āśrayet arka hasta aṃtare kuryāt śata ūrdhva aṃte śatena vā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca amānena hataḥ yajñaḥ tasmāt mānam na hāpayet śata ardham prathamam mānam śata sāhasram eva ca ayutam ca tathā lakṣam koṭi homam atas param atas param tu vibhave rājā vā anyaḥ ddhijottamāḥ vipākam karmaṇām sarvam naraḥ prāpnoti sarvadā śubha aśubham tatas nityam prāpnoti manujaḥ kila yuktāḥ ca api grahāḥ tatra nityam śāṃtika pauṣṭike adbhute ca tathā śāṃtim kuryāt bhakti samanvitaḥ tasmāt graha abhijanitam śubha aśubha phalam khalu homam yathā abhirucitam pauṣṭike kāmya karmaṇi lakṣa homam koṭi homam rājā kuryāt yathāvidhi anyaḥ śata ādikam kuryāt ayutam vibhave sati grahāṇām lakṣa homaḥ tu koṭi homaḥ tathā kalau nidhi homam ca abhicāram tat na kuryāt gṛhāśramī mānam nā eva ca kartavyam māna ādau ca aṣṭakam nyaset lakṣe sapta tāla saṃkhyā koṭi home ca viṃśatiḥ āraṃbhaḥ tri sahasraḥ syāt dvitīye aṣṭa sahasrakaḥ tṛtīye tu sahasram syāt graha sādhyaḥ smṛtaḥ vidhiḥ pañca ahe ca samāraṃbhe sahasram juhuyāt budhaḥ guṇa sāhasrakam turye pañca ahe śeṣam īritam paṃcame ca tathā ṣaṣṭhe kule bhāga dvaya adhikam na nyūnam na adhikam kāryam etat mānam udāhṛtam sa samāje japet nityam pañca tāreṇa sviṣṭakṛt tri aha sādhye tri rātre ca pūrṇam kṛtvā visarjayet pañca ahe tu tṛtīye ahni bali dānam praśasyate sapta ahe ca aṣṭa divase nava ahe paṃcame ahani pañca ahe dvādaśa ahe tu dvātriṃśat ṣoḍaśe ahani iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ kuṇḍa saṃskāra varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca kuṇḍānām atha saṃskāre vakṣye śāstra matam yathā a saṃskṛte ca artha hāniḥ tasmāt saṃskṛtya homayet aṣṭādaśa syuḥ saṃskārāḥ kuṇḍānām tatra darśitāḥ tāreṇa avekṣayet sthānam kuśa toyaiḥ prasecayet tri sūtrīkaraṇam paścāt vṛtta sūtram nipātayet dadyāt jihvām prakalpayet paścāt tasmāt agnim samāharet nadī parvata śālābhyaḥ strī hastāt parivarjayet saṃskṛtya parigṛhṇīyāt tridhā kṛtvā samuddharet tam agnim pratigṛhṇīyāt ātmanaḥ abhimukham yathā vāgīśvarīm ṛtusnātām vāgīśvara samāgatām dhyātvā samīraṇam dadyāt kāmam utpadyate tatas kālabījena ca aiśānyām yonau agnim vinikṣipet paścāt devasya devyāḥ ca dadyāt ācamanīyakam sarvajña ājñāpaya svāhā mantraḥ yam vahni pūjane vahnibarhiṣi saṃyuktāḥ sa ādi yāṃtāḥ sa biṃdavaḥ vahni mantrāḥ samuddiṣṭāḥ dvijānām maṃtraḥ īritaḥ jihvāḥ tāḥ trividhāḥ proktāḥ yajñadattena sattamāḥ hiraṇyā mā ājya homeṣu homayet saṃyata ātmakaḥ kanaka āsyāt tu kṛṣṇa āsyāt hirṇyā śubhra tā tathā bahurūpā atirūpā ca sāttvikā yoga karmasu viśvamūrtim sphuliṃginyau dhūmravarṇā manojavā etāḥ sapta niyuṃjīta vijñeyāḥ krūra karmasu śuddha kṣīreṇa raktāyām naityikeṣu prabhā smṛtā bahu rūpā puṣpa home kṛṣṇā ca annena pāyasaiḥ dhūminī tila home ca kāṣṭha home karālikā lohitāsyā pitṛ home tatas jñeyā manojavā vaiśvānaram sthitam home samidh homeṣu sattamāḥ samānam ājya home ca niṣaṇṇam śeṣa vastuṣu nāsikāyām manaḥ pīḍā mastake adhvā na saṃśayaḥ sādhāraṇam atho vakṣye vahneḥ jihvāḥ ca kīrtitāḥ pravakṣyāmi vidhim kṛtsnam yad viśeṣam punar śṛṇu ghṛta āhutau hiraṇya ākhyā gaganā pāṇi homataḥ vakrā khyātā mahā home kṛṣṇa ābhā sā kratau matā su prabhāḥ modaka vidhau bahu rūpa atirūpikāḥ na vā saṃkalpayet kuṇḍe śūdra ākāra vibhedataḥ indra koṣṭham mastakam syāt īśa āgneye ca mastake hutvā vrīhi gaṇam tatra karṇe puṣpa āhutim hunet vāma karṇe vāma netre hunet abja ādikam budhaḥ śravaṇe ca eva netre ca dakṣiṇe ca ikṣukhaṃḍakam vāma pāde vāma kare abhicāreṣu śasyate māraṇe puṣpa deśe tu na ca anyam homayet kvacid vipad karam vijānīyāt dhvaniḥ sarva vināśa kṛt candana agaru karpūra pāṭalā yūthikā nibhaḥ pāvakasya sutaḥ gaṃdhaḥ samaṃtāt su mahā udayaḥ pradakṣiṇaḥ tyakta kalpā chatrākā śithilā śikhā śubha dāḥ yajamānasya rājyasya api viśeṣataḥ chinna vṛttāḥ śikhāḥ kuryāt mṛtyuḥ dhana parikṣayaḥ nirvāpyam maraṇam vidyāt mahā dhūma ākule api ca evaṃvidheṣu doṣeṣu prāyaścittam samācaret aṣṭāviṃśa āhutīḥ tyaktvā brāhmaṇān bhojayet tatas mūlena ājyena juhuyāt juhuyāt pañcaviṃśatim mahāsnānam prakartavyam tri kālam hari pūjanam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge pañcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ yajña anta pūjā vidhi varṇanam sūt uvāca homa avasāne prajapet upacārān ca ṣoḍaśa dadyāt samīraṇam paścāt pīṭha pūjām samācarat gṛhītvā rakta puṣpam ca dhyāyet vahnim yathāvidhi iṣṭam śakti svastika abhītim uccais dīrghaiḥ dorbhiḥ dhārayantam vara antam hema ākalpam padma saṃstham trinetram dhyāyet vahnim baddha maulim jaṭābhiḥ varāham ṣaṇmukham ca eva gaṃdha ādyaiḥ sādhu pūjayet āvāhya sthāpayet paścāt aṣṭau mudrāḥ pradarśayet dattvā āsanam svāgatam ca dadyāt pādya ādika trayam atas pūrva ādi pātreṣu yāvatā ca hutāśanam mahodaram mahājihvam ākāśa tvena pūjayet tāraka ādīn samāpte ca gandhaiḥ puṣpaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ tatra eva jihvāḥ trividhāḥ dhyāyet maṃtra puraḥsarāḥ vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa upacāraiḥ anaṃtaram tvam ādiḥ sarva bhūtānām saṃsāra arṇava tārakaḥ puṭa aṃjalim tatas baddhvā pṛcchet kuśala pūrvakam svāgatam tu suraśreṣṭha śāṃtim kuru namaḥ astu te sarvaloka hita arthāya pādyam ca pratigṛhyatām nārāyaṇa param dhāma jyotīrūpa sanātana gṛhāṇa arghyam mayā dattam viśvarūpa namaḥ astu te jagat āditya rūpeṇa prakāśayati yaḥ sadā snānīyam te mayā dattam sarva kāma artha siddhaye hutāśana mahā bāho devadeva sanātana jyotiṣām jyotīrūpaḥ tvam anādinidhana acyuta devī devāḥ mudam yānti yasya samyak samāgamāt sarva doṣa upaśāṃti artha gandhaḥ ayam pratigṛhyatām tvam viṣṇuḥ tvam hi brahmā ca jyotiṣām gatiḥ īśvara gṛhāṇa puṣpam deveśa sa anulepam jagat bhavet devatānām pitṛrṇām ca sukham ekam sanātanam dhūpaḥ ayam devadeveśa gṛhyatām me dhanaṃjaya tvam ekaḥ sarva bhūteṣu sthāvareṣu careṣu ca parama ātmā parākāraḥ pradīpaḥ pratigṛhyatām ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca yajña bhedam tri bhedam ca vakṣye śāstra matam yathā yathā veda anusāreṇa yathā grahaṇa yojanam śata ardhe vahniḥ uddiṣṭaḥ śata ardhe kāśyapaḥ smṛtaḥ ghṛta pradīpake viṣṇuḥ tila yāge vanaspatiḥ lakṣa home tu vahniḥ syāt koṭi home hutāśanaḥ varuṇaḥ śāṃtike jñeyaḥ māraṇe hi aruṇaḥ smṛtaḥ nitya home analaḥ nāma prāyaścitte hutāśanaḥ lohitaḥ ca anna yajñe yaḥ grahāṇām pratyanukramāt deva pratiṣṭhā yāge tu lohitaḥ parikīrtitaḥ prajāpatiḥ vāstuyāge maṃḍape ca api padmake prapāyām ca eva nāga ākhyaḥ mahādāne havirbhujaḥ tulāpuruṣa dāne ca dhātā agniḥ parikīrtitaḥ vṛṣotsarge bhavet sūyaḥ avasāna aṃte raviḥ smṛtaḥ pāvakaḥ vaiśvadeve ca dīkṣā pakṣe janārdanaḥ trāsane ca bhavet kālaḥ kravya ādaḥ śara dāhane parṇa dāhe yamaḥ nāma hi asthi dāhe śikhaṃḍikaḥ garbhādhāne ca marutaḥ sīmaṃte piṃgalaḥ smṛtaḥ puṃsave tu iṃdraḥ ākhyātaḥ praśastaḥ yāga karmaṇi niṣkame hāṭakaḥ ca eva prāśane ca śuciḥ tathā ṣaḍānanaḥ ca cūḍāyām vrata ādeśe samudbhavaḥ udare jaṭhara agniḥ ca samudre vaḍavānalaḥ śikhāyām ca vibhuḥ jñeyaḥ svarasya agniḥ sarīsṛpaḥ aśva agniḥ maṃtharaḥ nāma ratha agniḥ jātavedasaḥ gajāgniḥ maṃdaraḥ ca eva sūryāgniḥ viṃdhya saṃjñakaḥ toya agniḥ varuṇaḥ nāma brāhmaṇa agniḥ havirbhujaḥ parvata agniḥ kratu bhujaḥ dāva agniḥ sūryaḥ ucyate dīpa agniḥ pāvakaḥ nāma gṛhya agniḥ dharaṇīpatiḥ ghṛta agniḥ ca nalaḥ vāyuḥ sūtikā agniḥ ca rākṣasaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge agnināmavarṇanam nāma saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca atha atas homa dravyāṇām pramāṇam abhidhīyate pramāṇe ca apramāṇe ca niṣphalam bhavati dhuvam karṣa mātram ghṛtam home śukti mātram payaḥ smṛtam muṣṭi mānena pṛthukāḥ lājāḥ syuḥ muṣṭi saṃmitāḥ śarkarā muṣṭi mātrā ca śarkarātolakam viduḥ ekaikam patra puṣpāṇi śālūkasya tri muṣṭikam sa vṛṃtakam japā puṣpam keśaram tat sa vṛṃtakam ekaikaśas ca padmānām jalajānām tathā eva ca jīvaṃtyāḥ phala mānena piṣṭakānām prasaṃkhyayā vasaṃtakam dhātri māne modakasya pramāṇataḥ ekaikaśas phalānām ca mātuliṃga tri kheḍakam aṣṭadhā nālikerasya panasam daśadhā bhavet padma bīja pramāṇena kūṣmāṃḍam ca aṣṭadhā bhavet urvārukam ca aṣṭadhā ca guḍūcī catur aṃgulam pūga mānam ca māṃsasya sa guḍam tatra dṛśyate anyatra badarī mānam tiṃdukam ca tridhā kṛtam kāṣṭham prādeśa mātram syāt dūrvāḥ yāḥ ca tri patrakam bhūrja patram ca gṛhṇīyāt śamīm prādeśa mātrikām vrīhayaḥ muṣṭi mātrāḥ syuḥ śukti mānena sarṣapāḥ maricāḥ syuḥ vimāḥ nena mṛṇālam ca atha mūlakam saptakhaṃḍam ca vārtākam tripuṣṭam ca tridhā uditam candana aguru karpūra kastūrī kuṃkumāni ca tittiḍī bīja mānena deśikaiḥ daśakam plāvanena eva sahasrāṇām śatam vinā evam vrīhi plāvane ca kāṣṭha vadi kṣudaṃḍakam prokṣaṇam mṛdu puṣpāṇām latā ādīnām tathā eva ca vṛṃta saṃplāvanāt eva phalam harati rākṣasaḥ na dvi tri plavanam kuryāt kṛtvā yāti rasātalam pūrva āśā abhimukhaḥ bhūtvā pāvayet ca yathākramāt na nyūnam na adhikam kuryāt śāṃti pakṣe udak mukhaḥ kaniṣṭhā aṃgulim āsādya prakuryāt parva bhūṣaṇam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāga iṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca śrīparṇī śiṃśapā kṣīrī bilvaḥ khadiraḥ eva ca sruve praśastāḥ taravaḥ siddhi dāḥ yāga karmaṇi pratiṣṭhāyām praśastāḥ tu dhātrī khadira keśarāḥ saṃskāre śaśi bhinnau ca dhātrī dhātrā vinirmitā saṃprāśe yaḥ sruvaḥ proktaḥ saṃskāre yajña sādhane pratiṣṭhāyām tu kathitāḥ te danye śāstra vedibhiḥ kāṣṭham gṛhītvā bilvasya rikta ādi tithi varjite kāṣṭham gṛhītvā vibhajet bhāgān triṃśat tathā punar viṃśati aṃgula mānam tu kuṃḍa vedi sama udaram kaṭāha ākāra nimnam ca sruvam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ dhātrī phala sama ākāram svadhā nimnam su śobhanam vedīm śūrpa ākṛtim kuryāt kuṃḍāni parikalpayet dvitriṃśam syāt kuṃḍa mānam adaive tasya kīrtitam caturbhiḥ aṃgaiḥ ānāham karṣa ādi agram tatas sruvam daṃḍa mūla āśraye daṃḍī bhavet kaṃkaṇa bhūṣitaḥ sauvarṇasya ca tāmrasya kāryā darvī pramāṇataḥ kṣīravṛkṣa samudbhūtam dvādaśa aṃgula saṃmitam dvayaṃgulam maṃḍalam tasya darvī sā yajña sādhane paṃca aṃgulam maṃḍalam ca aṣṭa hastam ca daṃḍakam daśa tolaka mānena sā ca darvī udāhṛtā ājya saṃśodhana artham tu sā tu tāmra mayasya ca ṣoḍaśa aṃgula mānena sarva abhāve ca paippalīm ājya sthālīm ghṛta mayīm mṛd mayīm ca samāśrayet atha tāmra mayī kāryā na ca tām tatra yojayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge sruvadarvīnirṇayaḥ nāma ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca atha pūrṇa vidhim vakṣye yathā caṃdra artha vedinām yasya samyak anuṣṭhānāt saṃpūrṇam syāt iti sthitiḥ homa pūrtau mokṣa kalpaḥ pūjā aṃte arghyam vidhīyate atha tasyām apūrṇāyām hata śrīḥ yajña bhraṃśa tā pūrṇam dattvā savitre arghyam brāhmaṇān bhojayet tatas gṛham praviśya ca tatas kula pūjām samācaret saptate dehi me pūrṇām punātu iti ṛcā kramāt niyojayet pratiṣṭhāyām nitya naimittike śṛṇu punātu iti ṛcā pūrṇā prathamā parikīrtitā saptatā iti dvitīyā syāt dehimā iti tṛtīyikā pūrṇā darvī caturthī syāt kula iva sthāpya deśikaḥ utthāya dadyāt pūrṇām tu na upaviśya kadācana kanakāyām ca jihvāyām raktāyām graha yāgake graha home śata aṃte ca pūrṇā ekā vidhīyate sahasra aṃte yugam dadyāt ayuta aṃte yuga dvayam sahasra aṃte dadet ekam puṣpa home ca sattamāḥ pūrṇā tu eka sahasram tu dadyāt yajña phala īpsayā mṛdu puṣpa ākṛtau tu ekā kevale ca ikṣuhomake śatam dve ca śate ca eva garbhādhāna annaprāśane sīmaṃtonnayane ca eva prāyaścitta ākṛtīṣu ca vaiśvadeve ca nitye ca pūrṇā tu ekā vidhīyate ṛṣi chaṃda ādikam śrutvā prati maṃtrasya sattamāḥ saptatā iti brāhmaṇasya ṛṣiḥ kauṃḍinyaḥ īritaḥ dehi mā iti ca maṃtrasya prajāpatiḥ ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ anuṣṭubh ca bhavet chaṃdaḥ devatā asya prajāpatiḥ pūrṇā darvī iti mantrasya śatakratuḥ ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ chaṃdaḥ nuṣṭubh samākhyātam vahniḥ ca eva atra devatā punātu iti ca mantrasya ṛṣiḥ syāt pavanaḥ smṛtaḥ chaṃdaḥ api jagatī khyātam devatā agniḥ ca kīrtitaḥ turya pūrṇāḥ yajña madhye nakule dvijasattamāḥ na ca āśiṣam yajña madhye abhiṣekam ca tarpaṇam ṛtvij chaṃdaḥ spṛśan samyak dakṣiṇa aṃgam atha api vā viśvāmitraḥ ayutam tatra homam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ nāgaraṃgam dhātakīm ca pūrṇāyām ca vivarjayet japya hāniḥ asaṃkhyāte homa bhraṃśaḥ ca jāyate tasmāt prāk eva sa tilān gaṇitvā sthāpayet pṛthak dhātakyāḥ ca phalaiḥ saṃkhyā kartavyā phalam icchatā karpūra caṃdanaiḥ kuryāt holikām yajña siddhaye gaṃgā mṛttikayā yuktaḥ śunikām atha vā dvijāḥ rakta guṃjā phalaiḥ saṃkhyām puṣṭi kāmeṣu yojayet hotā syāt ayutena api eka ahe veda saṃkhyayā ṛṇa sādhye bhavet hotā trayaḥ eva dvijottamāḥ lakṣa home tu hotāraḥ ṣaṭ eva parikīrtitāḥ koṭi home tu viprāḥ syuḥ praśastāḥ paṃkti saṃkhyayā nava paṃca daśa daśakam paṃcaviṃśam atha api vā kāma krodha vihīnāḥ syuḥ ṛtvijaḥ śāṃta cetasaḥ athavā ṛtvijau śāṃtau dvau eva parikīrtitau tadvat sa daśadhā ca aṣṭau nava home tu ṛtvijaḥ yatas sarvam avāpnoti kuryāt kāma vidhānataḥ yāvat kalpa śatāni aṣṭau ante mokṣam avāpnuyāt akāmaḥ yaḥ tu imam kuryāt lakṣa homam yathāvidhi śata kāmam avāpnoti padam ca ānaṃtyam aśnute bhāryāthīm labhate bhāryām kumārī ca śubham patim bhraṣṭa rājyaḥ tathā rājyam śrī kāmaḥ śriyam āpnuyāt yam yam kāmayate kāmam sarvam prāpnoti puṣkalam tasmāt śataguṇaḥ proktaḥ koṭi homaḥ svayaṃbhuvā ācāryaḥ eva hotā syāt brāhmaṇānām asaṃbhave pāṣāṇe mṛttikāyām ca na ca vastra āsane kvacid tatra dāru mayam kuryāt āgamam bhajate dvijaḥ dānam dadyāt ca homa aṃte pūrṇa ādau ca yathā bhavet dvija saṃskāra kāryeṣu pūrṇa ādau ca api dakṣiṇā maṃtra upāsana kāryeṣu soma yāga aśvamedhake iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ maṇḍala vidhi varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca atha atas maṃḍalam vakṣye purāṇeṣu yathā uditam devāḥ padmāsana sthāḥ ca bhaviṣyaṃti vasaṃti ca vinā abjam na arcayet devīm arcite yakṣiṇī haret atas maṃḍala vicchedam yasmāt daśaguṇam bhavet rajaḥ sādhye śataguṇam kevale dviguṇam phalam tri śatam vaṃdane sādhye sahasram ca rajaḥ aṣṭakam rajobhiḥ ṣoḍaśaiḥ biṃbam śatam śatam anaṃtakam yantre maṇau śālagrāme pratimāyām viśeṣataḥ catur asram navam vyūham krauṃcaprāṇam catu rvidham pārijātam caṃdra biṃbam sūryakāntam ca śekharam śata patram sahasra aram nava nābham ca muṣṭikam paṃcābjam ca eva mainākam kāmarājam ca puṣkaram aṣṭa asram ca eva śrī biṃbam ṣaṣ asram tri asram eva tu catvāriṃśat tathā paṃcasu adhikam parisaṃkhyayā catur asram nava vyūḍham vaiṣṇave yāga karmaṇi praśastam ca api gomedhe krauṃcam ghrāṇam caturvidham kāmarājam tathā tri asram aṣṭa asram ca ṣaṣ asrakam śaktānām kāma pakṣe ca paṃca siṃhāsanam mahat dhyāna acale meru pṛṣṭham maṇi muktā acaleṣu api harivallabham rājasūye soma yāgeṣu śasyate jalāśaya pratiṣṭhāyām vighnarājam praśasyate catur aṃgula ucchrāya mitā ṣaṣ aṃgulā hi atha api vā ṣaṣ aṃgulāḥ nava vyūhe vardhayet yajña kovidaḥ krauṃcaprāṇe turya hastam muṣṭi hastam samucchritam madhya dvaye hīna karam kaniṣṭham tri aṃgula adhikam pārijātam caṃdra biṃbam sūryakāntam ca śekharam grahāṇām pauṣṭike pakṣe bāhya grāma ādi sādhane prathame muṣṭi hastaḥ syāt saṃpūrṇe śeṣa mānakaiḥ nava lābhe ca paṃca abjam kara trayam udāhṛtam śeṣā ca eva variṣṭhā ca lavalī bhitti vedikā vijñeyāḥ dvijaśārdūlāḥ yathākāmyeṣu yojayet daśa haste ca aṣṭa haste aṣṭa haste ca ṣoḍaśam muṣṭi bāhum ca prādeśam vardhayet ṣoḍaśa aṃśake kuryāt yāgake śāṃti karmaṇi hīnam kuryāt prayatnena vapra ākāram paristave niśāraṇaiḥ gomayaiḥ ca vedikām ca pralepayet hīna vīrya gavānām ca purīṣam dhenukam tathā kapilāyāḥ ca yatnena kuṃḍa maṃḍala lepane vinā sūtraiḥ kīlake na maṃḍale na eva sūtrayet tasmāt prayatnataḥ kāryam yat sūtram yat ca kīlakam arka hasta mitam sūtram mṛdu lākṣā mayam tathā raupya tāmra mayam kuryāt vaiṣṇave yāga karmaṇi gaṇanāyake su praśastam śaiṣepāmārgam eva ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi prathama bhāge ekaviṃśatitamaḥ adhyāyaḥ viṣaya anukramaṇikā maṇḍaladeva racanā varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca guṇa aṃgulam pratidiśam vardhayet su vicakṣaṇaḥ catur asram samam kuyāt iṣṭeḥ aṣṭādaśa aṃgulam evam poḍaśa hasta antam vardhayet kramatas svayam haste vinirṇayam viprāḥ racayet maṃḍala sudhīḥ dvādaśa aṃgula kalpābhyām madhu haste ca maṃḍale padma mānam caturddhā tu vṛttam kuryāt samaṃtataḥ prathame karṇikā kāryyā keśarāṇi dvitīyake tṛtīye dala saṃdhīn ca dala agrāṇi caturthake karṇikām pīta varṇena śuddhena paṃkajam likhet keśarāḥ trividhāḥ proktāḥ mūla madhya agra deśataḥ mūle śukla aruṇāḥ madhye pītāḥ ca agre pratiṣṭhitāḥ aṣṭa aṃgula pramāṇam yat yathāvarṇam vināditaḥ śaṃbhuḥ gaurī tathā brahmā rāmakṛṣṇā iti anukramāt śiva viṣṇvoḥ mahā yāge śaṃbhum ārabhya dāpayet pratiṣṭhāyām ca rāma aṃtam kṛṣṇa aṃtam ca jalāśaye durgā yāge ca śrīpakṣe brahma ādīn parikalpayet graha yāge ca pīta ādīn kuryāt ca na tat anyathā sarvam ca pūrvavat kāryam paṃkajam su likhet sudhīḥ tāvat saṃkhyā haraṇayoḥ veṣṭayet prakramāt api śukla aruṇaiḥ tathā pītaiḥ pīta aruṇa sitaiḥ api pīta aruṇa sitaiḥ evam svabhāve pratibhāgake kalāyaṃtram tad aṃte ca guhya patrāḥ grakeṇa tu ṣoḍaśaiḥ viṃśa māne tu sa liṅgam ca aṣṭa patrake evam maṃḍala maṃtrāṇām varjayet paramārthataḥ tadvat mūleṣu koṇeṣu keśarāṇi prakalpayet daśa daṃḍa sama ākāram tri varṇam pratiraṃjitam aram dadyāt daśa agre tu sarva aṃgula pramāṇataḥ pītenāram ca sarvatra tad madhye śoṇa tuṃḍakam na śūdraḥ maṃḍalam kuryāt na kuryāt brāhmaṇabruvaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca krauñca mānam pravakṣyāmi yathā veda artha vādinām saṃmatam sarva taṃtreṣu gopanīyam prayatnataḥ catuṣṭayam nyaset vṛttam madhyama adhama bhāvataḥ tṛtīye padma patrāṇi caturthe ṣoḍaśa chadāḥ tad dakṣiṇa agram su likhet pārśvayoḥ pakṣaka dvayam śuklam pītam tathā raktam kṛṣṇam lohita sannibham saṃkhyātam tāmraparṇam ca śyāmalam ca aṣṭakam rajaḥ śuklam taṃḍula cūrṇa uttham pītam tu niśayā smṛtam raktam tu niśayā yogāt śaṃkha cūrṇa ādi bhāvitam kṛṣṇam pulaka ādi dagdham raktam pīta āsya yogataḥ kuṃkuma ābham pāṃḍuram ca rakta śvetaiḥ vinirmitam tāmra varṇam kusuṃbhena śyāmalam bilva patra jam yava godhūma cūrṇa ādi yogena tu rajaḥ smṛtam karṇikāyām keśareṣu śubhram eva nipātayet tatas ṣoḍaśa patreṣu pūrva ādi kramataḥ bhavet śuklam pītam tathā tāmram tatas saṃkhyātam eva ca śyāmalam kuṃkuma ābham ca raktam śuklam ca kṛṣṇakam pītam tāmram ca saṃkhyātam śyāmam kuṃkuma raktakam evam dadyāt vijaḥ pūrve īśāna aṃtam vibhāvayet tuṃḍabhāge bhavet pītam grīvāyām śuklam eva ca pucche viṃśati patrāṇi ādau paṃca rajaḥ kramāt ṣaṣ aṃguleṣu aṃḍa bhāge pītena parikalpayet grīvāyām śukla rajasā bhāvitāyām viśeṣataḥ tatra pīta ādikam lekhyam pūrva uktam ca yathā bhavet śukla ādikam pradadya anu pātreṣu ekaikaśas pṛthak pade śuddham ca aṃgulīṣu raktam śyāmena bhāvayet pūrva paścima digbhāge śuklam syāt vāra deśataḥ mahākrauṃcam idam jñeyam madhyakraucam idam śṛṇu kaniṣṭham sarva yajñeṣu vidyānām saptam uttamam atha aparam pravakṣyāmi sarva taṃtra matam kramāt rakta pītam rakta pītaiḥ kuryāt puccha catuṣṭayam pūrva ādi krama
