yoge tu patra aṃte dharaṇī tale su likhet mūla saṃlagnam bahiṣkoṇa catuṣṭayam kaniṣṭhe aṣṭa kulam kuryāt puccham kuryāt caturvidham trivṛt tam veṣṭayet paścāt sita rakta asitaiḥ kramāt dṛṣṭam janma śata udbhūtam pāpam nāśayate dhuvam pītam vā vilikhet viprāḥ naśyanti sakala āpadaḥ tasya kalpa śata udbhūtam pāpam nāśayate dhuvam mayūram vṛṣabham ca eva siṃham krauṃcam ca vai kapim pramādāt vā gṛhe kṣetre vṛkṣa agre ca api bho dvijāḥ utthāya vaṃdanam kuryāt brahma hatyā śatam dahet poṣaṇāt kīrtim āpnoti darśanāt pāpa vicyutiḥ darśanāt vardhate lakṣmīḥ āyuḥ vṛddhiḥ ca jāyate mayūraḥ brahmaṇaḥ mṛrtiḥ vṛṣabhaḥ ca sadāśivaḥ krauṃcaḥ nārāyaṇaḥ devaḥ vyāghraḥ tripurasuṃdarī atas param pravakṣyāmi maṃḍale maṃḍaleṣu api taṃḍula uttham yava uttham vā varjyam makara ropaṇam yat bālya śrāvaṇe jātam hiṃgulam gaṃdhakam tathā haimaṃtika udbhavam yat ca sitapāṣāṇam eva ca kāṃcanyāḥ ca prabhedam yat śastam śukla guṇam dvijāḥ śephāli vṛttam niśayāḥ atasī kusumāni ca kiṃśukasya ca puṣpāṇi śastam pītam guṇam bhavet kuśītam guḍakam ca eva maṃjiṣṭhām paṃcaraṃgakam ca eva śaṃkha cūrṇam loha viṣṭhām nāga viṣṭhām ca varjayet karpūram kuṃkumam ca eva rocanā rocanām śrayet yava śālīyakaiḥ bhinnam śuklam ca kārayet sudhīḥ lākṣām ca yadi gṛhṇīyāt tat bharjitvā pradāpayet ākāśam pṛthivīm ca eva bhaumam rāmam tathā śanī dharaṇīm sadana sthāne pañcadhā vibhajet bahis tarjanī aṃguṣṭha yogaiḥ vā tṛṇam ārabhya yat bhavet tṛṇam ārabhya sāmānye śaktaḥ vā madhyama āditaḥ rākṣasa ādi pratiṣṭhāyām graha pakṣe agnim āditaḥ pratiṣṭhāyām graha makhe kāmyeṣu parivarjayet subhadram maṇḍalam vakṣye śubha dam śubham ādiśet caturviśa aṃgulaiḥ pūrṇam sarvatra hastam ādiśet madhyamā dīrgha mānena māna aṃgulam iti smṛtam rekhā dvaya aṃtaram yat ca mūlarekhām na ca āśrayet vaddha aṃguṣṭha nakha dvaṃdvam māna aṃgulam atha api vā madhye nibadhya śaṃkum ca muṣṭi bāhu pramāṇataḥ prakalpya karṇikā ādīni madhye ca aṣṭadalam likhet bahis ca arka dalam kuryāt varṇānām kramakeṇa tu paṃcamam śveta varṇena bahis kuryāt triveṣṭanam sita pīta aruṇam kuryāt paścāt veda aṅgula antare subhadram maṇḍalāt pūrvam sarvatobhadrakam śṛṇu sarva kāryeṣu yajñeṣu sarva kalyāṇam āpnuyāt maṃḍalam sarvatobhadram sarva yajñeṣu puṣṭi dam sādhakānām hita arthāya īśvareṇa eva bhāṣitam koṇe sūtra dvayam dadyāt madhye sūtra dvayam punar tatas matsyān viracayet karṇe sūtrāṇi sādhakaḥ catuḥ sūtram pātayet ca pūrva apara vibhāgataḥ punar dadyāt catur sūtram karṇa sūtram punar dadet śata dvaya padam yāvat ṣaṭpaṃcāśā adhikam tathā pātayet ca tathā sūtram evam saptadaśam bhavet ūrdhva paṃktyā pada yugam ca ādye pada catuṣṭayam dvāra pārśve bhavet yāvat danta paṃktyā pada trayam paṅkajam śukla varṇena vaiṣṇavaḥ yāga karmaṇi pratiṣṭhāsu ca sarvāsu śuklam eva praśasyate pītena karṇikā kāryā catur bhāgena mānataḥ śubham cakora avasthāne tāpayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ karṇikā mūlam ārabhya rekhāḥ ṣoḍaśa kalpayet agre pītam bhavet evam kṛtvā paṃkaja veṣṭanam koṇeṣu raktam dadyāt ca padmam kṣetreṣu nirdiśet śuklena pīṭha gātrāṇi pīṭha koṇe pada traye śuddhena racayet pādau punar pīta ādi varṇakaiḥ citram su śobhanam kāryam tatra kalpalatām nyaset mānam kalpalatāyāḥ tu dvi aṅgulam parikīrtitam dve dve śastam ca bhramaṇam śaṃkha āvarta kramāt trayam granthau granthau puṣpa phale nānā varṇena bhāvayet nānā paśu gaṇaiḥ yuktam nānā pakṣi gaṇaiḥ yutam vaiṣṇave gāruḍam śastam śaive kīśa vṛṣam likhet śākte vyāghram tathā aiśe ca śarabham harim ālikhet śobhām pītena racayet upaśobhām ca pītakaiḥ koṇeṣu kṛṣṇa varṇena bahis syāt veṣṭana trayam śukla pīta aruṇaiḥ kāryam maṇḍalam syāt manoramam sarva jñāna mayam śuddham dharma kāma artha dāyakam catur asram samam kṛtvā digbhyaḥ dvādaśadhā dvijāḥ pātayet tatra sūtrāṇi koṣṭhānām dṛśyate śatam catuścatvāriṃśat ādyam paścāt ṣaṭtriṃśat aṃbujam koṣṭham prakalpayet pīṭham paṃktyā ca eva atra vīthikām dvāra śobhe yathāpūrvam upaśobham ca dṛśyate avaśiṣṭaiḥ padaiḥ kuryāt sadbhiḥ taṃtrāṇi mantra vid vidadhyāt pūrvavat śeṣam evam vā maṇḍalam bhavet pūrva ukta maṇḍale vidvan dharaṇī sadanam bahis madhye kalpalatā kāryā bahiṣkoṇeṣu sattamāḥ gulālī tūrya varṇena mahāmattaḥ iti smṛtaḥ śobhā upaśobhe śobhā agrām kuryāt vai maṇḍalam bhavet śatapatram vajranābham biṃbanābham sahasrakam gaja āhvam ca gaja ākāram madhye tu samalaṅkṛtam bahis dvādaśabhiḥ sūryaiḥ sūryākrāṃtam prakīrtitam śekharī tripuṭam ca eva śatapatram ca prakramāt cintāmaṇim kuṃkuma aṃśam khātam ca harivallabham pañca siṃhāsana stham ca pañca siṃhāsanam viduḥ tadvat vṛṣāsanam jñeyam śikhi rūpam śikhidhvajam nārasiṃham padmagarbham kapotāsyam tathā bhavet gāruḍam meru garbham ca nīlakaṇṭham nara ākṛtim śatakratu gaja ārūḍham śrī biṃba nava sūtrakam aṣṭa asram aṣṭa koṇa ādyam bahis padma vanam kṛtam kāma dvayena puṭitam sahasram padma veṣṭitam aṣṭa patrāṇi vai merum sumerum tad viparyaye mahā mahā meru pṛṣṭham śata traya chadaiḥ vṛtam chidra vyaktim pravakṣyāmi yathā mānena bho dvijāḥ vasu diś viṃśakaiḥ ca eva catvāriṃśat śata ardhakam daṃḍi śravaṇa saṃpanna mā ākāśam vasu saṃmitam śata viṃśa adhikam ca eva dalāni tad anantaram śukla raktam ca aṣṭa vaṇaiḥ biṃba uṣṭham paripūrayet śuklena paṅkajam tatra paścāt kuryāt triveṣṭanam sthaṃḍile kuśa haste ca pūrvavat veṣṭayet kramāt vasu pañcakalā pañcaviṃśakam tat na patrakāt catvāriṃśat tatas paścā daṣṭottaraśatam bhavet śuklam śoṇam tathā pītam śyāma śuklaiḥ anantaram vilome dala sandhīni śākte śaive tu ṣaṭpuram veṣṭayet paṃca varṇena śukla ādīni samaṃtataḥ rakta pītaiḥ samāstīrya koṇān śuklena pūrayet maṃḍalam biṃbarājasya aṣṭa uttara dalaiḥ vṛtam vasu pañca śakti viṃśat catvāriṃśat śata arddhakam tri ṛtu patram su vṛttam syāt vṛtta yuktam sa bilvakam catvāriṃśat dvayam ca eva gaganena samāvṛtam śatam viṃśa adhika śatam dviśatam viṃśam uttamam veṣṭana aṃse ca tri śatam prakramāt atha vardhayet navaviṃśam kalpayet tu catur sūtrāṇi pātayet pītena reta puḍitā madhye śuklam vibhāvyate sarvāḥ rekhāḥ ca śuklena pauṣṭike pītam ādiśet sa śāṃtike na yoktavyam kāme raktam vinirdiśet aiśānyām ca uttare bhāge guroḥ pītam tu paṅkajam pūrvasyām diśi śukrasya paṅkajam śubhra varṇakam vāruṇe tu śanais kṛṣṇam nairṛtyām dhūmra varṇakam vāyavyām diśi saṃyojya paṅkajam vilikhet tatas bahis pañca rajaiḥ kāryam yuva durga vibhūṣitam pūrva paścima digbhāge śuklam syāt dvāra deśataḥ pañca abja maṇḍalam jñeyam catur svastika bhūṣitam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca na kuryāt dakṣiṇā hīnam māna hīnam na kārayet amānena hataḥ yajñaḥ tasmāt mānam praśasyate ācārya hotṛ brahmāṇaḥ vidhi jñaḥ sahakartṛkaḥ yasya yajñe pāpakaḥ ca jāti hīnaḥ praveśayet aśītibhiḥ varāṭaiḥ ca paṇaḥ iti abhidhīyate taiḥ tu ṣoḍaśabhiḥ jñeyam purāṇam saptabhiḥ tu taiḥ rājataiḥ ca aṣṭabhiḥ svarṇam yajña ādau dakṣiṇā smṛtā mahārāme dvi sauvarṇam kūpe svarṇa ardham eva ca tulasī āmalakī yāge suvarṇa ekam pracakṣate yakṛt loke ca sauvarṇam lakṣe svarṇam catuṣṭayam prāsādasya samutsarge aṣṭādaśa suvarṇakāḥ taḍāge puṣkariṇyām ca ardha ardham kīrtitam mahādāne ca dīkṣāyām vṛṣotsarge ca sattamāḥ jīvataḥ ca vṛṣotsarge gayā śrāddhe tathā eva ca daṃpatyoḥ ca vṛṣotsarge mānam ekam udāhṛtam rājñaḥ karagrahe ca eva dīkṣāyām dāna karmaṇi aśīti rattikam svarṇam śravaṇe bhāratasya ca graha yāge pratiṣṭhāyām suvarṇa śata rattikaḥ devānām brāhmaṇānām ca dānam yasya prakalpitam tasya eva deyam tat dānam sa aṃga upāṃgam sa dakṣiṇam nānā asya kiñcid dātavyam saṃga bhaṃgaḥ bhavet yatas gṛhī tu kṛtvā yat dānam tadā tasya ṛṇī bhavet yajñeṣu home yat dravyam kāṣṭham ājya ādikam ca yat tat nāyakasya pūjāyām dravyam āhuḥ vinirmitam an ādi devatā arcāyām pūjā snāna ādi karmaṇi pratyakṣam dakṣiṇām dadyāt yajña dāna vrata ādike adakṣiṇam na eva kāryam prakuryāt bhūri dakṣiṇam atas dattam purā dattam dātavyam ca eva saṃprati para sva udāra buddhīnām sā sā hi dakṣiṇā bhavet dattāni vidhivat puṃsām deva dānāni yāni hi dāsī dāsa go ādīni manasā yāni karhi cit ekasya aneka dānam ca dadet kaścid pṛthak pṛthak varaṇam ca kadā kuryāt tantre kuryāt ca dakṣiṇām ratnasya dakṣiṇā deyā kāṃcanam samudāhṛtam bhūmeḥ bhūmiḥ dakṣiṇā syāt vastrasya vastra dakṣiṇā pānīyasya tu pānīyam vrīhīṇām vrīhi dakṣiṇā gajasya dakṣiṇā chāgaḥ hi aśvasya meṣaḥ īritaḥ paśūnām ca catuṣpādā devasya deva dakṣiṇā yajñaḥ mānasya ṣaṣ bhāgaḥ dviguṇaḥ parikīrtitaḥ ācāryasya eva bhāga ekam yajamānaḥ pradāsyati pāpakaiḥ tu kalatrāṇām bhāga ekam tat anaṃtaram pātrāṇām ṛtvij ādīnām bhāga trayam udāhṛtam ācārya ādi aṃśataḥ kaścid kṣīṇa vittam samāharet amūlyam varga mūlyam yat bhavet vai dakṣiṇa uttamā māna aśaktau tu yajñānām yat deyam yajña siddhaye devatā pustakam ratnam gāvaḥ dhānyam tilāḥ tathā nameru phala puṣpāṇi deyāni etāni sarvatas catur cakra aṃkitaḥ yaḥ tu sāṃdraḥ vṛttaḥ janārdanaḥ śveta liṃgam ratna liṃgam indranīla ādikam ca yat dakṣiṇa āvarta śaṃkham ca harivaṃśaḥ tathā khilaḥ kapilaḥ nīla vṛṣabhaḥ somadhānyam tathā eva ca amūlyāni āhuḥ etāni dattvā ananta phalāni ca svarṇa pādaḥ bhavet mūlyam śālagrāmasya dakṣiṇā kṣudra liṃge svarṇa mūlyam pāda ardham śrīdhare pi ca ananta unantam iti uktam pāda ardham bāṇa liṅgake yathā pustaka mātreṇa svarṇa pāda ardham iṣyate jyotiṣā īrdham suvarṇasya rajata ardham vṛṣe tathā harivaṃśe śloka śate svarṇam ekam prakīrtitam kapilāyām suvarṇa ardham dhenu mātre purāṇakam prāyaścitta vidhau jñeyam dhenu mātram purāṇakam purāṇa tritayam ca anye vīrya hīne dvayam bhavet kṛṣṇe vṛṣe ṣaṣ purāṇam śvete nava purāṇakam dvātriṃśat ca purāṇam syāt vṛṣe nīle tathā eva ca nameroḥ praticakre ca dvādaśa svarṇa rattikāḥ mūlyam śrīphala mātre api purāṇa tritayam bhavet etāni āhuḥ praśastāni mūla yoge param viduḥ iti śrī bhaviṣpe mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge mūlya kathane tṛtīyaḥ a dhyāyaḥ mūlya dāna varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca pūrṇapātram atho vakṣye yajñe sādhāraṇe api ca kāma home bhavet muṣṭiḥ muṣṭayoṣṭau tu kuñcikā ekaika kuñci mānena kuryāt pātrāṇi vai sadā pātrāṇi ca pṛthakkṛtvā sthāpayet dvāra deśataḥ siddhānām khaḍga dhārāṇām pratyekasya dina kramāt kuṇḍānām kuḍmalānām ca vedanam yādṛśam śṛṇu mahā siṃhāsane pañca daśa pātre tad ardhakam sahasrāre meru pṛṣṭhe turya raupya vṛṣa adhikam vṛṣe gale ca vṛṣabham śeṣe raupya sahasrakam mahākuṇḍe tu dviguṇam vṛtte raupyam nivedayet yonikuṇḍe dadet dhenum aṣṭa ardha svarṇa māṣakam ṣaṣ asre tu tad ardham syāt yāge māṣa dvayam bhavet dāraṇe hasta mātram syāt svarṇa kṛṣṇa kalam bhavet iṣṭikā karaṇe ca eva pratyahnā syāt paṇa dvayam khaṇḍe daśavarāṭam syāt bṛ hanmāne tu kākiṇī taḍāge puṣkariṇyām ca khanane prathama aṃgake sapta hasta mite kuṇḍe niṣṭhe ābaddha mātrakam purāṇasya ca eka aṃśam vetanam parikīrtitam bṛhat kūpasya nirmāṇe pratyaham ca paṇa dvayam śaile jñeyam kāñcanasya rattikā gṛhakarmaṇi koṣṭhe jñeyam sārddha paṇam raṃga ādi racite paṇam vṛkṣāṇām ropaṇe dadyāt pratyahnā sārdha māṣakam setubaṃdhe ca paṃkile ca paṇa dvayam ca kākiṇī paṇa īpaṇe tu tāmrasya dadyāt paṇa catuṣṭayam ghaṭane kāṃsya sīsānām paṇa trayam udāhṛtam atha vā dina saṃkhyānam paṇa ekam ca sa kākiṇi suvarṇasya paṇa eke tu purāṇam ratna kuṭṭime dina saṃkhyā paṇa dvaṃdvam ratnānām atha kuḍmalam maṇivedhe maṇau jñeyam kākiṇī parikīrtitā catur varāṭam adhikam sphāṭike maṇi vedhane kāṃsya tālasya nirmāṇe dhamane tu paṇa trayam lākṣā nirmāṇake kārye tad ardham api kīrtitam a vi vastrasya nirmāṇe syaṃdanam daśa kākiṇī pidhāna vastra nirmāṇe tri paṇam parikīrtitam daśa kākiṇī ūrdhva adhas tad vyaye paṇya vetanam vaṃśājīvasya pratyahnā paṇasya ardhe sa kākiṇi śirasā tasya vapane vijñeyā daśa kākiṇī sa śmaśru nakha māne tu pradadyāt kākiṇī dvayam nārīṇām atha saṃskāre nakha citra ādi rañjane paṇānām turyakam dadyāt sīmaṃtasya alake tathā pada citre tu sārddham syāt grīvāṇām guhya dhāraṇe dhānyānām ropaṇe ca eva dina ekasmin paṇa vetanam lavaṇe tu tathā deyāḥ guvākānām ca ropaṇe daṇḍapatrasya saṃskāre maricānām tathā eva ca paṇa dvayam varāṭānām adhikam daśam eva tu paṇa trayam cakrapaṇe mahiṣāṇām paṇa adhikam narāṇām vāhane ca eva paṇa ekam daśa kākiṇī dāsīnām gardabhānām ca adhikam kākiṇī dvayāt sadyas prakṣālane api ardham dina ādau adhikam bhavet mṛttikānām samuddhāram kuddāle ca ikṣu pīḍane vetanam puṣpa saṃskāre sahasram daśa kākiṇī kākiṇī sraj nibaddhe ca dviguṇam kaṇṭhamālikā abaddhe dvi aṃgulam yāvat muṇḍamālā prakīrtitā hasta traye kaṇṭha mālā ānābhi kamala avadhi kākiṇīka trayam ca eva nirmāṇe dvijasattamāḥ mālatyāḥ ca tulasyāḥ ca jāti yūthyoḥ ca sattamāḥ raupya māṣam snehe ca eva tu kākiṇī sārdha aṃgula pramāṇena vastravartim viduḥ budhāḥ ṣaṣ aṃgulena dairghyam ca na nyūnam na adhikam bhavet pañcaviṃśatibhiḥ saṃkhyā taṃtubhiḥ dvijasattamāḥ pañca aṅgulena mānena kartavyaḥ su samāhitaḥ svarṇadhāre hataḥ rājā rajate sarva kāma daḥ tāmre ca āyuḥ kṣaya karam āyase durgati pradaḥ dīpa ādhāram kāṃsya mayam tathā arīti mayasya ca daśa aṅga dhūpake mūlyam viṃśake tu paṇa trayam dvādaśaka aṃgule api ardha vartim dhūpāya vartayet haste paṃca pramāṇam ca vastraiḥ kuryāt ca vartikām pañcaviṃśatibhiḥ vā yaḥ sa mahāvartiḥ ucyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca atas param pravakṣyāmi kalaśānām vinirṇayam yasya arpite ca māṃgalye yātrā siddhiḥ ca jāyate sapta aṅgam kalaśe jñeyam pañca aṅgam atha vā punar vāri mātreṇa saṃpūrṇe na sā siddhiḥ prajāyate atha vā akṣata puṣpeṣu devam āvāhya pūjayet vaṭasya aśvattha vṛkṣasya dhātakī bilvakasya ca sauvarṇāḥ rājatāḥ vā api tāmra ādyāḥ mṛd mayāḥ tathā kalaśāḥ kramaśas proktāḥ yathā vitta anusārataḥ abhedyāḥ suṣamāḥ plakṣāḥ sarve ādyāḥ su pūritāḥ niśchidrāḥ ṛjavaḥ ca eva secanāni eka karṣakaḥ kuryāt kālāhe dviguṇam śatam mukham ca aṣṭa aṃgulam tasya dvi aṃgule ca vara arthite taijasaiḥ kārayet mānam mṛd maye mānam ucyate kalaśa sthāpanam vakṣye yatra sannihitāḥ surāḥ yajñe sādhāraṇam vakṣye yat vidhānam yathāmatam svastika upari vinyāse saṃpūrṇasya ardha mānake turya sūtrāṇi matimān pañca pūrvāyatanāni ca mārjayet svastika ākāram turya mātram yathā bhavet svastikam jāyate tatra kalaśānām tathā āsanam syonā pṛthivī iti maṃtreṇa kuryāt bhūbhiḥ parigraham madhyama ānānikābhyām ca nyasyet pātāla saṃmukham ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ asya syāt gāyatrī devatā raviḥ ājighram kalaśam mahyām sthāpayet kalaśam tatas kaniṣṭhā aṃguṣṭhakam tyaktvā kumbha agre udare api ca ājighrasya ca mantrasya ṛṣiḥ bhargaḥ udāhṛtaḥ paṃktiḥ chandaḥ ca uddiṣṭaḥ devatā viṣṇuḥ avyayaḥ paṃcanadyā iti mantreṇa kṣipet gaṅgā jalam tatas devatā paramā triṣṭubh devatā soma bhāvitaḥ yāḥ phalinī iti maṃtreṇa pradadyāt sa phala akṣatam yāḥ phalinī iti maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ kamala saṃjñakaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ gaṇapatiḥ devatā parikīrtitā jīvaṃtī pīvaram ca eva phalāni etāni varjayet hiraṇya garbha iti ṛcā pañcaratnāni nikṣipet ṛṣiḥ hiraṇyagarbhaḥ usya chandaḥ triṣṭubh udāhṛtam amṛtīkaraṇam kuryāt daiva śulbanam eva ca varuṇasya tvā iti ṛṣiḥ varuṇa aṃtare yojayet śrīḥ ca te iti mantreṇa dadyāt puṣpam sa candanam kāṇḍāt iti ca mantreṇa dadyāt dūrvā akṣatam punar vrīhayaḥ ca iti mantreṇa pañca vrīhīn ca nikṣipet tilāḥ ca māṣāḥ mudgāḥ ca śyāmākāḥ śālayaḥ smṛtāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge pañcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ māsa varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca atha māsa āśrayam karma kartum māsa nirūpaṇam cāndraḥ sauraḥ sāvanaḥ ca nākṣatraḥ ca tathā aparaḥ triṃśatā divasaiḥ māsaḥ sāvanaḥ parikīrtitaḥ nākṣatra māsaḥ aśvinī ādi revatī antaḥ hi viśrutaḥ rāśeḥ triṃśat bhāga kālaḥ kālaḥ tu ekasya bhāsvataḥ ahorātram tu tat na evam saure api bhāga mānataḥ saure cāndre tu upagaṇau triṃśat bhāge tu adarśanāt sāvanāḥ divasāḥ grāhyāḥ ṛṣīṇām samaye gṛhe atibhāga vyavasthāyām prāyaścitta kriyāsu ca mantra upāsana kārye ca annasya prāśane śiśoḥ karasya grahaṇe rājñaḥ vyavahāreṣu māḥsu ca yajñeṣu khyāyām grāhyaḥ māsaḥ tu sāvanaḥ saura māsaḥ vivāha ādau yadā ādyaiḥ su pragṛhyate cāndraḥ tu pārvaṇe grāhyaḥ vārṣikeṣu aṣṭakāsu ca śrāddheṣu tithi kāryeṣu tithi ukteṣu vrateṣu ca nākṣatraḥ somapādīnām ārya bhāga vicāraṇe karagraha vidhau rājñām na ayam sarva jana ākṛtiḥ citrā nakṣatra yogena caitrī sā pūrṇimā smṛtā sa ca tithi ātmakaḥ māsaḥ cāndraḥ śravaṇa bhāskaraḥ cāndraḥ caitrī aṃtikaḥ māsaḥ mukhyaḥ caitra ādi saṃjñakaḥ mukhyaḥ śukla ādi darśa antaḥ māsaḥ lākṣaṇikaḥ mataḥ caitra ādyāḥ cāndramāsāḥ ye dvādaśa api tu yogataḥ viśākhayā ādyeṣu yā vā tathā bhādrapadena vā yatra na pūrṇimā yogaḥ māsaḥ sa syāt vināśakaḥ tathā ca māsa sāmānye yogena ayam bhavet kvacid yadi varṣa sahasra ante tat akṣeṇa eva pūrṇimā daṇḍa dvaye bhukta śeṣe na bhuñjīta kadācana atikramya aparām bhoktum tithim yatra ubhau api sa ca adhikaḥ yatas māsaḥ tatas syāt adhimāsakaḥ sama rātrim divam kṛtvā vaivasvata purī gatim rāśi aṃtare sūryaḥ yāvat gacchati bhānumān vardhate tithayaḥ yāvat tulām yāti divā karaḥ tulā ādi rāśi ṣaṭke tu na varddhate kadācana svabhāvāt sama gatyā tu yatas saṃkramate raviḥ saṃcaya mānā tu ekaikā pratimāsam vivarddhate sa cāndraḥ malinaḥ māsaḥ koṇa pādyaiḥ samīhitaḥ bhukta ucchiṣṭā tu tad māsāt a saṃspṛṣṭa divākaraḥ yadā saṃkramate laṃghya tadā jñeyaḥ malimlucaḥ sārdha varṣa dvaye pūrṇe patati evam niśākaraḥ parityaktāḥ ca yāvaṃtyaḥ vyutkramiṇyaḥ ca yāḥ punar nirmamam malinam māsam pretānām ca hitāya ca atas preta kriyāḥ sarvāḥ kāryāḥ malimluce api ca tat idānīm pravakṣyāmi kathitam ca prasaṃgataḥ yat śrāddham preta saṃbaṃdhi sarpiḍīkaraṇa avadhi malamāse api tat kāryam viśi naṣṭi sapiṃḍanam tadā trayodaśe māsi kartavyam tat sapiṃḍanam varjyam māsikayā śrāddham ekam tasmin trayodaśe triṃśatā ghaṭikaiḥ śrāddham vardhate adya api saṃmitam upavāsa ādikam karma sīmantonnayanam tathā ārta varjam puṃsavanam putra ādi mukha darśanam mala māse api kurvīta nṛpāṇām abhiṣecanam vrata āraṃbham pratiṣṭhām ca cūḍākarma ca mekhalām maṃtra upāsām rahasyam ca mahā dānam su maṅgalam vivāham ca gṛha āraṃbham praveśam nava veśmanaḥ upagraham gavā ādīnām āśrama aṃtara saṃkramam dīrgha mātrāsu na ijyam vai tīrtha yātrā avasecanam varṣa vṛddhi vṛṣotsarga kanyāḥ dvis nayana ādi ca yajñam ca kāmikam vidvān malamāse vivarjayet pāda astam ca mahā astam ca dvividham ca astamasya tu pṛthivyām eva pādāḥ tam bhavet dvādaśa vatsarān ūnapañcāśat adhikam divasānām śata dvayam pratīcyām uditaḥ kāvyaḥ dṛśyaḥ bhavati sarvadā eka ṛkṣe guruṇā yuktaḥ yāvat tiṣṭhati bhārgavaḥ mala māsa vat karmāṇi prāhuḥ tyājyāni sarvaśas ṛkṣa bhede tu eka rāśau saṃparke yadi vā anayoḥ guroḥ rāhoḥ api tathā tyajet vidvān na saṃśayaḥ siṃhe rāśau sthite sūrye jīve ca astam upāgate heyāni yāni karmāṇi niṣiddhāni malimluce dvirāṣāḍhaḥ iti khyātaḥ gauṇe śabda vivartanāt āṣāḍhakīrtanam kāryam evam varṣa aṃtare āṣāḍha dvaya saṃyukta pūrṇamāsī dvayam tathā yugma karkaṭayoḥ rāśyaḥ dvirāṣāḍhaḥ tadā bhavet bhavet gauṇaḥ dvirāṣāḍhaḥ rāśiḥ tatra eva saṃyute karkaṭe śayanam kuryāt āgamiṣyam paratrake durga utthānam tulāyām tu viṣṇuḥ nidrām jahāti asau iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca daivam vā paitṛkam karma kālam āśritya vartate kāle tāni eva karmāṇi phalam yacchaṃti kurvatām vyayaḥ vā mukhya bhāvena phala daḥ karma śālinām kālaḥ tu guṇa bhāvena sarva kāla āśritā kriyā na kālena vinā kiñcid triṣu lokeṣu jāyate atas kālam pravakṣyāmi nimittam karmaṇām iha te api kālāḥ pakṣa māsa rāśi varṣa aṃtare api ca tithi ādi kāla bhāveṣu niṣiddham nihitam hi tat kālabhāgaḥ niḥsahāyaḥ ye api syuḥ karma sādhanāḥ tithau pūrvāhṇa vyāpinyām kurvīta karma vaidikam ekoddiṣṭam tu madhyāhna vyāpinyām hi samācaret parāhṇa vyāpinīm prāpya tithim kuryāt tu pārvaṇam na tu pūrvāhṇa madhyāhna parāhṇeṣu yathocitam ekaḥ hi kālaḥ prātar tu vṛddhiśrāddha ādi sādhane na apekṣate sāhāyyam tad tithi ādi viṣuva ādiṣu devebhyaḥ brahmaṇā dattaḥ pūrvāhṇaḥ tithibhiḥ saha pitṛbhyaḥ hi aparāhṇaḥ tu pārvaṇam tu param vinā pūrvāhṇa mātra saṃprāptau tatas devān prapūjayet pūrvāhṇa sparśa mātre api tithi khaṇḍena ca arpayet kharvā darpā tathā hiṃsrā tithiḥ ca trividhā bhavet hiṃsrā tu kṣaya jā jñeyā kāla bhedena gṛhyate kharvā darpā pare grāhyā hiṃsrā grāhyā tu pūrvatas śuklapakṣe parā grāhyā kṛṣṇe pūrvā praśasyate yathā vā āste raviḥ bhāti ghaṭikāḥ daśa vā api vā sā tithiḥ tat ahorātram vyapadeśyā na ca itarā śukle vā yadi vā kṛṣṇe kharvā darpā tithiḥ ca yā yayā astam savitā yāti pitṛ kārye ca sā tithiḥ śrāddha kāla ādikam yatra tatra śrāddham vidhīyate amāvāsya pārvaṇe ca sā tithiḥ pitṛ pūjane amāvasyā amṛtasya eva pārvaṇam yatra kutracid śuklapakṣe ca kṛṣṇe ca yaḥ yogaḥ para pūrvayoḥ pūrvedyus vā paredyus vā trisaṃdhya vyāpinī tithiḥ sā pūjyā ca sva kṛtyeṣu pakṣayoḥ ubhayoḥ api pūjyāḥ hi vyastam saṃtyajya pūrvam ca ekādaśī yugam dvitīyā vahninā yuktā caturthī paṃcamī yutā etāḥ upoṣyāḥ tithayaḥ puṇyāḥ syuḥ dharma vedibhiḥ etad vyastāḥ tu puṇyāni ghnaṃti pūrva kṛtāni api bāṇena viddhā yā ṣaṣṭhī muni viddhā tathā aṣṭamī daśamī ekādaśī viddhā trayodaśyā caturdaśī amāvāsyā bhūta viddhā na upoṣyā muninā api ca hanti putra kalatrāṇi dhanāni samupoṣitā viddhāḥ ye na abhinindyāḥ syuḥ yuktāḥ tena abhinanditāḥ tām astām tu tithim prāpya yugmāni apūjya tām iyuḥ yugmāni ca divāyoge grāhyāṇi vyasta niṃdanam rātri yogam vinā api syāt ekādaśī ādikam vratam naktam jāgaraṇam ca eva vinā ayoge api śasyate ekādaśī upavāsam tu dvādaśī yogataḥ caret divāyoge tu saṃpūrṇām tyajet ubhaya pūrvataḥ rātri yoge tu saṃpūrṇā sa upāsyā ekādaśī sadā saptamī śukla pakṣe api pūjyā ṣaṣṭhyā samanvitā niśi tu syāt yadā ṣaṣṭhī saptamī navamī divā upoṣya kevalām ṣaṣṭhīm toṣayet bhāskaram naraḥ evam trayodaśīm kṛṣṇām vidhi prāptām vinā dvijāḥ upoṣya pārvatīnātham toṣayet yaḥ ca kevalam divā trayodaśī yuktā kṛṣṇā upoṣyā caturdaśī pareṇa api caturdaśyāḥ na tu kuryāt amātithau trisaṃdhya vyāpinī prāpya yadi kuryāt upauṣaṇam pāraṇam tu sinīvālyām caturdaśyām upoṣayet caturdaśīm atikramya sinīvālyām tu pāraṇāt vratāni tasya naśyaṃti prākṛtāni caturdaśīm saptamī lalitā bhādre śakta utthānam ca vāruṇī pūjyāḥ ca etāḥ parāḥ kuryāt trisaṃdhya vyāpinīṣu api sa ṛkṣā ṛkṣa yoge tu ṛkṣa abhāve parā yutā ṛkṣa abhāve parā grāhyā trisaṃdhya vyāpinīṣu api śrāvaṇe ca ādya pāde tu praśastā śakra pūjane abhāve ca uttarāṣāḍhā dhaniṣṭhā ca viśiṣyate daṇḍa ardham daṇḍam ekam vā tad ardham palam eva vā udaye saṃyutā grāhyā sā tithiḥ ca uttamā bhavet trisaṃdhya vyāpinīm hitvā pūjyā śuklā aṣṭamī parā śukla ekādaśī amāvāsyā saṃkrāntyām śrāddha vāsare nara aśva go gaja ādīnām vāhanāt pātakī bhavet kartuḥ go mahiṣa ādīnām gardabha uṣṭra kharasya ca na vāhayet dāsa dāsī vāhanena asti dūṣaṇam grāma aṃtare na doṣaḥ syāt divi nadī aṃtare api ca tatra go mahiṣa ādīnām vāhane na asti dūṣaṇam kuryāt aṃbu ghaṭa śrāddham na kāla niyamam kvacid na ca anna niyamam kuryāt aśma pātram ca varjayet na yojayet mṛd mayam ca śūdrāṇām mṛd maye vidhiḥ nivedayet ca māsa aṃte mṛd mayam vṛkṣa mūlake parvaśrāddhe daivalakam tathā raṇḍa āśramam tyajet mātā pitṛ parityāgī taila havya ādi vikrayī catvāriṃśat utsavānām sa aṣṭānām ca caret yadi striyāḥ vimucyate kaścid sa tu raṇḍāśramī mataḥ aṣṭacatvāriṃśat abdam vayaḥ yāvat na pūryate putra bhāryā viyuktasya na asti yajña adhikāri tā yām tithim samanuprāpya samudeti divākaraḥ snāna adhyayana dāneṣu sā tithiḥ sakalā smṛtā yayā astam savitā yāti kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu sā tithiḥ pitṛrṇām sakalā jñeyā snāna dāna ādi karmasu saptamī śuklapakṣe yā yāvat icchet ca khaṇḍitā ādya bhāge raveḥ ṣaṣṭhyām para ādau yā aṣṭamī yutā yadi akhaṇḍā bhavet sā eva tadā jñeyā bhava ātmikā māgha māsena sā api evam pūrveṇa ravi toṣiṇī manvaṃtarā pareṇa eva snāna pāna ādi karmasu iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śūtaḥ uvāca tithīnām pravarā yasmāt brahmaṇā samudāhṛtā kārtika āśvayujoḥ caitre māghe ca api viśeṣataḥ snānam dānam daśaguṇam śiva viṣṇvoḥ ca pūjanam agnim iṣṭvā ca kṛtvā ca pratipadyām iti smṛtam haviṣā sarva dhānyāni prāpnuyāt īpsitam dhanam bṛhaspatau dvitīyāyām śuklāyām vidhi pūjanam kṛtvā naktam samaśnīyāt labhate bhūtim īpsitām dvitīyā yā tu vipra iṃdāḥ tām upoṣya harim yajet yām upoṣya na vaidhavyam prayāti strī na saṃśayaḥ amūlya śayanam māsam daṃpatī pratipūjayet vāsobhiḥ gandha puṣpaiḥ ca nānā bhakṣyaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ vaiśākhe śukla pakṣe tu tṛtīyāyām tathā eva ca gaṃgā toye naraḥ snātvā mucyate sarva kilbiṣaiḥ svāti yukta tṛtīyāyām vaiśākhe tu viśeṣataḥ māghe tu rohiṇī yuktāḥ vṛṣe ca āśvayuje tathā tasyām yat dīyate kiñcid tat akṣayam udāhṛtam viśeṣataḥ haviṣya annam modaka ādi samāyutam toya dānam viśeṣeṇa praśaṃsaṃti manīṣiṇaḥ budha śravaṇa saṃyuktā tṛtīyā yadi labhyate tasyām snāna upavāsa ādyam akṣayam parikīrtitam śivā śāṃtā sukhā ca eva caturthī trividhā smṛtā sā api bhādrapade śuklā śiva loke su pūjitā tasyām snānam tapaḥ dānam upavāsaḥ japaḥ tathā bhavet sahasra guṇitam śrāddham bhavati ca akṣayam gaṇeśe kārayet pūjām modaka ādibhiḥ ādarāt śrāvaṇe māsi pañcamyām śukla pakṣe viśeṣataḥ snāpayet nava nāgān ca gaṃdha toyaiḥ sugaṃdhibhiḥ teṣām kule prayacchanti abhayam prāṇa rakṣaṇam supte janārdane kṛṣṇa pañcamyām bhavana aṃgaṇe pūjayet manasā devīm vāmām snuhī iti saṃśrayām pūjayitvā naraḥ devīm na sarpa bhayam āpnu yāt yā iyam bhādrapade ṣaṣṭhī ṣaṣṭhī ca dvijasattama snāna dāna ādikam tasyām sarvam akṣayam ucyate ṣaṣṭhyām phala aśanaḥ viprāḥ viśeṣāt māgha kārtike śuddhe pakṣe ca saptamyām yadā saṃkramate raviḥ mahājayā tadā syāt vai saptamī bhāskarapriyā aparājitā tu bhādrasya mahā pātaka nāśinī śuklā vā yadi vā kṛṣṇā ṣaṣṭhī vā saptamī tu vā ravi vāreṇa saṃyuktā tithiḥ puṇyatamā smṛtā āśvinasya sita aṣṭamyām aṣṭādaśa bhujām yajet kārttike śukla pakṣe vā mahā vibhava vistaraiḥ āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe māsi śukla aṣṭamyām ca caṃḍikām prātar snātvā arcayet bhaktyā rātrau saṃsnāpayet dvijāḥ caitra māsi sita aṣṭamyām aśoka kusumaiḥ dvijāḥ arcayet mṛd mayīm devīm aśoka artham ca sarvadā sati aṣṭama muhūrte vā rohiṇī sahitā aṣṭamī śrāvaṇe māsi siṃhārke kvacid sā api ca śasyate ekādaśīnām koṭīnām vrataiḥ ca labhate phalam atas daśaguṇam proktam kṛtvā etat phalam āpnuyāta kṛtvā vimucyate pāpāt sapta kṛtya kṛtām varaḥ na api nakṣatra doṣaḥ asti vāra doṣaḥ na gaṇyate tri kālam pūjayet devam divā rātrau viśeṣataḥ ardharātre viśeṣeṇa puṣpaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ api rātri sparśe yadi param rajanyām api ca aṣṭamī saptamī sārdha yāmam ca rohiṇī vā na saṃspṛśet prāk āraṃbham prakurvīta adhimātra adhike vratī viśvanātha ādi devānām darśanam prāk vivarjayet yatra tatra upavāsī syāt yāma aṣṭaka vratam caret yāma ardham tad param yāme pāraṇam vicaret vratī tad pare ca anna janyam vā na kuryāt pāraṇam gṛhī divā aṣṭamyām muhūrte vā prājāpatyena saṃyutam tathā api ca divākṛtyam samāpya ca vratam caret muhūrta aṃte ca māsa aṃte aṣṭamyām api rohiṇī upavāse ca yaḥ doṣaḥ pūjā homaḥ praśasyate navamyām ca sadā pūjyāḥ pratimāse ayutam dvijāḥ kārtikasya tu māsasya daśamī śuklapakṣikā tasyām yukta aśanāḥ viprāḥ brahma lokam avāpnuyuḥ daśamī jyeṣṭha māsasya sā ced daśa harā smṛtā āśvinasya mahā puṇyā kārtike vijayā smṛtā ekādaśī vrata parā sarva pāpa praṇāśinī sarva pāpa vinirmuktāḥ yathā kurvaṃti mānavāḥ ekādaśyām upoṣya atha dvādaśyām pāraṇam caret dvādaśa dvādaśīḥ hanti tasmāt tathā ācaret budhaḥ pūrvedyus ekādaśī pūrṇā parehani ca vardhate vanavāsī parām kuryāt pūrvām kuryāt gṛhāśramī ekādaśī dvādaśī tu tadā upoṣyā parā tithiḥ yadā tu pāraṇā yogyā dvādaśī na upatiṣṭhate tadā pūrvā eva saṃgrāhyā tyājyā vṛddhā pare ahani ekādaśī kalā yuktā sakalā dvādaśī yadi tatra kratu samam puṇyam trayodaśyām tu pāraṇam ekādaśī dvādaśī ca pare ahani na labhyate na upoṣyā sā mahā doṣā putra pautra dhana kṣayāt ekādaśī daśa āviddhā dvādaśyām liptikāḥ yadā dvādaśī pāraṇā yogyā vardhate ca apare ahani tadā dina dvaye tyājyā pāraṇam ca niyogataḥ ṣoḍaśī grahaṇam dṛṣṭvā dvādaśī lupta pāraṇā caṇḍa atithau vratam ca eva hanti puṇyam purā kṛtam trayodaśyām yat vihitam pāraṇam na tu puṇya dam gṛhāśramī na kuryāt vā daśamī dvādaśī kṣayāt tathā api saṃparityajya dvādaśyām samupāvaset vajra ālokana mātram tu daśamī saṃviśet yadi ekādaśī na bhoktavyā parā hi ekādaśī tadā tadā ced daśamī viddhā samupoṣyā na dūṣaṇam dvādaśyām upavāsam tu yaḥ karoti nara uttamaḥ sa yāti paramam sthānam yatra viṣṇuḥ anāmayaḥ upoṣya daśamī mitrām mohāt ekādaśīm naraḥ tu upavāsam prakurvīta pāraṇam tu vivarjayet śuklām vā yadi vā kṛṣṇām pūrva saṃkalpitām api ekādaśīm sadā kuryāt na vai kṛṣṇa ittarām kvacid naktena vartayet kṛṣṇām iti śāstra viniścayaḥ māse ca ekādaśī yatra labhyate śukla pakṣake tatra kuryāt kṛṣṇa pakṣe parā tithiḥ na gṛhyate śrāvaṇī dvādaśī śuklā cāṃdrabhadre yadā harau tatra upoṣya hṛṣīkeśam pūjayet vidhivat naraḥ śrāvaṇe ca āśvine ca eva labhyate dvādaśī dine śravaṇena samāyuktā mahatī sā prakīrtitā puṣyeṇa drādaśī yuktā phālgune vijayā smṛtā kārtike ced parityājyā māghe tu nārakī bhavet yā bhādre vijayā proktā śravaṇena samāyutā ekādaśyām uttaratas dvādaśī ca divā anvitā niśipūrṇā dvādaśī ca śravaṇena api saṃyutā saphalā dvādaśī jñeyā upoṣya eṣā mahā phalā dvādaśyām viṣṇu viddhāyām vāsudevam prapūjayet kṛṣṇāyām tu vratam kuryāt bahu duḥkham samācareta dvādaśī kāma viddhā ced manyate na api upoṣaṇam hanyāt purā kṛtam puṇyam trayodaśyām upoṣaṇam prahare prahare snānam śarvaryām ca vidhīyate pūjanam ca agni kāryam ca ṣaṭsu kāryam vratī caret ekādaśīm dvādaśīm ca prāpnoti śravaṇe yadi ekādaśyām upoṣya atha dvādaśyām api upāvaset pāraṇam tu trayodaśyām dvādaśī ced na labhyate āmiṣa annam na bhuñjīta haviṣya annena pāraṇam yadā tu pāraṇā yogyā labhyate dvādaśī tadā tasyām na atikramaḥ yuktaḥ tad abhāve trayodaśī ekādaśī dvādaśī ca śravaṇa ṛkṣeṇa saṃyutā viṣṇuśṛṃkhalakaḥ nāma budhavāre viśiṣyate daśamyām saṃyataḥ bhūtvā prātar ekādaśī dine kṛtvā tu saṅgame snānam prahare prahare dvijāḥ anena vidhinā kṛtvā vijayāyām vrata uttamam sarva pāpam kṣayam nītvā viṣṇu loke vaset naraḥ catur yugānām divyānām yāvat syāt viṣṇu rūpadhṛka tretāyām daśa janmāni madhyadeśeṣu bho dvijāḥ tatas ca bhārate varṣe veda vedāṃta sāra vid jāyate daśa janmāni tretāyām brāhmaṇa uttamaḥ bhādre māsi site pakṣe dvādaśyām pṛthivīpatim śatrum utthāpayet prāhṇe śubha lagne śubha kṣaṇe śalya śālmalikasya api saptaparṇīyakasya ca eṣām anyatamam vṛkṣam caṃpakasya arjunasya vā bṛhat kadaṃba vṛkṣasya dvicatvāriṃśat aṃgulaiḥ dvātriṃśat aṃgulaiḥ vā api māna dvayam atha api vā tri vyāyāmam ca prathamam dvāviṃśa hastam eva vā hastaḥ ṣoḍaśa vārasya gṛhasthasya viśiṣyate aṣṭa hastam tu vaiśyasya śūdrasya pañca hastakam ghanasāra samāyuktām karpūra maṃḍana anvitām rakta vastra paricchannām puṣpa mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtām mañca sthām kārayet pūjām bhaktyā ca su dṛḍhaḥ naraḥ kāka ādīn na spṛśet jātu vaira pakṣe viśeṣataḥ patākāyāḥ nipāte tu rāṣṭra hānim samādiśet patāke nissṛte bhagne mahiṣāṇām vināśanam sthūṇā pāte ca bhagne vā ca aśva hānim samādiśet grahāṇām ca tri bhāgena ca ayutam juhuyāt budhaḥ ādityasya adbhutam idam dvija pāte tu bho dvijāḥ kapota pāte śukrasya kāka ādau bhaumam ādiśet bhūkaṃpe jāyate viṣṭam guroḥ adbhutam ādiśet kīṭa viddhe kṛte viprāḥ candrasya adbhutam ādiśet śivāḥ ruvanti cāndrasya vānaraḥ vā spṛśet kvacid ketoḥ adbhutam uddiṣṭam bhūmikaṃpe tu te dvijāḥ trayodaśīm sitām prāpya puṣpaiḥ nānāvidhaiḥ api caitre māsi sita aṣṭamyām śanau śatabhiṣā yadi gaṃgāyāḥ yadi labhyeta sūrya graha śataiḥ samā sā iyam mahāvāruṇī iti khyātā kṛṣṇa trayodaśī asyām snānam ca dānam ca śrāddham vā akṣayam ucyate madhu māse site pakṣe dambhabhañjī caturdaśī tasyām madana mūle ca akṣaram kāmam arcayet sa yāti paramam sthānam madanasya prabhāvataḥ anantasya vratam vakṣye sarva pāpa praṇāśanam dvādaśyām pūjite śakre dhvajake vāstu yaṣṭiṣu kṛtvā darbha maya anantam vāri dhānya anvitam tathā yava godhūma śālīnām cūrṇaiḥ na ekatamasya ca kṛtvā pūpa āhvayam tasmai dadyāt ekam śruta īkṣitam caturdaśa sūtra mayam sūtram kārpāsam eva ca atas preta caturdaśyām bhojayitvā tapodhanān tatas preta kathām śrutvā śākaiḥ naktam samācaret caturdaśam dvādaśam vā saptamam vā api pañcamam māna mātrā ādikam kṛtvā sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate māghe māsi vaṭāpāyaḥ kasya pāpam punīmahe snātvā tatra caturdaśyām samaye tārakāmaye saṃbhavet phālgune māsi yā ca kṛṣṇā caturdaśī śivarātriḥ iti khyātā sā jagat sarva kāma dā tithi yoge ca śarvaryām saṃpūrṇe vratam ācaret kāma viddhā sā ca pūjyā rātri yoge caret vratī atha vakṣyāmi caitra ādi māse tu pūrṇimā yathā mahācaitrī iti sā jñeyā pūrṇimā kṣaya puṇya dā viśākhā ādiṣu bhedeṣu pūrṇa candraḥ guruḥ caret mahāvaiśākhika ādyāḥ tu pūrṇimāḥ dvādaśa smṛtāḥ mahājyaiṣṭhī viśeṣaḥ ayam prājāpatye yathā raviḥ guru pūrṇa candraḥ jyeṣṭhāyām mahājyaiṣṭhī iti sā smṛtā vinā api guruṇā candraḥ kṛttikā pūrṇimā tathā tathā mahākārttikī sā tithiḥ puṇyatamā bhavet rohiṇyām tu sthitaḥ candraḥ paurṇamāsyām tu kārttike citrā vā yadi vā pūrṇā yadā syāt pūrṇimā atithiḥ mahācaitrī tathā api syāt aśvamedha phala pradā raviṇā kṛttikā yogāt ravi vāre ca pūrṇimā mahācaitrī tathā api syāt dattasya akṣaya kārikā sarvam akṣaya tām yāti phalam ca eva āśvamedhikam pitaraḥ tarpitāḥ yānti vaiṣṇavam lokam akṣayam bharaṇyām kārttike māsi yadi syāt pūrṇimā tithiḥ gaṃgādvāre tu mahatī vaiśākhī puṇya dā smṛtā śālagrāme mahācaitrī kṛta puṇyā mahātithiḥ gaṃgādvāre tu mahatī vaiśākhī puṇya dā smṛtā puruṣottame mahājyaiṣṭhī mahāṣāḍhī tu śṛṃkhale mahāśrāvaṇī kedāre mahā puṇyatamā matā mahābhādrī badaryām ca syāt naraḥ tathā mahatī mārgaśīrṣe syāt ayodhyāyām tathā uttare mahāpauṣī puṇyatamā mahāmāghī prayāgataḥ mahāphālgunī naimiṣe ca nirdiṣṭāḥ syuḥ mahā phalāḥ atra sma vihitam karma śubham vā yadi vā aśubham āśvine paurṇamāsī tu kaumudī iti prakīrtitā asyām candra udaye lakṣmīm pūjayet vidhivat naraḥ yaḥ śrāddham prabhāte paitṛkam dvijaḥ indu kṣaye māsi māsi prāyaścittīyate tu saḥ candra āśvine tu kṛṣṇāyām pañcadaśyām yathāvidhi kṛtvā snāna ādikam karma sa upavāsaḥ dinam nayet pradoṣa samaye lakṣmīm pūjayitvā yathāvidhi dīpavṛkṣān yathā vṛkṣān lakṣmī prītyai samutsṛjet nadī tīre girau goṣṭhe śmaśāne vṛkṣa mūlataḥ dvis bhojanam amāvāsyām na kartavyam kadācana śarvaryām ca viśeṣeṇa māgha phālgunayoḥ naraiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca vakṣye pravara saṃtānam yathākramam iti dvijāḥ yat vinā vyatyayaḥ yasmāt tasmāt śāstra anusārataḥ pravara trayam kāśyapasya kāśyapa āśā vanaiḥ dhruvam mokunī āṃgirasa bhāsyāt jāmadagnya āplavāyanam śāṃḍilya asita daivalāḥ pravara trayam eva ca parāśarasya ca tathā svayam śāṃbavaśiṣṭhakam ātreyam ācāryaṇasya a bāla pravaram eva hi artha kṣīra mitrāvaruṇam pañcamam parikīrtitam autathyasya ca vāśiṣṭham aindre cakram ca krauñcāyanam tathā autathya iti samākhyātam māhiṣyam cyavanam tathā urukaṃṭa trayam vidyāt kauśikasya trayam tathā yadgālaḥ devarāj khyātaḥ kuśika ādyāḥ ca bho dvijāḥ ghṛtakauśikasya kuśikāḥ viśvāmitra aghamarṣaṇam caṇḍakauśikasya ca tathā devarāj devarātakam taruṃka śākaṭāyanaḥ svayam eva pravara trayam bhrama dvayam jaimineḥ ca svayam vāśiṣṭham eva ca śaṃkha māṃgirasa cyavanam śaṃkha bhasya trayam matam āplavāyana iti pāṭhīne eke eva tu sattamāḥ kṛṣṇājinasya kṛṣṇājinam viśvāmitrasya jaiminam kātyāyanasya kātyāyana gārgyāyaṇa trayam tathā vātsyāyana iti vikhyātam kuśikasya ca paṃcamam amum ca viśvāmitram ca jāmadagnya āplavāyanam gārgyasya tathā aṃgirasaḥ eva ca vaśiṣṭhasya ca vāsiṣṭham ca tathā aṃgirasaḥ eva ca ye na uktāḥ ye api avijñātāḥ te proktāḥ kāśyapāt jagat iti śrī bhaviṇye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge navamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vāstuyāga varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca vāstuyāgam atho vakṣye bali maṇḍala pūrvakam aṃkura arpaṇakam kṛtvā madhye kuryāt ca maṃḍalam tri hastā piṃḍikā kāryā catur asrā udak plavā madhye saṃmārjayet vidvān pādān nava yathākramāt koṇe catuṣpadam jñeyam dikṣu tri padakam kramāt koṇe catuṣpadam sthāpyam catuṣkoṇe vibhāvayet catuṣkoṇam bahis kuryāt koṇe ca api catuṣṭayam dvātriṃśat ca bhavet bāhye ca atas ca api trayodaśa catvāriṃśat pañca yutāḥ militvā vāstu devatāḥ śikhī ca eva atha parjanyaḥ jayaṃtaḥ kuliśa āyudhaḥ sūryaḥ satyaḥ vṛṣaḥ ca eva ākāśam vāyuḥ eva ca pūṣā ca vitathaḥ ca eva guhānyaḥ ca yamaḥ tathā gandharvaḥ mṛgarājaḥ tu mṛgāḥ pitṛ gaṇāḥ tathā asuraḥ paśu pāśau ca rogaḥ hi mokṣaḥ eva ca bahis dvādaśa iti etāni īśāna ādīni yathākramam īśāna ādi catuṣkoṇam saṃsthitān pūjayet budhaḥ mitraḥ atha rājayakṣmā ca saptamaḥ pṛthivīdharaḥ aṣṭamaḥ tu āpavatsaḥ tu paridhau brahmaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ pūrva ādiṣu tathā pūjyāḥ gandha puṣpaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ militvā ūnapañcāśat uttamāḥ vāstu devatāḥ na anyatra yojayet viprāḥ prāsāde ca viśeṣataḥ bahis koṇe carakya ādi carakam ca vidārikām pūtanām ca tatas paścāt vāyavye pāpa rākṣasīm svaiḥ svaiḥ maṃtraiḥ ca gaṃdha ādyaiḥ pūjayet kusuma ādinā yathā uktena balim dadyāt pāyasa annena vā punar devavarṇān atho vakṣye yathāvat anuvarṇitāḥ pītaḥ śuklaḥ ca dharmaḥ ca pūṣā raktaḥ prakīrtitaḥ śyāmaḥ śukraḥ ca kṛṣṇaḥ ca pītaḥ śuklaḥ yathākramam pītaḥ bhṛṃgaḥ punar śuklaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ śuklaḥ tathā eva ca raktaḥ śuklaḥ ca śoṇaḥ ca kṛṣṇa raktaḥ tathā eva ca dhūmra pītaḥ rakta pītaḥ śuklaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ ca śyāmakaḥ rakta varṇena dvātriṃśat daśa varṇāḥ prakīrtitāḥ śukla śoṇam punar śvetam siṃdūra ābham prakīrtitam pāṃḍura kuṃkuma ābham ca raktam jñeyam ca pītakam śukla pītam ca śvetam ca gauram ca iti aṣṭa varṇakam pītam raktam ca śyāmam ca gauram ca iti catuṣṭayam ūnapañcāśat sarvam ca vāstukarmaṇi catvāriṃśat dvāra yutam gṛha devakule api ca mahākūpe tathā śvetaḥ anyatra api praśasyate su lipte ca śucau deśe sārdha hasta pramāṇataḥ daśa pūrva āyatāḥ rekhāḥ daśa ca eva uttara āyatāḥ ekādaśī padam kuryāt rekhābhiḥ padakena tu pada sthān pūjayet devān triṃśat pañcādaśa eva tu dvātriṃśat bāhyatas pūjyāḥ pūjya āgāre trayodaśa madhye nava pade brahmā tasya api aṣṭau samīpa gāḥ catur dikṣu ṣaṣ padam tu tri padam tu catuṣpadam pada ekam tu catuṣkoṇe eṣa vāstu vinirṇayaḥ carakya ādi tatas hitvā catvāriṃśat ca paṃcakam aparam maṇḍalam vakṣye yathāvat anupūrvaśas dvi catur koṣṭhakaiḥ dikṣu yajeta aryamaṇam tatas koṇeṣu koṣṭha dvaṃdveṣu bāhya ādi parikīrtitam sāvitram savitāram ca śakram indram jayam punar rudram rudra jayam ca eva vāyum jṛṃbhakam eva ca pilipiccham ca medhāvī vidārī pūtanā tathā kramāt īśāna paryaṃtām jayantaḥ śakra bhāskarau ca diśi prācyām avasthitāḥ agniḥ pūṣā ca vitadhaḥ yamaḥ ca gṛharakṣakaḥ dharvaḥ bhṛṃgarājaḥ ca mṛgaḥ dakṣiṇam āśritāḥ nirṛtiḥ dauvārikaḥ ca sugrīva varuṇau tatas śoṣa rogau pratyak diśi sthitāḥ prāṇa vāyuḥ ca nāgaḥ ca somaḥ bhallāṭaḥ eva ca militvā ca tripañcāśat tebhyaḥ pūrve balim haret piṇyākaiḥ parama annaiḥ vā pūrva uktaiḥ vā yathā kramāt śveta aśva vāhanam divyam kirīṭaiḥ svaiḥ vibhūṣitam ākṛṣṇena iti mantrasya svarṇe ṛṣi jagatī chandaḥ savitṛ aryama prītaye viniyogaḥ maṃtrasya kardamaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chandaḥ kamalā devatā vivasvat prītaye viniyogaḥ trinetram tri bhujam ca eva śveta aṃbara dharam śubham maṃtrasya jayaṃtaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ śaṅkaraḥ devatā mitra prītaye viniyogaḥ prītam mahīdharam dhyāyet vṛṣabha upari saṃsthim sāvitrīm śveta varṇām ca sarva lakṣaṇa saṃyutām dvi bhujām pīta vastrām ca śveta siṃhāsane sthitām rakta ambara dharām raktām rakta mālā upaśobhitām tat varṣam iti maṃtrasya gautamaḥ ṛṣiḥ virāj chandaḥ sūryaḥ devatā savitṛ prītaye viniyogaḥ śakram dhyāyet pīta varṇam śukla kairāvata sthitam sarva devaiḥ stūyamānam dvi bhujam pīta vāsasam rudram dhyāyet śveta varṇam vṛṣabha ārūḍha vigraham nāga yajñopavītam ca sarva lakṣaṇa saṃyutam rakta śyāma aṃbara dharam dvi bhujam rakta vāsasam īśānaḥ iti maṃtrasya marīciḥ ṛṣiḥ paṃkti chandaḥ vāyuḥ devatā apām prītaye viniyogaḥ padma śaṃkha dharam vāme vara abhaya karam param śarvam dhyāyet rakta varṇam vṛṣabha upari saṃsthitam mālā svāhā iti maṃtrasya bhārgavaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ mahādevaḥ devatā śarva prītaye viniyogaḥ guham dhyāyet pīta varṇam pīta padmāsana sthitam nānā ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyam kuṇḍala ādyaiḥ alaṅkṛtam vātaḥ vārā iti maṃtrasya kāśyapaḥ ṛṣiḥ anuṣṭubh chandaḥ vāyuḥ devatā aryama prītaye viniyogaḥ dhyāyet ca jambhakam śvetam dvi bhujam kuṭila ānanam devasya ha iti mantrasya paṃktiḥ chaṃdaḥ śacī devatā pilapiccha prītaye viniyogaḥ su cāru vadanām bhavyām guñjā hāra upaśobhitām śyāmām vidārikām dhyāyet tri netrām ca catur bhujām nānā gaṇa yutām devīm paṅkaja dvaya dhāriṇīm śrīḥ ca te iti mantrasya varuṇaḥ ṛṣiḥ nṛsiṃhaḥ devatā vidārikā prītaye viniyogaḥ raktām ca pūtanām dhyāyet paṅkaja sthām su śobhanām sarva ābharaṇa saṃpannām sarva alaṃkāra śobhitām mayi gṛhṇāmi iti maṃtrasya vivasvān ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ devatā pūtanā prītaye viniyogaḥ pūrva ādi dikṣu sarvāsu sārdha ādi aṃta padeṣu ca īśānam jaṭilam śvetam śūla hastam mahā bhujam trinetram vṛṣabha ārūḍham upaśobhitam āyuḥ śīrṣāṇaḥ iti maṃtrasya vāmadevaḥ ṛṣiḥ bṛhatī chandaḥ dharaṇīdharaḥ devatā īśāna prītaye viniyogaḥ dakṣiṇe paraśum dhyāyet oṃkāram ca tathā apare jayantam śvetam śveta vṛṣabha ārūḍham dhyātvā māna stoka iti mantrasya śakti ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ śaṅkaraḥ devatā jayaṃta prītaye viniyogaḥ śuklam pītam dvi bhujam airāvata stham vajra dharam dhyātvā mūlabījena sthāpayet bhāskaram rakta dvi bhujam rakta aśva stham dhyātvā māyā bījena pūjayet satyam ca dvi bhujam śvetam trinetram pīta vāsasam manda kuṃda bījena pūjayet vṛṣam pītam vṛṣabha ārūḍham ākāśa bījena pūjayet ṛkṣam nīlam catur bhujam mahiṣa ārūḍham iti mantrasya hotā yakṣaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ śaṃkaraḥ devatā ṛkṣa prītaye viniyogaḥ agnim raktam sapta jihvam rakta vāsasam piṅga akṣam dhyātvā agni dūtam iti maṃtrasya bharadvājaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ śaṃkaraḥ devatā agni prītaye vini yogaḥ vitatham raktam aja vāhanam dvi bhujam dhyātvā gāyatryā pūjayet gāyatryāḥ viśvāmitraḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ savitā devatā vitatha prītaye viniyogaḥ yamam kṛṣṇa mahiṣa ārūḍham daṇḍa hastam dhyāyet gṛhe kṣetram raktam ūrdhva keśam mahā bhujam rakta vāsasam dhyātvā vahnibījena pūjayet gandharvam śvetam dvi bhujam padmāsana stham dhyātvā yamabījena pūjayet bhṛṅgarājam rakta siṃhāsana ārūḍham divya yajña upavītinam dhyāyet hotā yaskā iti mantrasya bhārgavaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ yaśaḥ devatā bhṛṃgarāja prītaye viniyogaḥ mṛgam pītam mṛga ārūḍham pīta vāsasam dhyātvā nairṛta arddha padeṣu ca nirṛtim pītam śvetam padmāsana stham dhyātvā kaidācana iti mantrasya paṃktiḥ chandaḥ savitā devatā nirṛti prītaye viniyogaḥ śyāmam sugrīvam kṛṣṇa meṣa ārūḍham pīta vāsasam dhyātvā puṣpadantam pītam meṣa ārūḍham pītavāsasam dhyātvā asuram kṛṣṇam kṛṣṇa mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtam kṛtvā ākṛṣṇā iti mantrasya hiraṇya varṇaḥ ṛṣiḥ jagatī chandaḥ savitā devatā asura prītaye viniyogaḥ asuram kṛṣṇam nāga hāra anvitam padmāsana stham dhyātvā rogam kṛṣṇam nīla indīvara dharam śveta vṛṣabha ārūḍham dhyātvā namaḥ te rudraḥ iti mantrasya nāradaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chandaḥ śrīḥ devatā roga prītaye viniyogaḥ vāyu koṇāt ārabhya pūjayet vāyum dhūmra varṇam dhvaja hastam mṛga ārūḍham dhyātvā śvetam somam śveta varṇa āsana stham dhyātvā bhadrabījena pūjayet raktam bhallāṭam pīta vāsasam dhyātvā vahnibījena pūjayet pīta vāsasam aja vāhanam hāra keyūra anvitam vāyubījena maṃdara ādyaiḥ pūjayet ditim nāga hāra anvitām rakta padma āsana sthām dhyātvā māno tvā iti maṃtrasya bhārgavaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chandaḥ pṛthivī devatā diti prītaye viniyogaḥ aditim pīta varṇām siṃha ārūḍhām pīta aṃbara dharām dhyātvā evam yathā vidhāya atha homam kuryāt yathāvidhi homa ante dakṣiṇām dadyāt kāñcanam hema saṃyutam taḍāga yāga pakṣe tu suvarṇam ca ardham eva vā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ pūjā krama varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca atha pūjā kramam vakṣye purāṇa smṛti coditam nadī tīre nemi prāṃte daśa dvādaśa saṃkhyayā maṃḍalam racayet viprāḥ caruka dvaya saṃyutam uttara āśe dakṣiṇe ca aratni hasta antare api ca tri mekhalām hasta mātrām guṇa vedī samanvitām mūle sārdham ca śuklām ca mekhalām tu tathā eva ca ṣaṣ sapta aṃgulikām yonim paścime mekhalā upari śrāddham vṛddhi ātmakam kuryāt saṃkalpam mānasam caret śrāddha artham na eva saṃkalpet tathā vai devadarśane gayā śrāddha arthakam ca aṣṭa tīrtha śrāddha artham eva ca aiśānyām kalaśe devam pūjayet gaṇanāyakam madhye kuṇḍe mahān ca eva viṣṇu devam digīśvarān brahmāṇam ca agnikuṇḍe tu svaiḥ svaiḥ mantraiḥ prapūjayet prāṇāyāmam vidhāya atha bhūtaśuddhim samācaret dhyāyet vā aṭavī īśa puruṣam sarva lakṣaṇa saṃyutam śvetam catur bhujam śāṃtam kuṇḍala ādyaiḥ alaṃkṛtam pustakam ca akṣamālām ca vara abhaya karam param pitṛ vaiśvānara upetam kuṭila bhrūpa śobhitam mūrdhani agnim samāviśya mukhe vāyuḥ samāhitaḥ pṛthvīdharoḥ yamā ca eva tathā aṣṭavaneṣṭitau vakṣa sthale pārśve tu dakṣiṇe tadvat virathaḥ ca maharkṣakaḥ jaṃghayoḥ bhṛṃga sugrīvau sphicoḥ dauvārikaḥ gaṇaḥ evam dhyātvā nyaset puṣpam some na evam viciṃtayet mandaram dīrgha yuktena ṣaṣ aṅgāni samācaret tāvat vīryam tatas kṛtvā praṇavam brahmaṇā iti ca vāstu īśāya vidmaha iti tat naḥ viṣṇuḥ pracodayāt anena snapanam kuryāt pūjā dravyāṇi prokṣayet āsanam pūjayet pūrvam dharmeṇa api sva śaktitaḥ ādau tu bhāskaram sūryam śacī nātham gaṇādhipam ādhāra śaktim pṛthivīm pūjayet tatra paṅkajam baṃdīśāsanam iti uktam pūjayet āsanam tatas hareḥ dhyānam tatas kuryāt sthāpayet madhya maṇḍale āvāhya ca āsanam dadyāt tatas pādya ādika trayam maṃdaram vijayam somam mahādevam ca mādhavam rudram haram jayam bham ca pūrva ādi dala mūlake jayā ca vijayā ca eva satyā māyā śivā aṃbikā hāsinī kāminī ca etāḥ dala mūleṣu bhāvayet puṣpa añjali trayam dadyāt vāstoṣpataye iti api arghya maṃtreṇa gaṃdha ādyaiḥ pūjayet bhūtim icchatā vāstoṣpate bhava mate iti dhyātvā ṛtam ca iti maṃtreṇa pūjayet ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ chandaḥ gāyatrī parikīrtitam sūryaḥ ca devatā khyātaḥ prīṇitaḥ kuliśa āyudhaḥ sūryam rakta āsana ārūḍham dvi bhujam rakta vāsasam evam dhyātvā tu matimān haṃsam sa maṃtram īśvaram haṃsasya iti maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ autathyaḥ īritaḥ pūjayet parayā bhaktyā vastra alaṃkāra bhūṣaṇaiḥ uddharṣaṇaḥ iti maṃtreṇa kṛṣṇa puṣpaiḥ atha arcayet satyavrataḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya triṣṭubh chandaḥ asya devatā savitā ca eva vijñeyaḥ prītaye ca vṛṣasya ca śulka varṇam tathā ākāśam ṛṣṭi saṃghaiḥ ca saṃstutam ghaṭa stham dvi bhujam dhyāyet gadā padma vidhāriṇam ṛṣiḥ syāt kardamaḥ viprāḥ chandaḥ jāgatikā tathā devatā ca bhavet ca agniḥ ākāśa prītaye nyaset dvi bhujam dhūmra varṇam ca vāyum dhyātvā prapūjayet rājānaḥ iti mantreṇa pūjayet sita taṃḍulaiḥ ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇa chandaḥ gāyatrī devatā dvijāḥ rājānaḥ iti ca ṛcā pūjayet gandha candanaiḥ ṛṣiḥ paṅktiḥ chandaḥ atha jagatī smṛtam vitatham śyāma varṇam ca caturbhiḥ bāhubhiḥ vṛtam mṛga akṣa pāśa khaṭvāṅga śūlam ca dadhatam karaiḥ meṣa ārūḍham viśāla akṣam rājānaḥ mahyam īrayan gṛhakṣatam tathā śuklam caturbhiḥ gardabhaiḥ vṛtam śūlam daṃḍam ca khaḍvāṃgam dadhatam vṛṣavāhanam pīta vastra dharam devam jaṭā mukuṭa saṃyutam āśuḥ śiśānaḥ iti mantreṇa pūjayet gandha candanaiḥ puṣpadaṃtaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ ca parikīrtitam yamam dhyāyet kṛṣṇa varṇam mahiṣa stham dvi bāhukam daṇḍa pāśa dharam ca eva keyūra ādyaiḥ vibhūṣitam īśāna iti ca mantreṇa pūjayet kusuma ādinā vāmadevaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chandaḥ kālaḥ asya devatā ṣaḍānanam ca gandharvam pītam dhyāyet caturbhujam pīta aṃbara dharam ca eva nānā ābharaṇa bhūṣitam hārītaḥ usya ṛṣiḥ proktaḥ jagatī chandaḥ īritam bhṛṅgarājam jaṭā ārūḍham svaccham pīta aṃbaram śubham cakṣuḥ pīta iti mantreṇa pūjayet gandha caṃdanaiḥ ṛṣiḥ ca agastiḥ ākhyātaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ prakīrtitam viśvedevāḥ devatā ca bhṛṅgarājasya prītaye pītam mṛgam mṛga ārūḍham jaṭā mukuṭa maṃḍitam paras devāḥ iti maṃtreṇa pūjayet bali pāyasaiḥ kapilaḥ ca ṛṣiḥ proktaḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ īritam dhyāyet pitṛ gaṇam śukram caturbhiḥ bāhubhiḥ vṛtam śunaḥśepaḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya triṣṭubh chandaḥ ca devatā viśvedevāḥ samākhyātāḥ pitṛ medhena pūjayet dauvārikam ca aṣṭa bhujam kṛṣṇa varṇam vicintayet rakta vastra piṃgala akṣam kṛṣṇa vyāghra upari sthitam vaiśvānaraḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya gāyatrī chandaḥ īritam śaṃkha ābham ca eva sugrīvam dvi bhujam cakra dhāriṇam haṃsa ārūḍham mahā kāyam bali vijñāna kāraṇam maṃtreṇa pūjayet rakta bhūṣaṇaiḥ ṛṣiḥ śaṃkhaḥ tathā chandaḥ paṅktiḥ somaḥ atha devatā śvetam jalādhipam dhyāyet gandharva ādyaiḥ ca veṣṭitam iti maṃtreṇa bhaktitaḥ tryaṃbakaḥ asya ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ devaḥ jalādhipaḥ dhyāyet ca asuram raktam karālam naravāhanam daśabhiḥ bāhubhiḥ yuktam kṛṣṇa vastra anulepanam śat naḥ devī iti maṃtreṇa kṛṣṇa puṣpaiḥ prapūjayet ṛṣiḥ vaiśvānaraḥ chandaḥ virāj iti abhidhīyate śeṣam ṣaḍānanam dhyāyet kṛṣṇam ca madhu piṃgalam meṣa stham kuṇḍala upetam nāga yajña upavītinam siddhaḥ vīra iti mantreṇa kṛṣṇa puṣpaiḥ atha arcayet yamam ca kṛkara akṣam ca ākuñcan mūrdhaje dvijāḥ devatā ca yaśaḥ khyātam prītaye viniyojayet yamam ca kṛkara akṣam ca kṣamā ākuñcita mūrdhajam vāsukiḥ syāt ṛṣiḥ ca asya paṃktiḥ chandaḥ ca devatā ardha pītam ca dvi bhujam rakta akṣam dhūmram eva vā devatābhiḥ ca saṃpannam vātaḥ vāretiḥ eva ca ṛṣiḥ vāyuḥ ca gāyatrī chandaḥ vāyuḥ ca devatā pīta vastram pannaga stham hāra keyūra maṃḍitam avasṛṣṭā parāpate iti mantreṇa pūjayet agniḥ ca asya ṛṣiḥ prokta chandaḥ somaḥ ca devatā pītam bhallāṭakam dhyāyet padma stham rakta bhūṣaṇam yat mātuḥ iti mantreṇa pūjayet sita taṃḍulaiḥ jambhakaḥ asya ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ gāyatrī samudāhṛtā somam dhyāyet śyāma rūpam padmāsana gatam param nānā ābharaṇa sampannam kirīṭa vara dhāriṇam ṛṣiḥ svārthaḥ vedaḥ chandaḥ jagatī iti abhidhīyate darpam dhyāyet kṛṣṇa varṇam kṛṣṇa aṃbara dharam tathā nāga yajña upavītim ca śikhi staṃbham dvijottamāḥ paścadīśa iti mantreṇa gandha ādyaiḥ paripūjayet mantraḥ ca asya ṛṣiḥ ca asya pañcāyata namīritam paṃktiḥ chandaḥ tathā proktam devaḥ pañcānanaḥ smṛtaḥ śyāma varṇām ditim dhyāyet dvi bhujām pīta vigrahām sarva lakṣaṇa saṃpannām sarva alaṃkāra śobhitām suparṇaḥ asi iti mantreṇa pūjayet pītacandanaiḥ ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ chandaḥ jagatī parikīrtyate bhavet devaḥ bhārgavaḥ ca iṣṭa arthe paripūjayet rakta ābhām aditim dhyāyet sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitām śukra ambhāḥ iti mantreṇa gandha ādyaiḥ abhipūjayet vāmadevaḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya gandha ādyaiḥ abhipūjayet devaḥ śukraḥ samākhyātaḥ stutau ca viniyojayet īśāna ādi koṇa gatān pūjayet su samāhitaḥ āpam dhyāyet śukla varṇam kuṇḍala ādyaiḥ vibhūṣitam ṛṣiḥ syāt kardamaḥ chandaḥ virāj iti abhidhīyate devaḥ somaḥ samākhyātaḥ prītaye viniyojayet saritam dvi bhujam raktam rakta śveta aṃbara anvitam payasā śuklaḥ iti mantreṇa pūjayet kamala ādinā nārāyaṇaḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya paṃktiḥ chandaḥ prakīrtyate nārāyaṇaḥ svayam devaḥ prītaye viniyojayet devam kirīṭa sampannam sarva alaṃkāra bhūṣitam dṛṣṭvā pariśrutaḥ iti mantreṇa anena pūjayet ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ chandaḥ paṃktiḥ somaḥ atha devatā rudram dhyāyet rakta varṇam śītāṃśu kṛta śekharam dvi bhujam śūla hastam ca ḍamarum ca parābhavet divaḥ mūrdhan iti mantreṇa ṛṣayaḥ samudāhṛtāḥ ṛṣiḥ syāt kāśyapaḥ chandaḥ virāj iti abhidhīyate pūjayet parayā bhaktyā ṛṣiḥ nīlaḥ udāhṛtaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ devatā syāt hradaḥ api parikīrtitaḥ nānā ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyam sapta aśva ratha maṃḍitam ṛṣiḥ autathyaḥ ākhyātaḥ prītaye viniyojayet ṛṣiḥ gandhaḥ samākhyātaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ ca īritam vibudha adhipam tatas dhyāyet pītam vṛṣabhavāhanam ṛṣiḥ hārītaḥ iti uktaḥ jagatī chandaḥ īritam meṣa stham ca trinetram ca kirīṭa vara maṃḍitam pīta āsyam rājayakṣyāṇam karālam ca viciṃtayet dadhyaṅ ātharvaṇaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ īritam śukla aṃbara dharam dhyāyet dvi bhujam śikhivāhanam ṛṣiḥ syāt nāradaḥ proktaḥ chandaḥ nuṣṭubh prakīrtitam evam dhyātvā vivasvaṃtam mahā kāyam mahodaram kāśyapaḥ usyaḥ ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ triṣṭubh devaḥ śacīpatiḥ bahis īśāna koṇeṣu deva ādīn paripūjayet kūṣmāṇḍaiḥ varaṇā puṣpaiḥ śaurakaiḥ vā samarcayet pītām karālikām dhyāyet carakīm varavarṇinīm su abja sthām dvi bhujām ca eva guñjā hāra upaśobhitām pītinya rūpa mantreṇa pūjayet bhūtim icchukaḥ baladevaḥ ṛṣiḥ ca asya chandaḥ gaurī ca devatā dhyāyet vidārikām raktām nava yauvana saṃyutām pavitreṇa punīhi iti maṃtreṇa anena pūjayet ṛṣiḥ gargaḥ samākhyātaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ sya devatā pāpa ādi rākṣasīm dhyāyet saurabheya upari sthitām ṛṣiḥ suvarṇaḥ ākhyātaḥ paṅktiḥ chandaḥ prakīrtitam parvata agra mṛdam ca eva gaja daṃta mṛdam tathā valmīke saṃgame ca eva rāja dvāra catuṣpathāt kuśa mūla mṛdam ca eva yajñiyasya vanaspateḥ indravallī tathā ākrānta amṛtī trapuṣasya ca mālatī caṃpakam ca eva tathā urvārukasya ca śrīphalam bījapūram ca nālikeram ca dāḍimam dhātrīm jaṃbu phalam ca eva anyayā doṣam ādiśet pañca raktam suvarṇam ca nikṣipet varuṇam yajet asya maṃtrasya ca ṛṣiḥ viṣṇuḥ chandaḥ udāhṛtam gāyatrī devatā pāśī prītaye viniyojayet pañcagaṃdhān vinikṣipya hastam dattvā paṭhet tatas sarve samudrāḥ saritaḥ sarāṃsi ca mahā hradāḥ āyāṃtu sarva pāpa ghnāḥ sarva loka sukha āvahāḥ gaṃgā ādyāḥ saritaḥ sarvāḥ tīrthāni jaladāḥ nadāḥ āyāṃtu yajamānasya durita kṣaya kārakāḥ aghora aji aṣṭaka kṛtāḥ vāstoṣpatayaḥ iti api śatam vā ca aṣṭa saṃyuktam sahasram vā viśeṣataḥ śata ardham vā hunet vipraḥ tilaiḥ vā taṃḍulaiḥ saha aṣṭāviṃśatibhiḥ ca anyaiḥ aṣṭa aṣṭau paṃca paṃca vā carakya ādīn ca āsanaiḥ ca piṣṭakaiḥ vaṭakena vā vāstoṣpate dṛḍham japtvā yajet vāstupatim yadā paṃca upacāraiḥ vidhivat sa aṃga upāṃgaiḥ anaṃtaram balim āsādayet paścāt dadyāt ekaikaśas kramāt brāhmaṇaiḥ ca eva dadyāt ca sadā ājyam sa mākṣikam śāli annam śikhine dadyāt tathā nīlotpalāni ca odanam sa utpalam dadyāt parjanyāya vicakṣaṇaḥ jayāya piṣṭakam kāryam indrāya ghṛta modakaḥ sūryāya piṣṭaka annam ca satyāya yava pūlikām bhramāya matsya māṃsa annam śaṣkulīm atha piṣṭakam vāyavye ca tathā saktūn pūṣṇe ca apūpam eva hi vitathāya kalāya annam gṛha ṛkṣāya sa mākṣikam kṛśara annam ca śāli annam ca nivedayet mṛgāya yāvaka annam ca pitṛbhyaḥ mudga pāyasam dauvārikāya ca pūpakam pāyasam puṣpadaṃtāya varuṇāya ca piṣṭakam asurāya modakān ca eva dadyāt āpikṣaye surām ghṛtodanam ca somāya kaṇā annam yakṣmaṇe dadet rogāya ghṛta laḍḍūkam sa pāyasa guḍa odanam akṣāya vividha annam ca bhallāṭāya tathā eva ca somāya madhuśāli annam nāgāya guḍapiṣṭakam dityai dadyāt tathā kṣīram sitaśarkarayā saha kṣīra annam ca eva pūṣṇe ca āpa vatsāya vai dadhi jayāya ghṛtam annam ca miṣṭānnam ca vivasvate ghṛtaudanam ca citrāya rudrāya ghṛta pāyasam māṃsa odanam yakṣmaṇe ca kṛśaram varuṇāya ca aryamṇe śarkarā apūpam bahis dadyāt catuṣṭayam citra odanam sa māṃsam ca matsya annam guḍapiṣṭakam pratideva upari kṣīram ghṛta kṣīra samanvitam patākāḥ deva varṇena dadyāt brahma ādiṣu kramāt maṃtram japet sva sāmarthyāt sva sāmarthyāt stutim paṭhet puruṣastavasya sūryaḥ ṛṣiḥ jagatī chandaḥ śaṃkaraḥ uvāca nārāyaṇaḥ naraḥ haṃsaḥ viṣvaksenaḥ hutāśanaḥ saṃnyāsī śāstra tattva jñaḥ tripaṃcāśat guṇa ātmakaḥ yajñaḥ tvam hi vaṣaṭkāraḥ tvam oṃkāraḥ tvam agnayaḥ tvam svadhā tvam hi svāhā tvam sudhā ca puruṣottamaḥ namaḥ deva ādidevāya viṣṇave śāsvatāya ca upāsakānām prabhum ekam īśvaram te yāṃti siddhim paramām tu vaiṣṇavīm iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca tatas bherī ādi ghoṣeṇa yajamānaḥ udak mukhaḥ aiśānyām madhya bhāge vā yajet vā su samāhitaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ iti abhidhīyate agratas aṣṭa dalam lekhyam sthāpayet kalaśam tatas śukti śaṃkha samam vā api viśvāmitra samudbhavam pūjayet tīrtha toyena gandha puṣpa akṣata ādinā kṣīram ca mātuliṃgam ca sāvitram ca sa dūrvayā avraṇam kalaśam kṛtvā pañca varṇa samanvitam āvāhayet toyanidhim maṃtreṇa anena bhaktitaḥ hṛd varṇa arghyam mayā dattam paritoṣāya te namaḥ gṛhebhyaḥ ca eva somāya tvaṣṭre ca eva ca śūline tatas ṛghya dānam vidhivat kṣīreṇa haviṣā madhu yajamānaḥ sa patnīkaḥ kuṃbham kukṣau nidhāya ca hiraṇyagarbha iti maṃtrasya bharadvāja ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ chandaḥ ca jagatī khyātam devatā ca jalādhipaḥ asya maṃtrasya ca ṛṣiḥ nāradaḥ parikīrtitaḥ virāj chandaḥ ca īśānaḥ devatā samudāhṛtā saṃbhave pakṣi yugmam ca āḍīm vā cakravākakam dikṣu jīvaṃtikām dadyāt rākṣasebhyaḥ balim haret kṣātrakaḥ lakṣmaṇaḥ ca eva maṇibhadraḥ gaṇeśvaraḥ ye bhavāḥ bhāvinaḥ bhūtāḥ ye ca teṣu mayā asinaḥ āharam tu balim tuṣṭyā prayacchaṃtu śubham mama dadyāt payasvinīm gām ca ācāryāya viśeṣataḥ anyeṣām hi hiraṇyam ca gām ca dadyāt dvijanmane vyāhṛti dvitayam ca eva tatas vāruṇa paṃcakam prājāpatyam sviṣṭakṛt ca juhuyāt tad anaṃtaram ghṛtaiḥ sviṣṭakṛtam na asti tathā rasa visārakaiḥ madhūkaiḥ viśvapuṣpaiḥ ca tathā āmrātaka kāśakaiḥ dadyāt pūrṇām ca vidhivat sūryāya arghyam nivedayet pañca doṣam puraskṛtya brāhmaṇa anumatena ca gṛham praviśya ca tatas brāhmaṇān atha bhojayet dīna aṃdha kṛpaṇe ca eva dadyāt vitta anusārataḥ jñātibhiḥ saha bhuñjīta dadhi kṣīra āmiṣam vinā na kṣīram ca kaṣāyam ca bharjitam śākam eva ca na kāṇḍam ca na puṣpam ca karīram ca kadācana śāli annam mūlakam ca eva panasa āmra phalāni ca mastam madhu ghṛta guḍam mātuliṃgam sa saiṃdhavam etat praśastam jānīyāt marīcāni viśeṣataḥ pañca aṃgakam tatas kuryāt sthāpa yet nā iti yugmakam prathamā ca arka hastena dvitīyā daśa hastikā śata ardham tatas paścāt ṣaṣṭi hastam anaṃtaram iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge arghyadānavidhau dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca sva gṛhya agni vidhim vakṣye yoga bhedeṣu sattamāḥ putrāḥ eva ca kanyāḥ ca janiṣyāḥ ca apare sutāḥ gṛhyāḥ iti samākhyātāḥ yajamānasya dāyadāḥ teṣām saṃskāra yāgeṣu śānti karma kriyāsu ca ācārya vihitaḥ kalpaḥ tasmāt cakṣaḥ iti smṛtaḥ tri kuśam parigṛhṇāti tatas ca kurute dṛḍham ṛṣiḥ dakṣaḥ ca jagatī chandaḥ viṣṇuḥ ca devatā kaśyapaḥ tṛpyatām iti bhūḥ asi iti ca śodhanam ṛṣiḥ suvarṇa gāyatrī jagatī chandaḥ iṣyate devatā ca bhavet sūryaḥ pṛthivī śodhane nyaset aiśānī ādi krameṇa eva prādakṣiṇyena yatnatas kuśa garbha trayeṇa api bhrāmayet valaya ākṛti parisamūhanam iti uktam snapanam śṛṇu sattama īśāna ādeḥ ca saṃskāram kuryāt parisamūhanam pratiṣṭhāyām cara ityādi nairṛtyādi graham makhe paṃkti chandaḥ samuddiṣṭam indrāṇī ca asya devatā gomayam ca tri gaṃdham ca paṃcamūrtikayā api ca māna stokena iti ṛcā viśvedevaḥ ca pūjyatām ṛṣiḥ syāt kāśyapa chandaḥ viśvadevaḥ prakīrtitaḥ madhyamā tarjanībhyām ca kuśam ārabhya dakṣiṇam catur astrī kṛte kṣetram hasta mānam tathā ānanam yajvabhiḥ iti mantreṇa sūryaḥ prīṇāti sattamāḥ dakṣe sārdha aṃgulam tyaktvā paścimena parityajet uttara agrām likhet rekhām anyathā amaṃgalam bhavet āpyāyasva iti mantrasya dhanvatari ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ samākhyātam savitā ca atra devatā tat lagnam dakṣiṇe ca ekam pūrva arddha dvādaśa aṅgulam anya aṃgula aṃtaram ca ekam tatas sapta aṃgulam bhavet kuśa mūlena svarṇena pratiṣṭhāyām ca rājate aṃguṣṭha anāmikābhyām ca saṃjyoti iti ca saṃjapan saṃsmaret mitrāḥ varuṇau ṛṣiḥ autathya saṃjñakaḥ bhāsvarāya kṣipet agnau tatas ūrdhvam raṇam smṛtam sadasaṃpad ṛṣiḥ karṇaḥ virāj iti udāhṛtaḥ kuśa puṣpa udakena api devatīrthena sattamāḥ chandaḥ atha devī gāyatrī devatā gaṇanāyakaḥ kīśāt agnim samādāya me gṛhṇāmi iti saṃpaṭhan me gṛhṇāmi iti maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ gautamaḥ īritaḥ chandaḥ nuṣṭubh samākhyātam vāmadevaḥ atha devatā mantreṇa anena matimān dakṣiṇasyām vinikṣipet asya mantrasya hārītaḥ ṛṣiḥ syāt chandaḥ iṣyate āvāhanam tatas kuryāt saṃsarakṣa iti saṃjapan maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ nīlaḥ udāhṛtaḥ virāj chandaḥ atha vijñeyaḥ devatā ca śatakratuḥ vaiśvānaraḥ iti ṛcā agni sthāpanam īritam prīṇāti ṛṣiḥ syāt kāśyapaḥ smṛtaḥ badhnāsi iti ca maṃtreṇa agnim kuryāt pradakṣiṇam ṛṣiḥ svayaṃbhūḥ ākhyātaḥ virāj chandaḥ udāhṛtam brahmayajña anṛcā dogdhrī dhenuḥ iti tu ṛcā śakraḥ asya trāyatām eti śṛṇu ṛgbhyām ṛṣī dvijāḥ prajāpatiḥ ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ triṣṭubh devaḥ atha śaṃkaraḥ nāradaḥ ca ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ triṣṭubh devaḥ śacīpatiḥ praṇītā sthāpanam kuryāt dine ehi iti saṃjapan mantrasya ca ṛṣiḥ chandaḥ vāmadevaḥ prakīrtitaḥ śrīparṇī sahakāra uttham varuṇasya viśeṣataḥ ṣaṣ aṃgulena vistāram viṃśati aṃgulakena ca dairghyeṇa ca catur khyātaka aṃgulam ca pramāṇataḥ dvi aṃgule carakākāyām āsa āsan deva karmaṇi abhicāre bhavet kāṃsyam tāmram syāt śāṃti karmaṇi pratiṣṭhāyām mṛd mayam ca aṣṭa aṃgulam atha api vā dvādaśa aṃgula prastāram taijasam māna varjitam imam me varuṇena ṛcā praṇītām atha pūrayet sāgarāḥ atha prīyaṃtām ittham ādhyānam ācaret kayā naḥ citraḥ iti ṛcā nāgaḥ prīṇāti sattamāḥ asya maṃtrasya ca ṛṣiḥ bharadvājaḥ udāhṛtaḥ chandaḥ anuṣṭubh devatā ca īśānaḥ parikīrtitaḥ prayojana ādikam dravyam tatas āsādayet kramāt dakṣiṇa ādi uttara aṃtam dhuvāsaḥ iti ṛcā api ca ṛṣiḥ syāt nāradaḥ chandaḥ nuṣṭubh ca eva atha devatā śatakratuḥ ca prīṇāti yojayet atha sādarāt kāṣṭham ca paścime kuryāt prayacchan paścimena tu puratas annam pañca vrīhīḥ tilāḥ ca saha sarṣapān dakṣiṇe ca eva āpūpam bhṛṃgarājam tathā eva ca panasam nārikelam ca modakam laḍḍukam tathā praṇītām ca diś vidikṣu sthāpayet a vicārayan praṇītām na spṛśet jātu homa kāle kathaṃcana snāna kuṃbham ca bho viprāḥ yāvat yāgaḥ pravartate uccīrakam mātuliṃgam dūrvām dhātrī phalāni ca tulasī mālatī jātī jala jāni viśeṣataḥ aiśānyām sthāpayet sarvam yat ca vai kaṃkatī mayam nairṛtyā iti viśeṣaḥ yat ca vaikaṃkatī śamī kṣīra pāke tu kṣīra aṃte caru sthālīm atha ānayet pavi vat chedana kuśaiḥ chiṃdyāt prādeśikam punar chittvā pavitram prokṣaṇyām sthāpayet balabhid āmrakam pāyasena kāṭhinena pramathnīyāt kadācana na rasena na kārṣṇena na dṛḍhena kadācana tāmreṇa bhasmanā ca atha śukti śaṃkhena vāgyataḥ chedayet piñjulīm ca api pavitram atha deśikaḥ viṣṇoḥ rarāṭa maṃtrasya hārītaḥ ca ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ praṇītā bhājanam gṛhya prokṣaṇīm pūrayet tribhiḥ vāma hasta tale paścāt sthāpayet prokṣaṇīyakam madhyamā amadhyamā aṃguṣṭha apāmārgeṇa maṃtribhiḥ ṛṣiḥ syāt gautamaḥ chandaḥ dharmarājaḥ atha devatā sakṛt dravye tribhiḥ kāṣṭhaiḥ tri vāram maṃtra puṣpakaiḥ sthira sthāne tu saṃprāpta praṇītāyāḥ ca dakṣiṇe prādeśa aṃtarataḥ ca eva ājya sthālīm atha arpayet agratas maṇḍalam kṛtvā vahnim vipre tu sthāpayet dyūtam niḥsārayet tat tu nirūpya āśu krameṇa tu īśāna iti ca maṃtreṇa adhiśrapaṇam īritam ṛṣiḥ nārāyaṇaḥ chandaḥ paṃktiḥ īśaḥ atha devatā avekṣya īśam ārabhya dakṣiṇa āvartakena tu kulāyanī iti maṃtreṇa ṛṣi chanda ādikam smaran pariveṣya ājya sthālīm ca tris sakṛt vā samāhitaḥ pitaraḥ tṛpyatām iti saṃskāre mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ ṛṣiḥ syāt jamadagniḥ ca gāyatrī chandaḥ īritam devatā ca pinākī syāt agniṣṭome ca yojayet ṣaṣ aṃgulam sruvam paścāt gṛhītvā agnau pratapya ca tri rātram tu mahā yoge sakṛt anyatra sattamāḥ saṃmārjayet kuśena api mūlāt agram tu secayet agrāt mūlam punar kuryāt saṃpūjya ca punar punar ājya pātram puraskṛtya pavitram ca samāharet aṃguṣṭhe dve anāme tu gṛhṇīyāt tat pavitrakam aṣṭa aṃgulam madhya kṛtvas ghṛtam tris pavanam caret pātāle tris tathā ākāśe avekṣya ājyam tatas tribhiḥ prokṣaṇyām ca tathā kuryāt adhas saṃprokṣya deśikaḥ tūṣṇīm dadyāt tathā ca agnau sanniveśena tattvataḥ sa pavitram dakṣa kare gṛhītvā prokṣaṇīyakam aṣṭa aṃgule mūlabhāge tad jalena īśāditaḥ agnim paryukṣayet paścāt dakṣiṇa āvartakena ca pavitram ca praṇītāyām nidhāya prokṣaṇīyakam saṃyāva artham ca bho viprāḥ agni vat tatra deśikaḥ sruvam gṛhītvā juhuyāt tūṣṇīm eva samāhitaḥ ante ca devatā uddeśam prājāpatyam samīrayan praṇava aṃtena juhuyāt sarvatra dvijasattamāḥ vāyu koṇam samārabhya vahni koṇa antakena tu agnīṣoma ātmakam ca eva juhuyāt rākṣasāditaḥ aiśāna koṇa paryaṃtam tatas naimittikam caret paścāt su iṣṭam tatas dadyāt dadyāt ca matibhiḥ tathā vāruṇam pañcakam ca eva kṛtvā pūrṇām tatas labhet udvāha iti maṃtra sya atharvaṇa ṛṣiḥ smṛtaḥ chaṃdaḥ devī ca gāyatrī devatam ca api vāruṇam tvanna ugne iti maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ vāśiṣṭha saṃjñakaḥ chaṃdaḥ ca bṛhatī khyātam tat eva agniḥ prakīrtitaḥ iḍaḥ gatam iti mantrasya ṛṣiḥ kaḥ guhya saṃjñakaḥ chandaḥ ca jagatī khyātam devaḥ viṣṇuḥ prakīrtitaḥ udvartane iti maṃtrasya ṛṣiḥ kaḥ nu prakīrtitaḥ chandaḥ devī ca gāyatrī varuṇaḥ ca adhidevatā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca kuśa kaṇḍīm sva gṛhyena kṛtvā agnim ca arcayet tatas āghāra ājyabhāgau tu mahāvyāhṛtayaḥ trayaḥ sarvam prāyaścitta saṃjñakam prājāpatyam ca sviṣṭakṛt prājāpatye ca indrāya etau āghāra saṃjñakau bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar trayaḥ ca eva mahāvyāhṛtayaḥ smṛtāḥ sarvaprāyaścitta saṃjñāḥ ete vai pañca maṃtrakāḥ prājāpatya āhutiḥ ca ekā sviṣṭakṛt ca aparā smṛtā caturdaśā etāḥ kṛtayaḥ hotavyāḥ nitya saṃjñakāḥ kṛtvā sakṛt devatā uddeśam homam paścāt samācaret naimittikam vinā nityam viphalam yāti na anyathā ha sādhya ādi yāgeṣu yad nideśam śṛṇu dvijāḥ eka ahe vā āghāra ārajyau kṛtvā naimittikīm kṛtīḥ samāḥ sviṣṭakṛtam vidyāt ākṛti ādyāḥ tatas param viśeṣataḥ tri aha ādau tu aghārau ājya pūrvakam āghāra ārājya pūrveṇa tatas naimittikam caret sviṣṭakṛt vyāhṛtiḥ ca eva vāruṇa ādyāḥ tathā hi ṣaṭ dvijātīnām vivāhe tu naityikam prathamam bhavet dadyāt ekam ca nityam ca pṛthak nityam na ca ācaret paryagnikaraṇe ca eva udvāhe mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ candra ādityau ca utpavane vīkṣaṇe ca diśaḥ tathā prokṣaṇyām sthāpane durgāḥ ime lakṣmī pratiṣṭhitā homam kuryāt dvijaśreṣṭhāḥ vidhim kuryāt samāhitaḥ eteṣu devatāḥ proktāḥ dvijātīnām hitāya ca devatāḥ sarvāḥ jñātavyāḥ etāḥ yajñe samāhitaiḥ adhidaivena jānīyāt karavalyām paṃca phalam yatas iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca atha vakṣyāmi sat ca eṣām devānām dhyānam uttamam asya yajñe parijñānāt jihvā samyak phala pradā hiraṇya varṇām prathamām vahni jihvām mahā dyutim kanaka āḍhya karām devīm hiraṇya ākhya iṣṭa siddhaye kanakām dvi bhujām śuklām hastābhyām darbha saṃyutām kamaṃḍalum ca bibhrāṇām numaḥ sādhaka siddhi dām śaṃkha cakra abhaya varān dadhatīm praṇamāmi aham bhinnāñjana caya prakhyām svarṇa kuṃbham tu vāmatas dakṣiṇena vara āraktām dhārayaṃtīm namāmi aham suprabhā maṇḍala ābhā ca karābhyām tad kṛtāñjaliḥ japā kusuma saṃkāśā bahu rūpā sakhe mama śubha dā syāt bhujaiḥ śubhrā sahasram dadhatī parān japā puṣpa dhare nityam satī rūpe prasīda me mūlena vīkṣayet sthānam maṃtreṇa khananam matam trisūtrīkaraṇam kuryāt catur sūtram nipātayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge pañcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca pratiṣṭhāyāḥ pūrva dine kuryāt deva adhivāsanam dhānya pratiṣṭhām tasya eva yūpam ca api yathāvidhi rātrau mūla agre ca ghaṭe sthāpayet gaṇanāyakam saṃpūjya ca vidhānena digīśān ca tathā grahān brahmāṇam ca taḍāgeṣu varuṇam śānti yāgake somam ca maṃḍale sūryam pāde viṣṇum tathā eva ca śaive śaivam tathā proktam prapāyām atha vāruṇam ārāme ca eva brahmāṇam pādya ādyaiḥ api ca arcayet sunābha iti ca maṃtreṇa dvābhyām eva viśiṣyate kāṃḍāt iti ca maṃtreṇa dadyāt dūrvā śatam tatas siṃdoḥ iva iti siṃdūram viśvām iti ca mārjanam samiccha iti añjanam dadyāt duḥstham sura asurāḥ japan adyā eva tena maṃtreṇa sthāpayet atha vāriṇā yogam yoga dṛḍham japtvā pavitram vinyaset tatas dvābhyām taila gaṃdha yutam śrīsūktena api puṣpakam dadyāt dūrvā akṣatam tatas viśvāmi iti ca nimnī aṃta kāṃḍāt iti tathā akṣatam tatas yama gṛhāt bāhye maṇḍapa aṃtaram āśritaḥ sunāti iti vacaḥ dadyāt tatas ca āvāhayet prabhum tatra adhivāsanam kuryāt rakṣayet ca su rakṣibhiḥ ācāryaḥ yajamānaḥ ca ṛtvij bhojanam ācaret a kṣāra lavaṇa anya āsī dadhi viśvam tilān tyajet ādhāraṇam ca adhivāsam vakṣye tatra anusārataḥ pañcabhiḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ sārdham gandharvāḥ iti vismaran dadyāt gandham taila yutam gandha dvāra iti ṛcā punar yāḥ phalinī iti ca phalam pūga tānām avarjanam kauśikīḥ uttamā asi iti dadyāt khaḍgam su tīkṣṇakam śrīḥ ca te iti kusumam viśvāni iti ca saṃpaṭhan nirmathanam tatas kāryam iti sādhāraṇaḥ vidhiḥ vinā adhivāsanam viprāḥ pratiṣṭhānam samācaret na tat phalam avāpnoti vivāhe śaraṇam diśet tatas prayatnataḥ kāryam pūrvāhne rātri yogataḥ nitye naimittike kāmye kārayet kuṇḍa maṇḍapam sthaṃḍile hasta mātreṇa vālukānirmite api ca ekaika aṃgulakaḥ viprāḥ pīṭhe na asti vicāraṇā nava pañcaka kuṇḍe ca lakṣa ādau api śaṃkayā tatas daśa aṃgule pakṣe daśa aṃgam śṛṇuta dvijāḥ kāṣṭham pattram ca puṣpam ca modakam piṣṭakam tathā etat vai gṛha pakṣe ca viṣṇu pakṣe tila ādeḥ śaive yava āditaḥ kāryā śākte puṣpa āditaḥ bhavet sūrye pakṣe piṣṭaka ādi gopāle kṛśara āditaḥ kṛṣṇe ca karavīra ādi śrīphalāni ca traipure sārasvate ca śrīvṛkṣe mokṣakāme nigadyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca aṣṭau hotāraḥ dvārapāla atha aṣṭau aṣṭau kāryāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ yājakāḥ ca sarve śuddhāḥ lakṣitāḥ lakṣaṇa ādyaiḥ ekaḥ kāryaḥ jāpakaḥ asmin mahātmā divyaiḥ gadhaiḥ gaṃdha mālyaiḥ suvarṇaiḥ tailam kāryam brāhmaṇāḥ pañcaviṃśāḥ āvāpyaiḥ tu dviguṇaiḥ vai balīyaḥ divyaiḥ vastraiḥ arhaṇā dakṣiṇābhiḥ pratiṣṭhā ādiṣu sarveṣu samyak viprān atha arhayet pradadyāt arhaṇam samyak paścāt pātram nivedayet pratyekam brāhmaṇāḥ yajñe veda mantreṣu pāragāḥ ācāryaḥ yadi kāryeṣu varayet daśa govrajān viśiṣṭānām abhāve api kuryāt kuśa mayān dvijān kuśa pratikṛtau ca api sva gotram svam dvijam vinā na kuryāt caraṇa uddeśam tathā prahara saṃhatim gotra ādi kīrtana aṃteṣu sva nāma uddeśam īrayan tulāpuruṣa dāne ca tathā ca hāṭaka acale na pātram pratikṛti artham na ca alam sa udakam tathā śūdra saṃskārakaḥ ca eva kṛpaṇaḥ gaṇa yājakaḥ prāyaścitta gṛhītaḥ ca rāja yājaka paiśunau śūdra geha nivāsī ca śūdra prerakaḥ eva ca su alpa kaṇṭhaḥ vāmanaḥ ca vṛṣalī patiḥ eva ca bandhu dveṣī guru dveṣī bhāryā dveṣī tathā eva ca hīna aṃgaḥ ca eva vṛddha aṃgaḥ bhagna daṃtaḥ ca dāṃbhikaḥ śvitrī kuṣṭhī kula udbhūtaḥ nidrāluḥ vyasana arthakaḥ a dīkṣitaḥ kadaryaḥ ca caṃḍa rogī galat vraṇaḥ mahāvraṇī ca udarī yajña pātram na kārayet varaṇa aṃte tu pātrāṇām pūjā mantrān śṛṇu dvija brahma mūrtiḥ tvam ācāryaḥ saṃsārāt pāhi mām vibho ciram me śāśvatī kīrtiḥ yāvat lokāḥ cara acarāḥ prasīda tvam maheśāna pratiṣṭhā karma siddhaye tvam ādiḥ sarva bhūtānām saṃsāra arṇava tārakaḥ jñāna amṛta prada ācāryaḥ yajurveda namaḥ astu te praphulla kanaka ābhāsa bhāsvara asura bhūṣita ṣaṣ aṃga veda veda jñaḥ ṛtu iṅga mokṣa pradaḥ bhava praviśya maṇḍalam viprāḥ sva sthāne sthāpayet kramāt vedyāḥ paścima bhāge tu ācāryam sthāpayet budhaḥ kuṇḍasya agre tu brahmāṇam maṇḍalasya eva paścime dvāri dvāri prayatnena dvārapālān anukramāt nārāyaṇa sva rūpeṇa yajñam me saphalam kuru yajñeṣu sākṣī sarveṣu yajurveda artha tattva vid makha śreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu yena maṃtrāḥ su vistṛtāḥ makha śreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu eṣaḥ eva vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ māṃgalyam karmaṇām nityam sarvajñam jñāna rūpi pālaya tvam diśaḥ sarvāḥ vidiśaḥ ca tathā imam dikpāla rūpiṇam vipram yajña siddhau mī aham na saṃkalpam caret yāgam vratam deva arcanam tathā saṃkalpa mūlaḥ kāmaḥ vai yajñāḥ saṃkalpa saṃbhavāḥ kāmāt paraḥ nā eva bhavet niṣkā na śobhanaḥ tasmāt kāma mayam dharmam vinā mokṣam na ca ācaret na kuryāt sthāpane ca eva kuryāt vai maṃḍala aṃtare gṛhītvā auduṃbaram pātram vāri pūrṇam guṇa anvitam jalāśaya ārāmakūpa saṃkalpe pūrva diś mukhaḥ sādhāraṇe ca uttara āsyaḥ graha yajñe tu saṃmukhaḥ mahāvrate pratiṣṭhāyām pātram tāmram hiraṇmayam rājata aśma mayam sāṃgam yat yajñeṣu praśasyate yajñīya pātra puṭakam hasta sthāne prakīrtitam aiśyānyām nikṣipet toyam pratiṣṭhāyām ca pūrvatas ākāśe nikṣipet yāge vrate nityake śukti kāṃsya ādi hastaiḥ ca tāmra raupya ādibhiḥ tathā praṇavam pūrvam uccārya yajet yajñeśvaram smaret gaṅgā ca āditya caṃdrau ca dyauḥ bhūmī rātri vāsarau sūryaḥ somaḥ yamaḥ kālaḥ mahābhūtāni paṃca ca ete śubha aśubha asya iha karmaṇaḥ nava sākṣiṇaḥ iti uccārya nyaset dharmam dhyātvā puṣpa añjalim sṛjet amṛtam kṛtya pātre ca om tat sat iti nirdiśet dharmaḥ śubhra vapuḥ sita aṃbara dharaḥ kārya ūrdhva deśe vṛṣaḥ hastābhyām abhayam varam ca satatam rūpam param yaḥ dadhat sarva prāṇi sukha āvahaḥ kṛta dhiyām mokṣa eka hetuḥ sadā saḥ yam pātu jagaṃti ca eva satatam bhūyāt satām bhūtaye yajña saṃbaṃdhi viprān ca eka ahena eva yojayet haviḥ dravyāṇi yāni syuḥ aṣṭa yāga aṃtare pi ca punar punar niyojyāni brāhmaṇāḥ haviḥ agnayaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca māgha ādi māseṣu api ṣaṭsu kāryā yoga pratiṣṭhā ṛṣibhiḥ praṇītā lagne śubha sthe śubha vīkṣite vā kāryā pratiṣṭhā ca jalāśayānām śuddhā dvitīyā ca tathā tṛtīyā trayodaśī ca api tathā eva viprāḥ prāṇa pratiṣṭhā ca jalāśaya ādeḥ etāḥ praśastāḥ tithayaḥ bhavanti a prāpya ca etāni śubhāni yāni kāryā pratiṣṭhā viṣuva dvaye ca ṣaḍaśīti loka api ayana dvayena yuga ādike puṇya adine śubhe ca kāryā taḍāga ādi jalāśayasya prācyām pratiṣṭhā atha ca uttare vā su cāru īṣat pravaṇe ca deśe su vartulaḥ ṣoḍaśa hasta maṃḍapaḥ pūrva ādi dvāreṣu catuṣṭayeṣu plakṣa ādibhiḥ toraṇakaiḥ sureśaḥ ūrdhve ca hasta ānamitāni yāni vicitra mālya aṃbara bhūṣitāni bhūmau yathā ca hastakāni bhavanti ca etāni api toraṇāni sarvatra yāge api hi maṃḍapasya kāryāḥ dhvajāḥ dikṣu vidikṣu śubhrāḥ dikpāla varṇa ābha patāka yuktāḥ madhye ca vai nīla patāka yuktāḥ dhvajāḥ ca yasmin daśa hasta sammitāḥ tasmin patākāḥ api pañca hastāḥ aratni mātrāḥ yadi mūlabhāge vinibaddha gūḍhāḥ dvāre ca tasmin ca nirūpitāḥ vā raṃbhā supuṣpā sukha śāḍvalāḥ ca puṣṭa dvaye sūtritam veṣṭayet ca tathā ikṣu kāṇḍaiḥ atha yāga maṇḍapam vediḥ tathā maṃḍapa madhya bhāge kāryā ca vedyām parityajya daśa aṃgulāni aiśāni atas trīṇi tathā parāṇi prāsāde ca taḍāge ca mahā ārāme tathā eva ca kuṃḍāni kuryāt nava kuṃḍa pakṣe vedyāḥ tathā uccais avidikṣu ca eva sarvāṇi sarvatra ca mekhalāni ṣaṣ asra paṃca asra sa mekhalāni aṣṭa asra jāni abja trikoṇakāni tathā arddhacandram caturasrakam ca kuṇḍasya pūrvottara diś vibhāge sthāpyaḥ ghaṭaḥ candana cāru liptaḥ mālya ambara ācchādita pūrṇa pāthāḥ sa vṛtta patraḥ ca suvarṇa garbhaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca gataḥ yāga gṛhāt anyat maṇḍala aṃtaram āśritaḥ yajamānaḥ tathā nityam karma kṛtvā yathāvidhi paṃca devān namaskṛtya tathā yajñeśvaram harim saṃkalpam ca tatas kṛtvā brāhmaṇāḥ vedavyāsa ādi praṇītam yathāśāstra nidarśanam yathā yathā svatantra uktam puṇyā raṇya abhidhāyakam jalāśaya pratiṣṭhāyām vidhivat dvijāḥ yathā yathā ca kalpa uktam yathākuṇḍam vidhānataḥ sa adhivāsam yathā eva ekaḥ puṇyāḥ raṇya vidhāyakaḥ jalāśaya pratiṣṭhām ca kariṣye vidhivat dvijāḥ saṃkalpam evam kṛtvā tu vṛddhiśrāddham samācaret mātṛ yāgam puraskṛtya vṛddhiśrāddham samāpayet bherī ādi ghoṣeṇa su maṃgalena padyam likhet atra sa ṣoḍaśa akṣaram brahma īśān varayet sarvān ācāryam tu viśeṣataḥ svarṇa kuṃḍala yugmena tathā tāmra ādi bhājanaiḥ nānā ratnaiḥ ca vastraiḥ ca ācāryam varayet budhaḥ yathāmānam yathāśakti yathā abhivṛṇuyāt budhaḥ tatas sarva oṣadhībhiḥ ca yajamānaḥ sapatnikaḥ snāpayāmāsuḥ aprajāḥ yava godhūma nīvāra tila śyāmāka śālayaḥ priyaṃgu vrīhayaḥ ca aṣṭau sarva oṣadhi gaṇaḥ smṛtaḥ tatas śukla ambara dharaḥ śukla mālya anulepanaḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ abhyanujñātaḥ purohita puraḥsaraḥ nānā maṃgala ghoṣeṇa bherī paṭaha nisvanaiḥ paścimam dvāram āsādya praviśet yāga maṇḍapam carake pūjayet vighnam gaṃgām ca yamunām tathā pārśvayoḥ ca ardhataḥ lakṣmīm pratihāram anukramāt vedim pradakṣiṇīkṛtya namaskuryāt yathāvidhi svasti vācyam tatas kṛtvā paṃca devān prapūjayet bhūta utsādam tatas kṛtvā vikirān vikiret bhuvi apakrāmaṃtu ye bhūtāḥ ye ca asmin viprakārakāḥ yasmāt naḥ nāmni vartaṃte yajña mātram pravartatām pūjayet āsanam paścāt svakīyam puṣpa caṃdanaiḥ namaḥ naṃta āsanāya iti tathā padma āsanāya ca vimala āsanāya ca namaḥ namaḥ sāra āsanāya ca tatas bhūmi tale vāma hastam dattvā paṭhet naraḥ pṛthvi tvayā dhṛtāḥ lokāḥ devi tvam viṣṇunā dhṛtā tvam ca dhāraya mām nityam pavitram āsanam kuru sūryāya arghyam tatas dattvā gurum natvā kṛtāñjaliḥ caret gaṇānām tvā iti maṃtreṇa vrahmāṇam tad anaṃtaram ābrahman iti ṛcā tat viṣṇoḥ iti saṃsmaran vāsudevam tatas paścāt balibhiḥ gandha caṃdanaiḥ tatas deva śarīram tu navam āsādya triṃśatam tatas rāja adhirājena bhūtaśuddhim samācaret śuddha sphaṭika saṃkāśam śaṃkha kunda indu saprabham kirīṭa kuṇḍala yutam sitam paṃkaja dhāriṇam śukla mālya aṃbaram śuklam śukla gaṃgha anulepanam ahi tuṇḍa āsana stham ca pāśa hastam mahā balam rājīva locanam nityam nāga loka upaśobhitam makara grāha kūrma ādyaiḥ nānā jalacaraiḥ vṛtam jalāśaya gatam devam ciṃtayet jalaśāyinam tatas nyāsam prakurvīta paca aṃga tva avaśobhitam arghya pātram tatas kṛtvā tri bhāga jala pūritam aṣṭadhā mūlamaṃtram ca japtvā tena udakena ca āsanam yāga vastūni prokṣayet tena vāriṇā tat naḥ aruṇaḥ pracodayāt iti snānam samācaret tatas gaṇeśam aiśānyām āgneyyām guru pādukām dharma adharma ādikān sarvān sattva ādīn atha ca arcayet sūrya soma jala ādīnām maṇḍalāni yathākramam madhye śaktim ca kṣīrodam anaṃtam pṛthivīm tathā kūrmam ca ādhāra śaktim ca sumerum mandaram tathā tatas śvetam ca kusumam sa akṣatam yoga māyayā gṛhītvā pūrvavat deśe sthāpayet kalaśa upari āvāhanam tatas kṛtvā mantreṇa anena maṃtra vid yajña bhāgam gṛhāṇa idam tvām eva āvāhayāmi aham evam āvāhya lokeśam aṣṭau mudrāḥ pradarśayet gāyatryā snāpayitvā tu dadyāt pādya ādika trayam puṣpa añjalim tatas dattvā mūlamaṃtreṇa deśikaḥ pūrva ādi patra mūleṣu dharma ādīn pūjayet budhaḥ sattva ādyāḥ pūjayet tatra teṣām eva vara aṃganāḥ jñānam dharmam ca somam ca rajaḥ sattvam tamaḥ tathā patra agre lokapālānām agnya adīna āyudhān tathā karṇikā dakṣiṇe pūrvam vāme ca api śacīpatim pūrva patre tu brahmāṇam pūjayet sita paṅkajaiḥ pīṭha mantreṣu pūrva ādi brahmāṇam ca śivam tathā viṣṇum ca api gaṇeśam ca pṛthivīm gaṃdha candanaiḥ japet mantram sa aṣṭaśatam sahasram vijapet budhaḥ jānubhyām avanīm gatvā vijaya ākhya stavam paṭhet īśāna ādi pīṭha koṇeṣu kamalām aṃbikām tathā nairṛtyām viśva karmāṇam vāyavye tu sarasvatīm pūrva ādi dvāra deśe tu marutam ca āvaha ādikam āgneya ādiṣu koṇeṣu bahiṣpīṭham tatas jayet piśācān rākṣasān bhūtān vetāḥ lān ca tathā kramāt vivasvaṃtaḥ sudaṃtaḥ ca ete bhūta gaṇāḥ smṛtāḥ aṃgadaḥ nīlakarṇaḥ asau vasaṃtaḥ yāvakaḥ tathā ghorarūpāḥ mahākāyaḥ vetālāḥ ca prakīrtitāḥ gaṃdha puṣpa akṣataiḥ bhaktam sarve devāḥ graha ādayaḥ dhyāna varṇa anurūpeṇa pūjanīyāḥ prayatnataḥ yava vidruma saṃkāśam siṃdūra aruṇa saprabham ākṛṣṇena iti maṃtreṇa sthāpayet kalaśa upari iha āgaccha iti ca āvāhya pādya arghyaiḥ ca pṛthagvidhaiḥ gaṃdha puṣpa ādibhiḥ bhaktyā pūjayet tam yathāvidhi balim ca lohitam dadyāt pāyasam dadhi khaṃḍakam ghṛta liptam ca śāli annam patākām rakta varṇikām śveta aṃbara dharam śvetam śukla gaṃdha anu lepanam dvi bhujam vara dam devam gadā hastam mahā balam śukla padmāsana stham ca aśvam dadyāt śveta bhūṣitam imam devāḥ iti maṃtreṇa sthāpayet pūrva diś dale sita vastraiḥ ca puṣpaiḥ ca śukla mālya anulepanaiḥ rakta mālya aṃbaram devam rakta ābharaṇa bhūṣitam kirīṭa kuṃḍala dharam meṣa kaṃṭham caturbhujam vara dam yajñanāśam ca śūla śakti gadā dharam ciṃtayet parayā bhaktyā maṃgalam dharaṇī sutam atasī puṣpa saṃkāśam karṇikāra sama prabham rauhiṇeyam mahā kāyam nīla nīraja locanam praśāṃta vadanam devam pīta vastram catur bhujam nānā ābharaṇa saṃpūrṇam mṛgendra vara vāhanam pūjayet gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ pīta gaṃdha anulepanaiḥ vastraiḥ pīta patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ kṛśara anvitaiḥ pīta varṇam gurum dhyāyet pīta padmāsana sthitam pīta ābharaṇa saṃpannam pīta vastram catur bhujam vara dam daṃḍa hastam ca sa akṣasūtra kamaṃḍalum bṛhaspataye iti maṃtreṇa nairṛtyām diśi saṃsthitam pīta candana gaṃdhaiḥ ca pīta vastra ādi bhūṣaṇaiḥ dhūpaiḥ pīta patākābhiḥ pīta udaka nivedanaiḥ catur bhujam mahā kāyam vara dam daṃḍa dhāriṇam mahā bāhum viśāla akṣam sa akṣasūtra kamaṃḍalum stūyamānam muni śreṣṭhaiḥ sevitam daitya puṅgavaiḥ siṃhāsana gatam devam nīla indīvara locanam vilasat puṇḍarīkasya mālābhiḥ upaśobhitam nānā daitya indra putrān ca pāṭhayantam muhur muhur nānā śastra astra caturam nānā śāstra viśāradam evam dhyātvā bhṛgu śreṣṭham japan annāt parisrutam dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhiḥ saktubhiḥ kṣīra saṃyutaiḥ pūjayet parayā bhaktyā puṃḍarīkākṣataiḥ api dhyāyet saurim catur bāhum śūla hastam vara pradam indranīla nibham śyāmam bāṇa dhanuḥ dharam nīla aṃbara dharam nīla padma mālā upaśobhitam ghora rūpam mahā kāyam chāyā hṛdaya nanda nam maṃtreṇa vāyavyām diśi vinyaset kṛṣṇa caṃdana vastraiḥ ca kṛṣṇa mālya anulepanaiḥ dhūpaiḥ nīlapatākābhiḥ balibhiḥ māṣa miśritaiḥ dhūmra varṇam sadā ketum gadā hastam vara pradam dvi bhujam bhīma kāyam ca dhūmra akṣam dhūmra vāsasam ketum kṛṇvan iti mantreṇa aiśā sthāpayet diśi dhūmra varṇaiḥ ca mālyaiḥ ca dhūmra gaṃdha anulepanaiḥ dhūmra dhūmra patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ māṣa miśritaiḥ lokapālān aham vakṣye sarva siddhi pradāyakān yeṣu pūjita mātreṣu na a labhyam vidyate kvacid devarājam tatas dhyāyet puṣpabāṇa caya prabham dvi bhujam pīta saṃkāśam nīla indīvara locanam indrāṇīm ciṃtayet vāme utpala dvaya dhāriṇīm pūjayet parayā bhaktyā dhṛpa gaṃdha anulepanaiḥ nānāvidha upahāraiḥ ca patākābhiḥ dhvajaiḥ api balim kṣīra anvitam dadyāt modakam sita śarkarām uttapta svarṇa saṃkāśam vītihotram catur bhujam jvālā vitāna saṃraktam mūrdhni sapta śikhā anvitam vara dam vibhayam mālām dakṣe sūtram kamaṇḍalum trinetram rakta nayanam jaṭā mukuṭa maṃḍitam nīlāñjana caya prakhyam nīla siṃhāsana sthitam mahā mahiṣam ārūḍham daṃḍa pāśa dhara vibhum karāla vadanam bhīmam jvālā ghūrṇita locanam ghora daṃṣṭrā karālaiḥ ca kiṃkarāṇām gaṇaiḥ vṛtam mahiṣam ciṃtayet vāme citraguptam ca dakṣiṇe rākṣasa indram mahā kāyam kṛṣṇa varṇam dvi bāhukam nānā ābharaṇa saṃpannam khaṅga hastam mahā ba lam vara muktā vimāna stham ghora rūpam jaleśvaram eṣa te iti maṃtreṇa nairṛtyām sthāpayet diśi kṛṣṇa candana vastraiḥ ca kṛṣṇa mālya anulepanaiḥ dhūpaiḥ kṛṣṇa patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ māṣa miśritaiḥ śuddha sphaṭika saṃkāśam śaṃkha kunda indu saprabham dvi bhujam pāśa hastam ca sundara aṅgam vara pradam samīraṇam kuñjara varṇa sannibham mṛga adhirūḍham dvi bhujam dvi netram dhvaja aṃbaram ca api dadhānam ekam nīla aṃbaram megha gaṇaiḥ vṛtam ca nīlacandana vastraiḥ ca nīla mālya anulepanaiḥ dhūpaiḥ nīlapatākābhiḥ balibhiḥ pāyasaiḥ api dhyāyet dvi netram dvi bhujam dhaneśam pīta aṃbaram vai naravāhanam ca dhūpaiḥ pīta patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ pāyasaiḥ api snigdha karpūra saṃkāśam tuṣārakiraṇa prabham uttaṃga vṛṣabha ārūḍham trinetram bhasma bhūṣitam kapāla mālinam tadvat khaṇḍa iṃdu kṛta śekharam evam dhyātvā maheśānam sthāpayet īśa diś dale sita dhvaja patākābhiḥ balibhiḥ pāyasa ādibhiḥ tvam īśānaḥ iti maṃtreṇa ṛṣim chandaḥ samīrayan brahmāṇam rakta gaura agam śoṇa padma sama prabham
