rājahaṃsa samāyuktam vimāna vara saṃsthitam sruc sruvau dakṣiṇe haste vāme daṃḍam kamaṇḍalum ājya sthālīm tathā eva agre kuśān ca samidham tathā vāma pārśve tu sāvitrīm dakṣiṇe tu sarasvatīm nānā bhakṣya upacāraiḥ ca pūjayet gaṃdha candanaiḥ dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhiḥ balibhiḥ ca ājya pāyasaiḥ śaṃkha cakra gadā padma dhāriṇam jagat īśvaram ādhāra bhūtam jagatām svarṇa yajña upavītinam nānā ābharaṇa sampannam phaṇā śata samanvitam om namaḥ astu iti maṃtreṇa sthāpayet varuṇa antare dhūpaiḥ śvetapatākābhiḥ balibhiḥ ca eva nirmitaiḥ tatas maṇḍala pūrve tu brahmāṇam pīta vāsasam bibhratam ca śrutam tadvat tathā daṃḍa kamaṇḍalū dakṣiṇe tryaṃbakam dhyāyet śūla khaṭvāṃdhāriṇam vara dam ḍamaru dharam nāga yajña upavītinam kapāla mālinam devam bhujaṃga ābharaṇa anvitam trinetram kunda saṃkāśam bhūta preta gaṇaiḥ vṛtam atasī puṣpa saṃkāśam hāra keyūra bhūṣitam nānā ābharaṇa saṃpannam pīta vastram catur bhujam dakṣiṇe ca gadām cakram vāme śaṃkham sa padmakam śriyā dakṣiṇatas vāme sarasvatyā samanvitam tat viṣṇoḥ iti maṃtreṇa sthāpayet paścime tatas pūjayet gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ pāyasena ghṛtena ca gaṇeśam tu catur bāhum vyāla yajña upavītinam paraśum laguḍam vāme dakṣiṇe daṃḍam utpalam mūṣaka stham mahā kāyam śaṅkha kunda iṃdu saprabham nānā ābharaṇa saṃpannam sarva āpatti vināśanam uttapta jāṃbūnada hema sannibhām lakṣmīm saroja āsana saṃsthitām śubhām vāme sarojam dadhatīm tathā eva haste ca dakṣe dhṛta cāmarām ca śrīḥ ca tā iti ca mantreṇa aiśānyām maṃḍalāt bahis modakam paramānnam ca yavakṣīram nivedayet tatas devīm aṃbikām divya rūpām brahma iṃdra ādyaiḥ stūyamānām trinetrām siṃha īśa sthām tapta jāṃbūnada ābhām candra arddhena ābaddha maulim jaṭābhiḥ brahma iṃdra ādyaiḥ durjayām māhiṣa āsyam tīkṣṇaiḥ astraiḥ dānavam mardayaṃtīm śūlam tīkṣṇam bāṇa śaktī ca tīkṣṇe khaḍgam tīkṣṇam bibhratīm dakṣiṇena cāpam pāśam kheṭakam ca aṃkuśam ca ghaṇṭām vāme bibhratīm vai kuṭhāram śiraḥ chedāt ardha jātam kabandham khaḍgam tīkṣṇam bibhratīm daitya rājam nāgaiḥ pāśaiḥ veṣṭayitvā samam tācchūlena enam nighnatīm deha madhye sa indraiḥ devaiḥ stūyamānām suveṇīm gaṃdharva ādyaiḥ siddha saṃghaiḥ ca sevyām nānā vastraiḥ bhūṣaṇaiḥ dīpyamānām dhyāyet devīm aṃbikām ujvalaṃtīm māṃsaiḥ piṣṭaiḥ chāgala āḍhyaiḥ aśeṣaiḥ pūjyā devī caṃḍikā abhīṣṭa dā ca śyāmām ca pṛthivīm dhyāyet paṃkaja dvaya dhāriṇīm maṇḍūka sthām dvi bhujām syonā pṛthivī iti ca arcayet nairṛtyām viśvakarmāṇam dvi bhujam ṭaṃka dhāriṇam utpalam dakṣiṇe haste padma stham pīta vāsasam svasthām sarasvatīm dhyāyet vara da abhaya dāyinīm pīta vastrām su mukuṭām deva gandharva sevitām iti mantreṇa pūjayet sita caṃdanaiḥ balim śveta carum dadyāt kṛśaram yāvakam tathā sthāpayet vāma digbhāge kunda puṣpaiḥ prapūjayet pūrva ādi dvāra deśe tu pūjayet ca marut gaṇaiḥ agni ādiṣu ca koṇeṣu bahis bhūtān samācaret piśācāḥ rākṣasāḥ bhūtāḥ vetāla kapi jātayaḥ nirṇāsāḥ ca eva te sarve raudrāḥ vikṛta rūpiṇaḥ tatas maṇḍala madhye tu vāruṇam pūrva vartmanā kūrmam kūrma ākṛtim kuryāt śuddha svarṇena sattamāḥ pādam pādena mānena aṃgulam parimaṇḍalam prauṣṭhī matsyam tathā kuryāt kulīram tāmra nirmitam tena ekasya vinirmāṇam dvi aṃgula āyāma vistṛtam tathā mānena maṇḍūkam tām bhūmim muni sattamāḥ sita candana vastraiḥ ca pūjanīyāḥ samaṃtataḥ yāvakaiḥ ca viśeṣeṇa bahu maṃtra viśāradān pañca aṃgam śivasūktam ca yathā viṣṇoḥ harasya ca jaya agratas puruṣasūktam adbhyaḥ saṃbhūtam eva ca āśuḥ śiśānam ārabhya vayam moṣa aṃga rudrake yat jāgrataḥ ca agneḥ ca viṣṇoḥ arāṭam eva ca samasta adhyāya rudreṇa śata rudra ākhyam īritam sapta aṃga rudrasya puṣpadaṃta ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chaṃdaḥ tryaṃbakam iti aṃguṣṭhābhyām namaḥ tripād ūrdhvam iti tarjanībhyām svāhā veda aham iti madhyamābhyām vaṣaṭ amīṣām citram iti anāmikābhyām hum yavāgūm somaḥ iti kaniṣṭhikābhyām vauṣaṭ yat jāgrataḥ iti hṛdayāya namaḥ sahasra śīrṣā iti śirase svāhā adbhyaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ iti śikhāyai vaṣaṭ āśuḥ śiśānaḥ iti kavacābhyām huṃ namaḥ te rudraḥ iti netratrayāya vauṣaṭ rūḍham brahman iti astrāya phaṭ catur dikṣu choṭikāṃdānam iti sarva aṃgeṣu home pravartamāne tu sūktān anyān ca vai japet prajapet vāruṇam sūktam tathā ca pālasūktakam rātrisūktam ca raudram ca pāvamānam samujjvalam śāktam raudram ca saumyam ca kūṣmāṇḍam jātavedasam vairājam pauruṣam sūktam sauvarṇam rudrasaṃhitām śaiśavam pañca nirayam gāyatryam jyeṣṭhasāma ca vāmadevyam bṛhatsāma tathā ca eva rathaṃtaram govratam ca vikarṇam ca rakṣoghnam pāvanam smṛtam gāyaṃtam brāhmaṇāḥ ye ca pūrva ādi dvāra deśataḥ rudrādhyāyam ca pañca aṃgam raudraḥ iti abhidhīyate āpyāyasva iti ca catuḥ saumyam sūktam pracakṣate īśāva ityādi sva aṃgam ca kauṣmāṃḍam daśamam smṛtam ṣoḍaśam tu vibhrāj vṛhat sauram sūktam prakīrtitam saura sūktam iṣavaḥ maṃgalam smṛtam rātrisūktam hi yajva agne rakṣaḥ ghnam śaiva sūktakam gaṇānām tvā iti pañca āpohiṣṭhā iti ca trayam pavamānam tu tat viddhi pāvamānam tu ṣoḍaśa tad arddha arddham ca ārāme kūpe tu ekaṛcam japet saṃskuryāt dīkṣaṇa ādyaiḥ ca saṃpūjya ca parasparam vāgīśvaram samabhyarcya vāgīśvaryā samanvitam prāk eva tasya juhuyāt sahasram ca śatam tathā tila ājyaiḥ pāyasaiḥ vā atha patra puṣpa akṣatena ca ūrjena samidhā kuryāt aṣṭa aṣṭau sva gṛheṣu api indra īśvara mārutānām tila ājyena ghṛtena vā ekaikām āhutim dadyāt svaiḥ maṃtraiḥ yathākramāt digīśānām ca pratyekam aṣṭa aṣṭau ca viśeṣataḥ ekaikām āhutim dadyāt ājyena ca viśeṣataḥ śivam prajā patim viṣṇum durgām ca kamalām api sarasvatīm ca vidhivat pṛthivyai iti pāvakaiḥ bhūtebhyaḥ api āhutim dadyāt evam māsa dvayam kramāt anyeṣām madhura aktena tila lājaiḥ yayā akramam viṣṇum ca eva tu vāyavye durgāyāḥ ca tathā uttare kamalāyāḥ ca īśāne īśānasya sa bhūtakam pakṣe vai pañca kuṇḍe tu pūrva ādīnām krameṇa tu eka kuṃḍe grahān kṛtvā kṛtvā balabhidā saha paścime yasya yāgasya durgāyāḥ ca uttare diśi īśāne bhūtayakṣmā ca juhuyāt deśika uttamaḥ viṣṇu ādi devatānām ca agra kuṃḍe vidhīyate dvitīye pūjanam kuryāt homam kuryāt yathāvidhi bali dānam tṛtīye tu caturthīkam caturthake nīrājanam pañcame tu pañca aha sādhyakaḥ vidhiḥ udak mukhaḥ prāc mukhaḥ vā api aiśānī ādi krameṇa tu prādakṣiṇyena yajñam tu mantraiḥ parisamūhanam mantra pūrvam sa agnikānām niragneḥ tuṣṭikena tu diś vidikṣu paristīrya mahā yāgeṣu sarvadā prāyaścitte vaiśvadeve sāyaṃprātar pratīṣu ca māraṇa uccāṭa homeṣu tathā saṃkalpita ākṛtī pratyavāya kule kvāpi tatra nitya ākṛtim vinā tūrya homam tatas kṛtvā tūṣṇīm eva jita indriyaḥ ante sviṣṭakṛtam dadyāt vidhānam tasya bhoḥ śṛṇu ghṛta āhutim sviṣṭakṛt ca dvija saṃskāra karmasu ghṛtaiḥ sviṣṭakṛtam dadyāt yāga ādau parivarjayet sarva oṣadhi udaka snānam kari danta uttham uṣṇayā tri gandham ca tri śītam ca kuśa mūlasya mṛttikāḥ nikṣipet snāna kumbheṣu ācārya ādīn tu sthāpayet yajamānaḥ puras kṛtvā daṃta kāṣṭha puraḥsaram rātrau ca bhakṣya bhojya ādyaiḥ paritoṣya yava akṣatam kṛtvā yathā ukta kālena pūjayet taila dhārayā vāruṇena ca sūktena surāstu ādi yathākramam surāḥ tvām abhiṣiṃcaṃtu brahman na viṣṇu maheśvarāḥ vāsudevaḥ jagannāthaḥ tathā saṃkarṣaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ākhaṃḍala agniḥ bhagavān yamaḥ vai nirṛtiḥ tathā varuṇaḥ pavanaḥ ca eva dhanāyakṣaḥ tathā śivaḥ brahmaṇā sahitaḥ śeṣaḥ dikpālāḥ pātu te sadā kīrtiḥ lakṣmīḥ dhṛtiḥ medhā puṣṭiḥ śraddhā kriyā matiḥ buddhiḥ lajjā vapuḥ śāṃtiḥ tuṣṭiḥ kāṃtiḥ ca mātaraḥ etāḥ tvām abhiṣiṃcaṃtu deva pantyaḥ samāhitāḥ ādityaḥ candramāḥ bhaumaḥ budha jīva sita arka jāḥ grahāḥ tvām abhiṣiṃcaṃtu rāhuḥ ketuḥ ca tarpitāḥ deva dānava gaṃdharvāḥ yakṣa rākṣasa pannagāḥ deva patnyaḥ drumāḥ nāgāḥ daityāḥ ca apsarasām gaṇāḥ astrāṇi sarva śastrāṇi rājānaḥ vāhanāni ca auṣadhāni ca ratnāni kālasya avayavāḥ ca ye saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailāḥ tīrthāni jaladāḥ nadāḥ ete tvām abhiṣiṃcaṃtu sarva kāma artha siddhaye gavām aṣṭottaraśatam tad ardham ca atha viṃśatim ācāryāya abhirūpāya pradadiyāt abhipūjayan śuddhām ca kapilām dogdhrīm ghaṭa ācāmara varjitām sāmagāya tatas dadyāt suvarṇa dakṣiṇā anvitām yūpam ādāya saṃsthāpya snāpayet vāruṇam japan parvata agra mṛdā toya nāga valmīka jātayā ca eva dāpayet kāṃsya mūlam ca dadyāt loha mayam ca vā īśāvā iti maṃtreṇa dadyāt puṣpa añjali trayam maṃtreṇa punar puṣpam samutsṛjet prādeśa mātra vistāram madhye vṛttam ṣaṣ aṃgulam kāṃsya cakrasya mānam tu ūrdhvam yat dvādaśa aṃgulam aṃguṣṭha hīne lohasya tatra śūlam na kārayet tatas maṃgala pūrve tu dvijātīnām matena ca samutsṛjet ca prāsādam taḍāgam ca viśeṣataḥ catur darbham gṛhītvā tu īśāna abhimukhena tu samutsṛjet tatas paścāt vākyam etat urīyet om ityādi śrī kṛṣṇadvaipāyana abhidhāna vedavyāsa praṇīta bhaviṣya purāṇa ukta phala prapti kāmaḥ catuṣkoṇa ādi avacchinna mat kārita puṣkariṇī jalam etat ūrjitam gaṃdha puṣpa ādi arcitam varuṇa daivatam sarva sattvebhyaḥ snāna avagāhana artham aham utsṛje tatas varuṇasūktena varuṇam nāga saṃyutam pūjayet varuṇam devam arghyam dadyāt viśeṣataḥ śvetāśva sura saṃbhūtam śrīḥ ca tā iti ca saṃjapan āpyāyasva iti maṃtreṇa mṛdam catuṣpatha udbhavām tat viṣṇoḥ iti maṃtreṇa kuśa mūlena sthāpayet tīrtha toyena gaṃdhena tathā pañcāmṛtena ca gāyatryā snāpayet devam ratna toyena sādhakaḥ āpyāyasva iti maṃtreṇa kṣīreṇa tad anantaram sarasvatyām tā iti jātī puṣpa toyena snāpayet śrīḥ ca te iti maṃtrasya kardamaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chaṃdaḥ sarit devatā aśva khura mṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ āpyāyasva iti maṃtrasya parvataḥ ṛṣiḥ uṣṇih chandaḥ sarasvatī devatā varuṇa prītaye catuṣpatha mṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ tat viṣṇoḥ iti maṃtrasya mainākaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ sarasvatī devatā varuṇa prītaye kuśa mṛdā snāne viniyogaḥ kayā naḥ iti maṃtrasya vasiṣṭhaḥ ṛṣiḥ anuṣṭubh chandaḥ somaḥ devatā varuṇa prītaye nāga gaṃdha snāne viniyogaḥ maṃtrasya gargaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ vāsavaḥ devatā varuṇa prītaye viniyogaḥ sarasvatyai bhaiṣajyena iti maṃtrasya vāmadevaḥ ṛṣiḥ paṃktiḥ chaṃdaḥ viṣṇuḥ devatā varuṇa prītaye viniyogaḥ agne āyāhi iti maṃtrasya janārdanaḥ ṛṣiḥ jagatī chandaḥ aindrī devatā varuṇa prītaye viniyogaḥ prakṣipet pañca vrīhīn ca iyat ca iti ca saṃpaṭhan paścāt nīrājanam kuryāt pañca ghoṣa puraḥsaram śirīṣa puṣpa saṃbhūtam darpaṇam kāsya saṃbhavam gopīcandana saṃbhūtam gaṃgā mṛttikayā atha vā kṛṣṇām gām gomayam vā api svastikam śaṃkham eva ca utpanna svarga saṃbhūtam kalaśam māṣa saṃbhavam śrīrasam puṣpasaṃbhūtam darpaṇam kāṃsyasaṃbhavam pūrva akṣatam māṣa bhakta balim dadyāt vidhānataḥ tatas nārāyaṇasūktena devam nārāyaṇam vrajet anyeṣām ca eva devānām pradadyāt triṃśatam balim vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa krameṇa api vidhānataḥ pṛthak pṛthak tatas dadyāt tāvaṃtyena api bho dvijāḥ śarīram te na jānāmi ceṣṭām na eva ca na eva ca aṣṭottaraśatān dīpān paritas sthāpayet kramāt tad ardham vā pañcaviṃśam maṃtreṇa prayajet sudhīḥ tvam sūryya candra jyotīṃṣi viṣādaḥ tvam tathā eva ca tvam eva sarva jyotīṃṣi dīpaḥ ayam pratigṛhyatām pradakṣiṇam tatas kuryāt pañcadhā saptadhā atha vā vakṣyamāṇena maṃtreṇa dadyāt dhūpam daśa aṃgakam vanaspati rasaḥ divyaḥ gaṃdha āḍhyaḥ surabhiḥ śuciḥ dūrvā akṣatena mālyena yuktam puṣpeṇa pūjayet dadyāt pañca añjalim paścāt viṣṇusūktam punar japet tatas su śobhane sthāne vedīm nirmāya deśikaḥ varuṇam vinyaset tatra tathā puṣkariṇīm api gaṃdha puṣpam tatas dadyāt gām ca dadyāt sa dakṣiṇām cāmaram vyajanam chatram kāṃsyam loham tathā eva ca kuryāt puṣkariṇīm ramyām rājatīm ca tripādikām catuṣkoṇām ca suṣamām dvi aṃguṣṭha parimaṃḍalām suvarṇa pratimām kuryāt bhālena ekena bho drijāḥ bāṇa śakti pramāṇena svarṇa patram tu dvi aṃgulam nīrājana aṃte vipra iṃdrāḥ saṃsmaret amṛtam taret prāṇa pratiṣṭhām kuryāt tu varuṇāya nivedayet aśokaḥ khadiraḥ śālaḥ hi aśvatthaḥ bilvakaḥ tathā dhātrī kurubakaḥ ca eva bakulaḥ nāgakeśaraḥ eṣām eva kāṣṭha yūpam yajamāna pramāṇakam samādāya ca saṃsthāpya vastra ādyaiḥ pratigṛhya ca yūpa rakṣa iti maṃtreṇa khanitvā ca pradāpayet taḍāgasya tathā aiśānyām tathā prāsādakasya ca prāpayet dakṣiṇe bhāge āvāsasya ca madhyake naukāḥ gatvā tatas paścāt yūpam ādāya vāgyataḥ catur asram samākīrṇam catur dikṣu adhṛtaiḥ janaiḥ cakram sa darpaṇam dadyāt nāgadaṃḍa śiraḥ gataḥ evam cakram pūjayitvā śūlam nāgān ca pūjayet uccais dhvajam tatas kṛtvā na nāga iti ca saṃpaṭhet maṃtreṇa paṭhet dvāra dvayam tatas dikpālebhyaḥ balim dadyāt māṣa bhaktam guḍa odanam rakta puṣpa anvitam kṛtvā praṇipatya prasādayet sahasram vā dhanam dadyāt brāhmaṇāya kuṭuṃbine ikṣusvastītikām dadyāt jale mātṝḥ ca pūjayet maṃtharām vasutām kāṃtām rākṣasīm ca piśācikām nāginīḥ nāgaputrān ca madhye saṃpūjayet tatas pūrṇa aṃte ca pṛthak dadyāt lāja ādyaiḥ guḍa miśritaiḥ madhyame ca kanīyake svāhā iti juhuyāt paścāt praṇītām cālayet tatas kaniṣṭha pakṣe prāsāde tathā ca eva jalāśaye ārāme ca tathā setau viśeṣaḥ pañcamaḥ dvijāḥ iti paṭhitvā puṣkariṇī jalam haste gṛhītvā jale kṣipet trailokye yāni sthānāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca teṣām āpyāyanāya etat jalam utsṛjyate mayā śivāya sarva bhūtānām sadā pāhi jalāśayam pibaṃtaḥ hi avagāhaṃtaḥ sukhinaḥ sarva jaṃtavaḥ jalam viśva upakārāya kṛtam etat mayā sadā kīrtiḥ tiṣṭhatu me devāḥ cirāya dharaṇī tale tvad prasādāt mahābhāga nāga rāja namaḥ astu te teṣām doṣaiḥ na lipye aham svam svam gamam avāpnuyāt āpeyāḥ mātaraḥ saṃtu jagatām vṛkṣa yonayaḥ apāṃpate rasāya atra yādasām īśvara prabho varuṇa asya āsane kīrtim sanātana namaḥ astu te suvarṇam rajatam dadyāt anaḍvāham payasvinīm dadyāt dhenu dvayam paścāt kuryāt brāhmaṇa tarpaṇam vahni pūjām puraskṛtya mantreṇa prāśayet tatas pitṛrṇām dāpayet arghyam tatas devam prasādayet biṃba mudrām padma mudrām nāga mudrām pradarśayet vaiśvānarāḥ iti ṛcā pūjām kṛtvā vivarjayet yaḥ te prāṇān japan paścāt prakuryāt atha candanam pradakṣiṇam tatas paścāt taḍāgasya śṛṇu dvijāḥ brāhmaṇān puratas kṛtvā veda ghoṣam samuccaran mahā maṅgala pūrveṇa praviśet bhavanam sudhīḥ tatas gṛha arcanam kuryāt brāhmaṇānām ca bhojanam dīnānām kṛpaṇānām ca savitre arghyam nivedayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāge ūnaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śūtaḥ uvāca adhunā madhyamam vakṣye vidhim śāstra anusārataḥ muhūrte kalaśam sthāpya saṃgṛhya gaṇanāyakam sthāpayet prathamam yūpam ā pohiṣṭhā iti mantrakaiḥ devyāḥ tatas paścāt gandha dvāra iti gaṃdhakam śrīsūktena tatas dadyāt puṣpam dūrvā akṣatam tatas kāṇḍāt iti ca mantreṇa tatas dhūpam nivedayet ye gṛhṇāmi iti ca ṛcā pūjāyām sthāpayet tatas vivāha vidhinā sarvam kāryam ca eva adhivāsanam sarvam eva prayuṃjīta taḍāga ādiṣu paṇḍitaḥ adhivāsya taḍāga ādīn ācārya ādīn ca sarvaśas saṃgṛhya gaṃdha puṣpa ādyaiḥ dhūpaiḥ dīpaiḥ su śobhanaiḥ vṛddhiśrāddham tatas kuryāt mātṛ pūjā puraḥsaram alaṃkṛtya yathāśakti ācārya ādīn caret budhaḥ śṛṇuyāt paścime bhāge maṃḍapasya samīpatas madhyadeśe samudbhūtam yajña pātram praśasyate atha vā tatra deśīyam gurum vā śrotriya udbhavam yajñe pradhāna dvitīyam ṛtvij ācāryam eva hi vaitāna kalpe saṃpannam śakti kalpa parāyaṇam nigama jñāna saṃpannam yajñe pātram praśasyate patnī hīnam aputram ca śyāva daṃtam adaṃtakam gaṇānām yājakam ṣaṃḍham sva gotram parivarjayet apradhāneṣu yajñeṣu dāna yajñeṣu sattamāḥ dhanam ādau ca saṃśodhya tatas yajñam samācaret a yājya yājana udbhūtam pallavam vyavahārake kūṭa sākṣyeṇa pallave sthāpya hārakam eva ca haviḥ vikrayaṇam kṛtvā putra bhāryā divikrayī niṃditāni purāṇeṣu yat kṛtam tatra tad phalam yajña sadmani viprān ca na śrāddhān bhojayet kvacid brahman ācārya mukhyaḥ asi saṃsārāt trāhi mām vibho tvad prasādāt guro yajñe prāpnuyām mānasa īpsitam ciram me śāśvatī kīrtiḥ yāvat lokāḥ cara acarāḥ prasīda tvam maheśāna pratiṣṭhā karma siddhaye tvam ādiḥ sarva bhūtānām saṃsāra arṇava tāraka jñāna amṛta prada ācārya viṣṇu rūpa namaḥ astu te brahmāsana samudbhūtam prakāśita digaṃtaram prakīrṇa śāstra saṃbhāra vidhi jña praṇataḥ asmi te jvalat vaiśvānara prakhya dhūma śyāma ālita ānana ṣaṣ aṃga veda tattva jñaḥ ṛtvij mokṣam samācara tatas tūrya ādi ghoṣeṇa puraskṛtya dvijottamān yajamānaḥ sa patnīkaḥ praviśet yāga maṇḍapam pūjayet gandha mālya ādyaiḥ gaṃdha ādyaiḥ su manoharaiḥ nārāyaṇa sva rūpā usau yajñam me saphalam kuru makha śreṣṭheṣu sarveṣu yena maṃtrāḥ su vistṛtāḥ yajñeṣu sākṣī sarveṣu veda veda artha tattva vid ṛgveda jña mahā prājña viśvarūpa namaḥ astu te māṃgalyam karmaṇām nityam śāśvatam brahma rūpiṇam pālayaṃti diśaḥ sarvāḥ vidiśaḥ ca tathā imāḥ dikpāla rūpiṇam vipram yajña siddhyai namāmi aham pātayet dakṣiṇam jānu vikirān vikiret tatas trailokye yāni bhūtāni sthāvarāṇi carāṇi ca brahma viṣṇu śivāḥ sarve rakṣām kurvaṃtu tāni vai vedyāvedī iti maṃtreṇa paṭhet vedim praṇamya ca saṃpūjya gandha puṣpa ādyaiḥ imam maṃtra mudā haret yājanam yajamānaḥ ca śreyasā tatra yājakaḥ idam arghyam idam pādyam dhūpaḥ yam pratigṛhyatām aiśānyām kalaśe devam saṃpūjya gaṇa nāyakam brahmāṇam vāsudevam ca dvitīya kalaśe yajet maṃḍalam ca eva viṣṇuḥ vai dvārakā rūpam āsthitaḥ tena tvām pūjayāmi adya svarga prāptim kuruṣva me pūrva ādi dikṣu kalaśān saṃsthāpya ca trayam trayam ardha pāda savarṇena nirmitam tāraṇam budhaḥ maṃdaram kalpayitvā tu gopīnām ca kulena vā kalaśa upari saṃsthāpya maṃdaram saṃprapūjayet syonā pṛthivī iti maṃtreṇa gaṃdha puṣpaiḥ pṛthigvidhaiḥ prādeśa mātra loham tu raupyeṇa gaṃdhamādanam mṛdā saṃghaṭanaiḥ paścāt kadācana ṛcā yajet kadācana iti maṃtrasya sūryaḥ ṛṣiḥ triṣṭubh chandaḥ sūryaḥ devatā gaṃdhamādana prītaye viniyogaḥ tolaka dvaya mānena yavānām piṣṭaka upari pūjayet pārśva kalaśe dhātṛ ādīn pūrva diś kramāt pūjayet parayā bhaktyā gaṃdha puṣpa akṣata ādinā aṃbā aṃbikā iti maṃtrasya nalinaḥ ṛṣiḥ gāyatrī chandaḥ śaṃbhuḥ devatā jaya prītaye viniyogaḥ gāyatryā pūjayet dakṣe paścimam kalaśa dvayam bhūtaśuddhim tatas kṛtvā nyāsam kṛtvā vidhānataḥ vidhāya arghya ādikam ca eva dharma ādi maṃḍale yajet madhye ādhāra śakti ādīn varuṇam madhyatas yajet pūrva ādi kramataḥ ca eva indra ādīn kuladevatāḥ pārśva dvaye karṇikāyāḥ brahmāṇam ca api anantakam indra abhiṣeka maṃtrasya vādyam gāṃdhāra rāgakam vādyam rāgam ca eva varāṭakam ghanakaṃṭakam asya api vācyam rāgam tu gurjaram rakṣaḥ adhipasya saṃgrāmam vaitālam vādyam ucyate nāṭaka ākhyam tathā rāgam varuṇasya api me śṛṇu vādyam rājya abhiṣeka ākhyam rāgaḥ vasaṃta saṃjñakaḥ īśasya naṃdighoṣa ākhyam vādyam kāmadaḥ suvarṇam duṃdubhiḥ vādyam brahmaṇaḥ kathitaḥ budhaiḥ vādyam gāṃdhāra tāra ākhyam rāgaḥ ca aṅgāravātakaḥ some ghoṣe bhavet vādyam jaleśasya mahātmanaḥ mālava ākhyaḥ bhavet rāgaḥ patra agreṣu mahān api svaiḥ svaiḥ dharmaiḥ ca saṃgṛhya dakṣiṇe pṛthivīm yajet syonā pṛthivī iti maṃtreṇa upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ maṇḍapasya uttare bhāge mahādevam prapūjayet vetālāḥ ca piśācāḥ ca rākṣasāḥ ca sarī sṛpāḥ asmāt prayāṃtu me sthānāt ye ca anye vighna kārakāḥ madhu yuktam pāyasa annam varuṇāya nivedayet pītam ca ālohitam kṛṣṇam śuddham kṛṣṇam ca dhūmrakam pītam śuklam tathā citram śvetam annam yathākramam balayaḥ tu digīśānām grahāṇām api tān śṛṇu kṣīraudanam graheśāya śukla annam śaśine smṛtam lohitānnam ca bhaumāya budhāya kṣīraṣāṣṭikam māṃsaudanam śaneḥ jñeyam rāhoḥ ca kṛṣṇa bhaktakam dhūmra varṇam tu tāmram tu bhaumasya kṣīraṣāṣṭikam piṣṭaka annam śivasya uktam bhūtānām māṣa bhaktakam evam balim vidhāya atha agre kuṃbham niveśayet pradeśa dvyaṅgulam nāma aṣṭottarasahasrakam niśāvāṃchti sūtraiḥ ca saṃveṣṭya pihitam tathā śarāvam ca punar dadyāt vardhanīm pratipūjayet astrāya phaṭ iti maṃtreṇa dhyātvā devam jaleśvaram sūktam yajet yathāśakti śatam aṣṭa uttaram japet kuṃḍeṣu vinyaset nāgān aṣṭau pūrva ādiṣu kramāt anantam pūjayet pūrvam mānena aṃgula mātrakam nirmitam kāṃcanena eva sapta vartikayā sudhīḥ rājatam vāsukim nāgam yajet patra antare punar pāda mātre api ca aṃguṣṭha mātram tāmrasya bhakṣyakam paṃca aṃgulam tolikayā loham karkoṭakam punar vartikābhiḥ ṣoḍaśabhiḥ bṛhat parva pramāṇakam śaṃkhapālam kuśa mayam ardha pādena nirmitam aṃguṣṭha mātram raktena nāgam tālaka mātrakam aṃguṣṭhe tolakam paścāt padma nāgam punar yajet tolaka ardha pramāṇena aṃgulam parimāṇataḥ dhyātvā anaṃtam catur bāhum śukla sapta phaṇa anvitam dakṣiṇa ūrdhva kare śaṃkham adhi cakram pratiṣṭhitam sarva alaṃkāra saṃyuktam evam dhyātvā yathāvidhi sahasra śīrṣa iti maṃtreṇa pūjayitvā balim haret lājaiḥ ca tila saṃmiśraiḥ kṣīra yuktaiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ caturvidham tathā śvetam sarva alaṃkāra saṃyutam svakīyam prajapet tatra āpyāyasva iti vai ṛcā piṇyākam nāgajihvām ca tathā sarjarasam dadhi padmam ṭaṃkam dadhānam ca bhujābhyām nāga sattamam manaḥ unnāḥ iti maṃtreṇa ājyam somaḥ balim haret pañca nadyaḥ iti ṛcā viṣṇukrāntā baliḥ bhavet śarkarā kuṣṭhakam ca eva baliḥ tasya prakī rtitaḥ dvi bhujam śaṃkhapālam ca śaṃkha ābham śaṃkha dhāriṇam padmāsana stham padmābhyām hastābhyām ca varam vibhum maṃtrābhyām pūjayet pṛthak ghaṭaudanam bhṛṃgarājam padmam ca valayaḥ tayoḥ sva gṛhya uktena vidhinā saṃsthāpya agnim kuśaṃḍikām kṛtvā ājyasya saṃskāram vāruṇam śrapayet carum juhuyāt aṣṭa bilvāni digīśānām ghṛtena vai ekaikām āhutim dadyāt grahāṇām ca trayam trayam palāśa samidham paścāt pratiṣṭhām āhuti trayam śivasya paramānnena juhuyāt aṣṭa saṃkhyayā madhu ājya guḍa miśrābhiḥ lājābhiḥ juhuyāt pṛthak lājāni athoktam vitaret ekaikām āhutim kramāt sthālīpākasya juhuyāt ekaikām āhutim punar varuṇam ca samuddiśya rudram sarvam pṛthak pṛthak syonā pṛthivī iti maṃtreṇa vrīhimṛttikayā punar vṛṣān naḥ iti maṃtreṇa kayā naḥ iti vai punar kuśa mūla mṛdā ca eva catuṣpatha mṛdā tathā imāḥ rudra iti maṃtreṇa śrīḥ ca iti ṛcā punar padma khaṇḍasya ca mṛdā snāpayet su samāhitaḥ tat viṣṇoḥ iti maṃtreṇa tathā puṣpa udakena ca tīrtha udakena kṛṣṇena tri raktena tri śītakaiḥ pañca raktena raktānām mṛdā kaiḥ ca kuśa udakaiḥ svarṇa toyaiḥ ca kalaśaiḥ aṣṭottaraśatena tu taijasaiḥ mārttikaiḥ ca api aṣṭāviṃśatibhiḥ tathā dhūḥ asi iti tatas dhūpam hotre ca āhuti dīpakam ca siṃdūram svabhāve raktakam tathā mālatī kusumaiḥ kṛtyaiḥ nāgān saṃsthāpayet tatas dhārābhiḥ śata puṣpābhiḥ gandha toya ādibhiḥ tathā athavā aśvattha patreṣu vaṭa patreṣu vā sudhīḥ maṃḍapasya uttare deśe śayyām nirmāya śobhanām rājatam vāruṇam tasyām pāda mātreṇa nirmitām aṃguṣṭha mātram saṃsthāpya tatas puṣkariṇīm api svarṇa pādena ghaṭitām catur asrām su śobhanām aṃguṣṭha mātram sampūjya varuṇāya nivedayet yathāśakti tatas gām ca saṃbhave pañcaviṃśatiḥ suvarṇam rājatam ca eva dhānyam vāsaḥ varāṭakam nāga yaṣṭim samādāya kiṃcid uttara gām tathā tatas ukṣatāya bhaumāya kṛtvā ca ājya āhuti trayam lājān dadhi samāyuktam ghṛtam madhu guḍam tathā kṣīram ca piṣṭakam ca eva śaṣkulī gandhapuṣpakam paṃcāmṛtam pañcaratnam garbhe dadyāt samāhitaḥ gaṃgā jaleśayoḥ madhye paṃca ghoṣa puraḥsaram dhruvam dhruva iti maṃtreṇa yaṣṭimā maṃtrayet tatas yajña priyā asi devi tvam sarva vighna vināśinī pāhi mām sarva pāpebhyaḥ ātmanā tvam sthirībhava iti āmaṃtrya yajet ca eva gāyatrīm ca paṭhet tatas tathā puṣkariṇīm ca eva vardhanīm kalaśa udaraiḥ aniṣṭam mārjayet nāgān uddhṛtya kalaśam tathā pāṣāṇa abhyaṃtaram kṛtvā gomayaiḥ parilipya ca varuṇam puṣkariṇyām ca jala madhye vinikṣipet atra svāmī bhavān nāga rakṣaṇīyaḥ tvayā janaḥ gāyatreṇa tvā chaṃdasā amīmantram saṃśrāvayet punar saṃpūjya gaṃdha puṣpa ādyaiḥ puratas nikṣipet diśi pidhāya nāga rājānam ṛcābhyām parisūtrakaiḥ san niruddhya āśu saṃsthāpya balim dadyāḥ dvidhānataḥ pūrva bhāge puṣkariṇyām harita ābham sa vajrakam halagrahīta maṃtreṇa nyasya lāja āhutim kule manaḥśilām pravālam ca agnim īḍa iti saṃpaṭhet vaiśvānareṇa mantreṇa paṭhat lāmja āhutim punar dadyāt ye te śata mantreṇa paścime kāṭikam nyaset śāli bījena sahitam kayā naḥ iti maṃtrakam varuṇasya iti maṃtreṇa dadyāt aṣṭādaśa āhutīḥ kuṃkumena samāyuktam kuvidaṃḍam ṛcā paṭhan vinyasya tena maṃtreṇa pradadyāt āhutim punar aiśānyām maṃdrakam raṃgamī śāvā iti saṃpaṭhan saṃsthāpya ājya āhutim dadyāt tam īśānaḥ ṛcā punar āsadyaiḥ maṃtra saṃyuktaiḥ devam nārāyaṇam yajet varuṇa ātmakam tatas dhyātvā tatas nīrājanam paṭhet jānubhyām avanim gatvā paṭhet jñāna amṛtam stavam dharmaḥ vaṃśam tatas kuryāt utsarga aṃte vidhīyate tatas devīm punar kṛtvā dattvā puṣpa añjali trayam utsṛṣṭam sarva sattvebhyaḥ dṛśyate jalam ūrjitam ramaṃtīm sarva bhūtāni snāna pāna avagāhanaiḥ varuṇam ca tatas devam puṣkariṇyām ca nikṣipet pakṣiṇaḥ ca śubhān tatra bhekam kūrmam ca kardamam śaivālam prakṣipet ca eva dakṣiṇām tad anantaram suvarṇam dhānya ratnam ca ācāryāya pṛthak dadet ṛtvigbhyaḥ ca pṛthak dadyāt yathā vitta anusārataḥ nityam samāpya vidhivat dadyāt pūrṇāhutim punar dadyāt arghyam ca sūryāya hastāsaḥ iti saṃjapan tatas pradakṣiṇa āvartam saṃveṣṭya kṣīra dhārayā prāsāda pakṣe prāsādam ārāme atha maṃḍapam śata adhidhārayā śaktyā tri vāram brāhmaṇaiḥ saha vikīrya lāja kusumam vrīhīḥ ca eva kapardakān yajamānaḥ sa patnīkaḥ praviśet sva gṛham punar tatas gṛha arcanam kṛtvā brāhmaṇān atha bhojayet kumārīḥ ca kumārān ca dīna andha kṛpaṇān api nārāyaṇam tatas dadyāt vipram uddiśya bhaktitaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāga viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ cha iti madhyama parvaṇi dvitīya bhāgaḥ samāptaḥ viṣaya anukramaṇikā upavana ādi pratiṣṭhā varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca ārāma ādau viśeṣaḥ yaḥ vakṣyate atra mayā adhunā maṃḍalam kārayitvā tu catur asram samam śubham aiśānyām kalaśe devam tatra nātham prapūjayet madhyame kalaśe pūjā grahāṇām ca tatas param sva dikṣu dvāra deśe tu paścima dvāra deśayoḥ brahmāṇam ca api anantam ca madhyatas varuṇam yajet varuṇam ca uda kumbha stham bhūta śākhāsu śobhanam tena ca āvāhayāmi tvām vibho svargāya vai bhava pūrva gam mandaram sthāpya toraṇa upari sattamāḥ karṇikāyām vāsudevam śuddha sphaṭika sannibham śrīvatsa kaustubha uraskam mukuṭa ādyaiḥ alaṃkṛtam dakṣiṇe kamalā tasya vāme puṣṭi vyavasthitiḥ siddha kinnara yakṣa ādyaiḥ stūyamānam sura asuraiḥ saṃpūjya vidhivat bhaktyā viṣṇoḥ arāṭaḥ iti ṛcā dale saṃkarṣaṇa ādīn ca vimalā ādyāḥ ca nāyikāḥ saṃpūjya dhūpa dīpa ādyaiḥ upahāraiḥ anuttamaiḥ dhyāyet somam karṇikāyām dakṣiṇe padma saṃsthitam śukla ābham dvi bhujam śāntam keyūra ādi upaśobhitam praśasyam deva yakṣāṇām vara da abhaya hastakam imam devāḥ iti ṛcā upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ pūjayet ca niśānātham ghṛta bhaktam nivedayet indram jayantam ākāśam varuṇam ca agnim eva ca īśānam tatpuruṣam ca eva vāyum pūrva ādi dikṣu api karṇikāyāḥ vāma bhāge vara da abhaya hastakam dvi bhujam śukla varṇam ca mahādevam prapūjayet tryaṃbakeṇa ca maṃtreṇa dadyāt ca ghṛta piṣṭakam vāsudevāya devāya juhuyāt aṣṭau āhutīḥ paramānnena saumyasya juhuyāt aṣṭaviṃśatim gaṇeśasya tathā ājyena dadet eka āhutim budhaḥ brahmaṇaḥ varuṇasya atha ekaikām āhutim tathā grahāṇām sva ukta samidhā digīśānām pṛthak pṛthak ekaikām āhutim dadyāt ājyena ca yathākram karālī dhūmalī śvetā lohitā kanakaprabhā tāsām maṃtrāḥ krameṇa eva bindavaḥ yakāra sthāḥ ca vijñeyāḥ aṣṭa svara vibhūṣitāḥ ekaikām āhutim dadyāt dattvā ca eva samāhitaḥ agnīṣomam tathā indram ca pṛthivīm antarikṣakam sthālīpākena juhuyāt madhu kṣīra yava anvitam ekaikām āhutim teṣām samuddiśya pṛthak pṛthak japasva tvam mahābhāga śraddhayā ca eva vāgyataḥ maṅgalam paramānnam ca saura sūktam tathā japet tatas saṃmṛjya vidhinā snāpayitvā yathāvidhi yūpam garbhe vinikṣipya tatra kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ dhvajān āropya prāṃteṣu dadyāt somam vanaspatim ko adāt iti paṭhitvā ca vṛkṣāṇām karṇa vedhanam sūcyā su tīkṣṇayā kāryam dvi pātre vāma dakṣiṇe nava grahāṇām tṛpti artham yāvakam laḍḍukam tathā piṣṭakam ca pṛthak dadyāt kumārī bālakeṣu ca niśā raṃjita sūtreṇa saṃveṣṭya ca sa cūrṇakam pradadyāt dohakam ca eva vṛkṣāṇām vidhi pūrvakam prāśayet ca eva tān vṛkṣān imam mantram udāharet vṛkṣa agrāt patitasya api ārohāt patitasya ca maraṇe vā asthibhaṅge vā kartā pāpaiḥ na lipyate dhenum suvarṇam dhānyam ca ācāryāya pradakṣiṇam dattvā ca ṛtvije dadyāt suvarṇam rajatam tathā dhānyam ca brahmaṇe dadyāt ghṛta bhojyam sa śarkaram iṣṭām ca dakṣiṇām dadyāt sadasyāya tathā eva ca adhi kalaśam samānīya snānam kuryāt vidhānataḥ kṛtvā ca eva aniśam kuryāt dadyāt pūrṇāhutim tathā sarva oṣadhi udakam prokṣya tri vāram kṣīra dhārayā saṃveṣṭya tris catur vāram brahmaghoṣa puraḥsaram taṃtau viśeṣam vakṣyāmi varāḥ eva idam iti ṛcā balam kāmam hayagrīvam mādhavam puruṣottamam vāsudevam dhanādhyakṣam tatas nārāyaṇam yajet evam saṃpūjya vidhinā dakṣiṇe pṛthivīm yajet śuddha kāṃñcana varṇa ābhām vara abhaya karām śubhām maṃḍūka sthām ca dvi bhujām sarva alaṅkāra sundarīm syonā pṛthivī iti mantreṇa pūjayitvā yathāvidhi pāyasam madhu saṃyuktam balim dadyāt sa śarkaram vāmatas viśvakarmāṇam śuddha sphaṭika saṃnibham śūla ṭaṃka dharam śāṃtam saṃyajet upacārakaiḥ viśvan iti ṛcā tam ca balim ca madhu piṣṭakam dadyāt japet ca kauṣmāṇḍam sūktam pauruṣam eva ca ekaikam homayet paścāt pṛthivī homa karmaṇi picchile patitānām ca ucchritena aṃga saṃgataḥ ye ca atra prāṇinaḥ saṃti rakṣām kurvati setavaḥ gartam kṛtvā pañcaratnam saṃsthāpyam tad anantaram saṃsthāpya ca tatas yūpam saṃpūjya ca yathāvidhi ācāryāya tatas dadyāt iṣṭām ca vara dakṣiṇām pūjayet dvija dāṃpatyam lājābhiḥ paripūjitam poṭikām ca tatas śayyām dadyāt iṣṭa artha siddhaye setau vṛkṣa sthitāḥ ye syuḥ ropayet kadalīm śubhām teṣām pārśva dvaye pi evam ārāme ca pṛthak pṛthak iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhya ma parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ go pracāra vaiśiṣṭya varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca go pracāram punar vakṣye viśeṣam tatra me śṛṇu yajet viṣṇum sa la kṣmīkam upacāraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ upacāraiḥ ca brahmāṇam rudram ca eva karālikām varāham soma sūrye ca mahādevam yathākramam homam ca eva yathā viṣṇoḥ kamalāyāḥ trayam trayam ājyena kṣetrapālānām anyeṣām madhu miśritaiḥ ekaikām āhutim dadyāt lāja ādiṣu pṛthak pṛthak samutsṛjya vidhānena yūpam saṃsthāpya pūjayet tri hasta māttram racitam kuryāt nāga phaṇa anvitam lājā saṃyukta vidhinā viśveṣām iti sañjapan mayi gṛbhṇāmi iti sampūjya yūpam ca rudra daivatam saṃpūjya rudram pañcāṃgam dhānyam vastram ca dakṣiṇām ācāryāya tathā hotre anyeṣām iṣṭa dakṣiṇām go pracāre ca śaileyam yūpam hasta dvaya anvitam pañca śīrṣa anvitam kuryāt hasta mātram praropayet yūpam ca caitravṛkṣam ca kuṇḍalī maṭha pīṭhikām saṃspṛśya ācamya vai viprāḥ prāṇāyāmena śudhyati catur hasta pramāṇena śata kuṇḍena saṃmitam tad ardham ca kaniṣṭhena aṣṭaka aṣṭa adhikam bhavet śiva lokaḥ tathā gāvaḥ sarva deva su pūjitāḥ gobhyaḥ eṣā mayā bhūmiḥ sampradattā śubha arthinā yāvaṃti tṛṇa gulmāni saṃti bhūmau śubhāni ca pūrve sīmām nibadhnīyāt kṛtvā vṛkṣasya ropaṇam setum kṛtvā dakṣiṇatas paścima iṃgāra ropaṇam uttare khānayet kūpam tasya sīmām na laṃghayeta tatas sahasradhārām ca śasyena paripūritām na kuryāt agni digbhāge dakṣiṇām vā tatas śubhām kulāni pātayati āśu brahmahatyāḥ ca viṃdati yāvat tṛṇāni tad bhūmau sapta saṃkhyāni saṃkhyayā tāvatkālam vaset svarge viṣṇu lokāt na tad cyutiḥ vṛṣotsargāḥ vasāne tu pradadyāt yaḥ mahīm dvijāḥ na yāti viprāḥ preta tvam tasmāt viprāt amatsarāḥ tatra mānam pṛthak ca eva śṛṇuta atra samāgatāḥ gavām śatam vṛṣaḥ ca ekaḥ yatra tiṣṭhati a yaṃtritaḥ sīmā atīte na asti pātakam maṇḍapam pūjayet sūryam vāsudeva samanvitam homaḥ tila guḍābhyām ca aṣṭau aṣṭau pṛthak pṛthak yatna siddham tatas kṛtvā śulka ghaṭa catuṣṭayam samutsṛjet japet paścāt sauram sūktam ca vaiṣṇavam vaṭa patre tu saṃlikhya citram nirmāya vā punar dikpālān saṃnyaset svāsu svāsu dikṣu vicakṣaṇaḥ baddhāñjaliḥ paṭhet maṃtrān iṃdra ādīnām yathākramam dharma saṃsthāpana arthāya ātmanaḥ vibhavāya ca bho vahne meṣa vāhaḥ tvam catur śṛṃga virājita anātham maṇḍapam tvam hi dharmataḥ trātum arhasi yama tvam dakṣiṇa āśā īśa mahā mahiṣa vāhana anātham maṇḍapam tvam hi dharmataḥ trātum arhasi mañca sthaḥ rākṣasa indraḥ tvam khaḍga pāṇiḥ mahā balaḥ anātham maṇḍapam tvam hi dharmataḥ trātum arhasi vāri rāj dhvaja hastaḥ asi pavanaḥ mṛga vāhanaḥ anātham maṇḍapam tvam hi dharmataḥ trātum arhasi anātham maṇḍapam tvam hi dharmataḥ trātum arhasi ādidevaḥ asi devānām kartā hartā maheśvaraḥ anātham maṇḍapam tvam hi dharmataḥ trātum arhasi anaṃtaḥ nāga rājaḥ yaḥ dharām uddhṛtya tiṣṭhati anātham maṇḍapam tvam hi dharmataḥ srātum arhasi caturṇām eva varṇānām sthiti artham mṛga pakṣiṇām prītaye vāsudevasya evam maṇḍapam utsṛjet bhagne stambhe tṛṇe jīrṇe punar tṛṇa pradāpane sthāpane ca tathā eva asya pratiṣṭhā syāt yathā akṣayā ghāta apāya ādi doṣeṇa mriyaṃte yadi jantavaḥ pratiṣṭhāyām kṛtāyām tu dharmaḥ me syāt na pātakam mānuṣāḥ paśavaḥ ye ca nivasanti iha maṇḍape svasti ca astu sadā teṣām tvad prasādāt kila prabho tatas triguṇa sūtreṇa su trāmāṇā iti vai ṛcā saptadhā veṣṭayitvā tu dakṣiṇām saṃprakāśya ca maṇḍape bhojayet viprān teṣām dadyāt yathā īpsitān dīnebhyaḥ ca pṛthak dadyāt gṛham vipra puraḥsaram praviśet tūrya ghoṣeṇa prakuryāt ca gṛha arcanam evam prapāyām vijñeyaḥ viśeṣaḥ varuṇam vrajet vāsudevena sahitam sa aṃga upāṃgam sa dakṣiṇam sthālīpāka vidhānena prakuryāt deśika uttamaḥ ācāryāya gṛham dadyāt pariccheda samanvitam ṛtvije tāmra pātram ca jala pūrṇam ca dhānyakam dikpālān dvāra deśe tu kūpa yāge viśeṣataḥ brahmāṇam nāga rājānam dvārapālau ca paścime bali dānam vidhānena kṛtvā dadyāt yathāvidhi patākānām atas tattvam pravakṣyāmi yathākramam vajrī ca dhūmalī kṛṣṇā pītā ca eva atha vāruṇī śīghrā gaurī umā ca eva pītā śuklā prakīrtitā kuṃbheṣu pūjayet devān maheśam prathamam budhaḥ grahān ca madhya kalaśe brahmāṇam ca tatas param dakṣiṇe kalaśe viṣṇum karṇikāyām jaleśvaram saṃpūjya vaṭa patre ca nāgān saṃlikhya nāga jaiḥ yaḥ nāgāḥ tān pravakṣyāmi anaṃtaḥ vāsukiḥ tathā puṃḍarīka dala ābhāsa śubha karṇa aṃta locana phaṇā sahasra saṃyukta śaṃkha abja kṛta locana sarva nāgasya śūrasya kṛta svastika lāṃchana śaṃkhapālaḥ iti khyāta jalādhāra pratīkṣaka ati pīta suvarṇa ābha candra ardha aṃkita mastaka dīpta bhoga kṛta āṭopa śubha lakṣaṇa lakṣita yaḥ suvarṇena varṇena padma patra āyata īkṣaṇaḥ paṃcabiṃdu kṛta ābhogaḥ grīvāyām eka śekharaḥ nāginyaḥ nāga kanyāḥ ca tathā nāga kumārakāḥ sarve te prīta manasaḥ pūjām gṛhṇaṃtu me sadā sva gṛhya uktena vidhinā kṛtvā agni sthāpanam budhaḥ ājyam saṃskṛtya juhuyāt digīśānām yathākramam āditya ādi grahān ca eva brahmāṇam kṛṣṇam eva ca madhu piṣṭena ca śivam varuṇam juhuyāt tatas prādeśa mātram saṃprokṣya yūpam ca asya pramāṇakam catur asram śūla yuktam gaṇān ānīya pūjayet kūpe nikṣipya tān nāgān pañcaratnam kṣipet tatas su trāmāṇā iti maṃtreṇa tridhā saṃveṣṭya sūtrakaiḥ rañjitaḥ kadalī vṛkṣam varuṇāya samutsṛjet trātāram iti maṃtreṇa vastra mālyena bhūṣayet karṇa vedham tatas kṛtvā utsṛjet vākyam uccaran om adya ityādi sarva bhūtebhyaḥ phala puṣpa patra chāyā āvṛta mukhya nānā taru viracitam ārāmam vanaspati devatam su pūjitam vedavyāsa ādi ukta phala avāptaye amuka ṛṣi sagotraḥ amuka deva śarma aham utsṛje mahā utsavam tatas kuryāt kṛtvā baddhāñjaliḥ paṭhet vṛkṣa agrāt patitasya api ārohāt patitasya vā maraṇe ca asthi bhaṃge vā kartā pāpaiḥ na lipyate vajra āghāta ādi doṣeṇa mriyaṃte taravaḥ yadā tad dośamana arthāya tasya api etat pratiṣṭhitam madhye yūpam samāropya yatnataḥ madhu lāja akṣatam dadyāt añjanam mālyam eva ca niśā sūtreṇa saṃveṣṭya kadalī viṭapam nyaset veṣṭayet kṣīra dhārām ca pātayet ghṛta dhārayā toya anvitam guccha yuktam veṣṭayet sva gṛham vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhā varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhām ca vakṣye vai dvijasattamāḥ sthāpayet kalaśam tatra viṣṇum somam samarcayet ācārya mātram varayet niśā sūtraiḥ praveṣṭayet vṛkṣān mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtya bhūṣayet bhūṣaṇa ādinā karṇa vedham tatas kṛtvā utsṛjet vākya pūrvakam dadyāt yūpam madhya deśe ropayet kadalīm tatas raṃbhāḥ ca ropayet dikṣu sthālīpāka vidhānataḥ aṣṭau aṣṭau ca juhuyāt anyeṣām ca ghṛtena tu ekaikām āhutim dadyāt sviṣṭakṛt tad anantaram dakṣiṇām ca tatas dadyāt pūrṇām dattvā āhutim vrajet eka ādi vṛkṣam vṛkṣāṇām vidhim vakṣye dvijottamāḥ vṛkṣa mūle yajet dharmam pṛthivī ca viśam tathā digīśān ca tathā yakṣān ācāryam toṣayet tatas dhenum ca dakṣiṇām dadyāt dohadam vṛkṣa pūjanam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge tṛtīyaḥ a dhyāyaḥ kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhā varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca atha aśvattha pratiṣṭhāyām mūle bāhu pramāṇake sthaṃḍilam kārayet tatra caṃdanena ukṣitam tathā pūrvedyu rātri samaye tat viṣṇoḥ iti vai ṛcā sthāpayet vāriṇā pūrṇam kayā nā iti ca gandhakam dadyāt dūrvā akṣatam kalpe brāhmaṇa traya bhojanam kārayet sita sūtraiḥ ca veṣṭayet candana ukṣitaiḥ kuṃbhe vināyakam pūjya brahmāṇam ca pare ghaṭam sva dikṣu dikpatīn ca eva vṛkṣa mūle nava grahān maṃḍale śivam abhyarcya pīṭha pūjā puraḥsaram atha dhyānam pravakṣyāmi śvetam vṛṣabham eva ca dvi bhujam śūla hastam ca sarva ābharaṇa saṃyutam āropayet sva sāmarthyāt bhūtaśuddhim samācaret tatas arghya pātram kṛtvā tu pīṭha pūjām samācaret gaṇeśam guru pādam ca jayam bhadram samāhitaḥ madhye ādhāra śaktim ca kūrma anaṃtau sa padmakau candra sūrya agnika ādīnām maṃḍalāni kramāt yajet punar pātra aṃtara stham ca gṛhītvā kusumam budhaḥ pāṇikacchapikām kṛtvā dhyāyet vai varuṇam tathā madhuparkam ca āsanam ca pṛcchet ca svāgatam punar mudrām pradarśya vidhivat aṃga pūjām samācaret pūrva ādi patre indra ādīn brahmāṇam madhyatas yajet anaṃtam puratas ca eva teṣām astrāṇi tad bahis madhye toya adhipam rudram śāṃtam ca eva praśāṃtakam kāmam dharmam adharmam ca dikṣu nārā yaṇam śivam nairṛte ca yajet durgām pārśvayoḥ ca śatakratum vināyakam ca viṣṇum ca gaṅgām pṛthivi ṣaṣṭikam ṣoḍaśena upacāreṇa pūjayet ca viśeṣataḥ maṃḍalasya uttare bhāge nāga rūpam anaṃtakam paṃca kṛṣṇālakaiḥ kuryāt bṛhat parva pramāṇakam āropayet ca akṣata ādyaiḥ śveta candana puṣpakaiḥ varuṇam juhuyāt pūrvam madhunā pāyasena vā tila akṣataiḥ vā ājyaiḥ vā trimadhu aktaiḥ atha api vā aṣṭottaraśatam kuryāt digīśānām ghṛtena tu ekaikām āhutim dadyāt puṣpaiḥ tila ghṛtena ca nārāyaṇam śivam durgām gaṇeśam ca grahān niśi aṣṭau aṣṭau ca juhuyāt ghṛtaiḥ eka āhutiḥ bhaveta brahmā ayudhvānam iti maṃtreṇa brahmāṇam pāyasena tu eka āhutim tatas dadyāt āpohiṣṭhā iti vā tribhiḥ imam varuṇaḥ iti vā ṛcā punar vātasya yam iti punar pañca varṇam yathākramāt tatas sviṣṭakṛte dadyāt balim dadyāt anukramāt madhu ājya pāyasam dadyāt varuṇāya viśeṣataḥ yava kṣīram digīśebhyaḥ hi anyebhyaḥ pāyasena tu nāgāya piṣṭakam dadyāt lājā homa aṣṭakam punar aṣṭa aṣṭāpada mānena varuṇam rājatena tu kuryāt pūrva dvayena api bāṇa ratti suvarṇakaiḥ kuryāt puṣkariṇīm tatra pūrva ardhe caturasrake varuṇam vinyaset tatra tathā puṣkariṇīm api om adya ityādi viṣṇu rūpāya karuṇāya śruti rati ādi ukta vedavyāsa sapraṇīta agniṣṭoma phala prāptaye puṣkariṇī pratiṣṭhā karmaṇi imām puṣkariṇīm suvarṇa rājatām sva gṛhya uditām sa alaṃkārām su pūjitām amuka gotraḥ amuka deva śarmā tubhyam aham saṃpradade iti utsarga vākyam om adya ityādi brāhmaṇa mukhyebhyaḥ mama agniṣṭoma ādi aneka phala prāptaye imam jalāśayam varuṇa daivatam su pūjitam caturmukha sahitam catur sattva avac pūrva avasthāyinīm yaṣṭim samāropya vidhānataḥ puṣkariṇyā samam tena nāga yaṣṭi aṃtare kṣipet tatra eva ananta nāgam ca maṃtram etat udīrayet puṃḍarīka dala ābhāsa śubha rakta aṃta locana dakṣiṇām ca tatas dadyāt tatas pūrṇām vidhāya ca mocayet makarān grāhān mīna kūrmān jalecarān puṣkariṇyām ca tris kuryāt khātam sarva pradakṣiṇām āditya adhyāyakam japtvā kṣipet lāja kapardakān pātayet kṣīra dhārām ca sahasreṇa śatena ca sūtreṇa veṣṭayet prājñaḥ raktena ca catuṣkramāt pathi saṃtoṣayet dīnān saṃtoṣya ca gṛham vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ sarovara ādi pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca nalinyāḥ ca tathā vāpyāḥ hradasya dvijasattamāḥ vidhim vakṣye saha aṅgena vidhānam śṛṇuta dvijāḥ āpohiṣṭhā iti mantreṇa tathā astraiḥ śataiḥ api sva maṇḍale śubhe sthāne viśet pūrva mukhena tu gaṇeśam varuṇam ca eva ghaṭe saṃpūjayet śivam vāgīśam ca tathā viṣṇum sūrye kuṃbhe samarcayet pāyasena āhutim dadyāt varuṇāya ghṛtena ca ekaikām āhutim dadyāt anyeṣām ca sruveṇa ca yūpam niveśayet paścāt dadyāt dhenum ca dakṣiṇām pūrṇam dadyāt savitre arghyam dattvā tu sva gṛham vrajet ārāmasya vidhim vakṣye pratiṣṭhā vidhi vistaram hīnārāmasya ca tathā eka vṛkṣasya ca dvijāḥ araṇya madhye pāścātye uttare vā viśeṣataḥ maṃḍapam vartulam kuryāt arghya hasta pramāṇakam tad dakṣiṇe bhavet kuṃḍam catur asram samam śubham maṃdara ādikam āvāhya tatas saṃpūjayet kramāt bhṛgum karṇa samārūḍham sarva bhūṣaṇa bhūṣitam viṣvaksenasya maṃtraḥ yam pūjāyām ca eva sarvatas dvārapālam ca saṃpūrṇam gaurī ādīn kalaśeṣu ca svāsu dikṣu digīśānām bali puṣpa akṣata ādi nā vedi pārśve tatas gatvā vedim āvāhya pūjayet āsanam kalpayitvā tu sāmānya arghyam vidhāya ca aiśāne kalaśe vidyut brahmāṇam ca tathā grahān maḍala īśam vāsudevam sa āsanam ca bṛhaspatim pūjayet parayā bhaktyā pāyasa annam balim haret dhyātvā āropayet evam bāla ādīn atha nāyakān vimalā ādyāḥ nāyikāḥ ca digīśān ca yathāvidhi ṣoḍaśa uccais pṛthak rūpaiḥ prati puṣpa aṃjali kramāt paritas pūjayet viṣṇum śivam durgām sarasvatīm śuddha sphaṭika saṃkāśam dhyāyet somam caturmukham aśva ārūḍham divya rūpam padma akṣam dhṛta puṣpakam śvetam vanaspatim dhyāyet dvi bhujam pīta vāsasam sva ratha stham mahā bāhum śaṃkha aṃkuśa sa kheṭakam daśa svara anvitam toyam svabhāvam tamasā anvitam maṃtraḥ ayam devadevasya pūjāyām viniyojayet nīlam jayam bhṛṃgiṇam ca paritas ca yathākramāt tatas kuśa kaṃḍikām kṛtvā sthālīpākam vidhānataḥ aṣṭottaraśatam ca eva somāya dvādaśa āhutīḥ vānaspateḥ tathā aṣṭau ca ājye anyeṣām vidhīyatām ekaikām āhutim dadyāt sapta jihvām anantaram vāstoṣpataye iti maṃtreṇa sthālīpāka dvayam nayet vṛkṣa ādīn sthāpayet pūrve gāyatryā prathamam budhaḥ abjaiḥ agram kāṃsya vastram ratnam dikṣu yathākramam brīhayaḥ ca iti maṃtreṇa tathā ca saritaḥ ca me mitra trayaḥ ca iti tathā pūṣā ca me ṛcā tathā saṃsthāpya vrīhīn saṃvāpya tatra eva vidhi pūrvakam saṃsthāpya yajamānam ca surāḥ tvām iti mantrakaiḥ ācāryam ātmane tatra saṃsthitam dvija puṃgavaiḥ samāpya nitya vidhinā ācāryāya atha ca dakṣiṇām dhenum ca loha pātram ca dattvā iṣṭām ca dakṣiṇām brāhmaṇebhyaḥ yathāśakti dadyāt pūrṇām gṛham vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge paṃcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhā varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca kṣudra ārāma pratiṣṭhām ca vakṣye ca dvijasattama amaṃḍale śubhe sthāne sthāpayet kalaśam tatra somam viṣṇum samarcayet ācārya mātram varayet niśā sūtraiḥ praveṣṭayet vṛkṣān mālyaiḥ alaṃkṛtya bhūṣayet bhūṣaṇa ādinā bhojayet paṃca viprān ca viśeṣataḥ karṇavedham tatas kṛtvā utsṛjet vā āsya pūrvakam dadyāt yūpam madhya deśe ropayet kadalīm tatas raṃbhām ca ropayet dikṣu sthālīpāka vidhānataḥ aṣṭau aṣṭau ca juhuyāt anyeṣām ca ghṛtena tu ekaikām āhutim dadyāt sviṣṭakṛt tad anantaram dakṣiṇām ca tatas dadyāt pūrṇām dadyāt gṛham vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ śreṣṭha vṛkṣa pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca eka ādi varavṛkṣāṇām vidhim vakṣye dvijottamāḥ vṛkṣasya paścime bhāge sthāpayet kalaśam tatas vṛkṣam saṃsthāpayet pūrvam sūtreṇa pariveṣṭayet brahmāṇam kalaśebhyaḥ ca somam viṣṇum vanaspatim vṛkṣa mūle yajet dharmam pṛthivīm ca viśam tathā digīśān ca tathā yakṣān na ācāryam toṣayet tatas dhenum ca dakṣiṇām dadyāt dohadam vṛkṣa pūjanam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca atha aśvattha pratiṣṭhāyām mūle bāhu pramāṇakam sthaṇḍilam kārayet tatra caṃdanena aṅkitam yathā pūrvedyu rātri samaye tat viṣṇoḥ iti vai ṛcā sthāpayet vāriṇā pūrṇam kayā nā iti ca gaṃdhakam gaṃdha dvāra iti tailena śrīḥ ca tā iti ca caṃdanam dadyāt dūrvā akṣatam kalye brāhmaṇa traya bhojanam kārayet sita sūtraiḥ ca veṣṭayet caṃdanasya ca kumbhe vināyakam pūjya brahmāṇam ca pare ghaṭe sva dikṣu dikpatīn ca api vṛkṣa mūle nava grahān maṃḍale śivam abhyarcyam pīṭha pūjā puraḥsaram pūrve caṃḍam pracaṃḍam ca dakṣiṇe naṃdi bhṛṃgiṇau anaṃtam paścime kāmam uttare gaṇanāyakam kārtikeyam madhyadeśe ādhāra śakti pūrvakam anaṃtam pṛthivīm ca eva trivṛt tam ca tri maṃḍalam atha dhyānam pravakṣyāmi śvetam vṛṣabham eva ca dvi bhujam śūla hastam ca sarva ābharaṇa saṃyutam āropayet svataṃtreṇa mūle viṣṇum samarcayet śaṃkaram ca tathā madhye agre brahmāṇakam yajet balim ca piṣṭaka annam ca dattvā ca śrapayet carum anyeṣām ca sruveṇa eva homam dadyāt prayatnataḥ ropayet kadalī vṛkṣam ācāryam paritoṣayet kṛtvā pūrṇām paṃca dhārām kṛtvā ca api pradakṣiṇām kṣīra dhārām ca saṃpādya arghyam dattvā gṛham vrajet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ vaṭa pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca vaṭa sthānam atho vakṣye tasya mūle tu dakṣiṇe gaṇeśam ca śivam viṣṇum pūjayitvā hunet carum yava kṣīra balim dadyāt utsṛjet vākyam uccaran yūpam āropayet paścāt vaṭa mūlaiḥ samarpayet yakṣān nāgān ca gaṃdharvān siddhān ca eva marut gaṇān iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge navamaḥ adhyāyaḥ bilva pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca vakṣye bilva pratiṣṭhām ca pūrvedyus adhivāsayet tryaṃbakam ca iti maṃtreṇa sthāpayet gandha vāriṇā sunābha iti ca maṃtreṇa me gṛhṇāmi iti ca akṣatam tatas dhūpam vastram mālyam nivedayet niśā raktena vā kuryāt aṣṭa patram su śobhanam niveṣṭanam tatas kuryāt vṛkṣasya dvijasattamāḥ vrīhīn ca vāpayet tatra uttara abhimukhaḥ tathā śivam viṣṇum ca brahmāṇam pūjayet bhūtim icchatā śivam ca nāyakam kuryāt ādityān patra mūlake śeṣam ca taru mūle tu madhye anaṃtam śatakratum vanapālam ca somam ca sūryam pṛdhvīm anukramāt homaḥ tila akṣataiḥ kāryaḥ balim dadyāt ghṛta odanaiḥ yakṣebhyaḥ māṣa bhaktam ca vāyanāni ca dvādaśa grahāṇām prītaye dadyāt kṣīreṇa āveṣṭya dakṣiṇām kāṃcanam kāṃsya pātram ca tāṃbūlam tāmra pātrakam atha rātri pratiṣṭhām ca vakṣye śāstra anusārataḥ yakṣa eka vṛkṣa saṃskāre na punar jāyate bhuvi pūrvedyus upavāhe tu vṛkṣa mūle ghaṭam nyaset viṣṇum śivam gaṇeśam ca pūjayitvā tu sthāpayet kalaśān pañca vā sapta gaṃdha tailaiḥ alaṃkṛtān sūtraiḥ saṃveṣṭanam kṛtvā vastra mālyaiḥ anaṃtaram kāṃḍāt iti ca maṃtreṇa dadyāt dūrvā kṣatam tatas viṣṇusūktena ca punar siṃdūra aṃjana caṃdanam hunet paṃca āhutīḥ tatra yūpam dadyāt samutsṛjet veṣṭayet kṣīra toyena dhānyam dhenum ca dakṣiṇām dadyāt arghyam hunet pūrṇam bhojayet dvija daṃpatī iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca śata hasta mitām muṣṭim nānā taru vibhūṣitām pūga āmra ādi phalaiḥ yuktam vāstum kṛtvā yajet tu yaḥ ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi svarga loke vaset ciram tad vidhānam pravakṣyāmi yathā śāstra anusārataḥ agni kāryam tatas kṛtvā dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ maṇḍapa pratiṣṭhā vidhāna varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca pratiṣṭhām maṃḍapasya eva śailadāru mayasya ca tṛṇa kāṣṭhasya ca vibho tṛṇavat tasya ca dvijāḥ sūryam somam tathā viṣṇum kalaśe tu samarcayet prokṣayet kuśa toyena āpohiṣṭhā iti vai ṛcā ākṛṣṇena iti tailena śrīḥ ca te iti caṃdanam siṃdūra alaktakam dadyāt añjanam pūrvayā saha tatas prabhāte vimale śrāddham vṛddhi ātmakam caret dikpālān ca eva vinyasya maṃḍape śubha lakṣaṇe sūryam āvāhayet tatra somam viṣṇum ca pārśvayoḥ gaṇeśam ca grahān ca eva dikpālān ca ghaṭe arcayet pāyasam juhuyāt agnau aṣṭottaraśatam tathā ādityasya tathā viṣṇoḥ somasya dvādaśa āhutīḥ balim ca pāyasam dadyāt tailam kṣīram atha api vā jānubhyām avanim gatvā śanais oṣṭham na cālayet tatas śveta ghaṭam dadyāt maṇḍapa upari sattamāḥ triguṇena niśā aktaiḥ vā veṣṭayet vāri dhārayā dakṣiṇām vidhivat dadyāt sūryāya arghyam nivedayet tṛṇa veśmani vai sūryam vāsudeva samanvitam ghaṭe gaṇeśam vara dam varam kṛtvā samutsṛjet aiśānyām dāpayet yūpam dhvajān dikṣu prakalpayet prapāyām varuṇaḥ pūjyaḥ viśvakarmā prayatnataḥ pṛthivīm ca gaṇeśam ca pūjayitvā hunet ghṛtam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ mahā yūpa nirmāṇa pratiṣṭhā varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca catur hastam mahā yūpam hasta ṣoḍaśa nirmitam vakṣye tam ca pratiṣṭhām ca rātrau trairātrikam yajet varuṇam sita kuṃbhe ca prapā kūpasya paścime gāyatryā snāpayet pūrva mā apohiṣṭhā iti vai kramāt gaṃdha dvāra iti gandham ca aṃśunā ca iti tailakam ādau śrāddham na kartavyam pratiṣṭhā ante vidhīyate daṃpatī bhojanam kuryāt varayet eka brāhmaṇam maṃḍape ca aṣṭa haste ca kalaśam tatra vinyaset pūjayet varuṇam devam nārāyaṇa samanvitam śivam ca pṛthivīm ca eva svaiḥ svaiḥ mantraiḥ yathākramāt tatas kuśa kaṃḍikām kṛtvā sthālīpāka vidhānataḥ varuṇam ca samabhyarcya juhuyāt āhutīḥ daśa anyeṣām ca sruveṇa eva dadyāt eka āhutim kramāt varuṇasya ukta varuṇam tat tvā yāmi tatas param varuṇasya uttaṃbhanam asi iti ca ābhyām devān tathā eva ca yena a pāvaka cakṣasā paṃcamam samudāhṛtam tatas sviṣṭakṛtam kṛtvā saptajihvam carum nayet iha vā ityādikam paṃca tatas paṃcāhutim hunet śaṃbhave ca pṛthivyai ca mahārājāya ca kramāt śaṃkarāya ca rudrāya śarvāya paśupataye iti ca mahādevāya ca punar īśānāya iti ca kramāt vākya pūrvam sṛjet toyam tatra vāc karaṇam śṛṇu dakṣiṇām vidhivat dadyāt gām ca dadyāt payasvinīm maṃḍape kṣudra kūpe ca pratiṣṭhām śṛṇuta dvijāḥ gaṇeśam varuṇam kuṃbhe vidhivat pūjayet sudhīḥ veṣṭayet rakta sūtraiḥ ca dadyāt yūpam samutsṛjet dakṣiṇām vidhivat dadyāt viprān saṃpūjayet tatas iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca puṣpa ārāma pratiṣṭhām tu vakṣye śṛṇvaṃtu vai dvijāḥ madhye vedim tri hastām ca kṛtvā saṃsthāpayet ghaṭam kṛtvā ghaṭe gaṇeśam ca sūryam somam hutāśanam nārāyaṇam sthaṃḍile ca juhuyāt madhu pāyasam veṣṭayet rakta sūtraiḥ ca pradadyāt ca iti dakṣiṇām etat dhārājalena eva yava annam sa guḍam payaḥ aiśānyām yūpam āropya vidhivat dvijasattamāḥ karṇavedham samāropya snāpayet kuśa vāriṇā dhānyam yavam ca godhūmam dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām śatadhāra jalena eva veṣṭayet paritas dvijāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca jyeṣṭha āṣāḍhe tulasyāḥ ca pratiṣṭhām vidhivat caret yajamānaḥ śuddha dine ekādaśyām atha api vā nārāyaṇam śivam somam brahmāṇam ca indram eva ca tvām gaṃdharva iti ca punar puṣpam maṃḍa īśana iti ca māna stoka iti kusumam ca caṃdanam vaiśvadevī iti ca punar maṃtreṇa anena caṃdanam dūrvā maṃtreṇa dūrvāḥ ca rūpeṇa iti ca darppaṇam sa kuśaiḥ pītasūtra ādyaiḥ veṣṭayet kṣīra dhārayā śatadhārā jalena eva veṣṭayet sva gṛham vrajet vastreṇa āvṛtya vidhivat budhaḥ kāle ghaṭam nyaset sapta paṃca tribhiḥ vā atha tat viṣṇoḥ iti vai ṛcā snāpayet atha sādhvībhiḥ kṛta maṃgala pūrvakam tatas śrāddham samāpya eva mātṛ pūjā puraḥsaram ācāryam varayet pūrvam gaṃdha ādyaiḥ kusumaiḥ api ācāryaḥ eva hotā syāt brahmāṇam ca sadasyakam maṃḍape daśa haste api vartule sthaṃḍileṣu ca sahasram maṃḍalam kuryāt tatra nārāyaṇam yajet grahān loka īśvarān madhye ādityān ca marut gaṇān rudrān vasūn ca kalaśe paritas ca samarcayet tatas kuśa kaṃḍikām kṛtvā homam tila yavena tu aṣṭottaraśatam kuryāt anyeṣām śaktitas hunet nārāyaṇam samuddiśya dadyāt utsṛjya sattamāḥ madhye yūpam samuddiśya caru pākam balim dadet dakṣiṇām kāṃcanam dadyāt tilam dhānyam sa puṣpakam dhenum payasvinīm dadyāt veṣṭayet kṣīra dhārayā jayantyāḥ somavṛkṣasya tathā somavaṭasya ca pāṭalā kanakasya eva śālmalī niṃbakasya ca biṃba aśoka vaṭasya eva pratiṣṭhām na eva kārayet bhadrakasya śamīkoṇa caṃḍātaka bakasya ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge paṃcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca vṛkṣa ādīnām pratiṣṭhām ca uttameṣu uttamam caret madhye madhye kaniṣṭhā tu kaniṣṭham parikīrtitam vartulam maṃḍalam kuryāt tat tu śīrṣe tathā antyake madhye vā vedikām kuryāt tad madhye kuṃḍa maṃḍalam pūrvedyus rātri samaye ghaṭam saṃsthāpya pūjayet śeṣam saṃpūjya vidhivat pṛthivīm ca śivam tathā gaṃdha toyena gāyatryā setum saṃpūjya mokṣayet ca mantreṇa āpyāyasva iti vai ṛcā dadyāt gandha ādikam śrīḥ ca te lakṣmīḥ iti candanam dūrvā mantreṇa dūrvāḥ ca phala mantreṇa vai phalam añjana alaktakam kuryāt manonnāḥ iti saṃpaṭhan varayet atha ācāryam hotāram nṛvaraḥ caret pātra dvayam vidhātavyam sadasya ācāryam eva ca setu yāge vidhātavyam tathā dhānyācale pi ca yajet enam kṛte mauli yāga artham yāga maṃḍapam vedim āvāhayet pūrvam maṃḍapam pratipūjayet sthaṃḍile sarvatobhadre śeṣam viṣṇum pradarśayet sthālīpākena juhuyāt aṣṭāviṃśatika trayam balim dadyāt pṛthagrūpam śeṣayet vidhi pūrvakam piṣṭaka annam ghṛta annam ca vistare vā guḍa odanam māṣa bhaktam tu lokāya pṛthivyai paramānnakam vākya pūrvam sṛjet dhīraḥ vākya prakaraṇam śṛṇu baddhāṃñjaliḥ paṭhet mantram kuryāt ca vidhivat tatas picchile patitānām ca udgatena aṅga bhaṅgataḥ ye ca atra prāṇinaḥ santi sarveṣām prāṇa dhārakāḥ yūpam dadyāt iti mantreṇa ante ca api tathā dhvajān vidhivat dakṣiṇām dadyāt kulāni nava pañca vā pūrṇām dattvā savitre arghyam dattvā ca sva gṛham vrajet an ātape kṣudrasetoḥ pratiṣṭhām vidhivat caret viṣṇum śivam hutāśam ca eka kuṇḍe samarcayet kuryāt ekaikaśas viprāḥ aṣṭā viṃśati saṃkhyayā utsṛjya dāpayet dhūpam dhvaja varjyam hi sattamāḥ jñātibhiḥ saha bhuñjīta kṛtakṛtyaḥ abhidhīyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahā purāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca ṣaṣṭi hasta mitām bhūmim tasya pūrṇām manoramām pracāra artham gavām ca eva yaḥ dadyāt su samāhitaḥ ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi rudra loke mahīyate yaḥ dadyāt kevalām bhūmim kanyām dāsīm tathā vṛṣam alaṃkāram vinā dhenum phalasya ardham prakīrtitam amaṇḍape śubhe sthāne śarkarā ādi vivarjite tatra saṃpūjayet bhadram brahmāṇam ca śacīpatim gaṇeśam kṣetrapālam ca śeṣam ca eva digīśvarān pañca upacāraiḥ vidhivat pūjayet pāyasa ādinā tryambakena eva maṃtreṇa bhūmim saṃsthāpya pūjayet pañcagavyena ca punar ca puṣpakam evam yūpasya ca tathā adhigṛhṇāti maṃtrakam sura asura iti kusumam dūrvā mantreṇa dūrvikām sthālīpākena vidhinā anyeṣām pūrvavat caret utsṛjya āropayet dīpam sthiraḥ bhava iti vai ṛcā pṛthivīm ca varāham ca kūrma mādhava śaktikān vāstoṣpatim ca viṣṇum ca yūpe saṃpūjayet kramāt yāvaṃti tṛṇa gulmāni saṃti bhūmau śubhāni ca iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe tṛtīya bhāge go pracāra vidhau saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca śarad kāle vyatīte tu vasaṃte yajñam ārabhet nārāyaṇa ādi mūrtīnām dvātriṃśat bhedaḥ eva tu pratiṣṭhām pratimānām ca gajāsya ādīn ca sattamāḥ gaṇeśa graha dikpālān prati kuṃbheṣu pūjayet sthaṃḍile pūjayet viṣṇum parivāra gaṇam yajet pañcāmṛtaiḥ pañcagavyaiḥ paṃcamṛd piṇḍakaiḥ api tulasī kusumā puṣpa patrāṇi āhuḥ tripatrakam mṛttikā kari daṃtasya tathā aśva khura mṛttikā go mūtram gomayam kṣīram dadhi sarpiḥ tu paṃcamam kuryāt prāṇa pratiṣṭhām ca homam kuryāt yathāvidhi dakṣiṇām vidhivat dadyāt pūrṇām tu tad anantaram iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ deva ādi pratiṣṭhā varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca atas param tu vipra indrāḥ kālī ādīnām tathā eva ca pañcāmṛtaiḥ pañcagavyaiḥ karīṣa śata dhārayā śrī bilve pūjayet devīm dadyāt prāṇam anaṃtaram bilva patraiḥ phalaiḥ vā api dadyāt ca api śata āhutīḥ ekaikaśas tu sarveṣām dadyāt kāñcana dakṣiṇām pratimām kālikāyāḥ ca tārāyāḥ ca pṛthak pṛthak grāhyam vinā arcayet viprāḥ pañca pañcaśataiḥ api samīraṇam tatas dadyāt peṭikāyām niveśayet tatas vai ca aṣṭama dine rātrau api prapūjayet paśu dānam prakartavyam agni kāryam ca pāyasaiḥ śiva liṅga pratiṣṭhām ca vakṣye taṃtra matam yathā tri vipram bhojayet viprāḥ adhivāsyam viśeṣataḥ ācāryam varayet prātar snāpayet pūrva vartmanā dadyāt samīraṇam paścāt agni kāryam samācaret tila hema mayīm gām ca dadyāt gām ca vidhānataḥ pūrṇimāyām viśeṣeṇa na anyeṣām ca kathaṃcana homa aṃte vasudhārām ca kuṃbhe dattvā vidhānataḥ śālaśamaśilāyāḥ ca pratiṣṭhām vidhivat caret sadyas adhivāsayet devam dvādaśyām snāpayet atha kuṃbhe prajāpatim sthāpya śveta abjam nava nābhake cakra svarūpataḥ jñeyam pradadyāt ca samīraṇam ānīya tāmra bhāṃḍe ca tri kālam pratipūjayet sa kāñcanam vastra yugmam prada dyāt bhūri dakṣiṇam śrī sūryasya gaṇeśasya viriñceḥ ca api sattamāḥ vaṭa vṛkṣa aṃtikam gatvā sthāpayet varuṇam tatas aṣṭāviṃśatibhiḥ ddattvā dadyāt prāṇam anantaram eka aham athavā ākāśe guptam kṛtvā dina trayam tri ahāt eva punar pūjām punar homam samācaret punar ca bhojayet viprān dadyāt kāñcana dakṣiṇām vārāhyāḥ tripurāyāḥ ca nārikela udakaiḥ api dadyāt samīraṇam paścāt punar pūjām ca homayet paśu jñānam ca kartavyam ṣaṣ māsaiḥ pañcama udakaiḥ kumārīm bhojayet rātrau dadyāt kāñcana dakṣiṇām pratimām bhuvaneśīm ca mahāmāyā ambikām api kāmākṣīm ca tatas devīm indrākṣīm ca aparājitām pūrvedyus rātri samaye piṣṭa kāṣṭau nivedayet aṣṭau nirmāṇayet paścāt balim ca aṣṭau vidhāna vid parivāra gaṇaiḥ sārddham pūjayet prayataḥ sudhīḥ samīraṇam tatas dadyāt śivam sūryam yajet punar pāyasa annaiḥ ca juhuyāt tri dinam lipi pūjanam kumārī pūjanam kuryāt agnikāryam dina trayam paśu dānam ca kartavyam vibhave sati sattamāḥ rātrau jāgaraṇam kuryāt maṭha utsava puraḥsaram iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sūtaḥ uvāca durnimittāni atho vakṣye śṛṇvaṃtu muni sattamāḥ yasya ye graha doṣāḥ syuḥ teṣām śāṃtim yathākramāt graha ṛkṣa ādyaiḥ kṛtam divyam āntarikṣam nibodha me jalāśayānām vai kṛtyam bhaumam tat api kīrtitam bhaumam ca alpa phalam jñeyam divya āntarikṣam eva ca sapta aham aphalam dadyāt daivam ca api ca tad kṣaṇāt devānām hasanam ca eva kalkanam rudhira sravaḥ sarpa ādi ārohaṇam ca eva daivam tat api kīrtitam tatas meghāt samutpannā yadi vṛṣṭiḥ śilā tale sapta aha abhyaṃtare jīvam utpannam niṣphalam bhavet eka rāśi sthitāḥ pāpāḥ śani bhauma divākarāḥ pṛthvī dhūma ākulā tatra rudaṃti bahavaḥ janāḥ tatra paśyati rāja indraḥ kaḥ dharām dhārayiṣyati darśanam dhūmaketoḥ ca nakṣatre dhūma darśanam rājñaḥ janma dine vā atha śakracāpam dina aṃtare ākāśe api atha bhūmau ca tatra maṇḍūkam eva ca haridrā vṛṣṭiḥ pāṣāṇe siṃha bilva ākṛtiḥ yadi darśane rāṣṭra durbhikṣa makaram nṛpati kṣayaḥ ākṛṣṇena iti mantreṇa atha vā arkeṇa yatnataḥ prāsāda toraṇam tatra dvāram prākāra veśma ca dhānya sāram gavām sāram kūpe kumbha pradarśanam ādityasya adbhutam vidyāt kamalam juhuyāt tatas sahasram juhuyāt vā atha tatas śāṃtiḥ bhavet dhruvam vikṛtāḥ pakṣiṇaḥ ca eva pāṃḍu kapotakāḥ tatas śvetolūkaḥ bṛhan ca eva droṇakākaḥ ca kokilaḥ gṛhe tasya mahā utpātaḥ bhaviṣyati na saṃśayaḥ sthūla bhaṅga pragrahaṇam prarohaṇam atha api vā hārāḥ kaṭakaṭāyaṃte jātasya daṃta sambhavaḥ hasatā devatānām ca gātre svedaḥ ca jāyate nimittāni evamādīni jāyaṃte yasya veśmani ṣaḍbhiḥ māsaiḥ ca mriyate gṛhiṇī ca śubhā ca yā kuryāt ādityavāre vā ayutam tila pāyasam tatas śāṃtiḥ bhavet āśu dhenum dadyāt ca dakṣiṇām pāyasam tila mudgau ca puṣpam vā tālavṛntakam ikṣu modaka piṇyākān juhuyāt ravim uddiśan siṃhāsanam ratha chatram dhvajaḥ cāmara bhūṣite akasmāt dṛśyate yatra rājñaḥ vā anyatra kutracid āgamasya ca dṛṣṭvā eva bhaṃgaḥ kaṭakaṭāyanam cala tvam ca adharasya api tathā kaṭakaṭāyanam rāja amātya vināśāya mahīm ca tad sutaḥ api vā hastinaḥ mada yuktāḥ ca mriyaṃte na atra saṃśayaḥ tāḍī pūga ādayaḥ yatra yamau syātām pramādataḥ gehī tatra vinaśyeta sa dāraḥ putra saṃyutaḥ baddha puṣpe yadā puṣpam phalam vā yadi dṛśyate akṣata adarśanāt tatra somasya adbhuta darśanam dadhi madhu ghṛtam ca eva juhuyāt ayutam dvijāḥ imam devāḥ iti maṃtreṇa somāya śrapayet carum utpataṃti gṛhe yasya yavāḥ māṣāḥ ca puṣkalāḥ dadhi kṣīra ājya pākeṣu rudhiram dṛśyate yadi vyādhi līnāḥ vinaśyaṃti nikhilāḥ paśu mānuṣāḥ evam sarvāṇi bhūtāni bhavanti akārake dhruvam rāja amātya vināśāya gehe gehī vinaśyati prāṇa nāśāya viprāya āhutyā ca prabhavanti hi dṛṣṭvā vābhadram ati ugram juhuyāt ayutam kramāt maṃtreṇa śrapitam lohitam carum tri viprān bhojayet dadyāt dakṣiṇām lohitam tatas svarṇam aṃgāram uddiśya tatas śāṃtiḥ prajāyate puṣpam vā pātayet yatra phalam vā api tathā eva ca hasti aśva mahiṣāḥ gāvaḥ dāra apatya dhanāni ca tuṣṭena aṃgārakeṇa eva sarvam etat pradīyatām āṃgārakeṇa maṃtreṇa khādiram ca akṣataiḥ yutam dakṣiṇām ca yathāśakti dadyāt viprāya vā punar dhāvanti ca ūrdhva pucchāḥ ca gṛhe gāvaḥ svayam yadi ārohanti gṛham viprāḥ sārameyāḥ ca sūkarāḥ sarveṣām vā bhavet mṛtyuḥ vaṃdhyā gauḥ vā prajāyate mithyā vādena gehī ca rājñā vādaiḥ ca tiṣṭhati dharaṇī hananam yatra dvayoḥ āskadanam tathā nimittāni evamādīni go śva jātāni sattamāḥ maṇḍūka sarpa kūṣmāṃḍāḥ prasuvaṃti yathā striyaḥ śāṃtim tatra pravakṣyāmi yathā saṃpadyate sukham dadhi madhu ghṛta aktam ca apāmārgam tathā punar suvarṇam budham uddiśya gām ca dadyāt payasvinīm suvarṇam puṣpa vṛṣṭim ca suphalam ca akṣatam tathā gṛhe prāṃgaṇake yasya nipatanti kadācana alaṃkāra yutām vā api sarva ābharaṇa bhūṣitām gṛha madhye tu yaḥ paśyet kṣīṇām aṃtarhitām striyam akasmāt mālatī puṣpam jātam syāt tasya vā gṛhe somāya na ca saṃtuṣṭaḥ sarvam etat pradṛśyate dhanam dhānyam tathā putraḥ aiśvaryam ca vara striyaḥ sa bhṛtyāḥ ca mahiṣyaḥ ca mariṣyaṃti na saṃśayaḥ ca mantreṇa apāmārgam tathā budhaḥ payasvinīm tathā gām ca vāsaḥ yuga samanvitam dvijāya śraddhayā dadyāt tatas saṃpadyate śubham siṃha vyāghra gavā ādīnām dhana hāni vipad karaḥ ekaḥ vṛṣaḥ trayaḥ gāvaḥ sapta aṣṭa nava daṃtinaḥ saṃvatsareṇa tasya ekā prasūtiḥ vihatā punar punar punar vratam ca āśu akāle maithunam tathā bhuñjīkṛtāni dhānyāni vrīhayaḥ yava taṃḍulāḥ grāvi mārjāra maṃḍūkāḥ sthūṇā bhaṃge ca prāṅgaṇe gṛhe yasya prajāyaṃte tasyāḥ mṛtyuḥ na saṃśayaḥ ṣaṣ māsa abhyantare yatra śmaśānam yāsyati dhruvam kalaham jñāti vairam ca vyādhi pīḍā bhaviṣyati vipralāpaḥ mitra nāśaḥ iṣṭeṣu aniṣṭa darśanam bhāryā putra vināśaḥ ca bhavet eṣu viniścitam tadā rājñām vibhramaḥ ca tathā gṛha vināśanam amātya vargāḥ ca pure rājñām rājya parāṅmukhāḥ bṛhaspatim samuddiśya gām ca dadyāt payasvinīm vārimaṃḍe ca kūpe ca vāpyām ca madhu kāṃjike kṣīram dadhi ghṛtam ca eva jātam yadi bhaviṣyati akasmāt tatra vṛkṣaḥ ca phalena saha saṃyutaḥ gauram bṛhaspateḥ ca eva prakuryāt prāya dakṣiṇām aśubham hi śubhena eva śāṃtim homam ca kārayet tatra eva rākṣasam yatra ghaṭakam pariśoṣaṇam kesarī śarkarā tailam rājatam tāṃḍavam sthitam māṣa bhaktam tathā dhānyam suvarṇam rajatāni ca tāmram kāṃsyam tathā loham sīsakam pittalam tathā sthāpitāni iva dṛśyaṃte gṛhe ca etāni yasya vai vyādhi pīḍe tathā ghore rāja upadrava baṃdhane gaja aśva paśu bhṛtyānām vināśaḥ jāyate dhruvam yasya etāni pradṛśyaṃte parvataḥ kanakāni ca saṃpad tasya prajāyeta niścalā sukha dā sadā daṃta uttareṣu daṃtāḥ ca paṃktim ākramya saṃsthitāḥ te api doṣa karāḥ sarve kākṛtinaḥ tathā sarve te na te doṣa karāḥ kvacid bhāṃḍe kuṃbhe yadā ca eva śrūyate ghana garjitam kaṃcukānām gṛhe ca eva prākāraḥ śrūyate yadi mūṣikānām mukhe ca eva jvalaṃtī yasya paśyati śāṃtim tatra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham śamī patram nirmitam ca yavaiḥ yuktam gṛhiṇī api śukla vāsaḥ yugam ca eva gām ca śuklām payasvinīm suvarṇam śraddhayā ca eva dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām devāgāre yadā bhūmiḥ lohitā yasya dṛśyate rājā vā rāja putraḥ vā rājyam vā api vinaśyati maṃtriṇaḥ maṃtri putrāḥ ca mriyaṃte na atra saṃśayaḥ yatra vā dṛśyate loke gṛhe yasya su pūjitāḥ puṣpitāḥ ca gṛha staṃbhāḥ śarīram ca ghaṭaḥ tathā hasti aśva mahiṣāḥ ca eva ajāḥ gāvaḥ tathā eva ca nityam svāmi vadha arthāya puṣpitām pravahaṃti ca gṛhe haṃsaḥ gṛhe samyak maṇḍūkāḥ jalacāriṇaḥ sravaṃti pramadāḥ yatra bhinnāḥ te syuḥ nava aṃgikāḥ gṛhī tatra vinaśyeta sa putra paśu bāṃdhavaḥ dhanuḥ khaḍga dharāḥ rātrau madhyāhne cāndrake tathā manuṣya aṅganānām maraṇam tathā syāt rāṣṭra viplavaḥ rasa siddhāni vastūni surā ādyāḥ ca api vā punar hastinaḥ mada yuktāḥ ca aśvāḥ dhīrita hiṃsakāḥ nagare vā tathā grāme jāyante tasya vairiṇaḥ divā vā yadi vā rātrau śaneḥ adbhuta darśanam mṛga vyāghra ādi rakṣāṃsi tathā go mahiṣāḥ api juhuyāt ayutam samyak sasyān ca samidham dvijāḥ śat naḥ devī iti maṃtreṇa śubha artham śanivāsare gām ca nīlām tatas dadyāt jīvat vatsām payasvinīm vāsaḥ yugam ca viprāya suvarṇam rajatam tathā dattvā tu śraddhayā samyak dakṣiṇām śirasi sthitām vidhim homa avasāne tu tatas saṃpadyate śubham yadā dvāre godhikā ca śaṃkhinī praviśet gṛham tadā aśubham vijānīyāt rāja pīḍā dhana kṣayaḥ vinā garjita meghena śilā vṛṣṭiḥ prajāyate rakta miśrā hi pāṃḍuḥ ca patantī yatra dṛśyate tatra saṃdṛśyate ca abhram vṛkṣāḥ vāta vivarjitāḥ divā śivā purā rauti ulūkaḥ vā niśācaraḥ niśi nipatya kākutsthe pradeśe rauti vā vṛṣaḥ adharma prabalāḥ deśāḥ rājā dharma parāṅmukhaḥ anyonyam ca jighāṃsaṃti go brāhmaṇam atha api vā gṛhe gṛhī vinaśyet ca sa putra paśu bāṃdhavaḥ utsānam dvāra deśe asya maraṇam rāṣṭra vibhramaḥ rājya nāśaḥ bhavet rājñaḥ maraṇam vāhanasya ca viparītāni deśāni kramatas saṃbhavaṃti hi rāhuṇā grasta sūryaḥ api niśi ca atha yadā divā tārakā gaṇa vat ca eva rājñām nidhana kārakaḥ saha amātyāḥ vinaśyaṃti svarge ye ca su durjayāḥ para cakreṇa pātyaṃte rājānaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ chāyā dhvajaḥ ca gagane dṛśyate ced kadācana darśanāt eva rājñaḥ tu vināśaḥ saha rāṣṭrakaiḥ tathā staṃbhe dhūmaḥ eva vā gagane aśani ghātaḥ ca śakti hastena vā punar abdasya abhyaṃtare tasya maraṇam na atra saṃśayaḥ śikhā valaya madhye tu sa dhūmaḥ pāvaka udgamaḥ śavasya nīyamānasya utthānam vā pramādataḥ nirghātaḥ ca api bhūkaṃpaḥ nivāta ulkā pradarśanam akāle puṣpitāḥ vṛkṣāḥ phalam ca akāla saṃbhavam narāṇām āsanam ca eva gavām vā mānuṣī girā pakṣa mātra antare tasya putrasya maraṇam diśet śāṃtim atra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham dadhi madhu ghṛta aktam ca kuryāt dūrvā akṣatam tathā carum ca śrapayet tatra rāhum udiśya saṃśrayāt homam kuryāt tatas gām ca kapilām ca payasvinīm atasī tila śaṃkhau vā vāsaḥ yugam atha api vā śraddhayā rāhum uddiśya dadyāt viprāya dakṣiṇām dadhi madhu ghṛta kṣīreṇa vāruṇena ca vāruṇe dṛśyate ca adbhutam teṣu viśiṣṭaiḥ doṣa darśibhiḥ gṛhī tatra vinaṣṭaḥ ca bhavet sa paśu bāṃdhavaḥ dṛśyaṃte tatra krauñcāḥ ca jaṃbukāḥ gṛdhra vāyasāḥ dāruṇam bhīṣaṇam ghoram nṛtyaṃti ca hasaṃti ca mṛtyuḥ tasya bhavet āśu īśvarasya ca śāsanāt sthānāt sthāna aṃtaram yāti bhūmau vā patate bhṛśam sa baṃdhuḥ asyate rājā para cakraiḥ sa pīḍitaḥ durbhikṣam maraṇam ca eva ciram rāṣṭre bhaviṣyati gāvaḥ markaṭa kuṃbhāḥ viśaṃte gṛha veśmani gāvaḥ ca tasya naśyaṃti dāra apatya dhanāni ca anyasya doṣaḥ bhavati gṛhe yānti pramādataḥ śāṃtim atra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham viprāya maṃḍapam dadyāt bilva patram atha api vā aiṃdreṇa eva tu mantreṇa homaḥ kāryaḥ dvijātibhiḥ akasmāt śāla tāla akṣa khadira utpala serakāḥ haṃsaḥ vā droṇakākaḥ vā mayūraḥ vā gṛha upari śāṃtim atra pravakṣyāmi yayā saṃpadyate śubham dadhi madhu ghṛta aktam ca juhuyāt ayutam kuśam nīlām dhenum sa vatsām ca bahu kṣīra pradām tathā mṛttikām hema vāsaḥ ca nānā alaṃkāram eva ca dakṣiṇām ca pravakṣyāmi yasya na asti pratikriyā dakṣiṇasyām diśi chāyām yaḥ paśyet ātmanaḥ svayam svacchāyām pādukasya eva paśyet pañcaśiraḥ dvayam śīghram nāśam avāpnoti sapta ahāt na atra saṃśayaḥ uccāvacān pravakṣyāmi yathā śāstreṇa coditam kāka mārjāra śūkānām kapotānām viśeṣataḥ śanim uddiśya juhuyāt ayutam śanivāsare aṣṭāviṃśam carum kṛtvā tatas śāṃtiḥ bhavet dhruvam bhuja padoḥ tathā cakṣuḥ spaṃdane maraṇam diśet tat tu somādbhutam vidyāt vāma dakṣiṇāt kramāt kṛṣṇapakṣe bhavet vāme viparīte adbhutam diśet aniṣṭa sūcakam yasmāt tasmāt śāṃtim prakalpayet śatārddham ravim uddiśya śānti arthe homam ācaret devāgāre tathā godhā śaṃkhinī praviśet kvacid rakta kaṃṭhaḥ kapotaḥ ca vyāghraḥ eṇaḥ ca vā viśet na ca atra gṛha vaikṛtyam hasanam yadi dṛśyate saṃpatti sūcakam gehe maraṇam duḥkha darśanam pramādāt kaṃpane hāniḥ svede jāte vipad bhavet śva jaṃbukau atha vyāghraḥ yathāśakti ca dhāvati īśāne mahiṣaḥ tadvat tadā deśe ca viplavaḥ vṛkṣa adbhutam yadā paśyet tatra tasyām parityajet yad gṛheṣu hutam yāti deśa viplavam ādiśet deśe vā nagare grāme āraṇyapaśubandhanam sarpe vā viparītam ca māṃsa piṃḍam atha api vā tad gṛhe maraṇam ca eva deśa viplavam ādiśet dviguṇam ca api saṃdhyāyām ardharātre caturguṇam akāle tatra maraṇam akāle gṛhiṇī mṛtiḥ saura adbhutam vijānīyāt aśubhe vā viśodhanam sa aṃga upāṃgena sahita maṣṭau aṣṭau hutam ca vā tad mānena hutam viprāḥ kuryāt tatra eva bhūṣaṇam ekaikasya a hutam viprāḥ aṣṭau aṣṭau hutam ca vā adhi prati adhidevānām yāḥ ca anyāḥ ca aṃga devatāḥ māna aṃtam ca dadet pūrṇām dattvā pūrṇām na homayet amāna karaṇe doṣaḥ tasmāt mānam na hāpayet paṃkti catvāriṃśat ādyaiḥ caturdhā vibhajet naraḥ an iṣṭāya tatas dadyāt caru homam vibhāgaśaḥ adhi pratyadhidevānām aṣṭau aṣṭa hi udāhṛtam tryaṃbaka ādiṣu maṃtreṣu homa trayam udāhṛtam dhanaṃjaye tathā dadyāt caru homam vibhāgataḥ ādityāya aṣṭau aṣṭau adhika kalpayet sudhīḥ śata home tu sarvatra daśa aṃgam kalpayet naraḥ aniṣṭāya yuga aṃgam tu grahebhyaḥ hi aṃganāya ca sahasre ca eva viṃśa aṃge aniṣṭāya daśa aṃśakam pañca aṃśena grahāṇām ca pañca aṃśena yavān api tatra aniṣṭe paṃcaśatam tasya ardham graha vāgyataḥ ekatriṃśat bhavet mānam anyeṣām tu caturdaśa ca tithi aṃgam pañca aṃgam yasya ca adbhutam grahebhyaḥ ca eva paṃcāṃgam tatra vā aṃgam parān api eka eka aṃge bhavet mānam ṣaṭśatam ṣaṣṭiḥ eva ca adhikam ca bhavet ṣaṣṭiḥ daśame bhāga śeṣataḥ aniṣṭa aṃśe tri sahasram tri śatam triṃśatam tathā catur śatam grahāṇām ca tathā sapta śata adhikam upagrahebhyaḥ dadyāt ca paṃcāśīti adhikam śatam tithi aṃga bhāgaḥ śeṣeṇa grahe saptaśata adhikam graha aṃge yaḥ sthitaḥ bhāgaḥ yugalam bhāga śeṣataḥ śāṃtike pauṣṭike kāmye yadi icchet sukham ātmanaḥ grahāṇām ca ayutam homam tri aha sādhyena homayet tri aha sādhye vidhānam yat purā eva udīritam dvijāḥ idānīm prakrameṇa eva yaḥ bhāgaḥ sa nigadyate itareṣām grahāṇām ca pratyekam tu śatam śatam adhi pratyadhidevānām paṃcāśat homaḥ ucyate prati grahebhyaḥ tri śatam dadyāt aṣṭa śata adhikam ekāśītim dadau yatnāt aśītim ca aṃtyayoḥ dvayoḥ aniṣṭāya tri śatam tu tṛtīya divase matam tat pratyekam grahāṇām ca dvācatvāriṃśat ucyate adhi pratyadhidevānām pratyekam paṃcatriṃśakam ādityāya yugam dadyāt ekam tu tryaṃbakāya ca grahāṇām tri sahasram tu paṃcānām ca sahasrakam tryaṃbakāya tathā dadyāt tathā dhanaṃjayāya ca ṣaṣ pāda adhika ṣaṣ ṣaṭka sahasra parisaṃkhyayā nava śloka śata udbhūtam saṃpūrṇam syāt bhaviṣyakam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyama parvaṇi tṛtīya bhāge viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ iti tṛtīya bhāgaḥ samāptaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe madhyamaparva samāptam śrī veṅkaṭeśvara arpaṇam astu viṣaya anukramaṇikā kṛta yuga bhūpa ākhyānam śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ nārāyaṇam namaskṛtya naram ca eva narottamam devīm sarasvatīm vyāsam tatas jayam udīrayet śaunakaḥ uvāca aṣṭāviṃśe satya yuge ke rājānaḥ abhavan mune teṣām rājyasya varṣāṇi tat me vada vicakṣaṇa sūtaḥ uvāca sa taptvā sarayū tīre tapaḥ divyam śatam samāḥ brahmaṇaḥ vara dānena divyam yānam saḥ āptavān nārāyaṇam pūjayitvā harau rājyam nivedya ca ṣaṭtriṃśat ca sahasrāṇām abdam rājyam tadā akarot tasmāt jātaḥ vikukṣiḥ ca śata hīnam tat abdakam rājyam kṛtvā divam yātaḥ tasmāt jātaḥ ripuṃjayaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tat kakutstha sutaḥ smṛtaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tatas anena aṃsaḥ ātmajaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ nṛpaḥ pṛthuḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam viṣvagaśvaḥ ca tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt ārdraḥ nṛpaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam bhadrāśvaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam yuvanāśvaḥ tu tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam śravasthaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat udayāt asta paryaṃtam taiḥ nṛpaiḥ bhūmi maṃḍalam śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam bṛhadaśvaḥ tatas abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt kuvalayāśvakaḥ śata hīnam kṛta rājyam dṛḍhāśvaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat sahasra hīnam rājyam tat tasmāt putraḥ nikuṃbhakaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tat saṃkaṭāśvaḥ tu tad sutaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tat tasmāt jātaḥ prasenajit sahasra hīnam rājyam tat ravaṇāśvaḥ tu tad sutaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tat māṃdhātā tad sutaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam purukutsaḥ tu tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam triṃśadaśvaḥ tu tad sutaḥ rathe yasya smṛtāḥ vāhāḥ vājinaḥ triṃśataḥ varāḥ anaraṇyaḥ tatas jātaḥ hi aṣṭāviṃśat sahasrakam rājyam dvitīya caraṇe smṛtam satya yugasya vai pṛṣadaśvaḥ tatas jātaḥ rājyam ṣaṣṭha sahasrakam tad abdam bhū tale kṛtvā pitṛ lokam upāyayau haryaśvaḥ tu tatas jātaḥ viṣṇu bhakta kule nṛpaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tad tad sutaḥ vasumān smṛtaḥ sahasra hīnam rājyam tat tena rājñā ca satkṛtam sahasra hīnam rājyam tat kṛtvā svargam upāyayau tasmāt jātaḥ triśaṃkuḥ ca rājyam varṣa sahasrakam chadmanā hīna tām jātaḥ hariścaṃdraḥ tu tad sutaḥ rājyam viṃśat sahasram ca rohitaḥ nāma tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam hārītaḥ tanayaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam caṃcubhūpaḥ ca tad sutaḥ bhūpāḥ ca bāhu senā antāḥ vaiṣṇavāḥ parikīrtitāḥ rājyamānam kṛtam samyak bhūpaiḥ vaivasvata ādibhiḥ tṛtīya caraṇe madhye sagaraḥ nāma bhūpatiḥ śiva bhaktaḥ sat ācāraḥ tad putrāḥ sāgarāḥ smṛtāḥ triṃśat sahasra varṣam tat rājyam vai munibhiḥ smṛtam naṣṭeṣu sāgareṣu evam asamañjasaḥ ātmajaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam aṃśumān tad sutaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam dilīpaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ bhagīrathaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam śrutasenaḥ tatas abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam nābhāgaḥ tanayaḥ tatas śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam ambarīṣaḥ tatas abhavat śaivāḥ ṣaṣ śrutasena antāḥ nābhāgaḥ vaiṣṇavaḥ nṛpaḥ satyapādaḥ samāptaḥ ayam tṛtīyaḥ bhārateṃtare aṃvarīṣeṇa bhūpena śata hīnam kṛtam padam caturthe caraṇe tasya ca aṣṭādaśa sahasrakam abdam rājyam śubham jñātam karma bhūmyām ca bhārate ekonatriṃśat varṣāṇi rājyam tad triṃśatāni ca śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam siṃdhudvīpaḥ ambarīṣa jaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam ayutāśvaḥ tatas abhavat śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam ṛtuparṇaḥ tu tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam sarvakāmaḥ nṛpaḥ tatas śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam nṛpaḥ kalmāṣapādakaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam sudāsaḥ tanayaḥ abhavat tasmāt aśamakaḥ ca eva madayantyāḥ vaśiṣṭha jaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam harivarmā tatas abhavat sapta bhūpāḥ sudāsa antāḥ vaiṣṇavāḥ parikīrtitāḥ guru śāpāt tu saudāsaḥ rājya aṅgam gurave arpayat ūnatriṃśat sahasrāṇi tathā sapta śatāni vai pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt dillī vayaḥsutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bhṛpaḥ viśvāsa hastataḥ rājyam daśa sahasram tad niyajñaḥ prākṛtaḥ nṛpaḥ śata varṣa manāḥ vṛṣṭiḥ sarva rājyam vyanāśayat yajñam kṛtvā vasiṣṭhaḥ tu rājñī vacana tatparaḥ yajñāt khaṭvāṃgaḥ utpannaḥ khaṭvāṃgam śastram udvahan kṛtvā tatra varam labdhvā devebhyaḥ mukti tām gataḥ khaṭṭāṃgāt dīrghabāhuḥ ca rājyam viṃśat sa hasrakam tasmāt sudarśanaḥ jātaḥ devī pūjana tatparaḥ vaiṣṇavāḥ dāśarathyam tāḥ trayaḥ vikhyāta sat balāḥ khaṭvāṃgaḥ dīrghabāhuḥ ca vaiṣṇavau parikīrtitau sudarśanaḥ mahā prājñaḥ kāśī rāja sutām nṛpaḥ udūhya bhūpatīn jitvā devī sevā prasādataḥ rājyam bharatakhaṇḍa antam adadhat dharmataḥ nṛpaḥ varṣa pañca sahasrāṇi rājyam cakre sa bhūpatiḥ svapna madhye vacaḥ proktam mahākālyāḥ nṛpāya vai vatsa tvam priyayā sārddham vasiṣṭha ādibhiḥ anvitaḥ himālayam girim prāpya vāsam kuru mahāmate mahāvāyu prabhāvena kṣayaḥ bharatakhaṇḍake ratnākaraḥ paścimaḥ abdhiḥ tasya dvīpāḥ kṣayam gatāḥ mahā udadhiḥ pūrvatas abdhiḥ tasya dvīpāḥ kṣayam gatāḥ vāḍavaḥ abdhiḥ dakṣiṇe ca tasya dvīpāḥ kṣayam gatāḥ ye dvīpāḥ tu su vikhyātāḥ te api sarve layam gatāḥ sa jīvaḥ pralayam yāyāt tasmāt tvam jīvitaḥ bhava pañca varṣa pramāṇena vāyuḥ tejaḥ kramāt jalam śarkarā ca mahīm prāptāḥ tatas jīvāḥ kṣayam gatāḥ paṃca varṣa mite kāle jalam jātā vasuṃdharā śāṃtaḥ bhūtvā punar vāyuḥ jalam sarvam aśoṣayat daśa varṣa aṃtare bhūmiḥ sthalī bhūtvā pradṛśyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṃḍāpara paryāye kṛtayugabhūpākhyānam nāma prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ tretā yuga bhūpākhyāna varṇanam sūtaḥ uvāca vaiśākha śukla pakṣe tu tṛtīya guru vāsare māyādevī prabhāveṇa puram sarvam manoharam daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi rājyam kṛtvā sudarśanaḥ prāptavān śāśvatam lokam dilīpaḥ tad sutaḥ abhavat daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi dilīpaḥ rājya satkṛtaḥ rājyam kṛtam ca raghuṇā dilīpa ante pituḥ samam raghu vaṃśaḥ tatas khyātaḥ tretāyām bhṛgu nandana pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt daśarathaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt rāmaḥ hariḥ svayam ekādaśa sahasrāṇi rāma rājyam prakīrtitam tasya putraḥ kuśaḥ nāma rājyam daśa sahasrakam atithiḥ nāma tad putraḥ kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam tasmāt jātaḥ nalaḥ nāma tretāyām śakti pūjakaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt nābhaḥ sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam puṃḍarīkaḥ sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam kṣemadhanvā tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam dvārakaḥ nāma tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ hi ahīna jaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam kuruḥ nāma sutaḥ tatas kurukṣetram kṛtam tena tretāyām śatayaḥ janam pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam pāriyātraḥ sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam dalapālaḥ sutaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam chadma kārī tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt ukthaḥ sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam śaṃkhanābhiḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam viśvapālaḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam svarṇanābhiḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam puṣpasenaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam dhruvasaṃdhiḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam apavarmā tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam śīghra gantā tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam marupālaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛta rājyam prasūvaśrutaḥ ucyate tretā pādaḥ samāptaḥ ayam prathamaḥ bhārateṃtare udayāt udayam yāvat rājñā tatra su saṃdhinā pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam māmarbaḥ tanayaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam mahā aśvaḥ tanayaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bṛhat bālaḥ sutaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bṛhadaiśānaḥ eva tat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam vatsapālaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam prativyomā tatas nṛpaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam sutaḥ devakaraḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bṛhadaśvaḥ tatas nṛpaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam sutaḥ keśīnaraḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam antarikṣaḥ tatas nṛpaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam suvarṇāṃgaḥ nṛpaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bṛhadrājaḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam dharmarājaḥ tatas nṛpaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ kṛtañjayaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ raṇan jayaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam sañjayaḥ tad sutaḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tad putraḥ śākyavardhanaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam krodhadānaḥ tu tad sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt atula vikramaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ prasenajit pituḥ talyam kṛtam rājyam tad putraḥ śūdrakaḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ arddham kṛtam rājyam sarve tu raghu vaṃśa jāḥ pañcaṣaṣṭi mitāḥ bhūpāḥ devī pūjana tatparāḥ hiṃsā yajña parāḥ sarve svarga lokam itas gatāḥ buddhāḥ jātāḥ ca ye putrāḥ te sarvaiḥ varṇa saṃkarāḥ tretā tṛtīya caraṇa prārambhena nava tām gatāḥ indreṇa preṣitaḥ bhūmau candramāḥ rohiṇīpatiḥ viṣṇu bhaktaḥ candramāḥ ca śiva pūjana tatparaḥ māyādevī prasanna arthe śatam yajñam acīkarat aṣṭādaśa sahasrāṇi rājyam kṛtvā divam gataḥ ilām udvāhya dharmeṇa tasmāt jātaḥ purūravāḥ caturdaśa sahasrāṇi bhūmi rājyam acīkarat urvaśīm saḥ api svarveśyām samayena eva bhogyavān āyuḥ nāma sutaḥ jātaḥ dharma ātmā viṣṇu tatparaḥ ṣaṭtriṃśat ca sahasrāṇi rājyam kṛtvā purūravāḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam āyuṣaḥ nahuṣaḥ sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tatas śakra tvam āgataḥ muneḥ duvāsasaḥ śāpāt nṛpaḥ ajagara tām gataḥ pañca putrāḥ yayāteḥ ca trayaḥ mleccha tvam āgatāḥ tapaḥ bala prabhāveṇa rājyam lakṣa abda saṃmitam kṛtvā viṣṇu prasādena tatas vaikuṇṭham āgataḥ yadoḥ putraḥ smṛtaḥ kroṣṭā rājyam ṣaṣṭi sahasrakam tasmāt svāhā arcanaḥ putraḥ kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam tasmāt citrarathaḥ putraḥ kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam araviṃdaḥ sutaḥ tasmāt kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam atha śravāḥ tatas jātaḥ tejasvī viṣṇu tatparaḥ pituḥ artham kṛtam rājyam tad putraḥ tāmasaḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt uśanaḥsutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam śītāṃśuka nṛpaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam kamalāṃśuḥ tatas abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam pārāvata sutaḥ tatas pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam krāthaḥ nāma sutaḥ tatas pātāle vṛṣaparvaṇaḥ prayāgasya pratiṣṭhāne pure rājyam atha akarot daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi rājyam kṛtvā divam gataḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam pracinvān tad sutaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam bhavadaḥ tad sutaḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam putraḥ bāhugaraḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam saṃyātiḥ tanayaḥ abhavat pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt raṃti naraḥ sutaḥ pituḥ tulyam kṛtam rājyam tad putraḥ sutapāḥ smṛtaḥ pituḥ tusyam kṛtam rājyam saṃvaraṇaḥ tanayaḥ tatas śata varṣam tatas sūryaḥ tapatīm nāma kanyakām saṃvaraṇāya dadau tuṣṭaḥ ravi lokam nṛpaḥ gataḥ catvāraḥ sāgarāḥ vṛddhāḥ bhāratam kṣaya tām gatam dvi varṣe sāgare bhūmiḥ uṣitvā bhūdharaiḥ saha mahā vāyu prabhāvena sāgarāḥ śuṣka tām gatāḥ agastya tejasā bhūmiḥ sthalī bhūtvā pradṛśyate pañca varṣa aṃtare bhūmiḥ vṛkṣa dūrvā ādi saṃyutā sūrya ājñayā ca saṃvarṇaḥ tapatyā muninā saha vasiṣṭhena tri varṇaiḥ ca mukhyaiḥ sārddham samāgataḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe pratisargaparvaṇi caturyugakhaṇḍāpara paryāye tretāyugabhūpākhyānam nāma dvitīyaḥ udhyāyaḥ śaunakaḥ uvāca saṃvarṇaḥ ca mahīpālaḥ kasmin kāle samāgataḥ lomaharṣaṇa me brūhi dvāparasya nṛpān tathā sūtaḥ uvāca bhādrasya kṛṣṇa pakṣe tu trayodaśyām bhṛgau dine saṃvarṇaḥ munibhiḥ sārddham pratiṣṭhāne samāgataḥ pratiṣṭhānam kṛtam ramyam pañca yojanam āyatam arddha krośa unnatam harmyam racitam viśvakarmaṇā buddhi vaṃśe prasenasya saktāyāḥ bhūpatiḥ kṛtaḥ yadu vaṃśe sātvataḥ ca madhurā bhūpatiḥ kṛtaḥ mleccha vaṃśe śmaśrupālaḥ maru deśasya bhūpatiḥ krameṇa varddhitāḥ bhūpāḥ prajābhiḥ sahitāḥ bhuvi daśa varṣa sahasrāṇi saṃvarṇaḥ bhūpatiḥ smṛtaḥ tasya ātmajaḥ ayam arcā jñaḥ kṛtam rājyam pituḥ samam tasya putraḥ sūri jāpī pituḥ arddham ca rājya kṛt sūrya yajñaḥ tasya putraḥ saura yajña parāyaṇaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt ātithya vardhanaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam dvādaśātmā tu tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛta rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ divākaraḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt jātaḥ prabhākaraḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam bhāsvat ātmā ca tad sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam vivasvat jñaḥ tad ātmajaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam haridaśva arcanaḥ tatas śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam tasmāt vaikartanaḥ sutaḥ śata hīnam kṛtam rājyam
