prabhṛti loke asmin aḍāḍā khyātim āgatā sarva duṣṭa apahaḥ homaḥ sarva roga upaśāṃti daḥ kriyate asyām dvijaiḥ pārtha tena sā holikā matā sarva sāra ati viśvā iyam pūrvam āsīt yudhiṣṭhira sāra tvāt phalguḥ iti eṣā parama ānaṃda dāyinī asyām niśā āgame pārtha saṃrakṣyāḥ śiśavaḥ gṛhe gomayena upasaṃlipte sa catuṣke gṛha aṃgaṇe ākārayet śiśu prāyān khaḍga vyagra karān narān te kāṣṭha khaṇḍaiḥ saṃspṛśya gītaiḥ hāsya karaiḥ śiśūn rakṣaṃti teṣām dātavyam guḍam pakva annam eva ca evam ḍhauṃḍhita mātrasya sa doṣaḥ praśamam vrajet bālānām rakṣaṇam kāryam tasyāt tasmin niśā āgame yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca kṛtvā ca avaśya kāryāṇi saṃtarpya pitṛ devatāḥ vaṃdayet holikābhūtim sarva duṣṭa upaśāṃtaye catuṣkam kārayet śreṣṭham varṇakaiḥ ca akṣataiḥ śubhaiḥ kalaśasya agratas deyāḥ upānaha vara aṃśukāḥ āsane ca upaviṣṭasya brahmaghoṣeṇa bhārata carcayet candanam nārī avyaṃga aṃgā su lakṣaṇā padmarāga uttara paṭā śreṣṭha aṃśuka vibhūṣitā vasu dhārām śira ugre ca dadhi dūrvā akṣata anvitām carcāpayitvā śrīkhaṃḍam āyuḥ ārogya vṛddhaye paścāt ca prāśayet vidvān cūta puṣpam sa caṃdanam manobhavasya sā pūjā ṛṣibhiḥ saṃpradarśitā ye pibaṃti vasaṃta ādau cūta puṣpam sa candanam satyam hṛdistha kāmasya tad pūrtiḥ jāyate iñjasā anaṃtaram dvijendrāṇām sūta māgadha baṃdinām dadyāt dānam yathāśaktyā kāmaḥ me prīyatām iti tatas bhojana velāyām śṛtam yat prāktane ahani prāśnīyāt prathamam ca annam tatas bhuñjīta kāmataḥ ādhayaḥ vyādhayaḥ ca eva yānti nāśam na saṃśayaḥ putra pautra samāyuktaḥ sukham tiṣṭhati mānavaḥ puṇyā pavitrā jaya dā sarva vighra vināśinī eṣā te kathitā pārtha tithīnām uttamā tithiḥ saṃprāśya cūta kusumam saha candanena satyam hi pārtha puruṣaḥ sa sukhī samāste iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde phālgunapūrṇimo tsavavarṇanam nāma dvātriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca saṃtyajya ali kula ālīḍha kusumāni mṛdūni api damanena katham lokaiḥ pūjyaṃte nāka nāyakāḥ dolāṃdolana māhātmyam ratha yātrā mahā utsavam kathayasva amalam prājña yādava aṃbhoja bhāskara śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca pārtha arthi jana sat vṛkṣa kṣāṃti dhāma dharāpate yat etat bhavatā pṛṣṭam tat śṛṇuṣva vadāmi te purā surāṇām āvāse maṃdare cāru kaṃdare gandhādhārī kula ālīḍhaḥ jātaḥ damanakaḥ taruḥ tasya gaṃdham anāghreyam āghrāya sura yoṣitaḥ madana unmāda vaśagāḥ gāyaṃti ca hasaṃti ca ṛṣayaḥ niyamān tyaktvā prādravanta gṛhān prati na veda adhyayane dhyāne ratiḥ teṣām babhūva ha mānasam māninīnām tu punar gaṃdhena saṃdhitam gaṃdhena ākulitam lokam dṛṣṭvā brahmā tam abravīt śama nirmitayā vācā roṣāt prasphurita adharaḥ jātaḥ tvam loka damanāt nūnam damanakaḥ mayā ekasya api apakāram yaḥ karoti sa nara adhamaḥ bahūnām apakārāya saṃpravṛtaḥ kim ucyate dṛṣṭa artha bādhakam karma na kartavyam kathaṃcana adṛṣṭam prati saṃdehaḥ saḥ usmābhiḥ anumīyate puruṣāt evam ārabdham na krodhāt na artha kāraṇāt svabhāvaḥ eṣa me brahman tvayā sṛṣṭaḥ purā vibho yā yasya jaṃtoḥ prakṛtiḥ śubhā vā yadi vā itarā puṣpita aśoka śobhā āḍhye vane puṃskokila ākule tasmin kāle sureśānām śirāṃsi ākramya līlayā ye tvām āropayiṣyaṃti dāna māna purassarāḥ surāṇām te bhaviṣyanti sadā eva sukhinaḥ narāḥ sarvadā eva śivasya iṣṭā puṇyā pāpa bhaya apahā uvāsa vāsita aśeṣa bhuvanaḥ gaṃdha sampadā divye girau girisu nādayita adhivāse ratna aṃśu kacchurita kāñcana bhūmi bhāge śāpam varam ca hṛdaye viniveśya śaṃbhoḥ tatra āsthitaḥ damanakaḥ damita aṃtarātmā pravṛtta nara nārīkam pañcama uccāra sundaram sa ānaṃdam naṃdana vane ārdrayā sahitaḥ yathā unmādayan vane puṇye vidyādhara gaṇān bahūn vasaṃta ṛtau nṛtyamānān sura asura śata arcitaḥ saṃtāna pārijāta utthām baddhvā sa mādhavī latām kaścid āṃdolanam cakre samāliṃgya ghana stanīm gīta māṃdolaka ārūḍhaḥ tat gāyanti amara striyaḥ tam dṛṣṭvā aṣṭāpada nibhā bhavānī prāha śaṃkaram kautukam me paśya imāḥ śaṃkara prabho āṃdolakam mama kṛte kārayasva su alaṃkṛtam tat gaurī vacanam ramyam śrutvā go vṛṣabha dhvajaḥ sat dolām kārayāmāsa samāhūya mahā asurān staṃbha dvayam ropayitvā iṣṭāpūrta mayam dṛḍham satyam ca eva uparitatam śreṣṭham kāṣṭham akalpayat vāsukim daṃḍaka sthāne baddhvā tāṃtavasa prabham tat phaṇām aṃtarā pīṭham kṛtavān maṇi maṃḍitam kṛmi kārpāsa kauśeya vastraiḥ saṃveṣṭitam navaiḥ sragdāma ālaṃbita prāṃta maṇi mauktika śekharam racayitvā vicitrām tām dolām caila ajina uttarām tatra ārūḍhaḥ tu yāvat sa saumya soma vibhūṣaṇaḥ maṃdaram dolayāmāsa pārśva sthaiḥ pārṣadaiḥ saha vāma pārśve tu vijayā dakṣiṇena jayā bhavet cāmara ākrāṃta bāhū te tena āśliṣṭe nyavījatām āṃdolayantyā pārvatyā sahitam sa gada akṣaram yena deva asura straiṇam āsīt ānaṃda nirbharam jaguḥ gaṃdharva patayaḥ nanṛtuḥ ca apsaraḥ gaṇāḥ ucchalat tāla vādyāni vādayanti sma cāraṇāḥ celuḥ kula acalāḥ sarve cukṣubhuḥ sapta sāgarāḥ vavuḥ vātāḥ sa nirghātāḥ deve dolām samāsthite ālokya vyākulam lokam devāḥ śakra purogamāḥ upāramasva bhagavan bhavataḥ krīḍayā anayā gīrvāṇa gīrbhiḥ saṃhṛṣṭaḥ śaṃkaraḥ loka śaṃkaraḥ uvāca vacanam pārtha su rasa arthasya paśyataḥ sa anukaṃpam su lalitam visphuṭa artha pada akṣaram śrī mahādevaḥ uvāca adya prabhṛti ye dolā krīḍām puṣkariṇī taṭe vasaṃte kārayiṣyaṃti maṃḍite tridaśa aṃgaṇe netra paṭṭāpaṭa channām padmarāga vibhūṣi tām ātapatreṇa saṃyuktām vinyasta kanaka aṃḍakām vicitra ābharaṇa ābhābhiḥ ābhāsita digaṃtarām tārakā śāṃta citrāṅga puṣpa mālā manoramām mālām vidyādhara ākrātām prāṃta ropita darpaṇām chatra cāmara saṃchannām yathā śaktyā api alaṃkṛtām agni kāryam tatas kṛtvā kṣiptvā ca eva diśām balim tasyām āropayet devam iṣṭa hṛṣṭa jana āvṛtaḥ mūlamaṃtreṇa devānām proktam dolā adhirohaṇam pārśva sthaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ vidvān paṭhet vā maṃtram uttamam gaṃbhīra aṃtara nirghoṣaiḥ lalanānām ca nisvanaiḥ stuti maṃgala śabdaiḥ ca puṣpa dhūpa aghivāsitām etasmin antare nārīm dohanāya nikuṭṭakām praveśayet kuṃkuma āḍhyām krīḍā varṇapriyaiḥ saha suvarṇaśṛṃgiṇā proktam smita daṃta aṃśu karburam jala saṃklinna vasanaḥ raśanā dāma maṃḍitaḥ kambu grīvā ullasan sarvaḥ babhūva gaṇikā gaṇaḥ kuṃkuma kṣoda tāṃbūla puṣpa mālā ākulaḥ janaḥ tām vihāya jala krīḍām na anyasyāḥ vidadhe manaḥ pīta śīta jala āghāta tāḍitaḥ api janaḥ sukham nīrujaḥ te bhaviṣyanti sukhitāḥ śaradām śatam putra pautra samāḥ yuktāḥ dhana dhānya samāyutāḥ te prāpnuvaṃti bhuvi janma taroḥ phalāni duḥkha arṇavāt kula śatāni api tārayaṃti śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca ratha yātrā vidhānam te yāmi yudhiṣṭhira sthiraḥ bhūtvā nibodha idam tvam hi mūrta vidām varaḥ nāradaḥ śāradā kāntāt śiva loke samāyayau dṛṣṭvā apūrvam śivam śāṃtam sura īśaiḥ sarvatas vṛtam praṇamya upāviśat vipraḥ puratas keśa veśayoḥ tam upāsīnam ālakṣya bhagavān bhaga netra hā papraccha ācchādita manāḥ kutas ca āgamyate punar śrī nāradaḥ uvāca vasaṃtaḥ nāma kaḥ api eṣa kāmasya dayitaḥ sakhā malaya anila yuktena tena viśvam vaśīkṛtam śaśāṃka śekharaḥ kaḥ ayam kaḥ yam śaṃkha gadā dharaḥ koyam ca ḍimbaḥ vā brahmā kāmaḥ trijagatām prabhuḥ prāyas krīḍā ratiḥ lokaḥ vasaṃta vacanāt punar vyavasāyam na gacchanti ye saṃhṛtya vana aṃtaram gāyaṃtaḥ ca parīhṛṣṭāḥ te ca api āyāṃti yāṃti ca gopya sīmāṃtara gatāḥ kṣetra sthānasya rakṣiṇaḥ te api gāyaṃti nṛtyaṃti hasaṃti smaratārakāḥ viṭam paśyaṃti kulaṭāḥ prārabdha ucita paṇḍitāḥ su manāṃsi su saṃgīta nṛtya vādya su vāditam lalat lamba stanīm dṛṣṭvā jarā yoṣā api nṛtyati sarāṃsi adbhuta padmāni praphullā puṣpa vāṭikāḥ vṛkṣāḥ pakṣi śata ākīrṇāḥ vijighrāṇa mukhāḥ surāḥ vikaṃpa vasanāvālaḥ pavanaḥ triguṇa ātmakaḥ avajalpa mukhāḥ bālāḥ vṛddhāḥ tu vikala dvijāḥ ubhau api pratapyete paśya idam kāma ceṣṭitam pakṣiṇām pakṣa nikṣepaiḥ nadyaḥ tuṃga taraṃgakaiḥ pādapāḥ pallava śataiḥ nṛtyaṃte ca praharṣiṇaḥ kautuka ākulitaḥ śīghram āruroha ratham svakam prayayau puṇḍarīkākṣaḥ śaṃkha cakra gadā dharaḥ pārāvata pratīkāśam catur veda mayam ratham āsthāya prayayau hṛṣṭaḥ brahmā brāhmaṇa saṃstutaḥ kātyāyanī pracalitā pañcavaktreṇa ketunā prayātaḥ sva ratha ārūḍhaḥ kṛta karṇa kula ākulaḥ evam devaḥ parivṛtaḥ bhagavān go vṛṣa dhvajaḥ ratha ārūḍhaiḥ amūḍha ātmā martya lokam avātarat yāvat paśyati deveśaḥ tāvat sarvam tat akṣaram devaiḥ sārddham paśupatiḥ yāvat paśyati vismitaḥ gāyaṃti kecid sa utkaṃṭham luṭhaṃti anye praharṣitāḥ vādayaṃti apare tuṣṭāḥ jahasuḥ kecid ulbaṇam vādayaṃti anyathā vādyam gāyaṃti anye nyathā gaṇāḥ krīḍā ratibhiḥ ārabdham ālāpaiḥ ca suraiḥ api surāṇām kṣobham ālakṣya bhagavān govṛṣa dhvajaḥ vasaṃtaḥ svāmi bhakta tvāt mānya puṣpa ākaram yadā unmāda āḍhya janaḥ rakṣyaḥ kāryam kārya dvayam mama saṃciṃtya evam samānāyya vasaṃtam prāha śaṃkaraḥ samānītaḥ māsam ekam sthātavyam bhavatā tu iha yaḥ yathā ratham ārūḍhaḥ samāyātaḥ samīkṣitum varṣe varṣe sa tena eva saṃsthānena āgamiṣyati evam ābhāṣya bhagavān vasaṃtam ca tatas suraiḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca rathaḥ kimātmakaḥ kāryaḥ kāryā yātrā katham bhavet śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca su vicitram citra tanum śreṣṭha kāṣṭha mayam ratham su dṛḍha akṣam dṛḍha ābaṃdham su cakra ratha kūbaram atha vā vaṃśa vihitam netra paṭṭa paṭa āvṛtam tārakā śata citra aṃśam puṣpa mālā vibhūṣitam sita go yuga saṃyuktam pañcabāṇa patākinam chatra cāmara śobhā āḍhyam sthāpayet bhavana aṅgaṇe vaiśvadevam tatas kuryāt graha yajña vidhānataḥ catur caraṇakaiḥ maṃtraiḥ vipra śāntika pauṣṭikaiḥ āropayet rathe devam mūlamaṃtreṇa maṃtra vid abhīṣūṇām mahimānam panāyata manuḥ paścāt anuyacchanti raśmayaḥ śaṃkha duṃdubhi nirghoṣaiḥ kāhalānām ca niḥsvanaiḥ doṣa asukhena ramitam preṣaṇīya puraḥsaram tāṃbūlāni rathe dadyāt puṣpa mālā yutāni ca tasya tasya bhavet pūjyaḥ puṣpa dhūpa akṣata ādibhiḥ itaraḥ api bhavet pūjyaḥ saṃprāpte gṛhiṇām gṛhe kim punar jagatām bhartā sarva loka mahā īśvaraḥ kadācid akṣa bhaṅgaḥ syāt dhvaja bhaṃgaḥ atha vā bhavet brāhmaṇān tatra saṃpūjya homaḥ kāryaḥ vijānatā preraṇī prekṣaṇīyaiḥ ca bhrāmayitvā ratha uttamam vidyādharīṇām caritam itarābhiḥ prakāśyate sarva vyādhi vihīnaḥ ca sukhī syāt śaradām śatam yaḥ kārayitvā sauvarṇam raupyam vā ratham uttamam varṇakaiḥ citritam divyam dāru jam vā su śobhanam tatra api jāgaram kuryāt vādya gīta sumam galaiḥ aparāyām tṛtīye ahni sthāpayet ratham uttamam prekṣaṇīya vinodena tām rātrim ativāhayet mahāyātrām prakurvīta tatra api adbhuta ceṣṭitam pūjayitvā vidhānena ṣaṣṭhe ahni bhavanam nayet gaurī pūjyā tṛtīyāyām caturthyām vighnanāyakaḥ pañcamyām paṃkaja karām pūjayet vā sarasvatīm ṣaṣṭhyām śakti dharam skandam saptamyām tu divākaram aṣṭamyām ca caturdaśyām sampūjyaḥ śaśiśekharaḥ navamyām pūjayet caṇḍīm cāmuṇḍām muṇḍa mālinīm daśamyām ṛṣayaḥ śāṃtāḥ sarve vyāsa purassarāḥ ekādaśyām cakrapāṇim dvādaśyām vā samarcayet trayodaśyām trinetra uttha vahninā śāṃta vigraham sādhāraṇī tu sarveṣām paurṇamāsī tithiḥ smṛtā vyutkrameṇa api kartavyā tithīnām kārya gauravāt yātrā vāsaṃtikī ca iyam citta svāsthya karī parā samyak sudhā dhavalite bhavane surāṇām aṃtar su vastra maṇi mauktika dāna citre tāṃbūlaka kramuka vāravilāsinībhiḥ yātrām vidhāya bhavati iha sa bhārata īśaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde damanakāṃdolakarathayātrāmahotsavavarṇanam nāma catustriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca gaurīm vivāhya jagrāha haraḥ pāśupatam vratam umāpatiḥ paśupatiḥ dhyāna āsaktaḥ babhūva ha gauryāḥ manaḥ bhilaṣita pūraṇāya praharṣitaiḥ tatas māraḥ smaraḥ kāmaḥ upi ājagāma tam āśramam nidhāna vāruṇī darpa śṛṃgāraiḥ parivāritaḥ āmra aśoka vana uttaṃsaḥ mālatī kṛta śekharaḥ jhallarī vādya saṃghuṣṭa bhāṃḍāgārika lekhakaḥ pāna matta aṅganā ārūḍhaḥ hindola āścarya maṃtrimān mahā rāja adhirājaḥ vā smaraḥ prāptaḥ hara aṃtikam sa puṣpa cāpam ākṛṣya madana unmādanam śaram buddhvā tam tasya saṃkalpam rudraḥ krodhāt jvalan ruṣā lalāṭāt vahnim asṛjat tṛtīya nayanāt haraḥ kāmaḥ vilokitaḥ tena bhasmībhūtaḥ ca tad kṣaṇāt dagdham dṛṣṭvā smaram śokāt rati prītī sthite sadā tatas śoka ārta hṛdayā gaurī rudram uvāca ha kuru prasādam deveśa rati prītye vṛṣadhvaja saṃjīvaya smaram śaṃbho mūrtimaṃtam punar kuru tat śrutvā tu mahādevaḥ hṛṣṭaḥ provāca pārvatīm upaplutam jagat sarvam manmathena śarīriṇā asyām manobhavaḥ devi bhaviṣyati śarīravān evam varam imam dattvā manmathāya yudhiṣṭhira jagāma himavat śṛṃgam kailāsam pārvatī priyaḥ pūjā vidhānam aparam kathayāmi śṛṇuṇva tat asyām snātvā trayodaśyām aśoka ākhyam nagam likhet kāmadevam vasaṃtam ca vājivaktram jhaṣadhvajam sauvarṇam vā mahā rāja vārkṣam citram atha api vā līlā vilāsa gamanam garvitam sa apsa rogaṇam gandharva gīta vāditra prekṣaṇīya samākulam nandyāvarti rati krīḍāprīti vidyādharaiḥ yutam maṃtreṇa anena kauṃteya naraḥ nāryā samanvitaḥ namaḥ vāmāya kāmāya devadevāya mūrtaye brahma viṣṇu śiva indrāṇām manaḥ kṣobha karāya vai nānā prakārān bhakṣyān ca kāmaḥ me prīyatām iti sva patim pūjayet nārī vastra mālā vibhūṣaṇaiḥ kāmaḥ ayam iti saṃciṃtya prahṛṣṭena aṃtarātmanā manmatha āyatane tasmin yajamānaḥ suhṛd vṛtaḥ rātrau jāgaraṇam kuryāt sukha rātriḥ yathā bhavet karpūra kuṃkuma kṣoda gaṃdha tāṃbūla sarjanaiḥ nānā prakāraiḥ bhakṣyaiḥ ca kuryāt rātrau mahā utsavam dīpa prajvālanaiḥ nṛtyaiḥ prekṣaṇaiḥ prekṣaṇa utsavaiḥ vasaṃta samaye prāpte hṛṣṭaḥ tuṣṭaḥ nṛpaḥ pure subhikṣam kṣemam ārogyam yaśaḥ śrīḥ saukhyam uttamam kāma varṣī ca parjanyaḥ tasmin rāṣṭre prajāyate tuṣyate tu bhṛśam devaḥ dvādaśārddha arddha locanaḥ tathā kāmaḥ ca viṣṇuḥ ca vasaṃtaḥ ca prajāpatiḥ sarve api tasya tuṣyaṃti yakṣa gaṃdharva dānavāḥ asurāḥ yātudhānāḥ ca suparṇāḥ patagāḥ nagāḥ tuṣṭāḥ prayacchaṃti sukham tasya kartuḥ na saṃśayaḥ ratyā saha arcya puruṣaḥ pravarā ca yoṣit saubhāgya rūpa suta saukhya yutā sadā syāt yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca bhūta mātā iti saṃhṛṣṭe grāme grāme pure pure mukha aṃga bhaṃgān kurute loke vāta gṛhīta vat kim eṣa śāstra nirdiṣṭaḥ mārgaḥ kim uta laukikaḥ muhyate me manaḥ kṛṣṇa tvam tu vaktum iha arhasi śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca śṛṇu pārtha pravakṣyāmi yat te kiñcid manogatam āstikaḥ śraddadhānaḥ ca bhavati iti matiḥ mama krīḍan āste mudā yuktaḥ divya krīḍanakaiḥ haraḥ siñjat sat raśanām hṛṣṭām dṛṣṭvā gaurīm jagadguruḥ niḥsṛtām kāmayāmāsa mahārha śayane śivaḥ rata sthayoḥ tayoḥ jātam divya varṣa śatam yadā tadā devī samucchrāya nirodhāt nirgatā bahis mūtra udakāt samuttasthau nārī nirdārita udarā kṛṣṇā karāla vadanā piṃga akṣā mukta mūrddhajā kapāla mālā ābharaṇā baddha piṃḍā ūrdhva piṃḍikā vyāghra carma aṃbara dharā raṇat kiṃkiṇi mekhalā ḍamaḥ ḍamaḥ ḍamarukā phūtkāra āpūrita aṃbarā tasyāḥ pārśva anujāḥ ca anyāḥ gīta vādya laya anugāḥ uttāla tālam abalāḥ nṛtyaṃti ca hasaṃti ca kapāla khaṭvāṅga dharāḥ gaja carma avaguṇṭhitāḥ tathā eva śaṃkarāt jātaḥ tad rūpa ābharaṇaḥ pumān siṃha śārdūla vadanaiḥ radana ullikhita aṃbaraiḥ ekībhūtaiḥ kṣaṇena eva tau bhavānī bhavodbhavau dṛṣṭvā hṛṣṭa manāḥ devaḥ prāha devīm su vismitām bībhatsa adbhuta śṛṃgāra vara āyudha vidhāriṇau nṛ nāryoḥ antaram kiñcid sādṛśyāt pratibhāsayet bhrātṛbhāṃḍā bhūtamātā tathā eva udakasevikā saṃjñā trayam tayoḥ kṛtvā tatas prādāt varam haraḥ sevayiṣyaṃti ye bhaktyā jala saṃpūrṇa kaṃḍukaiḥ bhojayet kṣiprayā ca eva kṛsara apūpa pāyasaiḥ sa putra paśu vṛddhim ca śarīra ārogyam āpnuyāt na śākinyaḥ gṛhe tasya na piśācāḥ na rākṣasāḥ pīḍām kurvaṃti śiśavaḥ yāṃti vṛddhim nirāmayāḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca kadā pūjā prakartavyā bhūtamātuḥ sukha arthibhiḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca sarvatra eṣā bhagavatī bālānām hita kāriṇī nāma bhedaiḥ kriyā bhedaiḥ kāla bhedaiḥ ca pūjyate pratipad prabhṛti jyeṣṭhe yāvat paṃcadaśī tithiḥ tāvat pūjā prakartavyā preraṇaiḥ prekṣaṇīyakaiḥ vikarma phala nirdeśaḥ pāṃḍavānām viḍaṃbanam pradṛśyaṃte hāsya paraiḥ naraiḥ adbhuta ceṣṭitaiḥ viśvāsya dhana lobhena saṃdhyāyām nihataḥ pathi ārohaṇam ca śūla agre na paśyaṃtam hi paśyati dṛṣṭaḥ bhavadbhiḥ saṃhṛṣṭaḥ para pāra avamarśakaḥ śīrṇa sūkṣmeṇa patreṇa bālāḥ mālā anumoditāḥ muṣka bhuj rāsam ārūḍhaḥ mukham kṛtvā ca paścime caraiḥ kilāsaiḥ saṃprāptaḥ sarva udvega karaḥ param daṃḍa prahāra abhihataḥ nīyate daṃḍa pāśikaiḥ prekṣakaiḥ veṣṭitaḥ stenaḥ raṭati eṣa vimohitaḥ saṃyamya nīyate iyam tu mūrkhaḥ kraurya āvila īkṣaṇaḥ sita keśam sita śmaśru sita aṃbara dharam dvijam vaṭa ceṣṭā capeṭābhiḥ hanyamānam na paśyata gṛhāt niṣkramyatām raṃḍā vṛddhaḥ bhūtvā api asau striyāḥ svasyāḥ asau na kurute mūḍhaḥ bharaṇa poṣaṇam bhairava ābharaṇa uttālāḥ vyāla yajña upavītinaḥ pradattvā atāṇḍava padān paśyadhvam dhvāṃta dīpakān gṛhītam yat anena idam bālena api mahā vratam rakta dṛś kāka kṛṣṇa aṃgam śabaram kim na paśyata taru koṭara aṃtara gatān chitvā ca śuka śāvakān bahubhiḥ koṣṭhakīkṛtya śara oghaiḥ śakalīkṛtam vimukta ḍhakka ahaṃkāra su prahāram nirīkṣata imām kṛṣṇa arddha vadanām gṛhītām siṃdura arcitām vimukta keśām nṛtyantīm paśyadhvam yoginīm iva gaṃbhīra tūrya dhvaninā prabuddhām vṛtta tāṃḍavām evam prekṣaṇakam kṛtvā nayet vṛkṣa tale ca tām evam kṛte na dāridryam na ca duḥkham bhavet nṛṇām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde bhūtamātrutsavavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭatriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atha atas saṃpravakṣyāmi bali rakṣā vidhim nṛpa tam śṛṇu ekāgra manasā samāsāt gaditam mayā purā devāsure yuddhe dānavāḥ sura nirjitāḥ śukram balim puras kṛtvā yayuḥ śukraḥ uvāca tam śakraḥ uvāca na viṣādaḥ tvayā kāryaḥ kāryāṇām gatiḥ īdṛśī daivāt bhavanti bhūtānām kāle jaya parājayāḥ saṃdhānam saha śakreṇa kriyatām ayana dvayam ajeyaḥ sarva śatrūṇām kṛtaḥ śacyā śacīpatiḥ rakṣā baṃdha prabhāvena dānava indraḥ jitaḥ mahān varṣam ekam pratīkṣasva tatas śreyaḥ bhaviṣyati bhārgaveṇa evam uktāḥ te dānavāḥ vigata jvarāḥ tasthuḥ kālam pratīkṣantaḥ yathā uktam guruṇā tathā eṣa prabhāvaḥ rakṣāyāḥ kathitaḥ te yudhiṣṭhira yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca yathā yathā hi bhagavān vicitrāṇi prabhāṣate tathā tathā na me tṛptiḥ bahu arthāḥ śṛṇvataḥ kathāḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca ghana āvṛte ambare pārtha śādvale dharaṇī tale saṃprāpte śrāvaṇe ca eva paurṇamāsyām dina udaye snānam kurvīta matimān śruti smṛti vidhānata tatas devān pitṛrn ca eva tarpayet parama aṃbhasā upākarma ādi veda uktam ṛṣīṇām ca eva tarpaṇam kuryuḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ śrāddham devam uddiśya śaktitaḥ śūdrāṇām maṃtra sahitam snānam dānam ca śasyate tatas uparāhna samaye rakṣā poṭalikāḥ śubhāḥ kārayet ca akṣataiḥ śastaiḥ siddhārthaiḥ hema bhūṣitāḥ kāryā gṛhasya rakṣā gomaya rahitaiḥ su vṛtta kuṃḍūkaiḥ dūrvā varṇaka sahitaiḥ sakala duṣkṛta upaśāṃtaye tatra upaviśet rājā sa amātyaḥ sa purohitaḥ sa suhṛd rakṣā baṃdhaḥ kāryaḥ śāṃti dhvaninā narendrasya tadanu purodhāḥ nṛpatim rakṣām badhnīta maṃtreṇa yena baddhaḥ baliḥ rājā dānava indraḥ mahā balaḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ vaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ ca anyaiḥ ca mānavaiḥ yaḥ śrāvaṇe sravati śīta jale narendra rakṣā vidhāna vidhim ācarate manuṣyaḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde śrāvaṇa pūrṇimārakṣābandhanavidhivarṇanam nāma saptatriṃśat adhika śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭātriṃdadhikaśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca puṇyā mahā navamī asti tithīnām pravarā tithiḥ sā anuṣṭheyā suraiḥ sarvaiḥ prajāpālaiḥ viśeṣataḥ bhūta preta piśācānām prīti artham ca utsavāya vā yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca kasmāt kālāt pravṛttā iyam navamī maha śabda yuj uta aho pūrvam eva āsīt kṛta tretā yuga ādiṣu hatānām prāṇinām teṣām kā gatiḥ pāralaukikī svayam ghnatām ghātayatām anumodayatām tathā etat me saṃśayam pūrvam vaktum arhasi keśava śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca pārtha yā paramā śaktiḥ anantā loka viśrutā ādyā sarva gatā śuddhā bhāva gamyā manoharā ādyā aṣṭamī kalākālī dvitīyā sarvamaṅgalā dhyāyanti yām yoga ratām sā devī parameśvarī rūpa bhedaiḥ nāma bhedaiḥ bhavānī pūjyate śivā aṣṭamyām tu navamyām tu deva dānava rākṣasaiḥ anyeṣu api yugeṣu ādau sṛṣṭeḥ pūrvam pradarśitā pūjyate iyam purā devī tebhyaḥ pūrvataraiḥ śubhaiḥ ca yā aṣṭamī mūla saṃyutā kanyā gate savitari śuklapakṣe aṣṭamī tu yā mūla nakṣatra saṃyuktā sā mahānavamī smṛtā aṣṭamyām ca navamyām ca jaganmātaram ambikām māsi viśokaḥ jayati dviṣaḥ santarjayantī huṃkāraiḥ khaḍga ādibhiḥ aharniśam navamyām pūjitā devī dadāti navamam phalam sā puṇyā sā pavitrā ca sā dharma sukha dāyinī tasmāt sadā pūjanīyā cāmuṇḍā amuṇḍa mālinī tasyām yadi upayujyante prāṇinaḥ mahiṣa ādayaḥ yathā saṃtuṣyate loke mahiṣaiḥ vindhyavāsinī bhavānī prāṅgaṇe prāṇāḥ yeṣām yātāḥ yudhiṣṭhira teṣām svarge dhruvam vāsaḥ varāḥ te apsarasām priyāḥ teṣu sarveṣu ca eva āsīt navamī iyam purā arcitā prasiddha anādinidhanāḥ varṣe varṣe yudhiṣṭhira bhūyas bhūyas avatāraiḥ ca bhavānī pūjyate suraiḥ avatīrṇā bhuvi sadā nityam daitya nibarhiṇī punar ca eṣā mahā devī yaśodā garbha saṃbhavā kaṃsa asurasya uttamāṅge pādam dattvā gata āyuṣaḥ tatas prabhṛti lokeṣu yaśodā ānaṃda dāyinīm viṃdhya acale sthāpayitvā punar pūjā pravartitā evam viṃdhya upavāsinyāḥ nava rātra upavāsinaḥ eka rātreṇa naktena sva śaktyā a yācitena vā snātaiḥ pramuditaiḥ hṛṣṭaiḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ nṛpaiḥ strībhiḥ ca kuru śārdūla tat vidhānam idam śṛṇu jaya abhilāṣī nṛpatiḥ pratipad prabhṛti kramāt lohābhihārikam karma kārayet yāvat aṣṭami prāc udak pravaṇe deśe patākābhiḥ alaṃkṛtam maṇḍapam kārayet divyam nava sapta karam varam āgneyyām kārayet kuṇḍam hasta mātram su śobhanam rāja cihnāni sarvāṇi śastrāṇi astrāṇi yāni ca ānīya maṇḍape tāni sarvāṇi eva adhivāsayet tatas tu brāhmaṇaḥ snātaḥ śukla aṃbara dharaḥ śuciḥ loha nāmā abhavat pūrvam dānavaḥ tu mahā balaḥ tad aṃga sambhavam loham yat sarvam dṛśyate kṣitau śastra astra mantraiḥ hotavyam pāyasam ghṛta saṃyutam huta śeṣam turaṃgāṇām gajānām upahārayet lohābhihārikam karma tena etat ṛṣibhiḥ smṛtam baddha pratiśaravyam ca gaja aśva samalaṃkṛtam pratyaham nṛpatiḥ snātvā saṃpūjya pitṛ devatāḥ pūjayet rāja cihnāni phala mālya anulepanaiḥ tasya abhiharaṇāt rājñaḥ vijayaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ pūjā maṃtrān pravakṣyāmi purāṇa uktān aham tava yaiḥ pūjitāḥ prayacchanti kīrtim āyuḥ yaśaḥ balam yathā aṃbudaḥ chādayati śivāya imām vasundharām gandharva kula jātaḥ tvam mā bhūyāḥ kula dūṣakaḥ tejasā ca eva sūryasya munīnām tapasā yathā yām gatim brahma hā gacchet pitṛ hā mātṛ hā tathā bhūmi artha inṛta vādī ca kṣatriyaḥ ca parāṅmukhaḥ sūryācandramasau vāyuḥ pāvakaḥ ca na yatra vai vrajet ca tām gatim kṣipram tat ca pāpam bhavet kila patatrirāj vainateyaḥ tathā nārāyaṇadhvajaḥ śastra varma āyudhān yodhān rakṣa smān ca ripūn daha supratīka uñjanaḥ nīlaḥ ete aṣṭau devayonayaḥ eteṣām putra pautrāḥ ca balāni aṣṭau samāśritāḥ bhadraḥ mandraḥ mṛgaḥ ca eva gajaḥ saṃkīrṇaḥ eva ca vanevane prasūtāḥ te kari yonim mahā gajāḥ tvām vasavaḥ rudrāḥ ādityāḥ sa marut gaṇāḥ śrīḥ te somāt balam viṣṇoḥ tejaḥ sūryāt javaḥ nilāt sthairyam meroḥ jayam rudrāt yaśaḥ devāt puraṃdarāt yuddhe rakṣantu nāgāḥ tvām diśaḥ ca saha daivataiḥ aśvinau saha gaṃdharvaiḥ pāṃtu tvām sarvatas sadā nāga kinnara gandharva yakṣa bhūta gaṇa āgrahāḥ pramathāḥ ca saha ādityaiḥ bhūteśaḥ mātṛbhiḥ saha śakra senāpatiḥ skandaḥ varuṇaḥ ca āśritāḥ tvayi pradahantu ripūn sarvān rājā vijayam ṛcchatu yāni prayuktāni aribhiḥ dūṣaṇāni samaṃtataḥ etāni para śatrūṇām hatāni tava tejasā śobhitā asi tathā eva adya śobhamānā astu bhūpateḥ nīlām śvetām imām dṛṣṭvā naśyaṃtu adya nṛpa arayaḥ sadyas svasthāḥ bhavanti sma tvad vātena apamārjitāḥ pūtanā revatī nāmnā kālarātrī iti yā smṛtā dahantu āśu ripūn sarvān patāke tvām upāgatāḥ iti patākā mantraḥ asiḥ ca ripu hā khaḍgaḥ tīkṣṇa karmā durāsadaḥ iti aṣṭau tava nāmāni svayam uktāni vedhasā nakṣatram kṛttikā tubhyam guruḥ devaḥ maheśvaraḥ hiraṇyam ca śarīram te dhātā devaḥ janārdanaḥ dundubhe tvam sapatnānām ghoṣāt hṛdaya kampana yathā jīmūta ghoṣeṇa hṛṣyaṃti vara vāraṇāḥ tathā astu tava śabdena harṣaḥ asmākam mudā āvahaḥ yathā jīmūta śabdena strīṇām trāsaḥ abhijāyate cāpa mām sarvadā rakṣa sākam sāyaka sattamaiḥ puṇyaḥ tvam śaṅkha puṣpāṇām maṅgalānām ca maṅgalam viṣṇunā vidhṛtaḥ nityam manaḥ śāṃti pradaḥ bhava protsāraya āśu duritam ca amara amara vallabha iti cāmara maṃtraḥ sarva āyudhānām prathamā nirmitā asi pinākinā śūla āyudhāt viniṣkṛṣya kṛtvā muṣṭi parigraham caṃḍikāyāḥ pradattā asi sarva duṣṭa nibarhiṇi tathā vistāritā ca asi devānām pratipāditā sattva aṃga bhūtā asi sarva aśubha nivāriṇi churike rakṣa mām nityam śāntim yaccha namaḥ astu te iti churikā maṃtraḥ tāḍaya āśu ripūn sarvān hemadaṃḍa namaḥ astu te iti kanakadaṇḍa mantraḥ duḥkha hā dharma daḥ śāṃtaḥ sarva ariṣṭa vināśanaḥ ete aṣṭau saṃnidhau yasmāt tava siṃhā mahā balā tvayi sthitaḥ śivaḥ sākṣāt tvayi śakra sura īśvaraḥ aṣṭamyām dhāvanam kṛtvā pūrvāhne snānam ācaret durgām kāṃcana mūrtim raupyām vā paittalīm vārkṣī caitrīm tāmrīm vā adhibhavataḥ kṛtvā dāru vicitra toraṇa vinyastām śobhane sthāne puratas vinyasta dṛṣṭām vicitra gṛha madhya gām snātām kuṃkuma caṃdana gaṃdhaiḥ catur samaiḥ cīra paṭṭaiḥ carcita gātrām devīm kusumaiḥ abhyarcya tām bahubhiḥ puṣyamāṇa kīrtiḥ taiḥ dvi jananaiḥ janita paritoṣaiḥ divā anvitaḥ naredraḥ svayam prayacchet purohitaiḥ sārdham bilva patreṇa arcan jayaṃtī maṃgalā kālī bhadrakālī kapālinī durgā śivā kṣamā dhātrī svāhā svadhā namaḥ astu te durgā saṃpūjanīyā ca tad dināt droṇapuṣpayā sā ca abhīṣṭā sureśānyāḥ tathā rūḍha vraṇa āyutaḥ tatas khaḍgam namaskṛtya śatrūṇām māna marddanam icchet sva vijayam rājyam subhikṣam ca ātmanaḥ nṛpa punar punar praṇamya atha dhyāyet ca hṛdaye śivām mahiṣa ghnīm bahu bhujām kumārīm siṃha vāhinīm dānavān tarjayatī ca khaḍga uddhata karām śubhām ghaṃṭā akṣa sraj dharām durgām raṇa āraṃbhe vyavasthitām tatas jaya jaya ākāraiḥ stavam kuryāt imam tatas sarva maṅgala māṅgalye śive sarva artha sādhike śaraṇye tryaṃbake gauri nārāyaṇi namaḥ astu te bilva patra kṛta āmāle durge aham śaraṇam gataḥ kṛtvā evam arccām kauravya aṣṭamyām jāgaram niśi evam hṛṣṭaiḥ niśām nītvā prabhāte ca aruṇa udaye pātayet mahiṣān meṣān agratas nata kandharān śatam ca api śata ardham vā tad arddham vā yathā icchayā kāpālikebhyaḥ tat deyam dāsī dāsa janaiḥ tathā vibhajya sarvam kauṃteya suhṛd saṃbaṃdhi baṃdhuṣu tatas uparāhṇa samaye navamyām syaṃdane sthitām bhavānīm bhrāmayet rāṣṭre svayam rājā sa sainyavān sahasraiḥ puruṣaiḥ vā api ratha yuktaiḥ su śikṣitaiḥ śanais śanais adhikayā dīptyā prajvala dīpakaiḥ ākṛṣṭa khaḍgaiḥ vīraiḥ ca dhātu raktaiḥ gajaiḥ tathā nadadbhiḥ śaṃkha paṭahaiḥ nṛtyadbhiḥ vārayauvataiḥ alaṃkṛtābhiḥ nārībhiḥ bālakaiḥ su vibhūṣitaiḥ bhūtebhyaḥ tu balim dadyāt maṃtreṇa anena sa āmiṣam sa raktam sa jalam sa annam gandha puṣpa akṣa taiḥ yutam trīn trīn vārān triśūlena diś vidikṣu kṣipet balim balim gṛhṇantu imam devāḥ ādityāḥ vasavaḥ tathā marutaḥ atha aśvinau rudrāḥ suparṇāḥ pannagāḥ grahāḥ asurāḥ yātudhānāḥ ca mātaraḥ ca piśācakāḥ śākinyaḥ yakṣa vetālāḥ yoginyaḥ pūtanāḥ śivāḥ jṛṃbhakāḥ siddha gandharvāḥ vyālāḥ vidyādharāḥ dharāḥ dikpālāḥ lokapālāḥ ca ye ca vighna vināyakāḥ jagatām śāṃti kartāraḥ brahma ādyāḥ ca mahā ṛṣayaḥ sa vighnam mama pāpam te śāmyaṃtu paripanthinaḥ saumyāḥ bhavantu tṛptāḥ ca bhūtāḥ pretāḥ sukha āvahāḥ iti evam bhrāmayet rāṣṭre durgām devī rathe sthitām atha utpanneṣu vipreṣu bhūtaśāṃtim samācaret yena vighnāḥ na jāyaṃte yātrā saṃpūrṇa tām vrajet evam ye kurvate yātrām rājānaḥ anye api mānavāḥ mahānavamyām naṃdāyām putrakāḥ hṛṣṭa mānasāḥ te sarve pāpa nirmuktāḥ yāṃti bhāgavatīm purīm na teṣām śāvakaḥ na agniḥ na caurāḥ na vināyakāḥ vighnam kurvanti rāja indra yeṣām tuṣṭā maheśvarī bhavanti bhaktāḥ puruṣāḥ bhagavatyāḥ kim ucyate iti eṣa te samākhyātaḥ durgā devyāḥ mahā utsavaḥ paṭhatām śṛṇvatām ca eva sarva aśubha vināśanaḥ abhyarcya paṃcavadana anugatām navamyām durgām su durga gahanāni taranti martyāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde mahānavamīvratavarṇanam nāma aṣṭatriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca vijaya artham mahā indrasya dhvaja yaṣṭiḥ pratiṣṭhitā sā devī hi arcitā nityam bhūṣaṇaiḥ bhūṣitā svakaiḥ sva chatra ghaṃṭā piṭakaiḥ kiṃkiṇī baddha budbudaiḥ tām dṛṣṭvā dānavāḥ naṣṭāḥ bhayāt eva raṇe hatāḥ gatāḥ rasātalam daityāḥ devāḥ ca api divi sthitāḥ tatas prabhṛti tām divyām iṃdrayaṣṭim yajaṃti te devāḥ sarve gaṇāḥ sarve hṛṣṭāḥ tuṣṭāḥ yudhiṣṭhira atas svargam gataḥ rājā bhūri puṇya vaśāt vasuḥ tasmai datā mahā indreṇa vasu yaṣṭiḥ pragṛhyatām mahyām saṃpūjayāmāsa cakre ca iṃdra maham vasuḥ yeṣu deśeṣu manujāḥ bhakti bhāva puraḥsarāḥ pūjayiṣyaṃti varṣa ante mayā dattam mahā dhvajam teṣu deśeṣu muditāḥ prajāḥ roga vivarjitāḥ prabhūta annāḥ dharma yuktāḥ vṛṣa medhāḥ mahā utsavāḥ bhaviṣyanti su veṣāḥ ca su bhāṣāḥ ca subhūṣaṇāḥ śrutvā etat vacanam rājā vasuḥ vasumatām varaḥ viśeṣeṇa tatas cakre varṣe varṣe mahā utsavam śravaṇe sthāpayet yaṣṭim snāna vastraiḥ prapūjitām dairghyeṇa viṃśati karām sāra dāru mayīm śubhām indra sthāne purā uddiṣṭe indramātṛka saṃjñake vastraiḥ vicitraiḥ saṃvītām piṭikā alaṃkṛtām tathā piṭikānām mahā rāja kramam ca kathayāmi te vṛttam khaṃḍāsrakam ramyam dvitīyam rakta cūrṇitam tṛtīyam śvetakam citram aṣṭa asra piṭakam śubham caturtham indragopāla vṛttam mātṛ samāvṛtam pañcamam ca aṣṭa koṇam tu śuklam dhātu vicitritam kṛṣṇa karṇikayā ṣaṣṭham vṛttam budbuda śobhitam saptamam ca aṣṭa koṇam tu śuddham vidyādharaiḥ yutam aṣṭamam piṭakam vṛttam varatrā sūtra veṣṭitam nava graha yutam dīptam navamam ca sa caṃḍikam brahma viṣṇu īśa sahitam daśamam śiva saṃsthitam kṛṣṇam ekādaśam vṛttam yama yuktam yudhiṣṭhira chātram dvādaśamam śuklam dhvajadīrgham trayodaśam sa kuśam puṣpa sragdāma ghaṃṭā cāmara carcitam bandhayitvā candra pādaiḥ rajjubhiḥ sthūṇikām naraiḥ śanais utthāpayet pārtha hutvā vaiśvānaram dvijān dakṣiṇābhiḥ ca saṃpūjya guḍa pāyasa pūpakaiḥ kuryāt mahā utsavam rājā dināni nava sapta vā prekṣaṇīyaiḥ mahā dānaiḥ naṭaiḥ gītaiḥ kathānakaiḥ veśyā aṃganā naraiḥ hṛṣṭaiḥ dyūta krīḍā mahā utsavaiḥ rātrau prajāgaraḥ kāryaḥ rakṣaṇāya prayatnataḥ kāka ulūka kapotānām yena pātaḥ na vidyate kākāt bhavati durbhikṣam kauśikāt mriyate nṛpaḥ kapotāt ca prajā nāśaḥ tatas rakṣet sadā udyataḥ yāvat tu nīyate sthānāt anyasmāt aiṃdrataḥ dhvajaḥ iṃdra dhvaja samutthānam pramādāt na kṛtam yadi tatas dvādaśame varṣe kartavyam na antare punar bāhudaṃḍe vadet pīḍām jaṭhare jāṭharam bhayam varatrāyām mitra nāśaḥ sthūṇikāsu padātayaḥ kṣayam gacchanti rāja indra tasmāt yatnāt puraṃdaram utthāpya pūjayet bhaktyā divārātram ataṃdritaḥ sauvarṇam raupyakam kṛtvā pūrṇam utthāpayet dhvajam śāṃtikam pauṣṭikam kṛtvā dvijebhyaḥ annam pradāpayet trapusaiḥ karkaṭībhiḥ ca nālikeraiḥ kapitthakaiḥ bījapūraiḥ sa nāraṃgaiḥ bhakṣya annaiḥ vividhaiḥ tathā kṣema artham sarva lokasya pūjā iyam pratigṛhyatām śravaṇāt bharaṇīm yāvat pūjām kṛtvā vidhānataḥ rātrau visarjayet śakram maṃtreṇa anena pāṃḍava sārtham sura asura gaṇaiḥ puraṃdara śatakrato evam yaḥ kurute yātrām indraketoḥ yudhiṣṭhira parjanyaḥ kāma varṣī syāt tasmin rāṣṭre na saṃśayaḥ ītayaḥ na pravartaṃte tasmāt mṛtyu kṛtam bhayam vijitya śatrūn samare vaśe kṛtvā mahī talam bhuktvā rājyam ciraṃkālam indra loke mahīyate iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde mahendradhvajamahotsavavarṇanam nāma ekonacatvāriṃśadutaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca purā vāmana rūpeṇa yācayitvā dharām imām bali yajñe hariḥ sarvam krāṃtavān vikramaiḥ tribhiḥ indrāya dattavān rājyam balim pātāla vāsinam kṛtvā daitya pateḥ vāsam ahorātram punar nṛpa kārttike kṛṣṇa pakṣasya pañcadaśyām niśāgame yatheṣṭa ceṣṭāḥ daityānām rājyam teṣām mahī tale yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca niśśeṣeṇa hṛṣīkeśa kaumudīm brūhi me prabho kimartham dīyate dānam tasyām kā devatā bhavet praharṣaḥ kaḥ atra nirdiṣṭaḥ krīḍā kā atra prakīrtitā śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca kārttike kṛṣṇa pakṣe ca caturdaśyām dina udaye avaśyam eva kartavyam snānam naraka bhīrubhiḥ sītā loṣṭa samāyukta sa kaṃṭaka dala anvitān hara pāpam apāmārga bhrāmyamāṇam punar punar āpadam kilbiṣam ca api mama apahara sarvaśas apāmārga namaḥ te tu śarīram mama śodhaya iti apāmārga bhramaṇa mantraḥ tatas ca tarpaṇam kāryam dharmarājasya nāmabhiḥ yamāya dharmarājāya mṛtyave ca aṃtakāya ca vaivasvatāya kālāya sarva bhūta kṣayāya ca narakāya pradātavyaḥ dīpaḥ saṃpūjya devatāḥ tatas pradoṣa samaye dīpān dadyāt manoramān brahma viṣṇu śiva ādīnām bhavaneṣu maṭheṣu ca kūṭāgāreṣu caityeṣu sabhāsu ca nadīṣu ca prākāra udyāna vāpīṣu pratolī niṣkuṭeṣu ca siddhārha buddha cāmuṃḍā bhairava āyataneṣu ca maṃdurāsu viviktāsu hasti śālāsu ca eva hi evam prabhāta samaye amāvāsyāyām narādhipa snātvā devān pitṛrn bhaktyā saṃpūjya atha praṇamya ca kṛtvā tu pārvaṇam śrāddham dadhi kṣīra ghṛta ādibhiḥ adya rājyam baleḥ lokāḥ yatheṣṭam modyatām iti lokaḥ ca api pare hṛṣyet sudhā dhavalita ajire vṛkṣa candana mālā āḍhyaiḥ carcite ca gṛhe gṛhe nṛtya vāditra saṃghuṣṭe samprajvalita dīpake anyonya prīti saṃhṛṣṭa datta lābhena vai jane tāṃbūla hṛṣṭa vadane kuṅkuma kṣoda carcite dukūla paṭṭa nepathye svarṇa māṇikya bhūṣite adbhuta udbhaṭa śṛṃgāra pradarśita kutūhale yuvatī jana saṃkīrṇa vastra ujjvala vihāriṇi dīpa mālā ākule ramye vidhvasta dhvāṃta sañcaye pradoṣe doṣa rahite śasta doṣa āgame śubhe śaśi pūrṇa mukhābhiḥ ca kanyābhiḥ kṣipta taṇḍulam nīrājanam prakartavyam vṛkṣa śākhāsu dīpakaiḥ bhrāmyamāṇaḥ nataḥ mūrghni manujānām janādhipaḥ vṛkṣa śākhā anta dīpānām nirastāt darśanāt vrajet yātrā vihāra sañcāre jaya jīva iti vādinā avalokayitum ramyam padbhyām eva śanais śanais kṛta śobhām purīm paśyet kṛta rakṣām svakaiḥ naraiḥ tam dṛṣṭvā mahat āścaryam ṛddhim ca eva ātmanaḥ śubhām tāvat nagara nārībhiḥ śūrpa ḍiṃḍima vādanaiḥ niṣkrāmyate prahṛṣṭābhiḥ alakṣmīḥ sva gṛha aṃgaṇāt veśyā vilāsinī sārdham svasti maṃgala kāriṇī gṛhāt gṛham vrajantī ca pāda abhyaṃga pradāyinī piṣṭaka udvartana pare guru śuśrūṣaṇa ākule dvija abhivādana pare sukha rājya abhivīkṣaṇe suvāsinībhyaḥ dāne ca dīyamāne yadṛcchayā sadbhāvena eva santoṣyāḥ devāḥ sat puruṣāḥ dvijāḥ itare ca anna pānena vāc pradānena paṃḍitāḥ vastraiḥ tāṃbūla dānaiḥ ca puṣpa karpūra kuṃkumaiḥ grāmaiḥ viṣaya dānaiḥ ca sāmaṃta nṛpati indhanaiḥ padātīn aṅga saṃlagnān graiveya kaṭakaiḥ svakān svayam rājā toṣayet sa janān bhṛtyān pṛthak pṛthak yathārham toṣayitvā tu tatas malla naṭān bhaṭān vṛṣabhān mahiṣān ca eva yudhyamānān paraiḥ saha gajān aśvān ca yodhān ca padātīn samalaṃkṛtān maṃca ārūḍhaḥ svayam paśyet naṭa nartaka cāraṇān kruddhāpayet ānayet ca go mahiṣī ādikam tatas tatas uparāhna samaye pūrvasyām diśi bhārata mārga pālīm prabadhnīyāt tuṃga staṃbhe atha pādape kuśa kāśa mayīm divyām saṃbhave bahubhiḥ vṛtām pūjayitvā gajān vājīn sārdhe yāma traye gate gāvaḥ vṛṣāḥ sa mahiṣāḥ maṃḍitāḥ ghaṭika utkaṭāḥ kṛte home dvijendraiḥ tu gṛhṇīyāt mārgapālikām rāṣṭra bhojyena dhārābhiḥ sahasreṇa śatena vā sva śakti apekṣayā vā api gṛhṇīyāt vāma bhojanaiḥ mātuḥ kulam pitṛ kulam ātmānam saha baṃdhubhiḥ saṃtārayet sa sakalam mārga pālīm dadāti yaḥ nīrājanam ca tatra eva kāryam rājñe jaya pradam mārga pālī talena ittham hayāḥ gāvaḥ gajāḥ vṛṣāḥ rājānaḥ rāja putrāḥ ca brāhmaṇā śūdra jātayaḥ mārga pālīm samullaṃghya nīrujaḥ syāt sukhī sadā pūjām kuryāt naraḥ sākṣāt bhūmau maṃḍalake kṛte balim ālikhya daitya indram varṇakaiḥ paṃca raṃgakaiḥ sarva ābharaṇa saṃpūrṇam viṃdhyāvalyā saha āsitam kūṣmāṃḍa bāṇa jaṃghā ūru mura dānava saṃvṛtam saṃpūrṇa hṛṣṭa vadanam kirīṭa utkaṭa kuṇḍalam dvibhujam daitya rājānam kārayitvā nṛpaḥ svayam gṛhasya madhye śālāyām viśālāyām tatas arcayet bhrātṛ maṃtri janaiḥ sārddham saṃtuṣṭaḥ vaṃdibhiḥ stutaḥ madya māṃsa surā lehya dīpa vartī upahārakaiḥ maṃtreṇa anena rāja indra sa maṃtrī sa purohitaḥ bhaviṣya indra sura arāte pūjā iyam pratigṛhyatām evam pūjām nṛpaḥ kṛtvā rātrau jāgaraṇam tatas kārayet prekṣaṇīya ādi naṭa kṣatra kathānakaiḥ lokaḥ ca api gṛhasya aṃte śayyāyām śukla taṃḍulaiḥ saṃsthāpya bali rājānam phalaiḥ puṣpaiḥ ca pūjayet yāni tāni akṣayāṇi āhuḥ mayā evam saṃpradarśitam yat asyām dīyate dānam su alpam vā yadi vā bahu tat akṣayam bhavet sarvam viṣṇoḥ prīti karam param viṣṇunā vasudhā labdhā prītena balaye punar upakāra karaḥ dattaḥ ca asurāṇām mahā utsavaḥ tatas prabhṛti rāja indra pravṛttā kaumudī punar ku śabdena mahī jñeyā harṣe tatas param dhātu jñaiḥ naigama jñaiḥ ca tena eṣā kaumudī smṛtā kau modante janāḥ yasyām nānā bhāvaiḥ parasparā hṛṣṭāḥ tuṣṭāḥ sukha āyattāḥ tena eṣā kaumudī smṛtā kumudāni baleḥ yasmāt dīyante asyām yudhiṣṭhira artha arthe pārtha bhūmau ca tena eṣā kaumudī smṛtā ekam evam ahorātram varṣe varṣe viśām pate dattam dānava rājasya ādarśam iva bhū tale yaḥ karoti nṛpaḥ rāṣṭram tasya vyādhi bhayam kutas kutas īti bhayam tatra na asti mṛtyu kṛtam bhayam subhikṣam kṣemam ārogyam sarva sampadaḥ uttamāḥ nīrujaḥ ca janāḥ sarve sarva upadrava varjitāḥ kaumudī karaṇāt rājan bhavati iha mahī tale yaḥ yādṛśena bhāvena tiṣṭhati asyām yudhiṣṭhira harṣa dainya ādi rūpeṇa tasya varṣam prayāti hi rudite roditi varṣam hṛṣṭaḥ varṣam prahṛṣyati tasmāt prahṛṣṭaiḥ tuṣṭaiḥ ca kartavyā kaumudī naraiḥ vaiṣṇavī dānavī ca iyam tithiḥ paitrī yudhiṣṭhira kūṣmāṇḍa ādāna ramyam kuvalaya khaṇḍaiḥ ca dhātuka abhadram dīpa utsave janita sarva jana pramodām kurvaṃti ye sumanasaḥ balirāja pūjām dāna upabhoga sukha vṛddhi śata ākulānām harṣeṇa varṣam iha pārthiva yāti teṣām iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara pa rvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde dīpālikotsavavarṇanam nāma catvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca sarva kāma āptaye kṛtyam katham śāṃtika pauṣṭikam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca śrī kāmaḥ śānti kāmaḥ vā graha yajñam samārabhet dṛṣṭi āyuḥ puṣṭi kāmaḥ vā tathā eva abhicaran punar grahaśāṃtim pravakṣyāmi purāṇa śruti bhāṣitām grahān graha adhidevān ca sthāpya homam samārabhet graha yajñaḥ tridhā proktaḥ purāṇa śruti kovidaiḥ tṛtīyaḥ koṭi homaḥ tu sarva kāma phala pradaḥ ayutena āhutīnām ca nava graha makhaḥ smṛtaḥ tasya tāvat vidhim vakṣye purāṇa śruti bhāṣitam saṃsthāpanāya devānām catur asrām udak plavām agni praṇayanam kṛtvā tasyām āvāhayet surān devānām tatra saṃsthāpyā viṃśatiḥ dvādaśa adhikā rāhuḥ ketuḥ iti proktāḥ graha āloka hita āvahāḥ rajatāt āyasāt ca eva grahāḥ kāryāḥ kramāt amī uttareṇa gurum vidyāt budham pūrvottareṇa tu pūrveṇa bhārgavam vidyāt somam dakṣiṇa pūrvake paścimottarataḥ ketum sthāpayet śukla taṃḍulaiḥ rāja amātyān mahā rāja taṃḍulaiḥ sthāpayet atha bhāskarasya īśvaram vidyāt umām ca śaśinaḥ tathā brahmāṇam ca guroḥ vidyāt śukrasya api śacīpatim śanaiścarasya tu yamam rāhoḥ kālam tathā eva ca agniḥ āpaḥ kṣitiḥ viṣṇuḥ indraḥ sauvarṇa devatāḥ prajāpatiḥ ca sūryaḥ ca brahmā pratyadhidevatāḥ vināyakam tathā durgām vāyum ākāśam eva ca sāvitrīm ca tathā lakṣmīm umām ca sahabhartṛkām maṃdara āhū tathā kṛṣṇau dhūmram ketu guṇam viduḥ graha varṇāni deyāni vāsāṃsi kusumāni ca gaṃdhāḥ ca balayaḥ ca eva dhūpāḥ guggula pūrvakāḥ guḍa odanam raveḥ dadyāt somāya ghṛta pāyasam aṃgārakāya saṃyāvam budhāya kṣīraṣaṣṭikam śanaiścarāya kṛśaram meṣa māṃsam tu rāhave pañcaratna samāyuktam pañca bhaṃga yutam tathā sthāpayet avraṇam kuṃbham varuṇam tatra vinyaset gaṃgāyāḥ saritaḥ sarvāḥ samudrāḥ ca sarāṃsi ca mṛdam ānīya rāja indra sarva oṣadhi jala anvitām sarve samudrāḥ saritaḥ saraḥ prasravaṇāni ca āyāṃtu yajamānasya durita kṣaya kārakāḥ evam āvāhayitvā tān sarvān nṛpati sattama uduṃbara śamī dūrvā kuśāḥ ca samidhaḥ kramāt ekaikasya ca aṣṭaśatam aṣṭāviṃśati vā punar hotavyāḥ madhu sarpibhyām dadhnā vā pāyasena vā prādeśa mātrāḥ ṛjavaḥ viśākhāḥ viphalāḥ śubhāḥ devānām api sarveṣām upāṃśu parama artha vid ākṛṣṇena imam devāḥ agniḥ mūrddhā divaḥ kramāt udbudhyasva iti bodhyaḥ ca yathāsaṃkhyam udāhṛtāḥ śannodevī iti ca kayā ketum kṛṇvan iti iti ca hotavyam yadvat ājyam carum bhakṣyāṇi vā punar maṃtraiḥ daśa āhutīḥ dattvā homaḥ vyāhṛtibhiḥ tatas udak mukhāḥ prāc mukhāḥ ca kuryuḥ brāhmaṇa puṃgavāḥ āpaḥ hiṣṭāḥ iti umāyāḥ tu śyena iti svāminaḥ tathā viṣṇoḥ idam viṣṇuḥ iti svam icchā iti svayaṃbhuvaḥ indra ādi devatānām tu indrāya juhuyāt punar navā yamasya ayam gauḥ ca iti evam homaḥ prakīrtitaḥ citraguptasya vā jāta paurāṇikāḥ viduḥ budhāḥ agnim dūtam vṛṇīmahe iti vahneḥ udāhṛtaḥ iṃdram yamam varuṇam iti ayam maṃtraḥ prakīrtitaḥ bhūmeḥ pṛthivī aṃtarikṣam iti vedeṣu paṭhyate iti viṣṇoḥ udāhṛtaḥ varuṇaḥ pavanaḥ ca eva dhanādhyakṣaḥ tathā śivaḥ brahmaṇā sahitaḥ śeṣaḥ dikpālāḥ pātu te sadā kīrtiḥ lakṣmīḥ dhṛtiḥ medhāḥ puṣṭiḥ śraddhā kriyā matiḥ buddhiḥ lajjā śāṃti puṣṭī kāṃtiḥ tuṣṭiḥ ca mātaraḥ etāḥ tvām abhiṣiṃcaṃtu dharmapatnyaḥ samāgatāḥ ādityaḥ candramāḥ bhaumaḥ budha jīva sita arka jāḥ grahāḥ tvām abhiṣiṃcaṃtu rāhuḥ ketuḥ ca tarpitāḥ deva dānava gaṃdharvāḥ yakṣa rākṣasa pannagāḥ deva patnyaḥ drumāḥ nāgāḥ daityāḥ ca apsarasām gaṇāḥ astrāṇi sarva śastrāṇi rājānaḥ vāhanāni ca auṣadhāni ca ratnāni kālasya avayavāḥ ca ye saritaḥ sāgarāḥ śailāḥ tīrthāni jaladāḥ nadāḥ ete tvām abhiṣiṃcaṃtu sarva kāma artha siddhaye tatas śukla aṃbara dharaḥ śukla gandha anulepanaḥ sarva gandha samāyuktaḥ snātaḥ śraddhā samanvitaḥ yajamānaḥ sa patnīkān siddhi dān tān samāhitān dakṣiṇābhiḥ prayatnena pūjayet gata vismayaḥ sūryāya kapilām dhenum dadyāt śaṃkham tathā indave budhāya jātarūpam ca gurave pīta vāsasī śvetāśvam daityagurave kṛṣṇa aṃgām arka sūnave suvarṇena samā kāryā yajamānena dakṣiṇā sarveṣām athavā dadyāt guruḥ vā yena tuṣyati su maṃtreṇa pradātavyāḥ sarvāḥ sarva artha dakṣiṇāḥ kapile sarva devānām pūjanīyā asi rohiṇī tīrtha deva mayī yasmāt atas śāṃtim prayaccha me puṇyaḥ tvam śaṃkha puṇyānām maṅgalānām ca maṃgalam viṣṇunā vidhṛtaḥ nityam atas śāṃtim prayaccha me dharma tvam vṛṣa rūpeṇa jagat ānanda kārakaḥ aṣṭamūrteḥ adhiṣṭhānam atas śāṃtim prayaccha me ananta puṇya phala damataḥ śāṃtim prayaccha me pradānāt tasya me viṣṇuḥ atas śāṃtim prayacchatu kapilaḥ tu aśva rūpeṇa yasmāt amṛta sambhavaḥ candra arka vāhanaḥ nityam atas śāṃtim prayaccha me yasmāt tvam pṛthivī sarvā dheno vai kṛṣṇa saṃjñitā sarva pāpa harā nityam atas śāṃtim prayaccha me yasmāt āyasa karmāṇi tava adhīnāni sarvadā lāṃgalāni āyudha ādīni tasmāt śāṃtim prayaccha me yasmāt tvam chāga yajñānām aṃga tvena vyavasthitaḥ gavām aṃgeṣu tiṣṭhanti bhuvanāni caturdaśa yasmāt a śūnyam śayanam keśavasya śivasya ca śayyā mama api a śūnyā astu tathā janmani janmani yathā ratneṣu sarveṣu sarve devāḥ vyavasthitāḥ tathā śāṃtim prayacchaṃtu ratna dānena me surāḥ yathā bhūmi pradānasya kalām na arhanti ṣoḍaśīm dānāni anyāni me śāṃtim bhūmi dānāt bhavati api evam saṃpūjayet bhaktyā vitta śāṭhya vivarjitaḥ sapta aśvaḥ sapta rajjuḥ ca dvi bhujaḥ syāt sadā raviḥ śvetaḥ śveta aṃbara dharaḥ daśa aśvaḥ śveta bhūṣaṇaḥ gadā pāṇiḥ dvi bāhuḥ ca kartavyaḥ vara daḥ śaśī rakta mālya aṃbara dharaḥ karṇikāra samaṃdyutiḥ khaḍga carma gadā pāṇiḥ vidheyaḥ bhūminaṃdanaḥ pīta mālya aṃbara dharaḥ pīta gaṃdha anulepanaḥ kāṃcane ca rathe divye śobhamānaḥ budhaḥ sadā daṃḍinau vara dau kāryau sa akṣasūtra kamaḍalū bāṇa bāṇāsana dharaḥ kartavyaḥ arkasutaḥ sadā śārdūla vadanaḥ khaḍgī varmī śūlī vara pradaḥ nīla siṃhāsana sthaḥ ca rāhuḥ atra praśasyate dhūmrāḥ dvi bāhavaḥ sarve gadinaḥ vikṛta ānanāḥ gṛdhra āsana ratāḥ nityam ketavaḥ syuḥ vara pradāḥ sarve kirīṭinaḥ kāryāḥ grahāḥ loka hita āvahāḥ sva aṃgulena ucchritāḥ sarve śatam aṣṭa uttaram tadā graha svarūpam etat te vyākhyātam pāṃḍu nandana etat jñātvā prayatnena pūjā kāryā vicakṣaṇaiḥ vidhinā graha pūjām yonena tu ārabhate naraḥ yaḥ tu pīḍā karaḥ nityam mālya vittasya vā grahaḥ tam tu yatnena saṃpūjya śeṣān api arcayet budhaḥ grahāḥ gāvaḥ narendrāḥ ca brāhmaṇāḥ ca viśeṣataḥ pūjitāḥ pūjayaṃti ete nirdahaṃti avamānitāḥ tasmāt na dakṣiṇā hīnam kartavyam bhūtim icchatā saṃpūrṇāyām dakṣiṇāyām yasmāt ekaḥ api tuṣyati vivāha utsava yajñeṣu pratiṣṭhā ādiṣu karmasu kathitaḥ ayuta homaḥ ayam lakṣa homam atas śṛṇu sarva kāma āptaye yasmāt lakṣa homam viduḥ budhāḥ graha tārā balam labdhvā kṛtvā brāhmaṇa vācanam gṛhasya uttara pūrveṇa maṇḍapam kārayet budhaḥ daśa hastam atha aṣṭau vā hastān kuryāt vidhānataḥ prāc udak pravaṇām bhūmim kārayet yatnataḥ naraḥ prāguttaram samāsādya pradeśam maṃḍapasya tu śobhanam kārayet kuṇḍam yathāvat lakṣaṇa anvitam māna hīnam ca apraśastam aneka bhaya dam bhavet yasmāt tasmāt su saṃpūrṇam śāṃtikuṃḍam vidhīyate asmāt daśaguṇaḥ proktaḥ lakṣa home svayaṃbhuvā saṃsthāpanāya devānām vapra traya samāvṛtam dvi aṅgulaḥ tatra vistāraḥ sarveṣām kathyate budhaiḥ daśa aṃgula ucchritā bhittiḥ sthaṃḍilasya tathā upari tasmin āvāhayet devān pūrvavat puṣpa taṇḍulaiḥ āditya abhimukhāḥ sarvāḥ sthāpyāḥ pratyadhidevatāḥ sthāpanīyāḥ muni śreṣṭhāḥ na antareṇa parāṅmukhāḥ sama pīna śarīraḥ tu vāhanam parameṣṭhinaḥ viṣa pāpa haraḥ nityam atas śāṃtim prayaccha me sahasrāṇām śatam hutvā samidh saṃkhyā ādikam punar audumbarīm atha ārdrām ca vakra koṭara varjitām bāhu mātrām srucam kṛtvā tatas staṃbha dvaya upari ghṛta dhārām tathā samyak agneḥ upari pātayet pāṭhayet sūktam āgneyam vaiṣṇavam raudram aiṃdavam mahāvaiśvānaram sāma jyeṣṭhasāma ca pāṭhayet dātavyā yajamānena pūrvavat dakṣiṇā pṛthak kāma krodha vihīnena ṛtvigbhyaḥ śāṃta cetasaḥ atha vai ṛtvijau śāṃtau dvau eva tu ati kovidau tadvat ca daśa ca aṣṭau vā lakṣa home api ṛtvijaḥ kartavyāḥ śaktitaḥ tadvat catvāraḥ vā vimatsarāḥ dadyāt ca pāṃḍava śreṣṭha bhūṣaṇāni api śaktitas śayanāni ca vastrāṇi haimāni kaṭakāni ca karṇa aṃgulī pavitrāṇi bhaktimān pratipādayet na kuryāt dakṣiṇā hīnam vitta śāṭhyena mānavaḥ adadat lobha mohābhyām kula kṣayam avāpnuyāt anna dānam yathā śaktyā dātavyam bhūtim icchatā rāṣṭram hanyāt aṃga hīnaḥ maṃtra hīnaḥ tu ṛtvijaḥ a dakṣiṇaḥ yajamānam na asti yajña samaḥ ripuḥ tasmāt pīḍā karaḥ nityam yaḥ eva bhavati grahaḥ dakṣiṇābhiḥ prayatnena bahūn vā bahu vittavān yatas sarvān avāpnoti kurvan kāmān vidhānataḥ yāvat kalpa śatāni aṣṭau atha mokṣam avāpnuyāt sa tam kāmam avāpnoti padam ca ānaṃtyam aśnute bhāryā arthī śobhanām bhāryām kumārī ca śubham patim bhraṣṭa rājyaḥ tathā rājyam śrī kāmaḥ śriyam āpnuyāt yam yam prārthayate kāmam tam tam āpnoti puṣkalam śāṃtim nava graha mayīm durita upaśāṃtim rājan karoti bahunā vidhivat dvijendraiḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yu dhiṣṭhira saṃvāde navagrahalakṣahomavidhivarṇanam nāma ekacatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca rājā saṃvaraṇaḥ pūrvam pratiṣṭhāne pura uttame babhūva sa mahābhāgaḥ śāstra artha kuśalaḥ balī brahmaṇyaḥ pitṛ bhaktaḥ ca deva brāhmaṇa pūjakaḥ tasya atha kurvataḥ rājyam samyak pālayataḥ prajāḥ ājagāma mahā yogī sanakaḥ brahmaṇaḥ sutaḥ dattvā tasya āsanam rājā praṇamya śirasā tathā pūjayitvā arghya pādya ādyaiḥ ātmānam vinivedya ca itihāsa purāṇa uktāḥ cakāra vividhāḥ kathāḥ rājarṣīṇām purāṇām ca caritāni yathā artha vid tatas kathāṃtare rājā kāryam manasi saṃsthitam hitāya pṛthivīśānām jagataḥ ca ātmanaḥ tathā saṃvaraṇaḥ uvāca nirghāte pāṃśu varṣe ca gṛha bhaṃge tathā eva ca janma nakṣatra pīḍāsu anāvṛṣṭi bhayeṣu ca jvareṣu graha pīḍāsu durbhikṣe rāṣṭra vigrahe vyādhīnām saṃbhave jāte śarīre ca atipīḍite prabrūhi me dvijaśreṣṭha tathā ārogya pradam nṛṇām śṛṇu rājan pravakṣyāmi śāṃti karma hi anuttamam brahmahatyā ādi pāpāni yena naśyaṃti tad kṣaṇāt utpātā praśamam yāṃti mahat saṃpadyate sukham vidhānam tasya vakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣva ekamanāḥ bhava devāgāre nadī tīre vane vā bhavane api vā śubha nakṣatra yoge ca vāre pūrva guṇa anvite yajamānasya ānukūlye koṭi homam samācaret pūjayitvā prayatnena brāhmaṇam vedapāragam vastraiḥ vibhūṣaṇaiḥ ca eva gaṃdha mālya anulepanaiḥ tvam naḥ gatiḥ pitā mātā tvam gatiḥ tvam parāyaṇaḥ koṭi homa artham atulam śāṃti artham sārvakāmikam purohitaḥ tatas prājñaḥ śukla aṃbara dharaḥ śuciḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ veda saṃvṛttaiḥ puṇyaiḥ yuktaḥ samāhitaiḥ bhūmi bhāge same śuddhe prāc udak pravaṇe tathā puṇyāham vācayet pūrvam kṛtvā viprān su pūjitān jaghanyam tu tad ardhena śakti kāla ādi apekṣayā madhye tu maṇḍapasya api kuṃḍam kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ aṣṭa hasta pramāṇena āyāmena tathā eva ca mekhalā tritayam tasya dvādaśa aṃgula vistatam tad pramāṇām tathā yonim kurvīta su samāhitaḥ kuṃḍasya pūrva bhāge tu vedim kuryāt vicakṣaṇaḥ catur hastām samām ca eva hasta mātra ucchritaḥ nṛpa sthānam tat sarva bhūtānām kuryāt yatnena buddhimān uda lipya tatas bhūmim maṃḍapasya samīpatas vinyaset kalaśān tatra jala pūrṇān caturdaśa aśvattha plakṣa cūta ādyaiḥ pallavaiḥ upaśobhitān vitānam upariṣṭāt ca maṃḍapasya prakalpayet sthāpayet dikṣu sarvāsu toraṇāni vicakṣaṇaḥ evam saṃbhṛta saṃbhāraiḥ purodhāḥ su samāhitaḥ sthāpayitvā surān vedyām vakṣyamāṇān ariṃdama brāhmaṇam pūrva bhāge tu madhye devam janārdanam aiśānyām ca grahān sarvān āgneyyām marutaḥ tathā vāyum saumyām tathā aiśānyām lokapālān krameṇa tu evam saṃsthāpya vibudhān yathāsthānam nṛpa uttama veda ukta maṃtraiḥ tad liṅgaiḥ purāṇa uktaiḥ pṛthak pṛthak ādityāḥ vasavaḥ rudrāḥ lokapālāḥ tathā grahāḥ brahmā janārdanaḥ ca eva śūlapāṇiḥ bhaga akṣi hā atra saṃnihitāḥ sarve bhavaṃtu sukha bhāginaḥ pūjām gṛhṇaṃtu sarve itra mayā bhaktyā upapāditām kurvaṃtu ca śubham sarve yajña karma samāhitāḥ evam saṃpūjayitvā tān devān yatnena śuddha dhīḥ kuryāt saṃskāra karaṇam yathā uktam veda cintakaiḥ tatas samāhvayet vahnim nāmnā khyātam alābhe tu bahūn ca yathālābham niyojayet vidyā vṛddhān vayaḥ vṛddhān gṛhasthān saṃyata indriyān sva karma niyatān jñāna śīlān śāntān dvijottamān ciṃtayet tatra deveśam paṃcāsyam nṛpa pāvakam dhūmāyamāne vṛthā hotavyam jvalite nale ṛgbhiḥ pūrvā mukhaiḥ homaḥ yajurbhiḥ ca uttarā mukhaiḥ sāmabhiḥ paścime kāryaḥ atharvabhiḥ dakṣiṇā mukhaiḥ āghārau ājya bhāgau tu pūrvam hutvā vicakṣaṇaḥ brahmāṇam pūrvam api etat sarvam paścāt samācaret praṇava ādibhiḥ tad liṃgaiḥ svāhākāra aṃta yojitaiḥ juhuyāt sarva devānām vedyām ye ca upakalpitāḥ tilāḥ kṛṣṇāḥ ghṛta abhyaktāḥ kiñcid yava samanvitāḥ hotavyāḥ koṭi home tu samidhaḥ ca palāśa jāḥ pūrṇe pūrṇesahasre tu dadyāt pūrṇāhutim śubhām pūrṇāhutyaḥ samākhyātāḥ koṭi home narādhipa sahasrāṇi nṛpa śreṣṭha daśa śāstra viśāradaiḥ prāraṃbha dinam ārabhya brāhmaṇaiḥ brahma vādibhiḥ krodha lobha ādayaḥ doṣāḥ varjanīyāḥ prayatnataḥ yajamānena rāja indra savarga kāmān abhīpsitā saṃvaraṇaḥ uvāca kālena mahatā ca eva śakyaḥ prāptum kathaṃcana niyamāt brahmacaryāt vā duṣkaraḥ hi iti me matiḥ nirodhaḥ atra brāhmaṇānām bhṛśayya ādiṣu duṣkaraḥ kāryāt guru tayā yasmāt parva kāla ādi apekṣayā kāryasya gurutām jñātvā na eva kuryāt aparvaṇi yathā saṃkṣepataḥ kāryaḥ koṭi homaḥ tathā śṛṇu kṛtvā kuṃḍa śatam divyam yathoktam hasta saṃmitam ekaikasmin tatas kuṃḍe śatam viprān niyojayet sadyas pakṣe tu viprāṇām sahasram parikīrtitam homam kuryuḥ dvijāḥ sarve kuṇḍe kuṇḍe yathā uditam yathā kuṃḍa bahu tve api rājasūye mahā kratau tathā kuṃḍa śate api atra ghṛtārciṣi vitānite ekaḥ eva bhavet yajñaḥ koṭi homaḥ na saṃśayaḥ evam yat kriyate kṣipram vyākulaiḥ kārya gauravāt śatānanaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ koṭi homaḥ na saṃśayaḥ su alpaiḥ ahobhiḥ kāryaḥ syāt varṣā kāla ādike api vā tadā daśaguṇaḥ kāryaḥ koṭi homaḥ vijānatā te api vijñāna śīlāḥ syuḥ vratavaṃtaḥ jita indriyāḥ bhūpa kuṃḍa dvayam kṛtvā vibhajya ca vibhāvasum homam kuryuḥ dvijāḥ bhūyas saṃskṛtya vidhi pūrvakam śatam tatra niyojyam syāt viprāṇām pravibhajya vai māse vā atha dvi māse vā yathā kāle hi upasthite evam ca dvi mukham kāryaḥ koṭi homaḥ vicakṣaṇaiḥ yadā tu sva icchayā yajñam yajamānaḥ samāpayet yathā lābha sthitaiḥ vipraiḥ jñāna śīlaiḥ vicakṣaṇaiḥ na saṃkhyā niyamaḥ ca atra brāhmaṇānām narottama āvṛttyā sarva kāmasya cāturmāsya anukarma vat bahu vighnaḥ ca kālena tasmāt saṃkṣepam ācaret yatas hi citta vitta ādyam āyuḥ ca eva asthiram sadā atas saṃkṣepataḥ kāryam dharma kāryam praśasyate tatas tu dīkṣayet vid prān hotṛrn ca śraddhayā anvitaḥ niṣkaiḥ ca kaṃkaṇaiḥ ca eva kuṇḍalaiḥ vividhaiḥ nṛpa go śatam ca eva dātavyam aśvānām ca śatam tadā dīna andha kṛpaṇān sarvān vastra ādyaiḥ ca api pūjayet tatas ca avabhṛtham snāyāt taiḥ ghaṭaiḥ pūrva kalpitaiḥ lakṣa homa ukta maṃtreṇa sadā vijaya kāriṇā anāvṛṣṭi bhayam ca eva utpāta bhayam eva ca durbhikṣam graha pīḍā ca praśamam yāti bhū tale bhogān avāpya manasaḥ abhimatān prakāmam te yāṃti śakra sadanam su viśuddha sattvāḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca mahāśāṃtim pravakṣyāmi mahādevena bhāṣitām pārthivānām hita arthāya mahā dustara tāriṇīm nṛpa abhiṣeke sā kāryā yātrā kāle nṛpasya tu prasūtau mūla gaṇḍa ante yamalasya tu saṃbhave chatrāṇām ca dhvajānām ca sva sthānāt patane bhuvi kāka ulūka kapotānām praveśe veśmanaḥ tathā krūra grahāṇām vakra tve janma ādiṣu viśeṣataḥ janmani dvādaśe ca eva caturthe vā aṣṭame tathā yadā syuḥ guru mandāḥ a arāḥ sūryaḥ ca eva viśeṣataḥ yuddhe grahāṇām sarveṣām sūrya śītāṃśu kīlake vastra āyudha gavāśveṣu maṇi keśa vināśane veśmanaḥ ca tulā bhaṃge garbheṣu aśvatarīṣu ca ravi indvoḥ uparāgeṣu mahāśāṃtiḥ praśasyate sarvāṇi durnimittāni praśamam yānti sarvathā tām kuryuḥ brāhmaṇāḥ paṃca kula śīla samanvitāḥ catur vedāḥ tri vedāḥ ca dvi vedāḥ ca api pāṃḍava ātharvaṇāḥ viśeṣeṇa bahu ṛcāḥ yaju saṃyutāḥ śucayaḥ śruta saṃpannāḥ japa homa parāyaṇāḥ kṛcchra pārāka nakta ādyaiḥ kṛtakāya viśodhanāḥ pūrvam ārādhya maṃtraiḥ tu prārabheta kriyām tatas daśa dvādaśa hastam vā maṃḍapam kārayet śubham āgneyyām kārayet kuṃḍam hasta mātram su śobhanam mekhalā traya saṃyuktam yonyā ca api vibhūṣitam baddha candana mālam ca toraṇa alaṃkṛtam tathā śukla ambara dharaḥ snātāḥ śukla mālya anulepanāḥ tatas ca pañca kalaśān tasyām vedyām niyojayet āgneya ādiṣu koṇeṣu pañcamam madhyatas tathā aṣṭa asra alaṃkṛte padme cūta pallava śobhite auṣadhīḥ pañcaratnāni rocanām candanam tathā siddhārthakān śamī dūrvāḥ kuśān vrīhiḥ yavān tathā apāmārgam phalavatīm nyagrodha uduṃbarau tathā plakṣa aśvattha kapitthān ca priyaṃgu cūta pallavān hasti daṃta mṛdam ca eva koṇa kumbheṣu nikṣipet puṇya tīrtha udaka annam ca dhānyam gavyam ca madhyame kūrcam vācam iti idam ca vahni kumbha abhimantraṇam āśuḥ śiśānaḥ mantreṇa mantraṇam vāyu gocare īśāvāsyam caturthasya kumbhasya ca abhimaṃtraṇam phalaiḥ ca nārikela ādyaiḥ dīpakaiḥ kuṃbha pūjanam kapotasupraṇītena maṃtreṇa viniśeṣayet kṛtvā ca āvaraṇam vahneḥ ājya saṃskāram eva ca tatas puruṣasūktena pāyasa śrapaṇam bhavet abhighārya atha saṃsiddham tathā saṃsthāpayet bhuvi aṣṭādaśa pramāṇa idhmān dadyāt atha śamī mayān pālāśī samidhaḥ sapta tathā sapta iti dāpayet āghārau ājyabhāgau tu hutvā pūrva krameṇa tu juhuyāt āhutīḥ sapta jātavedasaḥ iti ṛcā sthālīpākasya juhuyāt punar vai jātavedasā yamāya iti ca sapta anyāḥ svāhā aṃtāḥ juhuyāt tatas idam viṣṇuḥ tatas sapta juhuyāt āhutīḥ nṛpa nakṣatrebhyaḥ tatas svāhā saptaviṃśat tha āhutīḥ yat karmaṇā eti juhuyāt tatas sviṣṭakṛtam punar tatas tu tūrya nirghoṣaiḥ kāhalā śaṃkha niḥsvanaiḥ kāśmarya vṛkṣa saṃbhūte bhadre bhadrāsane sthitam vedi madhya gatam kṛtvā durnimitta praśāṃtaye paṃcabhiḥ kalaśaiḥ pūrṇaiḥ maṃtraiḥ ebhiḥ yathākramam sahasrākṣeṇa prathamam tatas ca eva śatā yuṣā sajoṣasā ca indra iti viśvāni iti ṛgbhiḥ eva ca ṛtam astu iti ca tatas snāpayeyuḥ samāhitāḥ tatas diśām balim dadyāt vicitra anna samāyutam snātasya brāhmaṇāḥ sarve paṭheyuḥ śāṃtim uttamām śāṃti toyena dhārām ca pātayitvā puṇya aha vācanam kṛtvā śāṃti karma samāpayet kṣitim hiraṇyam vāsāṃsi śayanāni āsanāni ca viprebhyaḥ dakṣiṇām dadyāt yathā śaktyā vimatsaraḥ dīna anātha viśiṣṭebhyaḥ śrotriyebhyaḥ ca dāpayet āyuḥ ca labhate dīrgham śatrūn vijayate kṣaṇāt durgāṇi ca asya sidyanti putrān ca labhate śubhān yathā śastra prahārāṇām kavacam vāraṇam bhavet tathā daiva upaghātānām śāntiḥ bhavati vāraṇam dayā dākṣiṇya yuktasya sarve sa anugrahāḥ grahāḥ yaḥ kārayet sakala doṣa harīm samarthām śāṃtim praśāṃta hṛdayaḥ puruṣaḥ sadā eva iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde mahāśāṃtividhivarṇanam nāma tricatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ gaṇanātha śānti varṇanam yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca śāṃtim kathaya deveśa gaṇanāthasya me vibho yām kṛtvā sarva durgāṇi tarate mānavaḥ akhilaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca śāṃtim vakṣyāmi rāja indra gaṇanātha priyām parām yasyāḥ ācaraṇena eva sarva ariṣṭa kṣayaḥ bhavet svapne avagāhate atyartham jalam muṃḍān ca paśyati kāṣāya vāsasaḥ ca eva kravyādān adhirohati vimanāḥ viphala āraṃbhaḥ saṃsīdati animittatas tena upasṛṣṭaḥ labhate na rājyam rāja naṃdanaḥ kumārī na ca bhartāram apatyam garbhiṇī tathā ācārya tvam śrotriyaḥ ca na śiṣyaḥ adhyāpanam tathā vaṇij lābham na ca āpnoti na kṛṣim ca kṛṣīvalaḥ sugandha kuṃkuma ālipta śarīra śirasaḥ tathā bhadrāsana upaviṣṭasya svasti vācya dvijān śubhān mṛttikām rocanām gaṃdhān guggulam ca apsu nikṣipet yadā hṛtā hi eka vaṇaiḥ manubhiḥ kalaśaiḥ hradāt carmaṇi ānaḍuhe rakte sthāpya bhadrāsanam tathā sahasrākṣam śatadhāram ṛṣiṇā vacanam kṛtam tena tvām abhiṣiṃcāmi pāvamānyaḥ punaṃtu te bhagam te varuṇaḥ rājā bhagam sūryaḥ bṛhaspatiḥ yat te keśeṣu daurbhāgyam sīmaṃte yat ca mūrddhani lalāṭe karṇayoḥ akṣṇoḥ āpaḥ tat ghnantu te sadā snātasya sārṣapam tailam sruveṇa audumbareṇa ca mitaḥ ca samitaḥ ca eva tathā sāla kaṭaṃkaṭau kūṣmāṃḍaḥ rājaputraḥ ca aṃte svāhā samanvitaiḥ dadyāt catuṣpathe śūrpe kuśān āstīrya sarvaśas kṛtā kṛtān taṃḍulān ca palala odanam eva ca matsyān pakvān tathā eva āmān māṃsam etāvat eva tu puṣpam citram sugandham ca surām ca trividhām api mūlakam pūri ka apūpam tathā evā uṃḍeraka srajam dūrvām sarva prapuṣpāṇām dattvā arghyam pūrṇa maḍalām vināyakasya jananīm upatiṣṭhet tatas om abikām putrān dehi dhanam dehi sarva kāmān ca dehi me tatas śukla aṃbara dharaḥ śukla mālya anulepanaḥ evam vināyakam pūjya grahān ca eva vidhānataḥ karmaṇām phalam āpnoti śriyam āpnoti ca uttamām ādityasya tathā pūjām tilakam svāminaḥ tathā śveta arkasya tu yaḥ mūle mahāgaṇapatiḥ kṛtaḥ sarva lakṣaṇa saṃpūrṇaḥ saḥ api siddhi karaḥ smṛtaḥ saṃjapyate śucau deśe vighnam na atra hi dehinaḥ kṣīṇa bhāgyaḥ api puruṣaḥ pūjitaḥ ca nareśvaraḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde gaṇanāthaśāṃtivarṇanam nāma catuścatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca baṃdhane saṃnirodha iṅgāḥ vyādhīnām saṃprapīḍane katham mokṣaḥ bhavet tasya sādhya asādhyam bravīhi me gargeṇa kauśikaḥ pṛṣṭaḥ idam vacanam abravīt kṛttikāsu yadā kaścid dvyādhim saṃpratipadyate nava rātram bhavet pīḍā tri rātram rohiṇīṣu ca mṛgaśīrṣe pañca rātram ārdrā prāṇa viyojinī nava rātram tathā āśleṣā śmaśāna aṃtam maghāsu ca māsa dvayam tathā svātau viśākhā viṃśatiḥ dināḥ maitre ca eva daśa aham tu jyeṣṭhā ca eva arddha māsikā mūlena jāyate mokṣaḥ ca āṣāḍhāsu tri pañcakam uttarā dina viṃśatyā dvau māsau śravaṇena tu dhaniṣṭhāyām arddha māsam vāruṇe tu daśa ahakaiḥ nava bhādrapada ṛkṣe uttarāsu tri paṃcakam revatī daśa rātram tu ahorātram tathā aśvinī prāṇaiḥ viyojayet nityam garga na asti atra saṃśayaḥ kauśikena samādiṣṭaḥ nakṣatra vyādhi saṃbhavaḥ daivajñena api jñātavyam nakṣatram atha janmanā kṣīravṛkṣasya samidhaḥ juhuyāt aśva daivate āditye ca prayatnena ghṛta aktāḥ sita taṃḍulāḥ payasā sarpiṣā sākam bṛhaspati adhidaivate homaḥ proktaḥ priyaṃgūnām nakṣatre yāma daivate sāvitre dadhi homaḥ uta tvāṣṭram citraudanam haviḥ ap daivatye śāli bījaiḥ vaiśvadevam tu kārayet raktāḥ ca taṃḍulāḥ ca eva hotavyāḥ viṣṇu daivate vāruṇe pārijātānām puṣpāṇām homaḥ iṣyate raktāḥ ca taṇḍulāḥ ca eva hotavyāḥ viṣṇu daivate pauṣe phalāni akhaṃḍāni juhuyāt aṣṭa uttaram śatam sāvitrī homam ekam tu brahmā abhihitavān purā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde nakṣatrahomavidhivarṇanam nāma paṃca catvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca aparādha śatam yena kṣayam yāti śṛṇuṣva tat ikṣvākuḥ uvāca śrī vasiṣṭhaḥ uvāca śṛṇu rājan mahā bāho aparādha śata vratam yena anuṣṭhita mātreṇa kāma mokṣau labheta nā prāyaścittāni aśeṣāṇi sarva pāpa apanuttaye kṛtāni api akṛtāni syuḥ iti ha uvāca padmajaḥ pāpam gurutaram ca api dahyate tūla rāśi vat aparādha śatam rājan śṛṇuṣva gadataḥ mama anāśrami tvam prathamaḥ anagni tā vrata hīna tā a dātṛ tvam aśaucam ca nirdaya tvam spṛhālu tā akṣāṃtiḥ jana pīḍā ca māyi tvam api amaṃgalam kṣata vrata tvam nāstikyam veda niṃdā kaṭhora tā daṃbhaḥ śāṭhyam ca dhaurtyam ca kaṭuka uktiḥ pramāda tā bhāryā mātṛ suta ādīnām tyāgaḥ ca a pūjya pūjanam śrāddha hāniḥ japa tyāgaḥ paṃcayajña vivarjanam saṃdhyā tarpaṇa homānām hāniḥ agneḥ praṇāśanam paiśunyam paradāreṣu dānam veśyā abhigāmi tā apātra dānam ca alpam ca mūlikākuli bhakṣaṇam antyaja āgamanam mātṛ tyāgaḥ pitṛ vivarjanam kṛṣi karma kriyā vāham bhāryā saṃgraha kāri tā iṃdriya ajaya māyi tvam vidyā vismaraṇam tathā śāstra tyāgaḥ ṛṇam citra karma ca anaṃga dhāvanam bhāryā putra suta ādīnām vikrayaḥ paśu maithunam taḍāga āgamane vṛttam vidyā vikraya kāri tā vṛtti lopaḥ mahīpāla yācaka tvam ku mitra tā bhrūṇa hatyā para annam ca śūdra annasya niṣevaṇam vidvadbhyaḥ yācaka tvam hi vācāṭa tvam pratigrahaḥ śrauta saṃskāra dīna tva mārta trāṇa vivarjanam guru dāra abhigāmi tvam saṃyogaḥ ca api taiḥ saha anye api vividhāḥ saṃti proktāḥ prādhānyataḥ tu amī tathā api ete na śakyaṃte vaktum yasmāt anaṃtakāḥ aparādha sahasrāṇi lakṣa koṭi śatāni ca naśyaṃti tad kṣaṇāt nūnam satyeśasya anupūjanāt vāmadevaḥ tatas pūrvam nṛsiṃhaḥ dakṣiṇe sthitaḥ kapilaḥ paścima āsye tu vārāhaḥ ca uttare sthitaḥ padma kaumodakī śaṃkha cakra āyudha vidhāraṇam vāme ca adhas tathā dakṣe ūrdhve paścāt adhas nṛpa pāda adhastāt viniṣkrāṃtā gaṃgā pūtā sadā nṛbhiḥ śakti aṣṭakam tathā ca anyat tad nāmāni ca me śṛṇu jayā ca vijayā ca eva jayaṃtī pāpa nāśinī unmīlinī vaṃjulī ca trispṛśā atha vivarddhanā śukla aṃbara dharam saumyam prahṛṣṭa vadanam śivam sarva ābharaṇa śobhā āḍhyam bhukti mukti pradam harim pūjayet ca prayatnena vidhinā yena tam śṛṇu mārgaśīrṣa ādi māseṣu dvādaśasu api sarvadā dvādaśyām api amāyām vai aṣṭamyām ca sita asite kṛta upavāsaḥ śuddha ātmā kuryāt vratam ataṃdritaḥ evam tu niyamam kṛtvā daṃta dhāvana pūrvakam gacchet tatas taḍāge vā puṣkariṇyām gṛhe api vā snātvā tu naityakam karma kṛtvā naimittikam tatas sauvarṇam kārayet devam pūrva uktam satya rūpiṇam śakti aṣṭaka yutam lakṣmyā yuktam padmāsana sthayā tad karṇikā gatam devam śakti vṛnda samanvitam śuddha śukla aṃbara dharaḥ maṃtra saṃbhāra saṃsthitaḥ om kṣīrasāgara kallole snāhi pāpa niṣūdana yajñopavīta dānena kuru mām sarva pāvanam satyanātha namaḥ tubhyam mūrta amūrta svarūpiṇe vāsudeva nṛsiṃha ākhya kapilā divya bhūdhara vārāha acyuta yajñeśa lakṣmīkāṃta nṛpa īśvara paśum putram ca me dehi pāpa śatro niraṃjana saṃkarṣaṇa mahā vīrya sarva īśa amita vikrama kṛṣṇa kṛṣṇa prabho rāma rāma kṛṣṇa vibho hare trāhi mām sarva duḥkhebhyaḥ ramayā saha mādhava pūjā ca iyam mayā dattā pitāmaha jagadguro gṛhāṇa jagat īśāna nārāyaṇa namaḥ astu te dhanam guptam mahīpāla sarva pāpa apanuttaye dānam dadyāt mahā rāja hi aśaktau tad abhāvataḥ saṃvatsare tatas pūrṇe kuryāt udyāpanam budhaḥ pūrvavat pūjayet evam bahu saṃbhāravi staraiḥ anujñām prārthayet viprān pāpa ghvaṃsaḥ mama astu vai tatas sarvam brāhmaṇāya samarpya ca kṣamāpayet tat phalam koṭi guṇitam vratasya asya niṣevaṇāt yaḥ paṭhet śṛṇuyāt vā api sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate aśaktaḥ tu tathā śaktaḥ vitta śāṭhya vivarjitaḥ kṛte vai kriyamāṇe tu kartā phalam avāpnuyāt aparādha śata agha ogham vratena anena nāśayet iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde aparādhaśatavratavarṇanam nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ kāñcana vrata varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca vāsudevam jagannātham sthiti saṃyama kārakam parāvarāṇām sraṣṭāram purāṇam param avyayam ādidevam jagannātham jagataḥ kāraṇa ātma kam lakṣmīḥ provāca rāja indra pāda saṃvāhane sthitā praṣṭavyam kiñcid icchāmi praṣṭum praśna vidām vara prakuruṣva mahābhāga dayām kṛtvā mama upari uttamam sarva varṇānām vratānām api ca uttamam viṣṇuḥ uvāca gṛhasthaḥ ca āśramāṇām ca varṇānām brāhmaṇaḥ yathā yathā nadīṣu sarvāsu jāhnavī loka viśrutā hradānām udadhiḥ śreṣṭhaḥ devānām viṣṇuḥ uttamaḥ strīṇām devāḥ yathā lakṣmīḥ tathā idam vratam uttamam na gaṅgā na kurukṣetram na kāśī na ca puṣkaram gauryā devyā kṛtam pūrvam śaṃkareṇa mahātmanā rāmeṇa sītayā sārddham rājyam prāpya kṛtam purā kṛṣṇayā sahitaiḥ pārtha pāṃḍavaiḥ vana vāsibhiḥ raṃbhayā menayā vā api paulomyā satyabhāmayā śāṃḍilyā ca api arundhatyā urvaśyā devadattayā kṛtam vratam idam bhadram saubhāgya sukha kāmyayā pātāle nāga kanyābhiḥ kṛtam etat su śobhanam gāyatryā ca sarasvatyā sāvitryā brahma bhāryayā anyābhiḥ sarva nārībhiḥ sarva kāma phala īpsubhiḥ tasmāt te aham pravakṣyāmi sarva pāpa praṇāśanam vasu prīti karam ramyam vratānām paramam śṛṇu brahma hā mucyate pāpāt surāpaḥ vasu hārakaḥ guru bhāryā abhigāmī ca hi eteṣām saṃgamī ca yaḥ māna kūṭam tulā kūṭam kanyā vṛttiḥ gavām vratī agamyā gamanaḥ yaḥ tu māṃsa āśī vṛṣalī patiḥ kuṇḍa agni bhojī yaḥ tu syāt bhūbhiḥ hartā tathā eva ca ebhiḥ sarvaiḥ mahā pāpaiḥ mucyate na atra saṃśayaḥ kāñcana ākhyā purī nāma vratam trailokya viśrutam yaḥ karoti naraḥ devi nārī vā bhakti saṃyutā tasmin māse ca kartavyā kāñcana ākhyā purī śubhā saṃkrāṃtiḥ vā mahābhāge kuhūḥ vā ca aṣṭamī tithiḥ parvasu anyeṣu sarveṣu dātavyā kāñcanī purī vratī snātvā tu pūrvāhṇe nadī ādau vimale jale mṛttikā ālaṃbhanam kāryam maṃtreṇa anena suvrate uddhṛtā asi yathāpūrvam viṣṇunā kroḍa rūpiṇā lokānām upakāra artham vandanāt siddhi kāma dā tasmāt tvam vaṃditā pāpam hara me aneka janma jam tu hi sānnidhyam tīrtha sahitam kartavyam mama sāṃpratam anena vidhinā snātvā yajamānaḥ samāhitaḥ gṛham āgamya śuddha ātmā na alapan piśunān tu pākhaṃḍinaḥ vikarma sthān dhūrtān ca kitavāt śaṭhān prakṣālya pāṇi vadanam kuryāt tu ācamanam tatas dvādaśa akṣara maṃtreṇa tat jalam ca abhimaṃtrayet śamī vṛkṣa mayā vedī catur staṃbha samanvitā catur hasta pramāṇena kāryyā ca eva su śobhanā vastreṇa āveṣṭitāḥ stambhāḥ vitāna vara maṇḍitāḥ puṣpa mālā anvitāḥ kāryāḥ divya dhūpa adhivāsitāḥ madhye tu maṃḍalam kāryam padma ākhyam varṇakaiḥ śubhaiḥ yena dṛṣṭena deveśi sarva pāpa kṣayaḥ bhavet agre tu kalaśaḥ kāryaḥ jala pūrṇaḥ su śobhanaḥ kṣīrasāgara nāmā sa kalpitavyaḥ prayatnataḥ pañcaratna samāyuktam tasya upariṣṭāt saṃsthāpya kāṃcana ākhyām purīm śubhām catuṣpalā hi uttamā syāt dvi palā madhyamā smṛtā sāmānya eka palā kāryā kalaśaiḥ tu samanvitā modakān sthāpayet divyān samaṃtāt suṃdara ākṛtīn cātuścaraṇikān tatra viprān āvāhya suṃdari pratiṣṭhām kārayet tasya veda mantraiḥ su śobhanaiḥ tasyāḥ madhye nyaset viṣṇum haimam lakṣmyā samanvitam netre ratna maye kārye daśanāḥ vajra bhūṣitāḥ muktāphala mayam tasya bhūṣaṇam parikalpayet aṃgam svarṇa mayam kāryam śaṃkha cakra gadā āyudham pañcāmṛtena deveśam snāpya nārāyaṇam vibhum śeṣāḥ varṇāḥ purāṇa uktaiḥ tān śṛṇuṣva mama priye vāsudevāya pādau tu gulphau saṃkarṣaṇāya ca trailokya nāthāya guhye jñāna mayāya vai kaṭim dāmodarāya iti udaram hṛdayam viśva rūpiṇe nityam hi pūjayet devi uraḥ śrīvatsa dhāriṇe kaṇṭham kaustubha nāthāya āsyam yajña mukhāya ca daitya aṃta kāriṇe bāhū svaiḥ nāmaiḥ āyudhāni ca śriyam prapūjayet devīm devyāḥ maṃtraiḥ pṛthagvidhaiḥ indra ādi lokapālānām pūjā kāryā yathākramam nava grahāṇām homaḥ ca kartavyaḥ vighna nāśanaḥ pūjā gaṇapateḥ kāryā tathā homaḥ vidhānataḥ pāyasam ghṛtapūrān ca modakān pūrikāḥ tathā sohālika ādi naivedyam pheṇikāḥ śarkarāḥ tathā dīpān daśa diśaḥ dadyāt pārthivān raktavartikān etena tu viśāla akṣi mūlamantreṇa dāpayet puṣpa mālā anvitān kṛtvā caṃdanena vibhūṣitān sahasra śīrṣa ādibhiḥ maṃtraiḥ japadbhiḥ brāhmaṇa uttamaiḥ ṣoḍaśa atha sa patnīkān pūjayet ca yathāvidhi bhūṣayet ca śubhaiḥ vastraiḥ tathā alaṃkāraṇa ādibhiḥ viṣṇum matvā dvijaḥ pūjyaḥ lakṣmīm matvā ca brāhmaṇīm chatram ca upānahau ca eva aṃguli ābharaṇam tathā dātavyam ca sa bhāryāya kṛṣṇaḥ me prīyatām iti śayyām sa upaskarām ca eva vastreṇa ācchādya yatnataḥ purīm ghaṭāpayet pūrvam vastreṇa ācchādya yastaḥ yathā kuryāt prayāsena yathā kartā na paśyati dīpān tu dīpitān tatra ānayet yajña maṇḍapam śrutavān śāstra vid prājñaḥ kṛta sarva agha saṃkṣayaḥ ābadhya netre su prājñaḥ ācāryaḥ tam idam vadet sarva kāma pradām paśya kāṃcana ākhyām purīm imām vara vastra yutām ramyām duḥkha daurbhāgya nāśinīm puṣpa añjalim gurau kṣiptvā sa paśyet tām purīm śubhām dṛṣṭvā tām nagarīm devi yajamānaḥ samāhitaḥ sauvarṇam pātram ādāya raupyam tāmram atha api vā atha vā śaṃkham ādāya pātra alābhe tu sundari pañcaratnam kṣipet pātre jalam gāṅgam tathā phalam siddhārtham akṣatāḥ pūrvam rocanāḥ dadhi vā punar tatas ca ardhyam pradātavyam kṛṣṇāya prabhaviṣṇave lakṣmī nārāyaṇau devau sarva kāma phala pradau rukmapuryāḥ pradānena yaccha etām vāṃchitam mama nārāyaṇa hṛṣīkeśa jñāna jñeya niraṃjana lakṣmī kāṃta jagannātha gṛhāṇa arghyam namaḥ astu te jānubhyām avanim gatvā maṃtram etam udīrayet brahmaṇā pūjitā devī viṣṇunā śaṃkareṇa ca pārvatyā pūjitā lakṣmīḥ skaṃda vaiśravaṇena ca mayā ca pūjitā devi dharmasya vijigīṣayā saubhāgyam dehi me putrān dhanam pautrān ca pūjitān gṛhāṇa arghyam mayā dattam devi saukhyam prayaccha me rātrau jāgaraṇam kuryāt bhakti yuktena cetasā gīta nṛtya vinodena upākhyānaiḥ ca vaiṣṇavaiḥ unnidraḥ jāgṛyāt yaḥ tu śata yajña phalam labhet prabhāte vimale snātvā saṃpūjya pitṛ devatāḥ brāhmaṇān ca sa patnīkān paridhāpya anubhojayet dakṣiṇāḥ ca yathāśaktyā pradāya ca kṣamāpayet dīna aṃdha badhirān paṃgūn sarvān tān paritoṣayet paścāt pāraṇakam kāryam upavāsī bhavet yadi madhuram payasā yuktam suhṛdbhiḥ bāṃdhavaiḥ saha evam etat vratam kāryam ekādaśyām śuci smite śuklāyām atha kṛṣṇāyām tṛtīyāyām tathā tithau saṃkrānti vāsare vā api vyatīpāte ca vaidhṛtau yadā vā jāyate vittam cittam ca varavarṇini gauḥ ānīya pradātavyā kṛṣṇaḥ me prīyatām iti evam kṛte ca yat puṇyam tat na śakyam niveditum kalpa koṭi sahasrāṇi kalpa koṭi śatāni ca indra ādi lokapālānām vratī lokam avāpnuyāt tatas bhuktvā śuciḥ śrīmān bhogān trailokya suṃdari yaḥ idam śṛṇuyāt nityam vācayamānam samaṃtataḥ tvayā kāṃcanapurī ākhyam vratam etat kṛtam purā iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī lakṣmī viṣṇu saṃvāde kāṃcanapurīvratavarṇanam nāma saptacatvāriṃśaduttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca sapta pūrvān bhaviṣyān ca sva kule sapta mānavān lokān āpnoti ca tathā dakṣasya eva prajāpateḥ prājāpatyena vidhinā ātmānam ca samuddharet bhū gavāśva pradānāni gaja dānam tathā eva ca bahu varṣa sahasrāṇi purīṣam kākam aśnute śulkena dattvā kanyām ca ghoram narakam āpnuyāt bahūni abda sahasrāṇi tathā aśuci bhuj naraḥ savarṇām ca savarṇebhyaḥ dadyāt kanyām yathāvidhi dattvā ca adhika varṇāya dviguṇam nirguṇam tathā dvija putram anātham vā saṃskuryāt yaḥ ca karmabhiḥ cūḍā upanaya ādyaiḥ ca saḥ aśvamedha phalam labhet anāthām kanyakām dattvā nāka loke mahīyate kanyā dānāt avāpnoti dakṣa lokam narottama viṣṇu pūjā samam puṇyam tat kanyā pūjayā bhavet vimānam āhṛtya manobhirāmam sura aṅganā gīta vilāsa hṛdyam prāpnoti lokam tridaśa uttamānām kanyā pradānāt na vicāraṇā iti iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde kanyāpradānavarṇanam nāma aṣṭacatvāriṃśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ brāhmaṇa śuśrūṣā vidhi varṇanam śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca brāhmaṇāḥ daivatam bhūmau brāhmaṇāḥ divi daivatam brāhmaṇebhyaḥ param na asti na asti bhūtam jagattraye brāhmaṇāḥ hi mahābhāgāḥ pūjyaṃte satatam dvijāḥ brāhmaṇebhyaḥ samutpannāḥ devāḥ pūrvam iti smṛtiḥ brāhmaṇebhyaḥ jagat sarvam tasmāt pūjyatamāḥ dvijāḥ yeṣām aśnaṃti vaktreṇa devatāḥ pitaraḥ tathā ṛṣayaḥ ca tathā nāgāḥ kim bhūtam adhikam tatas tālavṛṃta anilena eva śrāṃta saṃvāhanena ca utsādanena gātrāṇām tathā vyaṃjana karmaṇā an iṣṭvā api samāpnoti svarga lokam ca śāśvatam brāhmaṇānām śubham kṛtvā nāka loke mahīyate yat brāhmaṇāḥ tuṣṭimantaḥ vadaṃti pratyakṣa deveṣu parokṣa devāḥ iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde brāhmaṇaśuśrūṣāvidhivarṇanam nāma ekonapaṃcāśat uttara śatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca yuṣmad vākya amṛtam idam hi aham śṛṇvan janārdana na tṛptim adhigacchāmi jātam kautūhalam hi me tasmāt govṛṣa kalpasya vidhānam kathaya acyuta śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca vṛṣa dāna phalam puṇyam śṛṇuṣva kathayāmi te pavitram pāvanam ca eva sarva dāna uttamam tathā voḍhā ca cāru pṛṣṭha aṃgaḥ hi arogaḥ pāṃḍu naṃdana yuvā bhadraḥ sarva doṣa vivarjitaḥ trātā bhavati saṃsārāt na atra kāryā vicāraṇā alaṃkṛtya vṛṣam śāṃtam puṇyehni samupasthite raupya lāḍgūla saṃyuktam brāhmaṇāya nivedayet maṃtreṇa anena rāja indra tam śṛṇuṣva vadāmi te dharmaḥ tvam vṛṣa rūpeṇa jaga dānaṃda kāraka aṣṭamūrteḥ adhiṣṭhānam atas pāhi sanātana sapta janma kṛtam pāpam vāc manaḥ kāya karma jam yānam vṛṣabha saṃyuktam dīpyamānam su śobhitam yāvaṃti tasya romāṇi go vṛṣasya mahīpate tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi gavām loke mahīyate yajña yājī mahā tejāḥ sarva brāhmaṇa pūjitaḥ tava uktam vai mahā rāja kasya deyaḥ vṛṣottamaḥ tat api aham te vakṣyāmi pātram trāṇa pradam nṛṇām yeṣām sadā vai śruti pūrṇa karṇāḥ jita indriyāḥ prāṇi vadhe nivṛttāḥ pratigrahe saṃkucitāḥ gṛhasthāḥ te brāhmaṇāḥ tārayitum samarthāḥ gātre dṛḍham bhāra saham su puṣṭam su śṛṅgiṇam sarva guṇa upapannam iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde vṛṣadānavidhivarṇanam nāma paṃcāśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca śrutaḥ purāṇa viṣayaḥ tvad prasādāt mayā acyuta saṃsāra asāra tām jñātvā śrutaḥ ca vrata vistaraḥ bhūyas ca śrotum icchāmi dāna māhātmyam uttamam kim dīyate kadā kṛṣṇa kena upāyena śaṃsa me dhanam dhanavatām kiñcid ahāryam rāja taskaraiḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca anītam yāti ca adhvānam dhanam vipra kara arpitam kim kāyena su puṣṭena balinā cira jīvinā yasya trivarga śūnyāni dināni āyāṃti yāṃti ca dīnāḥ niraśanāḥ rūkṣāḥ kapāla aṅkita pāṇayaḥ te dṛśyaṃte mahā rāja jāyamānā punar āyāsa śata labdhasya prāṇebhyaḥ api garīyasaḥ na upabhogaiḥ kṣayam yāṃti na pradānaiḥ samṛddhayaḥ pūrva arjitānām anyatra su kṛtānām parikṣayāt yasmāt mṛtasya tat na asti tasmāt sāṃśayikam varam dānāni bahu rūpāṇi kathayāmi tava anagha vyāsa vālmīki manu ādyaiḥ kathitāni purā mama yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca brāhmaṇa prīṇana arthāya keśavasya śivasya ca yāni dānāni deyāni tāni ācakṣya yadu uttama śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca trīṇi āhuḥ atidānāni gāvaḥ pṛthvī sarasvatī go dānam ādau vakṣyāmi pratyakṣa krama yogataḥ yudhiṣṭhiraḥ uvāca deyāḥ kiṃlakṣaṇāḥ gāvaḥ kāḥ ca rājan vivarjitāḥ kīdṛśāya pradātavyāḥ na deyāḥ kīdṛśāya vai śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca taruṇī rūpa saṃpannā su śīlā ca payasvinī nyāya arjitā sa vatsā ca pradeyā śrotriyāya gauḥ vṛddhā sa rogā hīna aṃgī vaṃdhyā duṣṭā mṛta prajā sā dattā eva haret pāpam śrotriyāya āhitāgnaye atithi priyāya dāṃtāya dhenum dadyāt guṇa adhike akulīnāya mūrkhāya lubdhāya piśunāya ca śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca puṇyam dinam atha āsādya snātvā ātarpya pitṛrn tathā ghṛta kṣīra abhiṣekam ca kṛtvā viṣṇoḥ śivasya ca udak mukhīm prāc mukhīm vā gṛṣṭim kṛtvā payasvinīm sa vatsām vastra saṃvītām sita yajña upavītinīm svarṇa śṛṅgīm raupya khurām kāṃsya dohanaka anvitām śaktitas dakṣiṇā yuktām brāhmaṇāya nivedayet pucche kṛṣṇājinam deyam gām pucche kariṇam kare aśvam sadā su karṇe vā dāsīm śirasi dāpayet gāvaḥ mama agratas saṃtu gāvaḥ me saṃtu pṛṣṭhatas gāvaḥ me hṛdaye saṃtu gavām madhye vasāmi aham pradakṣiṇām tatas kṛtvā dhenum dvijavarāya tām imām ca pratigṛhṇīṣva dhenuḥ dattā mayā tava sapta pūrvān sapta parān ātmānam ca eva mānavaḥ sarva kāma pradā sā syāt sarva kāleṣu pārthiva bhavati asau pāpa harā yāvat iṃdrāḥ caturdaśa sarveṣām eva pāpānām kṛtānām api jānatā prāyaścittam idam proktam anutāpa upabṛṃhitam sarveṣām eva dānānām eka janma anugam phalam brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ vaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ ca anyaiḥ ca mānavaiḥ lokāḥ kāma gamā prāptāḥ dattvā etat vidhinā nṛpa iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde pratyakṣadhenudānavratavidhivarṇanam nāma ekapaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca atha atas saṃpravakṣyāmi dhenūnām kalpanāḥ nṛpa viśeṣa vidhinā yāḥ ca deyāḥ kāmān abhīpsubhiḥ kāmam yat dīyate dānam samagram tat sukha āvaham tasmāt na dakṣiṇā hīnam vidhāna vikalam tathā deyam dānam mahā rāja samagra phala kāmyayā anyathā dīyamānam tat ahaṃkārāya kevalam pratyakṣam ca artha hāniḥ syāt na vā tat phala dam bhavet tiladhenum pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu pārthiva sattama vārāheṇa purā proktām mahā pātaka nāśinīm yām dattvā brahma hā go ghnaḥ pitṛ hā gurutalpa gaḥ agāra dāhī garadaḥ sarva pāpa rataḥ api vā mahāpātaka yuktaḥ ca saṃyuktaḥ ca upapātakaiḥ anulipte mahī pṛṣṭhe kṛṣṇājina samāvṛte dhenum tila mayīm kṛtvā darbhān āstīrya sarvatas tilāḥ śvetāḥ tilāḥ kṛṣṇāḥ tilāḥ go mūtra varṇakāḥ tilānām ca vicitrāṇām dhenum sarvām ca kārayet droṇasya vatsakam kuryāt catur āḍhakikām ca gām svarṇa śṛṃgīm raupya khurām gandha varṇavatīm tathā kāryā śarkarayā jihvā guḍena āsyam ca kambalaḥ ikṣu pādām tāmra pṛṣṭhīm śukti muktāphala īkṣaṇām praśasta patra śravaṇām phala daṃtavatīm śubhām sraj dāma pucchām kurvīta nava nīta stana anvitām sita vastra śirā ālambām sita sarṣapa romikām īdṛś saṃsthāna sampannām kṛtvā śraddhā samanvitaḥ kāṃsya upadohanām dadyāt parva kāle samāgate yā lakṣmīḥ sarva bhūtānām yā vai deveṣu avasthitā dhenu rūpeṇa sā devī mama pāpam vyapohatu tatas pradakṣiṇām kṛtvā pūjayitvā praṇamya ca yaḥ ca gṛhṇāti vidhivat dīyamānām pramodate dīyamānām praśaṃsaṃti ye ca saṃhṛṣṭa mānasāḥ praśāṃtāya su śīlāya veda vrata ratāya ca dhenum tila mayīm dattvā na śocati kṛta akṛte dānāt viśuddhiḥ pāpasya tasya puṇyavataḥ nṛpa cāndrāyaṇāt abhyadhikam kathitam tila bhakṣaṇam vācā kṛtam tu manasā karmaṇā yat ca saṃcitam muśalena udyate nā api laṃbite brāhmaṇe tathā vṛṣalī gamane ca eva guru dāra abhigāmini surā pānena yat pāpam abhakṣyasya ca bhakṣaṇāt yama mārge mahā ghore nadī vaitaraṇī smṛtā vālukāyāḥ sthalam ca eva pacyate yatra pāpinaḥ yatra loha mukhāḥ kākāḥ yatra śvānaḥ bhaya āvahāḥ nikṛtya pāpinām māṃsam bhakṣayaṃti bubhukṣitāḥ asipatravanam ca eva lohakaṃṭaka śālmalīm vimāne kāṃcane divye maṇi ratna vibhūṣite guṇa hīne na dātavyāḥ na dātavyāḥ dhana īśvare ekā ekasya dātavyā munibhiḥ kathitam purā idam puṇyam pavitram ca māṅgalyam kīrti vardhanam viprāṇām śrāvayet śrāddhe ananta phalam aśnute vibhajyamānāni etāni dātāram pātayaṃti adhas asyāḥ dāna prabhāvena vimānam sarvakāmikam eṣā ca eva pradātavyā prayatena antarātmanā paurṇamāsyām ca māghasya kārtikyām ca eva bhārata ṣaḍaśīti mukhe ca eva vyatīpāte tu sarvadā vaiśākhyām mārgaśīrṣyām vā gaja chāyāsu ca eva hi yāvaṃti dhenoḥ romaṇi gātreṣu nṛpa puṅgava tāvat varṣa sahasrāṇi tadā svarge mahīyate yaḥ ca gṛhṇāti vidhivat dīyamānām ca paśyati kṛtvā yathā ukta racanām kṛta cāru vatsām yacchaṃti te bhuvi bhavanti vimukta pāpāḥ pratigṛhṇāmi devi tvām kuṭuṃba bharaṇāya ca kāmam deyā dayā asmabhyam dheno tvam sarvadā hi asi iti śrī bhaviṣye mahāpurāṇe uttara parvaṇi śrī kṛṣṇa yudhiṣṭhira saṃvāde tila dhenudānavratavidhivarṇanam nāma dvipaṃcāśaduttaraśatatamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī kṛṣṇaḥ uvāca jaladhenum pravakṣyāmi prīyate dattayā yayā devadevaḥ hṛṣīkeśaḥ pūjitaḥ sarva bhāvanaḥ caturbhiḥ saṃyutam raupyam tila pātraiḥ caturdiśam sa vatsām ca pratiṣṭhāpya gomayena upaśobhitām sraj dāma pucchīm kurvīta tāmra dohanaka anvitām puṣpa dhūpa upahāraiḥ ca yathāvibhavam ātmanaḥ viṣṇoḥ vakṣasi yā lakṣmīḥ svāhā yā ca vibhāvasoḥ soma śakra arka śaktiḥ yā dhenu rūpeṇa sā astu me bhaktyā saṃpūjya goviṃdam jalaśāyinam acyutam sita vastra dharaḥ śāṃtaḥ vīta rāgaḥ vimatsaraḥ dadyāt viprāya rāja indra prīti artham jalaśāyinaḥ śeṣa paryaṃka śayanaḥ śrīmān śārṅga vibhūṣitaḥ jalaśāyī jagadyoniḥ prīyatām mama keśavaḥ sarva bhogān avāpnoti ye divyāḥ ye ca mānuṣāḥ śarīra ārogyam atulam praśamaḥ sarvakālikaḥ nṛṇām bhavanti dattāyām sarve kāmāḥ na saṃśayaḥ atrā api śrūyate bhūpa mudgale na mahātmanā dadarśa yātanān ekāḥ pāpa karma kṛtām nṛṇām dīpta agni tīkṣṇa yantra sthāḥ kvātha taila mayāḥ tathā uṣṇa kṣāra nadī pātāḥ bhairavāḥ puruṣa ṛṣabha vraṇa kṣāra nipātaḥ utha kumbhīpāka mahā ālayāḥ tāḥ dṛṣṭvā yātanāḥ vipraḥ cakāra paramām kṛpām āhlādam te tadā jagmuḥ pāpāḥ tad anukaṃpayā tam dṛṣṭvā nārakāḥ kecid sthitvā tad avalokinaḥ dharmarājam sa papraccha teṣām praśama kāraṇam tasmai ca ācaṣṭa rāja indra tadā vaivasvataḥ yamaḥ āhlāda hetum adhikam nārakāṇām narottama dāna anubhāvāt sarveṣām nārakāṇām dvijottama saṃpravṛtaḥ ayam āhlādaḥ kāraṇam tat śṛṇu sva me tvayā abhyarcya jagannātham sarveśam jalaśāyinam tasya dānasya te vyuṣṭiḥ iyam āhlāda dāyinī ye tvām paśyaṃti śṛṇvaṃti ye ca dhyāyaṃti mānavāḥ śṛṇoṣi yān ca vipra indra yān ca dhyāyasi paśyasi nivṛttiḥ paramā teṣām sarva āhlāda pradāyinī āhlāda hetu jananam nā asti vipra indra tādṛśam jaladhenuḥ yathā nṛṇām janmāni ekonaviṃśatim yeṣām samāśrayaḥ kṛṣṇe na niyamyāḥ hi te mayā kṛṣṇaḥ tu pūjitaḥ yaiḥ tu ye kṛṣṇa artham upoṣitāḥ yaiḥ ca nityam smṛtaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ na te mad viṣaya upagāḥ namaḥ kṛṣṇa acyuta anaṃta vāsudeva iti udīritam ūcuḥ te nārakāḥ sarve vahni śastra arka bhīravaḥ namaḥ kṛṣṇāya haraye viṣṇave jiṣṇave namaḥ hṛṣīkeśāya keśāya jagaddhātre acyutāya ca namaḥ paṅkaja netrāya namaḥ paṅkaja nābhaye janārdanāya śrīśāya śrī bhartre pīta vāsase goviṃdāya namaḥ nityam namaḥ ca udadhi śāyine namaḥ kamala netrāya nṛsiṃhāya ninādine śārṅgiṇe śita khaḍgāya śaṃkha cakra gadā bhṛte namaḥ vāmana rūpāya krānta loka trayāya ca varāha rūpāya tathā namaḥ yajña aṅga dhāriṇe vyāpta aśeṣa diś aṃtāya anaṃtāya paramātmane śastrāṇi kuṃṭha tām jagmuḥ analaḥ ca api śīta tām saṃśuṣkā kṣārasaritaḥ patitaḥ śālmali drumaḥ prakāśaḥ tamasaḥ jajñe narakāt bhānubhiḥ saha nirutsāhāḥ jaḍa dhiyaḥ babhūvuḥ yama kiṃkarāḥ jātāḥ gaṅgā ambu vāhinyaḥ pūya śauṇita nimnagāḥ veṇu vīṇā svana yutāḥ śabdāḥ ca āsan manoramāḥ tam tādṛśam atha ālakṣya tadā vaivasvataḥ yamaḥ kṣīṇa pāpa trayān tān tu pādya arghyaiḥ samapūjayat pūjayitvā ca tān āha kṛṣṇāya sa kṛta aṃjaliḥ praṇāmam ye api kurvanti teṣām api namaḥ namaḥ acyutāya aprameyāya māyā vāmana rūpiṇe praṇāmam ye api kurvanti teṣām api namaḥ namaḥ praṇāmam ye ca kurvanti teṣām api namaḥ namaḥ evam stutvā hṛṣīkeśam dharmarājasya paśyataḥ vimāna varam āruhya nārakāḥ tridivam yayuḥ saṃsmṛtya yama vākyāni viṣṇoḥ māhātmyam eva ca jaladhenoḥ tu māhātmyam saṃsmṛtya idam agāyata jīvaḥ gacchati kīṭa tvam yūkā matkuṇa yoni tām tasmāt druma latā ādīnām yonim tasmāt ca pakṣiṇām tatas ca paśu tām prāpya nara tvam abhivāṃchati tatas manuṣya tām prāpya naraḥ yonim kṛtātmanām tām prāpya ca śriyam parām naraḥ māyā vimohitaḥ dustarā api su sādhyā sā māyā kṛṣṇasya mohinī chinatti vaiṣṇavīm
